title: B-BACN: Bayesian Boundary-Aware Convolutional Network for Crack Characterization
title_zh: B-BACN：用于裂纹表征的贝叶斯边界感知卷积网络
abstract: Accurately detecting crack boundaries is crucial for reliability assessment and risk management of structures and materials, such as structural health monitoring, diagnostics, prognostics, and maintenance scheduling. Uncertainty quantification of crack detection is challenging due to various stochastic factors, such as measurement noises, signal processing, and model simplifications. A machine learning-based approach is proposed to quantify both epistemic and aleatoric uncertainties concurrently. We introduce a Bayesian Boundary-Aware Convolutional Network (B-BACN) that emphasizes uncertainty-aware boundary refinement to generate precise and reliable crack boundary detections. The proposed method employs a multi-task learning approach, where we use Monte Carlo Dropout to learn the epistemic uncertainty and a Gaussian sampling function to predict each sample's aleatoric uncertainty. Moreover, we include a boundary refinement loss to B-BACN to enhance the determination of defect boundaries. The proposed method is demonstrated with benchmark experimental results and compared with several existing methods. The experimental results illustrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach in uncertainty-aware crack boundary detection, minimizing misclassification rate, and improving model calibration capabilities.
summary: Accurately detecting crack boundaries is crucial for reliability assessment and risk management of structures and materials, such as structural health monitoring, diagnostics, prognostics, and maintenance scheduling. Uncertainty quantification of crack detection is challenging due to various stochastic factors, such as measurement noises, signal processing, and model simplifications. A machine learning-based approach is proposed to quantify both epistemic and aleatoric uncertainties concurrently. We introduce a Bayesian Boundary-Aware Convolutional Network (B-BACN) that emphasizes uncertainty-aware boundary refinement to generate precise and reliable crack boundary detections. The proposed method employs a multi-task learning approach, where we use Monte Carlo Dropout to learn the epistemic uncertainty and a Gaussian sampling function to predict each sample's aleatoric uncertainty. Moreover, we include a boundary refinement loss to B-BACN to enhance the determination of defect boundaries. The proposed method is demonstrated with benchmark experimental results and compared with several existing methods. The experimental results illustrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach in uncertainty-aware crack boundary detection, minimizing misclassification rate, and improving model calibration capabilities.
abstract_zh: 准确检测裂纹边界对于结构和材料的可靠性评估和风险管理至关重要，例如结构健康监测、诊断、预测和维护计划。由于测量噪声、信号处理和模型简化等各种随机因素，裂纹检测的不确定性量化具有挑战性。提出了一种基于机器学习的方法来同时量化认知不确定性和任意不确定性。我们引入了贝叶斯边界感知卷积网络（B-BACN），它强调不确定性感知边界细化，以生成精确可靠的裂纹边界检测。所提出的方法采用多任务学习方法，其中我们使用蒙特卡洛辍学来学习认知不确定性，并使用高斯采样函数来预测每个样本的任意不确定性。此外，我们还对 B-BACN 进行了边界细化损失，以增强缺陷边界的确定。所提出的方法通过基准实验结果进行了论证，并与几种现有方法进行了比较。实验结果说明了我们提出的方法在不确定性裂纹边界检测、最小化误分类率和提高模型校准能力方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种贝叶斯边界感知卷积网络（B-BACN），用于在裂纹检测中同时量化认识不确定性和偶然不确定性，以提高边界检测的精度和可靠性。
AI.motivation: 裂纹边界检测对结构健康监测至关重要，但现有方法难以有效处理测量噪声、信号处理及模型简化带来的不确定性量化问题。
AI.method: 采用多任务学习框架，结合蒙特卡洛Dropout估计认识不确定性，高斯采样预测偶然不确定性，并引入边界优化损失函数增强缺陷边界定位能力。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，B-BACN在基准测试中优于现有方法，有效降低了误分类率并提升了模型校准能力。
AI.conclusion: B-BACN通过不确定性感知的边界优化，为裂纹检测提供了更可靠的技术方案，具有实际工程应用价值。

authors_text: Shidong Cao,Wenhao Chai,Shengyu Hao,Yanting Zhang,Hangyue Chen,Gaoang Wang
title: DiffFashion: Reference-based Fashion Design with Structure-aware Transfer by Diffusion Models
title_zh: DiffFashion：基于参考的时装设计，通过扩散模型进行结构感知迁移
abstract: Image-based fashion design with AI techniques has attracted increasing attention in recent years. We focus on a new fashion design task, where we aim to transfer a reference appearance image onto a clothing image while preserving the structure of the clothing image. It is a challenging task since there are no reference images available for the newly designed output fashion images. Although diffusion-based image translation or neural style transfer (NST) has enabled flexible style transfer, it is often difficult to maintain the original structure of the image realistically during the reverse diffusion, especially when the referenced appearance image greatly differs from the common clothing appearance. To tackle this issue, we present a novel diffusion model-based unsupervised structure-aware transfer method to semantically generate new clothes from a given clothing image and a reference appearance image. In specific, we decouple the foreground clothing with automatically generated semantic masks by conditioned labels. And the mask is further used as guidance in the denoising process to preserve the structure information. Moreover, we use the pre-trained vision Transformer (ViT) for both appearance and structure guidance. Our experimental results show that the proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art baseline models, generating more realistic images in the fashion design task. Code and demo can be found at https://github.com/Rem105-210/DiffFashion.
summary: Image-based fashion design with AI techniques has attracted increasing attention in recent years. We focus on a new fashion design task, where we aim to transfer a reference appearance image onto a clothing image while preserving the structure of the clothing image. It is a challenging task since there are no reference images available for the newly designed output fashion images. Although diffusion-based image translation or neural style transfer (NST) has enabled flexible style transfer, it is often difficult to maintain the original structure of the image realistically during the reverse diffusion, especially when the referenced appearance image greatly differs from the common clothing appearance. To tackle this issue, we present a novel diffusion model-based unsupervised structure-aware transfer method to semantically generate new clothes from a given clothing image and a reference appearance image. In specific, we decouple the foreground clothing with automatically generated semantic masks by conditioned labels. And the mask is further used as guidance in the denoising process to preserve the structure information. Moreover, we use the pre-trained vision Transformer (ViT) for both appearance and structure guidance. Our experimental results show that the proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art baseline models, generating more realistic images in the fashion design task. Code and demo can be found at https://github.com/Rem105-210/DiffFashion.
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于图像的人工智能技术的时装设计越来越受到关注。我们专注于一项新的时装设计任务，旨在将参考外观图像转移到服装图像上，同时保留服装图像的结构。这是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为没有可用于新设计的输出时尚图像的参考图像。尽管基于扩散的图像翻译或神经风格迁移（NST）已经实现了灵活的风格迁移，但在反向扩散过程中通常很难真实地保持图像的原始结构，特别是当参考的外观图像与常见的服装外观有很大不同时。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于扩散模型的新型无监督结构感知传输方法，可以根据给定的服装图像和参考外观图像在语义上生成新衣服。具体来说，我们通过条件标签将前景服装与自动生成的语义掩模解耦。并且掩模进一步用作去噪过程中的指导以保留结构信息。此外，我们使用预训练的视觉 Transformer (ViT) 进行外观和结构指导。我们的实验结果表明，所提出的方法优于最先进的基线模型，在时装设计任务中生成更真实的图像。代码和演示可以在 https://github.com/Rem105-210/DiffFashion 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于扩散模型的结构感知迁移方法，通过参考图像生成新的服装设计，同时保持原始服装结构。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的图像翻译或神经风格迁移方法难以在反向扩散过程中真实保留原始图像结构，尤其当参考图像与常见服装外观差异较大时。
AI.method: 通过条件标签自动生成语义掩码分离前景服装，并在去噪过程中利用掩码作为引导以保留结构信息，结合预训练视觉Transformer实现外观与结构双重引导。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在服装设计任务中生成的图像比现有最先进模型更真实，代码和演示已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了结构保留难题，为基于AI的服装设计提供了新思路。

authors_text: Davide Sapienza,Elena Govi,Sara Aldhaheri,Marko Bertogna,Eloy Roura,Èric Pairet,Micaela Verucchi,Paola Ardón
title: Model-Based Underwater 6D Pose Estimation from RGB
title_zh: 基于模型的水下 6D 姿态估计（RGB）
abstract: Object pose estimation underwater allows an autonomous system to perform tracking and intervention tasks. Nonetheless, underwater target pose estimation is remarkably challenging due to, among many factors, limited visibility, light scattering, cluttered environments, and constantly varying water conditions. An approach is to employ sonar or laser sensing to acquire 3D data, however, the data is not clear and the sensors expensive. For this reason, the community has focused on extracting pose estimates from RGB input. In this work, we propose an approach that leverages 2D object detection to reliably compute 6D pose estimates in different underwater scenarios. We test our proposal with 4 objects with symmetrical shapes and poor texture spanning across 33,920 synthetic and 10 real scenes. All objects and scenes are made available in an open-source dataset that includes annotations for object detection and pose estimation. When benchmarking against similar end-to-end methodologies for 6D object pose estimation, our pipeline provides estimates that are 8% more accurate. We also demonstrate the real world usability of our pose estimation pipeline on an underwater robotic manipulator in a reaching task.
summary: Object pose estimation underwater allows an autonomous system to perform tracking and intervention tasks. Nonetheless, underwater target pose estimation is remarkably challenging due to, among many factors, limited visibility, light scattering, cluttered environments, and constantly varying water conditions. An approach is to employ sonar or laser sensing to acquire 3D data, however, the data is not clear and the sensors expensive. For this reason, the community has focused on extracting pose estimates from RGB input. In this work, we propose an approach that leverages 2D object detection to reliably compute 6D pose estimates in different underwater scenarios. We test our proposal with 4 objects with symmetrical shapes and poor texture spanning across 33,920 synthetic and 10 real scenes. All objects and scenes are made available in an open-source dataset that includes annotations for object detection and pose estimation. When benchmarking against similar end-to-end methodologies for 6D object pose estimation, our pipeline provides estimates that are 8% more accurate. We also demonstrate the real world usability of our pose estimation pipeline on an underwater robotic manipulator in a reaching task.
abstract_zh: 水下物体姿态估计允许自主系统执行跟踪和干预任务。尽管如此，由于能见度有限、光散射、杂乱的环境和不断变化的水条件等诸多因素，水下目标姿态估计非常具有挑战性。一种方法是利用声纳或激光传感来获取3D数据，但数据不清晰且传感器价格昂贵。因此，社区重点关注从 RGB 输入中提取姿势估计。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种利用 2D 对象检测来可靠地计算不同水下场景中的 6D 姿态估计的方法。我们使用 4 个具有对称形状和较差纹理的对象来测试我们的建议，跨越 33,920 个合成场景和 10 个真实场景。所有对象和场景都在开源数据集中提供，其中包括用于对象检测和姿势估计的注释。当针对 6D 物体姿态估计的类似端到端方法进行基准测试时，我们的流程提供的估计准确度提高了 8%。我们还展示了我们的姿态估计管道在水下机器人操纵器上执行任务时的真实可用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于RGB图像的水下6D姿态估计方法，通过2D目标检测实现复杂水下环境中的可靠姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 水下目标姿态估计面临能见度低、光线散射等挑战，传统传感器成本高且数据质量差，需开发基于RGB的高效解决方案。
AI.method: 利用2D目标检测模型结合对称物体特性，通过合成与真实场景数据训练，构建开源数据集并验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 在33,920个合成及10个真实场景中，姿态估计准确率较同类方法提升8%，并在水下机械臂抓取任务中验证了实用性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在复杂水下环境中表现出更高的姿态估计精度与鲁棒性，开源数据集为后续研究提供了重要支持。

search_text: Model-Based Underwater 6D Pose Estimation from RGB 基于模型的水下 6D 姿态估计（RGB） Object pose estimation underwater allows an autonomous system to perform tracking and intervention tasks. Nonetheless, underwater target pose estimation is remarkably challenging due to, among many factors, limited visibility, light scattering, cluttered environments, and constantly varying water conditions. An approach is to employ sonar or laser sensing to acquire 3D data, however, the data is not clear and the sensors expensive. For this reason, the community has focused on extracting pose estimates from RGB input. In this work, we propose an approach that leverages 2D object detection to reliably compute 6D pose estimates in different underwater scenarios. We test our proposal with 4 objects with symmetrical shapes and poor texture spanning across 33,920 synthetic and 10 real scenes. All objects and scenes are made available in an open-source dataset that includes annotations for object detection and pose estimation. When benchmarking against similar end-to-end methodologies for 6D object pose estimation, our pipeline provides estimates that are 8% more accurate. We also demonstrate the real world usability of our pose estimation pipeline on an underwater robotic manipulator in a reaching task. 水下物体姿态估计允许自主系统执行跟踪和干预任务。尽管如此，由于能见度有限、光散射、杂乱的环境和不断变化的水条件等诸多因素，水下目标姿态估计非常具有挑战性。一种方法是利用声纳或激光传感来获取3D数据，但数据不清晰且传感器价格昂贵。因此，社区重点关注从 RGB 输入中提取姿势估计。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种利用 2D 对象检测来可靠地计算不同水下场景中的 6D 姿态估计的方法。我们使用 4 个具有对称形状和较差纹理的对象来测试我们的建议，跨越 33,920 个合成场景和 10 个真实场景。所有对象和场景都在开源数据集中提供，其中包括用于对象检测和姿势估计的注释。当针对 6D 物体姿态估计的类似端到端方法进行基准测试时，我们的流程提供的估计准确度提高了 8%。我们还展示了我们的姿态估计管道在水下机器人操纵器上执行任务时的真实可用性。 本文提出一种基于RGB图像的水下6D姿态估计方法，通过2D目标检测实现复杂水下环境中的可靠姿态估计。 Davide Sapienza,Elena Govi,Sara Aldhaheri,Marko Bertogna,Eloy Roura,Èric Pairet,Micaela Verucchi,Paola Ardón cs.RO,cs.CV

title: Masked Multi-Step Probabilistic Forecasting for Short-to-Mid-Term Electricity Demand
title_zh: 中短期电力需求的隐蔽多步概率预测
comment: Accepted by the 2023 IEEE Power & Energy Society General Meeting (PESGM). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2209.14413
comments: Accepted by the 2023 IEEE Power & Energy Society General Meeting (PESGM). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2209.14413
abstract: Predicting the demand for electricity with uncertainty helps in planning and operation of the grid to provide reliable supply of power to the consumers. Machine learning (ML)-based demand forecasting approaches can be categorized into (1) sample-based approaches, where each forecast is made independently, and (2) time series regression approaches, where some historical load and other feature information is used. When making a short-to-mid-term electricity demand forecast, some future information is available, such as the weather forecast and calendar variables. However, in existing forecasting models this future information is not fully incorporated. To overcome this limitation of existing approaches, we propose Masked Multi-Step Multivariate Probabilistic Forecasting (MMMPF), a novel and general framework to train any neural network model capable of generating a sequence of outputs, that combines both the temporal information from the past and the known information about the future to make probabilistic predictions. Experiments are performed on a real-world dataset for short-to-mid-term electricity demand forecasting for multiple regions and compared with various ML methods. They show that the proposed MMMPF framework outperforms not only sample-based methods but also existing time-series forecasting models with the exact same base models. Models trainded with MMMPF can also generate desired quantiles to capture uncertainty and enable probabilistic planning for grid of the future.
summary: Predicting the demand for electricity with uncertainty helps in planning and operation of the grid to provide reliable supply of power to the consumers. Machine learning (ML)-based demand forecasting approaches can be categorized into (1) sample-based approaches, where each forecast is made independently, and (2) time series regression approaches, where some historical load and other feature information is used. When making a short-to-mid-term electricity demand forecast, some future information is available, such as the weather forecast and calendar variables. However, in existing forecasting models this future information is not fully incorporated. To overcome this limitation of existing approaches, we propose Masked Multi-Step Multivariate Probabilistic Forecasting (MMMPF), a novel and general framework to train any neural network model capable of generating a sequence of outputs, that combines both the temporal information from the past and the known information about the future to make probabilistic predictions. Experiments are performed on a real-world dataset for short-to-mid-term electricity demand forecasting for multiple regions and compared with various ML methods. They show that the proposed MMMPF framework outperforms not only sample-based methods but also existing time-series forecasting models with the exact same base models. Models trainded with MMMPF can also generate desired quantiles to capture uncertainty and enable probabilistic planning for grid of the future.
abstract_zh: 预测不确定的电力需求有助于电网的规划和运营，从而为消费者提供可靠的电力供应。基于机器学习（ML）的需求预测方法可以分为（1）基于样本的方法，其中每个预测都是独立进行的，以及（2）时间序列回归方法，其中使用一些历史负载和其他特征信息。在进行中短期电力需求预测时，可以获得一些未来信息，例如天气预报和日历变量。然而，在现有的预测模型中，这些未来信息并未完全纳入其中。为了克服现有方法的这一局限性，我们提出了掩蔽多步多元概率预测（MMMPF），这是一种新颖且通用的框架，用于训练能够生成输出序列的任何神经网络模型，该模型结合了过去的时间信息和有关未来的已知信息来进行概率预测。在真实数据集上进行了实验，用于多个地区的中短期电力需求预测，并与各种机器学习方法进行了比较。他们表明，所提出的 MMMPF 框架不仅优于基于样本的方法，而且优于具有完全相同基础模型的现有时间序列预测模型。使用 MMMPF 训练的模型还可以生成所需的分位数来捕获不确定性并实现未来电网的概率规划。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型框架MMMPF，用于结合历史数据和未来信息进行短期至中期电力需求的概率预测。
AI.motivation: 现有电力需求预测模型未能充分利用天气预报等未来信息，导致预测精度不足。
AI.method: 设计Masked Multi-Step Multivariate Probabilistic Forecasting框架，通过掩码机制整合历史时序数据与已知未来变量，训练生成序列输出的神经网络模型。
AI.result: 在多地区真实数据集上实验表明，MMMPF框架在相同基础模型下优于样本级方法和传统时间序列模型，并能生成可靠分位数捕捉不确定性。
AI.conclusion: MMMPF框架通过有效融合历史与未来信息，为电力系统概率化规划提供了更准确的预测方法。

authors_text: Yuanpeng Tu,Yuxi Li,Boshen Zhang,Liang Liu,Jiangning Zhang,Yabiao Wang,Cai Rong Zhao
title: Self-Supervised Likelihood Estimation with Energy Guidance for Anomaly Segmentation in Urban Scenes
title_zh: 城市场景中异常分割的能量指导自监督似然估计
abstract: Robust autonomous driving requires agents to accurately identify unexpected areas (anomalies) in urban scenes. To this end, some critical issues remain open: how to design advisable metric to measure anomalies, and how to properly generate training samples of anomaly data? Classical effort in anomaly detection usually resorts to pixel-wise uncertainty or sample synthesis, which ignores the contextual information and sometimes requires auxiliary data with fine-grained annotations. On the contrary, in this paper, we exploit the strong context-dependent nature of the segmentation task and design an energy-guided self-supervised framework for anomaly segmentation, which optimizes an anomaly head by maximizing the likelihood of self-generated anomaly pixels. For this purpose, we design two estimators to model anomaly likelihood, one is a task-agnostic binary estimator and the other depicts the likelihood as residual of task-oriented joint energy. Based on the proposed estimators, we devise an adaptive self-supervised training framework, which exploits the contextual reliance and estimated likelihood to refine mask annotations in anomaly areas. We conduct extensive experiments on challenging Fishyscapes and Road Anomaly benchmarks, demonstrating that without any auxiliary data or synthetic models, our method can still achieve comparable performance to supervised competitors. Code is available at https://github.com/yuanpengtu/SLEEG..
summary: Robust autonomous driving requires agents to accurately identify unexpected areas (anomalies) in urban scenes. To this end, some critical issues remain open: how to design advisable metric to measure anomalies, and how to properly generate training samples of anomaly data? Classical effort in anomaly detection usually resorts to pixel-wise uncertainty or sample synthesis, which ignores the contextual information and sometimes requires auxiliary data with fine-grained annotations. On the contrary, in this paper, we exploit the strong context-dependent nature of the segmentation task and design an energy-guided self-supervised framework for anomaly segmentation, which optimizes an anomaly head by maximizing the likelihood of self-generated anomaly pixels. For this purpose, we design two estimators to model anomaly likelihood, one is a task-agnostic binary estimator and the other depicts the likelihood as residual of task-oriented joint energy. Based on the proposed estimators, we devise an adaptive self-supervised training framework, which exploits the contextual reliance and estimated likelihood to refine mask annotations in anomaly areas. We conduct extensive experiments on challenging Fishyscapes and Road Anomaly benchmarks, demonstrating that without any auxiliary data or synthetic models, our method can still achieve comparable performance to supervised competitors. Code is available at https://github.com/yuanpengtu/SLEEG..
abstract_zh: 鲁棒的自动驾驶要求智能体准确识别城市场景中的意外区域（异常）。为此，一些关键问题仍然悬而未决：如何设计合适的指标来衡量异常，以及如何正确生成异常数据的训练样本？异常检测中的经典工作通常采用像素级不确定性或样本合成，这会忽略上下文信息，有时需要带有细粒度注释的辅助数据。相反，在本文中，我们利用分割任务的强上下文相关性，设计了一种用于异常分割的能量引导自监督框架，该框架通过最大化自生成异常像素的可能性来优化异常头。为此，我们设计了两个估计器来对异常可能性进行建模，一个是与任务无关的二元估计器，另一个将可能性描述为面向任务的联合能量的残差。基于所提出的估计器，我们设计了一个自适应自我监督训练框架，该框架利用上下文依赖和估计的可能性来细化异常区域中的掩模注释。我们对具有挑战性的 Fishyscapes 和 Road Anomaly 基准进行了广泛的实验，证明在没有任何辅助数据或合成模型的情况下，我们的方法仍然可以实现与受监督的竞争对手相当的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/yuanpengtu/SLEEG 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于能量引导的自监督似然估计框架，用于城市场景中的异常分割。
AI.motivation: 现有异常检测方法依赖像素级不确定性或样本合成，忽视上下文信息且需精细标注的辅助数据，难以满足自动驾驶中对城市场景异常区域准确识别的需求。
AI.method: 设计任务无关的二值估计器和任务导向的联合能量残差估计器，构建自监督训练框架，通过最大化自生成异常像素的似然性优化异常检测头，并利用上下文依赖性和估计似然值细化异常区域的掩码标注。
AI.result: 在Fishyscapes和Road Anomaly基准测试中，无需辅助数据或合成模型即可达到与监督方法相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过结合上下文依赖性和能量引导的自监督学习，有效解决了异常分割中对标注数据的依赖问题，为自动驾驶场景提供了鲁棒的异常检测方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于能量引导的自监督似然估计框架，用于城市场景中的异常分割。

search_text: Self-Supervised Likelihood Estimation with Energy Guidance for Anomaly Segmentation in Urban Scenes 城市场景中异常分割的能量指导自监督似然估计 Robust autonomous driving requires agents to accurately identify unexpected areas (anomalies) in urban scenes. To this end, some critical issues remain open: how to design advisable metric to measure anomalies, and how to properly generate training samples of anomaly data? Classical effort in anomaly detection usually resorts to pixel-wise uncertainty or sample synthesis, which ignores the contextual information and sometimes requires auxiliary data with fine-grained annotations. On the contrary, in this paper, we exploit the strong context-dependent nature of the segmentation task and design an energy-guided self-supervised framework for anomaly segmentation, which optimizes an anomaly head by maximizing the likelihood of self-generated anomaly pixels. For this purpose, we design two estimators to model anomaly likelihood, one is a task-agnostic binary estimator and the other depicts the likelihood as residual of task-oriented joint energy. Based on the proposed estimators, we devise an adaptive self-supervised training framework, which exploits the contextual reliance and estimated likelihood to refine mask annotations in anomaly areas. We conduct extensive experiments on challenging Fishyscapes and Road Anomaly benchmarks, demonstrating that without any auxiliary data or synthetic models, our method can still achieve comparable performance to supervised competitors. Code is available at https://github.com/yuanpengtu/SLEEG.. 鲁棒的自动驾驶要求智能体准确识别城市场景中的意外区域（异常）。为此，一些关键问题仍然悬而未决：如何设计合适的指标来衡量异常，以及如何正确生成异常数据的训练样本？异常检测中的经典工作通常采用像素级不确定性或样本合成，这会忽略上下文信息，有时需要带有细粒度注释的辅助数据。相反，在本文中，我们利用分割任务的强上下文相关性，设计了一种用于异常分割的能量引导自监督框架，该框架通过最大化自生成异常像素的可能性来优化异常头。为此，我们设计了两个估计器来对异常可能性进行建模，一个是与任务无关的二元估计器，另一个将可能性描述为面向任务的联合能量的残差。基于所提出的估计器，我们设计了一个自适应自我监督训练框架，该框架利用上下文依赖和估计的可能性来细化异常区域中的掩模注释。我们对具有挑战性的 Fishyscapes 和 Road Anomaly 基准进行了广泛的实验，证明在没有任何辅助数据或合成模型的情况下，我们的方法仍然可以实现与受监督的竞争对手相当的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/yuanpengtu/SLEEG 获取。 本文提出一种基于能量引导的自监督似然估计框架，用于城市场景中的异常分割。 Yuanpeng Tu,Yuxi Li,Boshen Zhang,Liang Liu,Jiangning Zhang,Yabiao Wang,Cai Rong Zhao cs.CV

authors_text: Yuanpeng Tu,Boshen Zhang,Yuxi Li,Liang Liu,Jian Li,Yabiao Wang,Chengjie Wang,Cai Rong Zhao
title: Learning from Noisy Labels with Decoupled Meta Label Purifier
title_zh: 使用解耦元标签净化器从噪声标签中学习
abstract: Training deep neural networks(DNN) with noisy labels is challenging since DNN can easily memorize inaccurate labels, leading to poor generalization ability. Recently, the meta-learning based label correction strategy is widely adopted to tackle this problem via identifying and correcting potential noisy labels with the help of a small set of clean validation data. Although training with purified labels can effectively improve performance, solving the meta-learning problem inevitably involves a nested loop of bi-level optimization between model weights and hyper-parameters (i.e., label distribution). As compromise, previous methods resort to a coupled learning process with alternating update. In this paper, we empirically find such simultaneous optimization over both model weights and label distribution can not achieve an optimal routine, consequently limiting the representation ability of backbone and accuracy of corrected labels. From this observation, a novel multi-stage label purifier named DMLP is proposed. DMLP decouples the label correction process into label-free representation learning and a simple meta label purifier. In this way, DMLP can focus on extracting discriminative feature and label correction in two distinctive stages. DMLP is a plug-and-play label purifier, the purified labels can be directly reused in naive end-to-end network retraining or other robust learning methods, where state-of-the-art results are obtained on several synthetic and real-world noisy datasets, especially under high noise levels.
summary: Training deep neural networks(DNN) with noisy labels is challenging since DNN can easily memorize inaccurate labels, leading to poor generalization ability. Recently, the meta-learning based label correction strategy is widely adopted to tackle this problem via identifying and correcting potential noisy labels with the help of a small set of clean validation data. Although training with purified labels can effectively improve performance, solving the meta-learning problem inevitably involves a nested loop of bi-level optimization between model weights and hyper-parameters (i.e., label distribution). As compromise, previous methods resort to a coupled learning process with alternating update. In this paper, we empirically find such simultaneous optimization over both model weights and label distribution can not achieve an optimal routine, consequently limiting the representation ability of backbone and accuracy of corrected labels. From this observation, a novel multi-stage label purifier named DMLP is proposed. DMLP decouples the label correction process into label-free representation learning and a simple meta label purifier. In this way, DMLP can focus on extracting discriminative feature and label correction in two distinctive stages. DMLP is a plug-and-play label purifier, the purified labels can be directly reused in naive end-to-end network retraining or other robust learning methods, where state-of-the-art results are obtained on several synthetic and real-world noisy datasets, especially under high noise levels.
abstract_zh: 使用噪声标签训练深度神经网络（DNN）具有挑战性，因为 DNN 很容易记住不准确的标签，导致泛化能力较差。最近，基于元学习的标签校正策略被广泛采用，通过借助一小组干净的验证数据来识别和校正潜在的噪声标签来解决这个问题。虽然使用纯化标签进行训练可以有效提高性能，但解​​决元学习问题不可避免地涉及模型权重和超参数（即标签分布）之间的双层优化的嵌套循环。作为妥协，以前的方法诉诸于交替更新的耦合学习过程。在本文中，我们凭经验发现这种对模型权重和标签分布的同时优化不能实现最佳例程，从而限制了主干的表示能力和校正标签的准确性。根据这一观察，提出了一种名为 DMLP 的新型多级标签纯化器。 DMLP 将标签校正过程解耦为无标签表示学习和简单的元标签纯化器。这样，DMLP可以在两个不同的阶段集中精力提取判别特征和标签校正。 DMLP 是一种即插即用的标签纯化器，纯化后的标签可以直接在朴素的端到端网络再训练或其他鲁棒学习方法中重复使用，其中在几个合成和现实世界噪声数据集上获得最先进的结果，特别是在高噪声水平下。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DMLP的多阶段标签净化方法，通过解耦标签修正过程来提升深度神经网络在噪声标签下的训练效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于元学习的标签修正方法因同时优化模型权重和标签分布导致次优解，限制了模型表示能力和标签修正精度。
AI.method: DMLP将标签修正分为两个阶段：第一阶段进行无标签的特征学习，第二阶段使用简化元学习器进行标签净化，实现解耦优化。
AI.result: 在多个合成和真实噪声数据集上取得最先进结果，尤其在高噪声水平下表现显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 解耦学习框架能有效提升模型表征能力与标签修正精度，DMLP作为即插即用模块可广泛应用于端到端重训练等场景。

ai_content.motivation: 现有基于元学习的标签修正方法因同时优化模型权重和标签分布导致次优解，限制了模型表示能力和标签修正精度。

authors_text: Kam Kwai Wong,Xingbo Wang,Yong Wang,Jianben He,Rong Zhang,Huamin Qu
title: Anchorage: Visual Analysis of Satisfaction in Customer Service Videos via Anchor Events
title_zh: 安克雷奇：通过锚定活动对客户服务视频的满意度进行可视化分析
comment: 13 pages. A preprint version of a publication at IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics (TVCG), 2023
comments: 13 pages. A preprint version of a publication at IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics (TVCG), 2023
abstract: Delivering customer services through video communications has brought new opportunities to analyze customer satisfaction for quality management. However, due to the lack of reliable self-reported responses, service providers are troubled by the inadequate estimation of customer services and the tedious investigation into multimodal video recordings. We introduce Anchorage, a visual analytics system to evaluate customer satisfaction by summarizing multimodal behavioral features in customer service videos and revealing abnormal operations in the service process. We leverage the semantically meaningful operations to introduce structured event understanding into videos which help service providers quickly navigate to events of their interest. Anchorage supports a comprehensive evaluation of customer satisfaction from the service and operation levels and efficient analysis of customer behavioral dynamics via multifaceted visualization views. We extensively evaluate Anchorage through a case study and a carefully-designed user study. The results demonstrate its effectiveness and usability in assessing customer satisfaction using customer service videos. We found that introducing event contexts in assessing customer satisfaction can enhance its performance without compromising annotation precision. Our approach can be adapted in situations where unlabelled and unstructured videos are collected along with sequential records.
summary: Delivering customer services through video communications has brought new opportunities to analyze customer satisfaction for quality management. However, due to the lack of reliable self-reported responses, service providers are troubled by the inadequate estimation of customer services and the tedious investigation into multimodal video recordings. We introduce Anchorage, a visual analytics system to evaluate customer satisfaction by summarizing multimodal behavioral features in customer service videos and revealing abnormal operations in the service process. We leverage the semantically meaningful operations to introduce structured event understanding into videos which help service providers quickly navigate to events of their interest. Anchorage supports a comprehensive evaluation of customer satisfaction from the service and operation levels and efficient analysis of customer behavioral dynamics via multifaceted visualization views. We extensively evaluate Anchorage through a case study and a carefully-designed user study. The results demonstrate its effectiveness and usability in assessing customer satisfaction using customer service videos. We found that introducing event contexts in assessing customer satisfaction can enhance its performance without compromising annotation precision. Our approach can be adapted in situations where unlabelled and unstructured videos are collected along with sequential records.
abstract_zh: 通过视频通信提供客户服务为分析客户满意度以进行质量管理带来了新的机会。然而，由于缺乏可靠的自我报告答复，服务提供商因对客户服务的评估不足以及对多模式视频记录的繁琐调查而感到困扰。我们推出Anchorage可视化分析系统，通过总结客户服务视频中的多模态行为特征并揭示服务过程中的异常操作来评估客户满意度。我们利用语义上有意义的操作将结构化事件理解引入视频中，帮助服务提供商快速导航到他们感兴趣的事件。安克雷奇支持从服务和运营层面全面评估客户满意度，并通过多层面的可视化视图高效分析客户行为动态。我们通过案例研究和精心设计的用户研究对安克雷奇进行了广泛的评估。结果证明了其使用客户服务视频评估客户满意度的有效性和可用性。我们发现，在评估客户满意度时引入事件上下文可以在不影响注释精度的情况下提高其性能。我们的方法可以适用于收集未标记和非结构化视频以及连续记录的情况。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Anchorage系统，通过分析客服视频中的多模态行为特征和异常操作，实现客户满意度的可视化评估。
AI.motivation: 传统客服质量评估依赖不可靠的自我报告，且多模态视频分析过程繁琐，缺乏有效工具支持。
AI.method: 构建Anchorage系统，结合语义事件理解与多视角可视化技术，从服务流程和操作层面分析客户行为动态。
AI.result: 通过案例研究和用户实验验证，系统能有效提升满意度评估性能，且不降低标注精度。
AI.conclusion: 引入事件上下文可增强满意度评估效果，该方法适用于无标签视频与序列记录的分析场景。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出Anchorage系统，通过分析客服视频中的多模态行为特征和异常操作，实现客户满意度的可视化评估。

search_text: Anchorage: Visual Analysis of Satisfaction in Customer Service Videos via Anchor Events 安克雷奇：通过锚定活动对客户服务视频的满意度进行可视化分析 Delivering customer services through video communications has brought new opportunities to analyze customer satisfaction for quality management. However, due to the lack of reliable self-reported responses, service providers are troubled by the inadequate estimation of customer services and the tedious investigation into multimodal video recordings. We introduce Anchorage, a visual analytics system to evaluate customer satisfaction by summarizing multimodal behavioral features in customer service videos and revealing abnormal operations in the service process. We leverage the semantically meaningful operations to introduce structured event understanding into videos which help service providers quickly navigate to events of their interest. Anchorage supports a comprehensive evaluation of customer satisfaction from the service and operation levels and efficient analysis of customer behavioral dynamics via multifaceted visualization views. We extensively evaluate Anchorage through a case study and a carefully-designed user study. The results demonstrate its effectiveness and usability in assessing customer satisfaction using customer service videos. We found that introducing event contexts in assessing customer satisfaction can enhance its performance without compromising annotation precision. Our approach can be adapted in situations where unlabelled and unstructured videos are collected along with sequential records. 通过视频通信提供客户服务为分析客户满意度以进行质量管理带来了新的机会。然而，由于缺乏可靠的自我报告答复，服务提供商因对客户服务的评估不足以及对多模式视频记录的繁琐调查而感到困扰。我们推出Anchorage可视化分析系统，通过总结客户服务视频中的多模态行为特征并揭示服务过程中的异常操作来评估客户满意度。我们利用语义上有意义的操作将结构化事件理解引入视频中，帮助服务提供商快速导航到他们感兴趣的事件。安克雷奇支持从服务和运营层面全面评估客户满意度，并通过多层面的可视化视图高效分析客户行为动态。我们通过案例研究和精心设计的用户研究对安克雷奇进行了广泛的评估。结果证明了其使用客户服务视频评估客户满意度的有效性和可用性。我们发现，在评估客户满意度时引入事件上下文可以在不影响注释精度的情况下提高其性能。我们的方法可以适用于收集未标记和非结构化视频以及连续记录的情况。 本文提出Anchorage系统，通过分析客服视频中的多模态行为特征和异常操作，实现客户满意度的可视化评估。 Kam Kwai Wong,Xingbo Wang,Yong Wang,Jianben He,Rong Zhang,Huamin Qu cs.HC,cs.MM

authors_text: Yuanpeng Tu,Boshen Zhang,Yuxi Li,Liang Liu,Jian Li,Jiangning Zhang,Yabiao Wang,Chengjie Wang,Cai Rong Zhao
title: Learning with Noisy labels via Self-supervised Adversarial Noisy Masking
title_zh: 通过自我监督的对抗性噪声掩蔽来学习噪声标签
abstract: Collecting large-scale datasets is crucial for training deep models, annotating the data, however, inevitably yields noisy labels, which poses challenges to deep learning algorithms. Previous efforts tend to mitigate this problem via identifying and removing noisy samples or correcting their labels according to the statistical properties (e.g., loss values) among training samples. In this paper, we aim to tackle this problem from a new perspective, delving into the deep feature maps, we empirically find that models trained with clean and mislabeled samples manifest distinguishable activation feature distributions. From this observation, a novel robust training approach termed adversarial noisy masking is proposed. The idea is to regularize deep features with a label quality guided masking scheme, which adaptively modulates the input data and label simultaneously, preventing the model to overfit noisy samples. Further, an auxiliary task is designed to reconstruct input data, it naturally provides noise-free self-supervised signals to reinforce the generalization ability of deep models. The proposed method is simple and flexible, it is tested on both synthetic and real-world noisy datasets, where significant improvements are achieved over previous state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Collecting large-scale datasets is crucial for training deep models, annotating the data, however, inevitably yields noisy labels, which poses challenges to deep learning algorithms. Previous efforts tend to mitigate this problem via identifying and removing noisy samples or correcting their labels according to the statistical properties (e.g., loss values) among training samples. In this paper, we aim to tackle this problem from a new perspective, delving into the deep feature maps, we empirically find that models trained with clean and mislabeled samples manifest distinguishable activation feature distributions. From this observation, a novel robust training approach termed adversarial noisy masking is proposed. The idea is to regularize deep features with a label quality guided masking scheme, which adaptively modulates the input data and label simultaneously, preventing the model to overfit noisy samples. Further, an auxiliary task is designed to reconstruct input data, it naturally provides noise-free self-supervised signals to reinforce the generalization ability of deep models. The proposed method is simple and flexible, it is tested on both synthetic and real-world noisy datasets, where significant improvements are achieved over previous state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 收集大规模数据集对于训练深度模型至关重要，然而，对数据进行注释不可避免地会产生噪声标签，这对深度学习算法提出了挑战。以前的努力倾向于通过识别和去除噪声样本或根据训练样本中的统计属性（例如损失值）纠正它们的标签来缓解这个问题。在本文中，我们旨在从一个新的角度解决这个问题，深入研究深层特征图，我们凭经验发现使用干净和错误标记的样本训练的模型表现出可区分的激活特征分布。根据这一观察，提出了一种称为对抗性噪声掩蔽的新型鲁棒训练方法。这个想法是通过标签质量引导掩蔽方案来规范深层特征，该方案同时自适应地调制输入数据和标签，防止模型过度拟合噪声样本。此外，辅助任务被设计用于重建输入数据，它自然地提供无噪声的自监督信号以增强深度模型的泛化能力。所提出的方法简单而灵活，在合成数据集和现实世界的噪声数据集上进行了测试，与以前最先进的方法相比，取得了显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过自监督对抗噪声掩码学习的方法，解决深度模型训练中标签噪声问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过识别并移除噪声样本或根据统计特性修正标签来缓解噪声问题，但效果有限。作者发现干净样本与误标签样本在深度特征图中具有可区分的激活分布，从而提出新思路。
AI.method: 设计对抗噪声掩码方法，通过标签质量引导的掩码方案正则化深度特征，同时自适应调节输入数据和标签；并引入辅助任务重构输入数据，提供无噪声的自监督信号。
AI.result: 在合成和真实噪声数据集上显著优于现有最先进方法，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法简单灵活，通过深度特征分布差异和自监督信号有效提升模型鲁棒性，为噪声标签学习提供新视角。

authors_text: Licheng Wen,Pinlong Cai,Daocheng Fu,Song Mao,Yikang Li
title: Bringing Diversity to Autonomous Vehicles: An Interpretable Multi-vehicle Decision-making and Planning Framework
title_zh: 为自动驾驶汽车带来多样性：可解释的多车辆决策和规划框架
abstract: With the development of autonomous driving, it is becoming increasingly common for autonomous vehicles (AVs) and human-driven vehicles (HVs) to travel on the same roads. Existing single-vehicle planning algorithms on board struggle to handle sophisticated social interactions in the real world. Decisions made by these methods are difficult to understand for humans, raising the risk of crashes and making them unlikely to be applied in practice. Moreover, vehicle flows produced by open-source traffic simulators suffer from being overly conservative and lacking behavioral diversity. We propose a hierarchical multi-vehicle decision-making and planning framework with several advantages. The framework jointly makes decisions for all vehicles within the flow and reacts promptly to the dynamic environment through a high-frequency planning module. The decision module produces interpretable action sequences that can explicitly communicate self-intent to the surrounding HVs. We also present the cooperation factor and trajectory weight set, bringing diversity to autonomous vehicles in traffic at both the social and individual levels. The superiority of our proposed framework is validated through experiments with multiple scenarios, and the diverse behaviors in the generated vehicle trajectories are demonstrated through closed-loop simulations.
summary: With the development of autonomous driving, it is becoming increasingly common for autonomous vehicles (AVs) and human-driven vehicles (HVs) to travel on the same roads. Existing single-vehicle planning algorithms on board struggle to handle sophisticated social interactions in the real world. Decisions made by these methods are difficult to understand for humans, raising the risk of crashes and making them unlikely to be applied in practice. Moreover, vehicle flows produced by open-source traffic simulators suffer from being overly conservative and lacking behavioral diversity. We propose a hierarchical multi-vehicle decision-making and planning framework with several advantages. The framework jointly makes decisions for all vehicles within the flow and reacts promptly to the dynamic environment through a high-frequency planning module. The decision module produces interpretable action sequences that can explicitly communicate self-intent to the surrounding HVs. We also present the cooperation factor and trajectory weight set, bringing diversity to autonomous vehicles in traffic at both the social and individual levels. The superiority of our proposed framework is validated through experiments with multiple scenarios, and the diverse behaviors in the generated vehicle trajectories are demonstrated through closed-loop simulations.
abstract_zh: 随着自动驾驶的发展，自动驾驶汽车（AV）和人类驾驶汽车（HV）在同一道路上行驶变得越来越普遍。现有的单车规划算法很难处理现实世界中复杂的社交互动。这些方法做出的决策对于人类来说很难理解，从而增加了崩溃的风险，并使它们不太可能在实践中应用。此外，开源交通模拟器生成的车流过于保守且缺乏行为多样性。我们提出了一种具有多种优点的分层多车辆决策和规划框架。该框架对流程中的所有车辆进行联合决策，并通过高频规划模块对动态环境做出迅速反应。决策模块产生可解释的动作序列，可以明确地将自我意图传达给周围的 HV。我们还提出了合作因素和轨迹权重设置，为社会和个人层面的交通中的自动驾驶汽车带来了多样性。我们提出的框架的优越性通过多个场景的实验得到验证，并且通过闭环模拟演示了生成的车辆轨迹中的不同行为。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可解释的多车辆决策与规划框架，旨在提升自动驾驶车辆（AVs）在复杂交通环境中的社会交互能力与行为多样性。
AI.motivation: 现有单车辆规划算法难以处理现实世界中的复杂社会交互，且决策过程不可解释，存在安全隐患；开源交通模拟器生成的车辆行为过于保守且缺乏多样性。
AI.method: 设计分层多车辆决策与规划框架，通过高频规划模块实时响应动态环境，决策模块生成可解释的动作序列，并引入协作因子与轨迹权重集以增强社会与个体层面的行为多样性。
AI.result: 实验验证了框架在多场景下的优越性，闭环仿真展示了生成车辆轨迹的多样化行为。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了现有方法的局限性，通过行为多样性与可解释性提升自动驾驶系统的安全性与实用性。

Existing single-vehicle planning algorithms on board struggle to handle sophisticated social interactions in the real world. Decisions made by these methods are difficult to understand for humans, raising the risk of crashes and making them unlikely to be applied in practice. Moreover, vehicle flows produced by open-source traffic simulators suffer from being overly conservative and lacking behavioral diversity. We propose a hierarchical multi-vehicle decision-making and planning framework with several advantages. The framework jointly makes decisions for all vehicles within the flow and reacts promptly to the dynamic environment through a high-frequency planning module. The decision module produces interpretable action sequences that can explicitly communicate self-intent to the surrounding HVs. We also present the cooperation factor and trajectory weight set, bringing diversity to autonomous vehicles in traffic at both the social and individual levels. The superiority of our proposed framework is validated through experiments with multiple scenarios, and the diverse behaviors in the generated vehicle trajectories are demonstrated through closed-loop simulations. 随着自动驾驶的发展，自动驾驶汽车（AV）和人类驾驶汽车（HV）在同一道路上行驶变得越来越普遍。现有的单车规划算法很难处理现实世界中复杂的社交互动。这些方法做出的决策对于人类来说很难理解，从而增加了崩溃的风险，并使它们不太可能在实践中应用。此外，开源交通模拟器生成的车流过于保守且缺乏行为多样性。我们提出了一种具有多种优点的分层多车辆决策和规划框架。该框架对流程中的所有车辆进行联合决策，并通过高频规划模块对动态环境做出迅速反应。决策模块产生可解释的动作序列，可以明确地将自我意图传达给周围的 HV。我们还提出了合作因素和轨迹权重设置，为社会和个人层面的交通中的自动驾驶汽车带来了多样性。我们提出的框架的优越性通过多个场景的实验得到验证，并且通过闭环模拟演示了生成的车辆轨迹中的不同行为。 本文提出了一种可解释的多车辆决策与规划框架，旨在提升自动驾驶车辆（AVs）在复杂交通环境中的社会交互能力与行为多样性。 Licheng Wen,Pinlong Cai,Daocheng Fu,Song Mao,Yikang Li cs.RO,cs.MA

title: HR-NeuS: Recovering High-Frequency Surface Geometry via Neural Implicit Surfaces
title_zh: HR-NeuS：通过神经隐式曲面恢复高频表面几何形状
abstract: Recent advances in neural implicit surfaces for multi-view 3D reconstruction primarily focus on improving large-scale surface reconstruction accuracy, but often produce over-smoothed geometries that lack fine surface details. To address this, we present High-Resolution NeuS (HR-NeuS), a novel neural implicit surface reconstruction method that recovers high-frequency surface geometry while maintaining large-scale reconstruction accuracy. We achieve this by utilizing (i) multi-resolution hash grid encoding rather than positional encoding at high frequencies, which boosts our model's expressiveness of local geometry details; (ii) a coarse-to-fine algorithmic framework that selectively applies surface regularization to coarse geometry without smoothing away fine details; (iii) a coarse-to-fine grid annealing strategy to train the network. We demonstrate through experiments on DTU and BlendedMVS datasets that our approach produces 3D geometries that are qualitatively more detailed and quantitatively of similar accuracy compared to previous approaches.
summary: Recent advances in neural implicit surfaces for multi-view 3D reconstruction primarily focus on improving large-scale surface reconstruction accuracy, but often produce over-smoothed geometries that lack fine surface details. To address this, we present High-Resolution NeuS (HR-NeuS), a novel neural implicit surface reconstruction method that recovers high-frequency surface geometry while maintaining large-scale reconstruction accuracy. We achieve this by utilizing (i) multi-resolution hash grid encoding rather than positional encoding at high frequencies, which boosts our model's expressiveness of local geometry details; (ii) a coarse-to-fine algorithmic framework that selectively applies surface regularization to coarse geometry without smoothing away fine details; (iii) a coarse-to-fine grid annealing strategy to train the network. We demonstrate through experiments on DTU and BlendedMVS datasets that our approach produces 3D geometries that are qualitatively more detailed and quantitatively of similar accuracy compared to previous approaches.
abstract_zh: 用于多视图 3D 重建的神经隐式表面的最新进展主要集中在提高大规模表面重建精度，但通常会产生缺乏精细表面细节的过度平滑的几何形状。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了高分辨率 NeuS (HR-NeuS)，这是一种新颖的神经隐式表面重建方法，可以恢复高频表面几何形状，同时保持大规模重建精度。我们通过利用（i）多分辨率哈希网格编码而不是高频位置编码来实现这一点，这增强了我们的模型对局部几何细节的表达能力； (ii) 一个从粗到细的算法框架，有选择地将表面正则化应用于粗略的几何形状，而不平滑精细的细节； (iii) 用于训练网络的从粗到细的网格退火策略。我们通过 DTU 和 BlendedMVS 数据集上的实验证明，与以前的方法相比，我们的方法产生的 3D 几何形状在质量上更详细，在数量上具有相似的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HR-NeuS方法，通过神经隐式表面实现高精度三维重建，解决传统方法表面细节丢失的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有神经隐式表面方法在大规模重建精度提升的同时，常因过度平滑导致表面细节丢失，无法满足高精度需求。
AI.method: 采用多分辨率哈希网格编码替代高频位置编码，结合粗到细的算法框架与网格退火策略，分阶段优化局部几何细节与整体结构。
AI.result: 在DTU和BlendedMVS数据集上验证，重建结果在保持整体精度的同时显著提升表面细节质量，定量指标与定性效果均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: HR-NeuS通过编码优化与分阶段训练策略，有效平衡了高频细节恢复与大规模结构准确性，为高质量三维重建提供新思路。

authors_text: Hyeonsu B. Kang,Nouran Soliman,Matt Latzke,Joseph Chee Chang,Jonathan Bragg
title: ComLittee: Literature Discovery with Personal Elected Author Committees
title_zh: ComLittee：与个人当选作者委员会的文献发现
abstract: In order to help scholars understand and follow a research topic, significant research has been devoted to creating systems that help scholars discover relevant papers and authors. Recent approaches have shown the usefulness of highlighting relevant authors while scholars engage in paper discovery. However, these systems do not capture and utilize users' evolving knowledge of authors. We reflect on the design space and introduce ComLittee, a literature discovery system that supports author-centric exploration. In contrast to paper-centric interaction in prior systems, ComLittee's author-centric interaction supports curation of research threads from individual authors, finding new authors and papers with combined signals from a paper recommender and the curated authors' authorship graphs, and understanding them in the context of those signals. In a within-subjects experiment that compares to an author-highlighting approach, we demonstrate how ComLittee leads to a higher efficiency, quality, and novelty in author discovery that also improves paper discovery.
summary: In order to help scholars understand and follow a research topic, significant research has been devoted to creating systems that help scholars discover relevant papers and authors. Recent approaches have shown the usefulness of highlighting relevant authors while scholars engage in paper discovery. However, these systems do not capture and utilize users' evolving knowledge of authors. We reflect on the design space and introduce ComLittee, a literature discovery system that supports author-centric exploration. In contrast to paper-centric interaction in prior systems, ComLittee's author-centric interaction supports curation of research threads from individual authors, finding new authors and papers with combined signals from a paper recommender and the curated authors' authorship graphs, and understanding them in the context of those signals. In a within-subjects experiment that compares to an author-highlighting approach, we demonstrate how ComLittee leads to a higher efficiency, quality, and novelty in author discovery that also improves paper discovery.
abstract_zh: 为了帮助学者理解和跟踪研究主题，大量研究致力于创建帮助学者发现相关论文和作者的系统。最近的方法已经表明，在学者从事论文发现时突出相关作者的有用性。然而，这些系统并没有捕获和利用用户不断发展的作者知识。我们反思设计空间并引入 ComLittee，这是一个支持以作者为中心的探索的文献发现系统。与之前系统中以论文为中心的交互相比，ComLittee 以作者为中心的交互支持对各个作者的研究线索进行管理，通过来自论文推荐器和所管理作者的作者权图的组合信号寻找新作者和论文，并在这些信号的背景下理解它们。在与作者突出显示方法进行比较的受试者内实验中，我们展示了 ComLittee 如何在作者发现方面带来更高的效率、质量和新颖性，同时也改善了论文发现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ComLittee系统，通过作者中心化的探索方式帮助学者更高效地发现文献和作者。
AI.motivation: 现有文献发现系统未能有效捕捉用户对作者知识的动态变化，需通过作者中心化交互提升发现效率与质量。
AI.method: 设计ComLittee系统，结合论文推荐算法与作者关系图谱，支持用户构建作者委员会以探索研究脉络。
AI.result: 对比实验表明，ComLittee在作者发现效率、质量及新颖性上优于传统作者高亮方法，同时提升论文发现效果。
AI.conclusion: 作者中心化交互能有效利用用户知识演化，结合推荐与图谱分析可显著优化文献发现流程。

authors_text: Peter Wu,Li-Wei Chen,Cheol Jun Cho,Shinji Watanabe,Louis Goldstein,Alan W Black,Gopala K. Anumanchipalli
title: Speaker-Independent Acoustic-to-Articulatory Speech Inversion
title_zh: 与说话人无关的声学到发音语音反转
abstract: To build speech processing methods that can handle speech as naturally as humans, researchers have explored multiple ways of building an invertible mapping from speech to an interpretable space. The articulatory space is a promising inversion target, since this space captures the mechanics of speech production. To this end, we build an acoustic-to-articulatory inversion (AAI) model that leverages self-supervision to generalize to unseen speakers. Our approach obtains 0.784 correlation on an electromagnetic articulography (EMA) dataset, improving the state-of-the-art by 12.5\%. Additionally, we show the interpretability of these representations through directly comparing the behavior of estimated representations with speech production behavior. Finally, we propose a resynthesis-based AAI evaluation metric that does not rely on articulatory labels, demonstrating its efficacy with an 18-speaker dataset.
summary: To build speech processing methods that can handle speech as naturally as humans, researchers have explored multiple ways of building an invertible mapping from speech to an interpretable space. The articulatory space is a promising inversion target, since this space captures the mechanics of speech production. To this end, we build an acoustic-to-articulatory inversion (AAI) model that leverages self-supervision to generalize to unseen speakers. Our approach obtains 0.784 correlation on an electromagnetic articulography (EMA) dataset, improving the state-of-the-art by 12.5\%. Additionally, we show the interpretability of these representations through directly comparing the behavior of estimated representations with speech production behavior. Finally, we propose a resynthesis-based AAI evaluation metric that does not rely on articulatory labels, demonstrating its efficacy with an 18-speaker dataset.
abstract_zh: 为了构建能够像人类一样自然地处理语音的语音处理方法，研究人员探索了多种构建从语音到可解释空间的可逆映射的方法。发音空间是一个有前途的反转目标，因为这个空间捕捉了语音产生的机制。为此，我们构建了一个声学到发音反转（AAI）模型，该模型利用自我监督来推广到看不见的说话者。我们的方法在电磁关节造影 (EMA) 数据集上获得了 0.784 的相关性，将最先进的性能提高了 12.5%。此外，我们通过直接比较估计表示的行为与语音产生行为来展示这些表示的可解释性。最后，我们提出了一种基于再合成的 AAI 评估指标，该指标不依赖发音标签，在 18 个说话者的数据集上证明了其有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需依赖说话人信息的语音到发音动作的逆向映射模型。
AI.motivation: 为了构建能够像人类一样自然处理语音的语音处理方法，研究者探索了从语音到可解释空间的可逆映射。发音动作空间是一个有前景的逆向目标，因为它捕捉了语音生成的机制。
AI.method: 本文构建了一种利用自监督学习的语音到发音动作逆向映射模型，使其能够推广到未见过的说话人。
AI.result: 该方法在电磁发音图谱数据集上获得了0.784的相关性，比现有技术提高了12.5%。此外，还通过直接比较估计表示与语音生成行为来展示这些表示的可解释性，并提出了一种基于重合成的AAI评估指标，该指标不依赖于发音标签，并在18人数据集上验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的模型在语音到发音动作的逆向映射任务中取得了显著的性能提升，并展示了其表示的可解释性，同时提出了一种新的评估指标。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需依赖说话人信息的语音到发音动作的逆向映射模型。

search_text: Speaker-Independent Acoustic-to-Articulatory Speech Inversion 与说话人无关的声学到发音语音反转 To build speech processing methods that can handle speech as naturally as humans, researchers have explored multiple ways of building an invertible mapping from speech to an interpretable space. The articulatory space is a promising inversion target, since this space captures the mechanics of speech production. To this end, we build an acoustic-to-articulatory inversion (AAI) model that leverages self-supervision to generalize to unseen speakers. Our approach obtains 0.784 correlation on an electromagnetic articulography (EMA) dataset, improving the state-of-the-art by 12.5\%. Additionally, we show the interpretability of these representations through directly comparing the behavior of estimated representations with speech production behavior. Finally, we propose a resynthesis-based AAI evaluation metric that does not rely on articulatory labels, demonstrating its efficacy with an 18-speaker dataset. 为了构建能够像人类一样自然地处理语音的语音处理方法，研究人员探索了多种构建从语音到可解释空间的可逆映射的方法。发音空间是一个有前途的反转目标，因为这个空间捕捉了语音产生的机制。为此，我们构建了一个声学到发音反转（AAI）模型，该模型利用自我监督来推广到看不见的说话者。我们的方法在电磁关节造影 (EMA) 数据集上获得了 0.784 的相关性，将最先进的性能提高了 12.5%。此外，我们通过直接比较估计表示的行为与语音产生行为来展示这些表示的可解释性。最后，我们提出了一种基于再合成的 AAI 评估指标，该指标不依赖发音标签，在 18 个说话者的数据集上证明了其有效性。 本文提出了一种无需依赖说话人信息的语音到发音动作的逆向映射模型。 Peter Wu,Li-Wei Chen,Cheol Jun Cho,Shinji Watanabe,Louis Goldstein,Alan W Black,Gopala K. Anumanchipalli eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Yuan He,Jiaoyan Chen,Ernesto Jiménez-Ruiz,Hang Dong,Ian Horrocks
title: Language Model Analysis for Ontology Subsumption Inference
title_zh: 本体包含推理的语言模型分析
comment: Accepted at Findings of ACL 2023; OntoLAMA Datasets are available at: https://huggingface.co/datasets/krr-oxford/OntoLAMA (Huggingface) or https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.6480540 (Zenodo)
comments: Accepted at Findings of ACL 2023; OntoLAMA Datasets are available at: https://huggingface.co/datasets/krr-oxford/OntoLAMA (Huggingface) or https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.6480540 (Zenodo)
abstract: Investigating whether pre-trained language models (LMs) can function as knowledge bases (KBs) has raised wide research interests recently. However, existing works focus on simple, triple-based, relational KBs, but omit more sophisticated, logic-based, conceptualised KBs such as OWL ontologies. To investigate an LM's knowledge of ontologies, we propose OntoLAMA, a set of inference-based probing tasks and datasets from ontology subsumption axioms involving both atomic and complex concepts. We conduct extensive experiments on ontologies of different domains and scales, and our results demonstrate that LMs encode relatively less background knowledge of Subsumption Inference (SI) than traditional Natural Language Inference (NLI) but can improve on SI significantly when a small number of samples are given. We will open-source our code and datasets.
summary: Investigating whether pre-trained language models (LMs) can function as knowledge bases (KBs) has raised wide research interests recently. However, existing works focus on simple, triple-based, relational KBs, but omit more sophisticated, logic-based, conceptualised KBs such as OWL ontologies. To investigate an LM's knowledge of ontologies, we propose OntoLAMA, a set of inference-based probing tasks and datasets from ontology subsumption axioms involving both atomic and complex concepts. We conduct extensive experiments on ontologies of different domains and scales, and our results demonstrate that LMs encode relatively less background knowledge of Subsumption Inference (SI) than traditional Natural Language Inference (NLI) but can improve on SI significantly when a small number of samples are given. We will open-source our code and datasets.
abstract_zh: 研究预训练语言模型（LM）是否可以充当知识库（KB）最近引起了广泛的研究兴趣。然而，现有的工作侧重于简单的、基于三元组的关系知识库，而忽略了更复杂的、基于逻辑的、概念化的知识库，例如 OWL 本体。为了研究 LM 的本体知识，我们提出了 OntoLAMA，这是一组基于推理的探测任务和来自涉及原子和复杂概念的本体包含公理的数据集。我们对不同领域和规模的本体进行了广泛的实验，结果表明，与传统自然语言推理（NLI）相比，LM 编码的包含推理（SI）背景知识相对较少，但在给出少量样本时可以显着提高 SI。我们将开源我们的代码和数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文研究预训练语言模型在本体子sumption推理中的能力，提出基于本体子sumption公理的探测任务和数据集OntoLAMA。
AI.motivation: 现有研究聚焦于简单的关系型知识库，而忽视了OWL等复杂逻辑本体，需探索语言模型对本体推理的理解能力。
AI.method: 构建OntoLAMA数据集，包含原子和复杂概念的本体子sumption公理，设计推理任务评估模型表现。
AI.result: 实验表明语言模型的本体推理知识少于自然语言推理任务，但少量样本训练后性能显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 语言模型具备本体推理潜力，尤其在少量样本场景下表现突出，未来需进一步优化模型与推理任务设计。

title: Random Majority Opinion Diffusion: Stabilization Time, Absorbing States, and Influential Nodes
title_zh: 随机多数意见扩散：稳定时间、吸收状态和影响节点
comment: Accepted in AAMAS 2023 (The 22nd International Conference on Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems)
comments: Accepted in AAMAS 2023 (The 22nd International Conference on Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems)
abstract: Consider a graph G with n nodes and m edges, which represents a social network, and assume that initially each node is blue or white. In each round, all nodes simultaneously update their color to the most frequent color in their neighborhood. This is called the Majority Model (MM) if a node keeps its color in case of a tie and the Random Majority Model (RMM) if it chooses blue with probability 1/2 and white otherwise. We prove that there are graphs for which RMM needs exponentially many rounds to reach a stable configuration in expectation, and such a configuration can have exponentially many states (i.e., colorings). This is in contrast to MM, which is known to always reach a stable configuration with one or two states in $O(m)$ rounds. For the special case of a cycle graph C_n, we prove the stronger and tight bounds of $\lceil n/2\rceil-1$ and $O(n^2)$ in MM and RMM, respectively. Furthermore, we show that the number of stable colorings in MM on C_n is equal to $Θ(Φ^n)$, where $Φ= (1+\sqrt{5})/2$ is the golden ratio, while it is equal to 2 for RMM. We also study the minimum size of a winning set, which is a set of nodes whose agreement on a color in the initial coloring enforces the process to end in a coloring where all nodes share that color. We present tight bounds on the minimum size of a winning set for both MM and RMM. Furthermore, we analyze our models for a random initial coloring, where each node is colored blue independently with some probability $p$ and white otherwise. Using some martingale analysis and counting arguments, we prove that the expected final number of blue nodes is respectively equal to $(2p^2-p^3)n/(1-p+p^2)$ and pn in MM and RMM on a cycle graph C_n. Finally, we conduct some experiments which complement our theoretical findings and also lead to the proposal of some intriguing open problems and conjectures to be tackled in future work.
summary: Consider a graph G with n nodes and m edges, which represents a social network, and assume that initially each node is blue or white. In each round, all nodes simultaneously update their color to the most frequent color in their neighborhood. This is called the Majority Model (MM) if a node keeps its color in case of a tie and the Random Majority Model (RMM) if it chooses blue with probability 1/2 and white otherwise. We prove that there are graphs for which RMM needs exponentially many rounds to reach a stable configuration in expectation, and such a configuration can have exponentially many states (i.e., colorings). This is in contrast to MM, which is known to always reach a stable configuration with one or two states in $O(m)$ rounds. For the special case of a cycle graph C_n, we prove the stronger and tight bounds of $\lceil n/2\rceil-1$ and $O(n^2)$ in MM and RMM, respectively. Furthermore, we show that the number of stable colorings in MM on C_n is equal to $Θ(Φ^n)$, where $Φ= (1+\sqrt{5})/2$ is the golden ratio, while it is equal to 2 for RMM. We also study the minimum size of a winning set, which is a set of nodes whose agreement on a color in the initial coloring enforces the process to end in a coloring where all nodes share that color. We present tight bounds on the minimum size of a winning set for both MM and RMM. Furthermore, we analyze our models for a random initial coloring, where each node is colored blue independently with some probability $p$ and white otherwise. Using some martingale analysis and counting arguments, we prove that the expected final number of blue nodes is respectively equal to $(2p^2-p^3)n/(1-p+p^2)$ and pn in MM and RMM on a cycle graph C_n. Finally, we conduct some experiments which complement our theoretical findings and also lead to the proposal of some intriguing open problems and conjectures to be tackled in future work.
abstract_zh: 考虑一个具有 n 个节点和 m 个边的图 G，它代表一个社交网络，并假设最初每个节点是蓝色或白色。在每一轮中，所有节点同时将其颜色更新为其邻域中最常见的颜色。如果节点在平局时保持其颜色，则称为多数模型 (MM)；如果节点以 1/2 的概率选择蓝色，否则称为随机多数模型 (RMM)。我们证明，对于某些图，RMM 需要指数级的轮数才能达到预期的稳定配置，并且这种配置可以具有指数级的多个状态（即着色）。这与 MM 形成对比，众所周知，MM 总是在 $O(m)$ 轮中达到一个或两个状态的稳定配置。对于循环图 C_n 的特殊情况，我们分别证明了 MM 和 RMM 中 $\lceil n/2\rceil-1$ 和 $O(n^2)$ 的更强和紧界。此外，我们表明，C_n 上 MM 中稳定着色的数量等于 $θ(Φ^n)$，其中 $Φ= (1+\sqrt{5})/2$ 是黄金比例，而 RMM 则等于 2。我们还研究了获胜集的最小大小，这是一组节点，其在初始着色中对颜色的一致强制该过程以所有节点共享该颜色的着色结束。我们对 MM 和 RMM 的获胜集的最小大小提出了严格的限制。此外，我们分析模型的随机初始着色，其中每个节点以一定的概率 $p$ 独立地着色为蓝色，否则为白色。使用一些鞅分析和计数参数，我们证明了循环图 C_n 上 MM 和 RMM 中蓝色节点的预期最终数量分别等于 $(2p^2-p^3)n/(1-p+p^2)$ 和 pn。最后，我们进行了一些实验，这些实验补充了我们的理论发现，并提出了一些在未来工作中需要解决的有趣的开放问题和猜想。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了随机多数意见扩散模型（RMM）与多数模型（MM）在社交网络中的稳定时间、吸收状态及关键节点的影响。
AI.motivation: 理解社交网络中意见动态演化过程，比较确定性与随机性模型在稳定时间、最终状态及关键节点作用上的差异。
AI.method: 通过理论证明、图论分析（如环形图）、鞅分析及实验验证，研究两种模型的稳定时间、吸收状态数量及最小获胜集大小。
AI.result: RMM在某些图中需指数级时间稳定，且吸收状态数量指数级增长；MM在环形图中稳定时间更短，吸收状态数量为黄金比例相关函数。RMM的获胜集更小，随机初始颜色下蓝色节点期望值不同。
AI.conclusion: RMM比MM更复杂且稳定时间更长，但吸收状态更少；MM在环形图中表现更高效，但存在更多稳定状态，未来需进一步研究开放问题。

tldr: 本文研究了随机多数意见扩散模型（RMM）与多数模型（MM）在社交网络中的稳定时间、吸收状态及关键节点的影响。
motivation: 理解社交网络中意见动态演化过程，比较确定性与随机性模型在稳定时间、最终状态及关键节点作用上的差异。
method: 通过理论证明、图论分析（如环形图）、鞅分析及实验验证，研究两种模型的稳定时间、吸收状态数量及最小获胜集大小。
result: RMM在某些图中需指数级时间稳定，且吸收状态数量指数级增长；MM在环形图中稳定时间更短，吸收状态数量为黄金比例相关函数。RMM的获胜集更小，随机初始颜色下蓝色节点期望值不同。
conclusion: RMM比MM更复杂且稳定时间更长，但吸收状态更少；MM在环形图中表现更高效，但存在更多稳定状态，未来需进一步研究开放问题。
search_text: Random Majority Opinion Diffusion: Stabilization Time, Absorbing States, and Influential Nodes 随机多数意见扩散：稳定时间、吸收状态和影响节点 Consider a graph G with n nodes and m edges, which represents a social network, and assume that initially each node is blue or white. In each round, all nodes simultaneously update their color to the most frequent color in their neighborhood. This is called the Majority Model (MM) if a node keeps its color in case of a tie and the Random Majority Model (RMM) if it chooses blue with probability 1/2 and white otherwise. We prove that there are graphs for which RMM needs exponentially many rounds to reach a stable configuration in expectation, and such a configuration can have exponentially many states (i.e., colorings). This is in contrast to MM, which is known to always reach a stable configuration with one or two states in $O(m)$ rounds. For the special case of a cycle graph C_n, we prove the stronger and tight bounds of $\lceil n/2\rceil-1$ and $O(n^2)$ in MM and RMM, respectively. Furthermore, we show that the number of stable colorings in MM on C_n is equal to $Θ(Φ^n)$, where $Φ= (1+\sqrt{5})/2$ is the golden ratio, while it is equal to 2 for RMM. We also study the minimum size of a winning set, which is a set of nodes whose agreement on a color in the initial coloring enforces the process to end in a coloring where all nodes share that color. We present tight bounds on the minimum size of a winning set for both MM and RMM. Furthermore, we analyze our models for a random initial coloring, where each node is colored blue independently with some probability $p$ and white otherwise. Using some martingale analysis and counting arguments, we prove that the expected final number of blue nodes is respectively equal to $(2p^2-p^3)n/(1-p+p^2)$ and pn in MM and RMM on a cycle graph C_n. Finally, we conduct some experiments which complement our theoretical findings and also lead to the proposal of some intriguing open problems and conjectures to be tackled in future work. 考虑一个具有 n 个节点和 m 个边的图 G，它代表一个社交网络，并假设最初每个节点是蓝色或白色。在每一轮中，所有节点同时将其颜色更新为其邻域中最常见的颜色。如果节点在平局时保持其颜色，则称为多数模型 (MM)；如果节点以 1/2 的概率选择蓝色，否则称为随机多数模型 (RMM)。我们证明，对于某些图，RMM 需要指数级的轮数才能达到预期的稳定配置，并且这种配置可以具有指数级的多个状态（即着色）。这与 MM 形成对比，众所周知，MM 总是在 $O(m)$ 轮中达到一个或两个状态的稳定配置。对于循环图 C_n 的特殊情况，我们分别证明了 MM 和 RMM 中 $\lceil n/2\rceil-1$ 和 $O(n^2)$ 的更强和紧界。此外，我们表明，C_n 上 MM 中稳定着色的数量等于 $θ(Φ^n)$，其中 $Φ= (1+\sqrt{5})/2$ 是黄金比例，而 RMM 则等于 2。我们还研究了获胜集的最小大小，这是一组节点，其在初始着色中对颜色的一致强制该过程以所有节点共享该颜色的着色结束。我们对 MM 和 RMM 的获胜集的最小大小提出了严格的限制。此外，我们分析模型的随机初始着色，其中每个节点以一定的概率 $p$ 独立地着色为蓝色，否则为白色。使用一些鞅分析和计数参数，我们证明了循环图 C_n 上 MM 和 RMM 中蓝色节点的预期最终数量分别等于 $(2p^2-p^3)n/(1-p+p^2)$ 和 pn。最后，我们进行了一些实验，这些实验补充了我们的理论发现，并提出了一些在未来工作中需要解决的有趣的开放问题和猜想。 本文研究了随机多数意见扩散模型（RMM）与多数模型（MM）在社交网络中的稳定时间、吸收状态及关键节点的影响。 Ahad N. Zehmakan cs.DS,cs.AI,cs.DM,cs.MA,cs.SI

title: Dataset Distillation with Convexified Implicit Gradients
title_zh: 具有凸隐式梯度的数据集蒸馏
abstract: We propose a new dataset distillation algorithm using reparameterization and convexification of implicit gradients (RCIG), that substantially improves the state-of-the-art. To this end, we first formulate dataset distillation as a bi-level optimization problem. Then, we show how implicit gradients can be effectively used to compute meta-gradient updates. We further equip the algorithm with a convexified approximation that corresponds to learning on top of a frozen finite-width neural tangent kernel. Finally, we improve bias in implicit gradients by parameterizing the neural network to enable analytical computation of final-layer parameters given the body parameters. RCIG establishes the new state-of-the-art on a diverse series of dataset distillation tasks. Notably, with one image per class, on resized ImageNet, RCIG sees on average a 108\% improvement over the previous state-of-the-art distillation algorithm. Similarly, we observed a 66\% gain over SOTA on Tiny-ImageNet and 37\% on CIFAR-100.
summary: We propose a new dataset distillation algorithm using reparameterization and convexification of implicit gradients (RCIG), that substantially improves the state-of-the-art. To this end, we first formulate dataset distillation as a bi-level optimization problem. Then, we show how implicit gradients can be effectively used to compute meta-gradient updates. We further equip the algorithm with a convexified approximation that corresponds to learning on top of a frozen finite-width neural tangent kernel. Finally, we improve bias in implicit gradients by parameterizing the neural network to enable analytical computation of final-layer parameters given the body parameters. RCIG establishes the new state-of-the-art on a diverse series of dataset distillation tasks. Notably, with one image per class, on resized ImageNet, RCIG sees on average a 108\% improvement over the previous state-of-the-art distillation algorithm. Similarly, we observed a 66\% gain over SOTA on Tiny-ImageNet and 37\% on CIFAR-100.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种使用隐式梯度重新参数化和凸化（RCIG）的新数据集蒸馏算法，该算法大大提高了现有技术。为此，我们首先将数据集蒸馏表述为双层优化问题。然后，我们展示了如何有效地使用隐式梯度来计算元梯度更新。我们进一步为该算法配备了凸近似，该近似对应于在冻结的有限宽度神经切线内核之上的学习。最后，我们通过参数化神经网络来改善隐式梯度的偏差，以便能够在给定身体参数的情况下分析计算最终层参数。 RCIG 在一系列不同的数据集蒸馏任务上建立了新的最先进技术。值得注意的是，在调整大小的 ImageNet 上，每类一张图像，RCIG 比之前最先进的蒸馏算法平均提高了 108%。同样，我们观察到在 Tiny-ImageNet 上比 SOTA 提高了 66%，在 CIFAR-100 上比 SOTA 提高了 37%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于凸化隐式梯度的重新参数化数据集蒸馏算法（RCIG），显著提升了数据集蒸馏的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集蒸馏方法在效率和精度上存在局限，需通过凸化隐式梯度和重新参数化技术优化模型训练过程。
AI.method: 将数据集蒸馏建模为双层优化问题，利用隐式梯度计算元梯度更新，并引入凸化近似（基于冻结的有限宽度神经切线核）及参数化网络以实现最终层参数的解析计算。
AI.result: 在Resized ImageNet、Tiny-ImageNet和CIFAR-100数据集上，RCIG分别较之前最优方法提升108%、66%和37%（每类仅用一张图像）。
AI.conclusion: RCIG通过凸化隐式梯度与重新参数化技术的结合，确立了数据集蒸馏任务的新基准。

authors_text: Srishti Palani,Aakanksha Naik,Doug Downey,Amy X. Zhang,Jonathan Bragg,Joseph Chee Chang
title: Relatedly: Scaffolding Literature Reviews with Existing Related Work Sections
title_zh: 相关：用现有相关工作部分搭建文献综述
abstract: Scholars who want to research a scientific topic must take time to read, extract meaning, and identify connections across many papers. As scientific literature grows, this becomes increasingly challenging. Meanwhile, authors summarize prior research in papers' related work sections, though this is scoped to support a single paper. A formative study found that while reading multiple related work paragraphs helps overview a topic, it is hard to navigate overlapping and diverging references and research foci. In this work, we design a system, Relatedly, that scaffolds exploring and reading multiple related work paragraphs on a topic, with features including dynamic re-ranking and highlighting to spotlight unexplored dissimilar information, auto-generated descriptive paragraph headings, and low-lighting of redundant information. From a within-subjects user study (n=15), we found that scholars generate more coherent, insightful, and comprehensive topic outlines using Relatedly compared to a baseline paper list.
summary: Scholars who want to research a scientific topic must take time to read, extract meaning, and identify connections across many papers. As scientific literature grows, this becomes increasingly challenging. Meanwhile, authors summarize prior research in papers' related work sections, though this is scoped to support a single paper. A formative study found that while reading multiple related work paragraphs helps overview a topic, it is hard to navigate overlapping and diverging references and research foci. In this work, we design a system, Relatedly, that scaffolds exploring and reading multiple related work paragraphs on a topic, with features including dynamic re-ranking and highlighting to spotlight unexplored dissimilar information, auto-generated descriptive paragraph headings, and low-lighting of redundant information. From a within-subjects user study (n=15), we found that scholars generate more coherent, insightful, and comprehensive topic outlines using Relatedly compared to a baseline paper list.
abstract_zh: 想要研究科学主题的学者必须花时间阅读、提取意义并确定许多论文之间的联系。随着科学文献的增长，这变得越来越具有挑战性。与此同时，作者总结了论文相关工作部分的先前研究，尽管这仅限于支持一篇论文。一项形成性研究发现，虽然阅读多个相关的工作段落有助于概述一个主题，但很难导航重叠和发散的参考文献和研究焦点。在这项工作中，我们设计了一个系统，相关地，该系统支持探索和阅读某个主题的多个相关工作段落，其功能包括动态重新排名和突出显示以突出​​未探索的不同信息、自动生成的描述性段落标题以及冗余信息的低亮度显示。从一项受试者内用户研究（n=15）中，我们发现与基线论文列表相比，学者们使用Relatedly生成了更加连贯、富有洞察力和全面的主题大纲。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Relatedly的系统，旨在通过整合多篇论文的'相关工作'部分，帮助学者更高效地进行文献综述。
AI.motivation: 随着科学文献的快速增长，学者们面临阅读、理解和整合多篇论文的挑战，而现有论文中的'相关工作'部分仅服务于单篇论文，难以应对跨论文的复杂关联。
AI.method: 设计了一个包含动态重排序、差异信息高亮、自动生成段落标题及冗余信息弱化功能的系统，并通过15人组内用户研究验证效果。
AI.result: 使用Relatedly的学者生成的文献主题大纲在连贯性、洞察力和全面性上显著优于传统论文列表基线。
AI.conclusion: Relatedly通过结构化呈现多篇论文的'相关工作'内容，有效提升了文献综述的效率和质量。

From a within-subjects user study (n=15), we found that scholars generate more coherent, insightful, and comprehensive topic outlines using Relatedly compared to a baseline paper list. 想要研究科学主题的学者必须花时间阅读、提取意义并确定许多论文之间的联系。随着科学文献的增长，这变得越来越具有挑战性。与此同时，作者总结了论文相关工作部分的先前研究，尽管这仅限于支持一篇论文。一项形成性研究发现，虽然阅读多个相关的工作段落有助于概述一个主题，但很难导航重叠和发散的参考文献和研究焦点。在这项工作中，我们设计了一个系统，相关地，该系统支持探索和阅读某个主题的多个相关工作段落，其功能包括动态重新排名和突出显示以突出​​未探索的不同信息、自动生成的描述性段落标题以及冗余信息的低亮度显示。从一项受试者内用户研究（n=15）中，我们发现与基线论文列表相比，学者们使用Relatedly生成了更加连贯、富有洞察力和全面的主题大纲。 本文提出了一种名为Relatedly的系统，旨在通过整合多篇论文的'相关工作'部分，帮助学者更高效地进行文献综述。 Srishti Palani,Aakanksha Naik,Doug Downey,Amy X. Zhang,Jonathan Bragg,Joseph Chee Chang cs.HC,cs.DL,cs.IR

authors_text: Ruokai Yin,Youngeun Kim,Yuhang Li,Abhishek Moitra,Nitin Satpute,Anna Hambitzer,Priyadarshini Panda
title: Workload-Balanced Pruning for Sparse Spiking Neural Networks
title_zh: 稀疏尖峰神经网络的工作负载平衡修剪
comment: 11 pages. Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Emerging Topics in Computational Intelligence (2024)
comments: 11 pages. Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Emerging Topics in Computational Intelligence (2024)
abstract: Pruning for Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) has emerged as a fundamental methodology for deploying deep SNNs on resource-constrained edge devices. Though the existing pruning methods can provide extremely high weight sparsity for deep SNNs, the high weight sparsity brings a workload imbalance problem. Specifically, the workload imbalance happens when a different number of non-zero weights are assigned to hardware units running in parallel. This results in low hardware utilization and thus imposes longer latency and higher energy costs. In preliminary experiments, we show that sparse SNNs (~98% weight sparsity) can suffer as low as ~59% utilization. To alleviate the workload imbalance problem, we propose u-Ticket, where we monitor and adjust the weight connections of the SNN during Lottery Ticket Hypothesis (LTH) based pruning, thus guaranteeing the final ticket gets optimal utilization when deployed onto the hardware. Experiments indicate that our u-Ticket can guarantee up to 100% hardware utilization, thus reducing up to 76.9% latency and 63.8% energy cost compared to the non-utilization-aware LTH method.
summary: Pruning for Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) has emerged as a fundamental methodology for deploying deep SNNs on resource-constrained edge devices. Though the existing pruning methods can provide extremely high weight sparsity for deep SNNs, the high weight sparsity brings a workload imbalance problem. Specifically, the workload imbalance happens when a different number of non-zero weights are assigned to hardware units running in parallel. This results in low hardware utilization and thus imposes longer latency and higher energy costs. In preliminary experiments, we show that sparse SNNs (~98% weight sparsity) can suffer as low as ~59% utilization. To alleviate the workload imbalance problem, we propose u-Ticket, where we monitor and adjust the weight connections of the SNN during Lottery Ticket Hypothesis (LTH) based pruning, thus guaranteeing the final ticket gets optimal utilization when deployed onto the hardware. Experiments indicate that our u-Ticket can guarantee up to 100% hardware utilization, thus reducing up to 76.9% latency and 63.8% energy cost compared to the non-utilization-aware LTH method.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 修剪已成为在资源受限的边缘设备上部署深度 SNN 的基本方法。虽然现有的剪枝方法可以为深度SNN提供极高的权重稀疏性，但高权重稀疏性带来了工作负载不平衡问题。具体来说，当不同数量的非零权重分配给并行运行的硬件单元时，就会发生工作负载不平衡。这导致硬件利用率低，从而导致更长的延迟和更高的能源成本。在初步实验中，我们表明稀疏 SNN（约 98% 权重稀疏度）的利用率可能低至约 59%。为了缓解工作负载不平衡问题，我们提出了 u-Ticket，在基于彩票假设 (LTH) 的剪枝过程中监控和调整 SNN 的权重连接，从而保证最终彩票在部署到硬件上时获得最佳利用率。实验表明，与非利用率感知的 LTH 方法相比，我们的 u-Ticket 可以保证高达 100% 的硬件利用率，从而减少高达 76.9% 的延迟和 63.8% 的能源成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出u-Ticket方法，在基于彩票假设的剪枝过程中监控和调整脉冲神经网络（SNN）的权重连接，以解决稀疏SNN部署时的负载不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有SNN剪枝方法虽能实现高权重稀疏度，但会导致硬件单元间负载不均衡，造成硬件利用率低、延迟和能耗增加（实验显示稀疏度达98%时利用率仅59%）。
AI.method: 在彩票假设（LTH）剪枝框架中引入负载感知机制，通过动态监控和调整权重连接，在保证模型精度的同时优化硬件利用率。
AI.result: u-Ticket方法实现100%硬件利用率，相比非负载感知方法降低76.9%的延迟和63.8%的能耗。
AI.conclusion: u-Ticket有效解决了稀疏SNN的负载不平衡问题，为边缘设备部署提供了更高效的解决方案。

title: Accelerating Evolution Through Gene Masking and Distributed Search
title_zh: 通过基因掩蔽和分布式搜索加速进化
abstract: In building practical applications of evolutionary computation (EC), two optimizations are essential. First, the parameters of the search method need to be tuned to the domain in order to balance exploration and exploitation effectively. Second, the search method needs to be distributed to take advantage of parallel computing resources. This paper presents BLADE (BLAnket Distributed Evolution) as an approach to achieving both goals simultaneously. BLADE uses blankets (i.e., masks on the genetic representation) to tune the evolutionary operators during the search, and implements the search through hub-and-spoke distribution. In the paper, (1) the blanket method is formalized for the (1 + 1)EA case as a Markov chain process. Its effectiveness is then demonstrated by analyzing dominant and subdominant eigenvalues of stochastic matrices, suggesting a generalizable theory; (2) the fitness-level theory is used to analyze the distribution method; and (3) these insights are verified experimentally on three benchmark problems, showing that both blankets and distribution lead to accelerated evolution. Moreover, a surprising synergy emerges between them: When combined with distribution, the blanket approach achieves more than $n$-fold speedup with $n$ clients in some cases. The work thus highlights the importance and potential of optimizing evolutionary computation in practical applications.
summary: In building practical applications of evolutionary computation (EC), two optimizations are essential. First, the parameters of the search method need to be tuned to the domain in order to balance exploration and exploitation effectively. Second, the search method needs to be distributed to take advantage of parallel computing resources. This paper presents BLADE (BLAnket Distributed Evolution) as an approach to achieving both goals simultaneously. BLADE uses blankets (i.e., masks on the genetic representation) to tune the evolutionary operators during the search, and implements the search through hub-and-spoke distribution. In the paper, (1) the blanket method is formalized for the (1 + 1)EA case as a Markov chain process. Its effectiveness is then demonstrated by analyzing dominant and subdominant eigenvalues of stochastic matrices, suggesting a generalizable theory; (2) the fitness-level theory is used to analyze the distribution method; and (3) these insights are verified experimentally on three benchmark problems, showing that both blankets and distribution lead to accelerated evolution. Moreover, a surprising synergy emerges between them: When combined with distribution, the blanket approach achieves more than $n$-fold speedup with $n$ clients in some cases. The work thus highlights the importance and potential of optimizing evolutionary computation in practical applications.
abstract_zh: 在构建进化计算（EC）的实际应用中，两项优化至关重要。首先，需要根据领域调整搜索方法的参数，以有效平衡探索和利用。其次，搜索方法需要分布式，以利用并行计算资源。本文提出 BLADE（BLAnket 分布式进化）作为同时实现这两个目标的方法。 BLADE在搜索过程中使用毯子（即遗传表示上的掩模）来调整进化算子，并通过中心辐射分布来实现搜索。在本文中，(1) 将 (1 + 1)EA 情况的毯子方法形式化为马尔可夫链过程。然后通过分析随机矩阵的主特征值和次主特征值来证明其有效性，提出了一个可推广的理论； (2)利用适应度理论对分布方法进行分析； （3）这些见解在三个基准问题上得到了实验验证，表明覆盖层和分布都会导致加速演化。此外，它们之间出现了令人惊讶的协同作用：当与分发相结合时，一揽子方法在某些情况下可以为 $n$ 客户实现超过 $n$ 倍的加速。因此，这项工作强调了在实际应用中优化进化计算的重要性和潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BLADE方法，通过基因掩码和分布式搜索加速进化计算。
AI.motivation: 实际应用中进化计算需平衡探索与利用，并有效利用并行计算资源，现有方法存在优化不足。
AI.method: BLADE采用基因掩码（blanket）调节进化算子，结合中心-辐射式分布式架构，通过马尔可夫链建模掩码过程，并运用适应度层级理论分析分布方法。
AI.result: 在三个基准问题实验中，BLADE实现进化加速，掩码与分布结合时在某些场景下达到超线性加速（n客户端实现n倍以上速度提升）。
AI.conclusion: 基因掩码与分布式搜索协同优化能显著提升进化计算效率，为实际应用提供有效解决方案。

title: Detection-Recovery Gap for Planted Dense Cycles
title_zh: 种植密集循环的检测-回收差距
abstract: Planted dense cycles are a type of latent structure that appears in many applications, such as small-world networks in social sciences and sequence assembly in computational biology. We consider a model where a dense cycle with expected bandwidth $n τ$ and edge density $p$ is planted in an Erdős-Rényi graph $G(n,q)$. We characterize the computational thresholds for the associated detection and recovery problems for the class of low-degree polynomial algorithms. In particular, a gap exists between the two thresholds in a certain regime of parameters. For example, if $n^{-3/4} \ll τ\ll n^{-1/2}$ and $p = C q = Θ(1)$ for a constant $C>1$, the detection problem is computationally easy while the recovery problem is hard for low-degree algorithms.
summary: Planted dense cycles are a type of latent structure that appears in many applications, such as small-world networks in social sciences and sequence assembly in computational biology. We consider a model where a dense cycle with expected bandwidth $n τ$ and edge density $p$ is planted in an Erdős-Rényi graph $G(n,q)$. We characterize the computational thresholds for the associated detection and recovery problems for the class of low-degree polynomial algorithms. In particular, a gap exists between the two thresholds in a certain regime of parameters. For example, if $n^{-3/4} \ll τ\ll n^{-1/2}$ and $p = C q = Θ(1)$ for a constant $C>1$, the detection problem is computationally easy while the recovery problem is hard for low-degree algorithms.
abstract_zh: 植入密集循环是一种潜在结构，出现在许多应用中，例如社会科学中的小世界网络和计算生物学中的序列组装。我们考虑一个模型，其中具有预期带宽 $n τ$ 和边缘密度 $p$ 的密集循环被植入 Erdős-Rényi 图 $G(n,q)$ 中。我们描述了低次多项式算法类别的相关检测和恢复问题的计算阈值。特别是，在特定的参数范围内，两个阈值之间存在差距。例如，如果 $n^{-3/4} \ll τ\ll n^{-1/2}$ 且 $p = C q = θ(1)$ 对于常数 $C>1$，则检测问题在计算上很容易，而恢复问题对于低度算法来说很困难。

AI.tldr: 研究在Erdős-Rényi随机图中植入密集环的检测与恢复问题的计算阈值，并刻画低度多项式算法下检测与恢复能力之间的差距。
AI.motivation: 密集环结构出现在小世界网络、序列组装等实际应用中，理解检测与恢复问题之间的计算阈值差距对于算法设计和理论理解具有重要意义。
AI.method: 采用低度多项式算法框架，理论分析在给定参数空间（带宽nτ、边密度p、背景图边概率q）下检测与恢复问题的计算阈值。
AI.result: 发现在特定参数区域存在检测-恢复差距：当n^{-3/4} << τ << n^{-1/2}且p = C q = Θ(1)（常数C>1）时，检测问题对低度算法是容易的，而恢复问题是困难的。
AI.conclusion: 对于植入密集环模型，低度多项式算法下检测与恢复问题的计算阈值并非总是重合，在特定参数范围内存在明显的计算难易差距。
