search_text: Detection-Recovery Gap for Planted Dense Cycles 种植密集循环的检测-回收差距 Planted dense cycles are a type of latent structure that appears in many applications, such as small-world networks in social sciences and sequence assembly in computational biology. We consider a model where a dense cycle with expected bandwidth $n τ$ and edge density $p$ is planted in an Erdős-Rényi graph $G(n,q)$. We characterize the computational thresholds for the associated detection and recovery problems for the class of low-degree polynomial algorithms. In particular, a gap exists between the two thresholds in a certain regime of parameters. For example, if $n^{-3/4} \ll τ\ll n^{-1/2}$ and $p = C q = Θ(1)$ for a constant $C>1$, the detection problem is computationally easy while the recovery problem is hard for low-degree algorithms. 植入密集循环是一种潜在结构，出现在许多应用中，例如社会科学中的小世界网络和计算生物学中的序列组装。我们考虑一个模型，其中具有预期带宽 $n τ$ 和边缘密度 $p$ 的密集循环被植入 Erdős-Rényi 图 $G(n,q)$ 中。我们描述了低次多项式算法类别的相关检测和恢复问题的计算阈值。特别是，在特定的参数范围内，两个阈值之间存在差距。例如，如果 $n^{-3/4} \ll τ\ll n^{-1/2}$ 且 $p = C q = θ(1)$ 对于常数 $C>1$，则检测问题在计算上很容易，而恢复问题对于低度算法来说很困难。 研究在Erdős-Rényi随机图中植入密集环的检测与恢复问题的计算阈值，并刻画低度多项式算法下检测与恢复能力之间的差距。 Cheng Mao,Alexander S. Wein,Shenduo Zhang math.ST,cs.DS,stat.ML

title: Robust Unsupervised StyleGAN Image Restoration
title_zh: 鲁棒无监督 StyleGAN 图像恢复
abstract: GAN-based image restoration inverts the generative process to repair images corrupted by known degradations. Existing unsupervised methods must be carefully tuned for each task and degradation level. In this work, we make StyleGAN image restoration robust: a single set of hyperparameters works across a wide range of degradation levels. This makes it possible to handle combinations of several degradations, without the need to retune. Our proposed approach relies on a 3-phase progressive latent space extension and a conservative optimizer, which avoids the need for any additional regularization terms. Extensive experiments demonstrate robustness on inpainting, upsampling, denoising, and deartifacting at varying degradations levels, outperforming other StyleGAN-based inversion techniques. Our approach also favorably compares to diffusion-based restoration by yielding much more realistic inversion results. Code is available at https://lvsn.github.io/RobustUnsupervised/.
summary: GAN-based image restoration inverts the generative process to repair images corrupted by known degradations. Existing unsupervised methods must be carefully tuned for each task and degradation level. In this work, we make StyleGAN image restoration robust: a single set of hyperparameters works across a wide range of degradation levels. This makes it possible to handle combinations of several degradations, without the need to retune. Our proposed approach relies on a 3-phase progressive latent space extension and a conservative optimizer, which avoids the need for any additional regularization terms. Extensive experiments demonstrate robustness on inpainting, upsampling, denoising, and deartifacting at varying degradations levels, outperforming other StyleGAN-based inversion techniques. Our approach also favorably compares to diffusion-based restoration by yielding much more realistic inversion results. Code is available at https://lvsn.github.io/RobustUnsupervised/.
abstract_zh: 基于 GAN 的图像恢复反转生成过程来修复因已知退化而损坏的图像。必须针对每个任务和退化级别仔细调整现有的无监督方法。在这项工作中，我们使 StyleGAN 图像恢复变得稳健：一组超参数适用于各种退化级别。这使得可以处理多种降级的组合，而无需重新调整。我们提出的方法依赖于三相渐进潜在空间扩展和保守优化器，这避免了任何额外的正则化项的需要。大量实验证明了在不同的退化水平下修复、上采样、去噪和去伪影的鲁棒性，优于其他基于 StyleGAN 的反演技术。与基于扩散的恢复相比，我们的方法还可以产生更真实的反演结果。代码可在 https://lvsn.github.io/RobustUnsupervised/ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种鲁棒的无监督StyleGAN图像修复方法，能够在不同退化程度下无需调整参数即可处理多种图像退化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督StyleGAN图像修复方法需要针对每个任务和退化程度单独调整参数，缺乏通用性且处理多退化组合时效率低下。
AI.method: 采用三阶段渐进潜在空间扩展策略与保守优化器，无需额外正则化项即可实现跨退化程度的鲁棒修复。
AI.result: 在修复、上采样、去噪和去伪影等任务中，方法在不同退化程度下均优于其他StyleGAN反转技术，并显著超越扩散模型的修复效果。
AI.conclusion: 提出的通用化修复框架通过参数共享和结构优化，实现了对多退化场景的高效处理，为无监督图像修复提供了新思路。

authors_text: Danilo Ribeiro,Shen Wang,Xiaofei Ma,Henry Zhu,Rui Dong,Deguang Kong,Juliette Burger,Anjelica Ramos,William Wang,Zhiheng Huang,George Karypis,Bing Xiang,Dan Roth
title: STREET: A Multi-Task Structured Reasoning and Explanation Benchmark
title_zh: STREET：多任务结构化推理和解释基准
abstract: We introduce STREET, a unified multi-task and multi-domain natural language reasoning and explanation benchmark. Unlike most existing question-answering (QA) datasets, we expect models to not only answer questions, but also produce step-by-step structured explanations describing how premises in the question are used to produce intermediate conclusions that can prove the correctness of a certain answer. We perform extensive evaluation with popular language models such as few-shot prompting GPT-3 and fine-tuned T5. We find that these models still lag behind human performance when producing such structured reasoning steps. We believe this work will provide a way for the community to better train and test systems on multi-step reasoning and explanations in natural language.
summary: We introduce STREET, a unified multi-task and multi-domain natural language reasoning and explanation benchmark. Unlike most existing question-answering (QA) datasets, we expect models to not only answer questions, but also produce step-by-step structured explanations describing how premises in the question are used to produce intermediate conclusions that can prove the correctness of a certain answer. We perform extensive evaluation with popular language models such as few-shot prompting GPT-3 and fine-tuned T5. We find that these models still lag behind human performance when producing such structured reasoning steps. We believe this work will provide a way for the community to better train and test systems on multi-step reasoning and explanations in natural language.
abstract_zh: 我们推出 STREET，一个统一的多任务和多领域自然语言推理和解释基准。与大多数现有的问答（QA）数据集不同，我们期望模型不仅能够回答问题，还能产生逐步的结构化解释，描述如何使用问题中的前提来产生中间结论，从而证明某个答案的正确性。我们使用流行的语言模型（例如少样本提示 GPT-3 和微调的 T5）进行广泛的评估。我们发现这些模型在产生这种结构化推理步骤时仍然落后于人类的表现。我们相信这项工作将为社区提供一种更好地训练和测试自然语言多步推理和解释系统的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出STREET基准，要求模型在多任务和多领域场景下完成自然语言推理与结构化解释生成。
AI.motivation: 现有问答数据集未要求模型生成结构化推理过程，而实际中人类解答需明确逻辑步骤，需建立更严格的评估标准。
AI.method: 构建包含多任务多领域的基准数据集，要求模型输出答案及对应前提到结论的结构化推理步骤，并使用GPT-3和T5进行对比实验。
AI.result: 主流语言模型在生成多步骤结构化解释任务中表现显著低于人类水平。
AI.conclusion: STREET基准为自然语言处理领域提供了评估和训练多步推理与解释能力的新方向。

We perform extensive evaluation with popular language models such as few-shot prompting GPT-3 and fine-tuned T5. We find that these models still lag behind human performance when producing such structured reasoning steps. We believe this work will provide a way for the community to better train and test systems on multi-step reasoning and explanations in natural language. 我们推出 STREET，一个统一的多任务和多领域自然语言推理和解释基准。与大多数现有的问答（QA）数据集不同，我们期望模型不仅能够回答问题，还能产生逐步的结构化解释，描述如何使用问题中的前提来产生中间结论，从而证明某个答案的正确性。我们使用流行的语言模型（例如少样本提示 GPT-3 和微调的 T5）进行广泛的评估。我们发现这些模型在产生这种结构化推理步骤时仍然落后于人类的表现。我们相信这项工作将为社区提供一种更好地训练和测试自然语言多步推理和解释系统的方法。 本文提出STREET基准，要求模型在多任务和多领域场景下完成自然语言推理与结构化解释生成。 Danilo Ribeiro,Shen Wang,Xiaofei Ma,Henry Zhu,Rui Dong,Deguang Kong,Juliette Burger,Anjelica Ramos,William Wang,Zhiheng Huang,George Karypis,Bing Xiang,Dan Roth cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Charlie Tran,Kai Shen,Kang Liu,Akshay Ashok,Adolfo Ramirez-Zamora,Jinghua Chen,Yulin Li,Ruogu Fang
title: Deep Learning Predicts Prevalent and Incident Parkinson's Disease From UK Biobank Fundus Imaging
title_zh: 深度学习通过英国生物银行眼底成像预测帕金森病的流行和发病率
abstract: Parkinson's disease is the world's fastest-growing neurological disorder. Research to elucidate the mechanisms of Parkinson's disease and automate diagnostics would greatly improve the treatment of patients with Parkinson's disease. Current diagnostic methods are expensive and have limited availability. Considering the insidious and preclinical onset and progression of the disease, a desirable screening should be diagnostically accurate even before the onset of symptoms to allow medical interventions. We highlight retinal fundus imaging, often termed a window to the brain, as a diagnostic screening modality for Parkinson's disease. We conducted a systematic evaluation of conventional machine learning and deep learning techniques to classify Parkinson's disease from UK Biobank fundus imaging. Our results show that Parkinson's disease individuals can be differentiated from age and gender-matched healthy subjects with an Area Under the Curve (AUC) of 0.77. This accuracy is maintained when predicting either prevalent or incident Parkinson's disease. Explainability and trustworthiness are enhanced by visual attribution maps of localized biomarkers and quantified metrics of model robustness to data perturbations.
summary: Parkinson's disease is the world's fastest-growing neurological disorder. Research to elucidate the mechanisms of Parkinson's disease and automate diagnostics would greatly improve the treatment of patients with Parkinson's disease. Current diagnostic methods are expensive and have limited availability. Considering the insidious and preclinical onset and progression of the disease, a desirable screening should be diagnostically accurate even before the onset of symptoms to allow medical interventions. We highlight retinal fundus imaging, often termed a window to the brain, as a diagnostic screening modality for Parkinson's disease. We conducted a systematic evaluation of conventional machine learning and deep learning techniques to classify Parkinson's disease from UK Biobank fundus imaging. Our results show that Parkinson's disease individuals can be differentiated from age and gender-matched healthy subjects with an Area Under the Curve (AUC) of 0.77. This accuracy is maintained when predicting either prevalent or incident Parkinson's disease. Explainability and trustworthiness are enhanced by visual attribution maps of localized biomarkers and quantified metrics of model robustness to data perturbations.
abstract_zh: 帕金森病是世界上增长最快的神经系统疾病。阐明帕金森病机制和自动诊断的研究将极大地改善帕金森病患者的治疗。目前的诊断方法价格昂贵且可用性有限。考虑到疾病的隐匿性和临床前发病和进展，即使在症状出现之前，理想的筛查也应该是诊断准确的，以便进行医疗干预。我们强调视网膜眼底成像，通常被称为大脑的窗口，作为帕金森病的诊断筛查方式。我们对传统机器学习和深度学习技术进行了系统评估，以对英国生物银行眼底成像中的帕金森病进行分类。我们的结果表明，帕金森病个体可以与年龄和性别匹配的健康受试者区分开来，曲线下面积 (AUC) 为 0.77。在预测帕金森病的患病率或发病率时，仍能保持这种准确性。通过局部生物标志物的视觉归因图和模型对数据扰动的稳健性的量化指标，增强了可解释性和可信度。

AI.tldr: 该论文利用深度学习技术，基于UK Biobank的视网膜眼底成像数据，预测帕金森病的患病和新发病例。
AI.motivation: 帕金森病诊断成本高且资源有限，需开发无创、早期筛查方法。视网膜成像作为‘大脑窗口’可能提供潜在生物标志物。
AI.method: 系统评估传统机器学习与深度学习模型，分析UK Biobank眼底图像数据，结合可视化归因图与模型鲁棒性指标增强可解释性。
AI.result: 模型可区分帕金森病患者与健康对照组（AUC=0.77），且对现患病与新发病例预测保持一致准确性。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习结合视网膜成像可作为帕金森病筛查工具，可视化生物标志物与鲁棒性分析提升了模型可信度。

authors_text: Karthik Valmeekam,Sarath Sreedharan,Matthew Marquez,Alberto Olmo,Subbarao Kambhampati
title: On the Planning Abilities of Large Language Models (A Critical Investigation with a Proposed Benchmark)
title_zh: 关于大型语言模型的规划能力（带有拟议基准的批判性调查）
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2206.10498
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2206.10498
abstract: Intrigued by the claims of emergent reasoning capabilities in LLMs trained on general web corpora, in this paper, we set out to investigate their planning capabilities. We aim to evaluate (1) how good LLMs are by themselves in generating and validating simple plans in commonsense planning tasks (of the type that humans are generally quite good at) and (2) how good LLMs are in being a source of heuristic guidance for other agents--either AI planners or human planners--in their planning tasks. To investigate these questions in a systematic rather than anecdotal manner, we start by developing a benchmark suite based on the kinds of domains employed in the International Planning Competition. On this benchmark, we evaluate LLMs in three modes: autonomous, heuristic and human-in-the-loop. Our results show that LLM's ability to autonomously generate executable plans is quite meager, averaging only about 3% success rate. The heuristic and human-in-the-loop modes show slightly more promise. In addition to these results, we also make our benchmark and evaluation tools available to support investigations by research community.
summary: Intrigued by the claims of emergent reasoning capabilities in LLMs trained on general web corpora, in this paper, we set out to investigate their planning capabilities. We aim to evaluate (1) how good LLMs are by themselves in generating and validating simple plans in commonsense planning tasks (of the type that humans are generally quite good at) and (2) how good LLMs are in being a source of heuristic guidance for other agents--either AI planners or human planners--in their planning tasks. To investigate these questions in a systematic rather than anecdotal manner, we start by developing a benchmark suite based on the kinds of domains employed in the International Planning Competition. On this benchmark, we evaluate LLMs in three modes: autonomous, heuristic and human-in-the-loop. Our results show that LLM's ability to autonomously generate executable plans is quite meager, averaging only about 3% success rate. The heuristic and human-in-the-loop modes show slightly more promise. In addition to these results, we also make our benchmark and evaluation tools available to support investigations by research community.
abstract_zh: 出于对在通用网络语料库上训练的法学硕士的紧急推理能力的说法的兴趣，在本文中，我们着手研究他们的规划能力。我们的目标是评估（1）法学硕士本身在常识性规划任务（人类通常非常擅长的类型）中生成和验证简单计划的能力如何，以及（2）法学硕士在为其他智能体（无论是人工智能规划者还是人类规划者）的规划任务中提供启发式指导的来源方面有多好。为了以系统而非轶事的方式研究这些问题，我们首先根据国际规划竞赛中使用的领域类型开发一个基准套件。在此基准上，我们以三种模式评估法学硕士：自主模式、启发式模式和人机参与模式。我们的结果表明，LLM 自主生成可执行计划的能力相当微弱，平​​均成功率只有 3% 左右。启发式和人机交互模式显示出了更多的前景。除了这些结果之外，我们还提供基准和评估工具来支持研究界的调查。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了大语言模型在常识规划任务中的自主规划能力，并提出一个基于国际规划竞赛领域的基准测试套件。
AI.motivation: 针对大语言模型被宣传具有涌现推理能力的现状，系统性验证其在规划任务中的实际表现并探索其作为辅助工具的潜力。
AI.method: 构建国际规划竞赛领域基准，通过自主模式、启发式模式和人机协作模式三类实验评估模型规划能力。
AI.result: 模型自主生成可执行计划的成功率仅约3%，启发式模式和人机协作模式表现稍好但仍有显著提升空间。
AI.conclusion: 大语言模型自主规划能力有限，但可作为启发式辅助工具提升其他智能体或人类规划效率，研究工具已开源共享。

authors_text: Ritayu Nagpal,Sam Long,Shahid Jahagirdar,Weiwei Liu,Scott Fazackerley,Ramon Lawrence,Amritpal Singh
title: An Application of Deep Learning for Sweet Cherry Phenotyping using YOLO Object Detection
title_zh: 使用 YOLO 目标检测深度学习在甜樱桃表型分析中的应用
comment: Published in 25th International Conference on Image Processing, Computer Vision, & Pattern Recognition (IPCV'21)
comments: Published in 25th International Conference on Image Processing, Computer Vision, & Pattern Recognition (IPCV'21)
abstract: Tree fruit breeding is a long-term activity involving repeated measurements of various fruit quality traits on a large number of samples. These traits are traditionally measured by manually counting the fruits, weighing to indirectly measure the fruit size, and fruit colour is classified subjectively into different color categories using visual comparison to colour charts. These processes are slow, expensive and subject to evaluators' bias and fatigue. Recent advancements in deep learning can help automate this process. A method was developed to automatically count the number of sweet cherry fruits in a camera's field of view in real time using YOLOv3. A system capable of analyzing the image data for other traits such as size and color was also developed using Python. The YOLO model obtained close to 99% accuracy in object detection and counting of cherries and 90% on the Intersection over Union metric for object localization when extracting size and colour information. The model surpasses human performance and offers a significant improvement compared to manual counting.
summary: Tree fruit breeding is a long-term activity involving repeated measurements of various fruit quality traits on a large number of samples. These traits are traditionally measured by manually counting the fruits, weighing to indirectly measure the fruit size, and fruit colour is classified subjectively into different color categories using visual comparison to colour charts. These processes are slow, expensive and subject to evaluators' bias and fatigue. Recent advancements in deep learning can help automate this process. A method was developed to automatically count the number of sweet cherry fruits in a camera's field of view in real time using YOLOv3. A system capable of analyzing the image data for other traits such as size and color was also developed using Python. The YOLO model obtained close to 99% accuracy in object detection and counting of cherries and 90% on the Intersection over Union metric for object localization when extracting size and colour information. The model surpasses human performance and offers a significant improvement compared to manual counting.
abstract_zh: 果树育种是一项长期活动，涉及对大量样品的各种果实品质性状的重复测量。传统上，这些性状是通过手动计数水果、称重来间接测量水果大小来测量的，并且通过与色卡的视觉比较将水果颜色主观地分为不同的颜色类别。这些过程缓慢、昂贵，并且容易受到评估者的偏见和疲劳的影响。深度学习的最新进展可以帮助实现这一过程的自动化。开发了一种使用 YOLOv3 自动实时计算相机视野中甜樱桃果实数量的方法。还使用 Python 开发了一个能够分析图像数据的其他特征（例如大小和颜色）的系统。 YOLO 模型在樱桃的目标检测和计数方面获得了接近 99% 的准确率，在提取大小和颜色信息时，在用于目标定位的交并集度量上获得了 90% 的准确率。该模型超越了人类的表现，并且与手动计数相比有了显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 应用深度学习中的YOLOv3模型实现甜樱桃的实时自动计数及大小、颜色等表型特征的自动化分析。
AI.motivation: 传统人工测量甜樱桃品质特征的方法存在效率低、成本高及主观性强等问题，亟需自动化解决方案提升检测效率和准确性。
AI.method: 基于YOLOv3目标检测模型实现樱桃的实时计数，结合Python开发图像分析系统提取果实大小与颜色等表型信息。
AI.result: YOLO模型在樱桃检测计数任务中达到近99%准确率，尺寸和颜色信息提取的IoU指标为90%，显著优于传统人工方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现了甜樱桃表型特征的自动化检测，显著提升检测效率与准确性，为果树育种研究提供高效可靠的工具支持。

search_text: An Application of Deep Learning for Sweet Cherry Phenotyping using YOLO Object Detection 使用 YOLO 目标检测深度学习在甜樱桃表型分析中的应用 Tree fruit breeding is a long-term activity involving repeated measurements of various fruit quality traits on a large number of samples. These traits are traditionally measured by manually counting the fruits, weighing to indirectly measure the fruit size, and fruit colour is classified subjectively into different color categories using visual comparison to colour charts. These processes are slow, expensive and subject to evaluators' bias and fatigue. Recent advancements in deep learning can help automate this process. A method was developed to automatically count the number of sweet cherry fruits in a camera's field of view in real time using YOLOv3. A system capable of analyzing the image data for other traits such as size and color was also developed using Python. The YOLO model obtained close to 99% accuracy in object detection and counting of cherries and 90% on the Intersection over Union metric for object localization when extracting size and colour information. The model surpasses human performance and offers a significant improvement compared to manual counting. 果树育种是一项长期活动，涉及对大量样品的各种果实品质性状的重复测量。传统上，这些性状是通过手动计数水果、称重来间接测量水果大小来测量的，并且通过与色卡的视觉比较将水果颜色主观地分为不同的颜色类别。这些过程缓慢、昂贵，并且容易受到评估者的偏见和疲劳的影响。深度学习的最新进展可以帮助实现这一过程的自动化。开发了一种使用 YOLOv3 自动实时计算相机视野中甜樱桃果实数量的方法。还使用 Python 开发了一个能够分析图像数据的其他特征（例如大小和颜色）的系统。 YOLO 模型在樱桃的目标检测和计数方面获得了接近 99% 的准确率，在提取大小和颜色信息时，在用于目标定位的交并集度量上获得了 90% 的准确率。该模型超越了人类的表现，并且与手动计数相比有了显着的改进。 应用深度学习中的YOLOv3模型实现甜樱桃的实时自动计数及大小、颜色等表型特征的自动化分析。 Ritayu Nagpal,Sam Long,Shahid Jahagirdar,Weiwei Liu,Scott Fazackerley,Ramon Lawrence,Amritpal Singh cs.CV,cs.AI

title: Simplified Continuous High Dimensional Belief Space Planning with Adaptive Probabilistic Belief-dependent Constraints
title_zh: 具有自适应概率置信约束的简化连续高维置信空间规划
abstract: Online decision making under uncertainty in partially observable domains, also known as Belief Space Planning, is a fundamental problem in robotics and Artificial Intelligence. Due to an abundance of plausible future unravelings, calculating an optimal course of action inflicts an enormous computational burden on the agent. Moreover, in many scenarios, e.g., information gathering, it is required to introduce a belief-dependent constraint. Prompted by this demand, in this paper, we consider a recently introduced probabilistic belief-dependent constrained POMDP. We present a technique to adaptively accept or discard a candidate action sequence with respect to a probabilistic belief-dependent constraint, before expanding a complete set of future observations samples and without any loss in accuracy. Moreover, using our proposed framework, we contribute an adaptive method to find a maximal feasible return (e.g., information gain) in terms of Value at Risk for the candidate action sequence with substantial acceleration. On top of that, we introduce an adaptive simplification technique for a probabilistically constrained setting. Such an approach provably returns an identical-quality solution while dramatically accelerating online decision making. Our universal framework applies to any belief-dependent constrained continuous POMDP with parametric beliefs, as well as nonparametric beliefs represented by particles. In the context of an information-theoretic constraint, our presented framework stochastically quantifies if a cumulative information gain along the planning horizon is sufficiently significant (e.g. for, information gathering, active SLAM). We apply our method to active SLAM, a highly challenging problem of high dimensional Belief Space Planning. Extensive realistic simulations corroborate the superiority of our proposed ideas.
summary: Online decision making under uncertainty in partially observable domains, also known as Belief Space Planning, is a fundamental problem in robotics and Artificial Intelligence. Due to an abundance of plausible future unravelings, calculating an optimal course of action inflicts an enormous computational burden on the agent. Moreover, in many scenarios, e.g., information gathering, it is required to introduce a belief-dependent constraint. Prompted by this demand, in this paper, we consider a recently introduced probabilistic belief-dependent constrained POMDP. We present a technique to adaptively accept or discard a candidate action sequence with respect to a probabilistic belief-dependent constraint, before expanding a complete set of future observations samples and without any loss in accuracy. Moreover, using our proposed framework, we contribute an adaptive method to find a maximal feasible return (e.g., information gain) in terms of Value at Risk for the candidate action sequence with substantial acceleration. On top of that, we introduce an adaptive simplification technique for a probabilistically constrained setting. Such an approach provably returns an identical-quality solution while dramatically accelerating online decision making. Our universal framework applies to any belief-dependent constrained continuous POMDP with parametric beliefs, as well as nonparametric beliefs represented by particles. In the context of an information-theoretic constraint, our presented framework stochastically quantifies if a cumulative information gain along the planning horizon is sufficiently significant (e.g. for, information gathering, active SLAM). We apply our method to active SLAM, a highly challenging problem of high dimensional Belief Space Planning. Extensive realistic simulations corroborate the superiority of our proposed ideas.
abstract_zh: 部分可观测域的不确定性下的在线决策，也称为置信空间规划，是机器人和人工智能中的一个基本问题。由于未来有大量可能的谜团，计算最佳行动方案会给智能体带来巨大的计算负担。此外，在许多场景中，例如信息收集，需要引入依赖于信念的约束。在这种需求的推动下，在本文中，我们考虑了最近引入的概率信念依赖约束 POMDP。我们提出了一种技术，在扩展一整套未来观察样本之前，根据概率信念依赖约束自适应地接受或丢弃候选动作序列，并且不会损失任何准确性。此外，使用我们提出的框架，我们提供了一种自适应方法，以在具有显着加速的候选动作序列的风险价值方面找到最大可行回报（例如，信息增益）。最重要的是，我们为概率约束设置引入了自适应简化技术。事实证明，这种方法会返回相同质量的解决方案，同时显着加速在线决策。我们的通用框架适用于任何具有参数信念的信念相关约束连续 POMDP，以及由粒子表示的非参数信念。在信息论约束的背景下，我们提出的框架随机量化沿规划范围的累积信息增益是否足够显着（例如，信息收集、主动 SLAM）。我们将我们的方法应用于主动 SLAM，这是一个极具挑战性的高维置信空间规划问题。广泛的现实模拟证实了我们提出的想法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种简化高维信念空间规划的方法，通过自适应概率信念依赖约束提升在线决策效率。
AI.motivation: 在部分可观测领域中，传统信念空间规划因计算量大且需处理信念依赖约束而面临效率瓶颈，尤其在信息获取等场景中亟需优化。
AI.method: 提出自适应接受/丢弃候选动作序列的机制，在无需完整观测样本的情况下满足概率约束，并通过价值风险量化加速最大可行回报计算，同时引入概率约束下的简化技术。
AI.result: 框架在高维信念空间规划（如主动SLAM）中实现显著加速，仿真验证了其在保持解质量的同时优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该通用框架有效解决了连续POMDP中的信念依赖约束问题，为高维在线决策提供了高效且准确的解决方案。

title: Online Safety Property Collection and Refinement for Safe Deep Reinforcement Learning in Mapless Navigation
title_zh: 无地图导航中安全深度强化学习的在线安全属性收集和细化
comment: Accepted at the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA). Marzari and Marchesini contributed equally
comments: Accepted at the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA). Marzari and Marchesini contributed equally
abstract: Safety is essential for deploying Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) algorithms in real-world scenarios. Recently, verification approaches have been proposed to allow quantifying the number of violations of a DRL policy over input-output relationships, called properties. However, such properties are hard-coded and require task-level knowledge, making their application intractable in challenging safety-critical tasks. To this end, we introduce the Collection and Refinement of Online Properties (CROP) framework to design properties at training time. CROP employs a cost signal to identify unsafe interactions and use them to shape safety properties. Hence, we propose a refinement strategy to combine properties that model similar unsafe interactions. Our evaluation compares the benefits of computing the number of violations using standard hard-coded properties and the ones generated with CROP. We evaluate our approach in several robotic mapless navigation tasks and demonstrate that the violation metric computed with CROP allows higher returns and lower violations over previous Safe DRL approaches.
summary: Safety is essential for deploying Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) algorithms in real-world scenarios. Recently, verification approaches have been proposed to allow quantifying the number of violations of a DRL policy over input-output relationships, called properties. However, such properties are hard-coded and require task-level knowledge, making their application intractable in challenging safety-critical tasks. To this end, we introduce the Collection and Refinement of Online Properties (CROP) framework to design properties at training time. CROP employs a cost signal to identify unsafe interactions and use them to shape safety properties. Hence, we propose a refinement strategy to combine properties that model similar unsafe interactions. Our evaluation compares the benefits of computing the number of violations using standard hard-coded properties and the ones generated with CROP. We evaluate our approach in several robotic mapless navigation tasks and demonstrate that the violation metric computed with CROP allows higher returns and lower violations over previous Safe DRL approaches.
abstract_zh: 安全对于在现实场景中部署深度强化学习 (DRL) 算法至关重要。最近，人们提出了验证方法来量化输入输出关系（称为属性）上违反 DRL 策略的数量。然而，这些属性是硬编码的并且需要任务级知识，使得它们的应用在具有挑战性的安全关键任务中变得棘手。为此，我们引入了在线属性收集和细化（CROP）框架来在训练时设计属性。 CROP 使用成本信号来识别不安全的交互，并使用它们来塑造安全属性。因此，我们提出了一种细化策略来组合模拟类似不安全交互的属性。我们的评估比较了使用标准硬编码属性计算违规数量和使用 CROP 生成的违规数量的好处。我们在几个机器人无地图导航任务中评估了我们的方法，并证明与以前的安全 DRL 方法相比，使用 CROP 计算的违规度量可以实现更高的回报和更低的违规。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CROP框架，在训练时动态收集和优化安全属性，以提升无地图导航中深度强化学习的安全性。
AI.motivation: 现有安全属性依赖硬编码且需任务特定知识，难以应对复杂安全关键任务，需自动化的安全属性生成方法。
AI.method: 通过成本信号识别不安全交互，收集并提炼相似不安全行为的安全属性，结合生成的属性约束策略。

search_text: Online Safety Property Collection and Refinement for Safe Deep Reinforcement Learning in Mapless Navigation 无地图导航中安全深度强化学习的在线安全属性收集和细化 Safety is essential for deploying Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) algorithms in real-world scenarios. Recently, verification approaches have been proposed to allow quantifying the number of violations of a DRL policy over input-output relationships, called properties. However, such properties are hard-coded and require task-level knowledge, making their application intractable in challenging safety-critical tasks. To this end, we introduce the Collection and Refinement of Online Properties (CROP) framework to design properties at training time. CROP employs a cost signal to identify unsafe interactions and use them to shape safety properties. Hence, we propose a refinement strategy to combine properties that model similar unsafe interactions. Our evaluation compares the benefits of computing the number of violations using standard hard-coded properties and the ones generated with CROP. We evaluate our approach in several robotic mapless navigation tasks and demonstrate that the violation metric computed with CROP allows higher returns and lower violations over previous Safe DRL approaches. 安全对于在现实场景中部署深度强化学习 (DRL) 算法至关重要。最近，人们提出了验证方法来量化输入输出关系（称为属性）上违反 DRL 策略的数量。然而，这些属性是硬编码的并且需要任务级知识，使得它们的应用在具有挑战性的安全关键任务中变得棘手。为此，我们引入了在线属性收集和细化（CROP）框架来在训练时设计属性。 CROP 使用成本信号来识别不安全的交互，并使用它们来塑造安全属性。因此，我们提出了一种细化策略来组合模拟类似不安全交互的属性。我们的评估比较了使用标准硬编码属性计算违规数量和使用 CROP 生成的违规数量的好处。我们在几个机器人无地图导航任务中评估了我们的方法，并证明与以前的安全 DRL 方法相比，使用 CROP 计算的违规度量可以实现更高的回报和更低的违规。 本文提出CROP框架，在训练时动态收集和优化安全属性，以提升无地图导航中深度强化学习的安全性。 Luca Marzari,Enrico Marchesini,Alessandro Farinelli cs.AI,cs.RO

authors_text: Yuqing Du,Olivia Watkins,Zihan Wang,Cédric Colas,Trevor Darrell,Pieter Abbeel,Abhishek Gupta,Jacob Andreas
title: Guiding Pretraining in Reinforcement Learning with Large Language Models
title_zh: 使用大型语言模型指导强化学习的预训练
abstract: Reinforcement learning algorithms typically struggle in the absence of a dense, well-shaped reward function. Intrinsically motivated exploration methods address this limitation by rewarding agents for visiting novel states or transitions, but these methods offer limited benefits in large environments where most discovered novelty is irrelevant for downstream tasks. We describe a method that uses background knowledge from text corpora to shape exploration. This method, called ELLM (Exploring with LLMs) rewards an agent for achieving goals suggested by a language model prompted with a description of the agent's current state. By leveraging large-scale language model pretraining, ELLM guides agents toward human-meaningful and plausibly useful behaviors without requiring a human in the loop. We evaluate ELLM in the Crafter game environment and the Housekeep robotic simulator, showing that ELLM-trained agents have better coverage of common-sense behaviors during pretraining and usually match or improve performance on a range of downstream tasks. Code available at https://github.com/yuqingd/ellm.
summary: Reinforcement learning algorithms typically struggle in the absence of a dense, well-shaped reward function. Intrinsically motivated exploration methods address this limitation by rewarding agents for visiting novel states or transitions, but these methods offer limited benefits in large environments where most discovered novelty is irrelevant for downstream tasks. We describe a method that uses background knowledge from text corpora to shape exploration. This method, called ELLM (Exploring with LLMs) rewards an agent for achieving goals suggested by a language model prompted with a description of the agent's current state. By leveraging large-scale language model pretraining, ELLM guides agents toward human-meaningful and plausibly useful behaviors without requiring a human in the loop. We evaluate ELLM in the Crafter game environment and the Housekeep robotic simulator, showing that ELLM-trained agents have better coverage of common-sense behaviors during pretraining and usually match or improve performance on a range of downstream tasks. Code available at https://github.com/yuqingd/ellm.
abstract_zh: 强化学习算法通常在缺乏密集、形状良好的奖励函数的情况下陷入困境。内在动机的探索方法通过奖励代理访问新颖的状态或转换来解决这一限制，但这些方法在大多数发现的新颖性与下游任务无关的大型环境中提供的好处有限。我们描述了一种使用文本语料库的背景知识来进行形状探索的方法。这种方法称为 ELLM（探索法学硕士），奖励代理实现语言模型建议的目标，并提示代理当前状态的描述。通过利用大规模语言模型预训练，ELLM 可以引导智能体做出对人类有意义且看似有用的行为，而无需人工介入。我们在 Crafter 游戏环境和 Housekeep 机器人模拟器中评估 ELLM，结果表明，经过 ELLM 训练的智能体在预训练期间能够更好地覆盖常识行为，并且通常能够匹配或提高一系列下游任务的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/yuqingd/ellm 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ELLM方法，利用大语言模型引导强化学习代理的探索，解决传统方法在大规模环境中探索效率低的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习依赖稀疏奖励函数，内在激励探索方法在大规模环境中因大量无关新奇性而效果有限，需更高效的目标引导机制。
AI.method: 通过提示语言模型生成当前状态相关目标，奖励代理实现这些目标，利用预训练语言模型的知识引导有意义的探索行为。
AI.result: 在Crafter和Housekeep环境中，ELLM提升预训练阶段常识行为覆盖率，下游任务性能通常优于或匹配基线方法。
AI.conclusion: ELLM通过语言模型知识有效引导强化学习探索，无需人工干预即可提升预训练质量与下游任务表现。

title: The Sum of Its Parts: Visual Part Segmentation for Inertial Parameter Identification of Manipulated Objects
title_zh: 各部分之和：用于操纵对象惯性参数识别的视觉部分分割
comment: In Proceedings of the IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA'23), London, UK, May 29 - Jun. 2, 2023
comments: In Proceedings of the IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA'23), London, UK, May 29 - Jun. 2, 2023
abstract: To operate safely and efficiently alongside human workers, collaborative robots (cobots) require the ability to quickly understand the dynamics of manipulated objects. However, traditional methods for estimating the full set of inertial parameters rely on motions that are necessarily fast and unsafe (to achieve a sufficient signal-to-noise ratio). In this work, we take an alternative approach: by combining visual and force-torque measurements, we develop an inertial parameter identification algorithm that requires slow or 'stop-and-go' motions only, and hence is ideally tailored for use around humans. Our technique, called Homogeneous Part Segmentation (HPS), leverages the observation that man-made objects are often composed of distinct, homogeneous parts. We combine a surface-based point clustering method with a volumetric shape segmentation algorithm to quickly produce a part-level segmentation of a manipulated object; the segmented representation is then used by HPS to accurately estimate the object's inertial parameters. To benchmark our algorithm, we create and utilize a novel dataset consisting of realistic meshes, segmented point clouds, and inertial parameters for 20 common workshop tools. Finally, we demonstrate the real-world performance and accuracy of HPS by performing an intricate 'hammer balancing act' autonomously and online with a low-cost collaborative robotic arm. Our code and dataset are open source and freely available.
summary: To operate safely and efficiently alongside human workers, collaborative robots (cobots) require the ability to quickly understand the dynamics of manipulated objects. However, traditional methods for estimating the full set of inertial parameters rely on motions that are necessarily fast and unsafe (to achieve a sufficient signal-to-noise ratio). In this work, we take an alternative approach: by combining visual and force-torque measurements, we develop an inertial parameter identification algorithm that requires slow or 'stop-and-go' motions only, and hence is ideally tailored for use around humans. Our technique, called Homogeneous Part Segmentation (HPS), leverages the observation that man-made objects are often composed of distinct, homogeneous parts. We combine a surface-based point clustering method with a volumetric shape segmentation algorithm to quickly produce a part-level segmentation of a manipulated object; the segmented representation is then used by HPS to accurately estimate the object's inertial parameters. To benchmark our algorithm, we create and utilize a novel dataset consisting of realistic meshes, segmented point clouds, and inertial parameters for 20 common workshop tools. Finally, we demonstrate the real-world performance and accuracy of HPS by performing an intricate 'hammer balancing act' autonomously and online with a low-cost collaborative robotic arm. Our code and dataset are open source and freely available.
abstract_zh: 为了与人类工人一起安全高效地操作，协作机器人 (cobot) 需要能够快速了解​​被操纵物体的动态。然而，估计全套惯性参数的传统方法依赖于必然快速且不安全的运动（以实现足够的信噪比）。在这项工作中，我们采取了另一种方法：通过结合视觉和力-扭矩测量，我们开发了一种惯性参数识别算法，该算法仅需要缓慢或“走走停停”的运动，因此非常适合人类使用。我们的技术称为同质零件分割 (HPS)，它利用了人造物体通常由不同的同质零件组成的观察结果。我们将基于表面的点聚类方法与体积形状分割算法相结合，以快速生成被操纵对象的部分级分割；然后 HPS 使用分段表示来准确估计物体的惯性参数。为了对我们的算法进行基准测试，我们创建并利用了一个新颖的数据集，其中包含 20 个常见车间工具的真实网格、分段点云和惯性参数。最后，我们通过使用低成本协作机械臂自主在线执行复杂的“锤子平衡动作”，展示了 HPS 的实际性能和准确性。我们的代码和数据集是开源的并且免费提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视觉部件分割的惯性参数识别方法，使协作机器人能够在安全的慢速运动中准确估计操作物体的动态特性。
AI.motivation: 传统惯性参数估计方法需要快速且危险的运动以获得足够信噪比，难以在人类工作环境中安全应用。
AI.method: 开发同质部件分割（HPS）算法，结合基于表面的点聚类与体积形状分割技术，通过视觉和力-扭矩测量实现慢速运动下的参数识别。
AI.result: 构建包含20种车间工具的新型数据集，实现低成本协作机械臂自主完成锤子平衡实验，验证方法的有效性与准确性。
AI.conclusion: HPS方法通过部件级分割显著提升参数估计精度，为协作机器人安全交互提供可行解决方案。

In this work, we take an alternative approach: by combining visual and force-torque measurements, we develop an inertial parameter identification algorithm that requires slow or 'stop-and-go' motions only, and hence is ideally tailored for use around humans. Our technique, called Homogeneous Part Segmentation (HPS), leverages the observation that man-made objects are often composed of distinct, homogeneous parts. We combine a surface-based point clustering method with a volumetric shape segmentation algorithm to quickly produce a part-level segmentation of a manipulated object; the segmented representation is then used by HPS to accurately estimate the object's inertial parameters. To benchmark our algorithm, we create and utilize a novel dataset consisting of realistic meshes, segmented point clouds, and inertial parameters for 20 common workshop tools. Finally, we demonstrate the real-world performance and accuracy of HPS by performing an intricate 'hammer balancing act' autonomously and online with a low-cost collaborative robotic arm. Our code and dataset are open source and freely available. 为了与人类工人一起安全高效地操作，协作机器人 (cobot) 需要能够快速了解​​被操纵物体的动态。然而，估计全套惯性参数的传统方法依赖于必然快速且不安全的运动（以实现足够的信噪比）。在这项工作中，我们采取了另一种方法：通过结合视觉和力-扭矩测量，我们开发了一种惯性参数识别算法，该算法仅需要缓慢或“走走停停”的运动，因此非常适合人类使用。我们的技术称为同质零件分割 (HPS)，它利用了人造物体通常由不同的同质零件组成的观察结果。我们将基于表面的点聚类方法与体积形状分割算法相结合，以快速生成被操纵对象的部分级分割；然后 HPS 使用分段表示来准确估计物体的惯性参数。为了对我们的算法进行基准测试，我们创建并利用了一个新颖的数据集，其中包含 20 个常见车间工具的真实网格、分段点云和惯性参数。最后，我们通过使用低成本协作机械臂自主在线执行复杂的“锤子平衡动作”，展示了 HPS 的实际性能和准确性。我们的代码和数据集是开源的并且免费提供。 本文提出一种基于视觉部件分割的惯性参数识别方法，使协作机器人能够在安全的慢速运动中准确估计操作物体的动态特性。 Philippe Nadeau,Matthew Giamou,Jonathan Kelly cs.RO,cs.CV

title: A Comprehensive Study of Modern Architectures and Regularization Approaches on CheXpert5000
title_zh: CheXpert5000 上现代架构和正则化方法的综合研究
abstract: Computer aided diagnosis (CAD) has gained an increased amount of attention in the general research community over the last years as an example of a typical limited data application - with experiments on labeled 100k-200k datasets. Although these datasets are still small compared to natural image datasets like ImageNet1k, ImageNet21k and JFT, they are large for annotated medical datasets, where 1k-10k labeled samples are much more common. There is no baseline on which methods to build on in the low data regime. In this work we bridge this gap by providing an extensive study on medical image classification with limited annotations (5k). We present a study of modern architectures applied to a fixed low data regime of 5000 images on the CheXpert dataset. Conclusively we find that models pretrained on ImageNet21k achieve a higher AUC and larger models require less training steps. All models are quite well calibrated even though we only fine-tuned on 5000 training samples. All 'modern' architectures have higher AUC than ResNet50. Regularization of Big Transfer Models with MixUp or Mean Teacher improves calibration, MixUp also improves accuracy. Vision Transformer achieve comparable or on par results to Big Transfer Models.
summary: Computer aided diagnosis (CAD) has gained an increased amount of attention in the general research community over the last years as an example of a typical limited data application - with experiments on labeled 100k-200k datasets. Although these datasets are still small compared to natural image datasets like ImageNet1k, ImageNet21k and JFT, they are large for annotated medical datasets, where 1k-10k labeled samples are much more common. There is no baseline on which methods to build on in the low data regime. In this work we bridge this gap by providing an extensive study on medical image classification with limited annotations (5k). We present a study of modern architectures applied to a fixed low data regime of 5000 images on the CheXpert dataset. Conclusively we find that models pretrained on ImageNet21k achieve a higher AUC and larger models require less training steps. All models are quite well calibrated even though we only fine-tuned on 5000 training samples. All 'modern' architectures have higher AUC than ResNet50. Regularization of Big Transfer Models with MixUp or Mean Teacher improves calibration, MixUp also improves accuracy. Vision Transformer achieve comparable or on par results to Big Transfer Models.
abstract_zh: 过去几年，计算机辅助诊断 (CAD) 作为典型的有限数据应用的示例（在标记的 100k-200k 数据集上进行实验）在一般研究界获得了越来越多的关注。尽管这些数据集与 ImageNet1k、ImageNet21k 和 JFT 等自然图像数据集相比仍然很小，但对于带注释的医学数据集来说它们很大，其中 1k-10k 个标记样本更为常见。没有关于在低数据状况下构建哪些方法的基线。在这项工作中，我们通过对具有有限注释的医学图像分类进行广泛的研究来弥补这一差距（5k）。我们提出了一项现代架构的研究，该架构应用于 CheXpert 数据集上 5000 张图像的固定低数据范围。最后，我们发现在 ImageNet21k 上预训练的模型实现了更高的 AUC，并且更大的模型需要更少的训练步骤。尽管我们只对 5000 个训练样本进行微调，但所有模型都经过了很好的校准。所有“现代”架构的 AUC 都高于 ResNet50。使用 MixUp 或 Mean Teacher 对大传输模型进行正则化可以改善校准，MixUp 还可以提高准确性。 Vision Transformer 实现了与大传输模型相当或相当的结果。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究了在CheXpert5000数据集上现代架构和正则化方法在有限标注数据下的医学图像分类效果。
AI.motivation: 医学图像数据集标注样本量远小于自然图像数据集，且缺乏低数据场景下的基准方法，需探索有效模型和正则化策略。
AI.method: 在5000张CheXpert图像上评估现代架构（如Vision Transformer、Big Transfer模型）及正则化方法（MixUp、Mean Teacher）的性能。
AI.result: ImageNet21k预训练模型AUC更高，大模型训练步数更少；现代架构优于ResNet50，MixUp和Mean Teacher提升校准和准确率。
AI.conclusion: 现代架构与正则化方法在低标注医学图像分类中表现优异，预训练模型和混合正则化策略可有效提升模型性能。

title: Enhancing Multivariate Time Series Classifiers through Self-Attention and Relative Positioning Infusion
title_zh: 通过自我关注和相对定位注入增强多元时间序列分类器
abstract: Time Series Classification (TSC) is an important and challenging task for many visual computing applications. Despite the extensive range of methods developed for TSC, relatively few utilized Deep Neural Networks (DNNs). In this paper, we propose two novel attention blocks (Global Temporal Attention and Temporal Pseudo-Gaussian augmented Self-Attention) that can enhance deep learning-based TSC approaches, even when such approaches are designed and optimized for a specific dataset or task. We validate this claim by evaluating multiple state-of-the-art deep learning-based TSC models on the University of East Anglia (UEA) benchmark, a standardized collection of 30 Multivariate Time Series Classification (MTSC) datasets. We show that adding the proposed attention blocks improves base models' average accuracy by up to 3.6%. Additionally, the proposed TPS block uses a new injection module to include the relative positional information in transformers. As a standalone unit with less computational complexity, it enables TPS to perform better than most of the state-of-the-art DNN-based TSC methods. The source codes for our experimental setups and proposed attention blocks are made publicly available.
summary: Time Series Classification (TSC) is an important and challenging task for many visual computing applications. Despite the extensive range of methods developed for TSC, relatively few utilized Deep Neural Networks (DNNs). In this paper, we propose two novel attention blocks (Global Temporal Attention and Temporal Pseudo-Gaussian augmented Self-Attention) that can enhance deep learning-based TSC approaches, even when such approaches are designed and optimized for a specific dataset or task. We validate this claim by evaluating multiple state-of-the-art deep learning-based TSC models on the University of East Anglia (UEA) benchmark, a standardized collection of 30 Multivariate Time Series Classification (MTSC) datasets. We show that adding the proposed attention blocks improves base models' average accuracy by up to 3.6%. Additionally, the proposed TPS block uses a new injection module to include the relative positional information in transformers. As a standalone unit with less computational complexity, it enables TPS to perform better than most of the state-of-the-art DNN-based TSC methods. The source codes for our experimental setups and proposed attention blocks are made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 对于许多视觉计算应用程序来说，时间序列分类（TSC）是一项重要且具有挑战性的任务。尽管为 TSC 开发了广泛的方法，但使用深度神经网络 (DNN) 的方法相对较少。在本文中，我们提出了两种新颖的注意力模块（全局时间注意力和时间伪高斯增强自注意力），它们可以增强基于深度学习的 TSC 方法，即使这些方法是针对特定数据集或任务设计和优化的。我们通过在东安格利亚大学 (UEA) 基准（30 个多元时间序列分类 (MTSC) 数据集的标准化集合）上评估多个最先进的基于深度学习的 TSC 模型来验证这一说法。我们表明，添加建议的注意力块可将基本模型的平均准确度提高高达 3.6%。此外，所提出的 TPS 块使用新的注入模块来包含变压器中的相对位置信息。作为计算复杂度较低的独立单元，它使 TPS 的性能优于大多数最先进的基于 DNN 的 TSC 方法。我们的实验设置和建议的注意力块的源代码是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种新型注意力模块以提升深度学习在多变量时间序列分类任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管时间序列分类（TSC）方法众多，但深度神经网络（DNN）的应用较少，且现有方法在特定数据集上的优化效果有限。
AI.method: 设计了全局时间注意力模块和伪高斯增强自注意力模块，并通过新型注入模块将相对位置信息融入Transformer架构。
AI.result: 在UEA基准测试中，所提方法使基础模型平均准确率提升最高3.6%，且TPS模块以更低计算复杂度超越多数SOTA方法。
AI.conclusion: 注意力机制与位置信息注入有效增强了DNN在TSC任务中的表现，代码已开源供验证使用。

title: User-Centered Design (IX): A "User Experience 3.0" Paradigm Framework in the Intelligence Era
title_zh: 以用户为中心的设计（九）：智能时代的“用户体验3.0”范式框架
abstract: The field of user experience (UX) based on the design philosophy of "user-centered design" is moving towards the intelligence era. Still, the existing UX paradigm mainly aims at non-intelligent systems and lacks a systematic approach to UX for intelligent systems. Throughout the development of UX, the UX paradigm shows the evolution characteristics of the cross-technology era. At present, the intelligence era has put forward new demands on the UX paradigm. For this reason, this paper proposes a "UX 3.0" paradigm framework and the corresponding UX methodology system in the intelligence era. The "UX 3.0" paradigm framework includes five categories of UX methods: ecological experience, innovation-enabled experience, AI-enabled experience, human-AI interaction-based experience, and human-AI collaboration-based experience methods, each providing corresponding multiple UX paradigmatic orientations. The proposal of the "UX 3.0" paradigm helps improve the existing UX methods and provides methodological support for the research and applications of UX in developing intelligent systems. Finally, this paper looks forward to future research and applications of the "UX 3.0" paradigm.
summary: The field of user experience (UX) based on the design philosophy of "user-centered design" is moving towards the intelligence era. Still, the existing UX paradigm mainly aims at non-intelligent systems and lacks a systematic approach to UX for intelligent systems. Throughout the development of UX, the UX paradigm shows the evolution characteristics of the cross-technology era. At present, the intelligence era has put forward new demands on the UX paradigm. For this reason, this paper proposes a "UX 3.0" paradigm framework and the corresponding UX methodology system in the intelligence era. The "UX 3.0" paradigm framework includes five categories of UX methods: ecological experience, innovation-enabled experience, AI-enabled experience, human-AI interaction-based experience, and human-AI collaboration-based experience methods, each providing corresponding multiple UX paradigmatic orientations. The proposal of the "UX 3.0" paradigm helps improve the existing UX methods and provides methodological support for the research and applications of UX in developing intelligent systems. Finally, this paper looks forward to future research and applications of the "UX 3.0" paradigm.
abstract_zh: 基于“以用户为中心的设计”设计理念的用户体验（UX）领域正在迈向智能时代。尽管如此，现有的用户体验范式主要针对非智能系统，缺乏系统的智能系统用户体验方法。纵观UX的发展历程，UX范式呈现出跨技术时代的演进特征。当前，智能时代对UX范式提出了新的要求。为此，本文提出了智能时代的“UX 3.0”范式框架以及相应的UX方法论体系。 “UX 3.0”范式框架包括五类UX方法：生态体验、创新赋能体验、AI赋能体验、人机交互体验、人机协作体验方法，每种方法都提供了相应的多种UX范式取向。 “UX 3.0”范式的提出有助于完善现有的UX方法，为UX在开发智能系统中的研究和应用提供方法论支撑。最后，本文对“UX 3.0”范式的未来研究和应用进行了展望。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向智能时代的'用户体验3.0'范式框架，以解决现有用户体验设计方法在智能系统中的不足。
AI.motivation: 当前用户体验范式主要针对非智能系统，缺乏对智能系统的系统性方法，而智能时代对用户体验提出了新要求。
AI.method: 构建包含生态体验、创新驱动体验、AI赋能体验、人机交互体验和人机协作体验五大类方法的'UX 3.0'范式框架。
AI.result: 形成了适用于智能系统的用户体验方法论体系，为智能系统UX研究与应用提供理论支持。
AI.conclusion: 'UX 3.0'范式有效弥补了传统UX方法的不足，为智能时代用户体验研究指明了方向。

search_text: User-Centered Design (IX): A "User Experience 3.0" Paradigm Framework in the Intelligence Era 以用户为中心的设计（九）：智能时代的“用户体验3.0”范式框架 The field of user experience (UX) based on the design philosophy of "user-centered design" is moving towards the intelligence era. Still, the existing UX paradigm mainly aims at non-intelligent systems and lacks a systematic approach to UX for intelligent systems. Throughout the development of UX, the UX paradigm shows the evolution characteristics of the cross-technology era. At present, the intelligence era has put forward new demands on the UX paradigm. For this reason, this paper proposes a "UX 3.0" paradigm framework and the corresponding UX methodology system in the intelligence era. The "UX 3.0" paradigm framework includes five categories of UX methods: ecological experience, innovation-enabled experience, AI-enabled experience, human-AI interaction-based experience, and human-AI collaboration-based experience methods, each providing corresponding multiple UX paradigmatic orientations. The proposal of the "UX 3.0" paradigm helps improve the existing UX methods and provides methodological support for the research and applications of UX in developing intelligent systems. Finally, this paper looks forward to future research and applications of the "UX 3.0" paradigm. 基于“以用户为中心的设计”设计理念的用户体验（UX）领域正在迈向智能时代。尽管如此，现有的用户体验范式主要针对非智能系统，缺乏系统的智能系统用户体验方法。纵观UX的发展历程，UX范式呈现出跨技术时代的演进特征。当前，智能时代对UX范式提出了新的要求。为此，本文提出了智能时代的“UX 3.0”范式框架以及相应的UX方法论体系。 “UX 3.0”范式框架包括五类UX方法：生态体验、创新赋能体验、AI赋能体验、人机交互体验、人机协作体验方法，每种方法都提供了相应的多种UX范式取向。 “UX 3.0”范式的提出有助于完善现有的UX方法，为UX在开发智能系统中的研究和应用提供方法论支撑。最后，本文对“UX 3.0”范式的未来研究和应用进行了展望。 本文提出了一种面向智能时代的'用户体验3.0'范式框架，以解决现有用户体验设计方法在智能系统中的不足。 Wei Xu cs.HC,cs.AI

title: System identification of neural systems: If we got it right, would we know?
title_zh: 神经系统的系统识别：如果我们做对了，我们会知道吗？
abstract: Artificial neural networks are being proposed as models of parts of the brain. The networks are compared to recordings of biological neurons, and good performance in reproducing neural responses is considered to support the model's validity. A key question is how much this system identification approach tells us about brain computation. Does it validate one model architecture over another? We evaluate the most commonly used comparison techniques, such as a linear encoding model and centered kernel alignment, to correctly identify a model by replacing brain recordings with known ground truth models. System identification performance is quite variable; it also depends significantly on factors independent of the ground truth architecture, such as stimuli images. In addition, we show the limitations of using functional similarity scores in identifying higher-level architectural motifs.
summary: Artificial neural networks are being proposed as models of parts of the brain. The networks are compared to recordings of biological neurons, and good performance in reproducing neural responses is considered to support the model's validity. A key question is how much this system identification approach tells us about brain computation. Does it validate one model architecture over another? We evaluate the most commonly used comparison techniques, such as a linear encoding model and centered kernel alignment, to correctly identify a model by replacing brain recordings with known ground truth models. System identification performance is quite variable; it also depends significantly on factors independent of the ground truth architecture, such as stimuli images. In addition, we show the limitations of using functional similarity scores in identifying higher-level architectural motifs.
abstract_zh: 人工神经网络被提议作为大脑各部分的模型。将网络与生物神经元的记录进行比较，再现神经反应的良好性能被认为支持该模型的有效性。一个关键问题是这种系统识别方法告诉我们多少关于大脑计算的信息。它是否验证一种模型架构优于另一种模型架构？我们评估最常用的比较技术，例如线性编码模型和居中内核对齐，通过用已知的地面真实模型替换大脑记录来正确识别模型。系统识别性能变化很大；它还很大程度上取决于独立于地面实况架构的因素，例如刺激图像。此外，我们还展示了使用功能相似性分数来识别更高级别的架构主题的局限性。

AI.tldr: 本文评估系统识别方法在神经网络模型验证中的有效性，探讨其是否能准确区分不同模型架构。
AI.motivation: 当前研究依赖系统识别方法验证神经网络模型，但存在疑问：这些方法是否能真正反映模型架构差异，或受其他因素干扰。
AI.method: 通过用已知地面真实模型替换真实神经数据，测试线性编码模型和中心核对齐等常用比较技术的性能。
AI.result: 系统识别性能波动显著，受刺激图像等因素影响，且功能相似性评分在识别高层架构模式时存在局限性。
AI.conclusion: 现有系统识别方法在验证神经网络模型时可靠性不足，需结合其他指标谨慎评估模型有效性。

authors_text: Xiangning Chen,Chen Liang,Da Huang,Esteban Real,Kaiyuan Wang,Yao Liu,Hieu Pham,Xuanyi Dong,Thang Luong,Cho-Jui Hsieh,Yifeng Lu,Quoc V. Le
title: Symbolic Discovery of Optimization Algorithms
title_zh: 优化算法的符号发现
comment: 30 pages, Lion is successfully deployed in production systems. We also add comparison with other automatically discovered optimizers
comments: 30 pages, Lion is successfully deployed in production systems. We also add comparison with other automatically discovered optimizers
abstract: We present a method to formulate algorithm discovery as program search, and apply it to discover optimization algorithms for deep neural network training. We leverage efficient search techniques to explore an infinite and sparse program space. To bridge the large generalization gap between proxy and target tasks, we also introduce program selection and simplification strategies. Our method discovers a simple and effective optimization algorithm, $\textbf{Lion}$ ($\textit{Evo$\textbf{L}$ved S$\textbf{i}$gn M$\textbf{o}$me$\textbf{n}$tum}$). It is more memory-efficient than Adam as it only keeps track of the momentum. Different from adaptive optimizers, its update has the same magnitude for each parameter calculated through the sign operation. We compare Lion with widely used optimizers, such as Adam and Adafactor, for training a variety of models on different tasks. On image classification, Lion boosts the accuracy of ViT by up to 2% on ImageNet and saves up to 5x the pre-training compute on JFT. On vision-language contrastive learning, we achieve 88.3% $\textit{zero-shot}$ and 91.1% $\textit{fine-tuning}$ accuracy on ImageNet, surpassing the previous best results by 2% and 0.1%, respectively. On diffusion models, Lion outperforms Adam by achieving a better FID score and reducing the training compute by up to 2.3x. For autoregressive, masked language modeling, and fine-tuning, Lion exhibits a similar or better performance compared to Adam. Our analysis of Lion reveals that its performance gain grows with the training batch size. It also requires a smaller learning rate than Adam due to the larger norm of the update produced by the sign function. Additionally, we examine the limitations of Lion and identify scenarios where its improvements are small or not statistically significant. Lion is also successfully deployed in production systems such as Google search ads CTR model.
summary: We present a method to formulate algorithm discovery as program search, and apply it to discover optimization algorithms for deep neural network training. We leverage efficient search techniques to explore an infinite and sparse program space. To bridge the large generalization gap between proxy and target tasks, we also introduce program selection and simplification strategies. Our method discovers a simple and effective optimization algorithm, $\textbf{Lion}$ ($\textit{Evo$\textbf{L}$ved S$\textbf{i}$gn M$\textbf{o}$me$\textbf{n}$tum}$). It is more memory-efficient than Adam as it only keeps track of the momentum. Different from adaptive optimizers, its update has the same magnitude for each parameter calculated through the sign operation. We compare Lion with widely used optimizers, such as Adam and Adafactor, for training a variety of models on different tasks. On image classification, Lion boosts the accuracy of ViT by up to 2% on ImageNet and saves up to 5x the pre-training compute on JFT. On vision-language contrastive learning, we achieve 88.3% $\textit{zero-shot}$ and 91.1% $\textit{fine-tuning}$ accuracy on ImageNet, surpassing the previous best results by 2% and 0.1%, respectively. On diffusion models, Lion outperforms Adam by achieving a better FID score and reducing the training compute by up to 2.3x. For autoregressive, masked language modeling, and fine-tuning, Lion exhibits a similar or better performance compared to Adam. Our analysis of Lion reveals that its performance gain grows with the training batch size. It also requires a smaller learning rate than Adam due to the larger norm of the update produced by the sign function. Additionally, we examine the limitations of Lion and identify scenarios where its improvements are small or not statistically significant. Lion is also successfully deployed in production systems such as Google search ads CTR model.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种将算法发现表述为程序搜索的方法，并将其应用于发现深度神经网络训练的优化算法。我们利用高效的搜索技术来探索无限且稀疏的程序空间。为了弥合代理任务和目标任务之间巨大的泛化差距，我们还引入了程序选择和简化策略。我们的方法发现了一种简单有效的优化算法，$\textbf{Lion}$ ($\textit{Evo$\textbf{L}$ved S$\textbf{i}$gn M$\textbf{o}$me$\textbf{n}$tum}$)。它比 Adam 更节省内存，因为它只跟踪动量。与自适应优化器不同的是，它的更新对于通过符号运算计算出的每个参数具有相同的幅度。我们将 Lion 与广泛使用的优化器（例如 Adam 和 Adafactor）进行比较，以针对不同任务训练各种模型。在图像分类方面，Lion 在 ImageNet 上将 ViT 的准确率提高了高达 2%，并在 JFT 上节省了高达 5 倍的预训练计算量。在视觉语言对比学习方面，我们在 ImageNet 上实现了 88.3% $\textit{zero-shot}$ 和 91.1% $\textit{fine-tuning}$ 准确率，分别超过了之前的最佳结果 2% 和 0.1%。在扩散模型上，Lion 的表现优于 Adam，获得了更好的 FID 分数并将训练计算量减少了 2.3 倍。对于自回归、屏蔽语言建模和微调，Lion 与 Adam 相比表现出相似或更好的性能。我们对 Lion 的分析表明，它的性能增益随着训练批量大小的增加而增长。由于符号函数产生的更新范数更大，它还需要比 Adam 更小的学习率。此外，我们还检查了 Lion 的局限性，并确定了其改进较小或不具有统计显着性的场景。 Lion还成功部署在谷歌搜索广告CTR模型等生产系统中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过符号搜索发现优化算法的方法，并应用于深度神经网络训练，开发出名为Lion的新型优化器。
AI.motivation: 现有优化器（如Adam）在内存效率和适应性上存在局限，需探索更高效的算法以提升模型训练效果。
AI.method: 将算法发现转化为程序搜索问题，结合高效搜索技术探索无限稀疏程序空间，并引入程序选择与简化策略以缩小任务差距。
AI.result: Lion在ImageNet上提升ViT准确率2%，减少JFT预训练计算量5倍；在视觉-语言任务中零样本准确率达88.3%，微调达91.1%；扩散模型FID分数更优且计算量减少2.3倍；在语言模型任务中表现与Adam相当或更优。
AI.conclusion: Lion通过符号搜索有效发现新型优化算法，在多任务中展现性能优势，但需注意其学习率调整需求及部分场景下的效果局限性。

search_text: Symbolic Discovery of Optimization Algorithms 优化算法的符号发现 We present a method to formulate algorithm discovery as program search, and apply it to discover optimization algorithms for deep neural network training. We leverage efficient search techniques to explore an infinite and sparse program space. To bridge the large generalization gap between proxy and target tasks, we also introduce program selection and simplification strategies. Our method discovers a simple and effective optimization algorithm, $\textbf{Lion}$ ($\textit{Evo$\textbf{L}$ved S$\textbf{i}$gn M$\textbf{o}$me$\textbf{n}$tum}$). It is more memory-efficient than Adam as it only keeps track of the momentum. Different from adaptive optimizers, its update has the same magnitude for each parameter calculated through the sign operation. We compare Lion with widely used optimizers, such as Adam and Adafactor, for training a variety of models on different tasks. On image classification, Lion boosts the accuracy of ViT by up to 2% on ImageNet and saves up to 5x the pre-training compute on JFT. On vision-language contrastive learning, we achieve 88.3% $\textit{zero-shot}$ and 91.1% $\textit{fine-tuning}$ accuracy on ImageNet, surpassing the previous best results by 2% and 0.1%, respectively. On diffusion models, Lion outperforms Adam by achieving a better FID score and reducing the training compute by up to 2.3x. For autoregressive, masked language modeling, and fine-tuning, Lion exhibits a similar or better performance compared to Adam. Our analysis of Lion reveals that its performance gain grows with the training batch size. It also requires a smaller learning rate than Adam due to the larger norm of the update produced by the sign function. Additionally, we examine the limitations of Lion and identify scenarios where its improvements are small or not statistically significant. Lion is also successfully deployed in production systems such as Google search ads CTR model. 我们提出了一种将算法发现表述为程序搜索的方法，并将其应用于发现深度神经网络训练的优化算法。我们利用高效的搜索技术来探索无限且稀疏的程序空间。为了弥合代理任务和目标任务之间巨大的泛化差距，我们还引入了程序选择和简化策略。我们的方法发现了一种简单有效的优化算法，$\textbf{Lion}$ ($\textit{Evo$\textbf{L}$ved S$\textbf{i}$gn M$\textbf{o}$me$\textbf{n}$tum}$)。它比 Adam 更节省内存，因为它只跟踪动量。与自适应优化器不同的是，它的更新对于通过符号运算计算出的每个参数具有相同的幅度。我们将 Lion 与广泛使用的优化器（例如 Adam 和 Adafactor）进行比较，以针对不同任务训练各种模型。在图像分类方面，Lion 在 ImageNet 上将 ViT 的准确率提高了高达 2%，并在 JFT 上节省了高达 5 倍的预训练计算量。在视觉语言对比学习方面，我们在 ImageNet 上实现了 88.3% $\textit{zero-shot}$ 和 91.1% $\textit{fine-tuning}$ 准确率，分别超过了之前的最佳结果 2% 和 0.1%。在扩散模型上，Lion 的表现优于 Adam，获得了更好的 FID 分数并将训练计算量减少了 2.3 倍。对于自回归、屏蔽语言建模和微调，Lion 与 Adam 相比表现出相似或更好的性能。我们对 Lion 的分析表明，它的性能增益随着训练批量大小的增加而增长。由于符号函数产生的更新范数更大，它还需要比 Adam 更小的学习率。此外，我们还检查了 Lion 的局限性，并确定了其改进较小或不具有统计显着性的场景。 Lion还成功部署在谷歌搜索广告CTR模型等生产系统中。 本文提出一种通过符号搜索发现优化算法的方法，并应用于深度神经网络训练，开发出名为Lion的新型优化器。 Xiangning Chen,Chen Liang,Da Huang,Esteban Real,Kaiyuan Wang,Yao Liu,Hieu Pham,Xuanyi Dong,Thang Luong,Cho-Jui Hsieh,Yifeng Lu,Quoc V. Le cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.CV,cs.NE

title: GenAug: Retargeting behaviors to unseen situations via Generative Augmentation
title_zh: GenAug：通过生成增强将行为重新定位到未见过的情况
abstract: Robot learning methods have the potential for widespread generalization across tasks, environments, and objects. However, these methods require large diverse datasets that are expensive to collect in real-world robotics settings. For robot learning to generalize, we must be able to leverage sources of data or priors beyond the robot's own experience. In this work, we posit that image-text generative models, which are pre-trained on large corpora of web-scraped data, can serve as such a data source. We show that despite these generative models being trained on largely non-robotics data, they can serve as effective ways to impart priors into the process of robot learning in a way that enables widespread generalization. In particular, we show how pre-trained generative models can serve as effective tools for semantically meaningful data augmentation. By leveraging these pre-trained models for generating appropriate "semantic" data augmentations, we propose a system GenAug that is able to significantly improve policy generalization. We apply GenAug to tabletop manipulation tasks, showing the ability to re-target behavior to novel scenarios, while only requiring marginal amounts of real-world data. We demonstrate the efficacy of this system on a number of object manipulation problems in the real world, showing a 40% improvement in generalization to novel scenes and objects.
summary: Robot learning methods have the potential for widespread generalization across tasks, environments, and objects. However, these methods require large diverse datasets that are expensive to collect in real-world robotics settings. For robot learning to generalize, we must be able to leverage sources of data or priors beyond the robot's own experience. In this work, we posit that image-text generative models, which are pre-trained on large corpora of web-scraped data, can serve as such a data source. We show that despite these generative models being trained on largely non-robotics data, they can serve as effective ways to impart priors into the process of robot learning in a way that enables widespread generalization. In particular, we show how pre-trained generative models can serve as effective tools for semantically meaningful data augmentation. By leveraging these pre-trained models for generating appropriate "semantic" data augmentations, we propose a system GenAug that is able to significantly improve policy generalization. We apply GenAug to tabletop manipulation tasks, showing the ability to re-target behavior to novel scenarios, while only requiring marginal amounts of real-world data. We demonstrate the efficacy of this system on a number of object manipulation problems in the real world, showing a 40% improvement in generalization to novel scenes and objects.
abstract_zh: 机器人学习方法具有跨任务、环境和对象广泛推广的潜力。然而，这些方法需要大量不同的数据集，在现实世界的机器人环境中收集这些数据集的成本很高。为了使机器人学习具有普遍性，我们必须能够利用机器人自身经验之外的数据源或先验知识。在这项工作中，我们假设在大型网络抓取数据语料库上预先训练的图像文本生成模型可以作为这样的数据源。我们表明，尽管这些生成模型主要是在非机器人数据上进行训练的，但它们可以作为将先验知识传递到机器人学习过程中的有效方法，从而实现广泛的泛化。特别是，我们展示了预训练的生成模型如何作为语义上有意义的数据增强的有效工具。通过利用这些预先训练的模型来生成适当的“语义”数据增强，我们提出了一个能够显着提高策略泛化能力的系统 GenAug。我们将 GenAug 应用于桌面操作任务，展示了将行为重新定位到新场景的能力，同时只需要少量的现实世界数据。我们展示了该系统在现实世界中的许多对象操作问题上的功效，显示对新场景和对象的泛化能力提高了 40%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GenAug方法，通过生成式增强技术将机器人学习行为推广到未见过的情景，利用预训练的图像-文本生成模型生成语义数据以提升策略泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中机器人学习需要大量多样化数据，但实际采集成本高昂。现有方法难以有效利用外部数据源，而预训练生成模型可作为补充先验知识的潜在数据源。
AI.method: 基于预训练生成模型（如CLIP）生成语义相关的数据增强样本，结合少量真实世界数据训练策略网络，实现行为到新场景的迁移。
AI.result: 在桌面操作任务中，GenAug在仅需少量真实数据的情况下，使策略对新场景和物体的泛化性能提升40%。
AI.conclusion: 生成式增强能有效补充机器人学习的数据不足，通过利用预训练模型的语义先验显著提升泛化能力，为现实场景的机器人应用提供新思路。

authors_text: Yizhou Wang,Dongliang Guo,Sheng Li,Octavia Camps,Yun Fu
title: Unveiling the Unseen: A Comprehensive Survey on Explainable Anomaly Detection in Images and Videos
title_zh: 揭开未见之谜：图像和视频中可解释异常检测的综合调查
abstract: Anomaly detection and localization in visual data, including images and videos, are crucial in machine learning and real-world applications. Despite rapid advancements in visual anomaly detection (VAD), interpreting these often black-box models and explaining why specific instances are flagged as anomalous remains challenging. This paper provides the first comprehensive survey focused specifically on explainable 2D visual anomaly detection (X-VAD), covering methods for both images (IAD) and videos (VAD). We first introduce the background of IAD and VAD. Then, as the core contribution, we present a thorough literature review of explainable methods, categorized by their underlying techniques (e.g., attention-based, generative model-based, reasoning-based, foundation model-based). We analyze the commonalities and differences in applying these methods across image and video modalities, highlighting modality-specific challenges and opportunities for explainability. Additionally, we summarize relevant datasets and evaluation metrics, discussing both standard performance metrics and emerging approaches for assessing explanation quality (e.g., faithfulness, stability). Finally, we discuss promising future directions and open problems, including quantifying explanation quality, explaining diverse AD paradigms (SSL, zero-shot), enhancing context-awareness, leveraging foundation models responsibly, and addressing real-world constraints like efficiency and robustness. A curated collection of related resources is available at https://github.com/wyzjack/Awesome-XAD.
summary: Anomaly detection and localization in visual data, including images and videos, are crucial in machine learning and real-world applications. Despite rapid advancements in visual anomaly detection (VAD), interpreting these often black-box models and explaining why specific instances are flagged as anomalous remains challenging. This paper provides the first comprehensive survey focused specifically on explainable 2D visual anomaly detection (X-VAD), covering methods for both images (IAD) and videos (VAD). We first introduce the background of IAD and VAD. Then, as the core contribution, we present a thorough literature review of explainable methods, categorized by their underlying techniques (e.g., attention-based, generative model-based, reasoning-based, foundation model-based). We analyze the commonalities and differences in applying these methods across image and video modalities, highlighting modality-specific challenges and opportunities for explainability. Additionally, we summarize relevant datasets and evaluation metrics, discussing both standard performance metrics and emerging approaches for assessing explanation quality (e.g., faithfulness, stability). Finally, we discuss promising future directions and open problems, including quantifying explanation quality, explaining diverse AD paradigms (SSL, zero-shot), enhancing context-awareness, leveraging foundation models responsibly, and addressing real-world constraints like efficiency and robustness. A curated collection of related resources is available at https://github.com/wyzjack/Awesome-XAD.
abstract_zh: 视觉数据（包括图像和视频）中的异常检测和定位对于机器学习和实际应用至关重要。尽管视觉异常检测（VAD）取得了快速进展，但解释这些通常是黑盒的模型并解释为什么特定实例被标记为异常仍然具有挑战性。本文提供了第一个专门针对可解释的 2D 视觉异常检测 (X-VAD) 的全面调查，涵盖图像 (IAD) 和视频 (VAD) 的方法。我们首先介绍一下IAD和VAD的背景。然后，作为核心贡献，我们对可解释方法进行了全面的文献综述，并按其基础技术进行分类（例如，基于注意力的、基于生成模型的、基于推理的、基于基础模型的）。我们分析了在图像和视频模式中应用这些方法的共性和差异，强调了特定模式的挑战和可解释性的机会。此外，我们总结了相关数据集和评估指标，讨论了标准绩效指标和评估解释质量（例如忠实性、稳定性）的新兴方法。最后，我们讨论有前途的未来方向和未解决的问题，包括量化解释质量、解释不同的 AD 范式（SSL、零样本）、增强上下文感知、负责任地利用基础模型以及解决效率和鲁棒性等现实世界的约束。 https://github.com/wyzjack/Awesome-XAD 提供了精选的相关资源集合。

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了图像和视频中可解释异常检测（X-VAD）的方法，分析了不同技术路线并探讨了未来方向。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉异常检测技术快速发展，但模型的可解释性不足，导致难以理解异常判定依据，阻碍了实际应用。
AI.method: 通过文献综述，将可解释方法按技术路线（如注意力机制、生成模型等）分类，并对比分析图像与视频模态的异同及挑战。
AI.result: 总结了主流方法、数据集及评估指标，指出当前在解释质量评估（如可信度、稳定性）和跨模态适应性方面的不足。
AI.conclusion: 未来需关注量化解释质量、零样本检测解释、上下文感知增强及高效鲁棒模型设计，开源资源库为研究提供支持。

search_text: Unveiling the Unseen: A Comprehensive Survey on Explainable Anomaly Detection in Images and Videos 揭开未见之谜：图像和视频中可解释异常检测的综合调查 Anomaly detection and localization in visual data, including images and videos, are crucial in machine learning and real-world applications. Despite rapid advancements in visual anomaly detection (VAD), interpreting these often black-box models and explaining why specific instances are flagged as anomalous remains challenging. This paper provides the first comprehensive survey focused specifically on explainable 2D visual anomaly detection (X-VAD), covering methods for both images (IAD) and videos (VAD). We first introduce the background of IAD and VAD. Then, as the core contribution, we present a thorough literature review of explainable methods, categorized by their underlying techniques (e.g., attention-based, generative model-based, reasoning-based, foundation model-based). We analyze the commonalities and differences in applying these methods across image and video modalities, highlighting modality-specific challenges and opportunities for explainability. Additionally, we summarize relevant datasets and evaluation metrics, discussing both standard performance metrics and emerging approaches for assessing explanation quality (e.g., faithfulness, stability). Finally, we discuss promising future directions and open problems, including quantifying explanation quality, explaining diverse AD paradigms (SSL, zero-shot), enhancing context-awareness, leveraging foundation models responsibly, and addressing real-world constraints like efficiency and robustness. A curated collection of related resources is available at https://github.com/wyzjack/Awesome-XAD. 视觉数据（包括图像和视频）中的异常检测和定位对于机器学习和实际应用至关重要。尽管视觉异常检测（VAD）取得了快速进展，但解释这些通常是黑盒的模型并解释为什么特定实例被标记为异常仍然具有挑战性。本文提供了第一个专门针对可解释的 2D 视觉异常检测 (X-VAD) 的全面调查，涵盖图像 (IAD) 和视频 (VAD) 的方法。我们首先介绍一下IAD和VAD的背景。然后，作为核心贡献，我们对可解释方法进行了全面的文献综述，并按其基础技术进行分类（例如，基于注意力的、基于生成模型的、基于推理的、基于基础模型的）。我们分析了在图像和视频模式中应用这些方法的共性和差异，强调了特定模式的挑战和可解释性的机会。此外，我们总结了相关数据集和评估指标，讨论了标准绩效指标和评估解释质量（例如忠实性、稳定性）的新兴方法。最后，我们讨论有前途的未来方向和未解决的问题，包括量化解释质量、解释不同的 AD 范式（SSL、零样本）、增强上下文感知、负责任地利用基础模型以及解决效率和鲁棒性等现实世界的约束。 https://github.com/wyzjack/Awesome-XAD 提供了精选的相关资源集合。 本文系统综述了图像和视频中可解释异常检测（X-VAD）的方法，分析了不同技术路线并探讨了未来方向。 Yizhou Wang,Dongliang Guo,Sheng Li,Octavia Camps,Yun Fu cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Beyond Transactional Democracy: A Study of Civic Tech in Canada
title_zh: 超越交易民主：加拿大公民技术研究
abstract: Technologies are increasingly enrolled in projects to involve civilians in the work of policy-making, often under the label of 'civic technology'. But conventional forms of participation through transactions such as voting provide limited opportunities for engagement. In response, some civic tech groups organize around issues of shared concern to explore new forms of democratic technologies. How does their work affect the relationship between publics and public servants? This paper explores how a Civic Tech Toronto creates a platform for civic engagement through the maintenance of an autonomous community for civic engagement and participation that is casual, social, nonpartisan, experimental, and flexible. Based on two years of action research, including community organizing, interviews, and observations, this paper shows how this grassroots civic tech group creates a civic platform that places a diverse range of participants in contact with the work of public servants, helping to build capacities and relationships that prepare both publics and public servants for the work of participatory democracy. The case shows that understanding civic tech requires a lens beyond the mere analysis or production of technical artifacts. As a practice for making technologies that is social and participatory, civic tech creates alternative modes of technology development and opportunities for experimentation and learning, and it can reconfigure the roles of democratic participants.
summary: Technologies are increasingly enrolled in projects to involve civilians in the work of policy-making, often under the label of 'civic technology'. But conventional forms of participation through transactions such as voting provide limited opportunities for engagement. In response, some civic tech groups organize around issues of shared concern to explore new forms of democratic technologies. How does their work affect the relationship between publics and public servants? This paper explores how a Civic Tech Toronto creates a platform for civic engagement through the maintenance of an autonomous community for civic engagement and participation that is casual, social, nonpartisan, experimental, and flexible. Based on two years of action research, including community organizing, interviews, and observations, this paper shows how this grassroots civic tech group creates a civic platform that places a diverse range of participants in contact with the work of public servants, helping to build capacities and relationships that prepare both publics and public servants for the work of participatory democracy. The case shows that understanding civic tech requires a lens beyond the mere analysis or production of technical artifacts. As a practice for making technologies that is social and participatory, civic tech creates alternative modes of technology development and opportunities for experimentation and learning, and it can reconfigure the roles of democratic participants.
abstract_zh: 技术越来越多地参与到让平民参与决策工作的项目中，这些项目通常被贴上“公民技术”的标签。但通过投票等交易的传统参与形式提供的参与机会有限。作为回应，一些民间科技团体围绕共同关心的问题组织起来，探索新形式的民主技术。他们的工作如何影响公众与公务员之间的关系？本文探讨了多伦多公民科技公司如何通过维护一个公民参与的自治社区来创建一个公民参与的平台，该社区是休闲的、社交的、无党派的、实验性的和灵活的。基于两年的行动研究，包括社区组织、访谈和观察，本文展示了这个草根公民技术团体如何创建一个公民平台，让各种参与者接触公务员的工作，帮助建立能力和关系，为公众和公务员的参与式民主工作做好准备。这个案例表明，理解公民技术需要的视角不仅仅是技术工件的分析或生产。作为一种创造社会性和参与性技术的实践，公民技术创造了技术开发的替代模式以及实验和学习的机会，并且它可以重新配置民主参与者的角色。

AI.tldr: 本文研究加拿大公民科技组织Civic Tech Toronto如何通过构建非正式、非党派的平台促进公民参与政策制定，探索超越传统民主模式的新型技术实践。
AI.motivation: 传统民主参与方式（如投票）存在局限性，需探索公民科技在构建新型民主技术实践中的潜力，以增强公众与公共部门的互动关系。
AI.method: 基于两年行动研究，结合社区组织、访谈和观察，分析Civic Tech Toronto的平台运作及其对公民与公共部门关系的影响。
AI.result: 该平台通过多样化参与机制建立了公民与公共部门的联系，培养了双方参与协商民主的能力，证明公民科技需超越技术工具本身，关注社会参与实践。
AI.conclusion: 公民科技作为社会参与的技术实践，能够重构民主参与者角色，提供技术开发新范式与实验学习机会，需从技术与社会互动的视角重新理解其价值。

title: Surround-View Vision-based 3D Detection for Autonomous Driving: A Survey
title_zh: 基于环视视觉的自动驾驶 3D 检测：调查
abstract: Vision-based 3D Detection task is fundamental task for the perception of an autonomous driving system, which has peaked interest amongst many researchers and autonomous driving engineers. However achieving a rather good 3D BEV (Bird's Eye View) performance is not an easy task using 2D sensor input-data with cameras. In this paper we provide a literature survey for the existing Vision Based 3D detection methods, focused on autonomous driving. We have made detailed analysis of over $60$ papers leveraging Vision BEV detections approaches and highlighted different sub-groups for detailed understanding of common trends. Moreover, we have highlighted how the literature and industry trend have moved towards surround-view image based methods and note down thoughts on what special cases this method addresses. In conclusion, we provoke thoughts of 3D Vision techniques for future research based on shortcomings of the current techniques including the direction of collaborative perception.
summary: Vision-based 3D Detection task is fundamental task for the perception of an autonomous driving system, which has peaked interest amongst many researchers and autonomous driving engineers. However achieving a rather good 3D BEV (Bird's Eye View) performance is not an easy task using 2D sensor input-data with cameras. In this paper we provide a literature survey for the existing Vision Based 3D detection methods, focused on autonomous driving. We have made detailed analysis of over $60$ papers leveraging Vision BEV detections approaches and highlighted different sub-groups for detailed understanding of common trends. Moreover, we have highlighted how the literature and industry trend have moved towards surround-view image based methods and note down thoughts on what special cases this method addresses. In conclusion, we provoke thoughts of 3D Vision techniques for future research based on shortcomings of the current techniques including the direction of collaborative perception.
abstract_zh: 基于视觉的3D检测任务是自动驾驶系统感知的基础任务，引起了许多研究人员和自动驾驶工程师的兴趣。然而，使用相机的 2D 传感器输入数据来实现相当好的 3D BEV（鸟瞰）性能并不是一件容易的事。在本文中，我们对现有基于视觉的 3D 检测方法进行了文献调查，重点关注自动驾驶。我们利用 Vision BEV 检测方法对超过 60 美元的论文进行了详细分析，并突出显示了不同的子组，以便详细了解共同趋势。此外，我们还强调了文献和行业趋势如何转向基于环视图像的方法，并记下对该方法解决的特殊情况的想法。总之，我们基于当前技术的缺点，包括协作感知的方向，引发了对 3D 视觉技术未来研究的思考。

AI.tldr: 本文对基于视觉的3D检测方法在自动驾驶中的应用进行了综述，重点分析了环绕视图图像方法的趋势和挑战。
AI.motivation: 基于视觉的3D鸟瞰图（BEV）检测对自动驾驶感知至关重要，但利用2D摄像头数据实现高性能极具挑战性，需系统梳理现有方法与趋势。
AI.method: 通过分析60余篇文献，对视觉BEV检测方法进行分类，总结子类群特征，并探讨环绕视图方法的行业趋势及特殊场景适用性。
AI.result: 明确了环绕视图方法在行业中的主导地位，指出现有技术在复杂场景下的不足，并提出协作感知等未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 当前技术存在局限性，未来需探索协作感知等新型3D视觉技术以提升自动驾驶系统的环境感知能力。

We have made detailed analysis of over $60$ papers leveraging Vision BEV detections approaches and highlighted different sub-groups for detailed understanding of common trends. In conclusion, we provoke thoughts of 3D Vision techniques for future research based on shortcomings of the current techniques including the direction of collaborative perception. 基于视觉的3D检测任务是自动驾驶系统感知的基础任务，引起了许多研究人员和自动驾驶工程师的兴趣。然而，使用相机的 2D 传感器输入数据来实现相当好的 3D BEV（鸟瞰）性能并不是一件容易的事。在本文中，我们对现有基于视觉的 3D 检测方法进行了文献调查，重点关注自动驾驶。我们利用 Vision BEV 检测方法对超过 60 美元的论文进行了详细分析，并突出显示了不同的子组，以便详细了解共同趋势。此外，我们还强调了文献和行业趋势如何转向基于环视图像的方法，并记下对该方法解决的特殊情况的想法。总之，我们基于当前技术的缺点，包括协作感知的方向，引发了对 3D 视觉技术未来研究的思考。 本文对基于视觉的3D检测方法在自动驾驶中的应用进行了综述，重点分析了环绕视图图像方法的趋势和挑战。 Apoorv Singh,Varun Bankiti cs.CV

title: Vision-RADAR fusion for Robotics BEV Detections: A Survey
title_zh: 用于机器人 BEV 检测的视觉与雷达融合：一项调查
abstract: Due to the trending need of building autonomous robotic perception system, sensor fusion has attracted a lot of attention amongst researchers and engineers to make best use of cross-modality information. However, in order to build a robotic platform at scale we need to emphasize on autonomous robot platform bring-up cost as well. Cameras and radars, which inherently includes complementary perception information, has potential for developing autonomous robotic platform at scale. However, there is a limited work around radar fused with Vision, compared to LiDAR fused with vision work. In this paper, we tackle this gap with a survey on Vision-Radar fusion approaches for a BEV object detection system. First we go through the background information viz., object detection tasks, choice of sensors, sensor setup, benchmark datasets and evaluation metrics for a robotic perception system. Later, we cover per-modality (Camera and RADAR) data representation, then we go into detail about sensor fusion techniques based on sub-groups viz., early-fusion, deep-fusion, and late-fusion to easily understand the pros and cons of each method. Finally, we propose possible future trends for vision-radar fusion to enlighten future research. Regularly updated summary can be found at: https://github.com/ApoorvRoboticist/Vision-RADAR-Fusion-BEV-Survey

However, in order to build a robotic platform at scale we need to emphasize on autonomous robot platform bring-up cost as well. Cameras and radars, which inherently includes complementary perception information, has potential for developing autonomous robotic platform at scale.
