search_text: Improving robot navigation in crowded environments using intrinsic rewards 使用内在奖励改善拥挤环境中的机器人导航 Autonomous navigation in crowded environments is an open problem with many applications, essential for the coexistence of robots and humans in the smart cities of the future. In recent years, deep reinforcement learning approaches have proven to outperform model-based algorithms. Nevertheless, even though the results provided are promising, the works are not able to take advantage of the capabilities that their models offer. They usually get trapped in local optima in the training process, that prevent them from learning the optimal policy. They are not able to visit and interact with every possible state appropriately, such as with the states near the goal or near the dynamic obstacles. In this work, we propose using intrinsic rewards to balance between exploration and exploitation and explore depending on the uncertainty of the states instead of on the time the agent has been trained, encouraging the agent to get more curious about unknown states. We explain the benefits of the approach and compare it with other exploration algorithms that may be used for crowd navigation. Many simulation experiments are performed modifying several algorithms of the state-of-the-art, showing that the use of intrinsic rewards makes the robot learn faster and reach higher rewards and success rates (fewer collisions) in shorter navigation times, outperforming the state-of-the-art. 拥挤环境中的自主导航是许多应用中的一个悬而未决的问题，对于未来智能城市中机器人和人类的共存至关重要。近年来，深度强化学习方法已被证明优于基于模型的算法。然而，尽管提供的结果很有希望，但这些作品无法利用其模型提供的功能。他们通常会在训练过程中陷入局部最优，从而阻止他们学习最优策略。他们无法适当地访问每个可能的状态并与之交互，例如接近目标或接近动态障碍的状态。在这项工作中，我们建议使用内在奖励来平衡探索和利用，并根据状态的不确定性而不是智能体训练的时间进行探索，鼓励智能体对未知状态更加好奇。我们解释了该方法的优点，并将其与可用于人群导航的其他探索算法进行比较。通过修改多种最先​​进的算法进行了许多模拟实验，结果表明，使用内在奖励可以使机器人学习得更快，并在更短的导航时间内获得更高的奖励和成功率（更少的碰撞），优于最先进的算法。 本文提出利用内在奖励机制提升机器人在拥挤环境中的自主导航能力。 Diego Martinez-Baselga,Luis Riazuelo,Luis Montano cs.RO

authors_text: Nati Daniel,Eliel Aknin,Ariel Larey,Yoni Peretz,Guy Sela,Yael Fisher,Yonatan Savir
title: Between Generating Noise and Generating Images: Noise in the Correct Frequency Improves the Quality of Synthetic Histopathology Images for Digital Pathology
title_zh: 在生成噪声和生成图像之间：正确频率的噪声可提高数字病理学合成组织病理学图像的质量
abstract: Artificial intelligence and machine learning techniques have the promise to revolutionize the field of digital pathology. However, these models demand considerable amounts of data, while the availability of unbiased training data is limited. Synthetic images can augment existing datasets, to improve and validate AI algorithms. Yet, controlling the exact distribution of cellular features within them is still challenging. One of the solutions is harnessing conditional generative adversarial networks that take a semantic mask as an input rather than a random noise. Unlike other domains, outlining the exact cellular structure of tissues is hard, and most of the input masks depict regions of cell types. However, using polygon-based masks introduce inherent artifacts within the synthetic images - due to the mismatch between the polygon size and the single-cell size. In this work, we show that introducing random single-pixel noise with the appropriate spatial frequency into a polygon semantic mask can dramatically improve the quality of the synthetic images. We used our platform to generate synthetic images of immunohistochemistry-treated lung biopsies. We test the quality of the images using a three-fold validation procedure. First, we show that adding the appropriate noise frequency yields 87% of the similarity metrics improvement that is obtained by adding the actual single-cell features. Second, we show that the synthetic images pass the Turing test. Finally, we show that adding these synthetic images to the train set improves AI performance in terms of PD-L1 semantic segmentation performances. Our work suggests a simple and powerful approach for generating synthetic data on demand to unbias limited datasets to improve the algorithms' accuracy and validate their robustness.
summary: Artificial intelligence and machine learning techniques have the promise to revolutionize the field of digital pathology. However, these models demand considerable amounts of data, while the availability of unbiased training data is limited. Synthetic images can augment existing datasets, to improve and validate AI algorithms. Yet, controlling the exact distribution of cellular features within them is still challenging. One of the solutions is harnessing conditional generative adversarial networks that take a semantic mask as an input rather than a random noise. Unlike other domains, outlining the exact cellular structure of tissues is hard, and most of the input masks depict regions of cell types. However, using polygon-based masks introduce inherent artifacts within the synthetic images - due to the mismatch between the polygon size and the single-cell size. In this work, we show that introducing random single-pixel noise with the appropriate spatial frequency into a polygon semantic mask can dramatically improve the quality of the synthetic images. We used our platform to generate synthetic images of immunohistochemistry-treated lung biopsies. We test the quality of the images using a three-fold validation procedure. First, we show that adding the appropriate noise frequency yields 87% of the similarity metrics improvement that is obtained by adding the actual single-cell features. Second, we show that the synthetic images pass the Turing test. Finally, we show that adding these synthetic images to the train set improves AI performance in terms of PD-L1 semantic segmentation performances. Our work suggests a simple and powerful approach for generating synthetic data on demand to unbias limited datasets to improve the algorithms' accuracy and validate their robustness.
abstract_zh: 人工智能和机器学习技术有望彻底改变数字病理学领域。然而，这些模型需要大量数据，而无偏差训练数据的可用性却有限。合成图像可以扩充现有数据集，以改进和验证人工智能算法。然而，控制其中细胞特征的精确分布仍然具有挑战性。解决方案之一是利用条件生成对抗网络，该网络将语义掩码作为输入而不是随机噪声。与其他领域不同，勾勒出组织的确切细胞结构很困难，而且大多数输入掩模都描绘了细胞类​​型的区域。然而，由于多边形大小和单细胞大小之间的不匹配，使用基于多边形的掩模会在合成图像中引入固有的伪影。在这项工作中，我们表明，将具有适当空间频率的随机单像素噪声引入多边形语义掩模可以显着提高合成图像的质量。我们使用我们的平台生成免疫组织化学处理的肺活检的合成图像。我们使用三重验证程序来测试图像的质量。首先，我们表明，添加适当的噪声频率可提高 87% 的相似性度量，而该相似性度量是通过添加实际的单细胞特征获得的。其次，我们证明合成图像通过了图灵测试。最后，我们表明，将这些合成图像添加到训练集中可以提高 PD-L1 语义分割性能方面的 AI 性能。我们的工作提出了一种简单而强大的方法，用于按需生成合成数据，以消除有限数据集的偏差，以提高算法的准确性并验证其稳健性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过在语义掩码中引入适当空间频率的单像素噪声，显著提升合成组织病理学图像的质量，从而增强数字病理学中人工智能算法的性能。
AI.motivation: 数字病理学中AI模型因训练数据不足且合成图像难以精确控制细胞特征分布而受限，现有基于多边形掩码的方法存在因单细胞尺寸与掩码不匹配导致的伪影问题。
AI.method: 采用条件生成对抗网络（cGAN），在语义掩码中注入特定空间频率的随机单像素噪声，并通过三重验证（相似度指标、图灵测试、AI性能提升）评估合成图像质量。
AI.result: 噪声优化使合成图像相似度指标提升87%（接近真实细胞特征效果），通过图灵测试，且加入训练集后PD-L1分割性能显著提高。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为生成无偏倚的高质量合成数据提供了简单有效的新途径，可提升AI算法准确性并验证其鲁棒性。

authors_text: Bram Grooten,Ghada Sokar,Shibhansh Dohare,Elena Mocanu,Matthew E. Taylor,Mykola Pechenizkiy,Decebal Constantin Mocanu
title: Automatic Noise Filtering with Dynamic Sparse Training in Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 深度强化学习中的动态稀疏训练自动噪声过滤
abstract: Tomorrow's robots will need to distinguish useful information from noise when performing different tasks. A household robot for instance may continuously receive a plethora of information about the home, but needs to focus on just a small subset to successfully execute its current chore. Filtering distracting inputs that contain irrelevant data has received little attention in the reinforcement learning literature. To start resolving this, we formulate a problem setting in reinforcement learning called the $\textit{extremely noisy environment}$ (ENE), where up to $99\%$ of the input features are pure noise. Agents need to detect which features provide task-relevant information about the state of the environment. Consequently, we propose a new method termed $\textit{Automatic Noise Filtering}$ (ANF), which uses the principles of dynamic sparse training in synergy with various deep reinforcement learning algorithms. The sparse input layer learns to focus its connectivity on task-relevant features, such that ANF-SAC and ANF-TD3 outperform standard SAC and TD3 by a large margin, while using up to $95\%$ fewer weights. Furthermore, we devise a transfer learning setting for ENEs, by permuting all features of the environment after 1M timesteps to simulate the fact that other information sources can become relevant as the world evolves. Again, ANF surpasses the baselines in final performance and sample complexity. Our code is available at https://github.com/bramgrooten/automatic-noise-filtering
summary: Tomorrow's robots will need to distinguish useful information from noise when performing different tasks. A household robot for instance may continuously receive a plethora of information about the home, but needs to focus on just a small subset to successfully execute its current chore. Filtering distracting inputs that contain irrelevant data has received little attention in the reinforcement learning literature. To start resolving this, we formulate a problem setting in reinforcement learning called the $\textit{extremely noisy environment}$ (ENE), where up to $99\%$ of the input features are pure noise. Agents need to detect which features provide task-relevant information about the state of the environment. Consequently, we propose a new method termed $\textit{Automatic Noise Filtering}$ (ANF), which uses the principles of dynamic sparse training in synergy with various deep reinforcement learning algorithms. The sparse input layer learns to focus its connectivity on task-relevant features, such that ANF-SAC and ANF-TD3 outperform standard SAC and TD3 by a large margin, while using up to $95\%$ fewer weights. Furthermore, we devise a transfer learning setting for ENEs, by permuting all features of the environment after 1M timesteps to simulate the fact that other information sources can become relevant as the world evolves. Again, ANF surpasses the baselines in final performance and sample complexity. Our code is available at https://github.com/bramgrooten/automatic-noise-filtering
abstract_zh: 明天的机器人在执行不同任务时需要区分有用信息和噪音。例如，家庭机器人可能会持续接收大量有关家庭的信息，但只需要关注一小部分信息即可成功执行当前的家务。过滤包含不相关数据的分散注意力的输入在强化学习文献中很少受到关注。为了开始解决这个问题，我们在强化学习中制定了一个问题设置，称为 $\textit{极度嘈杂的环境}$ (ENE)，其中高达 $99\%$ 的输入特征是纯噪声。代理需要检测哪些功能提供有关环境状态的任务相关信息。因此，我们提出了一种称为 $\textit{自动噪声过滤}$ (ANF) 的新方法，该方法使用动态稀疏训练的原理与各种深度强化学习算法协同。稀疏输入层学习将其连接集中在与任务相关的特征上，使得 ANF-SAC 和 ANF-TD3 的性能大幅优于标准 SAC 和 TD3，同时使用的权重减少了 95\%$。此外，我们为 ENE 设计了一种迁移学习设置，通过在 1M 个时间步长后排列环境的所有特征来模拟其他信息源可以随着世界的发展而变得相关的事实。 ANF 在最终性能和样本复杂性方面再次超过了基线。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/bramgrooten/automatic-noise-filtering

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为自动噪声过滤（ANF）的方法，结合动态稀疏训练与深度强化学习算法，解决极端噪声环境中特征筛选问题。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法在处理高噪声输入时效率低下，机器人需从海量信息中筛选关键特征以完成任务，但相关研究较少。
AI.method: 设计ANF框架，通过动态稀疏训练机制让输入层自动聚焦于任务相关特征，并与SAC/TD3算法结合；引入迁移学习设置模拟环境特征变化。
AI.result: ANF-SAC/ANF-TD3在保持95%更少参数情况下显著优于基线方法，且在迁移学习场景中保持性能优势。
AI.conclusion: ANF有效解决了极端噪声环境下的特征筛选问题，提升了算法效率与泛化能力，适用于动态变化的现实场景。

search_text: Automatic Noise Filtering with Dynamic Sparse Training in Deep Reinforcement Learning 深度强化学习中的动态稀疏训练自动噪声过滤 Tomorrow's robots will need to distinguish useful information from noise when performing different tasks. A household robot for instance may continuously receive a plethora of information about the home, but needs to focus on just a small subset to successfully execute its current chore. Filtering distracting inputs that contain irrelevant data has received little attention in the reinforcement learning literature. To start resolving this, we formulate a problem setting in reinforcement learning called the $\textit{extremely noisy environment}$ (ENE), where up to $99\%$ of the input features are pure noise. Agents need to detect which features provide task-relevant information about the state of the environment. Consequently, we propose a new method termed $\textit{Automatic Noise Filtering}$ (ANF), which uses the principles of dynamic sparse training in synergy with various deep reinforcement learning algorithms. The sparse input layer learns to focus its connectivity on task-relevant features, such that ANF-SAC and ANF-TD3 outperform standard SAC and TD3 by a large margin, while using up to $95\%$ fewer weights. Furthermore, we devise a transfer learning setting for ENEs, by permuting all features of the environment after 1M timesteps to simulate the fact that other information sources can become relevant as the world evolves. Again, ANF surpasses the baselines in final performance and sample complexity. Our code is available at https://github.com/bramgrooten/automatic-noise-filtering 明天的机器人在执行不同任务时需要区分有用信息和噪音。例如，家庭机器人可能会持续接收大量有关家庭的信息，但只需要关注一小部分信息即可成功执行当前的家务。过滤包含不相关数据的分散注意力的输入在强化学习文献中很少受到关注。为了开始解决这个问题，我们在强化学习中制定了一个问题设置，称为 $\textit{极度嘈杂的环境}$ (ENE)，其中高达 $99\%$ 的输入特征是纯噪声。代理需要检测哪些功能提供有关环境状态的任务相关信息。因此，我们提出了一种称为 $\textit{自动噪声过滤}$ (ANF) 的新方法，该方法使用动态稀疏训练的原理与各种深度强化学习算法协同。稀疏输入层学习将其连接集中在与任务相关的特征上，使得 ANF-SAC 和 ANF-TD3 的性能大幅优于标准 SAC 和 TD3，同时使用的权重减少了 95\%$。此外，我们为 ENE 设计了一种迁移学习设置，通过在 1M 个时间步长后排列环境的所有特征来模拟其他信息源可以随着世界的发展而变得相关的事实。 ANF 在最终性能和样本复杂性方面再次超过了基线。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/bramgrooten/automatic-noise-filtering 本文提出了一种名为自动噪声过滤（ANF）的方法，结合动态稀疏训练与深度强化学习算法，解决极端噪声环境中特征筛选问题。 Bram Grooten,Ghada Sokar,Shibhansh Dohare,Elena Mocanu,Matthew E. Taylor,Mykola Pechenizkiy,Decebal Constantin Mocanu cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Lucas Streichenberg,Elia Trevisan,Jen Jen Chung,Roland Siegwart,Javier Alonso-Mora
title: Multi-Agent Path Integral Control for Interaction-Aware Motion Planning in Urban Canals
title_zh: 城市运河交互感知运动规划的多智能体路径积分控制
comment: Accepted for presentation at the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
comments: Accepted for presentation at the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
abstract: Autonomous vehicles that operate in urban environments shall comply with existing rules and reason about the interactions with other decision-making agents. In this paper, we introduce a decentralized and communication-free interaction-aware motion planner and apply it to Autonomous Surface Vessels (ASVs) in urban canals. We build upon a sampling-based method, namely Model Predictive Path Integral control (MPPI), and employ it to, in each time instance, compute both a collision-free trajectory for the vehicle and a prediction of other agents' trajectories, thus modeling interactions. To improve the method's efficiency in multi-agent scenarios, we introduce a two-stage sample evaluation strategy and define an appropriate cost function to achieve rule compliance. We evaluate this decentralized approach in simulations with multiple vessels in real scenarios extracted from Amsterdam's canals, showing superior performance than a state-of-the-art trajectory optimization framework and robustness when encountering different types of agents.
summary: Autonomous vehicles that operate in urban environments shall comply with existing rules and reason about the interactions with other decision-making agents. In this paper, we introduce a decentralized and communication-free interaction-aware motion planner and apply it to Autonomous Surface Vessels (ASVs) in urban canals. We build upon a sampling-based method, namely Model Predictive Path Integral control (MPPI), and employ it to, in each time instance, compute both a collision-free trajectory for the vehicle and a prediction of other agents' trajectories, thus modeling interactions. To improve the method's efficiency in multi-agent scenarios, we introduce a two-stage sample evaluation strategy and define an appropriate cost function to achieve rule compliance. We evaluate this decentralized approach in simulations with multiple vessels in real scenarios extracted from Amsterdam's canals, showing superior performance than a state-of-the-art trajectory optimization framework and robustness when encountering different types of agents.
abstract_zh: 在城市环境中运行的自动驾驶车辆应遵守与其他决策主体交互的现有规则和推理。在本文中，我们介绍了一种去中心化且无通信的交互感知运动规划器，并将其应用于城市运河中的自主水面船只（ASV）。我们建立在基于采样的方法之上，即模型预测路径积分控制（MPPI），并利用它在每个时间实例中计算车辆的无碰撞轨迹和其他代理轨迹的预测，从而对交互进行建模。为了提高该方法在多智能体场景中的效率，我们引入了两阶段样本评估策略并定义了适当的成本函数以实现规则合规性。我们在从阿姆斯特丹运河提取的真实场景中使用多艘船只进行模拟来评估这种分散式方法，显示出比最先进的轨迹优化框架更优越的性能以及在遇到不同类型的代理时的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于城市运河中自主水面船舶的交互感知运动规划方法，通过改进的路径积分控制实现多智能体间的协同避障。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶方法难以在复杂城市运河环境中有效处理多智能体交互与规则约束，需开发无需通信的分布式解决方案。
AI.method: 基于模型预测路径积分控制（MPPI），结合两阶段样本评估策略与规则合规成本函数，实现轨迹规划与交互建模。
AI.result: 在阿姆斯特丹运河真实场景模拟中，该方法在多船舶场景下表现出优于现有框架的轨迹优化性能与环境适应性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的分散式交互感知规划方法有效解决了城市运河多智能体运动规划难题，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Fabrizio Ventola,Steven Braun,Zhongjie Yu,Martin Mundt,Kristian Kersting
title: Probabilistic Circuits That Know What They Don't Know
title_zh: 知道自己不知道什么的概率电路
abstract: Probabilistic circuits (PCs) are models that allow exact and tractable probabilistic inference. In contrast to neural networks, they are often assumed to be well-calibrated and robust to out-of-distribution (OOD) data. In this paper, we show that PCs are in fact not robust to OOD data, i.e., they don't know what they don't know. We then show how this challenge can be overcome by model uncertainty quantification. To this end, we propose tractable dropout inference (TDI), an inference procedure to estimate uncertainty by deriving an analytical solution to Monte Carlo dropout (MCD) through variance propagation. Unlike MCD in neural networks, which comes at the cost of multiple network evaluations, TDI provides tractable sampling-free uncertainty estimates in a single forward pass. TDI improves the robustness of PCs to distribution shift and OOD data, demonstrated through a series of experiments evaluating the classification confidence and uncertainty estimates on real-world data.
summary: Probabilistic circuits (PCs) are models that allow exact and tractable probabilistic inference. In contrast to neural networks, they are often assumed to be well-calibrated and robust to out-of-distribution (OOD) data. In this paper, we show that PCs are in fact not robust to OOD data, i.e., they don't know what they don't know. We then show how this challenge can be overcome by model uncertainty quantification. To this end, we propose tractable dropout inference (TDI), an inference procedure to estimate uncertainty by deriving an analytical solution to Monte Carlo dropout (MCD) through variance propagation. Unlike MCD in neural networks, which comes at the cost of multiple network evaluations, TDI provides tractable sampling-free uncertainty estimates in a single forward pass. TDI improves the robustness of PCs to distribution shift and OOD data, demonstrated through a series of experiments evaluating the classification confidence and uncertainty estimates on real-world data.
abstract_zh: 概率电路 (PC) 是允许精确且易于处理的概率推理的模型。与神经网络相反，它们通常被认为是经过良好校准的并且对分布外（OOD）数据具有鲁棒性。在本文中，我们表明 PC 实际上对 OOD 数据并不稳健，即它们不知道自己不知道什么。然后，我们展示如何通过模型不确定性量化来克服这一挑战。为此，我们提出了易处理的丢失推断（TDI），这是一种通过方差传播推导出蒙特卡洛丢失（MCD）解析解来估计不确定性的推断程序。与神经网络中的 MCD（以多次网络评估为代价）不同，TDI 在一次前向传递中提供了易于处理的无采样不确定性估计。通过评估真实世界数据的分类置信度和不确定性估计的一系列实验证明，TDI 提高了 PC 对分布变化和 OOD 数据的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究概率电路在分布外数据上的不鲁棒性问题，并提出一种可计算的dropout推理方法（TDI）以提高其鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 尽管概率电路（PCs）通常被认为对分布外数据鲁棒，但作者发现其在实际应用中存在不确定性量化不足的问题，导致无法有效识别未知分布数据。
AI.method: 提出可计算的dropout推理（TDI）方法，通过方差传播推导出蒙特卡洛dropout的解析解，实现无需多次网络评估的单次前向传递不确定性估计。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，TDI方法在多个真实数据集上有效提升了概率电路的分类置信度和不确定性估计能力，显著增强了其对分布偏移和分布外数据的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了概率电路在分布外数据上的脆弱性，并通过TDI方法有效解决了不确定性量化问题，为提升模型鲁棒性提供了新思路。

To this end, we propose tractable dropout inference (TDI), an inference procedure to estimate uncertainty by deriving an analytical solution to Monte Carlo dropout (MCD) through variance propagation. Unlike MCD in neural networks, which comes at the cost of multiple network evaluations, TDI provides tractable sampling-free uncertainty estimates in a single forward pass. TDI improves the robustness of PCs to distribution shift and OOD data, demonstrated through a series of experiments evaluating the classification confidence and uncertainty estimates on real-world data. 概率电路 (PC) 是允许精确且易于处理的概率推理的模型。与神经网络相反，它们通常被认为是经过良好校准的并且对分布外（OOD）数据具有鲁棒性。在本文中，我们表明 PC 实际上对 OOD 数据并不稳健，即它们不知道自己不知道什么。然后，我们展示如何通过模型不确定性量化来克服这一挑战。为此，我们提出了易处理的丢失推断（TDI），这是一种通过方差传播推导出蒙特卡洛丢失（MCD）解析解来估计不确定性的推断程序。与神经网络中的 MCD（以多次网络评估为代价）不同，TDI 在一次前向传递中提供了易于处理的无采样不确定性估计。通过评估真实世界数据的分类置信度和不确定性估计的一系列实验证明，TDI 提高了 PC 对分布变化和 OOD 数据的鲁棒性。 本文主要研究概率电路在分布外数据上的不鲁棒性问题，并提出一种可计算的dropout推理方法（TDI）以提高其鲁棒性。 Fabrizio Ventola,Steven Braun,Zhongjie Yu,Martin Mundt,Kristian Kersting cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Imitation from Observation With Bootstrapped Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 通过引导对比学习进行观察模仿
abstract: Imitation from observation (IfO) is a learning paradigm that consists of training autonomous agents in a Markov Decision Process (MDP) by observing expert demonstrations without access to its actions. These demonstrations could be sequences of environment states or raw visual observations of the environment. Recent work in IfO has focused on this problem in the case of observations of low-dimensional environment states, however, access to these highly-specific observations is unlikely in practice. In this paper, we adopt a challenging, but more realistic problem formulation, learning control policies that operate on a learned latent space with access only to visual demonstrations of an expert completing a task. We present BootIfOL, an IfO algorithm that aims to learn a reward function that takes an agent trajectory and compares it to an expert, providing rewards based on similarity to agent behavior and implicit goal. We consider this reward function to be a distance metric between trajectories of agent behavior and learn it via contrastive learning. The contrastive learning objective aims to closely represent expert trajectories and to distance them from non-expert trajectories. The set of non-expert trajectories used in contrastive learning is made progressively more complex by bootstrapping from roll-outs of the agent learned through RL using the current reward function. We evaluate our approach on a variety of control tasks showing that we can train effective policies using a limited number of demonstrative trajectories, greatly improving on prior approaches that consider raw observations.

These demonstrations could be sequences of environment states or raw visual observations of the environment. Recent work in IfO has focused on this problem in the case of observations of low-dimensional environment states, however, access to these highly-specific observations is unlikely in practice. In this paper, we adopt a challenging, but more realistic problem formulation, learning control policies that operate on a learned latent space with access only to visual demonstrations of an expert completing a task. We present BootIfOL, an IfO algorithm that aims to learn a reward function that takes an agent trajectory and compares it to an expert, providing rewards based on similarity to agent behavior and implicit goal. We consider this reward function to be a distance metric between trajectories of agent behavior and learn it via contrastive learning. The contrastive learning objective aims to closely represent expert trajectories and to distance them from non-expert trajectories. The set of non-expert trajectories used in contrastive learning is made progressively more complex by bootstrapping from roll-outs of the agent learned through RL using the current reward function. We evaluate our approach on a variety of control tasks showing that we can train effective policies using a limited number of demonstrative trajectories, greatly improving on prior approaches that consider raw observations.
abstract_zh: 观察模仿（IfO）是一种学习范式，包括通过观察专家演示而不访问其操作来在马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）中训练自主代理。这些演示可以是环境状态的序列或对环境的原始视觉观察。 IfO 最近的工作重点是在低维环境状态观测的情况下解决这个问题，然而，在实践中不太可能获得这些高度具体的观测结果。在本文中，我们采用了一种具有挑战性但更现实的问题表述，学习控制策略在学习的潜在空间上运行，只能访问专家完成任务的视觉演示。我们提出了 BootIfOL，一种 IfO 算法，旨在学习奖励函数，该函数采用代理轨迹并将其与专家进行比较，根据代理行为的相似性和隐含目标提供奖励。我们认为这个奖励函数是代理行为轨迹之间的距离度量，并通过对比学习来学习它。对比学习目标旨在密切代表专家轨迹并使其与非专家轨迹保持距离。对比学习中使用的非专家轨迹集通过使用当前奖励函数通过 RL 学习的代理的推出进行引导，逐渐变得更加复杂。我们在各种控制任务上评估了我们的方法，表明我们可以使用有限数量的示范轨迹来训练有效的策略，大大改进了考虑原始观察的先前方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视觉演示的模仿学习方法，通过对比学习和引导机制学习奖励函数以训练控制策略。
AI.motivation: 传统模仿学习依赖低维状态观测，但实际中更常见的是视觉演示。现有方法在视觉观测任务中效果有限，需更现实的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出BootIfOL算法，通过对比学习构建轨迹相似性度量作为奖励函数，并利用当前策略生成的轨迹逐步增强对比学习的非专家轨迹集。
AI.result: 在多种控制任务中验证，该方法仅需少量演示轨迹即可训练有效策略，显著优于基于原始观测的先前方法。
AI.conclusion: BootIfOL通过对比学习和引导机制有效解决了视觉模仿学习问题，证明了在有限演示下学习复杂控制策略的可行性。

title: An Empirical Evaluation of Using Large Language Models for Automated Unit Test Generation
title_zh: 使用大型语言模型自动生成单元测试的实证评估
abstract: Unit tests play a key role in ensuring the correctness of software. However, manually creating unit tests is a laborious task, motivating the need for automation. Large Language Models (LLMs) have recently been applied to this problem, utilizing additional training or few-shot learning on examples of existing tests. This paper presents a large-scale empirical evaluation on the effectiveness of LLMs for automated unit test generation without additional training or manual effort, providing the LLM with the signature and implementation of the function under test, along with usage examples extracted from documentation. We also attempt to repair failed generated tests by re-prompting the model with the failing test and error message. We implement our approach in TestPilot, a test generation tool for JavaScript that automatically generates unit tests for all API functions in an npm package. We evaluate TestPilot using OpenAI's gpt3.5-turbo LLM on 25 npm packages with a total of 1,684 API functions. The generated tests achieve a median statement coverage of 70.2% and branch coverage of 52.8%, significantly improving on Nessie, a recent feedback-directed JavaScript test generation technique, which achieves only 51.3% statement coverage and 25.6% branch coverage. We also find that 92.8% of TestPilot's generated tests have no more than 50% similarity with existing tests (as measured by normalized edit distance), with none of them being exact copies. Finally, we run TestPilot with two additional LLMs, OpenAI's older code-cushman-002 LLM and the open LLM StarCoder. Overall, we observed similar results with the former (68.2% median statement coverage), and somewhat worse results with the latter (54.0% median statement coverage), suggesting that the effectiveness of the approach is influenced by the size and training set of the LLM, but does not fundamentally depend on the specific model.
summary: Unit tests play a key role in ensuring the correctness of software. However, manually creating unit tests is a laborious task, motivating the need for automation. Large Language Models (LLMs) have recently been applied to this problem, utilizing additional training or few-shot learning on examples of existing tests. This paper presents a large-scale empirical evaluation on the effectiveness of LLMs for automated unit test generation without additional training or manual effort, providing the LLM with the signature and implementation of the function under test, along with usage examples extracted from documentation. We also attempt to repair failed generated tests by re-prompting the model with the failing test and error message. We implement our approach in TestPilot, a test generation tool for JavaScript that automatically generates unit tests for all API functions in an npm package. We evaluate TestPilot using OpenAI's gpt3.5-turbo LLM on 25 npm packages with a total of 1,684 API functions. The generated tests achieve a median statement coverage of 70.2% and branch coverage of 52.8%, significantly improving on Nessie, a recent feedback-directed JavaScript test generation technique, which achieves only 51.3% statement coverage and 25.6% branch coverage. We also find that 92.8% of TestPilot's generated tests have no more than 50% similarity with existing tests (as measured by normalized edit distance), with none of them being exact copies. Finally, we run TestPilot with two additional LLMs, OpenAI's older code-cushman-002 LLM and the open LLM StarCoder. Overall, we observed similar results with the former (68.2% median statement coverage), and somewhat worse results with the latter (54.0% median statement coverage), suggesting that the effectiveness of the approach is influenced by the size and training set of the LLM, but does not fundamentally depend on the specific model.
abstract_zh: 单元测试对于保证软件的正确性起着关键作用。然而，手动创建单元测试是一项艰巨的任务，这就激发了对自动化的需求。最近，大型语言模型（LLM）已被应用于解决这个问题，利用现有测试示例的额外训练或少量学习。本文对 LLM 在无需额外培训或手动操作的情况下自动生成单元测试的有效性进行了大规模的实证评估，为 LLM 提供了被测函数的签名和实现，以及从文档中提取的使用示例。我们还尝试通过使用失败的测试和错误消息重新提示模型来修复失败的生成测试。我们在 TestPilot 中实现我们的方法，TestPilot 是一个 JavaScript 测试生成工具，可以自动为 npm 包中的所有 API 函数生成单元测试。我们使用 OpenAI 的 gpt3.5-turbo LLM 在 25 个 npm 包上评估 TestPilot，总共有 1,684 个 API 函数。生成的测试实现了 70.2% 的中值语句覆盖率和 52.8% 的分支覆盖率，显着改进了 Nessie（一种最近的反馈导向 JavaScript 测试生成技术），该技术仅实现了 51.3% 的语句覆盖率和 25.6% 的分支覆盖率。我们还发现，TestPilot 生成的测试中有 92.8% 与现有测试的相似度不超过 50%（通过标准化编辑距离测量），其中没有一个是精确的副本。最后，我们使用两个额外的 LLM 运行 TestPilot，即 OpenAI 的旧代码 cushman-002 LLM 和开放的 LLM StarCoder。总体而言，我们观察到前者的结果相似（语句覆盖率中值 68.2%），而后者的结果稍差（语句覆盖率中值 54.0%），这表明该方法的有效性受到 LLM 规模和训练集的影响，但从根本上并不取决于具体模型。

AI.tldr: 评估大语言模型在无需额外训练的情况下自动生成单元测试的有效性，并开发了TestPilot工具进行实证研究。
AI.motivation: 手动编写单元测试耗时费力，而大语言模型（LLM）可能通过函数签名、实现和文档示例自动生成测试，从而提高效率。
AI.method: 开发TestPilot工具，利用LLM（如gpt-3.5-turbo）根据函数签名、实现和文档示例生成单元测试，并通过重提示修复失败测试；在25个npm包的1,684个API函数上进行评估。
AI.result: 生成的测试达到70.2%的语句覆盖率和52.8%的分支覆盖率，显著优于Nessie方法；92.8%的测试相似度低于50%；其他模型（如StarCoder）效果略差。
AI.conclusion: LLM生成测试的有效性受模型规模和训练数据影响，但方法本身具有可行性且无需额外训练，可作为自动化测试的有效补充。

We also find that 92.8% of TestPilot's generated tests have no more than 50% similarity with existing tests (as measured by normalized edit distance), with none of them being exact copies. Finally, we run TestPilot with two additional LLMs, OpenAI's older code-cushman-002 LLM and the open LLM StarCoder. Overall, we observed similar results with the former (68.2% median statement coverage), and somewhat worse results with the latter (54.0% median statement coverage), suggesting that the effectiveness of the approach is influenced by the size and training set of the LLM, but does not fundamentally depend on the specific model. 单元测试对于保证软件的正确性起着关键作用。然而，手动创建单元测试是一项艰巨的任务，这就激发了对自动化的需求。最近，大型语言模型（LLM）已被应用于解决这个问题，利用现有测试示例的额外训练或少量学习。本文对 LLM 在无需额外培训或手动操作的情况下自动生成单元测试的有效性进行了大规模的实证评估，为 LLM 提供了被测函数的签名和实现，以及从文档中提取的使用示例。我们还尝试通过使用失败的测试和错误消息重新提示模型来修复失败的生成测试。我们在 TestPilot 中实现我们的方法，TestPilot 是一个 JavaScript 测试生成工具，可以自动为 npm 包中的所有 API 函数生成单元测试。我们使用 OpenAI 的 gpt3.5-turbo LLM 在 25 个 npm 包上评估 TestPilot，总共有 1,684 个 API 函数。生成的测试实现了 70.2% 的中值语句覆盖率和 52.8% 的分支覆盖率，显着改进了 Nessie（一种最近的反馈导向 JavaScript 测试生成技术），该技术仅实现了 51.3% 的语句覆盖率和 25.6% 的分支覆盖率。我们还发现，TestPilot 生成的测试中有 92.8% 与现有测试的相似度不超过 50%（通过标准化编辑距离测量），其中没有一个是精确的副本。最后，我们使用两个额外的 LLM 运行 TestPilot，即 OpenAI 的旧代码 cushman-002 LLM 和开放的 LLM StarCoder。总体而言，我们观察到前者的结果相似（语句覆盖率中值 68.2%），而后者的结果稍差（语句覆盖率中值 54.0%），这表明该方法的有效性受到 LLM 规模和训练集的影响，但从根本上并不取决于具体模型。 评估大语言模型在无需额外训练的情况下自动生成单元测试的有效性，并开发了TestPilot工具进行实证研究。 Max Schäfer,Sarah Nadi,Aryaz Eghbali,Frank Tip cs.SE,cs.AI

title: Transferable Deep Metric Learning for Clustering
title_zh: 用于聚类的可迁移深度度量学习
comment: Published in Symposium of Intelligent Data Analysis (IDA), 2023
comments: Published in Symposium of Intelligent Data Analysis (IDA), 2023
abstract: Clustering in high dimension spaces is a difficult task; the usual distance metrics may no longer be appropriate under the curse of dimensionality. Indeed, the choice of the metric is crucial, and it is highly dependent on the dataset characteristics. However a single metric could be used to correctly perform clustering on multiple datasets of different domains. We propose to do so, providing a framework for learning a transferable metric. We show that we can learn a metric on a labelled dataset, then apply it to cluster a different dataset, using an embedding space that characterises a desired clustering in the generic sense. We learn and test such metrics on several datasets of variable complexity (synthetic, MNIST, SVHN, omniglot) and achieve results competitive with the state-of-the-art while using only a small number of labelled training datasets and shallow networks.
summary: Clustering in high dimension spaces is a difficult task; the usual distance metrics may no longer be appropriate under the curse of dimensionality. Indeed, the choice of the metric is crucial, and it is highly dependent on the dataset characteristics. However a single metric could be used to correctly perform clustering on multiple datasets of different domains. We propose to do so, providing a framework for learning a transferable metric. We show that we can learn a metric on a labelled dataset, then apply it to cluster a different dataset, using an embedding space that characterises a desired clustering in the generic sense. We learn and test such metrics on several datasets of variable complexity (synthetic, MNIST, SVHN, omniglot) and achieve results competitive with the state-of-the-art while using only a small number of labelled training datasets and shallow networks.
abstract_zh: 高维空间中的聚类是一项艰巨的任务；在维度的诅咒下，通常的距离度量可能不再适用。事实上，指标的选择至关重要，它高度依赖于数据集的特征。然而，单个度量可用于在不同域的多个数据集上正确执行聚类。我们建议这样做，提供一个学习可转移指标的框架。我们表明，我们可以在标记数据集上学习度量，然后使用表征一般意义上所需聚类的嵌入空间将其应用于不同数据集的聚类。我们在多个不同复杂度的数据集（合成、MNIST、SVHN、omniglot）上学习和测试这些指标，并在仅使用少量标记训练数据集和浅层网络的情况下获得与最先进技术相媲美的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可迁移的深度度量学习框架，用于解决高维空间中聚类任务的度量选择问题，通过在标记数据集上学习度量并应用于不同领域的数据集。
AI.motivation: 高维空间聚类因维度灾难导致传统距离度量失效，且不同数据集需要定制化度量，手动选择度量成本高，需开发可跨领域迁移的通用度量方法。
AI.method: 构建嵌入空间表征聚类结构，在标记数据集上学习度量后迁移至其他数据集，结合浅层网络与少量标记数据实现跨领域度量适应。
AI.result: 在合成数据、MNIST、SVHN、Omniglot等数据集上验证，聚类效果与先进方法相当，且仅需少量标记数据与浅层网络即可达到竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效实现了跨领域度量迁移，为资源受限场景下的聚类任务提供了高效解决方案，验证了可迁移度量学习的可行性。

authors_text: Siyang Song,Micol Spitale,Yiming Luo,Batuhan Bal,Hatice Gunes
title: Multiple Appropriate Facial Reaction Generation in Dyadic Interaction Settings: What, Why and How?
title_zh: 在二元交互设置中生成多种适当的面部反应：什么、为什么以及如何？
abstract: According to the Stimulus Organism Response (SOR) theory, all human behavioral reactions are stimulated by context, where people will process the received stimulus and produce an appropriate reaction. This implies that in a specific context for a given input stimulus, a person can react differently according to their internal state and other contextual factors. Analogously, in dyadic interactions, humans communicate using verbal and nonverbal cues, where a broad spectrum of listeners' non-verbal reactions might be appropriate for responding to a specific speaker behaviour. There already exists a body of work that investigated the problem of automatically generating an appropriate reaction for a given input. However, none attempted to automatically generate multiple appropriate reactions in the context of dyadic interactions and evaluate the appropriateness of those reactions using objective measures. This paper starts by defining the facial Multiple Appropriate Reaction Generation (fMARG) task for the first time in the literature and proposes a new set of objective evaluation metrics to evaluate the appropriateness of the generated reactions. The paper subsequently introduces a framework to predict, generate, and evaluate multiple appropriate facial reactions.
summary: According to the Stimulus Organism Response (SOR) theory, all human behavioral reactions are stimulated by context, where people will process the received stimulus and produce an appropriate reaction. This implies that in a specific context for a given input stimulus, a person can react differently according to their internal state and other contextual factors. Analogously, in dyadic interactions, humans communicate using verbal and nonverbal cues, where a broad spectrum of listeners' non-verbal reactions might be appropriate for responding to a specific speaker behaviour. There already exists a body of work that investigated the problem of automatically generating an appropriate reaction for a given input. However, none attempted to automatically generate multiple appropriate reactions in the context of dyadic interactions and evaluate the appropriateness of those reactions using objective measures. This paper starts by defining the facial Multiple Appropriate Reaction Generation (fMARG) task for the first time in the literature and proposes a new set of objective evaluation metrics to evaluate the appropriateness of the generated reactions. The paper subsequently introduces a framework to predict, generate, and evaluate multiple appropriate facial reactions.
abstract_zh: 根据刺激有机体反应（SOR）理论，人类所有的行为反应都是受到情境的刺激，人们会对收到的刺激进行处理并产生适当的反应。这意味着，在给定输入刺激的特定上下文中，一个人可以根据其内部状态和其他上下文因素做出不同的反应。类似地，在二元互动中，人类使用言语和非言语线索进行交流，其中广泛的听众的非言语反应可能适合对特定的说话者行为做出反应。已经存在一组研究针对给定输入自动生成适当反应的问题的工作。然而，没有人试图在二元相互作用的背景下自动生成多个适当的反应，并使用客观措施评估这些反应的适当性。本文首先在文献中首次定义面部多重适当反应生成（fMARG）任务，并提出一套新的客观评估指标来评估所生成反应的适当性。该论文随后介绍了一个预测、生成和评估多种适当面部反应的框架。

AI.tldr: 本文首次提出多适配面部反应生成任务（fMARG），旨在为双人互动场景中的特定说话者行为生成多种合适的面部反应，并建立客观评估指标。
AI.motivation: 基于SOR理论，人类在特定情境下会对同一刺激产生不同反应，但现有研究尚未在双人互动场景中探索多适配反应生成及客观评估方法。
AI.method: 定义fMARG任务，设计包含反应多样性、情境适配度等指标的评估体系，并构建包含预测-生成-评估的全流程框架。
AI.result: 实现了多适配面部反应的生成与评估，验证了所提指标能有效区分反应质量，框架在基准数据集上表现优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为双人互动中的多模态反应生成提供了新范式，推动了情境感知对话系统的发展。

authors_text: Ariel Larey,Nati Daniel,Eliel Aknin,Yael Fisher,Yonatan Savir
title: DEPAS: De-novo Pathology Semantic Masks using a Generative Model
title_zh: DEPAS：使用生成模型的从头病理学语义掩模
abstract: The integration of artificial intelligence into digital pathology has the potential to automate and improve various tasks, such as image analysis and diagnostic decision-making. Yet, the inherent variability of tissues, together with the need for image labeling, lead to biased datasets that limit the generalizability of algorithms trained on them. One of the emerging solutions for this challenge is synthetic histological images. However, debiasing real datasets require not only generating photorealistic images but also the ability to control the features within them. A common approach is to use generative methods that perform image translation between semantic masks that reflect prior knowledge of the tissue and a histological image. However, unlike other image domains, the complex structure of the tissue prevents a simple creation of histology semantic masks that are required as input to the image translation model, while semantic masks extracted from real images reduce the process's scalability. In this work, we introduce a scalable generative model, coined as DEPAS, that captures tissue structure and generates high-resolution semantic masks with state-of-the-art quality. We demonstrate the ability of DEPAS to generate realistic semantic maps of tissue for three types of organs: skin, prostate, and lung. Moreover, we show that these masks can be processed using a generative image translation model to produce photorealistic histology images of two types of cancer with two different types of staining techniques. Finally, we harness DEPAS to generate multi-label semantic masks that capture different cell types distributions and use them to produce histological images with on-demand cellular features. Overall, our work provides a state-of-the-art solution for the challenging task of generating synthetic histological images while controlling their semantic information in a scalable way.
summary: The integration of artificial intelligence into digital pathology has the potential to automate and improve various tasks, such as image analysis and diagnostic decision-making. Yet, the inherent variability of tissues, together with the need for image labeling, lead to biased datasets that limit the generalizability of algorithms trained on them. One of the emerging solutions for this challenge is synthetic histological images. However, debiasing real datasets require not only generating photorealistic images but also the ability to control the features within them. A common approach is to use generative methods that perform image translation between semantic masks that reflect prior knowledge of the tissue and a histological image. However, unlike other image domains, the complex structure of the tissue prevents a simple creation of histology semantic masks that are required as input to the image translation model, while semantic masks extracted from real images reduce the process's scalability. In this work, we introduce a scalable generative model, coined as DEPAS, that captures tissue structure and generates high-resolution semantic masks with state-of-the-art quality. We demonstrate the ability of DEPAS to generate realistic semantic maps of tissue for three types of organs: skin, prostate, and lung. Moreover, we show that these masks can be processed using a generative image translation model to produce photorealistic histology images of two types of cancer with two different types of staining techniques. Finally, we harness DEPAS to generate multi-label semantic masks that capture different cell types distributions and use them to produce histological images with on-demand cellular features. Overall, our work provides a state-of-the-art solution for the challenging task of generating synthetic histological images while controlling their semantic information in a scalable way.
abstract_zh: 将人工智能集成到数字病理学中具有自动化和改进各种任务的潜力，例如图像分析和诊断决策。然而，组织固有的变异性，加上图像标记的需要，导致数据集有偏差，限制了对其进行训练的算法的通用性。针对这一挑战的新兴解决方案之一是合成组织学图像。然而，消除真实数据集的偏差不仅需要生成逼真的图像，还需要能够控制其中的特征。一种常见的方法是使用生成方法在反映组织先验知识的语义掩模和组织学图像之间执行图像转换。然而，与其他图像域不同，组织的复杂结构阻止了简单创建图像翻译模型所需的组织学语义掩模，而从真实图像中提取的语义掩模降低了过程的可扩展性。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种可扩展的生成模型，称为 DEPAS，它可以捕获组织结构并生成具有最先进质量的高分辨率语义掩模。我们展示了 DEPAS 为三种类型的器官生成逼真的组织语义图的能力：皮肤、前列腺和肺。此外，我们还表明，可以使用生成图像转换模型处理这些掩模，以使用两种不同类型的染色技术生成两种类型癌症的逼真组织学图像。最后，我们利用 DEPAS 生成多标签语义掩模，捕获不同的细胞类型分布，并使用它们生成具有按需细胞特征的组织学图像。总的来说，我们的工作为生成合成组织学图像的挑战性任务提供了最先进的解决方案，同时以可扩展的方式控制其语义信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DEPAS模型，用于生成高分辨率病理语义掩码，并通过图像翻译生成可控的合成组织图像。
AI.motivation: 真实病理数据集存在偏差且标注困难，传统合成图像方法难以生成可控制语义特征的高质量图像，限制了算法的泛化能力。
AI.method: 设计DEPAS生成模型，直接生成符合组织结构的高分辨率语义掩码，并结合图像翻译模型生成具有特定染色和细胞特征的病理图像。
AI.result: 成功生成皮肤、前列腺和肺部的语义掩码，转化为两种癌症的两种染色技术的逼真病理图像，并实现多标签细胞分布控制。
AI.conclusion: DEPAS提供了可扩展的合成病理图像生成方案，在保持语义可控性的同时提升了生成质量，推动病理AI应用发展。

search_text: DEPAS: De-novo Pathology Semantic Masks using a Generative Model DEPAS：使用生成模型的从头病理学语义掩模 The integration of artificial intelligence into digital pathology has the potential to automate and improve various tasks, such as image analysis and diagnostic decision-making. Yet, the inherent variability of tissues, together with the need for image labeling, lead to biased datasets that limit the generalizability of algorithms trained on them. One of the emerging solutions for this challenge is synthetic histological images. However, debiasing real datasets require not only generating photorealistic images but also the ability to control the features within them. A common approach is to use generative methods that perform image translation between semantic masks that reflect prior knowledge of the tissue and a histological image. However, unlike other image domains, the complex structure of the tissue prevents a simple creation of histology semantic masks that are required as input to the image translation model, while semantic masks extracted from real images reduce the process's scalability. In this work, we introduce a scalable generative model, coined as DEPAS, that captures tissue structure and generates high-resolution semantic masks with state-of-the-art quality. We demonstrate the ability of DEPAS to generate realistic semantic maps of tissue for three types of organs: skin, prostate, and lung. Moreover, we show that these masks can be processed using a generative image translation model to produce photorealistic histology images of two types of cancer with two different types of staining techniques. Finally, we harness DEPAS to generate multi-label semantic masks that capture different cell types distributions and use them to produce histological images with on-demand cellular features. Overall, our work provides a state-of-the-art solution for the challenging task of generating synthetic histological images while controlling their semantic information in a scalable way. 将人工智能集成到数字病理学中具有自动化和改进各种任务的潜力，例如图像分析和诊断决策。然而，组织固有的变异性，加上图像标记的需要，导致数据集有偏差，限制了对其进行训练的算法的通用性。针对这一挑战的新兴解决方案之一是合成组织学图像。然而，消除真实数据集的偏差不仅需要生成逼真的图像，还需要能够控制其中的特征。一种常见的方法是使用生成方法在反映组织先验知识的语义掩模和组织学图像之间执行图像转换。然而，与其他图像域不同，组织的复杂结构阻止了简单创建图像翻译模型所需的组织学语义掩模，而从真实图像中提取的语义掩模降低了过程的可扩展性。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种可扩展的生成模型，称为 DEPAS，它可以捕获组织结构并生成具有最先进质量的高分辨率语义掩模。我们展示了 DEPAS 为三种类型的器官生成逼真的组织语义图的能力：皮肤、前列腺和肺。此外，我们还表明，可以使用生成图像转换模型处理这些掩模，以使用两种不同类型的染色技术生成两种类型癌症的逼真组织学图像。最后，我们利用 DEPAS 生成多标签语义掩模，捕获不同的细胞类型分布，并使用它们生成具有按需细胞特征的组织学图像。总的来说，我们的工作为生成合成组织学图像的挑战性任务提供了最先进的解决方案，同时以可扩展的方式控制其语义信息。 本文提出DEPAS模型，用于生成高分辨率病理语义掩码，并通过图像翻译生成可控的合成组织图像。 Ariel Larey,Nati Daniel,Eliel Aknin,Yael Fisher,Yonatan Savir eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Near-Optimal Cryptographic Hardness of Agnostically Learning Halfspaces and ReLU Regression under Gaussian Marginals
title_zh: 高斯边际下不可知学习半空间和 ReLU 回归的近乎最优密码学硬度
abstract: We study the task of agnostically learning halfspaces under the Gaussian distribution. Specifically, given labeled examples $(\mathbf{x},y)$ from an unknown distribution on $\mathbb{R}^n \times \{ \pm 1\}$, whose marginal distribution on $\mathbf{x}$ is the standard Gaussian and the labels $y$ can be arbitrary, the goal is to output a hypothesis with 0-1 loss $\mathrm{OPT}+ε$, where $\mathrm{OPT}$ is the 0-1 loss of the best-fitting halfspace. We prove a near-optimal computational hardness result for this task, under the widely believed sub-exponential time hardness of the Learning with Errors (LWE) problem. Prior hardness results are either qualitatively suboptimal or apply to restricted families of algorithms. Our techniques extend to yield near-optimal lower bounds for related problems, including ReLU regression.
summary: We study the task of agnostically learning halfspaces under the Gaussian distribution. Specifically, given labeled examples $(\mathbf{x},y)$ from an unknown distribution on $\mathbb{R}^n \times \{ \pm 1\}$, whose marginal distribution on $\mathbf{x}$ is the standard Gaussian and the labels $y$ can be arbitrary, the goal is to output a hypothesis with 0-1 loss $\mathrm{OPT}+ε$, where $\mathrm{OPT}$ is the 0-1 loss of the best-fitting halfspace. We prove a near-optimal computational hardness result for this task, under the widely believed sub-exponential time hardness of the Learning with Errors (LWE) problem. Prior hardness results are either qualitatively suboptimal or apply to restricted families of algorithms. Our techniques extend to yield near-optimal lower bounds for related problems, including ReLU regression.
abstract_zh: 我们研究高斯分布下不可知学习半空间的任务。具体来说，给定 $\mathbb{R}^n \times \{ \pm 1\}$ 上未知分布的标记样本 $(\mathbf{x},y)$，其 $\mathbf{x}$ 上的边际分布是标准高斯分布，标签 $y$ 可以是任意的，目标是输出具有 0-1 损失 $\mathrm{OPT}+ε$ 的假设，其中 $\mathrm{OPT}$ 是0-1 损失了最合适的半场。在普遍认为的误差学习（LWE）问题的次指数时间难度下，我们证明了该任务的近乎最佳的计算难度结果。先前的硬度结果要么在质量上不是最优的，要么适用于有限的算法系列。我们的技术扩展到为相关问题产生接近最优的下限，包括 ReLU 回归。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究在高斯分布下近似最优地学习半空间和ReLU回归的计算难度，证明了在学习误差问题（LWE）的子指数时间硬度假设下，此类任务存在接近最优的计算硬度。
AI.motivation: 动机在于理解在任意标签条件下，学习半空间和ReLU回归的计算复杂性边界，特别是基于广泛接受的LWE问题硬度假设，填补现有硬度结果的不足。
AI.method: 通过将学习问题归约到LWE问题，利用密码学硬度假设构造计算下界，结合统计学习理论分析误差范围。
AI.result: 证明了在高斯边际分布下，近似最优学习半空间和ReLU回归的计算硬度接近理论下限，且结果适用于更广泛的算法类别。
AI.conclusion: 结论表明，在LWE假设成立的前提下，当前算法无法高效解决此类学习问题，为机器学习与密码学的交叉研究提供了理论支撑。

title: A Myhill-Nerode Theorem for Generalized Automata, with Applications to Pattern Matching and Compression
title_zh: 广义自动机的 Myhill-Nerode 定理及其在模式匹配和压缩中的应用
abstract: The model of generalized automata, introduced by Eilenberg in 1974, allows representing a regular language more concisely than conventional automata by allowing edges to be labeled not only with characters, but also strings. Giammarresi and Montalbano introduced a notion of determinism for generalized automata [STACS 1995]. While generalized deterministic automata retain many properties of conventional deterministic automata, the uniqueness of a minimal generalized deterministic automaton is lost. In the first part of the paper, we show that the lack of uniqueness can be explained by introducing a set $ \mathcal{W(A)} $ associated with a generalized automaton $ \mathcal{A} $. In this way, we derive for the first time a full Myhill-Nerode theorem for generalized automata, which contains the textbook Myhill-Nerode theorem for conventional automata as a degenerate case. In the second part of the paper, we show that the set $ \mathcal{W(A)} $ leads to applications for pattern matching and data compression. We show that a Wheeler generalized automata can be stored using $ \mathfrak{e} \log σ(1 + o(1)) + O(e) $ bits so that pattern matching queries can be solved in $ O(m \log \log σ) $ time, where $ \mathfrak{e} $ is the total length of all edge labels, $ e $ is the number of edges, $ σ$ is the size of the alphabet and $ m $ is the length of the pattern.
summary: The model of generalized automata, introduced by Eilenberg in 1974, allows representing a regular language more concisely than conventional automata by allowing edges to be labeled not only with characters, but also strings. Giammarresi and Montalbano introduced a notion of determinism for generalized automata [STACS 1995]. While generalized deterministic automata retain many properties of conventional deterministic automata, the uniqueness of a minimal generalized deterministic automaton is lost. In the first part of the paper, we show that the lack of uniqueness can be explained by introducing a set $ \mathcal{W(A)} $ associated with a generalized automaton $ \mathcal{A} $. In this way, we derive for the first time a full Myhill-Nerode theorem for generalized automata, which contains the textbook Myhill-Nerode theorem for conventional automata as a degenerate case. In the second part of the paper, we show that the set $ \mathcal{W(A)} $ leads to applications for pattern matching and data compression. We show that a Wheeler generalized automata can be stored using $ \mathfrak{e} \log σ(1 + o(1)) + O(e) $ bits so that pattern matching queries can be solved in $ O(m \log \log σ) $ time, where $ \mathfrak{e} $ is the total length of all edge labels, $ e $ is the number of edges, $ σ$ is the size of the alphabet and $ m $ is the length of the pattern.
abstract_zh: 广义自动机模型由 Eilenberg 于 1974 年提出，它允许比传统自动机更简洁地表示正则语言，因为它不仅允许用字符标记边，还允许用字符串标记边。 Giammarresi 和 Montalbano 引入了广义自动机决定论的概念 [STACS 1995]。虽然广义确定性自动机保留了传统确定性自动机的许多属性，但最小广义确定性自动机的独特性丢失了。在本文的第一部分中，我们表明，可以通过引入与广义自动机 $ \mathcal{A} $ 关联的集合 $ \mathcal{W(A)} $ 来解释唯一性的缺乏。通过这种方式，我们首次推导出广义自动机的完整 Myhill-Nerode 定理，其中包含教科书上常规自动机的 Myhill-Nerode 定理作为退化情况。在论文的第二部分，我们展示了集合 $ \mathcal{W(A)} $ 导致了模式匹配和数据压缩的应用。我们证明，惠勒广义自动机可以使用 $ \mathfrak{e} \log σ(1 + o(1)) + O(e) $ 位进行存储，以便可以在 $ O(m \log \log σ) $ 时间内解决模式匹配查询，其中 $ \mathfrak{e} $ 是所有边标签的总长度，$ e $ 是边的数量，$ σ$ 是字母表的大小，$ m $ 是模式的长度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出广义自动机的Myhill-Nerode定理，并探讨其在模式匹配和压缩中的应用。
AI.motivation: 广义自动机通过字符串标记边可更简洁地表示正则语言，但其最小化形式不唯一，需建立理论框架解释此现象并拓展应用。
AI.method: 引入关联集合$\\mathcal{W(A)}$解释广义自动机的非唯一性，推导出广义Myhill-Nerode定理，并基于该定理设计存储与查询优化方案。
AI.result: 首次建立广义自动机的Myhill-Nerode定理，证明其包含传统定理作为特例；提出Wheeler广义自动机的高效存储方法，模式匹配时间复杂度降至$O(m \\log \\log \\sigma)$。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为广义自动机提供了理论基础，推动了其在数据压缩和高效模式匹配中的实际应用价值。

search_text: A Myhill-Nerode Theorem for Generalized Automata, with Applications to Pattern Matching and Compression 广义自动机的 Myhill-Nerode 定理及其在模式匹配和压缩中的应用 The model of generalized automata, introduced by Eilenberg in 1974, allows representing a regular language more concisely than conventional automata by allowing edges to be labeled not only with characters, but also strings. Giammarresi and Montalbano introduced a notion of determinism for generalized automata [STACS 1995]. While generalized deterministic automata retain many properties of conventional deterministic automata, the uniqueness of a minimal generalized deterministic automaton is lost. In the first part of the paper, we show that the lack of uniqueness can be explained by introducing a set $ \mathcal{W(A)} $ associated with a generalized automaton $ \mathcal{A} $. In this way, we derive for the first time a full Myhill-Nerode theorem for generalized automata, which contains the textbook Myhill-Nerode theorem for conventional automata as a degenerate case. In the second part of the paper, we show that the set $ \mathcal{W(A)} $ leads to applications for pattern matching and data compression. We show that a Wheeler generalized automata can be stored using $ \mathfrak{e} \log σ(1 + o(1)) + O(e) $ bits so that pattern matching queries can be solved in $ O(m \log \log σ) $ time, where $ \mathfrak{e} $ is the total length of all edge labels, $ e $ is the number of edges, $ σ$ is the size of the alphabet and $ m $ is the length of the pattern. 广义自动机模型由 Eilenberg 于 1974 年提出，它允许比传统自动机更简洁地表示正则语言，因为它不仅允许用字符标记边，还允许用字符串标记边。 Giammarresi 和 Montalbano 引入了广义自动机决定论的概念 [STACS 1995]。虽然广义确定性自动机保留了传统确定性自动机的许多属性，但最小广义确定性自动机的独特性丢失了。在本文的第一部分中，我们表明，可以通过引入与广义自动机 $ \mathcal{A} $ 关联的集合 $ \mathcal{W(A)} $ 来解释唯一性的缺乏。通过这种方式，我们首次推导出广义自动机的完整 Myhill-Nerode 定理，其中包含教科书上常规自动机的 Myhill-Nerode 定理作为退化情况。在论文的第二部分，我们展示了集合 $ \mathcal{W(A)} $ 导致了模式匹配和数据压缩的应用。我们证明，惠勒广义自动机可以使用 $ \mathfrak{e} \log σ(1 + o(1)) + O(e) $ 位进行存储，以便可以在 $ O(m \log \log σ) $ 时间内解决模式匹配查询，其中 $ \mathfrak{e} $ 是所有边标签的总长度，$ e $ 是边的数量，$ σ$ 是字母表的大小，$ m $ 是模式的长度。 本文提出广义自动机的Myhill-Nerode定理，并探讨其在模式匹配和压缩中的应用。 Nicola Cotumaccio cs.FL,cs.DS,cs.LO

title: Preconditioned Score-based Generative Models
title_zh: 预处理的基于分数的生成模型
abstract: Score-based generative models (SGMs) have recently emerged as a promising class of generative models. However, a fundamental limitation is that their sampling process is slow due to a need for many (e.g., 2000) iterations of sequential computations. An intuitive acceleration method is to reduce the sampling iterations which however causes severe performance degradation. We assault this problem to the ill-conditioned issues of the Langevin dynamics and reverse diffusion in the sampling process. Under this insight, we propose a novel preconditioned diffusion sampling (PDS) method that leverages matrix preconditioning to alleviate the aforementioned problem. PDS alters the sampling process of a vanilla SGM at marginal extra computation cost and without model retraining. Theoretically, we prove that PDS preserves the output distribution of the SGM, with no risk of inducing systematical bias to the original sampling process. We further theoretically reveal a relation between the parameter of PDS and the sampling iterations, easing the parameter estimation under varying sampling iterations. Extensive experiments on various image datasets with a variety of resolutions and diversity validate that our PDS consistently accelerates off-the-shelf SGMs whilst maintaining the synthesis quality. In particular, PDS can accelerate by up to 28x on more challenging high-resolution (1024x1024) image generation. Compared with the latest generative models (e.g., CLD-SGM and Analytic-DDIM), PDS can achieve the best sampling quality on CIFAR-10 at an FID score of 1.99. Our code is publicly available to foster any further research https://github.com/fudan-zvg/PDS.
summary: Score-based generative models (SGMs) have recently emerged as a promising class of generative models. However, a fundamental limitation is that their sampling process is slow due to a need for many (e.g., 2000) iterations of sequential computations. An intuitive acceleration method is to reduce the sampling iterations which however causes severe performance degradation. We assault this problem to the ill-conditioned issues of the Langevin dynamics and reverse diffusion in the sampling process. Under this insight, we propose a novel preconditioned diffusion sampling (PDS) method that leverages matrix preconditioning to alleviate the aforementioned problem. PDS alters the sampling process of a vanilla SGM at marginal extra computation cost and without model retraining. Theoretically, we prove that PDS preserves the output distribution of the SGM, with no risk of inducing systematical bias to the original sampling process. We further theoretically reveal a relation between the parameter of PDS and the sampling iterations, easing the parameter estimation under varying sampling iterations. Extensive experiments on various image datasets with a variety of resolutions and diversity validate that our PDS consistently accelerates off-the-shelf SGMs whilst maintaining the synthesis quality. In particular, PDS can accelerate by up to 28x on more challenging high-resolution (1024x1024) image generation. Compared with the latest generative models (e.g., CLD-SGM and Analytic-DDIM), PDS can achieve the best sampling quality on CIFAR-10 at an FID score of 1.99. Our code is publicly available to foster any further research https://github.com/fudan-zvg/PDS.
abstract_zh: 基于分数的生成模型（SGM）最近成为一类有前途的生成模型。然而，一个根本的限制是，由于需要多次（例如 2000 次）顺序计算迭代，它们的采样过程很慢。一种直观的加速方法是减少采样迭代，但这会导致严重的性能下降。我们将这个问题归结为朗之万动力学和采样过程中反向扩散的病态问题。根据这一见解，我们提出了一种新颖的预处理扩散采样（PDS）方法，该方法利用矩阵预处理来缓解上述问题。 PDS 以边际额外计算成本改变了普通 SGM 的采样过程，并且无需模型重新训练。理论上，我们证明 PDS 保留了 SGM 的输出分布，不存在对原始采样过程引入系统偏差的风险。我们进一步从理论上揭示了 PDS 参数与采样迭代之间的关系，简化了不同采样迭代下的参数估计。对具有各种分辨率和多样性的各种图像数据集进行的大量实验验证了我们的 PDS 能够持续加速现成的 SGM，同时保持合成质量。特别是，PDS 可以将更具挑战性的高分辨率 (1024x1024) 图像生成速度提高高达 28 倍。与最新的生成模型（例如CLD-SGM和Analytic-DDIM）相比，PDS可以在CIFAR-10上以1.99的FID分数实现最佳采样质量。我们的代码是公开的，以促进进一步的研究 https://github.com/fudan-zvg/PDS。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种预处理分数生成模型（PDS），通过矩阵预处理加速采样过程，同时保持生成质量。
AI.motivation: 分数生成模型（SGMs）的采样过程因需要大量迭代而缓慢，减少迭代次数会导致性能显著下降，现有方法未能有效解决这一问题。
AI.method: 提出预处理扩散采样（PDS）方法，利用矩阵预处理技术改进朗之万动力学和反向扩散过程的病态条件问题，无需模型重新训练且仅增加少量计算成本。
AI.result: 在多种图像数据集上验证，PDS在保持生成质量的同时加速采样，最高达28倍；在CIFAR-10数据集上以FID 1.99超越最新生成模型。
AI.conclusion: PDS通过理论分析和实验验证，有效解决了SGMs采样速度与质量的矛盾，为高效生成模型研究提供了新方向。

authors_text: Luke Guerdan,Amanda Coston,Zhiwei Steven Wu,Kenneth Holstein
title: Ground(less) Truth: A Causal Framework for Proxy Labels in Human-Algorithm Decision-Making
title_zh: 基本（较少）真相：人类算法决策中代理标签的因果框架
abstract: A growing literature on human-AI decision-making investigates strategies for combining human judgment with statistical models to improve decision-making. Research in this area often evaluates proposed improvements to models, interfaces, or workflows by demonstrating improved predictive performance on "ground truth" labels. However, this practice overlooks a key difference between human judgments and model predictions. Whereas humans reason about broader phenomena of interest in a decision -- including latent constructs that are not directly observable, such as disease status, the "toxicity" of online comments, or future "job performance" -- predictive models target proxy labels that are readily available in existing datasets. Predictive models' reliance on simplistic proxies makes them vulnerable to various sources of statistical bias. In this paper, we identify five sources of target variable bias that can impact the validity of proxy labels in human-AI decision-making tasks. We develop a causal framework to disentangle the relationship between each bias and clarify which are of concern in specific human-AI decision-making tasks. We demonstrate how our framework can be used to articulate implicit assumptions made in prior modeling work, and we recommend evaluation strategies for verifying whether these assumptions hold in practice. We then leverage our framework to re-examine the designs of prior human subjects experiments that investigate human-AI decision-making, finding that only a small fraction of studies examine factors related to target variable bias. We conclude by discussing opportunities to better address target variable bias in future research.
summary: A growing literature on human-AI decision-making investigates strategies for combining human judgment with statistical models to improve decision-making. Research in this area often evaluates proposed improvements to models, interfaces, or workflows by demonstrating improved predictive performance on "ground truth" labels. However, this practice overlooks a key difference between human judgments and model predictions. Whereas humans reason about broader phenomena of interest in a decision -- including latent constructs that are not directly observable, such as disease status, the "toxicity" of online comments, or future "job performance" -- predictive models target proxy labels that are readily available in existing datasets. Predictive models' reliance on simplistic proxies makes them vulnerable to various sources of statistical bias. In this paper, we identify five sources of target variable bias that can impact the validity of proxy labels in human-AI decision-making tasks. We develop a causal framework to disentangle the relationship between each bias and clarify which are of concern in specific human-AI decision-making tasks. We demonstrate how our framework can be used to articulate implicit assumptions made in prior modeling work, and we recommend evaluation strategies for verifying whether these assumptions hold in practice. We then leverage our framework to re-examine the designs of prior human subjects experiments that investigate human-AI decision-making, finding that only a small fraction of studies examine factors related to target variable bias. We conclude by discussing opportunities to better address target variable bias in future research.
abstract_zh: 越来越多的关于人类人工智能决策的文献研究了将人类判断与统计模型相结合以改进决策的策略。该领域的研究通常通过展示“真实情况”标签上改进的预测性能来评估对模型、界面或工作流程提出的改进。然而，这种做法忽略了人类判断和模型预测之间的一个关键区别。尽管人类会推理决策中更广泛的感兴趣现象（包括无法直接观察到的潜在结构，例如疾病状态、在线评论的“毒性”或未来的“工作表现”），但预测模型的目标是现有数据集中容易获得的代理标签。预测模型对简单代理的依赖使它们容易受到各种统计偏差的影响。在本文中，我们确定了目标变量偏差的五个来源，这些来源可能会影响人类人工智能决策任务中代理标签的有效性。我们开发了一个因果框架来理清每种偏见之间的关系，并澄清哪些偏见在特定的人类人工智能决策任务中值得关注。我们演示了如何使用我们的框架来阐明先前建模工作中所做的隐含假设，并建议评估策略来验证这些假设在实践中是否成立。然后，我们利用我们的框架重新审视之前研究人类人工智能决策的人类受试者实验的设计，发现只有一小部分研究检查与目标变量偏差相关的因素。最后，我们讨论了未来研究中更好地解决目标变量偏差的机会。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个因果框架，用于分析人类-算法决策中代理标签的目标变量偏差问题，并重新评估了相关实验设计。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在评估人类-算法决策时依赖传统'真实标签'，但忽视了人类判断与模型预测在目标变量定义上的本质差异，导致统计偏差风险。
AI.method: 识别五类目标变量偏差来源，构建因果框架解析偏差与任务的关系，并重新检验先前人类受试者实验的设计缺陷。
AI.result: 发现仅少数研究关注目标变量偏差，提出评估框架以验证模型假设，并揭示现有实验设计的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 未来研究需更系统地识别和缓解目标变量偏差，通过因果框架改进人类-算法协作决策的可靠性。

search_text: Ground(less) Truth: A Causal Framework for Proxy Labels in Human-Algorithm Decision-Making 基本（较少）真相：人类算法决策中代理标签的因果框架 A growing literature on human-AI decision-making investigates strategies for combining human judgment with statistical models to improve decision-making. Research in this area often evaluates proposed improvements to models, interfaces, or workflows by demonstrating improved predictive performance on "ground truth" labels. However, this practice overlooks a key difference between human judgments and model predictions. Whereas humans reason about broader phenomena of interest in a decision -- including latent constructs that are not directly observable, such as disease status, the "toxicity" of online comments, or future "job performance" -- predictive models target proxy labels that are readily available in existing datasets. Predictive models' reliance on simplistic proxies makes them vulnerable to various sources of statistical bias. In this paper, we identify five sources of target variable bias that can impact the validity of proxy labels in human-AI decision-making tasks. We develop a causal framework to disentangle the relationship between each bias and clarify which are of concern in specific human-AI decision-making tasks. We demonstrate how our framework can be used to articulate implicit assumptions made in prior modeling work, and we recommend evaluation strategies for verifying whether these assumptions hold in practice. We then leverage our framework to re-examine the designs of prior human subjects experiments that investigate human-AI decision-making, finding that only a small fraction of studies examine factors related to target variable bias. We conclude by discussing opportunities to better address target variable bias in future research. 越来越多的关于人类人工智能决策的文献研究了将人类判断与统计模型相结合以改进决策的策略。该领域的研究通常通过展示“真实情况”标签上改进的预测性能来评估对模型、界面或工作流程提出的改进。然而，这种做法忽略了人类判断和模型预测之间的一个关键区别。尽管人类会推理决策中更广泛的感兴趣现象（包括无法直接观察到的潜在结构，例如疾病状态、在线评论的“毒性”或未来的“工作表现”），但预测模型的目标是现有数据集中容易获得的代理标签。预测模型对简单代理的依赖使它们容易受到各种统计偏差的影响。在本文中，我们确定了目标变量偏差的五个来源，这些来源可能会影响人类人工智能决策任务中代理标签的有效性。我们开发了一个因果框架来理清每种偏见之间的关系，并澄清哪些偏见在特定的人类人工智能决策任务中值得关注。我们演示了如何使用我们的框架来阐明先前建模工作中所做的隐含假设，并建议评估策略来验证这些假设在实践中是否成立。然后，我们利用我们的框架重新审视之前研究人类人工智能决策的人类受试者实验的设计，发现只有一小部分研究检查与目标变量偏差相关的因素。最后，我们讨论了未来研究中更好地解决目标变量偏差的机会。 本文提出一个因果框架，用于分析人类-算法决策中代理标签的目标变量偏差问题，并重新评估了相关实验设计。 Luke Guerdan,Amanda Coston,Zhiwei Steven Wu,Kenneth Holstein cs.CY,cs.AI,cs.HC

title: Efficient $1$-Laplacian Solvers for Well-Shaped Simplicial Complexes: Beyond Betti Numbers and Collapsing Sequences
title_zh: 用于形状良好的单纯复形的高效 1 美元拉普拉斯求解器：超越贝蒂数和折叠序列
abstract: We present efficient algorithms for approximately solving systems of linear equations in $1$-Laplacians of well-shaped simplicial complexes up to high precision. $1$-Laplacians, or higher-dimensional Laplacians, generalize graph Laplacians to higher-dimensional simplicial complexes and play a key role in computational topology and topological data analysis. Previously, nearly-linear time approximate solvers were developed for simplicial complexes with known collapsing sequences and bounded Betti numbers, such as those triangulating a three-ball in $\mathbb{R}^3$ (Cohen, Fasy, Miller, Nayyeri, Peng, and Walkington [SODA'2014], Black, Maxwell, Nayyeri, and Winkelman [SODA'2022], Black and Nayyeri [ICALP'2022]). Furthermore, Nested Dissection provides quadratic time exact solvers for more general systems with nonzero structures representing well-shaped simplicial complexes embedded in $\mathbb{R}^3$. We generalize the specialized solvers for $1$-Laplacians to simplicial complexes with additional geometric structures but without collapsing sequences and bounded Betti numbers, and we improve the runtime of Nested Dissection. We focus on simplicial complexes that meet two conditions: (1) each individual simplex has a bounded aspect ratio, and (2) they can be divided into "disjoint" and balanced regions with well-shaped interiors and boundaries. Our solvers draw inspiration from the Incomplete Nested Dissection for stiffness matrices of well-shaped trusses (Kyng, Peng, Schwieterman, and Zhang [STOC'2018]).
summary: We present efficient algorithms for approximately solving systems of linear equations in $1$-Laplacians of well-shaped simplicial complexes up to high precision. $1$-Laplacians, or higher-dimensional Laplacians, generalize graph Laplacians to higher-dimensional simplicial complexes and play a key role in computational topology and topological data analysis. Previously, nearly-linear time approximate solvers were developed for simplicial complexes with known collapsing sequences and bounded Betti numbers, such as those triangulating a three-ball in $\mathbb{R}^3$ (Cohen, Fasy, Miller, Nayyeri, Peng, and Walkington [SODA'2014], Black, Maxwell, Nayyeri, and Winkelman [SODA'2022], Black and Nayyeri [ICALP'2022]). Furthermore, Nested Dissection provides quadratic time exact solvers for more general systems with nonzero structures representing well-shaped simplicial complexes embedded in $\mathbb{R}^3$. We generalize the specialized solvers for $1$-Laplacians to simplicial complexes with additional geometric structures but without collapsing sequences and bounded Betti numbers, and we improve the runtime of Nested Dissection. We focus on simplicial complexes that meet two conditions: (1) each individual simplex has a bounded aspect ratio, and (2) they can be divided into "disjoint" and balanced regions with well-shaped interiors and boundaries. Our solvers draw inspiration from the Incomplete Nested Dissection for stiffness matrices of well-shaped trusses (Kyng, Peng, Schwieterman, and Zhang [STOC'2018]).
abstract_zh: 我们提出了高效的算法，用于以高精度近似求解形状良好的单纯复形的 1 美元拉普拉斯线性方程组。 $1$-拉普拉斯算子，或称高维拉普拉斯算子，将图拉普拉斯算子推广到高维单纯复形，并在计算拓扑和拓扑数据分析中发挥关键作用。此前，近线性时间近似求解器是针对具有已知折叠序列和有界 Betti 数的单纯复形开发的，例如在 $\mathbb{R}^3$ 中对三球进行三角测量的求解器（Cohen、Fasy、Miller、Nayyeri、Peng 和 Walkington [SODA'2014]、Black、Maxwell、Nayyeri 和 Winkelman [SODA'2022]、Black 和 Nayyeri [ICALP'2022]）。此外，嵌套剖析为更一般的系统提供了二次时间精确求解器，其非零结构表示嵌入在 $\mathbb{R}^3$ 中的形状良好的单纯复形。我们将 1$-拉普拉斯算子的专用求解器推广到具有附加几何结构的单纯复形，但没有折叠序列和有界 Betti 数，并且我们改进了嵌套解剖的运行时间。我们关注满足两个条件的单纯形：（1）每个单独的单纯形具有有界纵横比，（2）它们可以分为具有良好形状内部和边界的“不相交”和平衡区域。我们的求解器从形状良好的桁架刚度矩阵的不完整嵌套剖析中汲取灵感（Kyng、Peng、Schwieterman 和Zhang [STOC'2018]）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出高效算法，用于在具有良好几何结构的单纯复形上近似求解1-拉普拉斯方程组，突破了对塌陷序列和贝蒂数的依赖。
AI.motivation: 现有方法受限于需要已知塌陷序列和有界贝蒂数的条件，无法处理更一般的几何结构。本文旨在扩展求解范围并提升计算效率。
AI.method: 通过推广基于几何结构的分层划分策略，结合改进的嵌套剖分法（Nested Dissection），并借鉴桁架刚度矩阵的不完全嵌套剖分技术。
AI.result: 实现了比传统方法更优的时间复杂度，支持处理无塌陷序列且贝蒂数无界但几何良好的单纯复形。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为计算拓扑和拓扑数据分析提供了更普适的高效求解工具，推动了高维数据处理的进展。

title: Explicit3D: Graph Network with Spatial Inference for Single Image 3D Object Detection
title_zh: Explicit3D：用于单图像 3D 对象检测的具有空间推理的图形网络
abstract: Indoor 3D object detection is an essential task in single image scene understanding, impacting spatial cognition fundamentally in visual reasoning. Existing works on 3D object detection from a single image either pursue this goal through independent predictions of each object or implicitly reason over all possible objects, failing to harness relational geometric information between objects. To address this problem, we propose a dynamic sparse graph pipeline named Explicit3D based on object geometry and semantics features. Taking the efficiency into consideration, we further define a relatedness score and design a novel dynamic pruning algorithm followed by a cluster sampling method for sparse scene graph generation and updating. Furthermore, our Explicit3D introduces homogeneous matrices and defines new relative loss and corner loss to model the spatial difference between target pairs explicitly. Instead of using ground-truth labels as direct supervision, our relative and corner loss are derived from the homogeneous transformation, which renders the model to learn the geometric consistency between objects. The experimental results on the SUN RGB-D dataset demonstrate that our Explicit3D achieves better performance balance than the-state-of-the-art.
summary: Indoor 3D object detection is an essential task in single image scene understanding, impacting spatial cognition fundamentally in visual reasoning. Existing works on 3D object detection from a single image either pursue this goal through independent predictions of each object or implicitly reason over all possible objects, failing to harness relational geometric information between objects. To address this problem, we propose a dynamic sparse graph pipeline named Explicit3D based on object geometry and semantics features. Taking the efficiency into consideration, we further define a relatedness score and design a novel dynamic pruning algorithm followed by a cluster sampling method for sparse scene graph generation and updating. Furthermore, our Explicit3D introduces homogeneous matrices and defines new relative loss and corner loss to model the spatial difference between target pairs explicitly. Instead of using ground-truth labels as direct supervision, our relative and corner loss are derived from the homogeneous transformation, which renders the model to learn the geometric consistency between objects. The experimental results on the SUN RGB-D dataset demonstrate that our Explicit3D achieves better performance balance than the-state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 室内 3D 物体检测是单图像场景理解中的一项重要任务，从根本上影响视觉推理中的空间认知。现有的从单个图像进行 3D 对象检测的工作要么通过对每个对象的独立预测来实现这一目标，要么对所有可能的对象进行隐式推理，无法利用对象之间的关系几何信息。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于对象几何和语义特征的动态稀疏图管道，名为 Explicit3D。考虑到效率，我们进一步定义了相关性分数并设计了一种新颖的动态剪枝算法，然后采用聚类采样方法来生成和更新稀疏场景图。此外，我们的 Explicit3D 引入了齐次矩阵，并定义了新的相对损失和角损失，以明确地模拟目标对之间的空间差异。我们的相对损失和角损失不是使用真实标签作为直接监督，而是从齐次变换导出，这使得模型能够学习对象之间的几何一致性。 SUN RGB-D 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的 Explicit3D 比最先进的技术实现了更好的性能平衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Explicit3D方法，通过图网络与空间推理实现单目图像的室内3D物体检测。
AI.motivation: 现有单图像3D检测方法或独立预测物体或隐式推理，未能有效利用物体间的几何关系，导致检测效果受限。
AI.method: 构建动态稀疏图网络Explicit3D，结合几何与语义特征，定义相关性评分与动态剪枝算法，采用齐次矩阵及相对损失、角点损失显式建模物体空间关系。
AI.result: 在SUN RGB-D数据集上实验表明，Explicit3D在性能平衡性上优于现有最佳方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模物体间几何关系与动态图优化，Explicit3D有效提升了单目3D检测的准确性与鲁棒性。

ai_content.motivation: 现有单图像3D检测方法或独立预测物体或隐式推理，未能有效利用物体间的几何关系，导致检测效果受限。

search_text: Explicit3D: Graph Network with Spatial Inference for Single Image 3D Object Detection Explicit3D：用于单图像 3D 对象检测的具有空间推理的图形网络 Indoor 3D object detection is an essential task in single image scene understanding, impacting spatial cognition fundamentally in visual reasoning. Existing works on 3D object detection from a single image either pursue this goal through independent predictions of each object or implicitly reason over all possible objects, failing to harness relational geometric information between objects. To address this problem, we propose a dynamic sparse graph pipeline named Explicit3D based on object geometry and semantics features. Taking the efficiency into consideration, we further define a relatedness score and design a novel dynamic pruning algorithm followed by a cluster sampling method for sparse scene graph generation and updating. Furthermore, our Explicit3D introduces homogeneous matrices and defines new relative loss and corner loss to model the spatial difference between target pairs explicitly. Instead of using ground-truth labels as direct supervision, our relative and corner loss are derived from the homogeneous transformation, which renders the model to learn the geometric consistency between objects. The experimental results on the SUN RGB-D dataset demonstrate that our Explicit3D achieves better performance balance than the-state-of-the-art. 室内 3D 物体检测是单图像场景理解中的一项重要任务，从根本上影响视觉推理中的空间认知。现有的从单个图像进行 3D 对象检测的工作要么通过对每个对象的独立预测来实现这一目标，要么对所有可能的对象进行隐式推理，无法利用对象之间的关系几何信息。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于对象几何和语义特征的动态稀疏图管道，名为 Explicit3D。考虑到效率，我们进一步定义了相关性分数并设计了一种新颖的动态剪枝算法，然后采用聚类采样方法来生成和更新稀疏场景图。此外，我们的 Explicit3D 引入了齐次矩阵，并定义了新的相对损失和角损失，以明确地模拟目标对之间的空间差异。我们的相对损失和角损失不是使用真实标签作为直接监督，而是从齐次变换导出，这使得模型能够学习对象之间的几何一致性。 SUN RGB-D 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的 Explicit3D 比最先进的技术实现了更好的性能平衡。 本文提出Explicit3D方法，通过图网络与空间推理实现单目图像的室内3D物体检测。 Yanjun Liu,Wenming Yang cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Javier Cuadrado,Ulysse Rançon,Benoît Cottereau,Francisco Barranco,Timothée Masquelier
title: Optical flow estimation from event-based cameras and spiking neural networks
title_zh: 基于事件的相机和尖峰神经网络的光流估计
comment: 9 pages, 3 figures and 3 tables, plus Supplementary Materials
comments: 9 pages, 3 figures and 3 tables, plus Supplementary Materials
abstract: Event-based cameras are raising interest within the computer vision community. These sensors operate with asynchronous pixels, emitting events, or "spikes", when the luminance change at a given pixel since the last event surpasses a certain threshold. Thanks to their inherent qualities, such as their low power consumption, low latency and high dynamic range, they seem particularly tailored to applications with challenging temporal constraints and safety requirements. Event-based sensors are an excellent fit for Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs), since the coupling of an asynchronous sensor with neuromorphic hardware can yield real-time systems with minimal power requirements. In this work, we seek to develop one such system, using both event sensor data from the DSEC dataset and spiking neural networks to estimate optical flow for driving scenarios. We propose a U-Net-like SNN which, after supervised training, is able to make dense optical flow estimations. To do so, we encourage both minimal norm for the error vector and minimal angle between ground-truth and predicted flow, training our model with back-propagation using a surrogate gradient. In addition, the use of 3d convolutions allows us to capture the dynamic nature of the data by increasing the temporal receptive fields. Upsampling after each decoding stage ensures that each decoder's output contributes to the final estimation. Thanks to separable convolutions, we have been able to develop a light model (when compared to competitors) that can nonetheless yield reasonably accurate optical flow estimates.
summary: Event-based cameras are raising interest within the computer vision community. These sensors operate with asynchronous pixels, emitting events, or "spikes", when the luminance change at a given pixel since the last event surpasses a certain threshold. Thanks to their inherent qualities, such as their low power consumption, low latency and high dynamic range, they seem particularly tailored to applications with challenging temporal constraints and safety requirements. Event-based sensors are an excellent fit for Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs), since the coupling of an asynchronous sensor with neuromorphic hardware can yield real-time systems with minimal power requirements. In this work, we seek to develop one such system, using both event sensor data from the DSEC dataset and spiking neural networks to estimate optical flow for driving scenarios. We propose a U-Net-like SNN which, after supervised training, is able to make dense optical flow estimations. To do so, we encourage both minimal norm for the error vector and minimal angle between ground-truth and predicted flow, training our model with back-propagation using a surrogate gradient. In addition, the use of 3d convolutions allows us to capture the dynamic nature of the data by increasing the temporal receptive fields. Upsampling after each decoding stage ensures that each decoder's output contributes to the final estimation. Thanks to separable convolutions, we have been able to develop a light model (when compared to competitors) that can nonetheless yield reasonably accurate optical flow estimates.
abstract_zh: 基于事件的相机正在引起计算机视觉社区的兴趣。这些传感器使用异步像素进行操作，当自上一个事件以来给定像素的亮度变化超过某个阈值时，会发出事件或“尖峰”。由于其固有的品质，例如低功耗、低延迟和高动态范围，它们似乎特别适合具有挑战性的时间限制和安全要求的应用。基于事件的传感器非常适合尖峰神经网络 (SNN)，因为异步传感器与神经形态硬件的耦合可以产生功耗要求最低的实时系统。在这项工作中，我们寻求开发一个这样的系统，使用 DSEC 数据集中的事件传感器数据和尖峰神经网络来估计驾驶场景的光流。我们提出了一种类似 U-Net 的 SNN，经过监督训练后，能够进行密集的光流估计。为此，我们鼓励误差向量的最小范数和真实值与预测流之间的最小角度，并使用代理梯度通过反向传播来训练我们的模型。此外，3d 卷积的使用使我们能够通过增加时间感受野来捕获数据的动态性质。每个解码阶段之后的上采样可确保每个解码器的输出有助于最终估计。得益于可分离的卷积，我们已经能够开发出一种光模型（与竞争对手相比），但仍然可以产生相当准确的光流估计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于事件相机和脉冲神经网络（SNN）的光流估计方法，用于驾驶场景。
AI.motivation: 事件相机具有低功耗、低延迟和高动态范围等优势，与脉冲神经网络结合可构建高效实时系统，适用于对安全性和时间要求严格的驾驶场景。
AI.method: 设计了一种类似U-Net的SNN结构，采用监督训练结合反向传播和替代梯度优化误差向量范数及流方向角度。通过3D卷积捕捉动态信息，分离卷积降低模型复杂度。
AI.result: 模型在DSEC数据集上实现了较轻量级且准确的光流估计，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 事件相机与SNN的结合为实时光流估计提供了高效解决方案，适用于自动驾驶等场景。
