authors_text: David Gamarnik,Eren C. Kızıldağ,Will Perkins,Changji Xu
title: Geometric Barriers for Stable and Online Algorithms for Discrepancy Minimization
title_zh: 用于差异最小化的稳定和在线算法的几何障碍
abstract: For many computational problems involving randomness, intricate geometric features of the solution space have been used to rigorously rule out powerful classes of algorithms. This is often accomplished through the lens of the multi Overlap Gap Property ($m$-OGP), a rigorous barrier against algorithms exhibiting input stability. In this paper, we focus on the algorithmic tractability of two models: (i) discrepancy minimization, and (ii) the symmetric binary perceptron (\texttt{SBP}), a random constraint satisfaction problem as well as a toy model of a single-layer neural network. Our first focus is on the limits of online algorithms. By establishing and leveraging a novel geometrical barrier, we obtain sharp hardness guarantees against online algorithms for both the \texttt{SBP} and discrepancy minimization. Our results match the best known algorithmic guarantees, up to constant factors. Our second focus is on efficiently finding a constant discrepancy solution, given a random matrix $\mathcal{M}\in\mathbb{R}^{M\times n}$. In a smooth setting, where the entries of $\mathcal{M}$ are i.i.d. standard normal, we establish the presence of $m$-OGP for $n=Θ(M\log M)$. Consequently, we rule out the class of stable algorithms at this value. These results give the first rigorous evidence towards a conjecture of Altschuler and Niles-Weed~\cite[Conjecture~1]{altschuler2021discrepancy}. Our methods use the intricate geometry of the solution space to prove tight hardness results for online algorithms. The barrier we establish is a novel variant of the $m$-OGP. Furthermore, it regards $m$-tuples of solutions with respect to correlated instances, with growing values of $m$, $m=ω(1)$. Importantly, our results rule out online algorithms succeeding even with an exponentially small probability.
summary: For many computational problems involving randomness, intricate geometric features of the solution space have been used to rigorously rule out powerful classes of algorithms. This is often accomplished through the lens of the multi Overlap Gap Property ($m$-OGP), a rigorous barrier against algorithms exhibiting input stability. In this paper, we focus on the algorithmic tractability of two models: (i) discrepancy minimization, and (ii) the symmetric binary perceptron (\texttt{SBP}), a random constraint satisfaction problem as well as a toy model of a single-layer neural network. Our first focus is on the limits of online algorithms. By establishing and leveraging a novel geometrical barrier, we obtain sharp hardness guarantees against online algorithms for both the \texttt{SBP} and discrepancy minimization. Our results match the best known algorithmic guarantees, up to constant factors. Our second focus is on efficiently finding a constant discrepancy solution, given a random matrix $\mathcal{M}\in\mathbb{R}^{M\times n}$. In a smooth setting, where the entries of $\mathcal{M}$ are i.i.d. standard normal, we establish the presence of $m$-OGP for $n=Θ(M\log M)$. Consequently, we rule out the class of stable algorithms at this value. These results give the first rigorous evidence towards a conjecture of Altschuler and Niles-Weed~\cite[Conjecture~1]{altschuler2021discrepancy}. Our methods use the intricate geometry of the solution space to prove tight hardness results for online algorithms. The barrier we establish is a novel variant of the $m$-OGP. Furthermore, it regards $m$-tuples of solutions with respect to correlated instances, with growing values of $m$, $m=ω(1)$. Importantly, our results rule out online algorithms succeeding even with an exponentially small probability.
abstract_zh: 对于许多涉及随机性的计算问题，解空间的复杂几何特征已被用来严格排除强大的算法类别。这通常是通过多重重叠间隙特性（$m$-OGP）来实现的，这是对表现出输入稳定性的算法的严格障碍。在本文中，我们重点关注两个模型的算法易处理性：（i）差异最小化，以及（ii）对称二元感知器（\texttt{SBP}），随机约束满足问题以及单层神经网络的玩具模型。我们首先关注的是在线算法的局限性。通过建立和利用一种新颖的几何障碍，我们针对 \texttt{SBP} 和差异最小化的在线算法获得了尖锐的硬度保证。我们的结果与最知名的算法保证相匹配，直至常数因子。我们的第二个重点是在给定随机矩阵 $\mathcal{M}\in\mathbb{R}^{M\times n}$ 的情况下有效地找到恒定差异解。在平滑的设置中，$\mathcal{M}$ 的条目是独立同分布的。标准正态，我们确定 $n=θ(M\log M)$ 时存在 $m$-OGP。因此，我们排除了该值的稳定算法类别。这些结果为 Altschuler 和 Niles-Weed 的猜想提供了第一个严格的证据~\cite[Conjecture~1]{altschuler2021discrepancy}。我们的方法使用解空间的复杂几何形状来证明在线算法的严格硬度结果。我们建立的屏障是 $m$-OGP 的一个新变体。此外，它考虑了与相关实例有关的 $m$ 解元组，其值不断增长，$m$，$m=ω(1)$。重要的是，我们的结果排除了在线算法成功的可能性，即使概率呈指数级小。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在线算法和稳定算法在差异最小化问题及对称二元感知机模型中的计算限制，通过几何障碍（如m-OGP）证明其硬度。
AI.motivation: 通过几何特性分析算法限制，特别是利用多重重叠间隙属性（m-OGP）排除稳定算法，扩展至在线算法和差异最小化问题，以揭示算法效率的边界。
AI.method: 提出新颖的m-OGP变体，分析解空间几何结构，结合相关实例的m元解分析，证明在线算法的严格硬度。
AI.result: 为SBP和差异最小化问题建立了在线算法的尖锐硬度保证，且结果匹配已知算法上限；在随机矩阵下证明m-OGP存在性，排除稳定算法，支持相关猜想。
AI.conclusion: 首次通过几何方法严格证明在线算法在指数小概率下仍无法成功，为算法复杂性理论提供了新视角和工具。

search_text: Geometric Barriers for Stable and Online Algorithms for Discrepancy Minimization 用于差异最小化的稳定和在线算法的几何障碍 For many computational problems involving randomness, intricate geometric features of the solution space have been used to rigorously rule out powerful classes of algorithms. This is often accomplished through the lens of the multi Overlap Gap Property ($m$-OGP), a rigorous barrier against algorithms exhibiting input stability. In this paper, we focus on the algorithmic tractability of two models: (i) discrepancy minimization, and (ii) the symmetric binary perceptron (\texttt{SBP}), a random constraint satisfaction problem as well as a toy model of a single-layer neural network. Our first focus is on the limits of online algorithms. By establishing and leveraging a novel geometrical barrier, we obtain sharp hardness guarantees against online algorithms for both the \texttt{SBP} and discrepancy minimization. Our results match the best known algorithmic guarantees, up to constant factors. Our second focus is on efficiently finding a constant discrepancy solution, given a random matrix $\mathcal{M}\in\mathbb{R}^{M\times n}$. In a smooth setting, where the entries of $\mathcal{M}$ are i.i.d. standard normal, we establish the presence of $m$-OGP for $n=Θ(M\log M)$. Consequently, we rule out the class of stable algorithms at this value. These results give the first rigorous evidence towards a conjecture of Altschuler and Niles-Weed~\cite[Conjecture~1]{altschuler2021discrepancy}. Our methods use the intricate geometry of the solution space to prove tight hardness results for online algorithms. The barrier we establish is a novel variant of the $m$-OGP. Furthermore, it regards $m$-tuples of solutions with respect to correlated instances, with growing values of $m$, $m=ω(1)$. Importantly, our results rule out online algorithms succeeding even with an exponentially small probability. 对于许多涉及随机性的计算问题，解空间的复杂几何特征已被用来严格排除强大的算法类别。这通常是通过多重重叠间隙特性（$m$-OGP）来实现的，这是对表现出输入稳定性的算法的严格障碍。在本文中，我们重点关注两个模型的算法易处理性：（i）差异最小化，以及（ii）对称二元感知器（\texttt{SBP}），随机约束满足问题以及单层神经网络的玩具模型。我们首先关注的是在线算法的局限性。通过建立和利用一种新颖的几何障碍，我们针对 \texttt{SBP} 和差异最小化的在线算法获得了尖锐的硬度保证。我们的结果与最知名的算法保证相匹配，直至常数因子。我们的第二个重点是在给定随机矩阵 $\mathcal{M}\in\mathbb{R}^{M\times n}$ 的情况下有效地找到恒定差异解。在平滑的设置中，$\mathcal{M}$ 的条目是独立同分布的。标准正态，我们确定 $n=θ(M\log M)$ 时存在 $m$-OGP。因此，我们排除了该值的稳定算法类别。这些结果为 Altschuler 和 Niles-Weed 的猜想提供了第一个严格的证据~\cite[Conjecture~1]{altschuler2021discrepancy}。我们的方法使用解空间的复杂几何形状来证明在线算法的严格硬度结果。我们建立的屏障是 $m$-OGP 的一个新变体。此外，它考虑了与相关实例有关的 $m$ 解元组，其值不断增长，$m$，$m=ω(1)$。重要的是，我们的结果排除了在线算法成功的可能性，即使概率呈指数级小。 本文研究了在线算法和稳定算法在差异最小化问题及对称二元感知机模型中的计算限制，通过几何障碍（如m-OGP）证明其硬度。 David Gamarnik,Eren C. Kızıldağ,Will Perkins,Changji Xu cs.CC,cs.DS,math-ph,math.PR

title: Divide and Save: Splitting Workload Among Containers in an Edge Device to Save Energy and Time
title_zh: 分割并节省：在边缘设备中的容器之间分割工作负载以节省能源和时间
abstract: The increasing demand for edge computing is leading to a rise in energy consumption from edge devices, which can have significant environmental and financial implications. To address this, in this paper we present a novel method to enhance the energy efficiency while speeding up computations by distributing the workload among multiple containers in an edge device. Experiments are conducted on two Nvidia Jetson edge boards, the TX2 and the AGX Orin, exploring how using a different number of containers can affect the energy consumption and the computational time for an inference task. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our splitting approach, a video object detection task is conducted using an embedded version of the state-of-the-art YOLO algorithm, quantifying the energy and the time savings achieved compared to doing the computations on a single container. The proposed method can help mitigate the environmental and economic consequences of high energy consumption in edge computing, by providing a more sustainable approach to managing the workload of edge devices.
summary: The increasing demand for edge computing is leading to a rise in energy consumption from edge devices, which can have significant environmental and financial implications. To address this, in this paper we present a novel method to enhance the energy efficiency while speeding up computations by distributing the workload among multiple containers in an edge device. Experiments are conducted on two Nvidia Jetson edge boards, the TX2 and the AGX Orin, exploring how using a different number of containers can affect the energy consumption and the computational time for an inference task. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our splitting approach, a video object detection task is conducted using an embedded version of the state-of-the-art YOLO algorithm, quantifying the energy and the time savings achieved compared to doing the computations on a single container. The proposed method can help mitigate the environmental and economic consequences of high energy consumption in edge computing, by providing a more sustainable approach to managing the workload of edge devices.
abstract_zh: 对边缘计算的需求不断增长，导致边缘设备的能源消耗增加，这可能会产生重大的环境和财务影响。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种新方法，通过在边缘设备中的多个容器之间分配工作负载来提高能源效率，同时加快计算速度。在两个 Nvidia Jetson 边缘板 TX2 和 AGX Orin 上进行了实验，探索使用不同数量的容器如何影响推理任务的能耗和计算时间。为了证明我们的分割方法的有效性，使用最先进的 YOLO 算法的嵌入式版本来执行视频对象检测任务，量化与在单个容器上进行计算相比所节省的能量和时间。所提出的方法可以通过提供更可持续的方法来管理边缘设备的工作负载，从而帮助减轻边缘计算中高能耗所造成的环境和经济后果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过在边缘设备中将工作负载分配到多个容器以节省能源和时间的方法。
AI.motivation: 边缘计算需求增长导致设备能源消耗增加，带来环境和经济负担，需提升计算效率并降低能耗。
AI.method: 在Nvidia Jetson TX2和AGX Orin边缘设备上，通过调整容器数量分配视频目标检测任务（基于YOLO算法），对比单容器模式的能耗与时间差异。
AI.result: 实验表明，多容器分配方案显著降低了能耗并缩短了计算时间，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为边缘计算提供了可持续的负载管理方案，可减轻高能耗带来的负面影响。

authors_text: Chengwei Qin,Aston Zhang,Zhuosheng Zhang,Jiaao Chen,Michihiro Yasunaga,Diyi Yang
title: Is ChatGPT a General-Purpose Natural Language Processing Task Solver?
title_zh: ChatGPT 是通用自然语言处理任务求解器吗？
abstract: Spurred by advancements in scale, large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated the ability to perform a variety of natural language processing (NLP) tasks zero-shot -- i.e., without adaptation on downstream data. Recently, the debut of ChatGPT has drawn a great deal of attention from the natural language processing (NLP) community due to the fact that it can generate high-quality responses to human input and self-correct previous mistakes based on subsequent conversations. However, it is not yet known whether ChatGPT can serve as a generalist model that can perform many NLP tasks zero-shot. In this work, we empirically analyze the zero-shot learning ability of ChatGPT by evaluating it on 20 popular NLP datasets covering 7 representative task categories. With extensive empirical studies, we demonstrate both the effectiveness and limitations of the current version of ChatGPT. We find that ChatGPT performs well on many tasks favoring reasoning capabilities (e.g., arithmetic reasoning) while it still faces challenges when solving specific tasks such as sequence tagging. We additionally provide in-depth analysis through qualitative case studies.
summary: Spurred by advancements in scale, large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated the ability to perform a variety of natural language processing (NLP) tasks zero-shot -- i.e., without adaptation on downstream data. Recently, the debut of ChatGPT has drawn a great deal of attention from the natural language processing (NLP) community due to the fact that it can generate high-quality responses to human input and self-correct previous mistakes based on subsequent conversations. However, it is not yet known whether ChatGPT can serve as a generalist model that can perform many NLP tasks zero-shot. In this work, we empirically analyze the zero-shot learning ability of ChatGPT by evaluating it on 20 popular NLP datasets covering 7 representative task categories. With extensive empirical studies, we demonstrate both the effectiveness and limitations of the current version of ChatGPT. We find that ChatGPT performs well on many tasks favoring reasoning capabilities (e.g., arithmetic reasoning) while it still faces challenges when solving specific tasks such as sequence tagging. We additionally provide in-depth analysis through qualitative case studies.
abstract_zh: 在规模进步的推动下，大型语言模型 (LLM) 已经证明了零样本执行各种自然语言处理 (NLP) 任务的能力，即无需对下游数据进行调整。最近，ChatGPT 的首次亮相引起了自然语言处理 (NLP) 社区的广泛关注，因为它可以对人类输入生成高质量的响应，并根据后续对话自我纠正之前的错误。然而，目前尚不清楚 ChatGPT 是否可以作为一个可以零样本执行许多 NLP 任务的通才模型。在这项工作中，我们通过在涵盖 7 个代表性任务类别的 20 个流行 NLP 数据集上评估 ChatGPT 的零样本学习能力，对 ChatGPT 的零样本学习能力进行了实证分析。通过广泛的实证研究，我们证明了当前版本 ChatGPT 的有效性和局限性。我们发现 ChatGPT 在许多有利于推理能力（例如算术推理）的任务上表现良好，但在解决序列标记等特定任务时仍然面临挑战。我们还通过定性案例研究提供深入分析。

AI.tldr: 评估ChatGPT作为通用自然语言处理任务解决者的零样本学习能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管ChatGPT在生成高质量响应方面表现出色，但其是否具备零样本解决多种NLP任务的能力尚未明确，需系统验证其通用性。
AI.method: 在20个主流NLP数据集（涵盖7类任务）上对ChatGPT进行零样本测试，并结合定性案例分析其表现。
AI.result: ChatGPT在需要推理的任务（如算术推理）表现优异，但在序列标注等特定任务上存在显著局限性。
AI.conclusion: 当前版本ChatGPT具备一定零样本通用性，但任务类型和复杂度仍限制其作为全能NLP工具的应用，需进一步优化。

We find that ChatGPT performs well on many tasks favoring reasoning capabilities (e.g., arithmetic reasoning) while it still faces challenges when solving specific tasks such as sequence tagging. We additionally provide in-depth analysis through qualitative case studies. 在规模进步的推动下，大型语言模型 (LLM) 已经证明了零样本执行各种自然语言处理 (NLP) 任务的能力，即无需对下游数据进行调整。最近，ChatGPT 的首次亮相引起了自然语言处理 (NLP) 社区的广泛关注，因为它可以对人类输入生成高质量的响应，并根据后续对话自我纠正之前的错误。然而，目前尚不清楚 ChatGPT 是否可以作为一个可以零样本执行许多 NLP 任务的通才模型。在这项工作中，我们通过在涵盖 7 个代表性任务类别的 20 个流行 NLP 数据集上评估 ChatGPT 的零样本学习能力，对 ChatGPT 的零样本学习能力进行了实证分析。通过广泛的实证研究，我们证明了当前版本 ChatGPT 的有效性和局限性。我们发现 ChatGPT 在许多有利于推理能力（例如算术推理）的任务上表现良好，但在解决序列标记等特定任务时仍然面临挑战。我们还通过定性案例研究提供深入分析。 评估ChatGPT作为通用自然语言处理任务解决者的零样本学习能力。 Chengwei Qin,Aston Zhang,Zhuosheng Zhang,Jiaao Chen,Michihiro Yasunaga,Diyi Yang cs.CL,cs.AI

title: ChatGPT versus Traditional Question Answering for Knowledge Graphs: Current Status and Future Directions Towards Knowledge Graph Chatbots
title_zh: ChatGPT 与传统知识图问答：知识图聊天机器人的现状和未来方向
abstract: Conversational AI and Question-Answering systems (QASs) for knowledge graphs (KGs) are both emerging research areas: they empower users with natural language interfaces for extracting information easily and effectively. Conversational AI simulates conversations with humans; however, it is limited by the data captured in the training datasets. In contrast, QASs retrieve the most recent information from a KG by understanding and translating the natural language question into a formal query supported by the database engine. In this paper, we present a comprehensive study of the characteristics of the existing alternatives towards combining both worlds into novel KG chatbots. Our framework compares two representative conversational models, ChatGPT and Galactica, against KGQAN, the current state-of-the-art QAS. We conduct a thorough evaluation using four real KGs across various application domains to identify the current limitations of each category of systems. Based on our findings, we propose open research opportunities to empower QASs with chatbot capabilities for KGs. All benchmarks and all raw results are available1 for further analysis.
summary: Conversational AI and Question-Answering systems (QASs) for knowledge graphs (KGs) are both emerging research areas: they empower users with natural language interfaces for extracting information easily and effectively. Conversational AI simulates conversations with humans; however, it is limited by the data captured in the training datasets. In contrast, QASs retrieve the most recent information from a KG by understanding and translating the natural language question into a formal query supported by the database engine. In this paper, we present a comprehensive study of the characteristics of the existing alternatives towards combining both worlds into novel KG chatbots. Our framework compares two representative conversational models, ChatGPT and Galactica, against KGQAN, the current state-of-the-art QAS. We conduct a thorough evaluation using four real KGs across various application domains to identify the current limitations of each category of systems. Based on our findings, we propose open research opportunities to empower QASs with chatbot capabilities for KGs. All benchmarks and all raw results are available1 for further analysis.
abstract_zh: 对话式人工智能和知识图谱问答系统（QAS）都是新兴的研究领域：它们为用户提供自然语言界面，以便轻松有效地提取信息。对话式人工智能模拟与人类的对话；然而，它受到训练数据集中捕获的数据的限制。相比之下，QAS 通过理解自然语言问题并将其转换为数据库引擎支持的正式查询来从知识图谱中检索最新信息。在本文中，我们对现有替代方案的特征进行了全面研究，以将两个世界结合成新颖的 KG 聊天机器人。我们的框架将两种具有代表性的对话模型 ChatGPT 和 Galoida 与当前最先进的 QAS KGQAN 进行了比较。我们使用跨不同应用领域的四个真实知识图谱进行全面评估，以确定每类系统当前的局限性。根据我们的发现，我们提出开放研究机会，为 QAS 提供 KG 的聊天机器人功能。所有基准测试和所有原始结果均可用于进一步分析。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了ChatGPT等对话模型与传统知识图谱问答系统（KGQAN）的特性，探讨如何结合两者开发知识图谱聊天机器人。
AI.motivation: 对话AI受限于训练数据，而传统问答系统缺乏对话灵活性，需探索结合两者优势以提升知识图谱交互体验。
AI.method: 构建框架对比ChatGPT、Galactica与KGQAN，基于四个真实知识图谱进行跨领域评估。
AI.result: 发现对话模型依赖训练数据导致准确性不足，传统系统在动态信息检索上表现更优但交互性欠缺。
AI.conclusion: 需进一步研究将问答系统的精准检索能力与聊天机器人的对话交互特性融合，推动下一代知识图谱应用发展。

authors_text: Kai Shen,Junliang Guo,Xu Tan,Siliang Tang,Rui Wang,Jiang Bian
title: A Study on ReLU and Softmax in Transformer
title_zh: Transformer中ReLU和Softmax的研究
abstract: The Transformer architecture consists of self-attention and feed-forward networks (FFNs) which can be viewed as key-value memories according to previous works. However, FFN and traditional memory utilize different activation functions (i.e., ReLU and Softmax respectively), which makes them not equivalent. In this paper, we first rebuild the connections between FFN and key-value memory by conducting extensive studies on ReLU and Softmax, and find they are equivalent when adding an additional layer normalization module on Softmax. In addition, ReLU outperforms Softmax on both FFN and key-value memory when the number of value slots is large. We analyze the reasons and then explore this good property of ReLU on the self-attention network where the original Softmax activation performs poorly on long input sequences. We then propose a full ReLU architecture named ReLUFormer which performs better than the baseline Transformer on long sequence tasks such as document translation. This paper sheds light on the following points: 1) Softmax and ReLU use different normalization methods over elements which lead to different variances of results, and ReLU is good at dealing with a large number of key-value slots; 2) FFN and key-value memory are equivalent, and thus the Transformer can be viewed as a memory network where FFNs and self-attention networks are both key-value memories.
summary: The Transformer architecture consists of self-attention and feed-forward networks (FFNs) which can be viewed as key-value memories according to previous works. However, FFN and traditional memory utilize different activation functions (i.e., ReLU and Softmax respectively), which makes them not equivalent. In this paper, we first rebuild the connections between FFN and key-value memory by conducting extensive studies on ReLU and Softmax, and find they are equivalent when adding an additional layer normalization module on Softmax. In addition, ReLU outperforms Softmax on both FFN and key-value memory when the number of value slots is large. We analyze the reasons and then explore this good property of ReLU on the self-attention network where the original Softmax activation performs poorly on long input sequences. We then propose a full ReLU architecture named ReLUFormer which performs better than the baseline Transformer on long sequence tasks such as document translation. This paper sheds light on the following points: 1) Softmax and ReLU use different normalization methods over elements which lead to different variances of results, and ReLU is good at dealing with a large number of key-value slots; 2) FFN and key-value memory are equivalent, and thus the Transformer can be viewed as a memory network where FFNs and self-attention networks are both key-value memories.
abstract_zh: Transformer 架构由自注意力和前馈网络（FFN）组成，根据之前的工作，可以将其视为键值存储器。然而，FFN 和传统记忆使用不同的激活函数（分别是 ReLU 和 Softmax），这使得它们不等价。在本文中，我们首先通过对ReLU和Softmax进行广泛的研究来重建FFN和键值存储器之间的连接，发现它们在Softmax上添加附加层归一化模块时是等效的。此外，当值槽数量较多时，ReLU 在 FFN 和键值内存上都优于 Softmax。我们分析了原因，然后探索了 ReLU 在自注意力网络上的良好特性，其中原始 Softmax 激活在长输入序列上表现不佳。然后，我们提出了一个名为 ReLUFormer 的完整 ReLU 架构，它在文档翻译等长序列任务上比基线 Transformer 表现更好。本文阐述了以下几点：1）Softmax和ReLU对元素使用不同的归一化方法，导致结果的方差不同，而ReLU擅长处理大量的键值槽； 2）FFN和键值记忆是等价的，因此Transformer可以被视为一个记忆网络，其中FFN和自注意力网络都是键值记忆。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究Transformer中ReLU与Softmax激活函数的等价性，并提出基于ReLU的新型架构ReLUFormer以提升长序列任务性能。
AI.motivation: Transformer的FFN与传统记忆模块因使用ReLU和Softmax导致非等价性，且Softmax在长序列处理中表现不佳，需探索更优激活方案。
AI.method: 通过对比ReLU与Softmax的归一化特性，在Softmax中增加层归一化模块实现等价性验证；分析ReLU在多值槽场景的优势，并将其应用于自注意力网络构建ReLUFormer。
AI.result: ReLU在值槽数量较多时优于Softmax，ReLUFormer在文档翻译等长序列任务中超越基线Transformer模型。
AI.conclusion: Softmax与ReLU因归一化方式差异导致结果方差不同，ReLU适合处理大量键值槽；FFN与记忆模块本质等价，Transformer可视为记忆网络，ReLUFormer验证了该理论的有效性。

search_text: A Study on ReLU and Softmax in Transformer Transformer中ReLU和Softmax的研究 The Transformer architecture consists of self-attention and feed-forward networks (FFNs) which can be viewed as key-value memories according to previous works. However, FFN and traditional memory utilize different activation functions (i.e., ReLU and Softmax respectively), which makes them not equivalent. In this paper, we first rebuild the connections between FFN and key-value memory by conducting extensive studies on ReLU and Softmax, and find they are equivalent when adding an additional layer normalization module on Softmax. In addition, ReLU outperforms Softmax on both FFN and key-value memory when the number of value slots is large. We analyze the reasons and then explore this good property of ReLU on the self-attention network where the original Softmax activation performs poorly on long input sequences. We then propose a full ReLU architecture named ReLUFormer which performs better than the baseline Transformer on long sequence tasks such as document translation. This paper sheds light on the following points: 1) Softmax and ReLU use different normalization methods over elements which lead to different variances of results, and ReLU is good at dealing with a large number of key-value slots; 2) FFN and key-value memory are equivalent, and thus the Transformer can be viewed as a memory network where FFNs and self-attention networks are both key-value memories. authors_text: Shuvro Chowdhury,Andrea Grimaldi,Navid Anjum Aadit,Shaila Niazi,Masoud Mohseni,Shun Kanai,Hideo Ohno,Shunsuke Fukami,Luke Theogarajan,Giovanni Finocchio,Supriyo Datta,Kerem Y. Camsari
title: A full-stack view of probabilistic computing with p-bits: devices, architectures and algorithms
title_zh: p 位概率计算的全栈视图：设备、架构和算法
comment: ef:IEEE Journal on Exploratory Solid-State Computational Devices and Circuits (2023)
comments: ef:IEEE Journal on Exploratory Solid-State Computational Devices and Circuits (2023)
abstract: The transistor celebrated its 75${}^\text{th}$ birthday in 2022. The continued scaling of the transistor defined by Moore's Law continues, albeit at a slower pace. Meanwhile, computing demands and energy consumption required by modern artificial intelligence (AI) algorithms have skyrocketed. As an alternative to scaling transistors for general-purpose computing, the integration of transistors with unconventional technologies has emerged as a promising path for domain-specific computing. In this article, we provide a full-stack review of probabilistic computing with p-bits as a representative example of the energy-efficient and domain-specific computing movement. We argue that p-bits could be used to build energy-efficient probabilistic systems, tailored for probabilistic algorithms and applications. From hardware, architecture, and algorithmic perspectives, we outline the main applications of probabilistic computers ranging from probabilistic machine learning and AI to combinatorial optimization and quantum simulation. Combining emerging nanodevices with the existing CMOS ecosystem will lead to probabilistic computers with orders of magnitude improvements in energy efficiency and probabilistic sampling, potentially unlocking previously unexplored regimes for powerful probabilistic algorithms.
summary: The transistor celebrated its 75${}^\text{th}$ birthday in 2022. The continued scaling of the transistor defined by Moore's Law continues, albeit at a slower pace. Meanwhile, computing demands and energy consumption required by modern artificial intelligence (AI) algorithms have skyrocketed. As an alternative to scaling transistors for general-purpose computing, the integration of transistors with unconventional technologies has emerged as a promising path for domain-specific computing. In this article, we provide a full-stack review of probabilistic computing with p-bits as a representative example of the energy-efficient and domain-specific computing movement. We argue that p-bits could be used to build energy-efficient probabilistic systems, tailored for probabilistic algorithms and applications. From hardware, architecture, and algorithmic perspectives, we outline the main applications of probabilistic computers ranging from probabilistic machine learning and AI to combinatorial optimization and quantum simulation. Combining emerging nanodevices with the existing CMOS ecosystem will lead to probabilistic computers with orders of magnitude improvements in energy efficiency and probabilistic sampling, potentially unlocking previously unexplored regimes for powerful probabilistic algorithms.
abstract_zh: 晶体管于 2022 年庆祝了 75${}^\text{th}$ 生日。摩尔定律定义的晶体管尺寸缩小仍在继续，尽管速度较慢。与此同时，现代人工智能（AI）算法所需的计算需求和能源消耗猛增。作为通用计算中缩小晶体管尺寸的替代方案，晶体管与非常规技术的集成已成为特定领域计算的一条有前途的道路。在本文中，我们以 p 位作为节能和特定领域计算运动的代表性示例，对概率计算进行了全栈回顾。我们认为 p 位可用于构建节能的概率系统，专为概率算法和应用程序量身定制。我们从硬件、架构和算法的角度概述了概率计算机的主要应用，从概率机器学习和人工智能到组合优化和量子模拟。将新兴纳米器件与现有 CMOS 生态系统相结合，将使概率计算机在能源效率和概率采样方面实现数量级的改进，从而有可能解锁以前未探索过的强大概率算法的机制。

AI.tldr: 本文全面综述了基于p-bit的概率计算技术，涵盖器件、架构和算法，旨在推动能效更高的领域特定计算。
AI.motivation: 传统晶体管性能提升放缓，而现代AI算法能耗激增，需探索替代方案以实现高效能计算。
AI.method: 从硬件器件、系统架构到算法层面，系统分析概率计算技术的全栈实现路径及应用潜力。
AI.result: 明确了概率计算在机器学习、组合优化和量子模拟等领域的应用，并指出其能效可提升数个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 融合新兴纳米器件与CMOS生态可构建高效概率计算机，为复杂概率算法开辟新可能。

ai_content.tldr: 本文全面综述了基于p-bit的概率计算技术，涵盖器件、架构和算法，旨在推动能效更高的领域特定计算。
ai_content.motivation: 传统晶体管性能提升放缓，而现代AI算法能耗激增，需探索替代方案以实现高效能计算。
ai_content.method: 从硬件器件、系统架构到算法层面，系统分析概率计算技术的全栈实现路径及应用潜力。

ai_content.conclusion: 融合新兴纳米器件与CMOS生态可构建高效概率计算机，为复杂概率算法开辟新可能。

search_text: A full-stack view of probabilistic computing with p-bits: devices, architectures and algorithms p 位概率计算的全栈视图：设备、架构和算法 The transistor celebrated its 75${}^\text{th}$ birthday in 2022. The continued scaling of the transistor defined by Moore's Law continues, albeit at a slower pace. Meanwhile, computing demands and energy consumption required by modern artificial intelligence (AI) algorithms have skyrocketed. As an alternative to scaling transistors for general-purpose computing, the integration of transistors with unconventional technologies has emerged as a promising path for domain-specific computing. In this article, we provide a full-stack review of probabilistic computing with p-bits as a representative example of the energy-efficient and domain-specific computing movement. We argue that p-bits could be used to build energy-efficient probabilistic systems, tailored for probabilistic algorithms and applications. From hardware, architecture, and algorithmic perspectives, we outline the main applications of probabilistic computers ranging from probabilistic machine learning and AI to combinatorial optimization and quantum simulation. Combining emerging nanodevices with the existing CMOS ecosystem will lead to probabilistic computers with orders of magnitude improvements in energy efficiency and probabilistic sampling, potentially unlocking previously unexplored regimes for powerful probabilistic algorithms. 晶体管于 2022 年庆祝了 75${}^\text{th}$ 生日。摩尔定律定义的晶体管尺寸缩小仍在继续，尽管速度较慢。与此同时，现代人工智能（AI）算法所需的计算需求和能源消耗猛增。作为通用计算中缩小晶体管尺寸的替代方案，晶体管与非常规技术的集成已成为特定领域计算的一条有前途的道路。在本文中，我们以 p 位作为节能和特定领域计算运动的代表性示例，对概率计算进行了全栈回顾。我们认为 p 位可用于构建节能的概率系统，专为概率算法和应用程序量身定制。我们从硬件、架构和算法的角度概述了概率计算机的主要应用，从概率机器学习和人工智能到组合优化和量子模拟。将新兴纳米器件与现有 CMOS 生态系统相结合，将使概率计算机在能源效率和概率采样方面实现数量级的改进，从而有可能解锁以前未探索过的强大概率算法的机制。 本文全面综述了基于p-bit的概率计算技术，涵盖器件、架构和算法，旨在推动能效更高的领域特定计算。 Shuvro Chowdhury,Andrea Grimaldi,Navid Anjum Aadit,Shaila Niazi,Masoud Mohseni,Shun Kanai,Hideo Ohno,Shunsuke Fukami,Luke Theogarajan,Giovanni Finocchio,Supriyo Datta,Kerem Y. Camsari cs.ET,cs.AR,cs.DC,cs.NE,physics.comp-ph

title: Soft Continuum Actuator Tip Position and Contact Force Prediction, Using Electrical Impedance Tomography and Recurrent Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用电阻抗断层扫描和递归神经网络预测软连续体致动器尖端位置和接触力
comment: Revised version for 6th IEEE-RAS International Conference on Soft Robotics (RoboSoft 2023) - updated figures and discussion
comments: Revised version for 6th IEEE-RAS International Conference on Soft Robotics (RoboSoft 2023) - updated figures and discussion
abstract: Enabling dexterous manipulation and safe human-robot interaction, soft robots are widely used in numerous surgical applications. One of the complications associated with using soft robots in surgical applications is reconstructing their shape and the external force exerted on them. Several sensor-based and model-based approaches have been proposed to address the issue. In this paper, a shape sensing technique based on Electrical Impedance Tomography (EIT) is proposed. The performance of this sensing technique in predicting the tip position and contact force of a soft bending actuator is highlighted by conducting a series of empirical tests. The predictions were performed based on a data-driven approach using a Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) recurrent neural network. The tip position predictions indicate the importance of using EIT data along with pressure inputs. Changing the number of EIT channels, we evaluated the effect of the number of EIT inputs on the accuracy of the predictions. The least RMSE values for the tip position are 3.6 and 4.6 mm in Y and Z coordinates, respectively, which are 7.36% and 6.07% of the actuator's total range of motion. Contact force predictions were conducted in three different bending angles and by varying the number of EIT channels. The results of the predictions illustrated that increasing the number of channels contributes to higher accuracy of the force estimation. The mean errors of using 8 channels are 7.69%, 2.13%, and 2.96% of the total force range in three different bending angles.
summary: Enabling dexterous manipulation and safe human-robot interaction, soft robots are widely used in numerous surgical applications. One of the complications associated with using soft robots in surgical applications is reconstructing their shape and the external force exerted on them. Several sensor-based and model-based approaches have been proposed to address the issue. In this paper, a shape sensing technique based on Electrical Impedance Tomography (EIT) is proposed. The performance of this sensing technique in predicting the tip position and contact force of a soft bending actuator is highlighted by conducting a series of empirical tests. The predictions were performed based on a data-driven approach using a Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) recurrent neural network. The tip position predictions indicate the importance of using EIT data along with pressure inputs. Changing the number of EIT channels, we evaluated the effect of the number of EIT inputs on the accuracy of the predictions. The least RMSE values for the tip position are 3.6 and 4.6 mm in Y and Z coordinates, respectively, which are 7.36% and 6.07% of the actuator's total range of motion. Contact force predictions were conducted in three different bending angles and by varying the number of EIT channels. The results of the predictions illustrated that increasing the number of channels contributes to higher accuracy of the force estimation. The mean errors of using 8 channels are 7.69%, 2.13%, and 2.96% of the total force range in three different bending angles.
abstract_zh: 软机器人能够实现灵巧的操作和安全的人机交互，广泛应用于众多手术应用中。在外科手术应用中使用软机器人的并发症之一是重建它们的形状和施加在它们上的外力。已经提出了几种基于传感器和基于模型的方法来解决这个问题。在本文中，提出了一种基于电阻抗断层扫描（EIT）的形状传感技术。通过进行一系列的经验测试，突出了这种传感技术在预测软弯曲执行器的尖端位置和接触力方面的性能。预测是基于使用长短期记忆 (LSTM) 循环神经网络的数据驱动方法进行的。尖端位置预测表明使用 EIT 数据和压力输入的重要性。改变 EIT 通道的数量，我们评估了 EIT 输入数量对预测准确性的影响。 Y 坐标和 Z 坐标中尖端位置的最小 RMSE 值分别为 3.6 和 4.6 mm，分别是执行器总运动范围的 7.36% 和 6.07%。通过改变 EIT 通道的数量，以三种不同的弯曲角度进行接触力预测。预测结果表明，增加通道数量有助于提高力估计的准确性。在三个不同弯曲角度下，使用 8 个通道的平均误差分别为总力范围的 7.69%、2.13% 和 2.96%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合电导率断层扫描（EIT）和长短期记忆网络（LSTM）的软体机器人末端位置与接触力预测方法。
AI.motivation: 软体机器人在手术中需精确感知形状和外部力，但传统方法存在精度不足或实时性差的问题，需开发新型传感与预测技术。
AI.method: 基于EIT采集软体执行器阻抗数据，结合压力传感器输入，利用LSTM神经网络建立数据驱动模型，通过调整EIT通道数量优化预测效果。
AI.result: 末端位置预测Y/Z轴RMSE分别为3.6/4.6mm（占行程7.36%/6.07%）；8通道EIT下接触力预测误差在三种弯曲角度中分别为7.69%、2.13%、2.96%。
AI.conclusion: EIT与LSTM结合可有效提升软体机器人状态感知精度，增加EIT通道数显著改善力预测性能，为手术机器人安全交互提供技术支撑。

authors_text: Pengfei Yang,Zhiming Chi,Zongxin Liu,Mengyu Zhao,Cheng-Chao Huang,Shaowei Cai,Lijun Zhang
title: Incremental Satisfiability Modulo Theory for Verification of Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 用于验证深度神经网络的增量可满足性模理论
abstract: Constraint solving is an elementary way for verification of deep neural networks (DNN). In the domain of AI safety, a DNN might be modified in its structure and parameters for its repair or attack. For such situations, we propose the incremental DNN verification problem, which asks whether a safety property still holds after the DNN is modified. To solve the problem, we present an incremental satisfiability modulo theory (SMT) algorithm based on the Reluplex framework. We simulate the most important features of the configurations that infers the verification result of the searching branches in the old solving procedure (with respect to the original network), and heuristically check whether the proofs are still valid for the modified DNN. We implement our algorithm as an incremental solver called DeepInc, and exerimental results show that DeepInc is more efficient in most cases. For the cases that the property holds both before and after modification, the acceleration can be faster by several orders of magnitude, showing that DeepInc is outstanding in incrementally searching for counterexamples. Moreover, based on the framework, we propose the multi-objective DNN repair problem and give an algorithm based on our incremental SMT solving algorithm. Our repair method preserves more potential safety properties on the repaired DNNs compared with state-of-the-art.
summary: Constraint solving is an elementary way for verification of deep neural networks (DNN). In the domain of AI safety, a DNN might be modified in its structure and parameters for its repair or attack. For such situations, we propose the incremental DNN verification problem, which asks whether a safety property still holds after the DNN is modified. To solve the problem, we present an incremental satisfiability modulo theory (SMT) algorithm based on the Reluplex framework. We simulate the most important features of the configurations that infers the verification result of the searching branches in the old solving procedure (with respect to the original network), and heuristically check whether the proofs are still valid for the modified DNN. We implement our algorithm as an incremental solver called DeepInc, and exerimental results show that DeepInc is more efficient in most cases. For the cases that the property holds both before and after modification, the acceleration can be faster by several orders of magnitude, showing that DeepInc is outstanding in incrementally searching for counterexamples. Moreover, based on the framework, we propose the multi-objective DNN repair problem and give an algorithm based on our incremental SMT solving algorithm. Our repair method preserves more potential safety properties on the repaired DNNs compared with state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 约束求解是验证深度神经网络（DNN）的基本方法。在人工智能安全领域，DNN 可能会修改其结构和参数以进行修复或攻击。针对这种情况，我们提出了增量 DNN 验证问题，该问题询问 DNN 修改后安全属性是否仍然成立。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于 Reluplex 框架的增量可满足性模理论（SMT）算法。我们模拟了推断旧求解过程中搜索分支验证结果（相对于原始网络）的配置的最重要特征，并启发式检查证明对于修改后的 DNN 是否仍然有效。我们将我们的算法实现为名为 DeepInc 的增量求解器，实验结果表明 DeepInc 在大多数情况下效率更高。对于修改前后属性都成立的情况，加速可以快几个数量级，这表明DeepInc在增量搜索反例方面表现出色。此外，基于该框架，我们提出了多目标DNN修复问题，并给出了基于增量SMT求解算法的算法。与最先进的技术相比，我们的修复方法在修复后的 DNN 上保留了更多潜在的安全特性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种增量满足性模理论（SMT）算法，用于验证修改后的深度神经网络（DNN）的安全属性。
AI.motivation: 在AI安全领域，DNN的结构和参数可能因修复或攻击而被修改，传统验证方法无法高效处理此类增量修改后的验证需求。
AI.method: 基于Reluplex框架设计增量SMT算法DeepInc，利用原始网络求解过程中的配置信息，启发式检查修改后DNN的证明有效性，并提出多目标DNN修复算法。
AI.result: 实验表明DeepInc在多数情况下效率更高，当属性在修改前后均成立时加速可达数个数量级，且修复方法能保留更多安全属性。
AI.conclusion: DeepInc在增量验证和修复任务中表现出显著效率优势，为动态修改的DNN安全验证提供了有效解决方案。

ai_content_json.result: 实验表明DeepInc在多数情况下效率更高，当属性在修改前后均成立时加速可达数个数量级，且修复方法能保留更多安全属性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: DeepInc在增量验证和修复任务中表现出显著效率优势，为动态修改的DNN安全验证提供了有效解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种增量满足性模理论（SMT）算法，用于验证修改后的深度神经网络（DNN）的安全属性。
motivation: 在AI安全领域，DNN的结构和参数可能因修复或攻击而被修改，传统验证方法无法高效处理此类增量修改后的验证需求。
method: 基于Reluplex框架设计增量SMT算法DeepInc，利用原始网络求解过程中的配置信息，启发式检查修改后DNN的证明有效性，并提出多目标DNN修复算法。
result: 实验表明DeepInc在多数情况下效率更高，当属性在修改前后均成立时加速可达数个数量级，且修复方法能保留更多安全属性。

search_text: Incremental Satisfiability Modulo Theory for Verification of Deep Neural Networks 用于验证深度神经网络的增量可满足性模理论 Constraint solving is an elementary way for verification of deep neural networks (DNN). In the domain of AI safety, a DNN might be modified in its structure and parameters for its repair or attack. For such situations, we propose the incremental DNN verification problem, which asks whether a safety property still holds after the DNN is modified. To solve the problem, we present an incremental satisfiability modulo theory (SMT) algorithm based on the Reluplex framework. We simulate the most important features of the configurations that infers the verification result of the searching branches in the old solving procedure (with respect to the original network), and heuristically check whether the proofs are still valid for the modified DNN. We implement our algorithm as an incremental solver called DeepInc, and exerimental results show that DeepInc is more efficient in most cases. For the cases that the property holds both before and after modification, the acceleration can be faster by several orders of magnitude, showing that DeepInc is outstanding in incrementally searching for counterexamples. Moreover, based on the framework, we propose the multi-objective DNN repair problem and give an algorithm based on our incremental SMT solving algorithm. Our repair method preserves more potential safety properties on the repaired DNNs compared with state-of-the-art. 约束求解是验证深度神经网络（DNN）的基本方法。在人工智能安全领域，DNN 可能会修改其结构和参数以进行修复或攻击。针对这种情况，我们提出了增量 DNN 验证问题，该问题询问 DNN 修改后安全属性是否仍然成立。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于 Reluplex 框架的增量可满足性模理论（SMT）算法。我们模拟了推断旧求解过程中搜索分支验证结果（相对于原始网络）的配置的最重要特征，并启发式检查证明对于修改后的 DNN 是否仍然有效。我们将我们的算法实现为名为 DeepInc 的增量求解器，实验结果表明 DeepInc 在大多数情况下效率更高。对于修改前后属性都成立的情况，加速可以快几个数量级，这表明DeepInc在增量搜索反例方面表现出色。此外，基于该框架，我们提出了多目标DNN修复问题，并给出了基于增量SMT求解算法的算法。与最先进的技术相比，我们的修复方法在修复后的 DNN 上保留了更多潜在的安全特性。 本文提出一种增量满足性模理论（SMT）算法，用于验证修改后的深度神经网络（DNN）的安全属性。 Pengfei Yang,Zhiming Chi,Zongxin Liu,Mengyu Zhao,Cheng-Chao Huang,Shaowei Cai,Lijun Zhang cs.AI,cs.FL

title: Mixed Multi-Model Semantic Interaction for Graph-based Narrative Visualizations
title_zh: 基于图的叙事可视化的混合多模型语义交互
abstract: Narrative sensemaking is an essential part of understanding sequential data. Narrative maps are a visual representation model that can assist analysts to understand narratives. In this work, we present a semantic interaction (SI) framework for narrative maps that can support analysts through their sensemaking process. In contrast to traditional SI systems which rely on dimensionality reduction and work on a projection space, our approach has an additional abstraction layer -- the structure space -- that builds upon the projection space and encodes the narrative in a discrete structure. This extra layer introduces additional challenges that must be addressed when integrating SI with the narrative extraction pipeline. We address these challenges by presenting the general concept of Mixed Multi-Model Semantic Interaction (3MSI) -- an SI pipeline, where the highest-level model corresponds to an abstract discrete structure and the lower-level models are continuous. To evaluate the performance of our 3MSI models for narrative maps, we present a quantitative simulation-based evaluation and a qualitative evaluation with case studies and expert feedback. We find that our SI system can model the analysts' intent and support incremental formalism for narrative maps.
summary: Narrative sensemaking is an essential part of understanding sequential data. Narrative maps are a visual representation model that can assist analysts to understand narratives. In this work, we present a semantic interaction (SI) framework for narrative maps that can support analysts through their sensemaking process. In contrast to traditional SI systems which rely on dimensionality reduction and work on a projection space, our approach has an additional abstraction layer -- the structure space -- that builds upon the projection space and encodes the narrative in a discrete structure. This extra layer introduces additional challenges that must be addressed when integrating SI with the narrative extraction pipeline. We address these challenges by presenting the general concept of Mixed Multi-Model Semantic Interaction (3MSI) -- an SI pipeline, where the highest-level model corresponds to an abstract discrete structure and the lower-level models are continuous. To evaluate the performance of our 3MSI models for narrative maps, we present a quantitative simulation-based evaluation and a qualitative evaluation with case studies and expert feedback. We find that our SI system can model the analysts' intent and support incremental formalism for narrative maps.
abstract_zh: 叙事意义建构是理解顺序数据的重要组成部分。叙事地图是一种视觉表示模型，可以帮助分析师理解叙事。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个叙事地图的语义交互（SI）框架，可以支持分析师完成意义建构过程。与依赖降维并在投影空间上工作的传统 SI 系统相比，我们的方法有一个额外的抽象层——结构空间——它建立在投影空间的基础上，并以离散结构对叙述进行编码。这个额外的层带来了额外的挑战，在将 SI 与叙事提取管道集成时必须解决这些挑战。我们通过提出混合多模型语义交互（3MSI）的一般概念来解决这些挑战——SI管道，其中最高级别的模型对应于抽象的离散结构，而较低级别的模型是连续的。为了评估我们的 3MSI 叙事地图模型的性能，我们提出了基于模拟的定量评估以及基于案例研究和专家反馈的定性评估。我们发现我们的 SI 系统可以模拟分析师的意图并支持叙事地图的增量形式主义。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于结构空间的混合多模型语义交互框架（3MSI），用于增强基于图的叙事地图分析。
AI.motivation: 传统语义交互系统依赖降维和投影空间，难以有效处理叙事的离散结构特征，需引入新方法提升分析效果。
AI.method: 构建包含投影空间与结构空间的双层框架，设计混合多模型语义交互（3MSI）方法，结合高层离散结构模型与低层连续模型。
AI.result: 定量模拟与专家反馈显示，该方法能准确建模分析师意图，支持叙事地图的增量形式化表达。
AI.conclusion: 3MSI框架有效解决了叙事分析中的结构抽象问题，为复杂序列数据的可视化分析提供了新方向。

authors_text: Mohammad B. Khreishah,Walter C. Daugherity,Laszlo B. Kish
title: XOR and XNOR gates in instantaneous noise based logic
title_zh: 基于瞬时噪声的逻辑中的异或门和异或非门
abstract: In this paper, we propose a new method of applying the XOR and XNOR gates on exponentially large superpositions in Instantaneous Noise-Based Logic. These new gates are repeatable, and they can achieve an exponential speed up in computation with a polynomial requirement in hardware complexity.
summary: In this paper, we propose a new method of applying the XOR and XNOR gates on exponentially large superpositions in Instantaneous Noise-Based Logic. These new gates are repeatable, and they can achieve an exponential speed up in computation with a polynomial requirement in hardware complexity.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种在基于瞬时噪声的逻辑中将 XOR 和 XNOR 门应用于指数大叠加的新方法。这些新的门是可重复的，并且它们可以在硬件复杂性的多项式要求下实现指数级的计算速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在瞬时噪声逻辑中实现XOR和XNOR门的新方法，可处理指数级大叠加态并实现计算加速。
AI.motivation: 传统逻辑门难以高效处理大尺度量子叠加态，而瞬时噪声逻辑可能提供更高效的计算框架，需探索其在复杂逻辑门应用中的潜力。
AI.method: 基于瞬时噪声逻辑设计可重复使用的XOR/XNOR门，通过多项式级硬件复杂度实现对指数级叠加态的高效操作。
AI.result: 实现了计算速度的指数级提升，同时保持硬件资源需求为多项式复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为复杂量子计算任务提供了高效解决方案，验证了瞬时噪声逻辑在提升计算性能方面的可行性。

authors_text: Yimin Dou,Kewen Li,Wenjun Lv,Timing Li,Hongjie Duan,Zhifeng Xu
title: ContrasInver: Ultra-Sparse Label Semi-supervised Regression for Multi-dimensional Seismic Inversion
title_zh: ContrasInver：多维地震反演的超稀疏标签半监督回归
comment: This work has been submitted to journal for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to journal for possible publication
abstract: The automated interpretation and inversion of seismic data have advanced significantly with the development of Deep Learning (DL) methods. However, these methods often require numerous costly well logs, limiting their application only to mature or synthetic data. This paper presents ContrasInver, a method that achieves seismic inversion using as few as two or three well logs, significantly reducing current requirements. In ContrasInver, we propose three key innovations to address the challenges of applying semi-supervised learning to regression tasks with ultra-sparse labels. The Multi-dimensional Sample Generation (MSG) technique pioneers a paradigm for sample generation in multi-dimensional inversion. It produces a large number of diverse samples from a single well, while establishing lateral continuity in seismic data. MSG yields substantial improvements over current techniques, even without the use of semi-supervised learning. The Region-Growing Training (RGT) strategy leverages the inherent continuity of seismic data, effectively propagating accuracy from closer to more distant regions based on the proximity of well logs. The Impedance Vectorization Projection (IVP) vectorizes impedance values and performs semi-supervised learning in a compressed space. We demonstrated that the Jacobian matrix derived from this space can filter out some outlier components in pseudo-label vectors, thereby solving the value confusion issue in semi-supervised regression learning. In the experiments, ContrasInver achieved state-of-the-art performance in the synthetic data SEAM I. In the field data with two or three well logs, only the methods based on the components proposed in this paper were able to achieve reasonable results. It's the first data-driven approach yielding reliable results on the Netherlands F3 and Delft, using only three and two well logs respectively.

However, these methods often require numerous costly well logs, limiting their application only to mature or synthetic data. This paper presents ContrasInver, a method that achieves seismic inversion using as few as two or three well logs, significantly reducing current requirements. In ContrasInver, we propose three key innovations to address the challenges of applying semi-supervised learning to regression tasks with ultra-sparse labels. The Multi-dimensional Sample Generation (MSG) technique pioneers a paradigm for sample generation in multi-dimensional inversion. It produces a large number of diverse samples from a single well, while establishing lateral continuity in seismic data. MSG yields substantial improvements over current techniques, even without the use of semi-supervised learning. The Region-Growing Training (RGT) strategy leverages the inherent continuity of seismic data, effectively propagating accuracy from closer to more distant regions based on the proximity of well logs. The Impedance Vectorization Projection (IVP) vectorizes impedance values and performs semi-supervised learning in a compressed space. We demonstrated that the Jacobian matrix derived from this space can filter out some outlier components in pseudo-label vectors, thereby solving the value confusion issue in semi-supervised regression learning. In the experiments, ContrasInver achieved state-of-the-art performance in the synthetic data SEAM I. In the field data with two or three well logs, only the methods based on the components proposed in this paper were able to achieve reasonable results. It's the first data-driven approach yielding reliable results on the Netherlands F3 and Delft, using only three and two well logs respectively.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习（DL）方法的发展，地震数据的自动解释和反演取得了显着进展。然而，这些方法通常需要大量昂贵的测井记录，限制了它们的应用仅适用于成熟的或合成的数据。本文介绍了 ContrasInver，一种使用少至两到三根测井曲线即可实现地震反演的方法，显着降低了当前的要求。在 ContrasInver 中，我们提出了三项关键创新，以解决将半监督学习应用于具有超稀疏标签的回归任务的挑战。多维样本生成（MSG）技术开创了多维反演中样本生成的范例。它从单口井中产生大量不同的样本，同时建立地震数据的横向连续性。即使不使用半监督学习，MSG 也能比当前技术产生重大改进。区域增长训练（RGT）策略利用地震数据固有的连续性，根据测井曲线的接近程度，有效地将精度从较近的区域传播到较远的区域。阻抗矢量化投影（IVP）对阻抗值进行矢量化并在压缩空间中执行半监督学习。我们证明了从该空间导出的雅可比矩阵可以过滤掉伪标签向量中的一些离群成分，从而解决半监督回归学习中的值混淆问题。在实验中，ContrasInver 在合成数据 SEAM I 中实现了最先进的性能。在具有两个或三个测井记录的现场数据中，只有基于本文提出的组件的方法才能获得合理的结果。这是第一个在荷兰 F3 和代尔夫特仅使用 3 条和 2 条测井曲线就可产生可靠结果的数据驱动方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ContrasInver方法，通过超稀疏标签的半监督回归实现多维地震反演，仅需两到三个井日志即可获得可靠结果。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法依赖大量昂贵的井日志数据，限制了其在实际地震数据中的应用，亟需减少对井日志数量的依赖。
AI.method: 提出多维样本生成(MSG)、区域生长训练(RGT)和阻抗向量投影(IVP)三项创新，结合半监督学习与压缩空间建模，解决超稀疏标签下的回归问题。
AI.result: 在合成数据SEAM I中达到最先进水平，实际数据中仅需2-3个井日志即可获得合理结果，首次在荷兰F3和Delft数据集实现可靠反演。
AI.conclusion: ContrasInver通过三项核心技术有效降低井日志依赖，验证了超稀疏标签半监督回归在地震反演中的可行性与实用性。

search_text: ContrasInver: Ultra-Sparse Label Semi-supervised Regression for Multi-dimensional Seismic Inversion ContrasInver：多维地震反演的超稀疏标签半监督回归 The automated interpretation and inversion of seismic data have advanced significantly with the development of Deep Learning (DL) methods. However, these methods often require numerous costly well logs, limiting their application only to mature or synthetic data. This paper presents ContrasInver, a method that achieves seismic inversion using as few as two or three well logs, significantly reducing current requirements. In ContrasInver, we propose three key innovations to address the challenges of applying semi-supervised learning to regression tasks with ultra-sparse labels. The Multi-dimensional Sample Generation (MSG) technique pioneers a paradigm for sample generation in multi-dimensional inversion. It produces a large number of diverse samples from a single well, while establishing lateral continuity in seismic data. MSG yields substantial improvements over current techniques, even without the use of semi-supervised learning. The Region-Growing Training (RGT) strategy leverages the inherent continuity of seismic data, effectively propagating accuracy from closer to more distant regions based on the proximity of well logs. The Impedance Vectorization Projection (IVP) vectorizes impedance values and performs semi-supervised learning in a compressed space. We demonstrated that the Jacobian matrix derived from this space can filter out some outlier components in pseudo-label vectors, thereby solving the value confusion issue in semi-supervised regression learning. In the experiments, ContrasInver achieved state-of-the-art performance in the synthetic data SEAM I. In the field data with two or three well logs, only the methods based on the components proposed in this paper were able to achieve reasonable results. It's the first data-driven approach yielding reliable results on the Netherlands F3 and Delft, using only three and two well logs respectively. 随着深度学习（DL）方法的发展，地震数据的自动解释和反演取得了显着进展。然而，这些方法通常需要大量昂贵的测井记录，限制了它们的应用仅适用于成熟的或合成的数据。本文介绍了 ContrasInver，一种使用少至两到三根测井曲线即可实现地震反演的方法，显着降低了当前的要求。在 ContrasInver 中，我们提出了三项关键创新，以解决将半监督学习应用于具有超稀疏标签的回归任务的挑战。多维样本生成（MSG）技术开创了多维反演中样本生成的范例。它从单口井中产生大量不同的样本，同时建立地震数据的横向连续性。即使不使用半监督学习，MSG 也能比当前技术产生重大改进。区域增长训练（RGT）策略利用地震数据固有的连续性，根据测井曲线的接近程度，有效地将精度从较近的区域传播到较远的区域。阻抗矢量化投影（IVP）对阻抗值进行矢量化并在压缩空间中执行半监督学习。我们证明了从该空间导出的雅可比矩阵可以过滤掉伪标签向量中的一些离群成分，从而解决半监督回归学习中的值混淆问题。在实验中，ContrasInver 在合成数据 SEAM I 中实现了最先进的性能。在具有两个或三个测井记录的现场数据中，只有基于本文提出的组件的方法才能获得合理的结果。这是第一个在荷兰 F3 和代尔夫特仅使用 3 条和 2 条测井曲线就可产生可靠结果的数据驱动方法。 本文提出ContrasInver方法，通过超稀疏标签的半监督回归实现多维地震反演，仅需两到三个井日志即可获得可靠结果。 Yimin Dou,Kewen Li,Wenjun Lv,Timing Li,Hongjie Duan,Zhifeng Xu physics.geo-ph,cs.CV

title: Evaluation of a Search Interface for Preference-Based Ranking -- Measuring User Satisfaction and System Performance
title_zh: 基于偏好的排名搜索界面的评估——衡量用户满意度和系统性能
comment: In NordiCHI 2018 Proceedings of the 10th Nordic Conference on Human-Computer Interaction
comments: In NordiCHI 2018 Proceedings of the 10th Nordic Conference on Human-Computer Interaction
abstract: Finding a product online can be a challenging task for users. Faceted search interfaces, often in combination with recommenders, can support users in finding a product that fits their preferences. However, those preferences are not always equally weighted: some might be more important to a user than others (e.g. red is the favorite color, but blue is also fine) and sometimes preferences are even contradictory (e.g. the lowest price vs. the highest performance). Often, there is even no product that meets all preferences. In those cases, faceted search interfaces reach their limits. In our research, we investigate the potential of a search interface, which allows a preference-based ranking based on weighted search and facet terms. We performed a user study with 24 participants and measured user satisfaction and system performance. The results show that with the preference-based search interface the users were given more alternatives that best meet their preferences and that they are more satisfied with the selected product than with a search interface using standard facets. Furthermore, in this work we study the relationship between user satisfaction and search precision within the whole search session and found first indications that there might be a relation between them.
summary: Finding a product online can be a challenging task for users. Faceted search interfaces, often in combination with recommenders, can support users in finding a product that fits their preferences. However, those preferences are not always equally weighted: some might be more important to a user than others (e.g. red is the favorite color, but blue is also fine) and sometimes preferences are even contradictory (e.g. the lowest price vs. the highest performance). Often, there is even no product that meets all preferences. In those cases, faceted search interfaces reach their limits. In our research, we investigate the potential of a search interface, which allows a preference-based ranking based on weighted search and facet terms. We performed a user study with 24 participants and measured user satisfaction and system performance. The results show that with the preference-based search interface the users were given more alternatives that best meet their preferences and that they are more satisfied with the selected product than with a search interface using standard facets. Furthermore, in this work we study the relationship between user satisfaction and search precision within the whole search session and found first indications that there might be a relation between them.
abstract_zh: 对于用户来说，在线查找产品可能是一项具有挑战性的任务。分面搜索界面通常与推荐器结合使用，可以支持用户找到适合其偏好的产品。然而，这些偏好并不总是同等重要：有些偏好对用户来说可能比其他偏好更重要（例如，红色是最喜欢的颜色，但蓝色也很好），有时偏好甚至是矛盾的（例如最低价格与最高性能）。通常，甚至没有一种产品能够满足所有偏好。在这些情况下，分面搜索界面就达到了极限。在我们的研究中，我们研究了搜索界面的潜力，该界面允许基于加权搜索和方面术语进行基于偏好的排名。我们对 24 名参与者进行了一项用户研究，并测量了用户满意度和系统性能。结果表明，与使用标准方面的搜索界面相比，基于偏好的搜索界面为用户提供了更多最能满足其偏好的选择，并且他们对所选产品更满意。此外，在这项工作中，我们研究了整个搜索会话中用户满意度和搜索精度之间的关系，并发现了它们之间可能存在关系的第一个迹象。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了一种基于偏好排序的搜索界面，旨在提升用户满意度和系统性能。
AI.motivation: 传统分面搜索界面难以处理用户权重不一或矛盾的偏好，导致无法满足所有需求。因此需探索基于权重和冲突偏好的搜索界面。
AI.method: 通过24名参与者的用户研究，对比基于偏好排序的界面与标准分面界面，测量用户满意度和系统性能指标。
AI.result: 基于偏好的搜索界面为用户提供了更符合其偏好的替代选项，用户满意度更高；初步发现用户满意度与搜索精度存在关联。
AI.conclusion: 偏好排序界面能有效提升用户满意度和系统性能，为处理复杂用户偏好提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Fabian Wagner,Mareike Thies,Noah Maul,Laura Pfaff,Oliver Aust,Sabrina Pechmann,Christopher Syben,Andreas Maier
title: Geometric Constraints Enable Self-Supervised Sinogram Inpainting in Sparse-View Tomography
title_zh: 几何约束使稀疏视图断层扫描中的自监督正弦图修复成为可能
abstract: The diagnostic quality of computed tomography (CT) scans is usually restricted by the induced patient dose, scan speed, and image quality. Sparse-angle tomographic scans reduce radiation exposure and accelerate data acquisition, but suffer from image artifacts and noise. Existing image processing algorithms can restore CT reconstruction quality but often require large training data sets or can not be used for truncated objects. This work presents a self-supervised projection inpainting method that allows optimizing missing projective views via gradient-based optimization. By reconstructing independent stacks of projection data, a self-supervised loss is calculated in the CT image domain and used to directly optimize projection image intensities to match the missing tomographic views constrained by the projection geometry. Our experiments on real X-ray microscope (XRM) tomographic mouse tibia bone scans show that our method improves reconstructions by 3.1-7.4%/7.7-17.6% in terms of PSNR/SSIM with respect to the interpolation baseline. Our approach is applicable as a flexible self-supervised projection inpainting tool for tomographic applications.
summary: The diagnostic quality of computed tomography (CT) scans is usually restricted by the induced patient dose, scan speed, and image quality. Sparse-angle tomographic scans reduce radiation exposure and accelerate data acquisition, but suffer from image artifacts and noise. Existing image processing algorithms can restore CT reconstruction quality but often require large training data sets or can not be used for truncated objects. This work presents a self-supervised projection inpainting method that allows optimizing missing projective views via gradient-based optimization. By reconstructing independent stacks of projection data, a self-supervised loss is calculated in the CT image domain and used to directly optimize projection image intensities to match the missing tomographic views constrained by the projection geometry. Our experiments on real X-ray microscope (XRM) tomographic mouse tibia bone scans show that our method improves reconstructions by 3.1-7.4%/7.7-17.6% in terms of PSNR/SSIM with respect to the interpolation baseline. Our approach is applicable as a flexible self-supervised projection inpainting tool for tomographic applications.
abstract_zh: 计算机断层扫描 (CT) 扫描的诊断质量通常受到患者诱发剂量、扫描速度和图像质量的限制。稀疏角度断层扫描可减少辐射暴露并加速数据采集，但会受到图像伪影和噪声的影响。现有的图像处理算法可以恢复CT重建质量，但通常需要大量的训练数据集或不能用于截断的对象。这项工作提出了一种自监督投影修复方法，允许通过基于梯度的优化来优化缺失的投影视图。通过重建独立的投影数据堆栈，在 CT 图像域中计算自监督损失，并用于直接优化投影图像强度，以匹配受投影几何约束的缺失断层摄影视图。我们对真实 X 射线显微镜 (XRM) 断层扫描小鼠胫骨骨扫描的实验表明，我们的方法在 PSNR/SSIM 方面相对于插值基线将重建提高了 3.1-7.4%/7.7-17.6%。我们的方法可用作断层扫描应用的灵活的自监督投影修复工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于几何约束的自监督正弦图修复方法，用于稀疏视角断层扫描中的投影数据修复。
AI.motivation: 稀疏视角断层扫描虽能降低辐射剂量和提升扫描速度，但易产生图像伪影和噪声，现有算法需大量训练数据或无法处理截断物体。
AI.method: 通过梯度优化直接调整投影强度，利用CT图像域的自监督损失函数，并结合投影几何约束优化缺失视角。
AI.result: 在XRM小鼠胫骨扫描实验中，PSNR/SSIM指标相较插值基线提升3.1-7.4%/7.7-17.6%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法作为灵活的自监督投影修复工具，可有效提升稀疏视角断层扫描的重建质量。

search_text: Geometric Constraints Enable Self-Supervised Sinogram Inpainting in Sparse-View Tomography 几何约束使稀疏视图断层扫描中的自监督正弦图修复成为可能 The diagnostic quality of computed tomography (CT) scans is usually restricted by the induced patient dose, scan speed, and image quality. Sparse-angle tomographic scans reduce radiation exposure and accelerate data acquisition, but suffer from image artifacts and noise. Existing image processing algorithms can restore CT reconstruction quality but often require large training data sets or can not be used for truncated objects. This work presents a self-supervised projection inpainting method that allows optimizing missing projective views via gradient-based optimization. By reconstructing independent stacks of projection data, a self-supervised loss is calculated in the CT image domain and used to directly optimize projection image intensities to match the missing tomographic views constrained by the projection geometry. Our experiments on real X-ray microscope (XRM) tomographic mouse tibia bone scans show that our method improves reconstructions by 3.1-7.4%/7.7-17.6% in terms of PSNR/SSIM with respect to the interpolation baseline. Our approach is applicable as a flexible self-supervised projection inpainting tool for tomographic applications. 计算机断层扫描 (CT) 扫描的诊断质量通常受到患者诱发剂量、扫描速度和图像质量的限制。稀疏角度断层扫描可减少辐射暴露并加速数据采集，但会受到图像伪影和噪声的影响。现有的图像处理算法可以恢复CT重建质量，但通常需要大量的训练数据集或不能用于截断的对象。这项工作提出了一种自监督投影修复方法，允许通过基于梯度的优化来优化缺失的投影视图。通过重建独立的投影数据堆栈，在 CT 图像域中计算自监督损失，并用于直接优化投影图像强度，以匹配受投影几何约束的缺失断层摄影视图。我们对真实 X 射线显微镜 (XRM) 断层扫描小鼠胫骨骨扫描的实验表明，我们的方法在 PSNR/SSIM 方面相对于插值基线将重建提高了 3.1-7.4%/7.7-17.6%。我们的方法可用作断层扫描应用的灵活的自监督投影修复工具。 本文提出一种基于几何约束的自监督正弦图修复方法，用于稀疏视角断层扫描中的投影数据修复。 Fabian Wagner,Mareike Thies,Noah Maul,Laura Pfaff,Oliver Aust,Sabrina Pechmann,Christopher Syben,Andreas Maier cs.CV

authors_text: Ricardo Pereira,Tiago Barros,Luis Garrote,Ana Lopes,Urbano J. Nunes
title: A Deep Learning-based Global and Segmentation-based Semantic Feature Fusion Approach for Indoor Scene Classification
title_zh: 一种基于深度学习的全局和基于分割的室内场景分类语义特征融合方法
abstract: This work proposes a novel approach that uses a semantic segmentation mask to obtain a 2D spatial layout of the segmentation-categories across the scene, designated by segmentation-based semantic features (SSFs). These features represent, per segmentation-category, the pixel count, as well as the 2D average position and respective standard deviation values. Moreover, a two-branch network, GS2F2App, that exploits CNN-based global features extracted from RGB images and the segmentation-based features extracted from the proposed SSFs, is also proposed. GS2F2App was evaluated in two indoor scene benchmark datasets: the SUN RGB-D and the NYU Depth V2, achieving state-of-the-art results on both datasets.
summary: This work proposes a novel approach that uses a semantic segmentation mask to obtain a 2D spatial layout of the segmentation-categories across the scene, designated by segmentation-based semantic features (SSFs). These features represent, per segmentation-category, the pixel count, as well as the 2D average position and respective standard deviation values. Moreover, a two-branch network, GS2F2App, that exploits CNN-based global features extracted from RGB images and the segmentation-based features extracted from the proposed SSFs, is also proposed. GS2F2App was evaluated in two indoor scene benchmark datasets: the SUN RGB-D and the NYU Depth V2, achieving state-of-the-art results on both datasets.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种新颖的方法，该方法使用语义分割掩模来获取整个场景中分割类别的 2D 空间布局，由基于分割的语义特征（SSF）指定。这些特征代表每个分割类别的像素计数以及 2D 平均位置和各自的标准偏差值。此外，还提出了一个两分支网络 GS2F2App，它利用从 RGB 图像中提取的基于 CNN 的全局特征和从所提出的 SSF 中提取的基于分割的特征。 GS2F2App 在两个室内场景基准数据集：SUN RGB-D 和 NYU Depth V2 中进行了评估，在两个数据集上均取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的室内场景分类方法，通过融合全局特征与分割语义特征实现更准确的分类。
AI.motivation: 现有室内场景分类方法未能充分挖掘语义分割信息，导致场景布局特征利用不足，需结合多源特征提升分类性能。
AI.method: 提出分割语义特征（SSFs）提取方法，计算各分割类别的像素统计信息；设计双分支网络GS2F2App，融合CNN全局特征与SSFs特征进行分类。
AI.result: 在SUN RGB-D和NYU Depth V2数据集上取得当时最先进的分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: 融合全局特征与分割语义特征能有效提升室内场景分类性能，验证了多模态特征融合的优越性。

authors_text: Chenlin Zhou,Peng Wang,Wei Wei,Guangyun Xu,Fuyu Li,Jia Sun
title: Learning Tri-mode Grasping for Ambidextrous Robot Picking
title_zh: 学习三模式抓取以实现灵巧的机器人拾取
abstract: Object picking in cluttered scenes is a widely investigated field of robot manipulation, however, ambidextrous robot picking is still an important and challenging issue. We found the fusion of different prehensile actions (grasp and suction) can expand the range of objects that can be picked by robot, and the fusion of prehensile action and nonprehensile action (push) can expand the picking space of ambidextrous robot. In this paper, we propose a Push-Grasp-Suction (PGS) tri-mode grasping learning network for ambidextrous robot picking through the fusion of different prehensile actions and the fusion of prehensile action and nonprehensile aciton. The prehensile branch of PGS takes point clouds as input, and the 6-DoF picking configuration of grasp and suction in cluttered scenes are generated by multi-task point cloud learning. The nonprehensile branch with depth image input generates instance segmentation map and push configuration, cooperating with the prehensile actions to complete the picking of objects out of single-arm space. PGS generalizes well in real scene and achieves state-of-the-art picking performance.
summary: Object picking in cluttered scenes is a widely investigated field of robot manipulation, however, ambidextrous robot picking is still an important and challenging issue. We found the fusion of different prehensile actions (grasp and suction) can expand the range of objects that can be picked by robot, and the fusion of prehensile action and nonprehensile action (push) can expand the picking space of ambidextrous robot. In this paper, we propose a Push-Grasp-Suction (PGS) tri-mode grasping learning network for ambidextrous robot picking through the fusion of different prehensile actions and the fusion of prehensile action and nonprehensile aciton. The prehensile branch of PGS takes point clouds as input, and the 6-DoF picking configuration of grasp and suction in cluttered scenes are generated by multi-task point cloud learning. The nonprehensile branch with depth image input generates instance segmentation map and push configuration, cooperating with the prehensile actions to complete the picking of objects out of single-arm space. PGS generalizes well in real scene and achieves state-of-the-art picking performance.
abstract_zh: 杂乱场景中的物体拾取是机器人操纵的一个广泛研究的领域，然而，灵巧的机器人拾取仍然是一个重要且具有挑战性的问题。我们发现不同抓取动作（抓取和吸力）的融合可以扩大机器人可以拾取的物体范围，而抓取动作和非抓取动作（推）的融合可以扩大双手机器人的拾取空间。在本文中，我们通过不同抓取动作的融合以及抓取动作和非抓取动作的融合，提出了一种用于双手机器人拾取的推-抓-吸（PGS）三模式抓取学习网络。 PGS的抓握分支以点云为输入，通过多任务点云学习生成杂乱场景中抓握和吸力的6-DoF拾取配置。具有深度图像输入的非抓取分支生成实例分割图和推送配置，配合抓取动作完成单臂空间中的物体拾取。 PGS 在实际场景中具有良好的泛化能力，并实现了最先进的拣选性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种融合抓取、吸盘和推挤三种模式的机器人抓取学习网络，用于解决复杂场景下的双臂机器人抓取问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在杂乱场景中抓取物体时存在局限性，单一机械臂难以覆盖所有物体类型，且缺乏对非抓取动作的有效利用。
AI.method: 设计Push-Grasp-Suction (PGS)三模态网络，包含基于点云的抓取/吸盘分支和基于深度图像的推挤分支，通过多任务学习生成六自由度抓取配置及推挤策略。
AI.result: 在真实场景中表现出色，实现了当前最先进的抓取性能，能够有效扩展机器人抓取物体的种类和操作空间。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合多模态操作策略，该方法显著提升了双臂机器人在复杂环境中的抓取能力，为机器人操作提供了新思路。

search_text: Learning Tri-mode Grasping for Ambidextrous Robot Picking 学习三模式抓取以实现灵巧的机器人拾取 Object picking in cluttered scenes is a widely investigated field of robot manipulation, however, ambidextrous robot picking is still an important and challenging issue. We found the fusion of different prehensile actions (grasp and suction) can expand the range of objects that can be picked by robot, and the fusion of prehensile action and nonprehensile action (push) can expand the picking space of ambidextrous robot. In this paper, we propose a Push-Grasp-Suction (PGS) tri-mode grasping learning network for ambidextrous robot picking through the fusion of different prehensile actions and the fusion of prehensile action and nonprehensile aciton. The prehensile branch of PGS takes point clouds as input, and the 6-DoF picking configuration of grasp and suction in cluttered scenes are generated by multi-task point cloud learning. The nonprehensile branch with depth image input generates instance segmentation map and push configuration, cooperating with the prehensile actions to complete the picking of objects out of single-arm space. PGS generalizes well in real scene and achieves state-of-the-art picking performance. 杂乱场景中的物体拾取是机器人操纵的一个广泛研究的领域，然而，灵巧的机器人拾取仍然是一个重要且具有挑战性的问题。我们发现不同抓取动作（抓取和吸力）的融合可以扩大机器人可以拾取的物体范围，而抓取动作和非抓取动作（推）的融合可以扩大双手机器人的拾取空间。在本文中，我们通过不同抓取动作的融合以及抓取动作和非抓取动作的融合，提出了一种用于双手机器人拾取的推-抓-吸（PGS）三模式抓取学习网络。 PGS的抓握分支以点云为输入，通过多任务点云学习生成杂乱场景中抓握和吸力的6-DoF拾取配置。具有深度图像输入的非抓取分支生成实例分割图和推送配置，配合抓取动作完成单臂空间中的物体拾取。 PGS 在实际场景中具有良好的泛化能力，并实现了最先进的拣选性能。 本文提出一种融合抓取、吸盘和推挤三种模式的机器人抓取学习网络，用于解决复杂场景下的双臂机器人抓取问题。 Chenlin Zhou,Peng Wang,Wei Wei,Guangyun Xu,Fuyu Li,Jia Sun cs.RO

title: Deep Orthogonal Hypersphere Compression for Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 用于异常检测的深度正交超球面压缩
abstract: Many well-known and effective anomaly detection methods assume that a reasonable decision boundary has a hypersphere shape, which however is difficult to obtain in practice and is not sufficiently compact, especially when the data are in high-dimensional spaces. In this paper, we first propose a novel deep anomaly detection model that improves the original hypersphere learning through an orthogonal projection layer, which ensures that the training data distribution is consistent with the hypersphere hypothesis, thereby increasing the true positive rate and decreasing the false negative rate. Moreover, we propose a bi-hypersphere compression method to obtain a hyperspherical shell that yields a more compact decision region than a hyperball, which is demonstrated theoretically and numerically. The proposed methods are not confined to common datasets such as image and tabular data, but are also extended to a more challenging but promising scenario, graph-level anomaly detection, which learns graph representation with maximum mutual information between the substructure and global structure features while exploring orthogonal single- or bi-hypersphere anomaly decision boundaries. The numerical and visualization results on benchmark datasets demonstrate the superiority of our methods in comparison to many baselines and state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Many well-known and effective anomaly detection methods assume that a reasonable decision boundary has a hypersphere shape, which however is difficult to obtain in practice and is not sufficiently compact, especially when the data are in high-dimensional spaces. In this paper, we first propose a novel deep anomaly detection model that improves the original hypersphere learning through an orthogonal projection layer, which ensures that the training data distribution is consistent with the hypersphere hypothesis, thereby increasing the true positive rate and decreasing the false negative rate. Moreover, we propose a bi-hypersphere compression method to obtain a hyperspherical shell that yields a more compact decision region than a hyperball, which is demonstrated theoretically and numerically. The proposed methods are not confined to common datasets such as image and tabular data, but are also extended to a more challenging but promising scenario, graph-level anomaly detection, which learns graph representation with maximum mutual information between the substructure and global structure features while exploring orthogonal single- or bi-hypersphere anomaly decision boundaries. The numerical and visualization results on benchmark datasets demonstrate the superiority of our methods in comparison to many baselines and state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 许多众所周知且有效的异常检测方法都假设合理的决策边界具有超球面形状，但这在实践中很难获得并且不够紧凑，特别是当数据位于高维空间时。在本文中，我们首先提出了一种新颖的深度异常检测模型，该模型通过正交投影层改进了原始超球面学习，确保训练数据分布与超球面假设一致，从而提高真阳性率并降低假阴性率。此外，我们提出了一种双超球压缩方法来获得超球壳，该方法产生比超球更紧凑的决策区域，这在理论上和数值上得到了证明。所提出的方法不仅限于图像和表格数据等常见数据集，还扩展到更具挑战性但有前途的场景，即图级异常检测，它在探索正交单超球或双超球异常决策边界的同时，学习子结构和全局结构特征之间最大互信息的图表示。基准数据集上的数值和可视化结果证明了我们的方法与许多基线和最先进的方法相比的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度正交超球面压缩的异常检测方法，旨在改进高维空间中传统超球面学习的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统异常检测方法假设决策边界为超球面形状，但在高维空间中难以实现且不够紧凑，因此需要一种更有效的方法来提高检测性能。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种正交投影层来改进原始超球面学习，并引入了双超球面压缩方法，以获得比超球体更紧凑的决策区域，同时该方法还扩展到图级别的异常检测。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上的数值和可视化结果表明，所提出的方法优于许多基线和最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过正交投影和双超球面压缩有效提升了异常检测性能，适用于多种数据类型，包括图像、表格和图数据。

authors_text: Miguel Ortega-Martín,Óscar García-Sierra,Alfonso Ardoiz,Jorge Álvarez,Juan Carlos Armenteros,Adrián Alonso
title: Linguistic ambiguity analysis in ChatGPT
title_zh: ChatGPT 中的语言歧义分析
abstract: Linguistic ambiguity is and has always been one of the main challenges in Natural Language Processing (NLP) systems. Modern Transformer architectures like BERT, T5 or more recently InstructGPT have achieved some impressive improvements in many NLP fields, but there is still plenty of work to do. Motivated by the uproar caused by ChatGPT, in this paper we provide an introduction to linguistic ambiguity, its varieties and their relevance in modern NLP, and perform an extensive empiric analysis. ChatGPT strengths and weaknesses are revealed, as well as strategies to get the most of this model.
summary: Linguistic ambiguity is and has always been one of the main challenges in Natural Language Processing (NLP) systems. Modern Transformer architectures like BERT, T5 or more recently InstructGPT have achieved some impressive improvements in many NLP fields, but there is still plenty of work to do. Motivated by the uproar caused by ChatGPT, in this paper we provide an introduction to linguistic ambiguity, its varieties and their relevance in modern NLP, and perform an extensive empiric analysis. ChatGPT strengths and weaknesses are revealed, as well as strategies to get the most of this model.
abstract_zh: 语言歧义一直是自然语言处理（NLP）系统的主要挑战之一。现代 Transformer 架构（例如 BERT、T5 或最近的 InstructGPT）在许多 NLP 领域取得了一些令人印象深刻的改进，但仍有大量工作要做。受 ChatGPT 引起的轩然大波的推动，在本文中，我们介绍了语言歧义、其种类及其在现代 NLP 中的相关性，并进行了广泛的经验分析。揭示了 ChatGPT 的优点和缺点，以及充分利用该模型的策略。

AI.tldr: 分析ChatGPT在处理语言歧义方面的表现及策略
AI.motivation: 探讨现代NLP模型在处理语言歧义中的挑战，并评估ChatGPT的表现
AI.method: 通过实证分析方法，评估ChatGPT在处理不同种类语言歧义时的表现
AI.result: 揭示了ChatGPT在处理语言歧义中的优势与不足，并提出了优化使用策略
AI.conclusion: 现代NLP模型在处理语言歧义上仍有改进空间，ChatGPT在特定场景下表现优异，但需结合具体任务优化使用策略

title: AV-data2vec: Self-supervised Learning of Audio-Visual Speech Representations with Contextualized Target Representations
title_zh: AV-data2vec：具有上下文目标表示的视听语音表示的自监督学习
abstract: Self-supervision has shown great potential for audio-visual speech recognition by vastly reducing the amount of labeled data required to build good systems. However, existing methods are either not entirely end-to-end or do not train joint representations of both modalities. In this paper, we introduce AV-data2vec which addresses these challenges and builds audio-visual representations based on predicting contextualized representations which has been successful in the uni-modal case. The model uses a shared transformer encoder for both audio and video and can combine both modalities to improve speech recognition. Results on LRS3 show that AV-data2vec consistently outperforms existing methods under all settings with the same amount of data and model size.
summary: Self-supervision has shown great potential for audio-visual speech recognition by vastly reducing the amount of labeled data required to build good systems. However, existing methods are either not entirely end-to-end or do not train joint representations of both modalities. In this paper, we introduce AV-data2vec which addresses these challenges and builds audio-visual representations based on predicting contextualized representations which has been successful in the uni-modal case. The model uses a shared transformer encoder for both audio and video and can combine both modalities to improve speech recognition. Results on LRS3 show that AV-data2vec consistently outperforms existing methods under all settings with the same amount of data and model size.
abstract_zh: 通过大大减少构建良好系统所需的标记数据量，自我监督在视听语音识别方面显示出了巨大的潜力。然而，现有的方法要么不完全是端到端的，要么不训练两种模式的联合表示。在本文中，我们介绍了 AV-data2vec，它解决了这些挑战，并基于预测上下文表示构建视听表示，该表示在单模态情况下取得了成功。该模型对音频和视频使用共享变压器编码器，并且可以结合这两种模式来改进语音识别。 LRS3 的结果表明，在具有相同数据量和模型大小的所有设置下，AV-data2vec 始终优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AV-data2vec方法，通过自监督学习实现音频-视觉语音表示的联合建模，解决现有方法在端到端性和多模态联合表示上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有音频-视觉语音识别方法存在非端到端或无法联合训练多模态表示的问题，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 采用共享Transformer编码器处理音频和视频模态，通过预测上下文化目标表示进行自监督学习，结合多模态信息提升语音识别。
AI.result: 在LRS3数据集上，AV-data2vec在相同数据量和模型规模下持续优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: AV-data2vec通过上下文化目标表示和多模态联合训练，有效提升了音频-视觉语音识别性能。

conclusion: AV-data2vec通过上下文化目标表示和多模态联合训练，有效提升了音频-视觉语音识别性能。
search_text: AV-data2vec: Self-supervised Learning of Audio-Visual Speech Representations with Contextualized Target Representations AV-data2vec：具有上下文目标表示的视听语音表示的自监督学习 Self-supervision has shown great potential for audio-visual speech recognition by vastly reducing the amount of labeled data required to build good systems. However, existing methods are either not entirely end-to-end or do not train joint representations of both modalities. In this paper, we introduce AV-data2vec which addresses these challenges and builds audio-visual representations based on predicting contextualized representations which has been successful in the uni-modal case. The model uses a shared transformer encoder for both audio and video and can combine both modalities to improve speech recognition. Results on LRS3 show that AV-data2vec consistently outperforms existing methods under all settings with the same amount of data and model size. 通过大大减少构建良好系统所需的标记数据量，自我监督在视听语音识别方面显示出了巨大的潜力。然而，现有的方法要么不完全是端到端的，要么不训练两种模式的联合表示。在本文中，我们介绍了 AV-data2vec，它解决了这些挑战，并基于预测上下文表示构建视听表示，该表示在单模态情况下取得了成功。该模型对音频和视频使用共享变压器编码器，并且可以结合这两种模式来改进语音识别。 LRS3 的结果表明，在具有相同数据量和模型大小的所有设置下，AV-data2vec 始终优于现有方法。 本文提出AV-data2vec方法，通过自监督学习实现音频-视觉语音表示的联合建模，解决现有方法在端到端性和多模态联合表示上的不足。 Jiachen Lian,Alexei Baevski,Wei-Ning Hsu,Michael Auli eess.AS,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Patrick Bowen,Guy Regev,Nir Regev,Bruno Pedroni,Edward Hanson,Yiran Chen
title: Analog, In-memory Compute Architectures for Artificial Intelligence
title_zh: 适用于人工智能的模拟内存计算架构
abstract: This paper presents an analysis of the fundamental limits on energy efficiency in both digital and analog in-memory computing architectures, and compares their performance to single instruction, single data (scalar) machines specifically in the context of machine inference. The focus of the analysis is on how efficiency scales with the size, arithmetic intensity, and bit precision of the computation to be performed. It is shown that analog, in-memory computing architectures can approach arbitrarily high energy efficiency as both the problem size and processor size scales.
summary: This paper presents an analysis of the fundamental limits on energy efficiency in both digital and analog in-memory computing architectures, and compares their performance to single instruction, single data (scalar) machines specifically in the context of machine inference. The focus of the analysis is on how efficiency scales with the size, arithmetic intensity, and bit precision of the computation to be performed. It is shown that analog, in-memory computing architectures can approach arbitrarily high energy efficiency as both the problem size and processor size scales.
abstract_zh: 本文分析了数字和模拟内存计算架构中能源效率的基本限制，并将其性能与单指令、单数据（标量）机器（特别是在机器推理的背景下）进行了比较。 The focus of the analysis is on how efficiency scales with the size, arithmetic intensity, and bit precision of the computation to be performed.结果表明，随着问题规模和处理器规模的扩大，模拟内存计算架构可以达到任意高的能源效率。

AI.tldr: 分析数字和模拟内存计算架构在人工智能中的能效限制，并比较其在机器推理中的性能。
AI.motivation: 提升人工智能计算的能效，特别是在大规模机器推理任务中，通过比较不同计算架构的效率。
AI.method: 通过理论分析比较数字和模拟内存计算架构的能效，结合问题规模、算术强度和位精度等因素进行性能评估。
AI.result: 模拟内存计算架构在规模扩大时能实现接近任意高的能源效率，优于数字架构和标量机器。
AI.conclusion: 模拟内存计算架构在大规模AI计算中具有显著能效优势，为未来高效计算架构设计提供方向。
