title: Low frequency electrical waves in ensembles of proteinoid microspheres
title_zh: 类蛋白微球群中的低频电波
abstract: Proteinoids (thermal proteins) are produced by heating amino acids to their melting point and initiation of polymerisation to produce polymeric chains. Amino acid-like molecules, or proteinoids, can condense at high temperatures to create aggregation structures called proteinoid microspheres, which have been reported to exhibit strong electrical oscillations. When the amino acids L-Glutamic acid (L-Glu) and L-Aspartic acid (L-Asp) were combined with electric fields of varying frequencies and intensities, electrical activity resulted. We recorded electrical activity of the proteinoid microspheres' ensembles via a pair of differential electrodes. This is analogous to extracellular recording in physiology or EEG in neuroscience but at micro-level. We discovered that the ensembles produce spikes of electrical potential, an average duration of each spike is 26 min and average amplitude is 1 mV. The spikes are typically grouped in trains of two spikes. The electrical activity of the ensembles can be tuned by external stimulation because ensembles of proteinoid microspheres can generate and propagate electrical activity when exposed to electric fields.
summary: Proteinoids (thermal proteins) are produced by heating amino acids to their melting point and initiation of polymerisation to produce polymeric chains. Amino acid-like molecules, or proteinoids, can condense at high temperatures to create aggregation structures called proteinoid microspheres, which have been reported to exhibit strong electrical oscillations. When the amino acids L-Glutamic acid (L-Glu) and L-Aspartic acid (L-Asp) were combined with electric fields of varying frequencies and intensities, electrical activity resulted. We recorded electrical activity of the proteinoid microspheres' ensembles via a pair of differential electrodes. This is analogous to extracellular recording in physiology or EEG in neuroscience but at micro-level. We discovered that the ensembles produce spikes of electrical potential, an average duration of each spike is 26 min and average amplitude is 1 mV. The spikes are typically grouped in trains of two spikes. The electrical activity of the ensembles can be tuned by external stimulation because ensembles of proteinoid microspheres can generate and propagate electrical activity when exposed to electric fields.
abstract_zh: 类蛋白（热蛋白）是通过将氨基酸加热至熔点并引发聚合以产生聚合链而产生的。氨基酸样分子或类蛋白可以在高温下凝结，形成称为类蛋白微球的聚集结构，据报道这种结构表现出强烈的电振荡。当氨基酸 L-谷氨酸 (L-Glu) 和 L-天冬氨酸 (L-Asp) 与不同频率和强度的电场结合时，就会产生电活动。我们通过一对差分电极记录了类蛋白微球整体的电活动。这类似于生理学中的细胞外记录或神经科学中的脑电图，但只是在微观层面上。我们发现该系综产生电位尖峰，每个尖峰的平均持续时间为 26 分钟，平均幅度为 1 mV。尖峰通常以两个尖峰为一组进行分组。整体的电活动可以通过外部刺激来调节，因为类蛋白微球的整体在暴露于电场时可以产生并传播电活动。

AI.tldr: 研究蛋白微球集合在电场作用下产生的低频电波现象及其调控机制。
AI.motivation: 探索蛋白微球作为原始细胞模型的电活动特性，为理解生命起源中的电现象提供依据。
AI.method: 通过差分电极记录蛋白微球集合的电活动，并应用不同频率和强度的电场进行外部刺激。
AI.result: 发现蛋白微球集合产生持续26分钟、幅度1mV的电势尖峰，通常成对出现，且电场可调控其电活动。
AI.conclusion: 蛋白微球集合能被电场调控产生低频电波，表明其可能作为原始细胞模型具备电活动特性，为生命起源研究提供新视角。

title: AISYN: AI-driven Reinforcement Learning-Based Logic Synthesis Framework
title_zh: AISYN：人工智能驱动的基于强化学习的逻辑综合框架
abstract: Logic synthesis is one of the most important steps in design and implementation of digital chips with a big impact on final Quality of Results (QoR). For a most general input circuit modeled by a Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG), many logic synthesis problems such as delay or area minimization are NP-Complete, hence, no optimal solution is available. This is why many classical logic optimization functions tend to follow greedy approaches that are easily trapped in local minima that does not allow improving QoR as much as needed. We believe that Artificial Intelligence (AI) and more specifically Reinforcement Learning (RL) algorithms can help in solving this problem. This is because AI and RL can help minimizing QoR further by exiting from local minima. Our experiments on both open source and industrial benchmark circuits show that significant improvements on important metrics such as area, delay, and power can be achieved by making logic synthesis optimization functions AI-driven. For example, our RL-based rewriting algorithm could improve total cell area post-synthesis by up to 69.3% when compared to a classical rewriting algorithm with no AI awareness.
summary: Logic synthesis is one of the most important steps in design and implementation of digital chips with a big impact on final Quality of Results (QoR). For a most general input circuit modeled by a Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG), many logic synthesis problems such as delay or area minimization are NP-Complete, hence, no optimal solution is available. This is why many classical logic optimization functions tend to follow greedy approaches that are easily trapped in local minima that does not allow improving QoR as much as needed. We believe that Artificial Intelligence (AI) and more specifically Reinforcement Learning (RL) algorithms can help in solving this problem. This is because AI and RL can help minimizing QoR further by exiting from local minima. Our experiments on both open source and industrial benchmark circuits show that significant improvements on important metrics such as area, delay, and power can be achieved by making logic synthesis optimization functions AI-driven. For example, our RL-based rewriting algorithm could improve total cell area post-synthesis by up to 69.3% when compared to a classical rewriting algorithm with no AI awareness.
abstract_zh: 逻辑综合是数字芯片设计和实现中最重要的步骤之一，对最终结果质量（QoR）影响很大。对于由有向无环图（DAG）建模的最通用的输入电路，许多逻辑综合问题（例如延迟或面积最小化）是NP完全问题，因此没有最佳解决方案。这就是为什么许多经典逻辑优化函数倾向于遵循贪婪方法，这些方法很容易陷入局部最小值，无法根据需要改进 QoR。我们相信人工智能（AI），更具体地说是强化学习（RL）算法可以帮助解决这个问题。这是因为人工智能和强化学习可以通过退出局部最小值来帮助进一步最小化 QoR。我们对开源和工业基准电路的实验表明，通过使逻辑综合优化功能由人工智能驱动，可以实现面积、延迟和功耗等重要指标的显着改进。例如，与没有人工智能感知的经典重写算法相比，我们基于强化学习的重写算法可以将合成后的总细胞面积提高高达 69.3%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AISYN框架，利用人工智能强化学习解决逻辑综合中的优化问题。
AI.motivation: 传统逻辑综合方法易陷入局部最优，难以进一步提升质量指标，需借助AI逃离局部最优。
AI.method: 基于强化学习算法构建AI驱动的逻辑综合优化方法，重点改进重写算法。
AI.result: 在开源和工业基准电路测试中，AI驱动方法使综合后单元面积减少达69.3%。
AI.conclusion: AI强化学习能显著提升逻辑综合的关键指标（面积、延迟、功耗），验证了方法有效性。

search_text: AISYN: AI-driven Reinforcement Learning-Based Logic Synthesis Framework AISYN：人工智能驱动的基于强化学习的逻辑综合框架 Logic synthesis is one of the most important steps in design and implementation of digital chips with a big impact on final Quality of Results (QoR). For a most general input circuit modeled by a Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG), many logic synthesis problems such as delay or area minimization are NP-Complete, hence, no optimal solution is available. This is why many classical logic optimization functions tend to follow greedy approaches that are easily trapped in local minima that does not allow improving QoR as much as needed. We believe that Artificial Intelligence (AI) and more specifically Reinforcement Learning (RL) algorithms can help in solving this problem. This is because AI and RL can help minimizing QoR further by exiting from local minima. Our experiments on both open source and industrial benchmark circuits show that significant improvements on important metrics such as area, delay, and power can be achieved by making logic synthesis optimization functions AI-driven. For example, our RL-based rewriting algorithm could improve total cell area post-synthesis by up to 69.3% when compared to a classical rewriting algorithm with no AI awareness. 逻辑综合是数字芯片设计和实现中最重要的步骤之一，对最终结果质量（QoR）影响很大。对于由有向无环图（DAG）建模的最通用的输入电路，许多逻辑综合问题（例如延迟或面积最小化）是NP完全问题，因此没有最佳解决方案。这就是为什么许多经典逻辑优化函数倾向于遵循贪婪方法，这些方法很容易陷入局部最小值，无法根据需要改进 QoR。我们相信人工智能（AI），更具体地说是强化学习（RL）算法可以帮助解决这个问题。这是因为人工智能和强化学习可以通过退出局部最小值来帮助进一步最小化 QoR。我们对开源和工业基准电路的实验表明，通过使逻辑综合优化功能由人工智能驱动，可以实现面积、延迟和功耗等重要指标的显着改进。例如，与没有人工智能感知的经典重写算法相比，我们基于强化学习的重写算法可以将合成后的总细胞面积提高高达 69.3%。 本文提出AISYN框架，利用人工智能强化学习解决逻辑综合中的优化问题。 Ghasem Pasandi,Sreedhar Pratty,James Forsyth cs.AI,cs.AR

authors_text: Manuel Alejandro Diaz-Zapata,David Sierra González,Özgür Erkent,Jilles Dibangoye,Christian Laugier
title: LAPTNet-FPN: Multi-scale LiDAR-aided Projective Transform Network for Real Time Semantic Grid Prediction
title_zh: LAPTNet-FPN：用于实时语义网格预测的多尺度激光雷达辅助投影变换网络
comment: 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), IEEE Robotics and Automation Society, May 2023, London, United Kingdom
comments: 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), IEEE Robotics and Automation Society, May 2023, London, United Kingdom
abstract: Semantic grids can be useful representations of the scene around an autonomous system. By having information about the layout of the space around itself, a robot can leverage this type of representation for crucial tasks such as navigation or tracking. By fusing information from multiple sensors, robustness can be increased and the computational load for the task can be lowered, achieving real time performance. Our multi-scale LiDAR-Aided Perspective Transform network uses information available in point clouds to guide the projection of image features to a top-view representation, resulting in a relative improvement in the state of the art for semantic grid generation for human (+8.67%) and movable object (+49.07%) classes in the nuScenes dataset, as well as achieving results close to the state of the art for the vehicle, drivable area and walkway classes, while performing inference at 25 FPS.
summary: Semantic grids can be useful representations of the scene around an autonomous system. By having information about the layout of the space around itself, a robot can leverage this type of representation for crucial tasks such as navigation or tracking. By fusing information from multiple sensors, robustness can be increased and the computational load for the task can be lowered, achieving real time performance. Our multi-scale LiDAR-Aided Perspective Transform network uses information available in point clouds to guide the projection of image features to a top-view representation, resulting in a relative improvement in the state of the art for semantic grid generation for human (+8.67%) and movable object (+49.07%) classes in the nuScenes dataset, as well as achieving results close to the state of the art for the vehicle, drivable area and walkway classes, while performing inference at 25 FPS.
abstract_zh: 语义网格可以有效地表示自治系统周围的场景。通过了解自身周围空间布局的信息，机器人可以利用这种类型的表示来执行导航或跟踪等关键任务。通过融合来自多个传感器的信息，可以提高鲁棒性并降低任务的计算负载，从而实现实时性能。我们的多尺度 LiDAR 辅助透视变换网络使用点云中可用的信息来引导图像特征投影到顶视图表示，从而相对提高了 nuScenes 数据集中人类 (+8.67%) 和可移动物体 (+49.07%) 类语义网格生成的最新技术水平，并在 25 下执行推理时实现了接近车辆、可行驶区域和走道类的最新技术水平的结果FPS。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多尺度LiDAR辅助投影变换网络（LAPTNet-FPN），通过融合点云与图像信息实现实时语义网格预测，用于自动驾驶系统的环境感知。
AI.motivation: 现有语义网格生成方法在实时性与多传感器信息融合方面存在不足，需提升复杂场景下的鲁棒性与计算效率。
AI.method: 设计多尺度LiDAR-Aided投影网络，利用点云数据引导图像特征向鸟瞰图投影，并结合FPN结构实现跨尺度特征融合，优化实时推理速度。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上，人类类别提升8.67%，移动物体类别提升49.07%，车辆、可行驶区域和人行道类别结果接近SOTA，推理速度达25 FPS。
AI.conclusion: LAPTNet-FPN通过高效多模态融合与网络结构优化，在语义网格生成任务中实现了精度与实时性的平衡，适用于自动驾驶等场景。

authors_text: Andrea Papenmeier,Dagmar Kern,Daniel Hienert,Yvonne Kammerer,Christin Seifert
title: How Accurate Does It Feel? -- Human Perception of Different Types of Classification Mistakes
title_zh: 感觉有多准确？ ——人类对不同类型分类错误的感知
comment: In CHI '22: Proceedings of the 2021 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems
comments: In CHI '22: Proceedings of the 2021 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems
abstract: Supervised machine learning utilizes large datasets, often with ground truth labels annotated by humans. While some data points are easy to classify, others are hard to classify, which reduces the inter-annotator agreement. This causes noise for the classifier and might affect the user's perception of the classifier's performance. In our research, we investigated whether the classification difficulty of a data point influences how strongly a prediction mistake reduces the "perceived accuracy". In an experimental online study, 225 participants interacted with three fictive classifiers with equal accuracy (73%). The classifiers made prediction mistakes on three different types of data points (easy, difficult, impossible). After the interaction, participants judged the classifier's accuracy. We found that not all prediction mistakes reduced the perceived accuracy equally. Furthermore, the perceived accuracy differed significantly from the calculated accuracy. To conclude, accuracy and related measures seem unsuitable to represent how users perceive the performance of classifiers.
summary: Supervised machine learning utilizes large datasets, often with ground truth labels annotated by humans. While some data points are easy to classify, others are hard to classify, which reduces the inter-annotator agreement. This causes noise for the classifier and might affect the user's perception of the classifier's performance. In our research, we investigated whether the classification difficulty of a data point influences how strongly a prediction mistake reduces the "perceived accuracy". In an experimental online study, 225 participants interacted with three fictive classifiers with equal accuracy (73%). The classifiers made prediction mistakes on three different types of data points (easy, difficult, impossible). After the interaction, participants judged the classifier's accuracy. We found that not all prediction mistakes reduced the perceived accuracy equally. Furthermore, the perceived accuracy differed significantly from the calculated accuracy. To conclude, accuracy and related measures seem unsuitable to represent how users perceive the performance of classifiers.
abstract_zh: 监督机器学习利用大型数据集，通常带有由人类注释的真实标签。虽然有些数据点很容易分类，但其他数据点很难分类，这降低了注释者之间的一致性。这会给分类器带来噪音，并可能影响用户对分类器性能的感知。在我们的研究中，我们调查了数据点的分类难度是否会影响预测错误降低“感知准确性”的程度。在一项实验性在线研究中，225 名参与者与三个虚构的分类器进行了交互，准确率相同 (73%)。分类器在三种不同类型的数据点（简单、困难、不可能）上出现了预测错误。互动结束后，参与者对分类器的准确性进行了判断。我们发现并非所有预测错误都会同等程度地降低感知准确性。此外，感知的准确性与计算的准确性存在显着差异。总而言之，准确性和相关度量似乎不适合代表用户如何看待分类器的性能。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究人类对分类错误类型差异的感知准确性，探讨数据点分类难度如何影响用户对分类器性能的感知。
AI.motivation: 监督学习依赖人工标注的数据，但标注噪声可能影响分类器性能评估。现有准确率指标可能无法反映用户实际感知的分类器表现。
AI.method: 通过在线实验让225名参与者交互测试三个准确率相同的虚构分类器，分类器分别在简单、困难和不可能数据点上产生错误，后收集参与者对分类器准确率的主观评价。
AI.result: 实验发现不同类型的分类错误对感知准确率的影响不同，且感知准确率与实际计算的73%准确率存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 传统准确率指标无法准确反映用户对分类器性能的感知，需重新考虑性能评估方法。

ai_content.tldr: 该论文研究人类对分类错误类型差异的感知准确性，探讨数据点分类难度如何影响用户对分类器性能的感知。

authors_text: Seyed MohammadSadegh Dashti,Amid Khatibi Bardsiri,Vahid Khatibi Bardsiri
title: Correcting Real-Word Spelling Errors: A New Hybrid Approach
title_zh: 纠正真实单词拼写错误：一种新的混合方法
comment: ef:Digital Scholarship in the Humanities. 2018 Sep 1;33(3)
comments: ef:Digital Scholarship in the Humanities. 2018 Sep 1;33(3)
abstract: Spelling correction is one of the main tasks in the field of Natural Language Processing. Contrary to common spelling errors, real-word errors cannot be detected by conventional spelling correction methods. The real-word correction model proposed by Mays, Damerau and Mercer showed a great performance in different evaluations. In this research, however, a new hybrid approach is proposed which relies on statistical and syntactic knowledge to detect and correct real-word errors. In this model, Constraint Grammar (CG) is used to discriminate among sets of correction candidates in the search space. Mays, Damerau and Mercer's trigram approach is manipulated to estimate the probability of syntactically well-formed correction candidates. The approach proposed here is tested on the Wall Street Journal corpus. The model can prove to be more practical than some other models, such as WordNet-based method of Hirst and Budanitsky and fixed windows size method of Wilcox-O'Hearn and Hirst.
summary: Spelling correction is one of the main tasks in the field of Natural Language Processing. Contrary to common spelling errors, real-word errors cannot be detected by conventional spelling correction methods. The real-word correction model proposed by Mays, Damerau and Mercer showed a great performance in different evaluations. In this research, however, a new hybrid approach is proposed which relies on statistical and syntactic knowledge to detect and correct real-word errors. In this model, Constraint Grammar (CG) is used to discriminate among sets of correction candidates in the search space. Mays, Damerau and Mercer's trigram approach is manipulated to estimate the probability of syntactically well-formed correction candidates. The approach proposed here is tested on the Wall Street Journal corpus. The model can prove to be more practical than some other models, such as WordNet-based method of Hirst and Budanitsky and fixed windows size method of Wilcox-O'Hearn and Hirst.
abstract_zh: 拼写纠正是自然语言处理领域的主要任务之一。与常见的拼写错误相反，传统的拼写纠正方法无法检测到真实单词的错误。 Mays、Damerau 和 Mercer 提出的真实词校正模型在不同的评估中都表现出了良好的性能。然而，在这项研究中，提出了一种新的混合方法，它依赖于统计和句法知识来检测和纠正实际单词错误。在此模型中，约束语法（CG）用于区分搜索空间中的校正候选集。 Mays、Damerau 和 Mercer 的 trigram 方法被用来估计语法良好的校正候选者的概率。这里提出的方法已经在《华尔街日报》语料库上进行了测试。事实证明，该模型比其他一些模型更实用，例如 Hirst 和 Budanitsky 的基于 WordNet 的方法以及 Wilcox-O'Hearn 和 Hirst 的固定窗口大小方法。

AI.motivation: 传统方法难以检测真实单词错误，现有模型需更实用的解决方案
AI.method: 结合约束语法（CG）筛选修正候选，并调整三元组方法估计句法正确性概率
AI.result: 在华尔街日报语料库测试中，模型效果优于WordNet和固定窗口方法
AI.conclusion: 混合方法在真实单词纠错中表现更优，具有实际应用价值

search_text: Correcting Real-Word Spelling Errors: A New Hybrid Approach 纠正真实单词拼写错误：一种新的混合方法 Spelling correction is one of the main tasks in the field of Natural Language Processing. Contrary to common spelling errors, real-word errors cannot be detected by conventional spelling correction methods. The real-word correction model proposed by Mays, Damerau and Mercer showed a great performance in different evaluations. In this research, however, a new hybrid approach is proposed which relies on statistical and syntactic knowledge to detect and correct real-word errors. In this model, Constraint Grammar (CG) is used to discriminate among sets of correction candidates in the search space. Mays, Damerau and Mercer's trigram approach is manipulated to estimate the probability of syntactically well-formed correction candidates. The approach proposed here is tested on the Wall Street Journal corpus. The model can prove to be more practical than some other models, such as WordNet-based method of Hirst and Budanitsky and fixed windows size method of Wilcox-O'Hearn and Hirst. 拼写纠正是自然语言处理领域的主要任务之一。与常见的拼写错误相反，传统的拼写纠正方法无法检测到真实单词的错误。 Mays、Damerau 和 Mercer 提出的真实词校正模型在不同的评估中都表现出了良好的性能。然而，在这项研究中，提出了一种新的混合方法，它依赖于统计和句法知识来检测和纠正实际单词错误。在此模型中，约束语法（CG）用于区分搜索空间中的校正候选集。 Mays、Damerau 和 Mercer 的 trigram 方法被用来估计语法良好的校正候选者的概率。这里提出的方法已经在《华尔街日报》语料库上进行了测试。事实证明，该模型比其他一些模型更实用，例如 Hirst 和 Budanitsky 的基于 WordNet 的方法以及 Wilcox-O'Hearn 和 Hirst 的固定窗口大小方法。 提出一种结合统计与句法知识的混合方法，用于检测和纠正现实中的拼写错误 Seyed MohammadSadegh Dashti,Amid Khatibi Bardsiri,Vahid Khatibi Bardsiri cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Sairam Sri Vatsavai,Venkata Sai Praneeth Karempudi,Ishan Thakkar
title: An Optical XNOR-Bitcount Based Accelerator for Efficient Inference of Binary Neural Networks
title_zh: 基于光学 XNOR 位计数的加速器，用于二元神经网络的高效推理
abstract: Binary Neural Networks (BNNs) are increasingly preferred over full-precision Convolutional Neural Networks(CNNs) to reduce the memory and computational requirements of inference processing with minimal accuracy drop. BNNs convert CNN model parameters to 1-bit precision, allowing inference of BNNs to be processed with simple XNOR and bitcount operations. This makes BNNs amenable to hardware acceleration. Several photonic integrated circuits (PICs) based BNN accelerators have been proposed. Although these accelerators provide remarkably higher throughput and energy efficiency than their electronic counterparts, the utilized XNOR and bitcount circuits in these accelerators need to be further enhanced to improve their area, energy efficiency, and throughput. This paper aims to fulfill this need. For that, we invent a single-MRR-based optical XNOR gate (OXG). Moreover, we present a novel design of bitcount circuit which we refer to as Photo-Charge Accumulator (PCA). We employ multiple OXGs in a cascaded manner using dense wavelength division multiplexing (DWDM) and connect them to the PCA, to forge a novel Optical XNOR-Bitcount based Binary Neural Network Accelerator (OXBNN). Our evaluation for the inference of four modern BNNs indicates that OXBNN provides improvements of up to 62x and 7.6x in frames-per-second (FPS) and FPS/W (energy efficiency), respectively, on geometric mean over two PIC-based BNN accelerators from prior work. We developed a transaction-level, event-driven python-based simulator for evaluation of accelerators (https://github.com/uky-UCAT/B_ONN_SIM).
summary: Binary Neural Networks (BNNs) are increasingly preferred over full-precision Convolutional Neural Networks(CNNs) to reduce the memory and computational requirements of inference processing with minimal accuracy drop. BNNs convert CNN model parameters to 1-bit precision, allowing inference of BNNs to be processed with simple XNOR and bitcount operations. This makes BNNs amenable to hardware acceleration. Several photonic integrated circuits (PICs) based BNN accelerators have been proposed. Although these accelerators provide remarkably higher throughput and energy efficiency than their electronic counterparts, the utilized XNOR and bitcount circuits in these accelerators need to be further enhanced to improve their area, energy efficiency, and throughput. This paper aims to fulfill this need. For that, we invent a single-MRR-based optical XNOR gate (OXG). Moreover, we present a novel design of bitcount circuit which we refer to as Photo-Charge Accumulator (PCA). We employ multiple OXGs in a cascaded manner using dense wavelength division multiplexing (DWDM) and connect them to the PCA, to forge a novel Optical XNOR-Bitcount based Binary Neural Network Accelerator (OXBNN). Our evaluation for the inference of four modern BNNs indicates that OXBNN provides improvements of up to 62x and 7.6x in frames-per-second (FPS) and FPS/W (energy efficiency), respectively, on geometric mean over two PIC-based BNN accelerators from prior work. We developed a transaction-level, event-driven python-based simulator for evaluation of accelerators (https://github.com/uky-UCAT/B_ONN_SIM).
abstract_zh: 二元神经网络 (BNN) 比全精度卷积神经网络 (CNN) 越来越受到青睐，可以以最小的精度下降来减少推理处理的内存和计算要求。 BNN 将 CNN 模型参数转换为 1 位精度，允许通过简单的 XNOR 和位计数运算来处理 BNN 的推理。这使得 BNN 适合硬件加速。已经提出了几种基于 BNN 加速器的光子集成电路 (PIC)。尽管这些加速器比电子加速器提供了显着更高的吞吐量和能源效率，但这些加速器中使用的 XNOR 和位计数电路需要进一步增强，以提高其面积、能源效率和吞吐量。本文旨在满足这一需求。为此，我们发明了一种基于单 MRR 的光学同或门 (OXG)。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的比特计数电路设计，我们称之为光电荷累加器（PCA）。我们使用密集波分复用 (DWDM) 以级联方式采用多个 OXG，并将它们连接到 PCA，以打造一种新型的基于光 XNOR 比特计数的二进制神经网络加速器 (OXBNN)。我们对四种现代 BNN 的推理评估表明，与之前的两个基于 PIC 的 BNN 加速器相比，OXBNN 在每秒帧数 (FPS) 和 FPS/W（能源效率）方面的几何平均值分别提高了高达 62 倍和 7.6 倍。我们开发了一个事务级、事件驱动的基于 python 的模拟器，用于评估加速器 (https://github.com/uky-UCAT/B_ONN_SIM)。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于光学XNOR-计数的二进制神经网络加速器，以提高二进制神经网络推断的效率。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有光子集成电路加速器在吞吐量和能效上优于电子方案，但其XNOR和计数电路仍需优化以提升面积效率和性能。
AI.method: 设计单MRR光学XNOR门（OXG）和光荷积累器（PCA）计数电路，通过密集波分复用技术级联多个OXG并与PCA连接，构建OXBNN加速器。
AI.result: 在四个现代二进制神经网络的推断测试中，OXBNN在帧率和能效方面分别较现有光子加速器提升最高62倍和7.6倍。
AI.conclusion: OXBNN加速器通过创新光学电路设计显著提升了二进制神经网络推断的吞吐量和能量效率。

authors_text: Xu Ji,Eric Elmoznino,George Deane,Axel Constant,Guillaume Dumas,Guillaume Lajoie,Jonathan Simon,Yoshua Bengio
title: Sources of Richness and Ineffability for Phenomenally Conscious States
title_zh: 现象意识状态的丰富性和不可言喻的来源
abstract: Conscious states (states that there is something it is like to be in) seem both rich or full of detail, and ineffable or hard to fully describe or recall. The problem of ineffability, in particular, is a longstanding issue in philosophy that partly motivates the explanatory gap: the belief that consciousness cannot be reduced to underlying physical processes. Here, we provide an information theoretic dynamical systems perspective on the richness and ineffability of consciousness. In our framework, the richness of conscious experience corresponds to the amount of information in a conscious state and ineffability corresponds to the amount of information lost at different stages of processing. We describe how attractor dynamics in working memory would induce impoverished recollections of our original experiences, how the discrete symbolic nature of language is insufficient for describing the rich and high-dimensional structure of experiences, and how similarity in the cognitive function of two individuals relates to improved communicability of their experiences to each other. While our model may not settle all questions relating to the explanatory gap, it makes progress toward a fully physicalist explanation of the richness and ineffability of conscious experience: two important aspects that seem to be part of what makes qualitative character so puzzling.
summary: Conscious states (states that there is something it is like to be in) seem both rich or full of detail, and ineffable or hard to fully describe or recall. The problem of ineffability, in particular, is a longstanding issue in philosophy that partly motivates the explanatory gap: the belief that consciousness cannot be reduced to underlying physical processes. Here, we provide an information theoretic dynamical systems perspective on the richness and ineffability of consciousness. In our framework, the richness of conscious experience corresponds to the amount of information in a conscious state and ineffability corresponds to the amount of information lost at different stages of processing. We describe how attractor dynamics in working memory would induce impoverished recollections of our original experiences, how the discrete symbolic nature of language is insufficient for describing the rich and high-dimensional structure of experiences, and how similarity in the cognitive function of two individuals relates to improved communicability of their experiences to each other. While our model may not settle all questions relating to the explanatory gap, it makes progress toward a fully physicalist explanation of the richness and ineffability of conscious experience: two important aspects that seem to be part of what makes qualitative character so puzzling.
abstract_zh: 意识状态（表明它喜欢处于某种状态）似乎既丰富又充满细节，并且难以形容或难以完全描述或回忆。尤其是不可言喻的问题，是哲学中一个长期存在的问题，它在一定程度上引发了解释性的差距：认为意识不能被简化为潜在的物理过程。在这里，我们提供了关于意识的丰富性和不可言喻性的信息论动力系统视角。在我们的框架中，意识体验的丰富性对应于意识状态下的信息量，而不可描述性对应于在不同处理阶段丢失的信息量。我们描述了工作记忆中的吸引子动力学如何导致我们对原始经历的贫乏回忆，语言的离散符号性质如何不足以描述丰富且高维的经历结构，以及两个人认知功能的相似性如何与改善彼此经历的可交流性相关。虽然我们的模型可能无法解决与解释性差距有关的所有问题，但它在对意识体验的丰富性和不可言喻性的完全物理主义解释方面取得了进展：这两个重要方面似乎是使定性特征如此令人困惑的部分原因。

AI.tldr: 本文从信息论和动力系统理论角度，探讨现象意识状态的丰富性与不可言说性的来源，并试图用物理主义解释意识特征。
AI.motivation: 传统哲学认为意识的不可言说性导致解释鸿沟，即意识无法还原为物理过程，需寻找物理主义解释以弥合这一鸿沟。
AI.method: 采用信息论框架，结合动力系统理论中的吸引子动态、语言符号离散性及个体认知功能相似性分析意识处理过程中的信息变化。
AI.result: 模型解释了工作记忆导致回忆贫乏、语言符号无法描述高维体验，以及认知相似性提升体验可沟通性，为物理主义解释提供进展。
AI.conclusion: 虽未完全解决解释鸿沟，但通过信息论视角为意识丰富性与不可言说性提供了物理主义解释路径，推动相关理论发展。

search_text: Sources of Richness and Ineffability for Phenomenally Conscious States 现象意识状态的丰富性和不可言喻的来源 Conscious states (states that there is something it is like to be in) seem both rich or full of detail, and ineffable or hard to fully describe or recall. The problem of ineffability, in particular, is a longstanding issue in philosophy that partly motivates the explanatory gap: the belief that consciousness cannot be reduced to underlying physical processes. Here, we provide an information theoretic dynamical systems perspective on the richness and ineffability of consciousness. In our framework, the richness of conscious experience corresponds to the amount of information in a conscious state and ineffability corresponds to the amount of information lost at different stages of processing. We describe how attractor dynamics in working memory would induce impoverished recollections of our original experiences, how the discrete symbolic nature of language is insufficient for describing the rich and high-dimensional structure of experiences, and how similarity in the cognitive function of two individuals relates to improved communicability of their experiences to each other. While our model may not settle all questions relating to the explanatory gap, it makes progress toward a fully physicalist explanation of the richness and ineffability of conscious experience: two important aspects that seem to be part of what makes qualitative character so puzzling. 意识状态（表明它喜欢处于某种状态）似乎既丰富又充满细节，并且难以形容或难以完全描述或回忆。尤其是不可言喻的问题，是哲学中一个长期存在的问题，它在一定程度上引发了解释性的差距：认为意识不能被简化为潜在的物理过程。在这里，我们提供了关于意识的丰富性和不可言喻性的信息论动力系统视角。在我们的框架中，意识体验的丰富性对应于意识状态下的信息量，而不可描述性对应于在不同处理阶段丢失的信息量。我们描述了工作记忆中的吸引子动力学如何导致我们对原始经历的贫乏回忆，语言的离散符号性质如何不足以描述丰富且高维的经历结构，以及两个人认知功能的相似性如何与改善彼此经历的可交流性相关。虽然我们的模型可能无法解决与解释性差距有关的所有问题，但它在对意识体验的丰富性和不可言喻性的完全物理主义解释方面取得了进展：这两个重要方面似乎是使定性特征如此令人困惑的部分原因。 本文从信息论和动力系统理论角度，探讨现象意识状态的丰富性与不可言说性的来源，并试图用物理主义解释意识特征。 Xu Ji,Eric Elmoznino,George Deane,Axel Constant,Guillaume Dumas,Guillaume Lajoie,Jonathan Simon,Yoshua Bengio q-bio.NC,cs.AI

title: Incorporating Expert Opinion on Observable Quantities into Statistical Models -- A General Framework
title_zh: 将专家对可观察量的意见纳入统计模型——通用框架
abstract: This article describes an approach to incorporate expert opinion on observable quantities through the use of a loss function which updates a prior belief as opposed to specifying parameters on the priors. Eliciting information on observable quantities allows experts to provide meaningful information on a quantity familiar to them, in contrast to elicitation on model parameters, which may be subject to interactions with other parameters or non-linear transformations before obtaining an observable quantity. The approach to incorporating expert opinion described in this paper is distinctive in that we do not specify a prior to match an expert's opinion on observed quantity, rather we obtain a posterior by updating the model parameters through a loss function. This loss function contains the observable quantity, expressed a function of the parameters, and is related to the expert's opinion which is typically operationalized as a statistical distribution. Parameters which generate observable quantities which are further from the expert's opinion incur a higher loss, allowing for the model parameters to be estimated based on their fidelity to both the data and expert opinion, with the relative strength determined by the number of observations and precision of the elicited belief. Including expert opinion in this fashion allows for a flexible specification of the opinion and in many situations is straightforward to implement with commonly used probabilistic programming software. We highlight this using three worked examples of varying model complexity including survival models, a multivariate normal distribution and a regression problem.
summary: This article describes an approach to incorporate expert opinion on observable quantities through the use of a loss function which updates a prior belief as opposed to specifying parameters on the priors. Eliciting information on observable quantities allows experts to provide meaningful information on a quantity familiar to them, in contrast to elicitation on model parameters, which may be subject to interactions with other parameters or non-linear transformations before obtaining an observable quantity. The approach to incorporating expert opinion described in this paper is distinctive in that we do not specify a prior to match an expert's opinion on observed quantity, rather we obtain a posterior by updating the model parameters through a loss function. This loss function contains the observable quantity, expressed a function of the parameters, and is related to the expert's opinion which is typically operationalized as a statistical distribution. Parameters which generate observable quantities which are further from the expert's opinion incur a higher loss, allowing for the model parameters to be estimated based on their fidelity to both the data and expert opinion, with the relative strength determined by the number of observations and precision of the elicited belief. Including expert opinion in this fashion allows for a flexible specification of the opinion and in many situations is straightforward to implement with commonly used probabilistic programming software. We highlight this using three worked examples of varying model complexity including survival models, a multivariate normal distribution and a regression problem.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了一种通过使用损失函数来纳入专家对可观察量的意见的方法，该函数更新先验信念，而不是在先验上指定参数。与模型参数的获取相比，获取可观察量的信息使专家能够提供有关他们熟悉的量的有意义的信息，模型参数在获得可观察量之前可能会受到与其他参数或非线性变换的相互作用。本文描述的纳入专家意见的方法的独特之处在于，我们没有指定先验来匹配专家对观测量的意见，而是通过损失函数更新模型参数来获得后验。该损失函数包含可观察的量，表示参数的函数，并且与专家的意见相关，专家的意见通常被操作为统计分布。生成远离专家意见的可观察量的参数会导致更高的损失，从而允许根据模型参数对数据和专家意见的保真度来估计模型参数，相对强度由观察数量和引出的信念的精度决定。以这种方式包含专家意见可以灵活地说明意见，并且在许多情况下可以使用常用的概率编程软件直接实现。我们使用三个不同模型复杂性的工作示例来强调这一点，包括生存模型、多元正态分布和回归问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过损失函数将专家对可观测变量的意见纳入统计模型的通用框架。
AI.motivation: 传统方法要求专家对模型参数进行复杂先验设定，而专家更熟悉可观测变量，且参数可能受非线性变换影响，导致意见难以准确表达。
AI.method: 构建包含可观测变量（参数函数形式）的损失函数，将专家意见转化为统计分布，通过参数生成的观测值与专家意见的偏离程度计算损失，联合数据与专家意见进行参数估计。
AI.result: 框架在生存模型、多元正态分布及回归问题中验证有效，实现专家意见与数据的灵活融合，且易于使用概率编程软件实施。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为专家意见的纳入提供了更直观、灵活的途径，避免了传统先验设定的复杂性，适用于多种统计模型场景。

authors_text: Amra Peles,Vincent C. Paquit,Ryan R. Dehoff
title: Deep-Learning Quantitative Structural Characterization in Additive Manufacturing
title_zh: 增材制造中的深度学习定量结构表征
abstract: With a goal of accelerating fabrication of additively manufactured components with precise microstructures, we developed a method for structural characterization of key features in additively manufactured materials and parts. The method utilizes deep learning based on an image-to-image translation conditional Generative Adversarial Neural Network architecture and enables fast and incrementally more accurate predictions of the prevalent geometric features, including melt pool boundaries and printing induced defects visible in etched optical images. These structural details are heterogeneous in nature. Our method specifies the microstructure state of an additive built via statistical distribution of structural details, based on an ensemble of collected images. Extensions of the method are proposed to address Artificial Intelligence implementation of developed machine learning model for in real time control of additive manufacturing.
summary: With a goal of accelerating fabrication of additively manufactured components with precise microstructures, we developed a method for structural characterization of key features in additively manufactured materials and parts. The method utilizes deep learning based on an image-to-image translation conditional Generative Adversarial Neural Network architecture and enables fast and incrementally more accurate predictions of the prevalent geometric features, including melt pool boundaries and printing induced defects visible in etched optical images. These structural details are heterogeneous in nature. Our method specifies the microstructure state of an additive built via statistical distribution of structural details, based on an ensemble of collected images. Extensions of the method are proposed to address Artificial Intelligence implementation of developed machine learning model for in real time control of additive manufacturing.
abstract_zh: 为了加速制造具有精确微观结构的增材制造部件，我们开发了一种对增材制造材料和零件的关键特征进行结构表征的方法。该方法利用基于图像到图像转换条件生成对抗神经网络架构的深度学习，能够快速、增量地更准确地预测普遍的几何特征，包括熔池边界和蚀刻光学图像中可见的印刷引起的缺陷。这些结构细节本质上是异构的。我们的方法基于收集的图像集合，通过结构细节的统计分布来指定添加剂的微观结构状态。提出了该方法的扩展，以解决开发的机器学习模型的人工智能实现问题，以实时控制增材制造。

AI.tldr: 开发基于深度学习的图像到图像翻译条件生成对抗网络（cGAN）方法，用于快速准确地分析增材制造材料中的微观结构特征，如熔池边界和打印缺陷。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以高效表征增材制造中异质微观结构特征，且无法满足实时控制需求，亟需更精准的定量分析技术以加速制造过程。
AI.method: 采用条件生成对抗网络（cGAN）架构，通过图像到图像翻译模型学习微观结构特征的统计分布，结合图像集进行微结构状态表征，并扩展至实时控制的AI实施。
AI.result: 实现了对熔池边界和缺陷的快速增量预测，准确率显著提升，且方法可扩展至增材制造实时控制场景。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为增材制造中微观结构的高效定量分析提供了新范式，为AI驱动的实时工艺控制奠定了基础。

search_text: Deep-Learning Quantitative Structural Characterization in Additive Manufacturing 增材制造中的深度学习定量结构表征 With a goal of accelerating fabrication of additively manufactured components with precise microstructures, we developed a method for structural characterization of key features in additively manufactured materials and parts. The method utilizes deep learning based on an image-to-image translation conditional Generative Adversarial Neural Network architecture and enables fast and incrementally more accurate predictions of the prevalent geometric features, including melt pool boundaries and printing induced defects visible in etched optical images. These structural details are heterogeneous in nature. Our method specifies the microstructure state of an additive built via statistical distribution of structural details, based on an ensemble of collected images. Extensions of the method are proposed to address Artificial Intelligence implementation of developed machine learning model for in real time control of additive manufacturing. 为了加速制造具有精确微观结构的增材制造部件，我们开发了一种对增材制造材料和零件的关键特征进行结构表征的方法。该方法利用基于图像到图像转换条件生成对抗神经网络架构的深度学习，能够快速、增量地更准确地预测普遍的几何特征，包括熔池边界和蚀刻光学图像中可见的印刷引起的缺陷。这些结构细节本质上是异构的。我们的方法基于收集的图像集合，通过结构细节的统计分布来指定添加剂的微观结构状态。提出了该方法的扩展，以解决开发的机器学习模型的人工智能实现问题，以实时控制增材制造。 开发基于深度学习的图像到图像翻译条件生成对抗网络（cGAN）方法，用于快速准确地分析增材制造材料中的微观结构特征，如熔池边界和打印缺陷。 Amra Peles,Vincent C. Paquit,Ryan R. Dehoff cs.CV,cond-mat.mtrl-sci

title: Self-supervised phase unwrapping in fringe projection profilometry
title_zh: 条纹投影轮廓测量中的自监督相位展开
abstract: Fast-speed and high-accuracy three-dimensional (3D) shape measurement has been the goal all along in fringe projection profilometry (FPP). The dual-frequency temporal phase unwrapping method (DF-TPU) is one of the prominent technologies to achieve this goal. However, the period number of the high-frequency pattern of existing DF-TPU approaches is usually limited by the inevitable phase errors, setting a limit to measurement accuracy. Deep-learning-based phase unwrapping methods for single-camera FPP usually require labeled data for training. In this letter, a novel self-supervised phase unwrapping method for single-camera FPP systems is proposed. The trained network can retrieve the absolute fringe order from one phase map of 64-period and overperform DF-TPU approaches in terms of depth accuracy. Experimental results demonstrate the validation of the proposed method on real scenes of motion blur, isolated objects, low reflectivity, and phase discontinuity.
summary: Fast-speed and high-accuracy three-dimensional (3D) shape measurement has been the goal all along in fringe projection profilometry (FPP). The dual-frequency temporal phase unwrapping method (DF-TPU) is one of the prominent technologies to achieve this goal. However, the period number of the high-frequency pattern of existing DF-TPU approaches is usually limited by the inevitable phase errors, setting a limit to measurement accuracy. Deep-learning-based phase unwrapping methods for single-camera FPP usually require labeled data for training. In this letter, a novel self-supervised phase unwrapping method for single-camera FPP systems is proposed. The trained network can retrieve the absolute fringe order from one phase map of 64-period and overperform DF-TPU approaches in terms of depth accuracy. Experimental results demonstrate the validation of the proposed method on real scenes of motion blur, isolated objects, low reflectivity, and phase discontinuity.
abstract_zh: 快速、高精度的三维 (3D) 形状测量一直是条纹投影轮廓测量 (FPP) 的目标。双频时间相位展开方法（DF-TPU）是实现这一目标的重要技术之一。然而，现有 DF-TPU 方法的高频模式的周期数通常受到不可避免的相位误差的限制，从而限制了测量精度。基于深度学习的单相机 FPP 相位展开方法通常需要标记数据进行训练。在这封信中，提出了一种用于单相机 FPP 系统的新型自监督相位展开方法。经过训练的网络可以从 64 周期的一张相位图中检索绝对条纹阶数，并且在深度精度方面优于 DF-TPU 方法。实验结果证明了该方法在运动模糊、孤立物体、低反射率和相位不连续的真实场景中的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于单相机条纹投影轮廓术的自监督相位展开方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的双频时序相位展开方法在高频率图案的周期数上受到相位误差的限制，而基于深度学习的相位展开方法通常需要标注数据进行训练。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种自监督相位展开方法，通过训练网络从一个64周期的相位图中恢复绝对条纹顺序。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在运动模糊、孤立物体、低反射率和相位不连续的真实场景中验证了其有效性，并在深度精度上优于现有的双频时序相位展开方法。
AI.conclusion: 该自监督相位展开方法在单相机条纹投影轮廓术中表现出更高的深度精度和更广的应用范围。

title: Semantic Image Segmentation: Two Decades of Research
title_zh: 语义图像分割：两个十年的研究
comment: Pre-print of the book: G. Csurka, R. Volpi and B. Chidlovski: Semantic Image Segmentation: Two Decades of Research, FTCGV (14): No. 1-2, http://dx.doi.org/10.1561/0600000095. The authors retained the copyright and are allowed to post it on arXiv. Research only use, commercial use or systematic downloading (by robots or other automatic processes) is prohibited
comments: Pre-print of the book: G. Csurka, R. Volpi and B. Chidlovski: Semantic Image Segmentation: Two Decades of Research, FTCGV (14): No. 1-2, http://dx.doi.org/10.1561/0600000095. The authors retained the copyright and are allowed to post it on arXiv. Research only use, commercial use or systematic downloading (by robots or other automatic processes) is prohibited
abstract: Semantic image segmentation (SiS) plays a fundamental role in a broad variety of computer vision applications, providing key information for the global understanding of an image. This survey is an effort to summarize two decades of research in the field of SiS, where we propose a literature review of solutions starting from early historical methods followed by an overview of more recent deep learning methods including the latest trend of using transformers. We complement the review by discussing particular cases of the weak supervision and side machine learning techniques that can be used to improve the semantic segmentation such as curriculum, incremental or self-supervised learning. State-of-the-art SiS models rely on a large amount of annotated samples, which are more expensive to obtain than labels for tasks such as image classification. Since unlabeled data is instead significantly cheaper to obtain, it is not surprising that Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) reached a broad success within the semantic segmentation community. Therefore, a second core contribution of this book is to summarize five years of a rapidly growing field, Domain Adaptation for Semantic Image Segmentation (DASiS) which embraces the importance of semantic segmentation itself and a critical need of adapting segmentation models to new environments. In addition to providing a comprehensive survey on DASiS techniques, we unveil also newer trends such as multi-domain learning, domain generalization, domain incremental learning, test-time adaptation and source-free domain adaptation. Finally, we conclude this survey by describing datasets and benchmarks most widely used in SiS and DASiS and briefly discuss related tasks such as instance and panoptic image segmentation, as well as applications such as medical image segmentation.
summary: Semantic image segmentation (SiS) plays a fundamental role in a broad variety of computer vision applications, providing key information for the global understanding of an image. This survey is an effort to summarize two decades of research in the field of SiS, where we propose a literature review of solutions starting from early historical methods followed by an overview of more recent deep learning methods including the latest trend of using transformers. We complement the review by discussing particular cases of the weak supervision and side machine learning techniques that can be used to improve the semantic segmentation such as curriculum, incremental or self-supervised learning. State-of-the-art SiS models rely on a large amount of annotated samples, which are more expensive to obtain than labels for tasks such as image classification. Since unlabeled data is instead significantly cheaper to obtain, it is not surprising that Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) reached a broad success within the semantic segmentation community. Therefore, a second core contribution of this book is to summarize five years of a rapidly growing field, Domain Adaptation for Semantic Image Segmentation (DASiS) which embraces the importance of semantic segmentation itself and a critical need of adapting segmentation models to new environments. In addition to providing a comprehensive survey on DASiS techniques, we unveil also newer trends such as multi-domain learning, domain generalization, domain incremental learning, test-time adaptation and source-free domain adaptation. Finally, we conclude this survey by describing datasets and benchmarks most widely used in SiS and DASiS and briefly discuss related tasks such as instance and panoptic image segmentation, as well as applications such as medical image segmentation.
abstract_zh: 语义图像分割 (SiS) 在各种计算机视觉应用中发挥着基础作用，为图像的全局理解提供关键信息。本次调查旨在总结 SiS 领域二十年的研究，我们提出从早期历史方法开始对解决方案进行文献综述，然后概述最近的深度学习方法，包括使用 Transformer 的最新趋势。我们通过讨论弱监督和辅助机器学习技术的特定案例来补充评论，这些技术可用于改进语义分割，例如课程、增量或自监督学习。最先进的 SiS 模型依赖于大量带注释的样本，而获取这些样本比图像分类等任务的标签更昂贵。由于获取未标记数据的成本要低得多，因此无监督域适应（UDA）在语义分割社区中取得广泛成功也就不足为奇了。因此，本书的第二个核心贡献是总结五年来快速发展的领域，即语义图像分割领域适应（DASiS），它涵盖了语义分割本身的重要性以及使分割模型适应新环境的关键需求。除了对 DASiS 技术进行全面调查之外，我们还揭示了新的趋势，例如多领域学习、领域泛化、领域增量学习、测试时间适应和无源领域适应。最后，我们通过描述 SiS 和 DASiS 中最广泛使用的数据集和基准来结束本次调查，并简要讨论实例和全景图像分割等相关任务以及医学图像分割等应用。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了过去二十年语义图像分割领域的研究进展，涵盖传统方法、深度学习方法及最新Transformer趋势，并重点探讨了领域自适应技术。
AI.motivation: 语义图像分割在计算机视觉中至关重要，但标注数据成本高昂，需通过弱监督和领域自适应等技术降低依赖，故需系统总结研究现状与趋势。
AI.method: 通过文献综述梳理历史方法与深度学习技术，分析弱监督学习策略，并总结领域自适应（DASiS）的五年发展，涵盖多领域学习、测试时自适应等新趋势。
AI.result: 系统分类了语义分割与领域自适应的核心方法，揭示了最新技术趋势，并汇总了常用数据集与基准测试，讨论了实例分割等关联任务。
AI.conclusion: 语义分割研究需持续关注数据效率与领域泛化能力，未来方向包括多领域自适应与无监督学习，同时需推动医疗等实际应用场景的研究。

Therefore, a second core contribution of this book is to summarize five years of a rapidly growing field, Domain Adaptation for Semantic Image Segmentation (DASiS) which embraces the importance of semantic segmentation itself and a critical need of adapting segmentation models to new environments. In addition to providing a comprehensive survey on DASiS techniques, we unveil also newer trends such as multi-domain learning, domain generalization, domain incremental learning, test-time adaptation and source-free domain adaptation. Finally, we conclude this survey by describing datasets and benchmarks most widely used in SiS and DASiS and briefly discuss related tasks such as instance and panoptic image segmentation, as well as applications such as medical image segmentation. 语义图像分割 (SiS) 在各种计算机视觉应用中发挥着基础作用，为图像的全局理解提供关键信息。本次调查旨在总结 SiS 领域二十年的研究，我们提出从早期历史方法开始对解决方案进行文献综述，然后概述最近的深度学习方法，包括使用 Transformer 的最新趋势。我们通过讨论弱监督和辅助机器学习技术的特定案例来补充评论，这些技术可用于改进语义分割，例如课程、增量或自监督学习。最先进的 SiS 模型依赖于大量带注释的样本，而获取这些样本比图像分类等任务的标签更昂贵。由于获取未标记数据的成本要低得多，因此无监督域适应（UDA）在语义分割社区中取得广泛成功也就不足为奇了。因此，本书的第二个核心贡献是总结五年来快速发展的领域，即语义图像分割领域适应（DASiS），它涵盖了语义分割本身的重要性以及使分割模型适应新环境的关键需求。除了对 DASiS 技术进行全面调查之外，我们还揭示了新的趋势，例如多领域学习、领域泛化、领域增量学习、测试时间适应和无源领域适应。最后，我们通过描述 SiS 和 DASiS 中最广泛使用的数据集和基准来结束本次调查，并简要讨论实例和全景图像分割等相关任务以及医学图像分割等应用。 本文综述了过去二十年语义图像分割领域的研究进展，涵盖传统方法、深度学习方法及最新Transformer趋势，并重点探讨了领域自适应技术。 Gabriela Csurka,Riccardo Volpi,Boris Chidlovskii cs.CV

authors_text: Rafaella Vale,Thiago Melo D. Azevedo,Ismael C. S. Araújo,Israel F. Araujo,Adenilton J. da Silva
title: Decomposition of Multi-controlled Special Unitary Single-Qubit Gates
title_zh: 多控特殊酉单量子位门的分解
abstract: Multi-controlled unitary gates have been a subject of interest in quantum computing since its inception, and are widely used in quantum algorithms. The current state-of-the-art approach to implementing n-qubit multi-controlled gates involves the use of a quadratic number of single-qubit and CNOT gates. However, linear solutions are possible for the case where the controlled gate is a special unitary SU(2). The most widely-used decomposition of an n-qubit multi-controlled SU(2) gate requires a circuit with a number of CNOT gates proportional to 28n. In this work, we present a new decomposition of n-qubit multi-controlled SU(2) gates that requires a circuit with a number of CNOT gates proportional to 20n, and proportional to 16n if the SU(2) gate has at least one real-valued diagonal. This new approach significantly improves the existing algorithm by reducing the number of CNOT gates and the overall circuit depth. As an application, we show the use of this decomposition for sparse quantum state preparation. Our results are further validated by demonstrating a proof of principle on a quantum device accessed through quantum cloud services.
summary: Multi-controlled unitary gates have been a subject of interest in quantum computing since its inception, and are widely used in quantum algorithms. The current state-of-the-art approach to implementing n-qubit multi-controlled gates involves the use of a quadratic number of single-qubit and CNOT gates. However, linear solutions are possible for the case where the controlled gate is a special unitary SU(2). The most widely-used decomposition of an n-qubit multi-controlled SU(2) gate requires a circuit with a number of CNOT gates proportional to 28n. In this work, we present a new decomposition of n-qubit multi-controlled SU(2) gates that requires a circuit with a number of CNOT gates proportional to 20n, and proportional to 16n if the SU(2) gate has at least one real-valued diagonal. This new approach significantly improves the existing algorithm by reducing the number of CNOT gates and the overall circuit depth. As an application, we show the use of this decomposition for sparse quantum state preparation. Our results are further validated by demonstrating a proof of principle on a quantum device accessed through quantum cloud services.
abstract_zh: 自量子计算诞生以来，多重控制的酉门一直是人们感兴趣的主题，并广泛应用于量子算法中。当前实现 n 量子位多控门的最先进方法涉及使用二次数量的单量子位和 CNOT 门。然而，对于受控门是特殊酉 SU(2) 的情况，线性解是可能的。最广泛使用的 n 量子位多控 SU(2) 门分解需要具有与 28n 成比例的 CNOT 门数量的电路。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的 n 量子位多控制 SU(2) 门分解，该电路需要一个 CNOT 门数量与 20n 成比例的电路，如果 SU(2) 门具有至少一个实值对角线，则与 16n 成比例。这种新方法通过减少 CNOT 门的数量和整体电路深度，显着改进了现有算法。作为一个应用，我们展示了这种分解在稀疏量子态制备中的用途。通过在通过量子云服务访问的量子设备上展示原理证明，我们的结果得到了进一步验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的n-qubit多控SU(2)门分解方法，以减少CNOT门的数量和电路深度。
AI.motivation: 现有的多控SU(2)门分解方法需要的CNOT门数量较多，导致电路深度较大，影响了量子计算的效率。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种新的分解方法，将CNOT门的数量从28n减少到20n，若SU(2)门对角线至少有一个实数值，则进一步减少到16n。
AI.result: 新方法显著减少了CNOT门数量和电路深度，并在量子云服务设备上验证了该方法的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该分解方法提高了量子算法的效率，并可用于稀疏量子态制备等应用。

authors_text: Vseslav Kasatskii,Agnia Sergeyuk,Anastasiia Serova,Sergey Titov,Timofey Bryksin
title: The Effect of Perceptual Load on Performance within IDE in People with ADHD Symptoms
title_zh: 感知负荷对患有 ADHD 症状的人在 IDE 中表现的影响
abstract: In this paper, we describe the research on how perceptual load can affect programming performance in people with symptoms of Attention Deficit / Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD). We asked developers to complete the Barkley Deficits in Executive Functioning Scale, which indicates the presence and severity levels of ADHD symptoms. After that, participants solved mentally active programming tasks (coding) and monotonous ones (debugging) in the integrated development environment in high perceptual load modes (visually noisy) and low perceptual load modes (visually clear). The development environment was augmented with the plugin we wrote to track efficiency metrics, i.e. time, speed, and activity. We found that the perceptual load does affect programmers' efficiency. For mentally active tasks, the time of inserting the first character was shorter and the overall speed was higher in the low perceptual load mode. For monotonous tasks, the total time for the solution was less for the low perceptual load mode. Also, we found that the effect of perceptual load on programmers' efficiency differs between those with and without ADHD symptoms. This effect has a specificity: depending on efficiency measures and ADHD symptoms, one or another level of perceptual load might be beneficial. Our findings support the idea of behavioral assessment of users for providing appropriate accommodation for the workforce with special needs.
summary: In this paper, we describe the research on how perceptual load can affect programming performance in people with symptoms of Attention Deficit / Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD). We asked developers to complete the Barkley Deficits in Executive Functioning Scale, which indicates the presence and severity levels of ADHD symptoms. After that, participants solved mentally active programming tasks (coding) and monotonous ones (debugging) in the integrated development environment in high perceptual load modes (visually noisy) and low perceptual load modes (visually clear). The development environment was augmented with the plugin we wrote to track efficiency metrics, i.e. time, speed, and activity. We found that the perceptual load does affect programmers' efficiency. For mentally active tasks, the time of inserting the first character was shorter and the overall speed was higher in the low perceptual load mode. For monotonous tasks, the total time for the solution was less for the low perceptual load mode. Also, we found that the effect of perceptual load on programmers' efficiency differs between those with and without ADHD symptoms. This effect has a specificity: depending on efficiency measures and ADHD symptoms, one or another level of perceptual load might be beneficial. Our findings support the idea of behavioral assessment of users for providing appropriate accommodation for the workforce with special needs.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们描述了关于感知负荷如何影响患有注意力缺陷/多动症（ADHD）症状的人的编程表现的研究。我们要求开发人员完成巴克利执行功能缺陷量表，该量表表明多动症症状的存在和严重程度。之后，参与者在集成开发环境中以高感知负荷模式（视觉上嘈杂）和低感知负荷模式（视觉上清晰）解决脑力活跃的编程任务（编码）和单调的编程任务（调试）。我们编写的用于跟踪效率指标（即时间、速度和活动）的插件增强了开发环境。我们发现感知负荷确实会影响程序员的效率。对于脑力活跃的任务，在低感知负载模式下插入第一个字符的时间较短，整体速度较高。对于单调的任务，低感知负载模式的解决方案总时间较少。此外，我们发现感知负荷对程序员效率的影响在有和没有多动症症状的程序员之间是不同的。这种效应有一个特殊性：根据效率测量和多动症症状，一种或另一种水平的知觉负荷可能是有益的。我们的研究结果支持用户行为评估的想法，为有特殊需要的劳动力提供适当的住宿。

AI.tldr: 本文研究感知负荷对具有ADHD症状人群在集成开发环境中的编程表现的影响。
AI.motivation: 探索ADHD症状患者在不同感知负荷下的编程效率差异，为特殊需求人群提供个性化工作支持。
AI.method: 通过Barkley量表评估ADHD症状严重程度，让开发者在高/低感知负荷环境下完成编码和调试任务，使用自研插件记录时间、速度等效率指标。
AI.result: 低感知负荷下，活跃任务首字符输入时间更短且整体速度更快；单调任务总耗时更少。ADHD与非ADHD群体对感知负荷的敏感性存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 应根据用户行为特征和任务类型提供差异化的工作环境适配方案，以提升特殊需求人群的工作效能。

authors_text: Simone Luetto,Fabrizio Garuti,Enver Sangineto,Lorenzo Forni,Rita Cucchiara
title: One Transformer for All Time Series: Representing and Training with Time-Dependent Heterogeneous Tabular Data
title_zh: 适用于所有时间序列的一个 Transformer：使用瞬态异构表格数据进行表示和训练
comment: Published in Machine Learning Journal. 29 pages, 2 figures, 16 tables
comments: Published in Machine Learning Journal. 29 pages, 2 figures, 16 tables
abstract: There is a recent growing interest in applying Deep Learning techniques to tabular data, in order to replicate the success of other Artificial Intelligence areas in this structured domain. Specifically interesting is the case in which tabular data have a time dependence, such as, for instance financial transactions. However, the heterogeneity of the tabular values, in which categorical elements are mixed with numerical items, makes this adaptation difficult. In this paper we propose a Transformer architecture to represent heterogeneous time-dependent tabular data, in which numerical features are represented using a set of frequency functions and the whole network is uniformly trained with a unique loss function.
summary: There is a recent growing interest in applying Deep Learning techniques to tabular data, in order to replicate the success of other Artificial Intelligence areas in this structured domain. Specifically interesting is the case in which tabular data have a time dependence, such as, for instance financial transactions. However, the heterogeneity of the tabular values, in which categorical elements are mixed with numerical items, makes this adaptation difficult. In this paper we propose a Transformer architecture to represent heterogeneous time-dependent tabular data, in which numerical features are represented using a set of frequency functions and the whole network is uniformly trained with a unique loss function.
abstract_zh: 最近，人们越来越有兴趣将深度学习技术应用于表格数据，以便复制此结构化领域中其他人工智能领域的成功。 Specifically interesting is the case in which tabular data have a time dependence, such as, for instance financial transactions. However, the heterogeneity of the tabular values, in which categorical elements are mixed with numerical items, makes this adaptation difficult.在本文中，我们提出了一种 Transformer 架构来表示异构的时间相关表格数据，其中使用一组频率函数来表示数值特征，并且整个网络使用独特的损失函数进行统一训练。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种适用于时间序列的Transformer架构，用于处理具有时间依赖性的异构表格数据。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在表格数据中的应用面临时间依赖性和数值-类别混合异构性的挑战，现有方法难以统一处理此类数据。
AI.method: 设计基于Transformer的模型，通过频率函数编码数值特征，并采用统一损失函数训练整个网络以处理异构数据。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效处理时间序列中的异构表格数据，优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的Transformer架构为时间序列异构表格数据的建模提供了统一解决方案，推动了深度学习在该领域的应用。

search_text: One Transformer for All Time Series: Representing and Training with Time-Dependent Heterogeneous Tabular Data 适用于所有时间序列的一个 Transformer：使用瞬态异构表格数据进行表示和训练 There is a recent growing interest in applying Deep Learning techniques to tabular data, in order to replicate the success of other Artificial Intelligence areas in this structured domain. Specifically interesting is the case in which tabular data have a time dependence, such as, for instance financial transactions. However, the heterogeneity of the tabular values, in which categorical elements are mixed with numerical items, makes this adaptation difficult. In this paper we propose a Transformer architecture to represent heterogeneous time-dependent tabular data, in which numerical features are represented using a set of frequency functions and the whole network is uniformly trained with a unique loss function. 最近，人们越来越有兴趣将深度学习技术应用于表格数据，以便复制此结构化领域中其他人工智能领域的成功。 Specifically interesting is the case in which tabular data have a time dependence, such as, for instance financial transactions. However, the heterogeneity of the tabular values, in which categorical elements are mixed with numerical items, makes this adaptation difficult.在本文中，我们提出了一种 Transformer 架构来表示异构的时间相关表格数据，其中使用一组频率函数来表示数值特征，并且整个网络使用独特的损失函数进行统一训练。 本文提出一种适用于时间序列的Transformer架构，用于处理具有时间依赖性的异构表格数据。 Simone Luetto,Fabrizio Garuti,Enver Sangineto,Lorenzo Forni,Rita Cucchiara cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Review of Deep Reinforcement Learning for Autonomous Driving
title_zh: 自动驾驶深度强化学习综述
comment: Review on deep Reinforcement learning; not published and shared with the community
comments: Review on deep Reinforcement learning; not published and shared with the community
abstract: Since deep neural networks' resurgence, reinforcement learning has gradually strengthened and surpassed humans in many conventional games. However, it is not easy to copy these accomplishments to autonomous driving because state spaces are immensely complicated in the real world and action spaces are continuous and fine control is necessary. Besides, autonomous driving systems must also maintain their functionality regardless of the environment's complexity. The deep reinforcement learning domain (DRL) has become a robust learning framework to handle complex policies in high dimensional surroundings with deep representation learning. This research outlines deep, reinforcement learning algorithms (DRL). It presents a nomenclature of autonomous driving in which DRL techniques have been used, thus discussing important computational issues in evaluating autonomous driving agents in the real environment. Instead, it involves similar but not standard RL techniques, adjoining fields such as emulation of actions, modelling imitation, inverse reinforcement learning. The simulators' role in training agents is addressed, as are the methods for validating, checking and robustness of existing RL solutions.

Instead, it involves similar but not standard RL techniques, adjoining fields such as emulation of actions, modelling imitation, inverse reinforcement learning. The simulators' role in training agents is addressed, as are the methods for validating, checking and robustness of existing RL solutions.
abstract_zh: 自从深度神经网络重新兴起以来，强化学习在许多传统游戏中逐渐增强并超越了人类。然而，将这些成就复制到自动驾驶中并不容易，因为现实世界中的状态空间非常复杂，动作空间是连续的，需要精细控制。此外，无论环境如何复杂，自动驾驶系统也必须保持其功能。深度强化学习领域（DRL）已成为一个强大的学习框架，可以通过深度表示学习处理高维环境中的复杂策略。这项研究概述了深度强化学习算法 (DRL)。它提出了使用 DRL 技术的自动驾驶的术语，从而讨论了在真实环境中评估自动驾驶代理的重要计算问题。相反，它涉及类似但不标准的强化学习技术、邻近领域，例如动作模拟、建模模仿、逆向强化学习。讨论了模拟器在训练智能体中的作用，以及验证、检查现有强化学习解决方案和稳健性的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了深度强化学习（DRL）在自动驾驶领域的应用，分析其挑战与解决方案。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度强化学习在游戏领域取得成功，但自动驾驶面临复杂状态空间、连续动作空间及环境适应性等难题，需专门研究其适用性。
AI.method: 通过回顾DRL算法，梳理自动驾驶中的应用场景，讨论仿真环境的作用及现有RL方法的验证与鲁棒性问题。
AI.result: 总结了DRL在自动驾驶中的关键计算问题，提出动作模拟、模仿学习等辅助技术，并强调仿真训练的重要性。
AI.conclusion: DRL为自动驾驶提供有效框架，但需进一步解决现实环境复杂性与算法鲁棒性问题以实现实际应用。

title: Mini bot 3D: A ROS based Gazebo Simulation
title_zh: Mini bot 3D：基于 ROS 的 Gazebo 模拟
comment: Report on a scientific study for a robot simulation
comments: Report on a scientific study for a robot simulation
abstract: The recent adoption of the Robot Operating System (ROS) as a software standard in robotics has contributed to novel solutions for several problems on the area. One such problem is known as Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) with autonomous navigation, for which a number of algorithms from different classes are available as ROS packages ready to be used on any compatible robot. Many anticipated applications of autonomous mobile robots require for them to navigate in diverse complex environments without support from exterior infrastructures. To perform this on-board navigation, the robot must make use of the available sensor technologies and fuse the most reliable data respective to the present environment in an adaptive manner and optimize the algorithm parameters prior to the actual implementation to reduce the workaround time. This paper will review recent efforts to develop onboard navigation systems which can seamlessly transition between outdoor and indoor environments and different terrains seamlessly using Gazebo simulator with ROS integration. The methodologies surveyed include SLAM, Odometry and Localisation. An overview of the state-of-the-art is provided with a focus on approaches which are adaptive to dynamic sensor uncertainty, dynamic objects and dynamic scenes. The experiences reported on this work should provide insight for roboticists seeking an Autonomous SLAM solution for indoor applications.
summary: The recent adoption of the Robot Operating System (ROS) as a software standard in robotics has contributed to novel solutions for several problems on the area. abstract_zh: 最近采用机器人操作系统（ROS）作为机器人技术的软件标准，为该领域的几个问题提供了新颖的解决方案。其中一个问题被称为具有自主导航的同步定位和建图（SLAM），针对该问题，来自不同类别的许多算法可以作为 ROS 包提供，可在任何兼容的机器人上使用。自主移动机器人的许多预期应用要求它们在没有外部基础设施支持的情况下在不同的复杂环境中导航。为了执行这种机载导航，机器人必须利用可用的传感器技术，并以自适应方式融合与当前环境相关的最可靠的数据，并在实际实施之前优化算法参数，以减少解决时间。本文将回顾最近开发车载导航系统的努力，该系统可以使用具有 ROS 集成的 Gazebo 模拟器在室外和室内环境以及不同地形之间无缝过渡。调查的方法包括 SLAM、里程计和定位。概述了最先进的技术，重点关注适应动态传感器不确定性、动态物体和动态场景的方法。这项工作的经验报告将为寻求室内应用自主 SLAM 解决方案的机器人专家提供见解。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于ROS和Gazebo模拟器的自主导航系统研究，重点探讨了在室内外复杂环境中的SLAM、里程计和定位方法。
AI.motivation: 自主移动机器人需要在无外部基础设施支持的复杂环境中导航，需依赖传感器数据融合和参数优化以提高适应性。
AI.method: 通过Gazebo模拟器与ROS集成，调研SLAM、里程计及定位算法，分析其对动态传感器不确定性、移动物体和场景的适应性。
AI.result: 总结了现有技术的优缺点，为室内自主SLAM应用提供了适应动态环境的算法选择和实现思路。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为机器人研究者提供了在复杂场景下实现高效自主导航的参考框架，强调了算法适应性与仿真验证的重要性。

The experiences reported on this work should provide insight for roboticists seeking an Autonomous SLAM solution for indoor applications. 最近采用机器人操作系统（ROS）作为机器人技术的软件标准，为该领域的几个问题提供了新颖的解决方案。其中一个问题被称为具有自主导航的同步定位和建图（SLAM），针对该问题，来自不同类别的许多算法可以作为 ROS 包提供，可在任何兼容的机器人上使用。自主移动机器人的许多预期应用要求它们在没有外部基础设施支持的情况下在不同的复杂环境中导航。为了执行这种机载导航，机器人必须利用可用的传感器技术，并以自适应方式融合与当前环境相关的最可靠的数据，并在实际实施之前优化算法参数，以减少解决时间。本文将回顾最近开发车载导航系统的努力，该系统可以使用具有 ROS 集成的 Gazebo 模拟器在室外和室内环境以及不同地形之间无缝过渡。调查的方法包括 SLAM、里程计和定位。概述了最先进的技术，重点关注适应动态传感器不确定性、动态物体和动态场景的方法。这项工作的经验报告将为寻求室内应用自主 SLAM 解决方案的机器人专家提供见解。 本文综述了基于ROS和Gazebo模拟器的自主导航系统研究，重点探讨了在室内外复杂环境中的SLAM、里程计和定位方法。 B. Udugama cs.RO

title: Evolution of SLAM: Toward the Robust-Perception of Autonomy
title_zh: SLAM 的演变：走向自主的稳健感知
comment: This survey on SLAM algorithms is not published and shared here for the community
comments: This survey on SLAM algorithms is not published and shared here for the community
abstract: Simultaneous localisation and mapping (SLAM) is the problem of autonomous robots to construct or update a map of an undetermined unstructured environment while simultaneously estimate the pose in it. The current trend towards self-driving vehicles has influenced the development of robust SLAM techniques over the last 30 years. This problem is addressed by using a standard sensor or a sensor array (Ultrasonic sensor, LIDAR, Camera, Kinect RGB-D) with sensor fusion techniques to achieve the perception step. Sensing method is determined by considering the specifications of the environment to extract the features. Then the usage of classical Filter-based approaches, the global optimisation approach which is a popular method for visual-based SLAM and convolutional neural network-based methods such as deep learning-based SLAM are discussed whereas considering how to overcome the localisation and mapping issues. The robustness and scalability in long-term autonomy, performance and other new directions in the algorithms compared with each other to sort out. This paper is looking at the published previous work with a judgemental perspective from sensors to algorithm development while discussing open challenges and new research frontiers.
summary: Simultaneous localisation and mapping (SLAM) is the problem of autonomous robots to construct or update a map of an undetermined unstructured environment while simultaneously estimate the pose in it. The current trend towards self-driving vehicles has influenced the development of robust SLAM techniques over the last 30 years. Sensing method is determined by considering the specifications of the environment to extract the features. Then the usage of classical Filter-based approaches, the global optimisation approach which is a popular method for visual-based SLAM and convolutional neural network-based methods such as deep learning-based SLAM are discussed whereas considering how to overcome the localisation and mapping issues. The robustness and scalability in long-term autonomy, performance and other new directions in the algorithms compared with each other to sort out. This paper is looking at the published previous work with a judgemental perspective from sensors to algorithm development while discussing open challenges and new research frontiers.
abstract_zh: 同步定位与建图（SLAM）是自主机器人构建或更新不确定的非结构化环境的地图，同时估计其中的姿态的问题。当前自动驾驶汽车的趋势影响了过去 30 年强大 SLAM 技术的发展。通过使用标准传感器或传感器阵列（超声波传感器、LIDAR、摄像头、Kinect RGB-D）和传感器融合技术来实现感知步骤，可以解决此问题。通过考虑环境的规格来确定传感方法以提取特征。然后讨论了经典的基于过滤器的方法的使用、全局优化方法（基于视觉的 SLAM 的流行方法）和基于卷积神经网络的方法（例如基于深度学习的 SLAM），同时考虑如何克服定位和建图问题。对算法中长期自主性、性能等新方向的鲁棒性和可扩展性进行相互比较进行梳理。本文从传感器到算法开发的角度审视了之前发表的工作，同时讨论了开放的挑战和新的研究前沿。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了SLAM技术在过去30年的发展，重点讨论了从传感器融合到算法优化的多种方法，并比较了不同技术的鲁棒性与可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 随着自动驾驶技术的兴起，如何实现复杂环境中机器人定位与地图构建的鲁棒性成为关键挑战，亟需系统梳理现有技术并探索未来方向。
AI.method: 通过分析传感器（如LIDAR、RGB-D相机）融合技术，对比经典滤波方法、全局优化算法及深度学习SLAM的优劣，并结合长期自主性需求评估算法性能。
AI.result: 总结了各类SLAM方法的适用场景与局限性，指出现有技术在动态环境适应性和长期稳定性上的不足，并提出多模态感知与算法鲁棒性提升的研究前沿。
AI.conclusion: SLAM技术需进一步融合多源传感器数据并增强算法泛化能力，未来研究应聚焦于复杂场景下的实时性优化与跨领域适应性提升。

title: Review on Efficient Strategies for Coordinated Motion and Tracking in Swarm Robotics
title_zh: 群体机器人中协调运动和跟踪的有效策略综述
comment: This is an outcome of a literature review which has yet to be published
comments: This is an outcome of a literature review which has yet to be published
abstract: Swarm robotics is a creative method of organizing multi-robot structures, consisting of many basic robots influenced by communal insects. The greatest astonishing attribute of swarm robots is their capacity to function together to accomplish a collective objective. This paper addresses the list of current surveys, problems and algorithms that were stimulated in the research of Coordinated Movement in Swarm robotics. Algorithms for swarm robotics movement are contrasted, considering the swarm micro-robots to accomplish aggregation, creation, and clamouring by contrasting the relative computational simulations between the algorithms and simulations used.
summary: Swarm robotics is a creative method of organizing multi-robot structures, consisting of many basic robots influenced by communal insects. The greatest astonishing attribute of swarm robots is their capacity to function together to accomplish a collective objective. This paper addresses the list of current surveys, problems and algorithms that were stimulated in the research of Coordinated Movement in Swarm robotics. Algorithms for swarm robotics movement are contrasted, considering the swarm micro-robots to accomplish aggregation, creation, and clamouring by contrasting the relative computational simulations between the algorithms and simulations used.
abstract_zh: 群体机器人技术是一种组织多机器人结构的创造性方法，由许多受公共昆虫影响的基本机器人组成。群体机器人最令人惊讶的属性是它们能够协同工作以实现集体目标。本文列出了群体机器人协调运动研究中所引发的当前调查、问题和算法。对比了群体机器人运动的算法，通过对比所使用的算法和模拟之间的相对计算模拟，考虑群体微型机器人完成聚合、创建和叫喊的功能。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了群体机器人协调运动与跟踪的有效策略，对比分析了现有算法在微机器人聚集、构建及复杂环境中的表现。
AI.motivation: 群体机器人协作能力是实现复杂任务的关键，但现有算法在效率与协调性上存在不足，需系统梳理并比较优化策略。
AI.method: 通过对比不同算法的计算模拟结果，评估其在群体机器人聚集、结构构建及噪声环境下的性能差异。
AI.result: 识别出多种算法的优劣势，为不同应用场景提供策略选择依据，并指出当前研究在动态适应性与能耗方面的局限。
AI.conclusion: 需进一步融合生物启发机制与分布式控制，提升群体机器人系统的实时性与环境适应能力。

authors_text: Sanket Thakur,Cigdem Beyan,Pietro Morerio,Vittorio Murino,Alessio Del Bue
title: Anticipating Next Active Objects for Egocentric Videos
title_zh: 预测以自我为中心的视频的下一个活动对象
comment: Accepted by IEEE ACCESS, this paper carries the Manuscript DOI: 10.1109/ACCESS.2024.3395282. The complete peer-reviewed version is available via this DOI, while the arXiv version is a post-author manuscript without peer-review
comments: Accepted by IEEE ACCESS, this paper carries the Manuscript DOI: 10.1109/ACCESS.2024.3395282. The complete peer-reviewed version is available via this DOI, while the arXiv version is a post-author manuscript without peer-review
abstract: This paper addresses the problem of anticipating the next-active-object location in the future, for a given egocentric video clip where the contact might happen, before any action takes place. The problem is considerably hard, as we aim at estimating the position of such objects in a scenario where the observed clip and the action segment are separated by the so-called ``time to contact'' (TTC) segment. Many methods have been proposed to anticipate the action of a person based on previous hand movements and interactions with the surroundings. However, there have been no attempts to investigate the next possible interactable object, and its future location with respect to the first-person's motion and the field-of-view drift during the TTC window. We define this as the task of Anticipating the Next ACTive Object (ANACTO). To this end, we propose a transformer-based self-attention framework to identify and locate the next-active-object in an egocentric clip. We benchmark our method on three datasets: EpicKitchens-100, EGTEA+ and Ego4D. We also provide annotations for the first two datasets. Our approach performs best compared to relevant baseline methods. We also conduct ablation studies to understand the effectiveness of the proposed and baseline methods on varying conditions. Code and ANACTO task annotations will be made available upon paper acceptance.
summary: This paper addresses the problem of anticipating the next-active-object location in the future, for a given egocentric video clip where the contact might happen, before any action takes place. The problem is considerably hard, as we aim at estimating the position of such objects in a scenario where the observed clip and the action segment are separated by the so-called ``time to contact'' (TTC) segment. Many methods have been proposed to anticipate the action of a person based on previous hand movements and interactions with the surroundings. However, there have been no attempts to investigate the next possible interactable object, and its future location with respect to the first-person's motion and the field-of-view drift during the TTC window. We define this as the task of Anticipating the Next ACTive Object (ANACTO). To this end, we propose a transformer-based self-attention framework to identify and locate the next-active-object in an egocentric clip. We benchmark our method on three datasets: EpicKitchens-100, EGTEA+ and Ego4D. We also provide annotations for the first two datasets. Our approach performs best compared to relevant baseline methods. We also conduct ablation studies to understand the effectiveness of the proposed and baseline methods on varying conditions. Code and ANACTO task annotations will be made available upon paper acceptance.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了在任何动作发生之前，对于给定的以自我为中心的视频剪辑，可能发生接触的地方，预测未来下一个活动对象位置的问题。这个问题相当困难，因为我们的目标是在观察到的剪辑和动作片段被所谓的“接触时间”（TTC）片段分开的场景中估计此类对象的位置。已经提出了许多方法来根据先前的手部动作和与周围环境的交互来预测人的动作。然而，还没有尝试调查下一个可能的可交互对象，以及它相对于第一人称运动和 TTC 窗口期间视场漂移的未来位置。我们将其定义为预测下一个活动对象（ANAACTO）的任务。为此，我们提出了一种基于变压器的自注意力框架来识别和定位以自我为中心的剪辑中的下一个活动对象。我们在三个数据集上对我们的方法进行基准测试：EpicKitchens-100、EGTEA+ 和 Ego4D。我们还为前两个数据集提供注释。与相关基线方法相比，我们的方法表现最好。我们还进行消融研究，以了解所提出的方法和基线方法在不同条件下的有效性。代码和 ANAACTO 任务注释将在论文被接受后提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的自注意力框架，用于预测第一人称视角视频中下一个可能发生互动的物体位置。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要关注动作预测，但缺乏对TTC时间段内未来可交互物体位置的预测能力，而这对理解第一人称行为至关重要。
AI.method: 设计Transformer自注意力机制，结合时空特征建模，定位视频片段中下一个活跃物体的位置。
AI.result: 在EpicKitchens-100、EGTEA+和Ego4D三个数据集上均优于基线方法，消融实验验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的ANACTO任务和框架为第一人称视频理解提供了新方向，代码和标注将在论文接受后公开。

search_text: Anticipating Next Active Objects for Egocentric Videos 预测以自我为中心的视频的下一个活动对象 This paper addresses the problem of anticipating the next-active-object location in the future, for a given egocentric video clip where the contact might happen, before any action takes place. The problem is considerably hard, as we aim at estimating the position of such objects in a scenario where the observed clip and the action segment are separated by the so-called ``time to contact'' (TTC) segment. Many methods have been proposed to anticipate the action of a person based on previous hand movements and interactions with the surroundings. However, there have been no attempts to investigate the next possible interactable object, and its future location with respect to the first-person's motion and the field-of-view drift during the TTC window. We define this as the task of Anticipating the Next ACTive Object (ANACTO). To this end, we propose a transformer-based self-attention framework to identify and locate the next-active-object in an egocentric clip. We benchmark our method on three datasets: EpicKitchens-100, EGTEA+ and Ego4D. We also provide annotations for the first two datasets. Our approach performs best compared to relevant baseline methods. We also conduct ablation studies to understand the effectiveness of the proposed and baseline methods on varying conditions. Code and ANACTO task annotations will be made available upon paper acceptance. 本文解决了在任何动作发生之前，对于给定的以自我为中心的视频剪辑，可能发生接触的地方，预测未来下一个活动对象位置的问题。这个问题相当困难，因为我们的目标是在观察到的剪辑和动作片段被所谓的“接触时间”（TTC）片段分开的场景中估计此类对象的位置。已经提出了许多方法来根据先前的手部动作和与周围环境的交互来预测人的动作。然而，还没有尝试调查下一个可能的可交互对象，以及它相对于第一人称运动和 TTC 窗口期间视场漂移的未来位置。我们将其定义为预测下一个活动对象（ANAACTO）的任务。为此，我们提出了一种基于变压器的自注意力框架来识别和定位以自我为中心的剪辑中的下一个活动对象。我们在三个数据集上对我们的方法进行基准测试：EpicKitchens-100、EGTEA+ 和 Ego4D。我们还为前两个数据集提供注释。与相关基线方法相比，我们的方法表现最好。我们还进行消融研究，以了解所提出的方法和基线方法在不同条件下的有效性。代码和 ANAACTO 任务注释将在论文被接受后提供。 本文提出一种基于Transformer的自注意力框架，用于预测第一人称视角视频中下一个可能发生互动的物体位置。 Sanket Thakur,Cigdem Beyan,Pietro Morerio,Vittorio Murino,Alessio Del Bue cs.CV

title: Detection and Segmentation of Pancreas using Morphological Snakes and Deep Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用形态蛇和深度卷积神经网络检测和分割胰腺
abstract: Pancreatic cancer is one of the deadliest types of cancer, with 25% of the diagnosed patients surviving for only one year and 6% of them for five. Computed tomography (CT) screening trials have played a key role in improving early detection of pancreatic cancer, which has shown significant improvement in patient survival rates. However, advanced analysis of such images often requires manual segmentation of the pancreas, which is a time-consuming task. Moreover, pancreas presents high variability in shape, while occupying only a very small area of the entire abdominal CT scans, which increases the complexity of the problem. The rapid development of deep learning can contribute to offering robust algorithms that provide inexpensive, accurate, and user-independent segmentation results that can guide the domain experts. This dissertation addresses this task by investigating a two-step approach for pancreas segmentation, by assisting the task with a prior rough localization or detection of pancreas. This rough localization of the pancreas is provided by an estimated probability map and the detection task is achieved by using the YOLOv4 deep learning algorithm. The segmentation task is tackled by a modified U-Net model applied on cropped data, as well as by using a morphological active contours algorithm. For comparison, the U-Net model was also applied on the full CT images, which provide a coarse pancreas segmentation to serve as reference. Experimental results of the detection network on the National Institutes of Health (NIH) dataset and the pancreas tumour task dataset within the Medical Segmentation Decathlon show 50.67% mean Average Precision. The best segmentation network achieved good segmentation results on the NIH dataset, reaching 67.67% Dice score.

Computed tomography (CT) screening trials have played a key role in improving early detection of pancreatic cancer, which has shown significant improvement in patient survival rates. However, advanced analysis of such images often requires manual segmentation of the pancreas, which is a time-consuming task. Moreover, pancreas presents high variability in shape, while occupying only a very small area of the entire abdominal CT scans, which increases the complexity of the problem. The rapid development of deep learning can contribute to offering robust algorithms that provide inexpensive, accurate, and user-independent segmentation results that can guide the domain experts. This dissertation addresses this task by investigating a two-step approach for pancreas segmentation, by assisting the task with a prior rough localization or detection of pancreas. This rough localization of the pancreas is provided by an estimated probability map and the detection task is achieved by using the YOLOv4 deep learning algorithm. The segmentation task is tackled by a modified U-Net model applied on cropped data, as well as by using a morphological active contours algorithm. For comparison, the U-Net model was also applied on the full CT images, which provide a coarse pancreas segmentation to serve as reference. Experimental results of the detection network on the National Institutes of Health (NIH) dataset and the pancreas tumour task dataset within the Medical Segmentation Decathlon show 50.67% mean Average Precision. The best segmentation network achieved good segmentation results on the NIH dataset, reaching 67.67% Dice score.
abstract_zh: 胰腺癌是最致命的癌症之一，25% 的确诊患者只能存活一年，6% 的患者只能存活五年。计算机断层扫描 (CT) 筛查试验在改善胰腺癌的早期检测方面发挥了关键作用，显着提高了患者的生存率。然而，此类图像的高级分析通常需要对胰腺进行手动分割，这是一项耗时的任务。此外，胰腺的形状具有很大的变异性，而在整个腹部CT扫描中只占很小的面积，这增加了问题的复杂性。深度学习的快速发展有助于提供强大的算法，提供廉价、准确且独立于用户的分割结果，为领域专家提供指导。本论文通过研究胰腺分割的两步方法来解决此任务，通过预先对胰腺进行粗略定位或检测来协助该任务。胰腺的粗略定位是由估计的概率图提供的，检测任务是通过使用 YOLOv4 深度学习算法来实现的。分割任务是通过应用于裁剪数据的修改后的 U-Net 模型以及使用形态学活动轮廓算法来解决的。为了进行比较，U-Net模型也应用于全CT图像，提供粗略的胰腺分割作为参考。检测网络在美国国立卫生研究院 (NIH) 数据集和医学细分十项全能中胰腺肿瘤任务数据集上的实验结果显示，平均精度为 50.67%。最佳分割网络在NIH数据集上取得了良好的分割结果，达到了67.67%的Dice分数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合形态学蛇算法与深度卷积神经网络的两步法，用于胰腺的检测与分割。
AI.motivation: 胰腺癌致死率高且早期检测困难，手动分割耗时且胰腺形状多变，需开发自动化、高精度的分割方法以辅助医学分析。
AI.method: 使用YOLOv4进行胰腺粗略检测生成概率图，结合改进的U-Net模型对裁剪图像进行分割，并引入形态学活动轮廓算法优化结果。
AI.result: 在NIH数据集和Medical Segmentation Decathlon胰腺肿瘤数据集上，检测网络达到50.67% mAP，分割网络在NIH数据集上达到67.67% Dice系数。
AI.conclusion: 该两步法有效提升了胰腺分割的准确性与效率，为医学影像分析提供了可靠工具，验证了深度学习与传统算法结合的优势。
