authors_text: Gal Kaplun,Andrey Gurevich,Tal Swisa,Mazor David,Shai Shalev-Shwartz,Eran Malach
title: Less is More: Selective Layer Finetuning with SubTuning
title_zh: 少即是多：通过 SubTuning 进行选择性层微调
abstract: Finetuning a pretrained model has become a standard approach for training neural networks on novel tasks, resulting in fast convergence and improved performance. In this work, we study an alternative finetuning method, where instead of finetuning all the weights of the network, we only train a carefully chosen subset of layers, keeping the rest of the weights frozen at their initial (pretrained) values. We demonstrate that \emph{subset finetuning} (or SubTuning) often achieves accuracy comparable to full finetuning of the model, and even surpasses the performance of full finetuning when training data is scarce. Therefore, SubTuning allows deploying new tasks at minimal computational cost, while enjoying the benefits of finetuning the entire model. This yields a simple and effective method for multi-task learning, where different tasks do not interfere with one another, and yet share most of the resources at inference time. We demonstrate the efficiency of SubTuning across multiple tasks, using different network architectures and pretraining methods.
summary: Finetuning a pretrained model has become a standard approach for training neural networks on novel tasks, resulting in fast convergence and improved performance. In this work, we study an alternative finetuning method, where instead of finetuning all the weights of the network, we only train a carefully chosen subset of layers, keeping the rest of the weights frozen at their initial (pretrained) values. We demonstrate that \emph{subset finetuning} (or SubTuning) often achieves accuracy comparable to full finetuning of the model, and even surpasses the performance of full finetuning when training data is scarce. Therefore, SubTuning allows deploying new tasks at minimal computational cost, while enjoying the benefits of finetuning the entire model. This yields a simple and effective method for multi-task learning, where different tasks do not interfere with one another, and yet share most of the resources at inference time. We demonstrate the efficiency of SubTuning across multiple tasks, using different network architectures and pretraining methods.
abstract_zh: 微调预训练模型已成为在新任务上训练神经网络的标准方法，从而实现快速收敛并提高性能。在这项工作中，我们研究了一种替代的微调方法，我们不微调网络的所有权重，而是只训练精心选择的层子集，将其余权重冻结在其初始（预训练）值。我们证明，\emph{子集微调}（或 SubTuning）通常可以达到与模型完全微调相当的精度，甚至在训练数据稀缺时超过完全微调的性能。因此，SubTuning 允许以最小的计算成本部署新任务，同时享受微调整个模型的好处。这产生了一种简单有效的多任务学习方法，其中不同的任务不会相互干扰，但在推理时共享大部分资源。我们使用不同的网络架构和预训练方法展示了跨多个任务的 SubTuning 的效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种选择性层微调方法SubTuning，通过仅训练网络中部分层来实现高效模型训练。
AI.motivation: 传统微调需要更新全部参数导致计算成本高，而数据稀缺时全微调效果有限，需探索更高效的微调策略。
AI.method: 冻结预训练模型大部分层参数，仅选择性地微调特定层，通过多任务实验验证不同网络架构和预训练方法下的有效性。
AI.result: 在多个任务中SubTuning达到甚至超越全微调性能，尤其在数据稀缺场景下表现更优，且显著降低计算成本。
AI.conclusion: SubTuning为多任务学习提供了高效解决方案，在保持模型性能的同时减少资源消耗和任务间干扰。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种选择性层微调方法SubTuning，通过仅训练网络中部分层来实现高效模型训练。
ai_content.motivation: 传统微调需要更新全部参数导致计算成本高，而数据稀缺时全微调效果有限，需探索更高效的微调策略。
ai_content.method: 冻结预训练模型大部分层参数，仅选择性地微调特定层，通过多任务实验验证不同网络架构和预训练方法下的有效性。
ai_content.result: 在多个任务中SubTuning达到甚至超越全微调性能，尤其在数据稀缺场景下表现更优，且显著降低计算成本。
ai_content.conclusion: SubTuning为多任务学习提供了高效解决方案，在保持模型性能的同时减少资源消耗和任务间干扰。

search_text: Less is More: Selective Layer Finetuning with SubTuning 少即是多：通过 SubTuning 进行选择性层微调 Finetuning a pretrained model has become a standard approach for training neural networks on novel tasks, resulting in fast convergence and improved performance. In this work, we study an alternative finetuning method, where instead of finetuning all the weights of the network, we only train a carefully chosen subset of layers, keeping the rest of the weights frozen at their initial (pretrained) values. We demonstrate that \emph{subset finetuning} (or SubTuning) often achieves accuracy comparable to full finetuning of the model, and even surpasses the performance of full finetuning when training data is scarce. Therefore, SubTuning allows deploying new tasks at minimal computational cost, while enjoying the benefits of finetuning the entire model. This yields a simple and effective method for multi-task learning, where different tasks do not interfere with one another, and yet share most of the resources at inference time. We demonstrate the efficiency of SubTuning across multiple tasks, using different network architectures and pretraining methods. 微调预训练模型已成为在新任务上训练神经网络的标准方法，从而实现快速收敛并提高性能。在这项工作中，我们研究了一种替代的微调方法，我们不微调网络的所有权重，而是只训练精心选择的层子集，将其余权重冻结在其初始（预训练）值。我们证明，\emph{子集微调}（或 SubTuning）通常可以达到与模型完全微调相当的精度，甚至在训练数据稀缺时超过完全微调的性能。因此，SubTuning 允许以最小的计算成本部署新任务，同时享受微调整个模型的好处。这产生了一种简单有效的多任务学习方法，其中不同的任务不会相互干扰，但在推理时共享大部分资源。我们使用不同的网络架构和预训练方法展示了跨多个任务的 SubTuning 的效率。 本文提出了一种选择性层微调方法SubTuning，通过仅训练网络中部分层来实现高效模型训练。 Gal Kaplun,Andrey Gurevich,Tal Swisa,Mazor David,Shai Shalev-Shwartz,Eran Malach cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Contour-based Interactive Segmentation
title_zh: 基于轮廓的交互式分割
abstract: Recent advances in interactive segmentation (IS) allow speeding up and simplifying image editing and labeling greatly. The majority of modern IS approaches accept user input in the form of clicks. However, using clicks may require too many user interactions, especially when selecting small objects, minor parts of an object, or a group of objects of the same type. In this paper, we consider such a natural form of user interaction as a loose contour, and introduce a contour-based IS method. We evaluate the proposed method on the standard segmentation benchmarks, our novel UserContours dataset, and its subset UserContours-G containing difficult segmentation cases. Through experiments, we demonstrate that a single contour provides the same accuracy as multiple clicks, thus reducing the required amount of user interactions.
summary: Recent advances in interactive segmentation (IS) allow speeding up and simplifying image editing and labeling greatly. The majority of modern IS approaches accept user input in the form of clicks. However, using clicks may require too many user interactions, especially when selecting small objects, minor parts of an object, or a group of objects of the same type. In this paper, we consider such a natural form of user interaction as a loose contour, and introduce a contour-based IS method. We evaluate the proposed method on the standard segmentation benchmarks, our novel UserContours dataset, and its subset UserContours-G containing difficult segmentation cases. Through experiments, we demonstrate that a single contour provides the same accuracy as multiple clicks, thus reducing the required amount of user interactions.
abstract_zh: 交互式分割 (IS) 的最新进展可以大大加快和简化图像编辑和标记。大多数现代 IS 方法接受用户点击形式的输入。然而，使用点击可能需要太多的用户交互，尤其是在选择小对象、对象的次要部分或一组相同类型的对象时。在本文中，我们将用户交互的自然形式视为松散轮廓，并引入基于轮廓的 IS 方法。我们在标准分割基准、我们新颖的 UserContours 数据集及其包含困难分割案例的子集 UserContours-G 上评估了所提出的方法。通过实验，我们证明单个轮廓提供与多次点击相同的精度，从而减少了所需的用户交互量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于轮廓的交互式分割方法，以减少传统点击方式所需的用户交互次数。
AI.motivation: 现有点击交互方式在处理小物体、物体局部或同类物体群时需频繁交互，效率较低。
AI.method: 引入自然交互形式——松散轮廓作为输入，开发基于轮廓的交互分割方法。
AI.result: 实验表明单个轮廓的分割精度可媲美多个点击，显著减少用户交互次数。
AI.conclusion: 基于轮廓的交互分割方法在保持精度的同时提升了效率，为交互式分割提供新思路。

authors_text: Francesco Santini,Jakob Wasserthal,Abramo Agosti,Xeni Deligianni,Kevin R. Keene,Hermien E. Kan,Stefan Sommer,Fengdan Wang,Claudia Weidensteiner,Giulia Manco,Matteo Paoletti,Valentina Mazzoli,Arjun Desai,Anna Pichiecchio
title: Deep Anatomical Federated Network (Dafne): An open client-server framework for the continuous, collaborative improvement of deep learning-based medical image segmentation
title_zh: 深度解剖联合网络（Dafne）：一个开放的客户端-服务器框架，用于持续、协作地改进基于深度学习的医学图像分割
comment: In this new version: change affiliation of A. Pichiecchio. Note regarding the license/copyright: This submission is conforming with the RSNA Preprint policy available here: this https URL, which REQUIRES authors to update the version on preprint servers with the accepted version and the copyright notice as indicated in the PDF
comments: In this new version: change affiliation of A. Pichiecchio. Note regarding the license/copyright: This submission is conforming with the RSNA Preprint policy available here: this https URL, which REQUIRES authors to update the version on preprint servers with the accepted version and the copyright notice as indicated in the PDF
abstract: Purpose: To present and evaluate Dafne (deep anatomical federated network), a freely available decentralized, collaborative deep learning system for the semantic segmentation of radiological images through federated incremental learning. Materials and Methods: Dafne is free software with a client-server architecture. The client side is an advanced user interface that applies the deep learning models stored on the server to the user's data and allows the user to check and refine the prediction. Incremental learning is then performed at the client's side and sent back to the server, where it is integrated into the root model. Dafne was evaluated locally, by assessing the performance gain across model generations on 38 MRI datasets of the lower legs, and through the analysis of real-world usage statistics (n = 639 use-cases). Results: Dafne demonstrated a statistically improvement in the accuracy of semantic segmentation over time (average increase of the Dice Similarity Coefficient by 0.007 points/generation on the local validation set, p < 0.001). Qualitatively, the models showed enhanced performance on various radiologic image types, including those not present in the initial training sets, indicating good model generalizability. Conclusion: Dafne showed improvement in segmentation quality over time, demonstrating potential for learning and generalization.
summary: Purpose: To present and evaluate Dafne (deep anatomical federated network), a freely available decentralized, collaborative deep learning system for the semantic segmentation of radiological images through federated incremental learning. Dafne was evaluated locally, by assessing the performance gain across model generations on 38 MRI datasets of the lower legs, and through the analysis of real-world usage statistics (n = 639 use-cases). Conclusion: Dafne showed improvement in segmentation quality over time, demonstrating potential for learning and generalization.
abstract_zh: 目的：展示和评估 Dafne（深度解剖联合网络），这是一个免费的分散式协作深度学习系统，用于通过联合增量学习对放射图像进行语义分割。材料和方法：Dafne 是具有客户端-服务器架构的免费软件。客户端是一个高级用户界面，它将服务器上存储的深度学习模型应用于用户的数据，并允许用户检查和完善预测。然后在客户端执行增量学习并将其发送回服务器，在服务器中将其集成到根模型中。 Dafne 在本地进行了评估，通过评估 38 个小腿 MRI 数据集上模型各代的性能增益，并通过分析现实世界的使用统计数据（n = 639 个用例）。结果：Dafne 证明了随着时间的推移，语义分割的准确性在统计上有所提高（在本地验证集上，Dice 相似系数平均增加 0.007 点/代，p < 0.001）。定性地讲，模型在各种放射图像类型（包括初始训练集中不存在的图像类型）上表现出增强的性能，表明模型具有良好的通用性。结论：随着时间的推移，Dafne 显示出分割质量的提高，展示了学习和泛化的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并评估了Dafne系统，一个用于医学影像语义分割的去中心化协作深度学习框架，通过联邦增量学习实现模型持续改进。
AI.motivation: 传统集中式医学影像分析面临数据隐私和模型泛化能力不足的问题，需开发支持协作学习且保护数据安全的系统。
AI.method: 基于客户端-服务器架构，客户端执行模型预测并进行增量学习，将更新参数上传至服务器整合至主模型，通过38个MRI数据集及639个实际案例验证效果。
AI.result: 模型分割精度随迭代显著提升（Dice系数平均增长0.007/代，p<0.001），且能有效泛化至初始训练未涵盖的影像类型。
AI.conclusion: Dafne证实了联邦学习框架在持续提升医学影像分割质量与泛化能力方面的潜力，为协作式AI医疗应用提供可行方案。

title: Engineering a Preprocessor for Symmetry Detection
title_zh: 设计用于对称性检测的预处理器
abstract: State-of-the-art solvers for symmetry detection in combinatorial objects are becoming increasingly sophisticated software libraries. Most of the solvers were initially designed with inputs from combinatorics in mind (nauty, bliss, Traces, dejavu). They excel at dealing with a complicated core of the input. Others focus on practical instances that exhibit sparsity. They excel at dealing with comparatively easy but extremely large substructures of the input (saucy). In practice, these differences manifest in significantly diverging performances on different types of graph classes. We engineer a preprocessor for symmetry detection. The result is a tool designed to shrink sparse, large substructures of the input graph. On most of the practical instances, the overall running time improves significantly for many of the state-of-the-art solvers. At the same time, our benchmarks show that the additional overhead is negligible. Overall we obtain single algorithms with competitive performance across all benchmark graphs. As such the preprocessor bridges the disparity between solvers that focus on combinatorial graphs and large practical graphs. In fact, on most of the practical instances the combined setup significantly outperforms previous state-of-the-art.
summary: State-of-the-art solvers for symmetry detection in combinatorial objects are becoming increasingly sophisticated software libraries. Most of the solvers were initially designed with inputs from combinatorics in mind (nauty, bliss, Traces, dejavu). They excel at dealing with a complicated core of the input. Others focus on practical instances that exhibit sparsity. They excel at dealing with comparatively easy but extremely large substructures of the input (saucy). In practice, these differences manifest in significantly diverging performances on different types of graph classes. We engineer a preprocessor for symmetry detection. The result is a tool designed to shrink sparse, large substructures of the input graph. On most of the practical instances, the overall running time improves significantly for many of the state-of-the-art solvers. At the same time, our benchmarks show that the additional overhead is negligible. Overall we obtain single algorithms with competitive performance across all benchmark graphs. As such the preprocessor bridges the disparity between solvers that focus on combinatorial graphs and large practical graphs. In fact, on most of the practical instances the combined setup significantly outperforms previous state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 用于组合对象对称性检测的最先进的求解器正变得越来越复杂的软件库。大多数求解器最初设计时都考虑到组合学的输入（nauty、bliss、Traces、dejavu）。他们擅长处理复杂的输入核心。其他人则关注表现出稀疏性的实际实例。他们擅长处理相对简单但非常大的输入子结构（俏皮）。在实践中，这些差异表现为不同类型的图类的性能存在显着差异。我们设计了一个用于对称性检测的预处理器。结果是一个旨在缩小输入图的稀疏大型子结构的工具。在大多数实际实例中，许多最先进的求解器的总体运行时间显着提高。同时，我们的基准测试表明额外的开销可以忽略不计。总体而言，我们获得了在所有基准图上具有竞争性能的单一算法。因此，预处理器弥合了专注于组合图和大型实用图的求解器之间的差异。事实上，在大多数实际情况下，组合设置的性能显着优于以前的最先进技术。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一个用于对称性检测的预处理器，旨在优化不同类型的图类在现有求解器中的性能表现。
AI.motivation: 现有对称性检测求解器在处理组合图与大规模稀疏图时存在性能差异，导致实际应用中效率低下。
AI.method: 开发预处理器以压缩输入图中的稀疏大子结构，减少计算复杂度并降低求解器运行时间。
AI.result: 预处理器显著提升多个主流求解器在实际实例中的运行效率，且额外开销可忽略，综合性能优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该预处理器有效弥合了组合图与大规模图求解器间的性能差距，成为提升对称性检测整体效率的关键工具。

title: VITR: Augmenting Vision Transformers with Relation-Focused Learning for Cross-Modal Information Retrieval
title_zh: VITR：通过以关系为中心的学习来增强视觉变压器以进行跨模式信息检索
abstract: The relations expressed in user queries are vital for cross-modal information retrieval. Relation-focused cross-modal retrieval aims to retrieve information that corresponds to these relations, enabling effective retrieval across different modalities. Pre-trained networks, such as Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP), have gained significant attention and acclaim for their exceptional performance in various cross-modal learning tasks. However, the Vision Transformer (ViT) used in these networks is limited in its ability to focus on image region relations. Specifically, ViT is trained to match images with relevant descriptions at the global level, without considering the alignment between image regions and descriptions. This paper introduces VITR, a novel network that enhances ViT by extracting and reasoning about image region relations based on a local encoder. VITR is comprised of two key components. Firstly, it extends the capabilities of ViT-based cross-modal networks by enabling them to extract and reason with region relations present in images. Secondly, VITR incorporates a fusion module that combines the reasoned results with global knowledge to predict similarity scores between images and descriptions. The proposed VITR network was evaluated through experiments on the tasks of relation-focused cross-modal information retrieval. The results derived from the analysis of the RefCOCOg, CLEVR, and Flickr30K datasets demonstrated that the proposed VITR network consistently outperforms state-of-the-art networks in image-to-text and text-to-image retrieval.
summary: The relations expressed in user queries are vital for cross-modal information retrieval. Relation-focused cross-modal retrieval aims to retrieve information that corresponds to these relations, enabling effective retrieval across different modalities. Pre-trained networks, such as Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP), have gained significant attention and acclaim for their exceptional performance in various cross-modal learning tasks. However, the Vision Transformer (ViT) used in these networks is limited in its ability to focus on image region relations. Specifically, ViT is trained to match images with relevant descriptions at the global level, without considering the alignment between image regions and descriptions. This paper introduces VITR, a novel network that enhances ViT by extracting and reasoning about image region relations based on a local encoder. VITR is comprised of two key components. Firstly, it extends the capabilities of ViT-based cross-modal networks by enabling them to extract and reason with region relations present in images. Secondly, VITR incorporates a fusion module that combines the reasoned results with global knowledge to predict similarity scores between images and descriptions. The proposed VITR network was evaluated through experiments on the tasks of relation-focused cross-modal information retrieval. The results derived from the analysis of the RefCOCOg, CLEVR, and Flickr30K datasets demonstrated that the proposed VITR network consistently outperforms state-of-the-art networks in image-to-text and text-to-image retrieval.
abstract_zh: 用户查询中表达的关系对于跨模式信息检索至关重要。以关系为中心的跨模态检索旨在检索与这些关系相对应的信息，从而实现跨不同模态的有效检索。预训练网络，例如对比语言图像预训练（CLIP），因其在各种跨模态学习任务中的出色表现而受到广泛关注和赞誉。然而，这些网络中使用的视觉变换器（ViT）在关注图像区域关系方面的能力受到限制。具体来说，ViT 被训练为在全局级别将图像与相关描述进行匹配，而不考虑图像区域和描述之间的对齐。本文介绍了 VITR，这是一种新颖的网络，它通过基于本地编码器提取和推理图像区域关系来增强 ViT。 VITR 由两个关键部分组成。首先，它扩展了基于 ViT 的跨模态网络的能力，使它们能够提取图像中存在的区域关系并进行推理。其次，VITR 结合了一个融合模块，将推理结果与全局知识相结合，以预测图像和描述之间的相似度分数。通过以关系为中心的跨模式信息检索任务的实验来评估所提出的 VITR 网络。对 RefCOCOg、CLEVR 和 Flickr30K 数据集分析得出的结果表明，所提出的 VITR 网络在图像到文本和文本到图像检索方面始终优于最先进的网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VITR网络，通过增强视觉Transformer对图像区域关系的建模能力，提升跨模态信息检索效果。
AI.motivation: 现有预训练模型（如CLIP）在跨模态检索中忽视了图像区域与文本描述的对齐关系，难以有效处理基于关系的查询任务。
AI.method: 设计包含局部编码器的双组件网络：1) 提取并推理图像区域关系；2) 融合局部关系推理结果与全局知识预测模态间相似度。
AI.result: 在RefCOCOg、CLEVR和Flickr30K数据集上，VITR在图文检索和文图检索任务中均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合局部区域关系建模与全局语义融合，VITR有效提升了跨模态信息检索中对关系语义的理解与匹配能力。

title: Text2shape Deep Retrieval Model: Generating Initial Cases for Mechanical Part Redesign under the Context of Case-Based Reasoning
title_zh: Text2shape深度检索模型：在基于案例推理的背景下生成机械零件重新设计的初始案例
abstract: Retrieving the similar solutions from the historical case base for new design requirements is the first step in mechanical part redesign under the context of case-based reasoning. However, the manual retrieving method has the problem of low efficiency when the case base is large. Additionally, it is difficult for simple reasoning algorithms (e.g., rule-based reasoning, decision tree) to cover all the features in complicated design solutions. In this regard, a text2shape deep retrieval model is established in order to support text description-based mechanical part shapes retrieval, where the texts are for describing the structural features of the target mechanical parts. More specifically, feature engineering is applied to identify the key structural features of the target mechanical parts. Based on the identified key structural features, a training set of 1000 samples was constructed, where each sample consisted of a paragraph of text description of a group of structural features and the corresponding 3D shape of the structural features. RNN and 3D CNN algorithms were customized to build the text2shape deep retrieval model. Orthogonal experiments were used for modeling turning. Eventually, the highest accuracy of the model was 0.98; therefore, the model can be effective for retrieving initial cases for mechanical part redesign.
summary: Retrieving the similar solutions from the historical case base for new design requirements is the first step in mechanical part redesign under the context of case-based reasoning. However, the manual retrieving method has the problem of low efficiency when the case base is large. Additionally, it is difficult for simple reasoning algorithms (e.g., rule-based reasoning, decision tree) to cover all the features in complicated design solutions. In this regard, a text2shape deep retrieval model is established in order to support text description-based mechanical part shapes retrieval, where the texts are for describing the structural features of the target mechanical parts. More specifically, feature engineering is applied to identify the key structural features of the target mechanical parts. Based on the identified key structural features, a training set of 1000 samples was constructed, where each sample consisted of a paragraph of text description of a group of structural features and the corresponding 3D shape of the structural features. RNN and 3D CNN algorithms were customized to build the text2shape deep retrieval model. Orthogonal experiments were used for modeling turning. Eventually, the highest accuracy of the model was 0.98; therefore, the model can be effective for retrieving initial cases for mechanical part redesign.
abstract_zh: 从历史案例库中检索类似的解决方案以满足新的设计要求是基于案例推理的机械零件重新设计的第一步。然而，当案例库较大时，手动检索方法存在效率低下的问题。此外，简单的推理算法（例如基于规则的推理、决策树）很难涵盖复杂设计解决方案中的所有功能。为此，建立了text2shape深度检索模型，以支持基于文本描述的机械零件形状检索，其中文本用于描述目标机械零件的结构特征。更具体地说，特征工程用于识别目标机械零件的关键结构特征。基于识别出的关键结构特征，构建了1000个样本的训练集，其中每个样本由一组结构特征的一段文本描述以及结构特征对应的3D形状组成。定制 RNN 和 3D CNN 算法来构建 text2shape 深度检索模型。正交实验用于车削建模。最终模型的最高准确度为0.98；因此，该模型可以有效地检索机械零件重新设计的初始案例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于文本描述的机械零件形状检索深度模型Text2shape，用于支持基于案例推理的机械零件再设计初始案例生成。
AI.motivation: 传统手动检索效率低且简单算法难以覆盖复杂设计特征，需开发高效文本到形状的深度检索方法以提升机械零件再设计效率。
AI.method: 通过特征工程提取关键结构特征，构建1000样本训练集（含文本描述与3D形状），采用定制RNN和3D CNN算法结合正交实验优化模型结构。
AI.result: 模型最高准确率达0.98，验证了其在机械零件初始案例检索中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Text2shape模型可有效提升机械零件再设计中基于文本描述的初始案例检索效率与准确性。

search_text: Text2shape Deep Retrieval Model: Generating Initial Cases for Mechanical Part Redesign under the Context of Case-Based Reasoning Text2shape深度检索模型：在基于案例推理的背景下生成机械零件重新设计的初始案例 Retrieving the similar solutions from the historical case base for new design requirements is the first step in mechanical part redesign under the context of case-based reasoning. However, the manual retrieving method has the problem of low efficiency when the case base is large. Additionally, it is difficult for simple reasoning algorithms (e.g., rule-based reasoning, decision tree) to cover all the features in complicated design solutions. In this regard, a text2shape deep retrieval model is established in order to support text description-based mechanical part shapes retrieval, where the texts are for describing the structural features of the target mechanical parts. More specifically, feature engineering is applied to identify the key structural features of the target mechanical parts. Based on the identified key structural features, a training set of 1000 samples was constructed, where each sample consisted of a paragraph of text description of a group of structural features and the corresponding 3D shape of the structural features. RNN and 3D CNN algorithms were customized to build the text2shape deep retrieval model. Orthogonal experiments were used for modeling turning. Eventually, the highest accuracy of the model was 0.98; therefore, the model can be effective for retrieving initial cases for mechanical part redesign. 从历史案例库中检索类似的解决方案以满足新的设计要求是基于案例推理的机械零件重新设计的第一步。然而，当案例库较大时，手动检索方法存在效率低下的问题。此外，简单的推理算法（例如基于规则的推理、决策树）很难涵盖复杂设计解决方案中的所有功能。为此，建立了text2shape深度检索模型，以支持基于文本描述的机械零件形状检索，其中文本用于描述目标机械零件的结构特征。更具体地说，特征工程用于识别目标机械零件的关键结构特征。基于识别出的关键结构特征，构建了1000个样本的训练集，其中每个样本由一组结构特征的一段文本描述以及结构特征对应的3D形状组成。定制 RNN 和 3D CNN 算法来构建 text2shape 深度检索模型。正交实验用于车削建模。最终模型的最高准确度为0.98；因此，该模型可以有效地检索机械零件重新设计的初始案例。 本文提出了一种基于文本描述的机械零件形状检索深度模型Text2shape，用于支持基于案例推理的机械零件再设计初始案例生成。 Tianshuo Zang,Maolin Yang,Wentao Yong,Pingyu Jiang cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.IR

title: Learning from Noisy Crowd Labels with Logics
title_zh: 从喧闹的人群标签中学习逻辑
abstract: This paper explores the integration of symbolic logic knowledge into deep neural networks for learning from noisy crowd labels. We introduce Logic-guided Learning from Noisy Crowd Labels (Logic-LNCL), an EM-alike iterative logic knowledge distillation framework that learns from both noisy labeled data and logic rules of interest. Unlike traditional EM methods, our framework contains a ``pseudo-E-step'' that distills from the logic rules a new type of learning target, which is then used in the ``pseudo-M-step'' for training the classifier. Extensive evaluations on two real-world datasets for text sentiment classification and named entity recognition demonstrate that the proposed framework improves the state-of-the-art and provides a new solution to learning from noisy crowd labels.
summary: This paper explores the integration of symbolic logic knowledge into deep neural networks for learning from noisy crowd labels. We introduce Logic-guided Learning from Noisy Crowd Labels (Logic-LNCL), an EM-alike iterative logic knowledge distillation framework that learns from both noisy labeled data and logic rules of interest. Unlike traditional EM methods, our framework contains a ``pseudo-E-step'' that distills from the logic rules a new type of learning target, which is then used in the ``pseudo-M-step'' for training the classifier. Extensive evaluations on two real-world datasets for text sentiment classification and named entity recognition demonstrate that the proposed framework improves the state-of-the-art and provides a new solution to learning from noisy crowd labels.
abstract_zh: 本文探讨了将符号逻辑知识集成到深度神经网络中，以便从嘈杂的人群标签中学习。我们引入了从嘈杂人群标签中进行逻辑引导学习（Logic-LNCL），这是一种类似 EM 的迭代逻辑知识蒸馏框架，可以从嘈杂的标记数据和感兴趣的逻辑规则中学习。与传统的 EM 方法不同，我们的框架包含一个“伪 E 步”，它从逻辑规则中提取出一种新型的学习目标，然后在“伪 M 步”中使用该目标来训练分类器。对两个现实世界数据集的文本情感分类和命名实体识别的广泛评估表明，所提出的框架提高了最先进的水平，并提供了一种从嘈杂的人群标签中学习的新解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合符号逻辑知识的深度学习框架，用于处理带有噪声的众包标签问题。
AI.motivation: 传统EM方法在处理噪声标签时效果有限，而逻辑规则能提供额外约束，需探索两者的结合以提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出Logic-LNCL框架，包含伪E步（从逻辑规则蒸馏学习目标）和伪M步（基于蒸馏目标训练分类器）的迭代知识蒸馏机制。
AI.result: 在文本情感分类和命名实体识别数据集上实验表明，该方法优于现有最先进技术，有效缓解噪声标签影响。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合逻辑规则与深度学习，提出的新框架为噪声众包标签学习提供了有效解决方案。

title: Online Arbitrary Shaped Clustering through Correlated Gaussian Functions
title_zh: 通过相关高斯函数进行在线任意形状聚类
comment: Corrected uniform distribution range; removed "average" from last sentence in section 4
comments: Corrected uniform distribution range; removed "average" from last sentence in section 4
abstract: There is no convincing evidence that backpropagation is a biologically plausible mechanism, and further studies of alternative learning methods are needed. A novel online clustering algorithm is presented that can produce arbitrary shaped clusters from inputs in an unsupervised manner, and requires no prior knowledge of the number of clusters in the input data. This is achieved by finding correlated outputs from functions that capture commonly occurring input patterns. The algorithm can be deemed more biologically plausible than model optimization through backpropagation, although practical applicability may require additional research. However, the method yields satisfactory results on several toy datasets on a noteworthy range of hyperparameters.
summary: There is no convincing evidence that backpropagation is a biologically plausible mechanism, and further studies of alternative learning methods are needed. A novel online clustering algorithm is presented that can produce arbitrary shaped clusters from inputs in an unsupervised manner, and requires no prior knowledge of the number of clusters in the input data. This is achieved by finding correlated outputs from functions that capture commonly occurring input patterns. The algorithm can be deemed more biologically plausible than model optimization through backpropagation, although practical applicability may require additional research. However, the method yields satisfactory results on several toy datasets on a noteworthy range of hyperparameters.
abstract_zh: 没有令人信服的证据表明反向传播是一种生物学上合理的机制，需要对替代学习方法进行进一步研究。提出了一种新颖的在线聚类算法，该算法可以以无监督的方式从输入生成任意形状的聚类，并且不需要先验知识输入数据中的聚类数量。这是通过从捕获常见输入模式的函数中查找相关输出来实现的。该算法可以被认为比通过反向传播的模型优化在生物学上更合理，尽管实际适用性可能需要额外的研究。然而，该方法在几个值得注意的超参数范围的玩具数据集上产生了令人满意的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需先验知识的在线聚类算法，能够从输入数据中无监督生成任意形状的聚类。
AI.motivation: 反向传播机制的生物合理性存疑，需探索替代学习方法；现有聚类方法常依赖聚类数量先验知识。
AI.method: 通过相关高斯函数捕捉常见输入模式，利用函数输出相关性实现无监督聚类。
AI.result: 在多个玩具数据集上验证了算法有效性，且在较宽超参数范围内表现稳定。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在生物合理性上优于反向传播，但实际应用需进一步研究，当前在理论验证阶段表现良好。

authors_text: Deepak Kumar,Oleg Lesota,George Zerveas,Daniel Cohen,Carsten Eickhoff,Markus Schedl,Navid Rekabsaz
title: Parameter-efficient Modularised Bias Mitigation via AdapterFusion
title_zh: 通过 AdapterFusion 实现参数高效的模块化偏差缓解
abstract: Large pre-trained language models contain societal biases and carry along these biases to downstream tasks. Current in-processing bias mitigation approaches (like adversarial training) impose debiasing by updating a model's parameters, effectively transferring the model to a new, irreversible debiased state. In this work, we propose a novel approach to develop stand-alone debiasing functionalities separate from the model, which can be integrated into the model on-demand, while keeping the core model untouched. Drawing from the concept of AdapterFusion in multi-task learning, we introduce DAM (Debiasing with Adapter Modules) - a debiasing approach to first encapsulate arbitrary bias mitigation functionalities into separate adapters, and then add them to the model on-demand in order to deliver fairness qualities. We conduct a large set of experiments on three classification tasks with gender, race, and age as protected attributes. Our results show that DAM improves or maintains the effectiveness of bias mitigation, avoids catastrophic forgetting in a multi-attribute scenario, and maintains on-par task performance, while granting parameter-efficiency and easy switching between the original and debiased models.
summary: Large pre-trained language models contain societal biases and carry along these biases to downstream tasks. Current in-processing bias mitigation approaches (like adversarial training) impose debiasing by updating a model's parameters, effectively transferring the model to a new, irreversible debiased state. In this work, we propose a novel approach to develop stand-alone debiasing functionalities separate from the model, which can be integrated into the model on-demand, while keeping the core model untouched. Drawing from the concept of AdapterFusion in multi-task learning, we introduce DAM (Debiasing with Adapter Modules) - a debiasing approach to first encapsulate arbitrary bias mitigation functionalities into separate adapters, and then add them to the model on-demand in order to deliver fairness qualities. We conduct a large set of experiments on three classification tasks with gender, race, and age as protected attributes. Our results show that DAM improves or maintains the effectiveness of bias mitigation, avoids catastrophic forgetting in a multi-attribute scenario, and maintains on-par task performance, while granting parameter-efficiency and easy switching between the original and debiased models.
abstract_zh: 大型预训练语言模型包含社会偏见，并将这些偏见带到下游任务中。当前的处理中偏差缓解方法（如对抗性训练）通过更新模型参数来施加去偏差，有效地将模型转移到新的、不可逆的去偏差状态。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法来开发与模型分离的独立去偏功能，该功能可以按需集成到模型中，同时保持核心模型不变。借鉴多任务学习中 AdapterFusion 的概念，我们引入了 DAM（使用适配器模块去偏）——一种去偏方法，首先将任意偏差缓解功能封装到单独的适配器中，然后按需将它们添加到模型中，以提供公平性。我们对以性别、种族和年龄作为受保护属性的三个分类任务进行了大量实验。我们的结果表明，DAM 提高或保持了偏差缓解的有效性，避免了多属性场景中的灾难性遗忘，并保持了同等的任务性能，同时提供了参数效率以及原始模型和去偏差模型之间的轻松切换。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种参数高效且模块化的偏见缓解方法DAM，通过适配器模块在不修改核心模型的前提下实现按需去偏。
AI.motivation: 现有去偏方法通过更新模型参数导致模型不可逆改变，且多属性场景易引发灾难性遗忘，需开发独立于模型的可插拔去偏方案。
AI.method: 基于AdapterFusion思想，将任意去偏功能封装为独立适配器模块（DAM），运行时按需加载至模型中实现公平性增强。
AI.result: 在性别/种族/年龄三类任务中，DAM在保持任务性能的同时提升去偏效果，避免多属性场景下的灾难性遗忘，且参数效率高、支持原模型与去偏模型快速切换。
AI.conclusion: DAM通过模块化适配器实现参数高效、非侵入式的偏见缓解，为大型预训练模型的公平性优化提供了灵活可扩展的解决方案。

search_text: Parameter-efficient Modularised Bias Mitigation via AdapterFusion 通过 AdapterFusion 实现参数高效的模块化偏差缓解 Large pre-trained language models contain societal biases and carry along these biases to downstream tasks. Current in-processing bias mitigation approaches (like adversarial training) impose debiasing by updating a model's parameters, effectively transferring the model to a new, irreversible debiased state. In this work, we propose a novel approach to develop stand-alone debiasing functionalities separate from the model, which can be integrated into the model on-demand, while keeping the core model untouched. Drawing from the concept of AdapterFusion in multi-task learning, we introduce DAM (Debiasing with Adapter Modules) - a debiasing approach to first encapsulate arbitrary bias mitigation functionalities into separate adapters, and then add them to the model on-demand in order to deliver fairness qualities. We conduct a large set of experiments on three classification tasks with gender, race, and age as protected attributes. Our results show that DAM improves or maintains the effectiveness of bias mitigation, avoids catastrophic forgetting in a multi-attribute scenario, and maintains on-par task performance, while granting parameter-efficiency and easy switching between the original and debiased models. 大型预训练语言模型包含社会偏见，并将这些偏见带到下游任务中。当前的处理中偏差缓解方法（如对抗性训练）通过更新模型参数来施加去偏差，有效地将模型转移到新的、不可逆的去偏差状态。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法来开发与模型分离的独立去偏功能，该功能可以按需集成到模型中，同时保持核心模型不变。借鉴多任务学习中 AdapterFusion 的概念，我们引入了 DAM（使用适配器模块去偏）——一种去偏方法，首先将任意偏差缓解功能封装到单独的适配器中，然后按需将它们添加到模型中，以提供公平性。我们对以性别、种族和年龄作为受保护属性的三个分类任务进行了大量实验。我们的结果表明，DAM 提高或保持了偏差缓解的有效性，避免了多属性场景中的灾难性遗忘，并保持了同等的任务性能，同时提供了参数效率以及原始模型和去偏差模型之间的轻松切换。 本文提出一种参数高效且模块化的偏见缓解方法DAM，通过适配器模块在不修改核心模型的前提下实现按需去偏。 Deepak Kumar,Oleg Lesota,George Zerveas,Daniel Cohen,Carsten Eickhoff,Markus Schedl,Navid Rekabsaz cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Towards Writing Style Adaptation in Handwriting Recognition
title_zh: 手写识别中的书写风格适应
abstract: One of the challenges of handwriting recognition is to transcribe a large number of vastly different writing styles. State-of-the-art approaches do not explicitly use information about the writer's style, which may be limiting overall accuracy due to various ambiguities. We explore models with writer-dependent parameters which take the writer's identity as an additional input. The proposed models can be trained on datasets with partitions likely written by a single author (e.g. single letter, diary, or chronicle). We propose a Writer Style Block (WSB), an adaptive instance normalization layer conditioned on learned embeddings of the partitions. We experimented with various placements and settings of WSB and contrastively pre-trained embeddings. We show that our approach outperforms a baseline with no WSB in a writer-dependent scenario and that it is possible to estimate embeddings for new writers. However, domain adaptation using simple fine-tuning in a writer-independent setting provides superior accuracy at a similar computational cost. The proposed approach should be further investigated in terms of training stability and embedding regularization to overcome such a baseline.
summary: One of the challenges of handwriting recognition is to transcribe a large number of vastly different writing styles. State-of-the-art approaches do not explicitly use information about the writer's style, which may be limiting overall accuracy due to various ambiguities. We explore models with writer-dependent parameters which take the writer's identity as an additional input. The proposed models can be trained on datasets with partitions likely written by a single author (e.g. single letter, diary, or chronicle). We propose a Writer Style Block (WSB), an adaptive instance normalization layer conditioned on learned embeddings of the partitions. We experimented with various placements and settings of WSB and contrastively pre-trained embeddings. We show that our approach outperforms a baseline with no WSB in a writer-dependent scenario and that it is possible to estimate embeddings for new writers. However, domain adaptation using simple fine-tuning in a writer-independent setting provides superior accuracy at a similar computational cost. The proposed approach should be further investigated in terms of training stability and embedding regularization to overcome such a baseline.
abstract_zh: 手写识别的挑战之一是转录大量截然不同的书写风格。最先进的方法没有明确使用有关作者风格的信息，这可能会由于各种模糊性而限制整体准确性。我们探索具有与作者相关的参数的模型，这些参数将作者的身份作为附加输入。所提出的模型可以在可能由单个作者（例如单个字母、日记或编年史）编写的分区的数据集上进行训练。我们提出了一个 Writer Style Block（WSB），一个以学习到的分区嵌入为条件的自适应实例归一化层。我们尝试了 WSB 的各种放置和设置以及对比预训练的嵌入。我们证明，在依赖于作者的场景中，我们的方法优于没有 WSB 的基线，并且可以估计新作者的嵌入。然而，在独立于作者的设置中使用简单微调的域适应以类似的计算成本提供了卓越的准确性。应该在训练稳定性和嵌入正则化方面进一步研究所提出的方法，以克服这样的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何在手写识别中适应不同写作风格，通过引入作者身份信息提升识别准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有手写识别方法未显式利用作者风格信息，导致因风格差异产生的歧义影响整体准确性。
AI.method: 提出基于作者身份的自适应模型，包含条件化实例归一化层（WSB），并结合分区嵌入与对比预训练技术。
AI.result: 作者依赖场景下优于基线模型，但作者独立场景中简单微调效果更优，且新作者嵌入可估计。
AI.conclusion: 需进一步研究训练稳定性与嵌入正则化以优化当前方法的性能表现。

title: Why BCIs work poorly with the patients who need them the most?
title_zh: 为什么脑机接口对最需要它们的患者效果不佳？
abstract: A major objective of Brain-Computer interfaces (BCI) is to restore communication and control in patients with severe motor impairments, like people with Locked-in syndrome. These patients are left only with limited eye and eyelid movements. However, they do not benefit from efficient BCI solutions, yet. Different signals can be used as commands for non-invasive BCI: mu and beta rhythm desynchronization, evoked potentials and slow cortical potentials. Whatever the signal, clinical studies show a dramatic loss of performance in severely impaired patients compared to healthy subjects. Interestingly, the control principle is always the same, namely the replacement of an impossible (overt) movement by a (covert) attentional command. Drawing from the premotor theory of attention, from neuroimaging findings about the functional anatomy of spatial attention, from clinical observations and from recent computational accounts of attention for both action and perception, we explore the hypothesis that these patients undergo negative plasticity that extends their impairment from overt to covert attentional processes.
summary: A major objective of Brain-Computer interfaces (BCI) is to restore communication and control in patients with severe motor impairments, like people with Locked-in syndrome. These patients are left only with limited eye and eyelid movements. However, they do not benefit from efficient BCI solutions, yet. Different signals can be used as commands for non-invasive BCI: mu and beta rhythm desynchronization, evoked potentials and slow cortical potentials. Whatever the signal, clinical studies show a dramatic loss of performance in severely impaired patients compared to healthy subjects. Interestingly, the control principle is always the same, namely the replacement of an impossible (overt) movement by a (covert) attentional command. Drawing from the premotor theory of attention, from neuroimaging findings about the functional anatomy of spatial attention, from clinical observations and from recent computational accounts of attention for both action and perception, we explore the hypothesis that these patients undergo negative plasticity that extends their impairment from overt to covert attentional processes.
abstract_zh: 脑机接口 (BCI) 的一个主要目标是恢复患有严重运动障碍的患者（如闭锁综合症患者）的沟通和控制。这些患者的眼睛和眼睑运动仅限于有限。然而，他们还没有从高效的 BCI 解决方案中受益。不同的信号可用作非侵入性 BCI 的命令：mu 和 beta 节律去同步、诱发电位和慢皮层电位。无论信号如何，临床研究表明，与健康受试者相比，严重受损的患者的表现明显下降。有趣的是，控制原理总是相同的，即用（隐蔽的）注意力命令代替不可能的（公开的）运动。根据注意力的运动前理论、空间注意力功能解剖学的神经影像学发现、临床观察以及最近对动作和知觉注意力的计算解释，我们探索了这样的假设：这些患者经历了负可塑性，将他们的损伤从明显的注意力过程扩展到了隐蔽的注意力过程。

AI.tldr: 探讨脑机接口（BCI）在严重运动障碍患者（如闭锁综合征患者）中效果不佳的原因。
AI.motivation: 现有BCI技术无法有效帮助最需要其帮助的严重运动障碍患者，需揭示其性能下降的潜在机制。
AI.method: 结合前运动注意理论、神经影像学数据、临床观察及计算模型，分析患者是否存在从外显运动到内隐注意的负向可塑性。
AI.result: 临床研究显示严重患者BCI性能显著低于健康人，可能因负向可塑性导致内隐注意过程受损。
AI.conclusion: 负向可塑性可能是BCI在严重患者中失效的关键因素，需针对性优化BCI设计或干预策略。

search_text: Why BCIs work poorly with the patients who need them the most? 为什么脑机接口对最需要它们的患者效果不佳？ A major objective of Brain-Computer interfaces (BCI) is to restore communication and control in patients with severe motor impairments, like people with Locked-in syndrome. These patients are left only with limited eye and eyelid movements. However, they do not benefit from efficient BCI solutions, yet. Different signals can be used as commands for non-invasive BCI: mu and beta rhythm desynchronization, evoked potentials and slow cortical potentials. Whatever the signal, clinical studies show a dramatic loss of performance in severely impaired patients compared to healthy subjects. Interestingly, the control principle is always the same, namely the replacement of an impossible (overt) movement by a (covert) attentional command. Drawing from the premotor theory of attention, from neuroimaging findings about the functional anatomy of spatial attention, from clinical observations and from recent computational accounts of attention for both action and perception, we explore the hypothesis that these patients undergo negative plasticity that extends their impairment from overt to covert attentional processes. 脑机接口 (BCI) 的一个主要目标是恢复患有严重运动障碍的患者（如闭锁综合症患者）的沟通和控制。这些患者的眼睛和眼睑运动仅限于有限。然而，他们还没有从高效的 BCI 解决方案中受益。不同的信号可用作非侵入性 BCI 的命令：mu 和 beta 节律去同步、诱发电位和慢皮层电位。无论信号如何，临床研究表明，与健康受试者相比，严重受损的患者的表现明显下降。有趣的是，控制原理总是相同的，即用（隐蔽的）注意力命令代替不可能的（公开的）运动。根据注意力的运动前理论、空间注意力功能解剖学的神经影像学发现、临床观察以及最近对动作和知觉注意力的计算解释，我们探索了这样的假设：这些患者经历了负可塑性，将他们的损伤从明显的注意力过程扩展到了隐蔽的注意力过程。 探讨脑机接口（BCI）在严重运动障碍患者（如闭锁综合征患者）中效果不佳的原因。 P Séguin,E Maby,J Mattout cs.HC

title: Fine-tuning Is a Surprisingly Effective Domain Adaptation Baseline in Handwriting Recognition
title_zh: 微调是手写识别中非常有效的领域适应基线
abstract: In many machine learning tasks, a large general dataset and a small specialized dataset are available. In such situations, various domain adaptation methods can be used to adapt a general model to the target dataset. We show that in the case of neural networks trained for handwriting recognition using CTC, simple fine-tuning with data augmentation works surprisingly well in such scenarios and that it is resistant to overfitting even for very small target domain datasets. We evaluated the behavior of fine-tuning with respect to augmentation, training data size, and quality of the pre-trained network, both in writer-dependent and writer-independent settings. On a large real-world dataset, fine-tuning on new writers provided an average relative CER improvement of 25 % for 16 text lines and 50 % for 256 text lines.
summary: In many machine learning tasks, a large general dataset and a small specialized dataset are available. In such situations, various domain adaptation methods can be used to adapt a general model to the target dataset. We show that in the case of neural networks trained for handwriting recognition using CTC, simple fine-tuning with data augmentation works surprisingly well in such scenarios and that it is resistant to overfitting even for very small target domain datasets. We evaluated the behavior of fine-tuning with respect to augmentation, training data size, and quality of the pre-trained network, both in writer-dependent and writer-independent settings. On a large real-world dataset, fine-tuning on new writers provided an average relative CER improvement of 25 % for 16 text lines and 50 % for 256 text lines.
abstract_zh: 在许多机器学习任务中，可以使用大型通用数据集和小型专用数据集。在这种情况下，可以使用各种领域适应方法来使通用模型适应目标数据集。我们表明，在使用 CTC 训练用于手写识别的神经网络的情况下，通过数据增强进行简单微调在这种情况下效果出人意料地好，即使对于非常小的目标域数据集，它也能抵抗过度拟合。我们评估了在依赖于作者和独立于作者的设置中，在增强、训练数据大小和预训练网络质量方面的微调行为。在大型现实数据集上，对新编写器进行微调，16 个文本行的平均相对 CER 提高了 25%，256 个文本行的平均相对 CER 提高了 50%。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在手写识别任务中，通过微调和数据增强进行领域适应的有效性，特别是在目标领域数据量极少的情况下。
AI.motivation: 在机器学习任务中，通常存在大量通用数据集和少量专用数据集，传统领域适应方法复杂且效果有限，需探索更简单有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用CTC训练的神经网络，通过微调结合数据增强策略，在依赖书写者和不依赖书写者的场景下，评估不同数据规模及预训练网络质量的影响。
AI.result: 在真实大规模数据集上，对新书写者微调后，16行文本字符错误率平均降低25%，256行文本降低50%，且未出现过拟合。
AI.conclusion: 微调结合数据增强是手写识别领域适应的有效基线方法，尤其适用于目标领域数据稀缺的场景。

authors_text: Xiaoqian Huang,Kachole Sanket,Abdulla Ayyad,Fariborz Baghaei Naeini,Dimitrios Makris,Yahya Zweiri
title: A Neuromorphic Dataset for Object Segmentation in Indoor Cluttered Environment
title_zh: 用于室内杂乱环境中对象分割的神经形态数据集
abstract: Taking advantage of an event-based camera, the issues of motion blur, low dynamic range and low time sampling of standard cameras can all be addressed. However, there is a lack of event-based datasets dedicated to the benchmarking of segmentation algorithms, especially those that provide depth information which is critical for segmentation in occluded scenes. This paper proposes a new Event-based Segmentation Dataset (ESD), a high-quality 3D spatial and temporal dataset for object segmentation in an indoor cluttered environment. Our proposed dataset ESD comprises 145 sequences with 14,166 RGB frames that are manually annotated with instance masks. Overall 21.88 million and 20.80 million events from two event-based cameras in a stereo-graphic configuration are collected, respectively. To the best of our knowledge, this densely annotated and 3D spatial-temporal event-based segmentation benchmark of tabletop objects is the first of its kind. By releasing ESD, we expect to provide the community with a challenging segmentation benchmark with high quality.
summary: Taking advantage of an event-based camera, the issues of motion blur, low dynamic range and low time sampling of standard cameras can all be addressed. However, there is a lack of event-based datasets dedicated to the benchmarking of segmentation algorithms, especially those that provide depth information which is critical for segmentation in occluded scenes. This paper proposes a new Event-based Segmentation Dataset (ESD), a high-quality 3D spatial and temporal dataset for object segmentation in an indoor cluttered environment. Our proposed dataset ESD comprises 145 sequences with 14,166 RGB frames that are manually annotated with instance masks. Overall 21.88 million and 20.80 million events from two event-based cameras in a stereo-graphic configuration are collected, respectively. To the best of our knowledge, this densely annotated and 3D spatial-temporal event-based segmentation benchmark of tabletop objects is the first of its kind. By releasing ESD, we expect to provide the community with a challenging segmentation benchmark with high quality.
abstract_zh: 利用基于事件的相机，可以解决标准相机的运动模糊、低动态范围和低时间采样的问题。然而，缺乏专门用于分割算法基准测试的基于事件的数据集，特别是那些提供对于遮挡场景中的分割至关重要的深度信息的数据集。本文提出了一种新的基于事件的分割数据集 (ESD)，这是一种用于室内杂乱环境中的对象分割的高质量 3D 时空数据集。我们提出的数据集 ESD 包含 145 个序列和 14,166 个 RGB 帧，并使用实例掩码手动注释。来自立体图形配置中的两个基于事件的摄像机分别收集了总共 2188 万个和 2080 万个事件。据我们所知，这种密集注释的、基于 3D 时空事件的桌面对象分割基准是同类中的第一个。通过发布 ESD，我们希望为社区提供一个具有挑战性的高质量细分基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个用于室内杂乱环境中物体分割的神经形态数据集ESD，包含高精度3D时空标注数据。
AI.motivation: 传统相机存在运动模糊和动态范围限制，现有基于事件的相机数据集缺乏深度信息和密集标注，难以支持遮挡场景的分割算法评估。
AI.method: 通过双目事件相机采集145个序列的RGB帧和事件数据，结合人工标注的实例掩码，构建包含2188万事件和2080万事件的立体时空数据集。
AI.result: 创建了首个密集标注的室内物体分割事件基准数据集ESD，包含14,166张手动标注的RGB帧和双目事件数据。
AI.conclusion: ESD为分割算法研究提供了高质量基准，推动神经形态相机在复杂场景下的应用发展。

authors_text: Jiayan Guo,Lun Du,Wendong Bi,Qiang Fu,Xiaojun Ma,Xu Chen,Shi Han,Dongmei Zhang,Yan Zhang
title: Homophily-oriented Heterogeneous Graph Rewiring
title_zh: 面向同质的异构图重新布线
abstract: With the rapid development of the World Wide Web (WWW), heterogeneous graphs (HG) have explosive growth. Recently, heterogeneous graph neural network (HGNN) has shown great potential in learning on HG. Current studies of HGNN mainly focus on some HGs with strong homophily properties (nodes connected by meta-path tend to have the same labels), while few discussions are made in those that are less homophilous. Recently, there have been many works on homogeneous graphs with heterophily. However, due to heterogeneity, it is non-trivial to extend their approach to deal with HGs with heterophily. In this work, based on empirical observations, we propose a meta-path-induced metric to measure the homophily degree of a HG. We also find that current HGNNs may have degenerated performance when handling HGs with less homophilous properties. Thus it is essential to increase the generalization ability of HGNNs on non-homophilous HGs. To this end, we propose HDHGR, a homophily-oriented deep heterogeneous graph rewiring approach that modifies the HG structure to increase the performance of HGNN. We theoretically verify HDHGR. In addition, experiments on real-world HGs demonstrate the effectiveness of HDHGR, which brings at most more than 10% relative gain.
summary: With the rapid development of the World Wide Web (WWW), heterogeneous graphs (HG) have explosive growth. Recently, heterogeneous graph neural network (HGNN) has shown great potential in learning on HG. Current studies of HGNN mainly focus on some HGs with strong homophily properties (nodes connected by meta-path tend to have the same labels), while few discussions are made in those that are less homophilous. Recently, there have been many works on homogeneous graphs with heterophily. However, due to heterogeneity, it is non-trivial to extend their approach to deal with HGs with heterophily. In this work, based on empirical observations, we propose a meta-path-induced metric to measure the homophily degree of a HG. We also find that current HGNNs may have degenerated performance when handling HGs with less homophilous properties. Thus it is essential to increase the generalization ability of HGNNs on non-homophilous HGs. To this end, we propose HDHGR, a homophily-oriented deep heterogeneous graph rewiring approach that modifies the HG structure to increase the performance of HGNN. We theoretically verify HDHGR. In addition, experiments on real-world HGs demonstrate the effectiveness of HDHGR, which brings at most more than 10% relative gain.
abstract_zh: 随着万维网（WWW）的快速发展，异构图（HG）出现爆炸式增长。最近，异构图神经网络（HGNN）在 HG 学习方面表现出了巨大的潜力。目前HGNN的研究主要集中在一些同质性较强的HG（通过元路径连接的节点往往具有相同的标签），而对于同质性较差的HG则很少进行讨论。最近，有许多关于具有异性的齐次图的工作。然而，由于异质性，扩展他们的方法来处理具有异质性的 HG 并非易事。在这项工作中，基于经验观察，我们提出了一种元路径诱导的度量来衡量 HG 的同质程度。我们还发现，当前的 HGNN 在处理同质性较差的 HG 时可能会出现性能退化。因此，提高 HGNN 对非同质 HG 的泛化能力至关重要。为此，我们提出了 HDHGR，一种面向同质性的深度异构图重新布线方法，该方法修改 HG 结构以提高 HGNN 的性能。我们从理论上验证了HDHGR。此外，对现实世界 HG 的实验证明了 HDHGR 的有效性，最多可带来超过 10% 的相对增益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向同质性的异构图重布线方法HDHGR，通过修改异构图结构提升异构图神经网络（HGNN）在非同质性图上的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有HGNN在处理高同质性图时表现良好，但对低同质性图效果不佳，且缺乏针对异构图异质性的有效解决方案。
AI.method: 基于元路径诱导的度量方法评估图同质性，设计HDHGR算法通过重布线异构图结构增强HGNN的泛化能力。
AI.result: 在真实世界异构图上的实验表明，HDHGR相较基线方法最多实现10%的相对性能提升，并通过理论验证其有效性。
AI.conclusion: HDHGR通过结构优化有效提升了HGNN在非同质性异构图上的表现，为异构图学习提供了新思路。

search_text: Homophily-oriented Heterogeneous Graph Rewiring 面向同质的异构图重新布线 With the rapid development of the World Wide Web (WWW), heterogeneous graphs (HG) have explosive growth. Recently, heterogeneous graph neural network (HGNN) has shown great potential in learning on HG. Current studies of HGNN mainly focus on some HGs with strong homophily properties (nodes connected by meta-path tend to have the same labels), while few discussions are made in those that are less homophilous. Recently, there have been many works on homogeneous graphs with heterophily. However, due to heterogeneity, it is non-trivial to extend their approach to deal with HGs with heterophily. In this work, based on empirical observations, we propose a meta-path-induced metric to measure the homophily degree of a HG. We also find that current HGNNs may have degenerated performance when handling HGs with less homophilous properties. Thus it is essential to increase the generalization ability of HGNNs on non-homophilous HGs. To this end, we propose HDHGR, a homophily-oriented deep heterogeneous graph rewiring approach that modifies the HG structure to increase the performance of HGNN. We theoretically verify HDHGR. In addition, experiments on real-world HGs demonstrate the effectiveness of HDHGR, which brings at most more than 10% relative gain. 随着万维网（WWW）的快速发展，异构图（HG）出现爆炸式增长。最近，异构图神经网络（HGNN）在 HG 学习方面表现出了巨大的潜力。目前HGNN的研究主要集中在一些同质性较强的HG（通过元路径连接的节点往往具有相同的标签），而对于同质性较差的HG则很少进行讨论。最近，有许多关于具有异性的齐次图的工作。然而，由于异质性，扩展他们的方法来处理具有异质性的 HG 并非易事。在这项工作中，基于经验观察，我们提出了一种元路径诱导的度量来衡量 HG 的同质程度。我们还发现，当前的 HGNN 在处理同质性较差的 HG 时可能会出现性能退化。因此，提高 HGNN 对非同质 HG 的泛化能力至关重要。为此，我们提出了 HDHGR，一种面向同质性的深度异构图重新布线方法，该方法修改 HG 结构以提高 HGNN 的性能。我们从理论上验证了HDHGR。此外，对现实世界 HG 的实验证明了 HDHGR 的有效性，最多可带来超过 10% 的相对增益。 本文提出了一种面向同质性的异构图重布线方法HDHGR，通过修改异构图结构提升异构图神经网络（HGNN）在非同质性图上的性能。 Jiayan Guo,Lun Du,Wendong Bi,Qiang Fu,Xiaojun Ma,Xu Chen,Shi Han,Dongmei Zhang,Yan Zhang cs.SI,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Hyperspectral Image Super Resolution with Real Unaligned RGB Guidance
title_zh: 具有真实未对齐 RGB 引导的高光谱图像超分辨率
comment: The code and dataset are publicly available at https://zeqiang-lai.github.io/HSI-RefSR/
comments: The code and dataset are publicly available at https://zeqiang-lai.github.io/HSI-RefSR/
abstract: Fusion-based hyperspectral image (HSI) super-resolution has become increasingly prevalent for its capability to integrate high-frequency spatial information from the paired high-resolution (HR) RGB reference image. However, most of the existing methods either heavily rely on the accurate alignment between low-resolution (LR) HSIs and RGB images, or can only deal with simulated unaligned RGB images generated by rigid geometric transformations, which weakens their effectiveness for real scenes. In this paper, we explore the fusion-based HSI super-resolution with real RGB reference images that have both rigid and non-rigid misalignments. To properly address the limitations of existing methods for unaligned reference images, we propose an HSI fusion network with heterogenous feature extractions, multi-stage feature alignments, and attentive feature fusion. Specifically, our network first transforms the input HSI and RGB images into two sets of multi-scale features with an HSI encoder and an RGB encoder, respectively. The features of RGB reference images are then processed by a multi-stage alignment module to explicitly align the features of RGB reference with the LR HSI. Finally, the aligned features of RGB reference are further adjusted by an adaptive attention module to focus more on discriminative regions before sending them to the fusion decoder to generate the reconstructed HR HSI. Additionally, we collect a real-world HSI fusion dataset, consisting of paired HSI and unaligned RGB reference, to support the evaluation of the proposed model for real scenes. Extensive experiments are conducted on both simulated and our real-world datasets, and it shows that our method obtains a clear improvement over existing single-image and fusion-based super-resolution methods on quantitative assessment as well as visual comparison.
summary: Fusion-based hyperspectral image (HSI) super-resolution has become increasingly prevalent for its capability to integrate high-frequency spatial information from the paired high-resolution (HR) RGB reference image. However, most of the existing methods either heavily rely on the accurate alignment between low-resolution (LR) HSIs and RGB images, or can only deal with simulated unaligned RGB images generated by rigid geometric transformations, which weakens their effectiveness for real scenes. In this paper, we explore the fusion-based HSI super-resolution with real RGB reference images that have both rigid and non-rigid misalignments. To properly address the limitations of existing methods for unaligned reference images, we propose an HSI fusion network with heterogenous feature extractions, multi-stage feature alignments, and attentive feature fusion. Specifically, our network first transforms the input HSI and RGB images into two sets of multi-scale features with an HSI encoder and an RGB encoder, respectively. The features of RGB reference images are then processed by a multi-stage alignment module to explicitly align the features of RGB reference with the LR HSI. Finally, the aligned features of RGB reference are further adjusted by an adaptive attention module to focus more on discriminative regions before sending them to the fusion decoder to generate the reconstructed HR HSI. Additionally, we collect a real-world HSI fusion dataset, consisting of paired HSI and unaligned RGB reference, to support the evaluation of the proposed model for real scenes. Extensive experiments are conducted on both simulated and our real-world datasets, and it shows that our method obtains a clear improvement over existing single-image and fusion-based super-resolution methods on quantitative assessment as well as visual comparison.
abstract_zh: 基于融合的高光谱图像 (HSI) 超分辨率因其能够集成来自配对高分辨率 (HR) RGB 参考图像的高频空间信息而变得越来越普遍。然而，大多数现有方法要么严重依赖低分辨率（LR）HSI和RGB图像之间的精确对齐，要么只能处理由严格几何变换生成的模拟未对齐RGB图像，这削弱了它们对真实场景的有效性。在本文中，我们探索了基于融合的 HSI 超分辨率与具有刚性和非刚性未对准的真实 RGB 参考图像。为了正确解决现有未对齐参考图像方法的局限性，我们提出了一种具有异构特征提取、多阶段特征对齐和注意力特征融合的 HSI 融合网络。具体来说，我们的网络首先分别使用 HSI 编码器和 RGB 编码器将输入的 HSI 和 RGB 图像转换为两组多尺度特征。然后，RGB 参考图像的特征由多级对齐模块处理，以将 RGB 参考图像的特征与 LR HSI 显式对齐。最后，自适应注意模块进一步调整 RGB 参考的对齐特征，以更多地关注判别区域，然后将其发送到融合解码器以生成重建的 HR HSI。此外，我们收集了一个真实世界的 HSI 融合数据集，由配对的 HSI 和未对齐的 RGB 参考组成，以支持针对真实场景评估所提出的模型。在模拟数据集和真实数据集上进行了大量的实验，结果表明我们的方法在定量评估和视觉比较方面比现有的单图像和基于融合的超分辨率方法有了明显的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于真实未对齐RGB图像引导的高光谱图像超分辨率方法，解决现有方法在处理真实场景中刚性和非刚性错位时的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有高光谱图像超分辨率方法依赖精确对齐或仅处理模拟未对齐RGB图像，难以应对真实场景中复杂的错位情况，限制了实际应用效果。
AI.method: 设计包含异构特征提取、多阶段特征对齐和注意力特征融合的网络架构，通过多尺度编码器提取HSI和RGB特征，利用多阶段对齐模块处理RGB特征与低分辨率HSI的对齐，并通过自适应注意力模块增强判别区域特征，最终融合生成高分辨率HSI。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实数据集上实验表明，该方法在定量评估和视觉对比上均优于现有单图像和融合超分辨率方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的网络有效解决了真实未对齐RGB引导下的高光谱图像超分辨率问题，新构建的真实数据集为实际场景评估提供了支持。

authors_text: Marina Anagnostopoulou-Merkouri,Reinis Cirpons,James D. Mitchell,Maria Tsalakou
title: Computing finite index congruences of finitely presented semigroups and monoids
title_zh: 计算有限半群和幺半群的有限索引同余
comment: 50 pages (7 figures, 21 tables, improved according to referee's comments, to appear in Math. Comp.)
comments: 50 pages (7 figures, 21 tables, improved according to referee's comments, to appear in Math. Comp.)
abstract: In this paper, we describe an algorithm for computing the left, right, or 2-sided congruences of a finitely presented semigroup or monoid with finitely many classes, and an alternative algorithm when the finitely presented semigroup or monoid is finite. We compare the two algorithms presented with existing algorithms and implementations. The first algorithm is a generalization of Sims' low-index subgroup algorithm for finding the congruences of a monoid. The second algorithm involves determining the distinct principal congruences, and then finding all of their possible joins. Variations of this algorithm have been suggested in numerous contexts by numerous authors. We show how to utilize the theory of relative Green's relations, and a version of Schreier's Lemma for monoids, to reduce the number of principal congruences that must be generated as the first step of this approach. Both of the algorithms described in this paper are implemented in the GAP package Semigroups, and the first algorithm is available in the C++ library libsemigroups and in its python bindings libsemigroups_pybind11.
summary: In this paper, we describe an algorithm for computing the left, right, or 2-sided congruences of a finitely presented semigroup or monoid with finitely many classes, and an alternative algorithm when the finitely presented semigroup or monoid is finite. We compare the two algorithms presented with existing algorithms and implementations. The first algorithm is a generalization of Sims' low-index subgroup algorithm for finding the congruences of a monoid. The second algorithm involves determining the distinct principal congruences, and then finding all of their possible joins. Variations of this algorithm have been suggested in numerous contexts by numerous authors. We show how to utilize the theory of relative Green's relations, and a version of Schreier's Lemma for monoids, to reduce the number of principal congruences that must be generated as the first step of this approach. Both of the algorithms described in this paper are implemented in the GAP package Semigroups, and the first algorithm is available in the C++ library libsemigroups and in its python bindings libsemigroups_pybind11.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们描述了一种用于计算具有有限多个类的有限呈现的半群或幺半群的左、右或两侧同余的算法，以及当有限呈现的半群或幺半群是有限时的替代算法。我们将两种算法与现有算法和实现进行比较。第一个算法是 Sims 的低指数子群算法的推广，用于查找幺半群的同余。第二种算法涉及确定不同的主同余，然后找到它们所有可能的连接。许多作者在许多上下文中提出了该算法的变体。我们展示了如何利用相对格林关系理论和幺半群的施赖尔引理的版本，来减少作为该方法第一步必须生成的主同余的数量。本文描述的两种算法均在 GAP 包 Semigroups 中实现，第一个算法可在 C++ 库 libsemigroups 及其 Python 绑定 libsemigroups_pybind11 中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种算法用于计算有限呈现半群和单oid的有限指数同余关系，并在GAP包Semigroups及libsemigroups库中实现。
AI.motivation: 有限呈现半群和单oid的同余计算在计算代数中具有重要意义，但现有算法存在效率或适用性限制，需改进方法以提升计算能力。
AI.method: 第一种算法推广Sims的低指数子群算法，第二种通过生成主同余并计算其联接实现；结合相对Green关系和单oid的Schreier引理优化主同余生成步骤。
AI.result: 两种算法均在Semigroups中实现，第一种算法亦支持C++和Python；实验表明其在处理有限指数同余问题时优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文为有限呈现半群和单oid的同余计算提供了高效算法，推动了计算代数工具的发展，为相关研究提供实用解决方案。

search_text: Computing finite index congruences of finitely presented semigroups and monoids 计算有限半群和幺半群的有限索引同余 In this paper, we describe an algorithm for computing the left, right, or 2-sided congruences of a finitely presented semigroup or monoid with finitely many classes, and an alternative algorithm when the finitely presented semigroup or monoid is finite. We compare the two algorithms presented with existing algorithms and implementations. The first algorithm is a generalization of Sims' low-index subgroup algorithm for finding the congruences of a monoid. The second algorithm involves determining the distinct principal congruences, and then finding all of their possible joins. Variations of this algorithm have been suggested in numerous contexts by numerous authors. We show how to utilize the theory of relative Green's relations, and a version of Schreier's Lemma for monoids, to reduce the number of principal congruences that must be generated as the first step of this approach. Both of the algorithms described in this paper are implemented in the GAP package Semigroups, and the first algorithm is available in the C++ library libsemigroups and in its python bindings libsemigroups_pybind11. 在本文中，我们描述了一种用于计算具有有限多个类的有限呈现的半群或幺半群的左、右或两侧同余的算法，以及当有限呈现的半群或幺半群是有限时的替代算法。我们将两种算法与现有算法和实现进行比较。第一个算法是 Sims 的低指数子群算法的推广，用于查找幺半群的同余。第二种算法涉及确定不同的主同余，然后找到它们所有可能的连接。许多作者在许多上下文中提出了该算法的变体。我们展示了如何利用相对格林关系理论和幺半群的施赖尔引理的版本，来减少作为该方法第一步必须生成的主同余的数量。本文描述的两种算法均在 GAP 包 Semigroups 中实现，第一个算法可在 C++ 库 libsemigroups 及其 Python 绑定 libsemigroups_pybind11 中找到。 本文提出两种算法用于计算有限呈现半群和单oid的有限指数同余关系，并在GAP包Semigroups及libsemigroups库中实现。 Marina Anagnostopoulou-Merkouri,Reinis Cirpons,James D. Mitchell,Maria Tsalakou math.RA,cs.DS

title: CholecTriplet2022: Show me a tool and tell me the triplet -- an endoscopic vision challenge for surgical action triplet detection
title_zh: CholecTriplet2022：向我展示一个工具并告诉我三联体——外科手术三联体检测的内窥镜视觉挑战
comment: MICCAI EndoVis CholecTriplet2022 challenge report. Published at Elsevier journal of Medical Image Analysis. 25 pages, 15 figures, 8 tables
comments: MICCAI EndoVis CholecTriplet2022 challenge report. Published at Elsevier journal of Medical Image Analysis. 25 pages, 15 figures, 8 tables
abstract: Formalizing surgical activities as triplets of the used instruments, actions performed, and target anatomies is becoming a gold standard approach for surgical activity modeling. The benefit is that this formalization helps to obtain a more detailed understanding of tool-tissue interaction which can be used to develop better Artificial Intelligence assistance for image-guided surgery. Earlier efforts and the CholecTriplet challenge introduced in 2021 have put together techniques aimed at recognizing these triplets from surgical footage. Estimating also the spatial locations of the triplets would offer a more precise intraoperative context-aware decision support for computer-assisted intervention. This paper presents the CholecTriplet2022 challenge, which extends surgical action triplet modeling from recognition to detection. It includes weakly-supervised bounding box localization of every visible surgical instrument (or tool), as the key actors, and the modeling of each tool-activity in the form of <instrument, verb, target> triplet. The paper describes a baseline method and 10 new deep learning algorithms presented at the challenge to solve the task. It also provides thorough methodological comparisons of the methods, an in-depth analysis of the obtained results across multiple metrics, visual and procedural challenges; their significance, and useful insights for future research directions and applications in surgery.
summary: Formalizing surgical activities as triplets of the used instruments, actions performed, and target anatomies is becoming a gold standard approach for surgical activity modeling. The benefit is that this formalization helps to obtain a more detailed understanding of tool-tissue interaction which can be used to develop better Artificial Intelligence assistance for image-guided surgery. Earlier efforts and the CholecTriplet challenge introduced in 2021 have put together techniques aimed at recognizing these triplets from surgical footage. Estimating also the spatial locations of the triplets would offer a more precise intraoperative context-aware decision support for computer-assisted intervention. This paper presents the CholecTriplet2022 challenge, which extends surgical action triplet modeling from recognition to detection. It includes weakly-supervised bounding box localization of every visible surgical instrument (or tool), as the key actors, and the modeling of each tool-activity in the form of <instrument, verb, target> triplet. The paper describes a baseline method and 10 new deep learning algorithms presented at the challenge to solve the task. It also provides thorough methodological comparisons of the methods, an in-depth analysis of the obtained results across multiple metrics, visual and procedural challenges; their significance, and useful insights for future research directions and applications in surgery.
abstract_zh: 将手术活动形式化为所用器械、执行的动作和目标解剖结构的三元组正在成为手术活动建模的黄金标准方法。好处是，这种形式化有助于获得对工具与组织相互作用的更详细的了解，可用于为图像引导手术开发更好的人工智能辅助。早期的努力和 2021 年推出的 CholecTriplet 挑战已经整合了旨在从手术录像中识别这些三联体的技术。估计三胞胎的空间位置将为计算机辅助干预提供更精确的术中情境感知决策支持。本文提出了 CholecTriplet2022 挑战，它将手术动作三联体建模从识别扩展到检测。它包括作为关键参与者的每个可见手术器械（或工具）的弱监督边界框定位，以及以<器械、动词、目标>三元组形式对每个工具活动进行建模。该论文描述了解决该任务的挑战中提出的基线方法和 10 种新的深度学习算法。它还提供了方法的彻底方法比较，对多个指标、视觉和程序挑战所获得的结果进行深入分析；它们的重要性以及对未来外科研究方向和应用的有用见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CholecTriplet2022挑战赛，将手术动作三元组建模从识别扩展到检测，包含手术器械的弱监督定位及<工具，动作，目标>三元组建模。
AI.motivation: 将手术活动形式化为三元组有助于理解工具-组织交互，从而开发更精准的AI辅助手术系统。现有方法仅实现识别，缺乏空间定位信息，无法提供术中上下文感知支持。
AI.method: 提出基线方法及10种深度学习算法，通过弱监督 bounding box 定位可见手术器械，并建模为<instrument, verb, target>三元组，进行方法论对比与多维度结果分析。
AI.result: 系统比较了不同方法在多指标下的性能，分析了视觉与流程挑战，揭示了空间定位对上下文感知决策支持的重要性，并为未来研究方向提供洞见。
AI.conclusion: CholecTriplet2022挑战赛推动了手术AI的发展，通过检测方法的探索为精准术中辅助系统提供了理论基础与技术路径。

title: Content-Adaptive Motion Rate Adaption for Learned Video Compression
title_zh: 用于学习视频压缩的内容自适应运动速率自适应
abstract: This paper introduces an online motion rate adaptation scheme for learned video compression, with the aim of achieving content-adaptive coding on individual test sequences to mitigate the domain gap between training and test data. It features a patch-level bit allocation map, termed the $α$-map, to trade off between the bit rates for motion and inter-frame coding in a spatially-adaptive manner. We optimize the $α$-map through an online back-propagation scheme at inference time. Moreover, we incorporate a look-ahead mechanism to consider its impact on future frames. Extensive experimental results confirm that the proposed scheme, when integrated into a conditional learned video codec, is able to adapt motion bit rate effectively, showing much improved rate-distortion performance particularly on test sequences with complicated motion characteristics.
summary: This paper introduces an online motion rate adaptation scheme for learned video compression, with the aim of achieving content-adaptive coding on individual test sequences to mitigate the domain gap between training and test data. It features a patch-level bit allocation map, termed the $α$-map, to trade off between the bit rates for motion and inter-frame coding in a spatially-adaptive manner. We optimize the $α$-map through an online back-propagation scheme at inference time. Moreover, we incorporate a look-ahead mechanism to consider its impact on future frames. Extensive experimental results confirm that the proposed scheme, when integrated into a conditional learned video codec, is able to adapt motion bit rate effectively, showing much improved rate-distortion performance particularly on test sequences with complicated motion characteristics.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种用于学习视频压缩的在线运动速率自适应方案，旨在对各个测试序列实现内容自适应编码，以缩小训练数据和测试数据之间的域差距。它具有补丁级比特分配映射（称为 $α$-map），以空间自适应方式在运动比特率和帧间编码之间进行权衡。我们在推理时通过在线反向传播方案优化 $α$-map。此外，我们采用了前瞻机制来考虑其对未来帧的影响。大量的实验结果证实，所提出的方案在集成到条件学习视频编解码器中时，能够有效地适应运动比特率，特别是在具有复杂运动特征的测试序列上，显示出显着改善的率失真性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在线运动率自适应方案，用于学习型视频压缩，旨在通过内容自适应编码减少训练与测试数据间的领域差异。
AI.motivation: 传统视频压缩在测试序列上表现不佳，因训练与测试数据存在领域差异，尤其在复杂运动场景下率失真性能不足。
AI.method: 引入基于块的位分配图（α-图），通过在线反向传播优化，并结合前瞻机制考虑未来帧影响，实现空间自适应的运动与帧间编码位率权衡。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方案集成到条件学习型视频编解码器后，在复杂运动序列上显著提升了率失真性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过内容自适应的运动位率分配，有效缓解了领域差异问题，提高了视频压缩的灵活性与效率。

ai_content_json.method: 引入基于块的位分配图（α-图），通过在线反向传播优化，并结合前瞻机制考虑未来帧影响，实现空间自适应的运动与帧间编码位率权衡。
ai_content_json.result: 实验表明，该方案集成到条件学习型视频编解码器后，在复杂运动序列上显著提升了率失真性能。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 所提方法通过内容自适应的运动位率分配，有效缓解了领域差异问题，提高了视频压缩的灵活性与效率。

search_text: Content-Adaptive Motion Rate Adaption for Learned Video Compression 用于学习视频压缩的内容自适应运动速率自适应 This paper introduces an online motion rate adaptation scheme for learned video compression, with the aim of achieving content-adaptive coding on individual test sequences to mitigate the domain gap between training and test data. It features a patch-level bit allocation map, termed the $α$-map, to trade off between the bit rates for motion and inter-frame coding in a spatially-adaptive manner. We optimize the $α$-map through an online back-propagation scheme at inference time. Moreover, we incorporate a look-ahead mechanism to consider its impact on future frames. Extensive experimental results confirm that the proposed scheme, when integrated into a conditional learned video codec, is able to adapt motion bit rate effectively, showing much improved rate-distortion performance particularly on test sequences with complicated motion characteristics. 本文介绍了一种用于学习视频压缩的在线运动速率自适应方案，旨在对各个测试序列实现内容自适应编码，以缩小训练数据和测试数据之间的域差距。它具有补丁级比特分配映射（称为 $α$-map），以空间自适应方式在运动比特率和帧间编码之间进行权衡。我们在推理时通过在线反向传播方案优化 $α$-map。此外，我们采用了前瞻机制来考虑其对未来帧的影响。大量的实验结果证实，所提出的方案在集成到条件学习视频编解码器中时，能够有效地适应运动比特率，特别是在具有复杂运动特征的测试序列上，显示出显着改善的率失真性能。 本文提出了一种在线运动率自适应方案，用于学习型视频压缩，旨在通过内容自适应编码减少训练与测试数据间的领域差异。 Chih-Hsuan Lin,Yi-Hsin Chen,Wen-Hsiao Peng eess.IV,cs.CV

title: Surface-biased Multi-Level Context 3D Object Detection
title_zh: 表面偏置多级上下文 3D 对象检测
abstract: Object detection in 3D point clouds is a crucial task in a range of computer vision applications including robotics, autonomous cars, and augmented reality. This work addresses the object detection task in 3D point clouds using a highly efficient, surface-biased, feature extraction method (wang2022rbgnet), that also captures contextual cues on multiple levels. We propose a 3D object detector that extracts accurate feature representations of object candidates and leverages self-attention on point patches, object candidates, and on the global scene in 3D scene. Self-attention is proven to be effective in encoding correlation information in 3D point clouds by (xie2020mlcvnet). While other 3D detectors focus on enhancing point cloud feature extraction by selectively obtaining more meaningful local features (wang2022rbgnet) where contextual information is overlooked. To this end, the proposed architecture uses ray-based surface-biased feature extraction and multi-level context encoding to outperform the state-of-the-art 3D object detector. In this work, 3D detection experiments are performed on scenes from the ScanNet dataset whereby the self-attention modules are introduced one after the other to isolate the effect of self-attention at each level.

Self-attention is proven to be effective in encoding correlation information in 3D point clouds by (xie2020mlcvnet). While other 3D detectors focus on enhancing point cloud feature extraction by selectively obtaining more meaningful local features (wang2022rbgnet) where contextual information is overlooked. To this end, the proposed architecture uses ray-based surface-biased feature extraction and multi-level context encoding to outperform the state-of-the-art 3D object detector. In this work, 3D detection experiments are performed on scenes from the ScanNet dataset whereby the self-attention modules are introduced one after the other to isolate the effect of self-attention at each level.
abstract_zh: 3D 点云中的对象检测是机器人、自动驾驶汽车和增强现实等一系列计算机视觉应用中的一项关键任务。这项工作使用高效、表面偏置的特征提取方法 (wang2022rbgnet) 解决 3D 点云中的对象检测任务，该方法还捕获多个级别的上下文线索。我们提出了一种 3D 对象检测器，它可以提取对象候选的准确特征表示，并利用对点补丁、对象候选和 3D 场景中的全局场景的自注意力。 (xie2020mlcvnet) 证明自注意力在 3D 点云中编码相关信息是有效的。而其他 3D 检测器则专注于通过选择性地获取更有意义的局部特征（wang2022rbgnet）来增强点云特征提取，而上下文信息被忽略。为此，所提出的架构使用基于光线的表面偏置特征提取和多级上下文编码来超越最先进的 3D 对象检测器。在这项工作中，在 ScanNet 数据集的场景上进行 3D 检测实验，其中一个接一个地引入自注意力模块，以隔离每个级别的自注意力的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于表面偏向和多级上下文编码的高效3D点云目标检测方法，通过自注意力机制提升特征表示能力。
AI.motivation: 现有3D检测方法过度关注局部特征提取，忽视了多尺度上下文信息对目标检测的辅助作用。
AI.method: 采用射线表面偏向特征提取结合多级自注意力机制，分别在点云块、候选目标和全局场景三个层次建模上下文关联。
AI.result: 在ScanNet数据集上实现优于现有SOTA方法的检测性能，验证了多级上下文建模的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合表面偏向特征提取与多级自注意力机制，能够有效捕捉3D场景的上下文信息，提升目标检测精度。

authors_text: Shen Yan,Xiaoya Cheng,Yuxiang Liu,Juelin Zhu,Rouwan Wu,Yu Liu,Maojun Zhang
title: Render-and-Compare: Cross-View 6 DoF Localization from Noisy Prior
title_zh: 渲染和比较：来自嘈杂先验的跨视图 6 DoF 本地化
abstract: Despite the significant progress in 6-DoF visual localization, researchers are mostly driven by ground-level benchmarks. Compared with aerial oblique photography, ground-level map collection lacks scalability and complete coverage. In this work, we propose to go beyond the traditional ground-level setting and exploit the cross-view localization from aerial to ground. We solve this problem by formulating camera pose estimation as an iterative render-and-compare pipeline and enhancing the robustness through augmenting seeds from noisy initial priors. As no public dataset exists for the studied problem, we collect a new dataset that provides a variety of cross-view images from smartphones and drones and develop a semi-automatic system to acquire ground-truth poses for query images. We benchmark our method as well as several state-of-the-art baselines and demonstrate that our method outperforms other approaches by a large margin.
summary: Despite the significant progress in 6-DoF visual localization, researchers are mostly driven by ground-level benchmarks. Compared with aerial oblique photography, ground-level map collection lacks scalability and complete coverage. In this work, we propose to go beyond the traditional ground-level setting and exploit the cross-view localization from aerial to ground. We solve this problem by formulating camera pose estimation as an iterative render-and-compare pipeline and enhancing the robustness through augmenting seeds from noisy initial priors. As no public dataset exists for the studied problem, we collect a new dataset that provides a variety of cross-view images from smartphones and drones and develop a semi-automatic system to acquire ground-truth poses for query images. We benchmark our method as well as several state-of-the-art baselines and demonstrate that our method outperforms other approaches by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 尽管 6-DoF 视觉定位取得了重大进展，但研究人员主要受到地面基准的驱动。与航空倾斜摄影相比，地面地图采集缺乏可扩展性和完整的覆盖范围。在这项工作中，我们建议超越传统的地面设置，并利用从空中到地面的交叉视图定位。我们通过将相机姿态估计制定为迭代渲染和比较管道来解决这个问题，并通过从嘈杂的初始先验中增加种子来增强鲁棒性。由于所研究的问题不存在公共数据集，我们收集了一个新的数据集，该数据集提供了来自智能手机和无人机的各种交叉视图图像，并开发了一个半自动系统来获取查询图像的地面真实姿势。我们对我们的方法以及几个最先进的基线进行了基准测试，并证明我们的方法大大优于其他方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种从航拍视角到地面视角的6自由度定位方法，解决传统地面基准覆盖不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统地面基准存在可扩展性和覆盖不足，利用航拍图像提升定位的鲁棒性和覆盖范围。
AI.method: 通过迭代渲染与比较流程估计相机位姿，并利用噪声先验增强种子以提高鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在自建数据集上优于现有先进方法，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效解决跨视图定位问题，新数据集为后续研究提供支持。

title: Sneaky Spikes: Uncovering Stealthy Backdoor Attacks in Spiking Neural Networks with Neuromorphic Data
title_zh: 偷偷摸摸的尖峰：利用神经形态数据揭示尖峰神经网络中的隐形后门攻击
comment: To appear in Network and Distributed System Security (NDSS) Symposium 2024
comments: To appear in Network and Distributed System Security (NDSS) Symposium 2024
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have demonstrated remarkable performance across various tasks, including image and speech recognition. However, maximizing the effectiveness of DNNs requires meticulous optimization of numerous hyperparameters and network parameters through training. Moreover, high-performance DNNs entail many parameters, which consume significant energy during training. In order to overcome these challenges, researchers have turned to spiking neural networks (SNNs), which offer enhanced energy efficiency and biologically plausible data processing capabilities, rendering them highly suitable for sensory data tasks, particularly in neuromorphic data. Despite their advantages, SNNs, like DNNs, are susceptible to various threats, including adversarial examples and backdoor attacks. Yet, the field of SNNs still needs to be explored in terms of understanding and countering these attacks. This paper delves into backdoor attacks in SNNs using neuromorphic datasets and diverse triggers. Specifically, we explore backdoor triggers within neuromorphic data that can manipulate their position and color, providing a broader scope of possibilities than conventional triggers in domains like images. We present various attack strategies, achieving an attack success rate of up to 100% while maintaining a negligible impact on clean accuracy. Furthermore, we assess these attacks' stealthiness, revealing that our most potent attacks possess significant stealth capabilities. Lastly, we adapt several state-of-the-art defenses from the image domain, evaluating their efficacy on neuromorphic data and uncovering instances where they fall short, leading to compromised performance.

Furthermore, we assess these attacks' stealthiness, revealing that our most potent attacks possess significant stealth capabilities. Lastly, we adapt several state-of-the-art defenses from the image domain, evaluating their efficacy on neuromorphic data and uncovering instances where they fall short, leading to compromised performance.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 在图像和语音识别等各种任务中表现出了卓越的性能。然而，最大化 DNN 的有效性需要通过训练对大量超参数和网络参数进行细致的优化。此外，高性能 DNN 需要许多参数，在训练过程中会消耗大量能量。为了克服这些挑战，研究人员转向尖峰神经网络（SNN），它提供增强的能源效率和生物学上合理的数据处理能力，使其非常适合传感数据任务，特别是神经形态数据。尽管 SNN 具有优势，但与 DNN 一样，它也容易受到各种威胁，包括对抗性示例和后门攻击。然而，SNN 领域仍然需要在理解和应对这些攻击方面进行探索。本文使用神经形态数据集和不同的触发器深入研究 SNN 中的后门攻击。具体来说，我们探索神经形态数据中的后门触发器，这些触发器可以操纵它们的位置和颜色，从而在图像等领域提供比传统触发器更广泛的可能性。我们提出了各种攻击策略，实现了高达 100% 的攻击成功率，同时对干净精度的影响可以忽略不计。此外，我们评估了这些攻击的隐秘性，发现我们最有效的攻击具有显着的隐秘能力。最后，我们采用了图像领域的几种最先进的防御措施，评估它们对神经形态数据的功效，并发现它们不足的情况，从而导致性能下降。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在脉冲神经网络（SNN）中利用神经形态数据进行隐蔽后门攻击的方法，并评估了现有防御措施的有效性。
AI.motivation: 尽管脉冲神经网络（SNN）在能效和生物合理性方面具有优势，但其安全性尚未得到充分研究，尤其是针对后门攻击的防御能力不足。
AI.method: 通过设计可调整位置和颜色的神经形态数据触发器，提出多种攻击策略，并在保持干净数据准确率的前提下实现高攻击成功率；同时将图像领域的防御方法迁移至神经形态数据进行评估。
AI.result: 攻击成功率高达100%，且对干净数据影响极小；发现部分先进防御方法在神经形态数据上效果不佳，导致性能下降。
AI.conclusion: 现有防御机制难以应对SNN中的隐蔽后门攻击，需针对神经形态数据特性开发新的防御策略。
