search_text: Sneaky Spikes: Uncovering Stealthy Backdoor Attacks in Spiking Neural Networks with Neuromorphic Data 偷偷摸摸的尖峰：利用神经形态数据揭示尖峰神经网络中的隐形后门攻击 Deep neural networks (DNNs) have demonstrated remarkable performance across various tasks, including image and speech recognition. However, maximizing the effectiveness of DNNs requires meticulous optimization of numerous hyperparameters and network parameters through training. Moreover, high-performance DNNs entail many parameters, which consume significant energy during training. In order to overcome these challenges, researchers have turned to spiking neural networks (SNNs), which offer enhanced energy efficiency and biologically plausible data processing capabilities, rendering them highly suitable for sensory data tasks, particularly in neuromorphic data. Despite their advantages, SNNs, like DNNs, are susceptible to various threats, including adversarial examples and backdoor attacks. Yet, the field of SNNs still needs to be explored in terms of understanding and countering these attacks. This paper delves into backdoor attacks in SNNs using neuromorphic datasets and diverse triggers. Specifically, we explore backdoor triggers within neuromorphic data that can manipulate their position and color, providing a broader scope of possibilities than conventional triggers in domains like images. We present various attack strategies, achieving an attack success rate of up to 100% while maintaining a negligible impact on clean accuracy. Furthermore, we assess these attacks' stealthiness, revealing that our most potent attacks possess significant stealth capabilities. Lastly, we adapt several state-of-the-art defenses from the image domain, evaluating their efficacy on neuromorphic data and uncovering instances where they fall short, leading to compromised performance. 深度神经网络 (DNN) 在图像和语音识别等各种任务中表现出了卓越的性能。然而，最大化 DNN 的有效性需要通过训练对大量超参数和网络参数进行细致的优化。此外，高性能 DNN 需要许多参数，在训练过程中会消耗大量能量。为了克服这些挑战，研究人员转向尖峰神经网络（SNN），它提供增强的能源效率和生物学上合理的数据处理能力，使其非常适合传感数据任务，特别是神经形态数据。尽管 SNN 具有优势，但与 DNN 一样，它也容易受到各种威胁，包括对抗性示例和后门攻击。然而，SNN 领域仍然需要在理解和应对这些攻击方面进行探索。本文使用神经形态数据集和不同的触发器深入研究 SNN 中的后门攻击。具体来说，我们探索神经形态数据中的后门触发器，这些触发器可以操纵它们的位置和颜色，从而在图像等领域提供比传统触发器更广泛的可能性。我们提出了各种攻击策略，实现了高达 100% 的攻击成功率，同时对干净精度的影响可以忽略不计。此外，我们评估了这些攻击的隐秘性，发现我们最有效的攻击具有显着的隐秘能力。最后，我们采用了图像领域的几种最先进的防御措施，评估它们对神经形态数据的功效，并发现它们不足的情况，从而导致性能下降。 本文研究了在脉冲神经网络（SNN）中利用神经形态数据进行隐蔽后门攻击的方法，并评估了现有防御措施的有效性。 Gorka Abad,Oguzhan Ersoy,Stjepan Picek,Aitor Urbieta cs.CR,cs.CV,cs.LG

title: ELEA -- Build your own Evolutionary Algorithm in your Browser
title_zh: ELEA——在浏览器中构建您自己的进化算法
comment: You can find a running instance of ELEA as well as its source code at the following URLs: https://elea-toolkit.netlify.app/ https://github.com/HPI-ELEA/elea
comments: You can find a running instance of ELEA as well as its source code at the following URLs: https://elea-toolkit.netlify.app/ https://github.com/HPI-ELEA/elea
abstract: We provide an open source framework to experiment with evolutionary algorithms which we call "Experimenting and Learning toolkit for Evolutionary Algorithms (ELEA)". ELEA is browser-based and allows to assemble evolutionary algorithms using drag-and-drop, starting from a number of simple pre-designed examples, making the startup costs for employing the toolkit minimal. The designed examples can be executed and collected data can be displayed graphically. Further features include export of algorithm designs and experimental results as well as multi-threading. With the very intuitive user interface and the short time to get initial experiments going, this tool is especially suitable for explorative analyses of algorithms as well as for the use in classrooms.
summary: We provide an open source framework to experiment with evolutionary algorithms which we call "Experimenting and Learning toolkit for Evolutionary Algorithms (ELEA)". ELEA is browser-based and allows to assemble evolutionary algorithms using drag-and-drop, starting from a number of simple pre-designed examples, making the startup costs for employing the toolkit minimal. The designed examples can be executed and collected data can be displayed graphically. Further features include export of algorithm designs and experimental results as well as multi-threading. With the very intuitive user interface and the short time to get initial experiments going, this tool is especially suitable for explorative analyses of algorithms as well as for the use in classrooms.
abstract_zh: 我们提供了一个开源框架来实验进化算法，我们称之为“进化算法实验和学习工具包（ELEA）”。 ELEA 基于浏览器，允许从许多简单的预先设计的示例开始，使用拖放功能来组装进化算法，从而使使用该工具包的启动成本降至最低。可以执行设计的示例并且可以以图形方式显示收集的数据。其他功能包括导出算法设计和实验结果以及多线程。凭借非常直观的用户界面和较短的初始实验时间，该工具特别适合算法的探索性分析以及在课堂上使用。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为ELEA的开源框架，允许用户在浏览器中通过拖放操作构建和实验进化算法，降低使用门槛。
AI.motivation: 为降低进化算法实验的入门难度，提供直观工具支持教学和探索性研究。
AI.method: 开发基于浏览器的交互式框架，集成拖放组装、预设示例、数据可视化、多线程及结果导出功能。
AI.result: 实现了一个用户友好的工具，支持快速实验设计与分析，适用于课堂和算法探索场景。
AI.conclusion: ELEA通过直观界面和低启动成本，有效促进进化算法的教学与研究应用。

authors_text: Jiahui Liu,Xingqun Zhan,Cheng Chi,Xin Zhang,Chuanrun Zhai
title: Robust Extrinsic Self-Calibration of Camera and Solid State LiDAR
title_zh: 相机和固态激光雷达的鲁棒外在自校准
abstract: This letter proposes an extrinsic calibration approach for a pair of monocular camera and prism-spinning solid-state LiDAR. The unique characteristics of the point cloud measured resulting from the flower-like scanning pattern is first disclosed as the vacant points, a type of outlier between foreground target and background objects. Unlike existing method using only depth continuous measurements, we use depth discontinuous measurements to retain more valid features and efficiently remove vacant points. The larger number of detected 3D corners thus contain more robust a priori information than usual which, together with the 2D corners detected by overlapping cameras and constrained by the proposed circularity and rectangularity rules, produce accurate extrinsic estimates. The algorithm is evaluated with real field experiments adopting both qualitative and quantitative performance criteria, and found to be superior to existing algorithms. The code is available on GitHub.
summary: This letter proposes an extrinsic calibration approach for a pair of monocular camera and prism-spinning solid-state LiDAR. The unique characteristics of the point cloud measured resulting from the flower-like scanning pattern is first disclosed as the vacant points, a type of outlier between foreground target and background objects. Unlike existing method using only depth continuous measurements, we use depth discontinuous measurements to retain more valid features and efficiently remove vacant points. The larger number of detected 3D corners thus contain more robust a priori information than usual which, together with the 2D corners detected by overlapping cameras and constrained by the proposed circularity and rectangularity rules, produce accurate extrinsic estimates. The algorithm is evaluated with real field experiments adopting both qualitative and quantitative performance criteria, and found to be superior to existing algorithms. The code is available on GitHub.
abstract_zh: 这封信提出了一种用于一对单目相机和棱镜旋转固态激光雷达的外在校准方法。由花状扫描图案测量得到的点云的独特特征首先被公开为空点，这是前景目标和背景物体之间的一种离群点。与仅使用深度连续测量的现有方法不同，我们使用深度不连续测量来保留更多有效特征并有效去除空缺点。因此，检测到的大量 3D 角点包含比平常更强大的先验信息，这些先验信息与重叠摄像机检测到的 2D 角点以及所提出的圆形和矩形规则的约束一起，产生准确的外在估计。该算法通过采用定性和定量性能标准的实际现场实验进行了评估，结果发现该算法优于现有算法。该代码可在 GitHub 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对单目相机与棱镜旋转固态激光雷达的外参自标定方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖深度连续测量，难以有效处理固态激光雷达花形扫描模式产生的空洞点（前景与背景间的异常点）。
AI.method: 利用深度不连续测量保留更多有效特征，通过检测3D角点并结合相机重叠区域的2D角点（受圆形度与矩形度规则约束）实现鲁棒标定。
AI.result: 实际场验证明该算法在定性与定量指标上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过有效处理空洞点并融合多源特征，实现了更精确的相机-固态激光雷达外参标定。

search_text: Robust Extrinsic Self-Calibration of Camera and Solid State LiDAR 相机和固态激光雷达的鲁棒外在自校准 This letter proposes an extrinsic calibration approach for a pair of monocular camera and prism-spinning solid-state LiDAR. The unique characteristics of the point cloud measured resulting from the flower-like scanning pattern is first disclosed as the vacant points, a type of outlier between foreground target and background objects. Unlike existing method using only depth continuous measurements, we use depth discontinuous measurements to retain more valid features and efficiently remove vacant points. The larger number of detected 3D corners thus contain more robust a priori information than usual which, together with the 2D corners detected by overlapping cameras and constrained by the proposed circularity and rectangularity rules, produce accurate extrinsic estimates. The algorithm is evaluated with real field experiments adopting both qualitative and quantitative performance criteria, and found to be superior to existing algorithms. The code is available on GitHub. 这封信提出了一种用于一对单目相机和棱镜旋转固态激光雷达的外在校准方法。由花状扫描图案测量得到的点云的独特特征首先被公开为空点，这是前景目标和背景物体之间的一种离群点。与仅使用深度连续测量的现有方法不同，我们使用深度不连续测量来保留更多有效特征并有效去除空缺点。因此，检测到的大量 3D 角点包含比平常更强大的先验信息，这些先验信息与重叠摄像机检测到的 2D 角点以及所提出的圆形和矩形规则的约束一起，产生准确的外在估计。该算法通过采用定性和定量性能标准的实际现场实验进行了评估，结果发现该算法优于现有算法。该代码可在 GitHub 上获取。 本文提出了一种针对单目相机与棱镜旋转固态激光雷达的外参自标定方法。 Jiahui Liu,Xingqun Zhan,Cheng Chi,Xin Zhang,Chuanrun Zhai cs.RO

title: Unlabeled Imperfect Demonstrations in Adversarial Imitation Learning
title_zh: 对抗性模仿学习中未标记的不完美演示
abstract: Adversarial imitation learning has become a widely used imitation learning framework. The discriminator is often trained by taking expert demonstrations and policy trajectories as examples respectively from two categories (positive vs. negative) and the policy is then expected to produce trajectories that are indistinguishable from the expert demonstrations. But in the real world, the collected expert demonstrations are more likely to be imperfect, where only an unknown fraction of the demonstrations are optimal. Instead of treating imperfect expert demonstrations as absolutely positive or negative, we investigate unlabeled imperfect expert demonstrations as they are. A positive-unlabeled adversarial imitation learning algorithm is developed to dynamically sample expert demonstrations that can well match the trajectories from the constantly optimized agent policy. The trajectories of an initial agent policy could be closer to those non-optimal expert demonstrations, but within the framework of adversarial imitation learning, agent policy will be optimized to cheat the discriminator and produce trajectories that are similar to those optimal expert demonstrations. Theoretical analysis shows that our method learns from the imperfect demonstrations via a self-paced way. Experimental results on MuJoCo and RoboSuite platforms demonstrate the effectiveness of our method from different aspects.

But in the real world, the collected expert demonstrations are more likely to be imperfect, where only an unknown fraction of the demonstrations are optimal. Instead of treating imperfect expert demonstrations as absolutely positive or negative, we investigate unlabeled imperfect expert demonstrations as they are. A positive-unlabeled adversarial imitation learning algorithm is developed to dynamically sample expert demonstrations that can well match the trajectories from the constantly optimized agent policy. The trajectories of an initial agent policy could be closer to those non-optimal expert demonstrations, but within the framework of adversarial imitation learning, agent policy will be optimized to cheat the discriminator and produce trajectories that are similar to those optimal expert demonstrations. Theoretical analysis shows that our method learns from the imperfect demonstrations via a self-paced way. Experimental results on MuJoCo and RoboSuite platforms demonstrate the effectiveness of our method from different aspects.
abstract_zh: 对抗性模仿学习已成为广泛使用的模仿学习框架。鉴别器通常通过分别以两个类别（正与负）的专家演示和政策轨迹作为示例来进行训练，然后期望该政策产生与专家演示无法区分的轨迹。但在现实世界中，收集的专家演示更有可能是不完美的，其中只有未知的部分演示是最佳的。我们不将不完美的专家论证视为绝对正面或负面，而是按原样调查未标记的不完美专家论证。开发了一种积极的无标记对抗性模仿学习算法来动态采样专家演示，该算法可以很好地匹配不断优化的代理策略的轨迹。初始代理策略的轨迹可能更接近那些非最优专家演示，但在对抗性模仿学习的框架内，代理策略将被优化以欺骗判别器并产生与那些最优专家演示类似的轨迹。理论分析表明，我们的方法通过自定进度的方式从不完美的演示中学习。 Experimental results on MuJoCo and RoboSuite platforms demonstrate the effectiveness of our method from different aspects.

AI.tldr: 研究对抗模仿学习中不完美专家示范的处理方法
AI.motivation: 传统对抗模仿学习假设专家示范均为完美样本，但实际场景中专家示范可能存在非最优行为，导致模型性能下降，需处理未标记的不完美示范问题
AI.method: 提出正例-未标记对抗模仿学习算法，通过动态采样机制筛选高质量专家示范，并结合策略优化使智能体轨迹逼近最优专家示范
AI.result: 在MuJoCo和RoboSuite平台实验验证了方法有效性，展示了对不完美示范的鲁棒性和性能优势
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自定进度学习机制有效利用不完美示范，提升了对抗模仿学习在实际场景中的适应能力

title: FREIGHT: Fast Streaming Hypergraph Partitioning
title_zh: FREIGHT：快速流式超图分区
abstract: Partitioning the vertices of a (hyper)graph into k roughly balanced blocks such that few (hyper)edges run between blocks is a key problem for large-scale distributed processing. A current trend for partitioning huge (hyper)graphs using low computational resources are streaming algorithms. In this work, we propose FREIGHT: a Fast stREamInG Hypergraph parTitioning algorithm which is an adaptation of the widely-known graph-based algorithm Fennel. By using an efficient data structure, we make the overall running of FREIGHT linearly dependent on the pin-count of the hypergraph and the memory consumption linearly dependent on the numbers of nets and blocks. The results of our extensive experimentation showcase the promising performance of FREIGHT as a highly efficient and effective solution for streaming hypergraph partitioning. Our algorithm demonstrates competitive running time with the Hashing algorithm, with a difference of a maximum factor of four observed on three fourths of the instances. Significantly, our findings highlight the superiority of FREIGHT over all existing (buffered) streaming algorithms and even the in-memory algorithm HYPE, with respect to both cut-net and connectivity measures. This indicates that our proposed algorithm is a promising hypergraph partitioning tool to tackle the challenge posed by large-scale and dynamic data processing.
summary: Partitioning the vertices of a (hyper)graph into k roughly balanced blocks such that few (hyper)edges run between blocks is a key problem for large-scale distributed processing. A current trend for partitioning huge (hyper)graphs using low computational resources are streaming algorithms. In this work, we propose FREIGHT: a Fast stREamInG Hypergraph parTitioning algorithm which is an adaptation of the widely-known graph-based algorithm Fennel. By using an efficient data structure, we make the overall running of FREIGHT linearly dependent on the pin-count of the hypergraph and the memory consumption linearly dependent on the numbers of nets and blocks. The results of our extensive experimentation showcase the promising performance of FREIGHT as a highly efficient and effective solution for streaming hypergraph partitioning. Our algorithm demonstrates competitive running time with the Hashing algorithm, with a difference of a maximum factor of four observed on three fourths of the instances. Significantly, our findings highlight the superiority of FREIGHT over all existing (buffered) streaming algorithms and even the in-memory algorithm HYPE, with respect to both cut-net and connectivity measures. This indicates that our proposed algorithm is a promising hypergraph partitioning tool to tackle the challenge posed by large-scale and dynamic data processing.
abstract_zh: 将（超）图的顶点划分为 k 个大致平衡的块，以便在块之间运行很少的（超）边是大规模分布式处理的关键问题。使用低计算资源划分巨大（超）图的当前趋势是流算法。在这项工作中，我们提出了 FREIGHT：一种快速流超图分区算法，它是广为人知的基于图的算法 Fennel 的改编版。通过使用高效的数据结构，我们使 FREIGHT 的整体运行线性依赖于超图的引脚数，并使内存消耗线性依赖于网络和块的数量。我们广泛的实验结果展示了 FREIGHT 作为流式超图分区的高效且有效的解决方案的良好性能。我们的算法展示了与哈希算法竞争的运行时间，在四分之三的实例上观察到最大因子为四的差异。值得注意的是，我们的研究结果强调了 FREIGHT 在切网和连接测量方面优于所有现有（缓冲）流算法甚至内存中算法 HYPE。这表明我们提出的算法是一种有前途的超图划分工具，可以解决大规模动态数据处理带来的挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FREIGHT的快速流式超图划分算法，用于处理大规模分布式计算中的超图划分问题。
AI.motivation: 随着超图规模的增大，传统划分算法在计算资源和内存消耗上面临挑战，亟需高效且低资源消耗的流式算法。
AI.method: 基于知名图划分算法Fennel，通过设计高效的数据结构，使算法运行时间与超图的引脚数线性相关，内存消耗与网表数和块数线性相关。
AI.result: 实验表明，FREIGHT在运行时间上与Hashing算法相当（最多相差4倍），在割网数和连通性指标上优于所有现有流式算法及内存算法HYPE。
AI.conclusion: FREIGHT为大规模动态数据处理提供了高效且有效的超图划分工具，具有显著的性能优势。

title: Near-Optimal Dynamic Time Warping on Run-Length Encoded Strings
title_zh: 游程编码字符串的近乎最佳动态时间扭曲
abstract: We give an $\tilde O(n^2)$ time algorithm for computing the exact Dynamic Time Warping distance between two strings whose run-length encoding is of size at most $n$. This matches (up to log factors) the known (conditional) lower bound, and should be compared with the previous fastest $O(n^3)$ time exact algorithm and the $\tilde O(n^2)$ time approximation algorithm.
summary: We give an $\tilde O(n^2)$ time algorithm for computing the exact Dynamic Time Warping distance between two strings whose run-length encoding is of size at most $n$. This matches (up to log factors) the known (conditional) lower bound, and should be compared with the previous fastest $O(n^3)$ time exact algorithm and the $\tilde O(n^2)$ time approximation algorithm.
abstract_zh: 我们给出了一个 $\tilde O(n^2)$ 时间算法，用于计算游程编码最大为 $n$ 大小的两个字符串之间的精确动态时间扭曲距离。这与已知（条件）下限匹配（最多对数因子），并且应与之前最快的 $O(n^3)$ 时间精确算法和 $\tilde O(n^2)$ 时间近似算法进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种近似最优的动态时间规整算法，用于计算两个具有最大n大小的运行长度编码字符串之间的精确距离。
AI.motivation: 现有的精确计算动态时间规整距离的算法时间复杂度较高，而近似算法虽然效率较高但不够精确。因此，需要一种在时间和精度之间取得平衡的算法。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种新的算法，其时间复杂度为$\	ilde O(n^2)$，用于计算运行长度编码字符串之间的精确动态时间规整距离。
AI.result: 该算法在时间复杂度上与已知的（条件）下界相匹配，并优于之前最快的$O(n^3)$精确算法和$\	ilde O(n^2)$近似算法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的算法在时间和精度之间取得了良好的平衡，为处理运行长度编码字符串的动态时间规整问题提供了更高效的解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种近似最优的动态时间规整算法，用于计算两个具有最大n大小的运行长度编码字符串之间的精确距离。

search_text: Near-Optimal Dynamic Time Warping on Run-Length Encoded Strings 游程编码字符串的近乎最佳动态时间扭曲 We give an $\tilde O(n^2)$ time algorithm for computing the exact Dynamic Time Warping distance between two strings whose run-length encoding is of size at most $n$. This matches (up to log factors) the known (conditional) lower bound, and should be compared with the previous fastest $O(n^3)$ time exact algorithm and the $\tilde O(n^2)$ time approximation algorithm. 我们给出了一个 $\tilde O(n^2)$ 时间算法，用于计算游程编码最大为 $n$ 大小的两个字符串之间的精确动态时间扭曲距离。这与已知（条件）下限匹配（最多对数因子），并且应与之前最快的 $O(n^3)$ 时间精确算法和 $\tilde O(n^2)$ 时间近似算法进行比较。 本文提出了一种近似最优的动态时间规整算法，用于计算两个具有最大n大小的运行长度编码字符串之间的精确距离。 Itai Boneh,Shay Golan,Shay Mozes,Oren Weimann cs.DS

authors_text: Mareike Thies,Fabian Wagner,Noah Maul,Laura Pfaff,Linda-Sophie Schneider,Christopher Syben,Andreas Maier
title: Optimizing CT Scan Geometries With and Without Gradients
title_zh: 使用和不使用梯度优化 CT 扫描几何形状
abstract: In computed tomography (CT), the projection geometry used for data acquisition needs to be known precisely to obtain a clear reconstructed image. Rigid patient motion is a cause for misalignment between measured data and employed geometry. Commonly, such motion is compensated by solving an optimization problem that, e.g., maximizes the quality of the reconstructed image with respect to the projection geometry. So far, gradient-free optimization algorithms have been utilized to find the solution for this problem. Here, we show that gradient-based optimization algorithms are a possible alternative and compare the performance to their gradient-free counterparts on a benchmark motion compensation problem. Gradient-based algorithms converge substantially faster while being comparable to gradient-free algorithms in terms of capture range and robustness to the number of free parameters. Hence, gradient-based optimization is a viable alternative for the given type of problems.
summary: In computed tomography (CT), the projection geometry used for data acquisition needs to be known precisely to obtain a clear reconstructed image. Rigid patient motion is a cause for misalignment between measured data and employed geometry. Commonly, such motion is compensated by solving an optimization problem that, e.g., maximizes the quality of the reconstructed image with respect to the projection geometry. So far, gradient-free optimization algorithms have been utilized to find the solution for this problem. Here, we show that gradient-based optimization algorithms are a possible alternative and compare the performance to their gradient-free counterparts on a benchmark motion compensation problem. Gradient-based algorithms converge substantially faster while being comparable to gradient-free algorithms in terms of capture range and robustness to the number of free parameters. Hence, gradient-based optimization is a viable alternative for the given type of problems.
abstract_zh: 在计算机断层扫描 (CT) 中，需要精确了解用于数据采集的投影几何形状才能获得清晰的重建图像。患者的刚性运动是测量数据与所采用的几何形状之间未对准的原因。通常，通过解决优化问题来补偿这种运动，例如，最大化重建图像相对于投影几何形状的质量。到目前为止，无梯度优化算法已被用来寻找该问题的解决方案。在这里，我们展示了基于梯度的优化算法是一种可能的替代方案，并在基准运动补偿问题上将其性能与无梯度算法进行了比较。基于梯度的算法收敛速度要快得多，同时在捕获范围和对自由参数数量的鲁棒性方面与无梯度算法相当。因此，基于梯度的优化是针对给定类型问题的可行替代方案。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了梯度优化算法与无梯度优化算法在CT扫描几何优化中的性能差异。
AI.motivation: CT图像重建需要精确的投影几何，但患者运动会导致几何失配。传统方法依赖无梯度优化算法，但其收敛速度较慢，需探索更高效方案。
AI.method: 将梯度优化算法应用于基准运动补偿问题，与无梯度算法进行性能对比实验。
AI.result: 梯度算法收敛速度显著更快，且在捕获范围和参数鲁棒性方面与无梯度算法表现相当。
AI.conclusion: 梯度优化算法是解决CT扫描几何优化问题的可行且高效的替代方案。

title: A Lifetime Extended Energy Management Strategy for Fuel Cell Hybrid Electric Vehicles via Self-Learning Fuzzy Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过自学习模糊强化学习的燃料电池混合动力汽车的终身扩展能源管理策略
comment: ef:2022 10th International Conference on Systems and Control (ICSC), IEEE, Nov 2022, Marseille, France. pp.161-167
comments: ef:2022 10th International Conference on Systems and Control (ICSC), IEEE, Nov 2022, Marseille, France. pp.161-167
abstract: Modeling difficulty, time-varying model, and uncertain external inputs are the main challenges for energy management of fuel cell hybrid electric vehicles. In the paper, a fuzzy reinforcement learning-based energy management strategy for fuel cell hybrid electric vehicles is proposed to reduce fuel consumption, maintain the batteries' long-term operation, and extend the lifetime of the fuel cells system. Fuzzy Q-learning is a model-free reinforcement learning that can learn itself by interacting with the environment, so there is no need for modeling the fuel cells system. In addition, frequent startup of the fuel cells will reduce the remaining useful life of the fuel cells system. The proposed method suppresses frequent fuel cells startup by considering the penalty for the times of fuel cell startups in the reward of reinforcement learning. Moreover, applying fuzzy logic to approximate the value function in Q-Learning can solve continuous state and action space problems. Finally, a python-based training and testing platform verify the effectiveness and self-learning improvement of the proposed method under conditions of initial state change, model change and driving condition change.
summary: Modeling difficulty, time-varying model, and uncertain external inputs are the main challenges for energy management of fuel cell hybrid electric vehicles. In the paper, a fuzzy reinforcement learning-based energy management strategy for fuel cell hybrid electric vehicles is proposed to reduce fuel consumption, maintain the batteries' long-term operation, and extend the lifetime of the fuel cells system. Fuzzy Q-learning is a model-free reinforcement learning that can learn itself by interacting with the environment, so there is no need for modeling the fuel cells system. In addition, frequent startup of the fuel cells will reduce the remaining useful life of the fuel cells system. The proposed method suppresses frequent fuel cells startup by considering the penalty for the times of fuel cell startups in the reward of reinforcement learning. Moreover, applying fuzzy logic to approximate the value function in Q-Learning can solve continuous state and action space problems. Finally, a python-based training and testing platform verify the effectiveness and self-learning improvement of the proposed method under conditions of initial state change, model change and driving condition change.
abstract_zh: 建模难度、时变模型和不确定的外部输入是燃料电池混合动力汽车能量管理的主要挑战。本文提出了一种基于模糊强化学习的燃料电池混合动力汽车能量管理策略，以降低燃料消耗，维持电池的长期运行，并延长燃料电池系统的使用寿命。模糊Q学习是一种无模型强化学习，可以通过与环境交互进行自我学习，因此不需要对燃料电池系统进行建模。此外，燃料电池的频繁启动会缩短燃料电池系统的剩余使用寿命。所提出的方法通过考虑强化学习奖励中燃料电池启动次数的惩罚来抑制频繁的燃料电池启动。此外，应用模糊逻辑来逼近Q-Learning中的价值函数可以解决连续状态和动作空间问题。最后，基于Python的训练和测试平台验证了该方法在初始状态变化、模型变化和驾驶条件变化情况下的有效性和自学习改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自学习模糊强化学习的燃料电池混合动力汽车能量管理策略，以延长燃料电池系统寿命并降低燃料消耗。
AI.motivation: 燃料电池混合动力汽车的能量管理面临建模困难、时变模型和不确定外部输入等挑战，传统方法难以兼顾燃料经济性与燃料电池寿命。
AI.method: 采用无需建模的模糊Q学习算法，通过惩罚燃料电池频繁启动次数优化奖励函数，并利用模糊逻辑处理连续状态与动作空间问题，结合Python平台验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在初始状态变化、模型变化及驾驶条件变化下均能有效降低燃料消耗，延长燃料电池寿命，并展现自学习改进能力。
AI.conclusion: 所提策略通过强化学习与模糊逻辑结合，实现了燃料电池混合动力汽车的能量优化管理，在复杂工况下具有良好的适应性与鲁棒性。

Finally, a python-based training and testing platform verify the effectiveness and self-learning improvement of the proposed method under conditions of initial state change, model change and driving condition change. 建模难度、时变模型和不确定的外部输入是燃料电池混合动力汽车能量管理的主要挑战。本文提出了一种基于模糊强化学习的燃料电池混合动力汽车能量管理策略，以降低燃料消耗，维持电池的长期运行，并延长燃料电池系统的使用寿命。模糊Q学习是一种无模型强化学习，可以通过与环境交互进行自我学习，因此不需要对燃料电池系统进行建模。此外，燃料电池的频繁启动会缩短燃料电池系统的剩余使用寿命。所提出的方法通过考虑强化学习奖励中燃料电池启动次数的惩罚来抑制频繁的燃料电池启动。此外，应用模糊逻辑来逼近Q-Learning中的价值函数可以解决连续状态和动作空间问题。最后，基于Python的训练和测试平台验证了该方法在初始状态变化、模型变化和驾驶条件变化情况下的有效性和自学习改进。 本文提出一种基于自学习模糊强化学习的燃料电池混合动力汽车能量管理策略，以延长燃料电池系统寿命并降低燃料消耗。 Liang Guo,Zhongliang Li,Rachid Outbib cs.AI,cs.LG,eess.SY

authors_text: James Urquhart Allingham,Jie Ren,Michael W Dusenberry,Xiuye Gu,Yin Cui,Dustin Tran,Jeremiah Zhe Liu,Balaji Lakshminarayanan
title: A Simple Zero-shot Prompt Weighting Technique to Improve Prompt Ensembling in Text-Image Models
title_zh: 一种简单的零样本提示加权技术，用于改进文本图像模型中的提示集成
comment: Accepted at ICML 2023. 23 pages, 10 tables, 3 figures
comments: Accepted at ICML 2023. 23 pages, 10 tables, 3 figures
abstract: Contrastively trained text-image models have the remarkable ability to perform zero-shot classification, that is, classifying previously unseen images into categories that the model has never been explicitly trained to identify. However, these zero-shot classifiers need prompt engineering to achieve high accuracy. Prompt engineering typically requires hand-crafting a set of prompts for individual downstream tasks. In this work, we aim to automate this prompt engineering and improve zero-shot accuracy through prompt ensembling. In particular, we ask "Given a large pool of prompts, can we automatically score the prompts and ensemble those that are most suitable for a particular downstream dataset, without needing access to labeled validation data?". We demonstrate that this is possible. In doing so, we identify several pathologies in a naive prompt scoring method where the score can be easily overconfident due to biases in pre-training and test data, and we propose a novel prompt scoring method that corrects for the biases. Using our proposed scoring method to create a weighted average prompt ensemble, our method outperforms equal average ensemble, as well as hand-crafted prompts, on ImageNet, 4 of its variants, and 11 fine-grained classification benchmarks, all while being fully automatic, optimization-free, and not requiring access to labeled validation data.
summary: Contrastively trained text-image models have the remarkable ability to perform zero-shot classification, that is, classifying previously unseen images into categories that the model has never been explicitly trained to identify. However, these zero-shot classifiers need prompt engineering to achieve high accuracy. Prompt engineering typically requires hand-crafting a set of prompts for individual downstream tasks. In this work, we aim to automate this prompt engineering and improve zero-shot accuracy through prompt ensembling. In particular, we ask "Given a large pool of prompts, can we automatically score the prompts and ensemble those that are most suitable for a particular downstream dataset, without needing access to labeled validation data?". We demonstrate that this is possible. In doing so, we identify several pathologies in a naive prompt scoring method where the score can be easily overconfident due to biases in pre-training and test data, and we propose a novel prompt scoring method that corrects for the biases. Using our proposed scoring method to create a weighted average prompt ensemble, our method outperforms equal average ensemble, as well as hand-crafted prompts, on ImageNet, 4 of its variants, and 11 fine-grained classification benchmarks, all while being fully automatic, optimization-free, and not requiring access to labeled validation data.
abstract_zh: 对比训练的文本图像模型具有执行零样本分类的卓越能力，即将以前未见过的图像分类为模型从未经过明确训练来识别的类别。然而，这些零样本分类器需要及时的工程设计才能实现高精度。提示工程通常需要为各个下游任务手工制作一组提示。在这项工作中，我们的目标是自动化这种即时工程，并通过即时集成提高零样本精度。特别是，我们问“给定大量提示，我们是否可以自动对提示进行评分并组合最适合特定下游数据集的提示，而无需访问标记的验证数据？”。我们证明这是可能的。在此过程中，我们在一种简单的提示评分方法中识别出了几种病症，由于预训练和测试数据的偏差，分数很容易变得过于自信，并且我们提出了一种新颖的提示评分方法来纠正偏差。使用我们提出的评分方法创建加权平均提示集成，我们的方法在 ImageNet、其 4 个变体和 11 个细粒度分类基准上优于等平均集成以及手工制作的提示，同时是全自动、免优化且不需要访问标记的验证数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需标注验证数据的自动提示加权方法，通过改进提示集成提升文本-图像模型的零样本分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本分类依赖人工设计提示，效率低且需验证数据。本文旨在自动化提示工程，消除预训练和测试数据偏差带来的过拟合问题。
AI.method: 设计新型提示评分机制，通过分析预训练偏差和测试数据分布，自动计算提示权重并生成加权集成模型。
AI.result: 在ImageNet及其变体、11个细粒度分类基准测试中，该方法超越等权重集成和人工设计提示，且无需优化或验证数据。
AI.conclusion: 提出的自动提示加权方法有效提升了零样本分类性能，为文本-图像模型的提示集成提供了无需人工干预的通用解决方案。

title: Link Prediction with Attention Applied on Multiple Knowledge Graph Embedding Models
title_zh: 多知识图嵌入模型中应用注意力的链接预测
abstract: Predicting missing links between entities in a knowledge graph is a fundamental task to deal with the incompleteness of data on the Web. Knowledge graph embeddings map nodes into a vector space to predict new links, scoring them according to geometric criteria. Relations in the graph may follow patterns that can be learned, e.g., some relations might be symmetric and others might be hierarchical. However, the learning capability of different embedding models varies for each pattern and, so far, no single model can learn all patterns equally well. In this paper, we combine the query representations from several models in a unified one to incorporate patterns that are independently captured by each model. Our combination uses attention to select the most suitable model to answer each query. The models are also mapped onto a non-Euclidean manifold, the Poincaré ball, to capture structural patterns, such as hierarchies, besides relational patterns, such as symmetry. We prove that our combination provides a higher expressiveness and inference power than each model on its own. As a result, the combined model can learn relational and structural patterns. We conduct extensive experimental analysis with various link prediction benchmarks showing that the combined model outperforms individual models, including state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: Predicting missing links between entities in a knowledge graph is a fundamental task to deal with the incompleteness of data on the Web. Knowledge graph embeddings map nodes into a vector space to predict new links, scoring them according to geometric criteria. Relations in the graph may follow patterns that can be learned, e.g., some relations might be symmetric and others might be hierarchical. However, the learning capability of different embedding models varies for each pattern and, so far, no single model can learn all patterns equally well. In this paper, we combine the query representations from several models in a unified one to incorporate patterns that are independently captured by each model. Our combination uses attention to select the most suitable model to answer each query. The models are also mapped onto a non-Euclidean manifold, the Poincaré ball, to capture structural patterns, such as hierarchies, besides relational patterns, such as symmetry. We prove that our combination provides a higher expressiveness and inference power than each model on its own. As a result, the combined model can learn relational and structural patterns. We conduct extensive experimental analysis with various link prediction benchmarks showing that the combined model outperforms individual models, including state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 预测知识图中实体之间缺失的链接是处理网络数据不完整性的一项基本任务。知识图嵌入将节点映射到向量空间中以预测新链接，并根据几何标准对它们进行评分。图中的关系可以遵循可以学习的模式，例如，一些关系可能是对称的，而另一些关系可能是分层的。然而，不同嵌入模型的学习能力因每种模式而异，到目前为止，没有一个模型可以同样好地学习所有模式。在本文中，我们将多个模型的查询表示组合在一个统一的模型中，以合并每个模型独立捕获的模式。我们的组合使用注意力来选择最合适的模型来回答每个查询。这些模型还映射到非欧几里得流形（庞加莱球），以捕获结构模式（例如层次结构）以及关系模式（例如对称性）。我们证明，我们的组合比每个​​模型本身提供了更高的表达能力和推理能力。因此，组合模型可以学习关系和结构模式。我们对各种链路预测基准进行了广泛的实验分析，表明组合模型优于单个模型，包括最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合多种知识图谱嵌入模型并应用注意力机制的链接预测方法，以提升对不同关系模式和结构特征的学习能力。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱嵌入模型在处理对称性、层次性等不同关系模式时表现各异，单一模型难以全面捕捉复杂模式。
AI.method: 通过注意力机制融合多个模型的查询表示，结合Poincaré球面映射以捕捉结构特征，增强模型表达能力。
AI.result: 在多个链接预测基准测试中，组合模型性能优于所有单个模型及现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 多模型注意力融合方法能有效结合不同模型的优势，提升对关系与结构模式的联合学习能力。

authors_text: Sudhanshu Srivastava,Ishika Gupta,Anusha Prakash,Jom Kuriakose,Hema A. Murthy
title: Fast and small footprint Hybrid HMM-HiFiGAN based system for speech synthesis in Indian languages
title_zh: 基于混合 HMM-HiFiGAN 的快速且占用空间小的系统，用于印度语言的语音合成
abstract: Hidden-Markov-model (HMM) based text-to-speech (HTS) offers flexibility in speaking styles along with fast training and synthesis while being computationally less intense. HTS performs well even in low-resource scenarios. The primary drawback is that the voice quality is poor compared to that of E2E systems. A hybrid approach combining HMM-based feature generation and neural-network-based HiFi-GAN vocoder to improve HTS synthesis quality is proposed. HTS is trained on high-resolution mel-spectrograms instead of conventional mel generalized coefficients (MGC), and the output mel-spectrogram corresponding to the input text is used in a HiFi-GAN vocoder trained on Indic languages, to produce naturalness that is equivalent to that of E2E systems, as evidenced from the DMOS and PC tests.
summary: Hidden-Markov-model (HMM) based text-to-speech (HTS) offers flexibility in speaking styles along with fast training and synthesis while being computationally less intense. HTS performs well even in low-resource scenarios. The primary drawback is that the voice quality is poor compared to that of E2E systems. A hybrid approach combining HMM-based feature generation and neural-network-based HiFi-GAN vocoder to improve HTS synthesis quality is proposed. HTS is trained on high-resolution mel-spectrograms instead of conventional mel generalized coefficients (MGC), and the output mel-spectrogram corresponding to the input text is used in a HiFi-GAN vocoder trained on Indic languages, to produce naturalness that is equivalent to that of E2E systems, as evidenced from the DMOS and PC tests.
abstract_zh: 基于隐马尔可夫模型 (HMM) 的文本转语音 (HTS) 提供了说话风格的灵活性以及快速训练和合成，同时计算强度较低。即使在资源匮乏的情况下，HTS 也能表现良好。主要缺点是语音质量比端到端系统差。提出了一种结合基于 HMM 的特征生成和基于神经网络的 HiFi-GAN 声码器来提高 HTS 合成质量的混合方法。 HTS 采用高分辨率梅尔频谱图而不是传统的梅尔广义系数 (MGC) 进行训练，并且与输入文本相对应的输出梅尔频谱图用于在印度语言上训练的 HiFi-GAN 声码器中，以产生与 E2E 系统相当的自然度，如 DMOS 和 PC 测试所证明的那样。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合HMM和HiFi-GAN的混合语音合成系统，用于印度语言的高效高质量语音生成。
AI.motivation: 传统HMM-TTS在低资源场景下训练快且灵活，但语音质量不足；端到端系统质量高但资源消耗大，需平衡效率与质量。
AI.method: 采用HMM生成高分辨率mel谱图特征，结合针对印度语言训练的HiFi-GAN声码器，替代传统MGC系数以提升自然度。
AI.result: 通过DMOS和PC测试验证，系统语音质量达到端到端系统水平，同时保持HMM的高效性与小体积特性。
AI.conclusion: 混合架构有效融合HMM与神经声码器优势，在印度语言语音合成中实现高质量与低资源需求的平衡。

search_text: Fast and small footprint Hybrid HMM-HiFiGAN based system for speech synthesis in Indian languages 基于混合 HMM-HiFiGAN 的快速且占用空间小的系统，用于印度语言的语音合成 Hidden-Markov-model (HMM) based text-to-speech (HTS) offers flexibility in speaking styles along with fast training and synthesis while being computationally less intense. HTS performs well even in low-resource scenarios. The primary drawback is that the voice quality is poor compared to that of E2E systems. A hybrid approach combining HMM-based feature generation and neural-network-based HiFi-GAN vocoder to improve HTS synthesis quality is proposed. HTS is trained on high-resolution mel-spectrograms instead of conventional mel generalized coefficients (MGC), and the output mel-spectrogram corresponding to the input text is used in a HiFi-GAN vocoder trained on Indic languages, to produce naturalness that is equivalent to that of E2E systems, as evidenced from the DMOS and PC tests. 基于隐马尔可夫模型 (HMM) 的文本转语音 (HTS) 提供了说话风格的灵活性以及快速训练和合成，同时计算强度较低。即使在资源匮乏的情况下，HTS 也能表现良好。主要缺点是语音质量比端到端系统差。提出了一种结合基于 HMM 的特征生成和基于神经网络的 HiFi-GAN 声码器来提高 HTS 合成质量的混合方法。 HTS 采用高分辨率梅尔频谱图而不是传统的梅尔广义系数 (MGC) 进行训练，并且与输入文本相对应的输出梅尔频谱图用于在印度语言上训练的 HiFi-GAN 声码器中，以产生与 E2E 系统相当的自然度，如 DMOS 和 PC 测试所证明的那样。 本文提出一种结合HMM和HiFi-GAN的混合语音合成系统，用于印度语言的高效高质量语音生成。 Sudhanshu Srivastava,Ishika Gupta,Anusha Prakash,Jom Kuriakose,Hema A. Murthy eess.AS,cs.SD

title: A Unified View of Long-Sequence Models towards Modeling Million-Scale Dependencies
title_zh: 用于建模百万级依赖关系的长序列模型的统一视图
abstract: Ever since their conception, Transformers have taken over traditional sequence models in many tasks, such as NLP, image classification, and video/audio processing, for their fast training and superior performance. Much of the merit is attributable to positional encoding and multi-head attention. However, Transformers fall short in learning long-range dependencies mainly due to the quadratic complexity scaled with context length, in terms of both time and space. Consequently, over the past five years, a myriad of methods has been proposed to make Transformers more efficient. In this work, we first take a step back, study and compare existing solutions to long-sequence modeling in terms of their pure mathematical formulation. Specifically, we summarize them using a unified template, given their shared nature of token mixing. Through benchmarks, we then demonstrate that long context length does yield better performance, albeit application-dependent, and traditional Transformer models fall short in taking advantage of long-range dependencies. Next, inspired by emerging sparse models of huge capacity, we propose a machine learning system for handling million-scale dependencies. As a proof of concept, we evaluate the performance of one essential component of this system, namely, the distributed multi-head attention. We show that our algorithm can scale up attention computation by almost $40\times$ using four GeForce RTX 4090 GPUs, compared to vanilla multi-head attention mechanism. We believe this study is an instrumental step towards modeling million-scale dependencies.
summary: Ever since their conception, Transformers have taken over traditional sequence models in many tasks, such as NLP, image classification, and video/audio processing, for their fast training and superior performance. Much of the merit is attributable to positional encoding and multi-head attention. However, Transformers fall short in learning long-range dependencies mainly due to the quadratic complexity scaled with context length, in terms of both time and space. Consequently, over the past five years, a myriad of methods has been proposed to make Transformers more efficient. In this work, we first take a step back, study and compare existing solutions to long-sequence modeling in terms of their pure mathematical formulation. Specifically, we summarize them using a unified template, given their shared nature of token mixing. Through benchmarks, we then demonstrate that long context length does yield better performance, albeit application-dependent, and traditional Transformer models fall short in taking advantage of long-range dependencies. Next, inspired by emerging sparse models of huge capacity, we propose a machine learning system for handling million-scale dependencies. As a proof of concept, we evaluate the performance of one essential component of this system, namely, the distributed multi-head attention. We show that our algorithm can scale up attention computation by almost $40\times$ using four GeForce RTX 4090 GPUs, compared to vanilla multi-head attention mechanism. We believe this study is an instrumental step towards modeling million-scale dependencies.
abstract_zh: 自诞生以来，Transformers 因其快速训练和卓越性能而在许多任务中取代了传统序列模型，例如 NLP、图像分类和视频/音频处理。大部分优点归功于位置编码和多头注意力。然而，Transformers 在学习远程依赖方面存在不足，主要是由于时间和空间方面的二次复杂性随上下文长度而缩放。因此，在过去的五年里，人们提出了无数的方法来提高 Transformer 的效率。在这项工作中，我们首先退后一步，从纯数学公式的角度研究和比较长序列建模的现有解决方案。具体来说，考虑到它们具有令牌混合的共同性质，我们使用统一的模板对它们进行了总结。然后，通过基准测试，我们证明长上下文长度确实会产生更好的性能，尽管依赖于应用程序，而传统的 Transformer 模型在利用远程依赖关系方面存在缺陷。接下来，受到新兴的大容量稀疏模型的启发，我们提出了一种用于处理百万级依赖关系的机器学习系统。作为概念证明，我们评估了该系统的一个重要组成部分的性能，即分布式多头注意力。我们证明，与普通的多头注意力机制相比，我们的算法可以使用四个 GeForce RTX 4090 GPU 将注意力计算规模扩大近 40 倍。我们相信这项研究是迈向百万级依赖关系建模的重要一步。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在研究并改进Transformer模型在处理长序列和大规模依赖关系时的效率和性能。
AI.motivation: Transformer模型虽然在许多任务中表现出色，但其二次复杂度限制了其处理长序列的能力，因此需要寻找更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 本文通过数学公式统一现有长序列建模方法，并提出一种基于分布式多头注意力机制的机器学习系统。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提出的分布式多头注意力机制在四个GeForce RTX 4090 GPU上将注意力计算扩展了约40倍。
AI.conclusion: 本文为建模百万级依赖关系提供了重要的一步，展示了改进的Transformer模型在处理长序列任务中的潜力。

authors_text: Christine Eilers,Rob van Kemenade,Benjamin Busam,Nassir Navab
title: On the Importance of Patient Acceptance for Medical Robotic Imaging
title_zh: 论患者接受医疗机器人成像的重要性
abstract: Purpose: Mutual acceptance is required for any human-to-human interaction. Therefore, one would assume that this also holds for robot-patient interactions. However, the medical robotic imaging field lacks research in the area of acceptance. This work, therefore, aims at analyzing the influence of robot-patient interactions on acceptance in an exemplary medical robotic imaging system. Methods: We designed an interactive human-robot scenario, including auditive and gestural cues, and compared this pipeline to a non-interactive scenario. Both scenarios were evaluated through a questionnaire to measure acceptance. Heart rate monitoring was also used to measure stress. The impact of the interaction was quantified in the use case of robotic ultrasound scanning of the neck. Results: We conducted the first user study on patient acceptance of robotic ultrasound. Results show that verbal interactions impacts trust more than gestural ones. Furthermore, through interaction, the robot is perceived to be friendlier. The heart rate data indicates that robot-patient interaction could reduce stress. Conclusion: Robot-patient interactions are crucial for improving acceptance in medical robotic imaging systems. While verbal interaction is most important, the preferred interaction type and content are participant-dependent. Heart rate values indicate that such interactions can also reduce stress. Overall, this initial work showed that interactions improve patient acceptance in medical robotic imaging, and other medical robot-patient systems can benefit from the design proposals to enhance acceptance in interactive scenarios.
summary: Purpose: Mutual acceptance is required for any human-to-human interaction. Therefore, one would assume that this also holds for robot-patient interactions. However, the medical robotic imaging field lacks research in the area of acceptance. This work, therefore, aims at analyzing the influence of robot-patient interactions on acceptance in an exemplary medical robotic imaging system. Methods: We designed an interactive human-robot scenario, including auditive and gestural cues, and compared this pipeline to a non-interactive scenario. Both scenarios were evaluated through a questionnaire to measure acceptance. Heart rate monitoring was also used to measure stress. The impact of the interaction was quantified in the use case of robotic ultrasound scanning of the neck. Results: We conducted the first user study on patient acceptance of robotic ultrasound. Results show that verbal interactions impacts trust more than gestural ones. Furthermore, through interaction, the robot is perceived to be friendlier. The heart rate data indicates that robot-patient interaction could reduce stress. Conclusion: Robot-patient interactions are crucial for improving acceptance in medical robotic imaging systems. While verbal interaction is most important, the preferred interaction type and content are participant-dependent. Heart rate values indicate that such interactions can also reduce stress. Overall, this initial work showed that interactions improve patient acceptance in medical robotic imaging, and other medical robot-patient systems can benefit from the design proposals to enhance acceptance in interactive scenarios.
abstract_zh: 目的：任何人与人之间的互动都需要相互接受。因此，人们会认为这也适用于机器人与患者的互动。然而，医疗机器人成像领域缺乏接受领域的研究。因此，这项工作旨在分析机器人与患者交互对示例性医疗机器人成像系统接受度的影响。方法：我们设计了一个交互式人机场景，包括听觉和手势提示，并将该流程与非交互式场景进行比较。这两种情况都通过问卷进行评估，以衡量接受程度。心率监测也用于测量压力。在机器人颈部超声扫描的用例中量化了交互的影响。结果：我们针对患者对机器人超声的接受程度进行了首次用户研究。结果表明，言语互动比手势互动更能影响信任。此外，通过交互，机器人被认为更加友好。心率数据表明机器人与患者的互动可以减轻压力。结论：机器人与患者的互动对于提高医疗机器人成像系统的接受度至关重要。虽然口头互动最重要，但首选的互动类型和内容取决于参与者。心率值表明这种相互作用也可以减轻压力。总体而言，这项初步工作表明，交互可以提高患者对医疗机器人成像的接受度，而其他医疗机器人-患者系统可以从设计方案中受益，以提高交互场景中的接受度。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了医疗机器人影像系统中患者对机器人交互的接受度影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管人类交互需要相互接受，但医疗机器人影像领域缺乏对患者接受度的研究，因此需探讨机器人-患者交互的影响。
AI.method: 设计包含语音和手势提示的交互式人机场景，并与非交互场景对比，通过问卷调查和心率监测评估接受度与压力水平。
AI.result: 交互式场景提升患者对机器人的信任感和友好感知，语音交互比手势更有效，且交互可降低患者压力。
AI.conclusion: 机器人-患者交互对提升医疗机器人影像系统的接受度至关重要，语音交互最为关键，但具体交互方式需根据患者偏好调整。

search_text: On the Importance of Patient Acceptance for Medical Robotic Imaging 论患者接受医疗机器人成像的重要性 Purpose: Mutual acceptance is required for any human-to-human interaction. Therefore, one would assume that this also holds for robot-patient interactions. However, the medical robotic imaging field lacks research in the area of acceptance. This work, therefore, aims at analyzing the influence of robot-patient interactions on acceptance in an exemplary medical robotic imaging system. Methods: We designed an interactive human-robot scenario, including auditive and gestural cues, and compared this pipeline to a non-interactive scenario. Both scenarios were evaluated through a questionnaire to measure acceptance. Heart rate monitoring was also used to measure stress. The impact of the interaction was quantified in the use case of robotic ultrasound scanning of the neck. Results: We conducted the first user study on patient acceptance of robotic ultrasound. Results show that verbal interactions impacts trust more than gestural ones. Furthermore, through interaction, the robot is perceived to be friendlier. The heart rate data indicates that robot-patient interaction could reduce stress. Conclusion: Robot-patient interactions are crucial for improving acceptance in medical robotic imaging systems. While verbal interaction is most important, the preferred interaction type and content are participant-dependent. Heart rate values indicate that such interactions can also reduce stress. Overall, this initial work showed that interactions improve patient acceptance in medical robotic imaging, and other medical robot-patient systems can benefit from the design proposals to enhance acceptance in interactive scenarios. 目的：任何人与人之间的互动都需要相互接受。因此，人们会认为这也适用于机器人与患者的互动。然而，医疗机器人成像领域缺乏接受领域的研究。因此，这项工作旨在分析机器人与患者交互对示例性医疗机器人成像系统接受度的影响。方法：我们设计了一个交互式人机场景，包括听觉和手势提示，并将该流程与非交互式场景进行比较。这两种情况都通过问卷进行评估，以衡量接受程度。心率监测也用于测量压力。在机器人颈部超声扫描的用例中量化了交互的影响。结果：我们针对患者对机器人超声的接受程度进行了首次用户研究。结果表明，言语互动比手势互动更能影响信任。此外，通过交互，机器人被认为更加友好。心率数据表明机器人与患者的互动可以减轻压力。结论：机器人与患者的互动对于提高医疗机器人成像系统的接受度至关重要。虽然口头互动最重要，但首选的互动类型和内容取决于参与者。心率值表明这种相互作用也可以减轻压力。总体而言，这项初步工作表明，交互可以提高患者对医疗机器人成像的接受度，而其他医疗机器人-患者系统可以从设计方案中受益，以提高交互场景中的接受度。 本文分析了医疗机器人影像系统中患者对机器人交互的接受度影响。 Christine Eilers,Rob van Kemenade,Benjamin Busam,Nassir Navab cs.RO

authors_text: Xihuai Wang,Zheng Tian,Ziyu Wan,Ying Wen,Jun Wang,Weinan Zhang
title: Order Matters: Agent-by-agent Policy Optimization
title_zh: 订单问题：逐个代理策略优化
abstract: While multi-agent trust region algorithms have achieved great success empirically in solving coordination tasks, most of them, however, suffer from a non-stationarity problem since agents update their policies simultaneously. In contrast, a sequential scheme that updates policies agent-by-agent provides another perspective and shows strong performance. However, sample inefficiency and lack of monotonic improvement guarantees for each agent are still the two significant challenges for the sequential scheme. In this paper, we propose the \textbf{A}gent-by-\textbf{a}gent \textbf{P}olicy \textbf{O}ptimization (A2PO) algorithm to improve the sample efficiency and retain the guarantees of monotonic improvement for each agent during training. We justify the tightness of the monotonic improvement bound compared with other trust region algorithms. From the perspective of sequentially updating agents, we further consider the effect of agent updating order and extend the theory of non-stationarity into the sequential update scheme. To evaluate A2PO, we conduct a comprehensive empirical study on four benchmarks: StarCraftII, Multi-agent MuJoCo, Multi-agent Particle Environment, and Google Research Football full game scenarios. A2PO consistently outperforms strong baselines.
summary: While multi-agent trust region algorithms have achieved great success empirically in solving coordination tasks, most of them, however, suffer from a non-stationarity problem since agents update their policies simultaneously. In contrast, a sequential scheme that updates policies agent-by-agent provides another perspective and shows strong performance. However, sample inefficiency and lack of monotonic improvement guarantees for each agent are still the two significant challenges for the sequential scheme. In this paper, we propose the \textbf{A}gent-by-\textbf{a}gent \textbf{P}olicy \textbf{O}ptimization (A2PO) algorithm to improve the sample efficiency and retain the guarantees of monotonic improvement for each agent during training. We justify the tightness of the monotonic improvement bound compared with other trust region algorithms. From the perspective of sequentially updating agents, we further consider the effect of agent updating order and extend the theory of non-stationarity into the sequential update scheme. To evaluate A2PO, we conduct a comprehensive empirical study on four benchmarks: StarCraftII, Multi-agent MuJoCo, Multi-agent Particle Environment, and Google Research Football full game scenarios. A2PO consistently outperforms strong baselines.
abstract_zh: 虽然多智能体信任域算法在解决协调任务方面取得了巨大的成功，但由于智能体同时更新策略，大多数算法都存在非平稳性问题。相比之下，逐个代理更新策略的顺序方案提供了另一种视角并显示出强大的性能。然而，样本效率低下和缺乏每个代理的单调改进保证仍然是序贯方案的两个重大挑战。在本文中，我们提出了\textbf{A}gent-by-\textbf{a}gent \textbf{P}olicy \textbf{O}优化（A2PO）算法，以提高样本效率并保留训练期间每个智能体单调改进的保证。与其他信任域算法相比，我们证明了单调改进界限的紧密性。从顺序更新智能体的角度来看，我们进一步考虑了智能体更新顺序的影响，并将非平稳性理论扩展到顺序更新方案中。为了评估 A2PO，我们对四个基准进行了全面的实证研究：星际争霸 II、多智能体 MuJoCo、多智能体粒子环境和 Google Research Football 完整游戏场景。 A2PO 始终优于强大的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出A2PO算法，解决多智能体强化学习中顺序更新策略的样本效率低和缺乏单调改进保证的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有同步更新策略的多智能体算法存在非平稳性问题，而顺序更新虽表现良好但样本效率低且无法保证每个智能体的单调改进。
AI.method: 设计A2PO算法，通过逐个智能体更新策略，结合信任区域方法确保单调改进，并分析更新顺序对非平稳性的影响。
AI.result: A2PO在StarCraftII、Multi-agent MuJoCo等四个基准测试中均优于现有强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: A2PO有效解决了顺序更新策略的挑战，在提升样本效率的同时保证了性能改进，为多智能体强化学习提供了新思路。

title: COACH: Cooperative Robot Teaching
title_zh: COACH：协作机器人教学
abstract: Knowledge and skills can transfer from human teachers to human students. However, such direct transfer is often not scalable for physical tasks, as they require one-to-one interaction, and human teachers are not available in sufficient numbers. Machine learning enables robots to become experts and play the role of teachers to help in this situation. In this work, we formalize cooperative robot teaching as a Markov game, consisting of four key elements: the target task, the student model, the teacher model, and the interactive teaching-learning process. Under a moderate assumption, the Markov game reduces to a partially observable Markov decision process, with an efficient approximate solution. We illustrate our approach on two cooperative tasks, one in a simulated video game and one with a real robot.
summary: Knowledge and skills can transfer from human teachers to human students. However, such direct transfer is often not scalable for physical tasks, as they require one-to-one interaction, and human teachers are not available in sufficient numbers. Machine learning enables robots to become experts and play the role of teachers to help in this situation. In this work, we formalize cooperative robot teaching as a Markov game, consisting of four key elements: the target task, the student model, the teacher model, and the interactive teaching-learning process. Under a moderate assumption, the Markov game reduces to a partially observable Markov decision process, with an efficient approximate solution. We illustrate our approach on two cooperative tasks, one in a simulated video game and one with a real robot.
abstract_zh: 知识和技能可以从人类教师转移到人类学生。然而，这种直接传输通常无法扩展用于物理任务，因为它们需要一对一的交互，并且人类教师的数量不足。机器学习使机器人能够成为专家，并扮演老师的角色来帮助解决这种情况。在这项工作中，我们将协作机器人教学形式化为马尔可夫博弈，由四个关键要素组成：目标任务、学生模型、教师模型和交互式教学过程。在适度的假设下，马尔可夫博弈简化为部分可观察的马尔可夫决策过程，并具有有效的近似解。我们在两项合作任务中说明了我们的方法，一项是在模拟视频游戏中，另一项是在真实的机器人中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出COACH框架，通过将协作机器人教学建模为马尔可夫博弈，使机器人能够有效教授物理任务。
AI.motivation: 人类教师难以规模化传授物理技能，且数量不足，需让机器人担任教师角色以解决这一问题。
AI.method: 将协作教学形式化为包含目标任务、学生模型、教师模型及交互过程的马尔可夫博弈，并在合理假设下简化为部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）求解。
AI.result: 在模拟视频游戏和真实机器人任务中验证了方法的有效性，证明框架可实现机器人与学生的协作教学。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为机器人教学提供了理论基础和实践方案，解决了物理任务教学的可扩展性难题。

authors_text: Julian Schmidt,Julian Jordan,Franz Gritschneder,Thomas Monninger,Klaus Dietmayer
title: Exploring Navigation Maps for Learning-Based Motion Prediction
title_zh: 探索基于学习的运动预测的导航地图
comment: Accepted to the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2023)
comments: Accepted to the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2023)
abstract: The prediction of surrounding agents' motion is a key for safe autonomous driving. In this paper, we explore navigation maps as an alternative to the predominant High Definition (HD) maps for learning-based motion prediction. Navigation maps provide topological and geometrical information on road-level, HD maps additionally have centimeter-accurate lane-level information. As a result, HD maps are costly and time-consuming to obtain, while navigation maps with near-global coverage are freely available. We describe an approach to integrate navigation maps into learning-based motion prediction models. To exploit locally available HD maps during training, we additionally propose a model-agnostic method for knowledge distillation. In experiments on the publicly available Argoverse dataset with navigation maps obtained from OpenStreetMap, our approach shows a significant improvement over not using a map at all. Combined with our method for knowledge distillation, we achieve results that are close to the original HD map-reliant models. Our publicly available navigation map API for Argoverse enables researchers to develop and evaluate their own approaches using navigation maps.
summary: The prediction of surrounding agents' motion is a key for safe autonomous driving. In this paper, we explore navigation maps as an alternative to the predominant High Definition (HD) maps for learning-based motion prediction. Navigation maps provide topological and geometrical information on road-level, HD maps additionally have centimeter-accurate lane-level information. As a result, HD maps are costly and time-consuming to obtain, while navigation maps with near-global coverage are freely available. We describe an approach to integrate navigation maps into learning-based motion prediction models. To exploit locally available HD maps during training, we additionally propose a model-agnostic method for knowledge distillation. In experiments on the publicly available Argoverse dataset with navigation maps obtained from OpenStreetMap, our approach shows a significant improvement over not using a map at all. Combined with our method for knowledge distillation, we achieve results that are close to the original HD map-reliant models. Our publicly available navigation map API for Argoverse enables researchers to develop and evaluate their own approaches using navigation maps.
abstract_zh: 周围智能体运动的预测是安全自动驾驶的关键。在本文中，我们探索导航地图作为基于学习的运动预测的主要高清（HD）地图的替代方案。导航地图提供道路级别的拓扑和几何信息，高清地图还提供厘米级精度的车道级别信息。因此，获取高清地图既昂贵又耗时，而几乎覆盖全球的导航地图却可以免费获得。我们描述了一种将导航地图集成到基于学习的运动预测模型中的方法。为了在训练期间利用本地可用的高清地图，我们还提出了一种与模型无关的知识蒸馏方法。在使用从 OpenStreetMap 获得的导航地图的公开可用的 Argoverse 数据集上进行的实验中，我们的方法显示出比根本不使用地图的显着改进。结合我们的知识蒸馏方法，我们获得了接近原始依赖高清地图的模型的结果。我们公开提供的 Argoverse 导航地图 API 使研究人员能够使用导航地图开发和评估自己的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何利用导航地图替代高精度地图进行基于学习的运动预测，以降低数据获取成本并提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 高精度地图成本高昂且获取困难，而导航地图具有全球覆盖且免费，但其在运动预测中的有效性尚未被充分验证。
AI.method: 提出将导航地图整合到学习模型中的方法，并设计模型无关的知识蒸馏技术以利用局部高精度地图进行训练。
AI.result: 在Argoverse数据集上，使用导航地图的方法显著优于无地图方案，结合知识蒸馏后性能接近依赖高精度地图的模型。
AI.conclusion: 导航地图可作为高精度地图的有效替代方案，公开的导航地图API为后续研究提供了便利。

title: Capsules as viewpoint learners for human pose estimation
title_zh: 胶囊作为人体姿势估计的视点学习器
comment: 16 pages, 9 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2108.08557
comments: 16 pages, 9 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2108.08557
abstract: The task of human pose estimation (HPE) deals with the ill-posed problem of estimating the 3D position of human joints directly from images and videos. In recent literature, most of the works tackle the problem mostly by using convolutional neural networks (CNNs), which are capable of achieving state-of-the-art results in most datasets. We show how most neural networks are not able to generalize well when the camera is subject to significant viewpoint changes. This behaviour emerges because CNNs lack the capability of modelling viewpoint equivariance, while they rather rely on viewpoint invariance, resulting in high data dependency. Recently, capsule networks (CapsNets) have been proposed in the multi-class classification field as a solution to the viewpoint equivariance issue, reducing both the size and complexity of both the training datasets and the network itself. In this work, we show how capsule networks can be adopted to achieve viewpoint equivariance in human pose estimation. We propose a novel end-to-end viewpoint-equivariant capsule autoencoder that employs a fast Variational Bayes routing and matrix capsules. We achieve state-of-the-art results for multiple tasks and datasets while retaining other desirable properties, such as greater generalization capabilities when changing viewpoints, lower data dependency and fast inference. Additionally, by modelling each joint as a capsule, the hierarchical and geometrical structure of the overall pose is retained in the feature space, independently from the viewpoint. We further test our network on multiple datasets, both in the RGB and depth domain, from seen and unseen viewpoints and in the viewpoint transfer task.
summary: The task of human pose estimation (HPE) deals with the ill-posed problem of estimating the 3D position of human joints directly from images and videos. In recent literature, most of the works tackle the problem mostly by using convolutional neural networks (CNNs), which are capable of achieving state-of-the-art results in most datasets. We show how most neural networks are not able to generalize well when the camera is subject to significant viewpoint changes. This behaviour emerges because CNNs lack the capability of modelling viewpoint equivariance, while they rather rely on viewpoint invariance, resulting in high data dependency. Recently, capsule networks (CapsNets) have been proposed in the multi-class classification field as a solution to the viewpoint equivariance issue, reducing both the size and complexity of both the training datasets and the network itself. In this work, we show how capsule networks can be adopted to achieve viewpoint equivariance in human pose estimation. We propose a novel end-to-end viewpoint-equivariant capsule autoencoder that employs a fast Variational Bayes routing and matrix capsules. We achieve state-of-the-art results for multiple tasks and datasets while retaining other desirable properties, such as greater generalization capabilities when changing viewpoints, lower data dependency and fast inference. Additionally, by modelling each joint as a capsule, the hierarchical and geometrical structure of the overall pose is retained in the feature space, independently from the viewpoint. We further test our network on multiple datasets, both in the RGB and depth domain, from seen and unseen viewpoints and in the viewpoint transfer task.
abstract_zh: 人体姿态估计 (HPE) 任务处理直接从图像和视频估计人体关节 3D 位置的不适定问题。在最近的文献中，大多数工作主要通过使用卷积神经网络（CNN）来解决这个问题，它能够在大多数数据集中实现最先进的结果。我们展示了当相机发生重大视点变化时，大多数神经网络如何无法很好地概括。出现这种行为的原因是 CNN 缺乏对视点等方差进行建模的能力，而依赖于视点不变性，从而导致高度的数据依赖性。最近，胶囊网络（CapsNets）在多类分类领域被提出，作为视点等方差问题的解决方案，减少了训练数据集和网络本身的大小和复杂性。在这项工作中，我们展示了如何采用胶囊网络来实现人体姿势估计中的视点等变。我们提出了一种新颖的端到端视点等变胶囊自动编码器，它采用快速变分贝叶斯路由和矩阵胶囊。我们在多个任务和数据集上实现了最先进的结果，同时保留了其他所需的属性，例如改变观点时更强的泛化能力、更低的数据依赖性和快速推理。此外，通过将每个关节建模为胶囊，整体姿势的层次和几何结​​构保留在特征空间中，独立于视点。我们在多个数据集上进一步测试我们的网络，包括 RGB 和深度域、从可见和不可见的视点以及视点传输任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用胶囊网络（CapsNets）解决人体姿态估计中视角变化导致的泛化问题，通过构建视角等变的胶囊自编码器提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积神经网络（CNN）在视角变化时依赖数据量且泛化能力差，而胶囊网络在视角等变性建模方面具有潜力，可减少数据依赖并提升姿态估计的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计端到端视角等变胶囊自编码器，结合快速变分贝叶斯路由和矩阵胶囊，将每个关节建模为胶囊以保留姿态的层次几何结构。
AI.result: 在RGB和深度域多个数据集上达到SOTA性能，视角变化下泛化能力更强，数据依赖更低且推理速度更快。
AI.conclusion: 胶囊网络通过建模视角等变性有效解决了人体姿态估计的视角挑战，为未来研究提供了新方向。

authors_text: Giuseppe Spallitta,Gabriele Masina,Paolo Morettin,Andrea Passerini,Roberto Sebastiani
title: Enhancing SMT-based Weighted Model Integration by Structure Awareness
title_zh: 通过结构感知增强基于 SMT 的加权模型集成
abstract: The development of efficient exact and approximate algorithms for probabilistic inference is a long-standing goal of artificial intelligence research. Whereas substantial progress has been made in dealing with purely discrete or purely continuous domains, adapting the developed solutions to tackle hybrid domains, characterised by discrete and continuous variables and their relationships, is highly non-trivial. Weighted Model Integration (WMI) recently emerged as a unifying formalism for probabilistic inference in hybrid domains. Despite a considerable amount of recent work, allowing WMI algorithms to scale with the complexity of the hybrid problem is still a challenge. In this paper we highlight some substantial limitations of existing state-of-the-art solutions, and develop an algorithm that combines SMT-based enumeration, an efficient technique in formal verification, with an effective encoding of the problem structure. This allows our algorithm to avoid generating redundant models, resulting in drastic computational savings. Additionally, we show how SMT-based approaches can seamlessly deal with different integration techniques, both exact and approximate, significantly expanding the set of problems that can be tackled by WMI technology. An extensive experimental evaluation on both synthetic and real-world datasets confirms the substantial advantage of the proposed solution over existing alternatives. The application potential of this technology is further showcased on a prototypical task aimed at verifying the fairness of probabilistic programs.

Whereas substantial progress has been made in dealing with purely discrete or purely continuous domains, adapting the developed solutions to tackle hybrid domains, characterised by discrete and continuous variables and their relationships, is highly non-trivial. Weighted Model Integration (WMI) recently emerged as a unifying formalism for probabilistic inference in hybrid domains. Despite a considerable amount of recent work, allowing WMI algorithms to scale with the complexity of the hybrid problem is still a challenge. In this paper we highlight some substantial limitations of existing state-of-the-art solutions, and develop an algorithm that combines SMT-based enumeration, an efficient technique in formal verification, with an effective encoding of the problem structure. This allows our algorithm to avoid generating redundant models, resulting in drastic computational savings. Additionally, we show how SMT-based approaches can seamlessly deal with different integration techniques, both exact and approximate, significantly expanding the set of problems that can be tackled by WMI technology. An extensive experimental evaluation on both synthetic and real-world datasets confirms the substantial advantage of the proposed solution over existing alternatives. The application potential of this technology is further showcased on a prototypical task aimed at verifying the fairness of probabilistic programs.
abstract_zh: 开发用于概率推理的高效精确和近似算法是人工智能研究的长期目标。尽管在处理纯离散或纯连续领域方面已经取得了实质性进展，但采用已开发的解决方案来处理以离散和连续变量及其关系为特征的混合领域是非常重要的。加权模型集成（WMI）最近成为混合领域概率推理的统一形式。尽管最近做了大量工作，但允许 WMI 算法根据混合问题的复杂性进行扩展仍然是一个挑战。在本文中，我们强调了现有最先进解决方案的一些实质性局限性，并开发了一种将基于 SMT 的枚举（形式验证中的有效技术）与问题结构的有效编码相结合的算法。这使得我们的算法能够避免生成冗余模型，从而大大节省计算量。此外，我们还展示了基于 SMT 的方法如何无缝处理不同的集成技术（精确的和近似的），从而显着扩展了 WMI 技术可以解决的问题集。对合成数据集和真实数据集的广泛实验评估证实了所提出的解决方案相对于现有替代方案的巨大优势。该技术的应用潜力在旨在验证概率程序公平性的原型任务上得到了进一步展示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合SMT求解器与结构感知编码的算法，以提升混合域概率推理中加权模型积分（WMI）的效率。
AI.motivation: 现有WMI算法在处理包含离散和连续变量的复杂混合域问题时存在扩展性不足的问题，需改进以应对实际应用需求。
AI.method: 将SMT求解器的枚举技术与问题结构编码结合，避免生成冗余模型，并兼容精确和近似积分方法。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在合成和真实数据集上均显著优于现有方案，且成功应用于概率程序公平性验证任务。
AI.conclusion: 结构感知的SMT-WMI方法有效扩展了混合域概率推理的适用范围，为复杂问题提供了高效解决方案。

search_text: Enhancing SMT-based Weighted Model Integration by Structure Awareness 通过结构感知增强基于 SMT 的加权模型集成 The development of efficient exact and approximate algorithms for probabilistic inference is a long-standing goal of artificial intelligence research. Whereas substantial progress has been made in dealing with purely discrete or purely continuous domains, adapting the developed solutions to tackle hybrid domains, characterised by discrete and continuous variables and their relationships, is highly non-trivial. Weighted Model Integration (WMI) recently emerged as a unifying formalism for probabilistic inference in hybrid domains. Despite a considerable amount of recent work, allowing WMI algorithms to scale with the complexity of the hybrid problem is still a challenge. In this paper we highlight some substantial limitations of existing state-of-the-art solutions, and develop an algorithm that combines SMT-based enumeration, an efficient technique in formal verification, with an effective encoding of the problem structure. This allows our algorithm to avoid generating redundant models, resulting in drastic computational savings. Additionally, we show how SMT-based approaches can seamlessly deal with different integration techniques, both exact and approximate, significantly expanding the set of problems that can be tackled by WMI technology. An extensive experimental evaluation on both synthetic and real-world datasets confirms the substantial advantage of the proposed solution over existing alternatives. The application potential of this technology is further showcased on a prototypical task aimed at verifying the fairness of probabilistic programs. 开发用于概率推理的高效精确和近似算法是人工智能研究的长期目标。尽管在处理纯离散或纯连续领域方面已经取得了实质性进展，但采用已开发的解决方案来处理以离散和连续变量及其关系为特征的混合领域是非常重要的。加权模型集成（WMI）最近成为混合领域概率推理的统一形式。尽管最近做了大量工作，但允许 WMI 算法根据混合问题的复杂性进行扩展仍然是一个挑战。在本文中，我们强调了现有最先进解决方案的一些实质性局限性，并开发了一种将基于 SMT 的枚举（形式验证中的有效技术）与问题结构的有效编码相结合的算法。这使得我们的算法能够避免生成冗余模型，从而大大节省计算量。此外，我们还展示了基于 SMT 的方法如何无缝处理不同的集成技术（精确的和近似的），从而显着扩展了 WMI 技术可以解决的问题集。对合成数据集和真实数据集的广泛实验评估证实了所提出的解决方案相对于现有替代方案的巨大优势。该技术的应用潜力在旨在验证概率程序公平性的原型任务上得到了进一步展示。 本文提出了一种结合SMT求解器与结构感知编码的算法，以提升混合域概率推理中加权模型积分（WMI）的效率。 Giuseppe Spallitta,Gabriele Masina,Paolo Morettin,Andrea Passerini,Roberto Sebastiani cs.AI

authors_text: Shihao Su,Jianyun Xu,Huanyu Wang,Zhenwei Miao,Xin Zhan,Dayang Hao,Xi Li
title: PUPS: Point Cloud Unified Panoptic Segmentation
title_zh: PUPS：点云统一全景分割
abstract: Point cloud panoptic segmentation is a challenging task that seeks a holistic solution for both semantic and instance segmentation to predict groupings of coherent points. Previous approaches treat semantic and instance segmentation as surrogate tasks, and they either use clustering methods or bounding boxes to gather instance groupings with costly computation and hand-crafted designs in the instance segmentation task. In this paper, we propose a simple but effective point cloud unified panoptic segmentation (PUPS) framework, which use a set of point-level classifiers to directly predict semantic and instance groupings in an end-to-end manner. To realize PUPS, we introduce bipartite matching to our training pipeline so that our classifiers are able to exclusively predict groupings of instances, getting rid of hand-crafted designs, e.g. anchors and Non-Maximum Suppression (NMS). In order to achieve better grouping results, we utilize a transformer decoder to iteratively refine the point classifiers and develop a context-aware CutMix augmentation to overcome the class imbalance problem. As a result, PUPS achieves 1st place on the leader board of SemanticKITTI panoptic segmentation task and state-of-the-art results on nuScenes.
summary: Point cloud panoptic segmentation is a challenging task that seeks a holistic solution for both semantic and instance segmentation to predict groupings of coherent points. Previous approaches treat semantic and instance segmentation as surrogate tasks, and they either use clustering methods or bounding boxes to gather instance groupings with costly computation and hand-crafted designs in the instance segmentation task. In this paper, we propose a simple but effective point cloud unified panoptic segmentation (PUPS) framework, which use a set of point-level classifiers to directly predict semantic and instance groupings in an end-to-end manner. To realize PUPS, we introduce bipartite matching to our training pipeline so that our classifiers are able to exclusively predict groupings of instances, getting rid of hand-crafted designs, e.g. anchors and Non-Maximum Suppression (NMS). In order to achieve better grouping results, we utilize a transformer decoder to iteratively refine the point classifiers and develop a context-aware CutMix augmentation to overcome the class imbalance problem. As a result, PUPS achieves 1st place on the leader board of SemanticKITTI panoptic segmentation task and state-of-the-art results on nuScenes.
abstract_zh: 点云全景分割是一项具有挑战性的任务，它寻求语义和实例分割的整体解决方案来预测相干点的分组。以前的方法将语义和实例分割视为代理任务，并且它们在实例分割任务中使用聚类方法或边界框来通过昂贵的计算和手工设计来收集实例分组。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单但有效的点云统一全景分割（PUPS）框架，该框架使用一组点级分类器以端到端的方式直接预测语义和实例分组。为了实现 PUPS，我们在训练管道中引入二分匹配，以便我们的分类器能够专门预测实例分组，摆脱手工设计，例如锚点和非极大值抑制（NMS）。为了获得更好的分组结果，我们利用 Transformer 解码器迭代地细化点分类器，并开发上下文感知的 CutMix 增强来克服类不平衡问题。结果，PUPS 在 SemanticKITTI 全景分割任务排行榜上获得第一名，并在 nuScenes 上取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PUPS框架，通过端到端方式直接预测点云的语义与实例分组，解决传统方法计算成本高和依赖手工设计的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统点云全景分割方法需通过聚类或边界框进行实例分组，存在计算成本高、依赖手工设计（如锚点和NMS）等缺陷。
AI.method: 采用点级分类器直接预测语义与实例分组，引入二分图匹配替代手工设计，结合Transformer解码器迭代优化分类器，并使用上下文感知CutMix增强解决类别不平衡。
AI.result: 在SemanticKITTI全景分割任务中排名第一，并在nuScenes数据集上取得SOTA结果。
AI.conclusion: PUPS通过端到端设计和创新训练策略，有效提升了点云全景分割的性能，无需依赖传统手工设计模块。

authors_text: Jiajun Huang,Xinqi Zhu,Chengbin Du,Siqi Ma,Surya Nepal,Chang Xu
title: Anti-Compression Contrastive Facial Forgery Detection
title_zh: 抗压缩对比人脸伪造检测
abstract: Forgery facial images and videos have increased the concern of digital security. It leads to the significant development of detecting forgery data recently. However, the data, especially the videos published on the Internet, are usually compressed with lossy compression algorithms such as H.264. The compressed data could significantly degrade the performance of recent detection algorithms. The existing anti-compression algorithms focus on enhancing the performance in detecting heavily compressed data but less consider the compression adaption to the data from various compression levels. We believe creating a forgery detection model that can handle the data compressed with unknown levels is important. To enhance the performance for such models, we consider the weak compressed and strong compressed data as two views of the original data and they should have similar representation and relationships with other samples. We propose a novel anti-compression forgery detection framework by maintaining closer relations within data under different compression levels. Specifically, the algorithm measures the pair-wise similarity within data as the relations, and forcing the relations of weak and strong compressed data close to each other, thus improving the discriminate power for detecting strong compressed data. To achieve a better strong compressed data relation guided by the less compressed one, we apply video level contrastive learning for weak compressed data, which forces the model to produce similar representations within the same video and far from the negative samples. The experiment results show that the proposed algorithm could boost performance for strong compressed data while improving the accuracy rate when detecting the clean data.
summary: Forgery facial images and videos have increased the concern of digital security. It leads to the significant development of detecting forgery data recently. However, the data, especially the videos published on the Internet, are usually compressed with lossy compression algorithms such as H.264. The compressed data could significantly degrade the performance of recent detection algorithms. The existing anti-compression algorithms focus on enhancing the performance in detecting heavily compressed data but less consider the compression adaption to the data from various compression levels. We believe creating a forgery detection model that can handle the data compressed with unknown levels is important. To enhance the performance for such models, we consider the weak compressed and strong compressed data as two views of the original data and they should have similar representation and relationships with other samples. We propose a novel anti-compression forgery detection framework by maintaining closer relations within data under different compression levels. Specifically, the algorithm measures the pair-wise similarity within data as the relations, and forcing the relations of weak and strong compressed data close to each other, thus improving the discriminate power for detecting strong compressed data. To achieve a better strong compressed data relation guided by the less compressed one, we apply video level contrastive learning for weak compressed data, which forces the model to produce similar representations within the same video and far from the negative samples. The experiment results show that the proposed algorithm could boost performance for strong compressed data while improving the accuracy rate when detecting the clean data.
abstract_zh: 伪造面部图像和视频增加了对数字安全的担忧。它导致了最近检测伪造数据的重大发展。然而，数据，尤其是互联网上发布的视频，通常采用H.264等有损压缩算法进行压缩。压缩数据可能会显着降低最新检测算法的性能。现有的抗压缩算法侧重于增强检测重度压缩数据的性能，而较少考虑对不同压缩级别的数据的压缩适应。我们相信创建一个可以处理未知级别压缩数据的伪造检测模型非常重要。为了提高此类模型的性能，我们将弱压缩数据和强压缩数据视为原始数据的两个视图，并且它们应该与其他样本具有相似的表示和关系。我们提出了一种新颖的反压缩伪造检测框架，通过在不同压缩级别下保持数据之间更紧密的关系。具体来说，该算法将数据内的成对相似性衡量为关系，迫使弱压缩数据和强压缩数据的关系彼此接近，从而提高检测强压缩数据的判别力。为了在压缩程度较低的数据指导下实现更好的强压缩数据关系，我们对弱压缩数据应用视频级对比学习，这迫使模型在同一视频内产生相似的表示，并且远离负样本。实验结果表明，该算法可以提高强压缩数据的性能，同时提高检测干净数据的准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型抗压缩人脸伪造检测框架，旨在解决因视频压缩导致的检测性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 网络视频常经H.264等有损压缩算法处理，现有检测算法在处理未知压缩等级的数据时性能显著下降，且现有抗压缩方法较少考虑多压缩等级的自适应性。
AI.method: 将弱压缩与强压缩数据视为原始数据的两种视角，通过保持不同压缩等级数据的表示关系一致性，结合视频级对比学习，使弱压缩数据引导强压缩数据的关系学习。
AI.result: 实验表明该算法在强压缩数据检测性能显著提升，同时清洁数据检测准确率也得到改善。
AI.conclusion: 通过跨压缩等级的对比学习框架，有效提升了模型对未知压缩等级数据的鲁棒性，为多压缩场景下的伪造检测提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种新型抗压缩人脸伪造检测框架，旨在解决因视频压缩导致的检测性能下降问题。
ai_content.motivation: 网络视频常经H.264等有损压缩算法处理，现有检测算法在处理未知压缩等级的数据时性能显著下降，且现有抗压缩方法较少考虑多压缩等级的自适应性。
ai_content.method: 将弱压缩与强压缩数据视为原始数据的两种视角，通过保持不同压缩等级数据的表示关系一致性，结合视频级对比学习，使弱压缩数据引导强压缩数据的关系学习。
ai_content.result: 实验表明该算法在强压缩数据检测性能显著提升，同时清洁数据检测准确率也得到改善。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过跨压缩等级的对比学习框架，有效提升了模型对未知压缩等级数据的鲁棒性，为多压缩场景下的伪造检测提供了新思路。
