tldr: 本文提出一种新型抗压缩人脸伪造检测框架，旨在解决因视频压缩导致的检测性能下降问题。
motivation: 网络视频常经H.264等有损压缩算法处理，现有检测算法在处理未知压缩等级的数据时性能显著下降，且现有抗压缩方法较少考虑多压缩等级的自适应性。
method: 将弱压缩与强压缩数据视为原始数据的两种视角，通过保持不同压缩等级数据的表示关系一致性，结合视频级对比学习，使弱压缩数据引导强压缩数据的关系学习。
result: 实验表明该算法在强压缩数据检测性能显著提升，同时清洁数据检测准确率也得到改善。
conclusion: 通过跨压缩等级的对比学习框架，有效提升了模型对未知压缩等级数据的鲁棒性，为多压缩场景下的伪造检测提供了新思路。
search_text: Anti-Compression Contrastive Facial Forgery Detection 抗压缩对比人脸伪造检测 Forgery facial images and videos have increased the concern of digital security. It leads to the significant development of detecting forgery data recently. However, the data, especially the videos published on the Internet, are usually compressed with lossy compression algorithms such as H.264. The compressed data could significantly degrade the performance of recent detection algorithms. The existing anti-compression algorithms focus on enhancing the performance in detecting heavily compressed data but less consider the compression adaption to the data from various compression levels. We believe creating a forgery detection model that can handle the data compressed with unknown levels is important. To enhance the performance for such models, we consider the weak compressed and strong compressed data as two views of the original data and they should have similar representation and relationships with other samples. We propose a novel anti-compression forgery detection framework by maintaining closer relations within data under different compression levels. Specifically, the algorithm measures the pair-wise similarity within data as the relations, and forcing the relations of weak and strong compressed data close to each other, thus improving the discriminate power for detecting strong compressed data. To achieve a better strong compressed data relation guided by the less compressed one, we apply video level contrastive learning for weak compressed data, which forces the model to produce similar representations within the same video and far from the negative samples. The experiment results show that the proposed algorithm could boost performance for strong compressed data while improving the accuracy rate when detecting the clean data. 伪造面部图像和视频增加了对数字安全的担忧。它导致了最近检测伪造数据的重大发展。然而，数据，尤其是互联网上发布的视频，通常采用H.264等有损压缩算法进行压缩。压缩数据可能会显着降低最新检测算法的性能。现有的抗压缩算法侧重于增强检测重度压缩数据的性能，而较少考虑对不同压缩级别的数据的压缩适应。我们相信创建一个可以处理未知级别压缩数据的伪造检测模型非常重要。为了提高此类模型的性能，我们将弱压缩数据和强压缩数据视为原始数据的两个视图，并且它们应该与其他样本具有相似的表示和关系。我们提出了一种新颖的反压缩伪造检测框架，通过在不同压缩级别下保持数据之间更紧密的关系。具体来说，该算法将数据内的成对相似性衡量为关系，迫使弱压缩数据和强压缩数据的关系彼此接近，从而提高检测强压缩数据的判别力。为了在压缩程度较低的数据指导下实现更好的强压缩数据关系，我们对弱压缩数据应用视频级对比学习，这迫使模型在同一视频内产生相似的表示，并且远离负样本。实验结果表明，该算法可以提高强压缩数据的性能，同时提高检测干净数据的准确率。 本文提出一种新型抗压缩人脸伪造检测框架，旨在解决因视频压缩导致的检测性能下降问题。 Jiajun Huang,Xinqi Zhu,Chengbin Du,Siqi Ma,Surya Nepal,Chang Xu cs.CV

authors_text: Martin Büchner,Jannik Zürn,Ion-George Todoran,Abhinav Valada,Wolfram Burgard
title: Learning and Aggregating Lane Graphs for Urban Automated Driving
title_zh: 学习和聚合城市自动驾驶的车道图
abstract: Lane graph estimation is an essential and highly challenging task in automated driving and HD map learning. Existing methods using either onboard or aerial imagery struggle with complex lane topologies, out-of-distribution scenarios, or significant occlusions in the image space. Moreover, merging overlapping lane graphs to obtain consistent large-scale graphs remains difficult. To overcome these challenges, we propose a novel bottom-up approach to lane graph estimation from aerial imagery that aggregates multiple overlapping graphs into a single consistent graph. Due to its modular design, our method allows us to address two complementary tasks: predicting ego-respective successor lane graphs from arbitrary vehicle positions using a graph neural network and aggregating these predictions into a consistent global lane graph. Extensive experiments on a large-scale lane graph dataset demonstrate that our approach yields highly accurate lane graphs, even in regions with severe occlusions. The presented approach to graph aggregation proves to eliminate inconsistent predictions while increasing the overall graph quality. We make our large-scale urban lane graph dataset and code publicly available at http://urbanlanegraph.cs.uni-freiburg.de.
summary: Lane graph estimation is an essential and highly challenging task in automated driving and HD map learning. Existing methods using either onboard or aerial imagery struggle with complex lane topologies, out-of-distribution scenarios, or significant occlusions in the image space. Moreover, merging overlapping lane graphs to obtain consistent large-scale graphs remains difficult. To overcome these challenges, we propose a novel bottom-up approach to lane graph estimation from aerial imagery that aggregates multiple overlapping graphs into a single consistent graph. Due to its modular design, our method allows us to address two complementary tasks: predicting ego-respective successor lane graphs from arbitrary vehicle positions using a graph neural network and aggregating these predictions into a consistent global lane graph. Extensive experiments on a large-scale lane graph dataset demonstrate that our approach yields highly accurate lane graphs, even in regions with severe occlusions. The presented approach to graph aggregation proves to eliminate inconsistent predictions while increasing the overall graph quality. We make our large-scale urban lane graph dataset and code publicly available at http://urbanlanegraph.cs.uni-freiburg.de.
abstract_zh: 车道图估计是自动驾驶和高清地图学习中一项重要且极具挑战性的任务。使用机载图像或航空图像的现有方法难以应对复杂的车道拓扑、分布外场景或图像空间中的严重遮挡。此外，合并重叠车道图以获得一致的大规模图仍然很困难。为了克服这些挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的自下而上的方法来从航空图像估计车道图，将多个重叠图聚合成一个一致的图。由于其模块化设计，我们的方法使我们能够解决两个互补的任务：使用图神经网络从任意车辆位置预测自我相关的后继车道图，并将这些预测聚合成一致的全局车道图。对大规模车道图数据集的大量实验表明，即使在遮挡严重的区域，我们的方法也能产生高度准确的车道图。所提出的图聚合方法被证明可以消除不一致的预测，同时提高整体图质量。我们在 http://urbanlanegraph.cs.uni-freiburg.de 公开提供大规模城市车道图数据集和代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从航拍图像中学习和聚合城市道路车道图的新方法，以解决自动驾驶中的复杂车道拓扑和遮挡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理复杂车道结构、分布外场景及严重遮挡，且无法有效合并重叠车道图生成一致的大规模地图。
AI.method: 设计自底向上的模块化框架，利用图神经网络预测车辆位置相关的局部车道图，并通过聚合算法生成全局一致的车道图。
AI.result: 在大规模数据集实验中，方法在遮挡区域仍保持高精度，聚合过程显著提升图一致性与整体质量。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了车道图估计与聚合难题，公开的数据集和代码为自动驾驶研究提供了重要资源。

title: On the Mixing Time of Glauber Dynamics for the Hard-core and Related Models on G(n,d/n)
title_zh: 关于G(n,d/n)上硬核及相关模型的格劳伯动力学混合时间
abstract: We study the single-site Glauber dynamics for the fugacity $λ$, Hard-core model on the random graph $G(n, d/n)$. We show that for the typical instances of the random graph $G(n,d/n)$ and for fugacity $λ< \frac{d^d}{(d-1)^{d+1}}$, the mixing time of Glauber dynamics is $n^{1 + O(1/\log \log n)}$. Our result improves on the recent elegant algorithm in [Bezakova, Galanis, Goldberg Stefankovic; ICALP'22]. The algorithm there is a MCMC based sampling algorithm, but it is not the Glauber dynamics. Our algorithm here is simpler, as we use the classic Glauber dynamics. Furthermore, the bounds on mixing time we prove are smaller than those in Bezakova et al. paper, hence our algorithm is also faster. The main challenge in our proof is handling vertices with unbounded degrees. We provide stronger results with regard the spectral independence via branching values and show that the our Gibbs distributions satisfy the approximate tensorisation of the entropy. We conjecture that the bounds we have here are optimal for $G(n,d/n)$. As corollary of our analysis for the Hard-core model, we also get bounds on the mixing time of the Glauber dynamics for the Monomer-dimer model on $G(n,d/n)$. The bounds we get for this model are slightly better than those we have for the Hard-core model
summary: We study the single-site Glauber dynamics for the fugacity $λ$, Hard-core model on the random graph $G(n, d/n)$. We show that for the typical instances of the random graph $G(n,d/n)$ and for fugacity $λ< \frac{d^d}{(d-1)^{d+1}}$, the mixing time of Glauber dynamics is $n^{1 + O(1/\log \log n)}$. Our result improves on the recent elegant algorithm in [Bezakova, Galanis, Goldberg Stefankovic; ICALP'22]. The algorithm there is a MCMC based sampling algorithm, but it is not the Glauber dynamics. Our algorithm here is simpler, as we use the classic Glauber dynamics. Furthermore, the bounds on mixing time we prove are smaller than those in Bezakova et al. paper, hence our algorithm is also faster. The main challenge in our proof is handling vertices with unbounded degrees. We provide stronger results with regard the spectral independence via branching values and show that the our Gibbs distributions satisfy the approximate tensorisation of the entropy. We conjecture that the bounds we have here are optimal for $G(n,d/n)$. As corollary of our analysis for the Hard-core model, we also get bounds on the mixing time of the Glauber dynamics for the Monomer-dimer model on $G(n,d/n)$. The bounds we get for this model are slightly better than those we have for the Hard-core model
abstract_zh: 我们研究随机图 $G(n, d/n)$ 上逸度 $λ$ 的单点 Glauber 动力学，即硬核模型。我们证明，对于随机图 $G(n,d/n)$ 的典型实例和逸度 $λ< \frac{d^d}{(d-1)^{d+1}}$，格劳伯动力学的混合时间为 $n^{1 + O(1/\log \log n)}$。我们的结果改进了 [Bezakova、Galanis、Goldberg Stefankovic； ICLP'22]。该算法有基于 MCMC 的采样算法，但它不是 Glauber 动力学。我们这里的算法更简单，因为我们使用经典的格劳伯动力学。此外，我们证明的混合时间范围比 Bezakova 等人的范围小。纸，因此我们的算法也更快。我们证明中的主要挑战是处理具有无限度数的顶点。我们通过分支值提供了关于谱独立性的更强结果，并表明我们的吉布斯分布满足熵的近似张量化。我们推测这里的边界对于 $G(n,d/n)$ 是最佳的。作为我们对硬核模型分析的推论，我们还得到了 $G(n,d/n)$ 上单体-二聚体模型的 Glauber 动力学混合时间的界限。我们为此模型获得的边界略好于硬核模型的边界

AI.tldr: 本文研究了随机图G(n,d/n)上硬核模型及关联模型的单点Glauber动力学的混合时间。
AI.motivation: 改进现有MCMC采样算法的效率，提出更简洁的Glauber动力学方法并证明更优的混合时间界。
AI.method: 通过分支值分析和熵近似张量化证明谱独立性，处理高阶顶点度问题。
AI.result: 在λ< d^d/(d-1)^{d+1}条件下，混合时间为n^{1+O(1/log log n)}，并推广至单体-二聚体模型。
AI.conclusion: 提出的混合时间界在G(n,d/n)上最优，并为相关模型提供更优结果。

Our result improves on the recent elegant algorithm in [Bezakova, Galanis, Goldberg Stefankovic; ICALP'22]. The algorithm there is a MCMC based sampling algorithm, but it is not the Glauber dynamics. Our algorithm here is simpler, as we use the classic Glauber dynamics. Furthermore, the bounds on mixing time we prove are smaller than those in Bezakova et al. paper, hence our algorithm is also faster. The main challenge in our proof is handling vertices with unbounded degrees. We provide stronger results with regard the spectral independence via branching values and show that the our Gibbs distributions satisfy the approximate tensorisation of the entropy. We conjecture that the bounds we have here are optimal for $G(n,d/n)$. As corollary of our analysis for the Hard-core model, we also get bounds on the mixing time of the Glauber dynamics for the Monomer-dimer model on $G(n,d/n)$. The bounds we get for this model are slightly better than those we have for the Hard-core model 我们研究随机图 $G(n, d/n)$ 上逸度 $λ$ 的单点 Glauber 动力学，即硬核模型。我们证明，对于随机图 $G(n,d/n)$ 的典型实例和逸度 $λ< \frac{d^d}{(d-1)^{d+1}}$，格劳伯动力学的混合时间为 $n^{1 + O(1/\log \log n)}$。我们的结果改进了 [Bezakova、Galanis、Goldberg Stefankovic； ICLP'22]。该算法有基于 MCMC 的采样算法，但它不是 Glauber 动力学。我们这里的算法更简单，因为我们使用经典的格劳伯动力学。此外，我们证明的混合时间范围比 Bezakova 等人的范围小。纸，因此我们的算法也更快。我们证明中的主要挑战是处理具有无限度数的顶点。我们通过分支值提供了关于谱独立性的更强结果，并表明我们的吉布斯分布满足熵的近似张量化。我们推测这里的边界对于 $G(n,d/n)$ 是最佳的。作为我们对硬核模型分析的推论，我们还得到了 $G(n,d/n)$ 上单体-二聚体模型的 Glauber 动力学混合时间的界限。我们为此模型获得的边界略好于硬核模型的边界 本文研究了随机图G(n,d/n)上硬核模型及关联模型的单点Glauber动力学的混合时间。 Charilaos Efthymiou,Weiming Feng cs.DM,cs.DS,math.PR

authors_text: Mikael Møller Høgsgaard,Lion Kamma,Kasper Green Larsen,Jelani Nelson,Chris Schwiegelshohn
title: Sparse Dimensionality Reduction Revisited
title_zh: 重新审视稀疏维数降低
abstract: The sparse Johnson-Lindenstrauss transform is one of the central techniques in dimensionality reduction. It supports embedding a set of $n$ points in $\mathbb{R}^d$ into $m=O(\varepsilon^{-2} \lg n)$ dimensions while preserving all pairwise distances to within $1 \pm \varepsilon$. Each input point $x$ is embedded to $Ax$, where $A$ is an $m \times d$ matrix having $s$ non-zeros per column, allowing for an embedding time of $O(s \|x\|_0)$. Since the sparsity of $A$ governs the embedding time, much work has gone into improving the sparsity $s$. The current state-of-the-art by Kane and Nelson (JACM'14) shows that $s = O(\varepsilon ^{-1} \lg n)$ suffices. This is almost matched by a lower bound of $s = Ω(\varepsilon ^{-1} \lg n/\lg(1/\varepsilon))$ by Nelson and Nguyen (STOC'13). Previous work thus suggests that we have near-optimal embeddings. In this work, we revisit sparse embeddings and identify a loophole in the lower bound. Concretely, it requires $d \geq n$, which in many applications is unrealistic. We exploit this loophole to give a sparser embedding when $d = o(n)$, achieving $s = O(\varepsilon^{-1}(\lg n/\lg(1/\varepsilon)+\lg^{2/3}n \lg^{1/3} d))$. We also complement our analysis by strengthening the lower bound of Nelson and Nguyen to hold also when $d \ll n$, thereby matching the first term in our new sparsity upper bound. Finally, we also improve the sparsity of the best oblivious subspace embeddings for optimal embedding dimensionality.
summary: The sparse Johnson-Lindenstrauss transform is one of the central techniques in dimensionality reduction. It supports embedding a set of $n$ points in $\mathbb{R}^d$ into $m=O(\varepsilon^{-2} \lg n)$ dimensions while preserving all pairwise distances to within $1 \pm \varepsilon$. Each input point $x$ is embedded to $Ax$, where $A$ is an $m \times d$ matrix having $s$ non-zeros per column, allowing for an embedding time of $O(s \|x\|_0)$. Since the sparsity of $A$ governs the embedding time, much work has gone into improving the sparsity $s$. The current state-of-the-art by Kane and Nelson (JACM'14) shows that $s = O(\varepsilon ^{-1} \lg n)$ suffices. This is almost matched by a lower bound of $s = Ω(\varepsilon ^{-1} \lg n/\lg(1/\varepsilon))$ by Nelson and Nguyen (STOC'13). Previous work thus suggests that we have near-optimal embeddings. In this work, we revisit sparse embeddings and identify a loophole in the lower bound. Concretely, it requires $d \geq n$, which in many applications is unrealistic. We exploit this loophole to give a sparser embedding when $d = o(n)$, achieving $s = O(\varepsilon^{-1}(\lg n/\lg(1/\varepsilon)+\lg^{2/3}n \lg^{1/3} d))$. We also complement our analysis by strengthening the lower bound of Nelson and Nguyen to hold also when $d \ll n$, thereby matching the first term in our new sparsity upper bound. Finally, we also improve the sparsity of the best oblivious subspace embeddings for optimal embedding dimensionality.
abstract_zh: 稀疏 Johnson-Lindenstrauss 变换是降维的核心技术之一。它支持将 $\mathbb{R}^d$ 中的一组 $n$ 点嵌入 $m=O(\varepsilon^{-2} \lg n)$ 维度，同时将所有成对距离保留在 $1 \pm \varepsilon$ 范围内。每个输入点 $x$ 都嵌入到 $Ax$，其中 $A$ 是一个 $m \times d$ 矩阵，每列有 $s$ 个非零，允许嵌入时间为 $O(s \|x\|_0)$。由于 $A$ 的稀疏性决定了嵌入时间，因此在改善 $s$ 的稀疏性方面投入了大量工作。 Kane 和 Nelson (JACM'14) 的最新技术表明 $s = O(\varepsilon ^{-1} \lg n)$ 就足够了。这几乎与 Nelson 和 Nguyen (STOC'13) 的 $s = Ω(\varepsilon ^{-1} \lg n/\lg(1/\varepsilon))$ 的下限相匹配。因此，之前的工作表明我们拥有接近最佳的嵌入。在这项工作中，我们重新审视稀疏嵌入并识别下限中的漏洞。具体来说，它需要 $d \geq n$，这在许多应用中是不现实的。我们利用这个漏洞在 $d = o(n)$ 时提供稀疏嵌入，实现 $s = O(\varepsilon^{-1}(\lg n/\lg(1/\varepsilon)+\lg^{2/3}n \lg^{1/3} d))$。我们还通过加强 Nelson 和 Nguyen 的下界来补充我们的分析，使其在 $d \ll n$ 时也保持不变，从而匹配我们新的稀疏上限中的第一项。最后，我们还提高了最佳不经意子空间嵌入的稀疏性，以获得最佳嵌入维数。

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视稀疏嵌入技术，针对低维数据场景改进稀疏性上界。
AI.motivation: 现有稀疏嵌入下界假设输入维度d≥n，但实际应用中d远小于n的情况更常见，需突破此限制。
AI.method: 通过分析Nelson和Nguyen的下界条件漏洞，提出当d=o(n)时的新稀疏性上界，并强化下界以匹配上界首项。
AI.result: 在d=o(n)时实现s=O(ε⁻¹(lg n/lg(1/ε)+lg²/³n lg¹/³d))的稀疏性，同时加强下界使其适用于d≪n场景。
AI.conclusion: 突破传统下界假设限制，为低维数据提供更优稀疏嵌入方案，并改进最优嵌入维度下的 oblivious subspace embeddings 稀疏性。

title: Identifying Semantically Difficult Samples to Improve Text Classification
title_zh: 识别语义困难的样本以改进文本分类
abstract: In this paper, we investigate the effect of addressing difficult samples from a given text dataset on the downstream text classification task. We define difficult samples as being non-obvious cases for text classification by analysing them in the semantic embedding space; specifically - (i) semantically similar samples that belong to different classes and (ii) semantically dissimilar samples that belong to the same class. We propose a penalty function to measure the overall difficulty score of every sample in the dataset. We conduct exhaustive experiments on 13 standard datasets to show a consistent improvement of up to 9% and discuss qualitative results to show effectiveness of our approach in identifying difficult samples for a text classification model.
summary: In this paper, we investigate the effect of addressing difficult samples from a given text dataset on the downstream text classification task. We define difficult samples as being non-obvious cases for text classification by analysing them in the semantic embedding space; specifically - (i) semantically similar samples that belong to different classes and (ii) semantically dissimilar samples that belong to the same class. We propose a penalty function to measure the overall difficulty score of every sample in the dataset. We conduct exhaustive experiments on 13 standard datasets to show a consistent improvement of up to 9% and discuss qualitative results to show effectiveness of our approach in identifying difficult samples for a text classification model.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了处理给定文本数据集中的困难样本对下游文本分类任务的影响。我们通过在语义嵌入空间中分析困难样本，将其定义为文本分类的非明显情况；具体来说 - (i) 属于不同类别的语义相似样本和 (ii) 属于同一类别的语义不相似样本。我们提出了一个惩罚函数来衡量数据集中每个样本的总体难度分数。我们对 13 个标准数据集进行了详尽的实验，显示了高达 9% 的一致改进，并讨论了定性结果，以显示我们的方法在识别文本分类模型的困难样本方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本论文旨在通过识别语义上难以分类的样本，提升文本分类模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有文本分类方法可能忽视了语义上容易混淆的样本，导致模型在复杂案例上表现不足，需针对性优化。
AI.method: 提出基于语义嵌入空间的惩罚函数，量化样本难度：识别语义相似但类别不同、或语义差异大但类别相同的困难样本。
AI.result: 在13个标准数据集上实现最高9%的性能提升，定性分析验证了方法在识别困难样本上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过显式处理语义困难样本，显著提升分类效果，为文本分类中的样本优化提供新思路。

title: Contour Context: Abstract Structural Distribution for 3D LiDAR Loop Detection and Metric Pose Estimation
title_zh: 轮廓上下文：3D LiDAR 环路检测和公制姿态估计的抽象结构分布
abstract: This paper proposes \textit{Contour Context}, a simple, effective, and efficient topological loop closure detection pipeline with accurate 3-DoF metric pose estimation, targeting the urban utonomous driving scenario. We interpret the Cartesian birds' eye view (BEV) image projected from 3D LiDAR points as layered distribution of structures. To recover elevation information from BEVs, we slice them at different heights, and connected pixels at each level will form contours. Each contour is parameterized by abstract information, e.g., pixel count, center position, covariance, and mean height. The similarity of two BEVs is calculated in sequential discrete and continuous steps. The first step considers the geometric consensus of graph-like constellations formed by contours in particular localities. The second step models the majority of contours as a 2.5D Gaussian mixture model, which is used to calculate correlation and optimize relative transform in continuous space. A retrieval key is designed to accelerate the search of a database indexed by layered KD-trees. We validate the efficacy of our method by comparing it with recent works on public datasets.
summary: This paper proposes \textit{Contour Context}, a simple, effective, and efficient topological loop closure detection pipeline with accurate 3-DoF metric pose estimation, targeting the urban utonomous driving scenario. We interpret the Cartesian birds' eye view (BEV) image projected from 3D LiDAR points as layered distribution of structures. To recover elevation information from BEVs, we slice them at different heights, and connected pixels at each level will form contours. Each contour is parameterized by abstract information, e.g., pixel count, center position, covariance, and mean height. The similarity of two BEVs is calculated in sequential discrete and continuous steps. The first step considers the geometric consensus of graph-like constellations formed by contours in particular localities. The second step models the majority of contours as a 2.5D Gaussian mixture model, which is used to calculate correlation and optimize relative transform in continuous space. A retrieval key is designed to accelerate the search of a database indexed by layered KD-trees. We validate the efficacy of our method by comparing it with recent works on public datasets.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了 \textit{Contour Context}，一种简单、有效、高效的拓扑闭环检测管道，具有精确的 3-DoF 度量姿态估计，针对城市自动驾驶场景。我们将从 3D LiDAR 点投影的笛卡尔鸟瞰 (BEV) 图像解释为结构的分层分布。为了从 BEV 中恢复高程信息，我们在不同的高度对它们进行切片，每个级别的连接像素将形成轮廓。每个轮廓都由抽象信息参数化，例如像素计数、中心位置、协方差和平均高度。两个 BEV 的相似度是通过连续的离散和连续步骤来计算的。第一步考虑由特定位置的轮廓形成的类图星座的几何一致性。第二步将大部分轮廓建模为 2.5D 高斯混合模型，用于计算相关性并优化连续空间中的相对变换。检索键旨在加速对分层 KD 树索引的数据库的搜索。我们通过与公共数据集上的最新研究进行比较来验证我们的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Contour Context方法，通过3D LiDAR数据实现城市自动驾驶场景下的环路检测与度量姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在复杂城市环境中难以高效处理动态结构变化，需更精确的拓扑闭环检测与姿态估计技术。
AI.method: 将BEV图像分层切片生成轮廓，提取抽象参数；分两阶段计算相似性：离散阶段分析局部几何共识，连续阶段用2.5D高斯混合模型优化相对变换，结合分层KD树加速检索。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上验证了方法有效性，相较最新算法在环路检测与姿态估计精度上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: Contour Context为城市自动驾驶提供了高效、准确的3D LiDAR闭环检测解决方案，具备实际应用潜力。

search_text: Contour Context: Abstract Structural Distribution for 3D LiDAR Loop Detection and Metric Pose Estimation 轮廓上下文：3D LiDAR 环路检测和公制姿态估计的抽象结构分布 This paper proposes \textit{Contour Context}, a simple, effective, and efficient topological loop closure detection pipeline with accurate 3-DoF metric pose estimation, targeting the urban utonomous driving scenario. We interpret the Cartesian birds' eye view (BEV) image projected from 3D LiDAR points as layered distribution of structures. To recover elevation information from BEVs, we slice them at different heights, and connected pixels at each level will form contours. Each contour is parameterized by abstract information, e.g., pixel count, center position, covariance, and mean height. The similarity of two BEVs is calculated in sequential discrete and continuous steps. The first step considers the geometric consensus of graph-like constellations formed by contours in particular localities. The second step models the majority of contours as a 2.5D Gaussian mixture model, which is used to calculate correlation and optimize relative transform in continuous space. A retrieval key is designed to accelerate the search of a database indexed by layered KD-trees. We validate the efficacy of our method by comparing it with recent works on public datasets. 本文提出了 \textit{Contour Context}，一种简单、有效、高效的拓扑闭环检测管道，具有精确的 3-DoF 度量姿态估计，针对城市自动驾驶场景。我们将从 3D LiDAR 点投影的笛卡尔鸟瞰 (BEV) 图像解释为结构的分层分布。为了从 BEV 中恢复高程信息，我们在不同的高度对它们进行切片，每个级别的连接像素将形成轮廓。每个轮廓都由抽象信息参数化，例如像素计数、中心位置、协方差和平均高度。两个 BEV 的相似度是通过连续的离散和连续步骤来计算的。第一步考虑由特定位置的轮廓形成的类图星座的几何一致性。第二步将大部分轮廓建模为 2.5D 高斯混合模型，用于计算相关性并优化连续空间中的相对变换。检索键旨在加速对分层 KD 树索引的数据库的搜索。我们通过与公共数据集上的最新研究进行比较来验证我们的方法的有效性。 本文提出Contour Context方法，通过3D LiDAR数据实现城市自动驾驶场景下的环路检测与度量姿态估计。 Binqian Jiang,Shaojie Shen cs.RO,cs.CV

title: CoMAE: Single Model Hybrid Pre-training on Small-Scale RGB-D Datasets
title_zh: CoMAE：小规模 RGB-D 数据集的单模型混合预训练
comment: 10 pages(including references),5 figures, Accept by Thirty-Seventh AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI 2023)
comments: 10 pages(including references),5 figures, Accept by Thirty-Seventh AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI 2023)
abstract: Current RGB-D scene recognition approaches often train two standalone backbones for RGB and depth modalities with the same Places or ImageNet pre-training. However, the pre-trained depth network is still biased by RGB-based models which may result in a suboptimal solution. In this paper, we present a single-model self-supervised hybrid pre-training framework for RGB and depth modalities, termed as CoMAE. Our CoMAE presents a curriculum learning strategy to unify the two popular self-supervised representation learning algorithms: contrastive learning and masked image modeling. Specifically, we first build a patch-level alignment task to pre-train a single encoder shared by two modalities via cross-modal contrastive learning. Then, the pre-trained contrastive encoder is passed to a multi-modal masked autoencoder to capture the finer context features from a generative perspective. In addition, our single-model design without requirement of fusion module is very flexible and robust to generalize to unimodal scenario in both training and testing phases. Extensive experiments on SUN RGB-D and NYUDv2 datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our CoMAE for RGB and depth representation learning. In addition, our experiment results reveal that CoMAE is a data-efficient representation learner. Although we only use the small-scale and unlabeled training set for pre-training, our CoMAE pre-trained models are still competitive to the state-of-the-art methods with extra large-scale and supervised RGB dataset pre-training. Code will be released at https://github.com/MCG-NJU/CoMAE.
summary: Current RGB-D scene recognition approaches often train two standalone backbones for RGB and depth modalities with the same Places or ImageNet pre-training. However, the pre-trained depth network is still biased by RGB-based models which may result in a suboptimal solution. In this paper, we present a single-model self-supervised hybrid pre-training framework for RGB and depth modalities, termed as CoMAE. Our CoMAE presents a curriculum learning strategy to unify the two popular self-supervised representation learning algorithms: contrastive learning and masked image modeling. Specifically, we first build a patch-level alignment task to pre-train a single encoder shared by two modalities via cross-modal contrastive learning. Then, the pre-trained contrastive encoder is passed to a multi-modal masked autoencoder to capture the finer context features from a generative perspective. In addition, our single-model design without requirement of fusion module is very flexible and robust to generalize to unimodal scenario in both training and testing phases. Extensive experiments on SUN RGB-D and NYUDv2 datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our CoMAE for RGB and depth representation learning. In addition, our experiment results reveal that CoMAE is a data-efficient representation learner. Although we only use the small-scale and unlabeled training set for pre-training, our CoMAE pre-trained models are still competitive to the state-of-the-art methods with extra large-scale and supervised RGB dataset pre-training. Code will be released at https://github.com/MCG-NJU/CoMAE.
abstract_zh: 当前的 RGB-D 场景识别方法通常使用相同的 Places 或 ImageNet 预训练来训练两个独立的 RGB 和深度模式主干。然而，预训练的深度网络仍然受到基于 RGB 的模型的偏差，这可能会导致解决方案不理想。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于 RGB 和深度模态的单模型自监督混合预训练框架，称为 CoMAE。我们的 CoMAE 提出了一种课程学习策略，以统一两种流行的自监督表示学习算法：对比学习和掩模图像建模。具体来说，我们首先构建一个补丁级对齐任务，通过跨模态对比学习来预训练由两种模态共享的单个编码器。然后，将预先训练的对比编码器传递给多模态掩码自动编码器，以从生成角度捕获更精细的上下文特征。此外，我们的单模型设计不需要融合模块，非常灵活和鲁棒，可以在训练和测试阶段推广到单峰场景。在 SUN RGB-D 和 NYUDv2 数据集上进行的大量实验证明了我们的 CoMAE 对于 RGB 和深度表示学习的有效性。此外，我们的实验结果表明 CoMAE 是一种数据高效的表示学习器。尽管我们只使用小规模且未标记的训练集进行预训练，但我们的 CoMAE 预训练模型仍然比具有超大规模和监督 RGB 数据集预训练的最先进方法具有竞争力。代码将在 https://github.com/MCG-NJU/CoMAE 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CoMAE的单模型混合预训练框架，用于在小规模RGB-D数据集上统一学习RGB和深度模态的表示。
AI.motivation: 现有RGB-D场景识别方法分别训练两个独立的RGB和深度网络，导致深度网络受RGB预训练模型偏见，难以获得最优解。
AI.method: 通过课程学习策略融合对比学习和掩码图像建模：首先使用跨模态对比学习进行块级对齐预训练，再基于预训练编码器构建多模态掩码自编码器捕捉细粒度上下文特征。
AI.result: 在SUN RGB-D和NYUDv2数据集上的实验表明，CoMAE在仅使用小规模无标签数据预训练的情况下，性能可与使用大规模有标签数据预训练的最先进方法竞争。
AI.conclusion: CoMAE通过单模型设计实现了跨模态表示学习的高效性和灵活性，证明了其在数据效率和泛化能力上的优势。

search_text: CoMAE: Single Model Hybrid Pre-training on Small-Scale RGB-D Datasets CoMAE：小规模 RGB-D 数据集的单模型混合预训练 Current RGB-D scene recognition approaches often train two standalone backbones for RGB and depth modalities with the same Places or ImageNet pre-training. However, the pre-trained depth network is still biased by RGB-based models which may result in a suboptimal solution. In this paper, we present a single-model self-supervised hybrid pre-training framework for RGB and depth modalities, termed as CoMAE. Our CoMAE presents a curriculum learning strategy to unify the two popular self-supervised representation learning algorithms: contrastive learning and masked image modeling. Specifically, we first build a patch-level alignment task to pre-train a single encoder shared by two modalities via cross-modal contrastive learning. Then, the pre-trained contrastive encoder is passed to a multi-modal masked autoencoder to capture the finer context features from a generative perspective. In addition, our single-model design without requirement of fusion module is very flexible and robust to generalize to unimodal scenario in both training and testing phases. Extensive experiments on SUN RGB-D and NYUDv2 datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our CoMAE for RGB and depth representation learning. In addition, our experiment results reveal that CoMAE is a data-efficient representation learner. Although we only use the small-scale and unlabeled training set for pre-training, our CoMAE pre-trained models are still competitive to the state-of-the-art methods with extra large-scale and supervised RGB dataset pre-training. Code will be released at https://github.com/MCG-NJU/CoMAE. 当前的 RGB-D 场景识别方法通常使用相同的 Places 或 ImageNet 预训练来训练两个独立的 RGB 和深度模式主干。然而，预训练的深度网络仍然受到基于 RGB 的模型的偏差，这可能会导致解决方案不理想。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于 RGB 和深度模态的单模型自监督混合预训练框架，称为 CoMAE。我们的 CoMAE 提出了一种课程学习策略，以统一两种流行的自监督表示学习算法：对比学习和掩模图像建模。具体来说，我们首先构建一个补丁级对齐任务，通过跨模态对比学习来预训练由两种模态共享的单个编码器。然后，将预先训练的对比编码器传递给多模态掩码自动编码器，以从生成角度捕获更精细的上下文特征。此外，我们的单模型设计不需要融合模块，非常灵活和鲁棒，可以在训练和测试阶段推广到单峰场景。在 SUN RGB-D 和 NYUDv2 数据集上进行的大量实验证明了我们的 CoMAE 对于 RGB 和深度表示学习的有效性。此外，我们的实验结果表明 CoMAE 是一种数据高效的表示学习器。尽管我们只使用小规模且未标记的训练集进行预训练，但我们的 CoMAE 预训练模型仍然比具有超大规模和监督 RGB 数据集预训练的最先进方法具有竞争力。代码将在 https://github.com/MCG-NJU/CoMAE 发布。 本文提出了一种名为CoMAE的单模型混合预训练框架，用于在小规模RGB-D数据集上统一学习RGB和深度模态的表示。 Jiange Yang,Sheng Guo,Gangshan Wu,Limin Wang cs.CV

title: Maximum Coverage in Sublinear Space, Faster
title_zh: 次线性空间最大覆盖，速度更快
abstract: Given a collection of $m$ sets from a universe $\mathcal{U}$, the Maximum Set Coverage problem consists of finding $k$ sets whose union has largest cardinality. This problem is NP-Hard, but the solution can be approximated by a polynomial time algorithm up to a factor $1-1/e$. However, this algorithm does not scale well with the input size. In a streaming context, practical high-quality solutions are found, but with space complexity that scales linearly with respect to the size of the universe $|\mathcal{U}|$. However, one randomized streaming algorithm has been shown to produce a $1-1/e-\varepsilon$ approximation of the optimal solution with a space complexity that scales only poly-logarithmically with respect to $m$ and $|\mathcal{U}|$. In order to achieve such a low space complexity, the authors used a technique called subsampling, based on independent-wise hash functions, and $F_0$-sketching. This article focuses on this sublinear-space algorithm and introduces methods to reduce the time cost of subsampling. Firstly, we give some optimizations that do not alter the space complexity, number of passes and approximation quality of the original algorithm. In particular, we reanalyze the error bounds to show that the original independence factor of $Ω(\varepsilon^{-2} k \log m)$ can be fine-tuned to $Ω(k \log m)$. Secondly we show that $F_0$-sketching can be replaced by a much more simple mechanism. Finally, our experimental results show that even a pairwise-independent hash-function sampler does not produce worse solution than the original algorithm, while running significantly faster by several orders of magnitude.

Secondly we show that $F_0$-sketching can be replaced by a much more simple mechanism. Finally, our experimental results show that even a pairwise-independent hash-function sampler does not produce worse solution than the original algorithm, while running significantly faster by several orders of magnitude.
abstract_zh: 给定来自宇宙$\mathcal{U}$的$m$个集合的集合，最大集合覆盖问题包括找到其并集具有最大基数的$k$个集合。该问题是 NP-Hard，但解决方案可以通过多项式时间算法近似到 $1-1/e$ 因子。然而，该算法不能很好地适应输入大小。在流媒体环境中，找到了实用的高质量解决方案，但空间复杂度相对于宇宙 $|\mathcal{U}|$ 的大小呈线性缩放。然而，一种随机流算法已被证明可以产生最佳解决方案的 $1-1/e-\varepsilon$ 近似值，其空间复杂度仅相对于 $m$ 和 $|\mathcal{U}|$ 呈多对数缩放。为了实现如此低的空间复杂度，作者使用了一种称为子采样的技术，该技术基于独立的哈希函数和 $F_0$ 草图。本文重点介绍这种次线性空间算法，并介绍减少子采样时间成本​​的方法。首先，我们给出了一些不改变原始算法的空间复杂度、遍数和近似质量的优化。特别是，我们重新分析误差界限，表明原始独立因子 $Ω(\varepsilon^{-2} k \log m)$ 可以微调为 $Ω(k \log m)$。其次，我们表明 $F_0$ 草图可以用更简单的机制代替。最后，我们的实验结果表明，即使是成对独立的哈希函数采样器也不会产生比原始算法更差的解决方案，同时运行速度明显快了几个数量级。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的子线性空间最大覆盖问题算法，通过优化子抽样过程和替换F0-sketching机制以提升效率。
AI.motivation: 现有流式算法解决最大覆盖问题时，空间复杂度与宇宙集大小线性相关，或需较高独立性因子导致计算开销大。
AI.method: 优化子抽样过程，调整误差界使独立性因子从Ω(ε⁻²k log m)降至Ω(k log m)，用简单机制替代F0-sketching，并验证成对独立哈希函数的可行性。
AI.result: 实验表明新方法在保持近似质量的同时，运行速度提升多个数量级，且成对独立哈希采样效果不劣于原算法。
AI.conclusion: 通过理论分析与实验验证，提出更高效低空间复杂度的流式最大覆盖问题解决方案，显著降低计算时间开销。

search_text: Maximum Coverage in Sublinear Space, Faster 次线性空间最大覆盖，速度更快 Given a collection of $m$ sets from a universe $\mathcal{U}$, the Maximum Set Coverage problem consists of finding $k$ sets whose union has largest cardinality. This problem is NP-Hard, but the solution can be approximated by a polynomial time algorithm up to a factor $1-1/e$. However, this algorithm does not scale well with the input size. In a streaming context, practical high-quality solutions are found, but with space complexity that scales linearly with respect to the size of the universe $|\mathcal{U}|$. However, one randomized streaming algorithm has been shown to produce a $1-1/e-\varepsilon$ approximation of the optimal solution with a space complexity that scales only poly-logarithmically with respect to $m$ and $|\mathcal{U}|$. In order to achieve such a low space complexity, the authors used a technique called subsampling, based on independent-wise hash functions, and $F_0$-sketching. This article focuses on this sublinear-space algorithm and introduces methods to reduce the time cost of subsampling. Firstly, we give some optimizations that do not alter the space complexity, number of passes and approximation quality of the original algorithm. In particular, we reanalyze the error bounds to show that the original independence factor of $Ω(\varepsilon^{-2} k \log m)$ can be fine-tuned to $Ω(k \log m)$. Secondly we show that $F_0$-sketching can be replaced by a much more simple mechanism. Finally, our experimental results show that even a pairwise-independent hash-function sampler does not produce worse solution than the original algorithm, while running significantly faster by several orders of magnitude. 给定来自宇宙$\mathcal{U}$的$m$个集合的集合，最大集合覆盖问题包括找到其并集具有最大基数的$k$个集合。该问题是 NP-Hard，但解决方案可以通过多项式时间算法近似到 $1-1/e$ 因子。然而，该算法不能很好地适应输入大小。在流媒体环境中，找到了实用的高质量解决方案，但空间复杂度相对于宇宙 $|\mathcal{U}|$ 的大小呈线性缩放。然而，一种随机流算法已被证明可以产生最佳解决方案的 $1-1/e-\varepsilon$ 近似值，其空间复杂度仅相对于 $m$ 和 $|\mathcal{U}|$ 呈多对数缩放。为了实现如此低的空间复杂度，作者使用了一种称为子采样的技术，该技术基于独立的哈希函数和 $F_0$ 草图。本文重点介绍这种次线性空间算法，并介绍减少子采样时间成本​​的方法。首先，我们给出了一些不改变原始算法的空间复杂度、遍数和近似质量的优化。特别是，我们重新分析误差界限，表明原始独立因子 $Ω(\varepsilon^{-2} k \log m)$ 可以微调为 $Ω(k \log m)$。其次，我们表明 $F_0$ 草图可以用更简单的机制代替。最后，我们的实验结果表明，即使是成对独立的哈希函数采样器也不会产生比原始算法更差的解决方案，同时运行速度明显快了几个数量级。 本文提出一种改进的子线性空间最大覆盖问题算法，通过优化子抽样过程和替换F0-sketching机制以提升效率。 Stephen Jaud,Anthony Wirth,Farhana Choudhury cs.DS

authors_text: Sourajit Saha,Shaswati Saha,Md Osman Gani,Tim Oates,David Chapman
title: RFC-Net: Learning High Resolution Global Features for Medical Image Segmentation on a Computational Budget
title_zh: RFC-Net：根据计算预算学习医学图像分割的高分辨率全局特征
comment: In Proceedings of AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence 2023
comments: In Proceedings of AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence 2023
abstract: Learning High-Resolution representations is essential for semantic segmentation. Convolutional neural network (CNN)architectures with downstream and upstream propagation flow are popular for segmentation in medical diagnosis. However, due to performing spatial downsampling and upsampling in multiple stages, information loss is inexorable. On the contrary, connecting layers densely on high spatial resolution is computationally expensive. In this work, we devise a Loose Dense Connection Strategy to connect neurons in subsequent layers with reduced parameters. On top of that, using a m-way Tree structure for feature propagation we propose Receptive Field Chain Network (RFC-Net) that learns high resolution global features on a compressed computational space. Our experiments demonstrates that RFC-Net achieves state-of-the-art performance on Kvasir and CVC-ClinicDB benchmarks for Polyp segmentation.
summary: Learning High-Resolution representations is essential for semantic segmentation. Convolutional neural network (CNN)architectures with downstream and upstream propagation flow are popular for segmentation in medical diagnosis. However, due to performing spatial downsampling and upsampling in multiple stages, information loss is inexorable. On the contrary, connecting layers densely on high spatial resolution is computationally expensive. In this work, we devise a Loose Dense Connection Strategy to connect neurons in subsequent layers with reduced parameters. On top of that, using a m-way Tree structure for feature propagation we propose Receptive Field Chain Network (RFC-Net) that learns high resolution global features on a compressed computational space. Our experiments demonstrates that RFC-Net achieves state-of-the-art performance on Kvasir and CVC-ClinicDB benchmarks for Polyp segmentation.
abstract_zh: 学习高分辨率表示对于语义分割至关重要。具有下游和上游传播流的卷积神经网络（CNN）架构在医学诊断中的分割中很受欢迎。然而，由于在多个阶段执行空间下采样和上采样，信息丢失是不可避免的。相反，在高空间分辨率上密集连接层的计算成本很高。在这项工作中，我们设计了一种松散密集连接策略，以减少参数的方式连接后续层中的神经元。最重要的是，使用 m 路树结构进行特征传播，我们提出了感受场链网络（RFC-Net），它在压缩计算空间上学习高分辨率全局特征。我们的实验表明，RFC-Net 在息肉分割的 Kvasir 和 CVC-ClinicDB 基准上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RFC-Net网络，在计算资源有限的情况下学习高分辨率全局特征，用于医学图像中的息肉分割任务。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN在医学图像分割中存在信息损失与计算成本的矛盾，需在保持高分辨率特征的同时降低计算消耗。
AI.method: 设计松散密集连接策略减少参数量，并采用m-way树结构构建特征传播路径，形成RFC-Net网络以压缩计算空间。
AI.result: RFC-Net在Kvasir和CVC-ClinicDB息肉分割基准测试中达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: RFC-Net通过创新网络结构有效平衡了计算效率与分割精度，为医疗图像分割提供新思路。

title: Deep Transfer Tensor Factorization for Multi-View Learning
title_zh: 用于多视图学习的深度传输张量分解
comment: International Conference on Data Mining 2022 Workshop MRL
comments: International Conference on Data Mining 2022 Workshop MRL
abstract: This paper studies the data sparsity problem in multi-view learning. To solve data sparsity problem in multiview ratings, we propose a generic architecture of deep transfer tensor factorization (DTTF) by integrating deep learning and cross-domain tensor factorization, where the side information is embedded to provide effective compensation for the tensor sparsity. Then we exhibit instantiation of our architecture by combining stacked denoising autoencoder (SDAE) and CANDECOMP/ PARAFAC (CP) tensor factorization in both source and target domains, where the side information of both users and items is tightly coupled with the sparse multi-view ratings and the latent factors are learned based on the joint optimization. We tightly couple the multi-view ratings and the side information to improve cross-domain tensor factorization based recommendations. Experimental results on real-world datasets demonstrate that our DTTF schemes outperform state-of-the-art methods on multi-view rating predictions.
summary: This paper studies the data sparsity problem in multi-view learning. To solve data sparsity problem in multiview ratings, we propose a generic architecture of deep transfer tensor factorization (DTTF) by integrating deep learning and cross-domain tensor factorization, where the side information is embedded to provide effective compensation for the tensor sparsity. Then we exhibit instantiation of our architecture by combining stacked denoising autoencoder (SDAE) and CANDECOMP/ PARAFAC (CP) tensor factorization in both source and target domains, where the side information of both users and items is tightly coupled with the sparse multi-view ratings and the latent factors are learned based on the joint optimization. We tightly couple the multi-view ratings and the side information to improve cross-domain tensor factorization based recommendations. Experimental results on real-world datasets demonstrate that our DTTF schemes outperform state-of-the-art methods on multi-view rating predictions.
abstract_zh: 本文研究多视图学习中的数据稀疏问题。为了解决多视图评分中的数据稀疏问题，我们通过集成深度学习和跨域张量分解，提出了一种通用的深度传输张量分解（DTTF）架构，其中嵌入辅助信息，为张量稀疏性提供有效补偿。然后，我们通过在源域和目标域中组合堆叠去噪自动编码器（SDAE）和 CANDECOMP/PARAFAC（CP）张量分解来展示我们的架构的实例化，其中用户和项目的辅助信息与稀疏多视图评分紧密耦合，并且基于联合优化来学习潜在因素。我们将多视图评级和辅助信息紧密结合起来，以改进基于跨域张量分解的推荐。真实世界数据集的实验结果表明，我们的 DTTF 方案在多视图评级预测方面优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种深度迁移张量分解方法（DTTF），用于解决多视角学习中的数据稀疏性问题，通过结合深度学习和跨域张量分解，利用侧信息提升多视角评分预测性能。
AI.motivation: 多视角学习中数据稀疏性问题限制了模型性能，现有方法难以有效利用侧信息进行跨域知识迁移，需结合深度学习与张量分解以提升预测准确性。
AI.method: 通过集成堆叠去噪自编码器（SDAE）与CP张量分解，构建跨域深度迁移张量分解框架，在联合优化中紧密耦合多视角评分数据与用户/物品侧信息，学习共享潜在因子。
AI.result: 在真实世界数据集上的实验表明，DTTF在多视角评分预测任务中显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: DTTF通过深度学习与张量分解的融合有效缓解了多视角数据稀疏性问题，跨域知识迁移与侧信息耦合机制显著提升了推荐系统的预测性能。

search_text: Deep Transfer Tensor Factorization for Multi-View Learning 用于多视图学习的深度传输张量分解 This paper studies the data sparsity problem in multi-view learning. To solve data sparsity problem in multiview ratings, we propose a generic architecture of deep transfer tensor factorization (DTTF) by integrating deep learning and cross-domain tensor factorization, where the side information is embedded to provide effective compensation for the tensor sparsity. Then we exhibit instantiation of our architecture by combining stacked denoising autoencoder (SDAE) and CANDECOMP/ PARAFAC (CP) tensor factorization in both source and target domains, where the side information of both users and items is tightly coupled with the sparse multi-view ratings and the latent factors are learned based on the joint optimization. We tightly couple the multi-view ratings and the side information to improve cross-domain tensor factorization based recommendations. Experimental results on real-world datasets demonstrate that our DTTF schemes outperform state-of-the-art methods on multi-view rating predictions. 本文研究多视图学习中的数据稀疏问题。为了解决多视图评分中的数据稀疏问题，我们通过集成深度学习和跨域张量分解，提出了一种通用的深度传输张量分解（DTTF）架构，其中嵌入辅助信息，为张量稀疏性提供有效补偿。然后，我们通过在源域和目标域中组合堆叠去噪自动编码器（SDAE）和 CANDECOMP/PARAFAC（CP）张量分解来展示我们的架构的实例化，其中用户和项目的辅助信息与稀疏多视图评分紧密耦合，并且基于联合优化来学习潜在因素。我们将多视图评级和辅助信息紧密结合起来，以改进基于跨域张量分解的推荐。真实世界数据集的实验结果表明，我们的 DTTF 方案在多视图评级预测方面优于最先进的方法。 本文提出了一种深度迁移张量分解方法（DTTF），用于解决多视角学习中的数据稀疏性问题，通过结合深度学习和跨域张量分解，利用侧信息提升多视角评分预测性能。 Penghao Jiang,Ke Xin,Chunxi Li cs.CV

title: Learning to Scale Temperature in Masked Self-Attention for Image Inpainting
title_zh: 学习在图像修复的蒙面自注意力中缩放温度
abstract: Recent advances in deep generative adversarial networks (GAN) and self-attention mechanism have led to significant improvements in the challenging task of inpainting large missing regions in an image. These methods integrate self-attention mechanism in neural networks to utilize surrounding neural elements based on their correlation and help the networks capture long-range dependencies. Temperature is a parameter in the Softmax function used in the self-attention, and it enables biasing the distribution of attention scores towards a handful of similar patches. Most existing self-attention mechanisms in image inpainting are convolution-based and set the temperature as a constant, performing patch matching in a limited feature space. In this work, we analyze the artifacts and training problems in previous self-attention mechanisms, and redesign the temperature learning network as well as the self-attention mechanism to address them. We present an image inpainting framework with a multi-head temperature masked self-attention mechanism, which provides stable and efficient temperature learning and uses multiple distant contextual information for high quality image inpainting. In addition to improving image quality of inpainting results, we generalize the proposed model to user-guided image editing by introducing a new sketch generation method. Extensive experiments on various datasets such as Paris StreetView, CelebA-HQ and Places2 clearly demonstrate that our method not only generates more natural inpainting results than previous works both in terms of perception image quality and quantitative metrics, but also enables to help users to generate more flexible results that are related to their sketch guidance.
summary: Recent advances in deep generative adversarial networks (GAN) and self-attention mechanism have led to significant improvements in the challenging task of inpainting large missing regions in an image. These methods integrate self-attention mechanism in neural networks to utilize surrounding neural elements based on their correlation and help the networks capture long-range dependencies. Temperature is a parameter in the Softmax function used in the self-attention, and it enables biasing the distribution of attention scores towards a handful of similar patches. Most existing self-attention mechanisms in image inpainting are convolution-based and set the temperature as a constant, performing patch matching in a limited feature space. In this work, we analyze the artifacts and training problems in previous self-attention mechanisms, and redesign the temperature learning network as well as the self-attention mechanism to address them. We present an image inpainting framework with a multi-head temperature masked self-attention mechanism, which provides stable and efficient temperature learning and uses multiple distant contextual information for high quality image inpainting. In addition to improving image quality of inpainting results, we generalize the proposed model to user-guided image editing by introducing a new sketch generation method. Extensive experiments on various datasets such as Paris StreetView, CelebA-HQ and Places2 clearly demonstrate that our method not only generates more natural inpainting results than previous works both in terms of perception image quality and quantitative metrics, but also enables to help users to generate more flexible results that are related to their sketch guidance.
abstract_zh: 深度生成对抗网络（GAN）和自注意力机制的最新进展使得修复图像中大面积缺失区域这一具有挑战性的任务取得了显着的进步。这些方法将自注意力机制集成到神经网络中，根据周围的神经元素的相关性来利用它们，并帮助网络捕获远程依赖性。温度是自注意力中使用的 Softmax 函数中的一个参数，它可以使注意力分数的分布偏向少数相似的补丁。图像修复中现有的大多数自注意力机制都是基于卷积的，并将温度设置为常数，在有限的特征空间中执行补丁匹配。在这项工作中，我们分析了先前自注意力机制中的伪影和训练问题，并重新设计了温度学习网络以及自注意力机制来解决这些问题。我们提出了一种具有多头温度掩蔽自注意力机制的图像修复框架，它提供稳定高效的温度学习，并使用多个远程上下文信息进行高质量的图像修复。除了提高修复结果的图像质量之外，我们还通过引入一种新的草图生成方法将所提出的模型推广到用户引导的图像编辑。在 Paris StreetView、CelebA-HQ 和 Places2 等各种数据集上进行的大量实验清楚地表明，我们的方法不仅在感知图像质量和定量指标方面比以前的作品生成更自然的修复结果，而且还能够帮助用户生成与其草图指导相关的更灵活的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多头温度掩码自注意力机制，通过学习温度参数改进图像修复效果，并引入新草图生成方法实现用户指导的图像编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有自注意力机制使用固定温度参数，限制了特征空间匹配能力，导致修复结果存在伪影和训练问题。
AI.method: 设计可学习温度参数的多头掩码自注意力机制，结合多距离上下文信息，并开发新型草图生成方法支持用户指导编辑。
AI.result: 在Paris StreetView、CelebA-HQ和Places2数据集上，修复结果在感知质量和定量指标均优于现有方法，且支持灵活的用户草图引导。
AI.conclusion: 动态温度学习机制有效提升了图像修复质量，扩展的草图生成方法增强了用户交互能力，验证了方法的先进性与实用性。

authors_text: Bum Jun Kim,Hyeyeon Choi,Hyeonah Jang,Donggeon Lee,Sang Woo Kim
title: How to Use Dropout Correctly on Residual Networks with Batch Normalization
title_zh: 如何在具有批量归一化的残差网络上正确使用 Dropout
abstract: For the stable optimization of deep neural networks, regularization methods such as dropout and batch normalization have been used in various tasks. Nevertheless, the correct position to apply dropout has rarely been discussed, and different positions have been employed depending on the practitioners. In this study, we investigate the correct position to apply dropout. We demonstrate that for a residual network with batch normalization, applying dropout at certain positions increases the performance, whereas applying dropout at other positions decreases the performance. Based on theoretical analysis, we provide the following guideline for the correct position to apply dropout: apply one dropout after the last batch normalization but before the last weight layer in the residual branch. We provide detailed theoretical explanations to support this claim and demonstrate them through module tests. In addition, we investigate the correct position of dropout in the head that produces the final prediction. Although the current consensus is to apply dropout after global average pooling, we prove that applying dropout before global average pooling leads to a more stable output. The proposed guidelines are validated through experiments using different datasets and models.
summary: For the stable optimization of deep neural networks, regularization methods such as dropout and batch normalization have been used in various tasks. Nevertheless, the correct position to apply dropout has rarely been discussed, and different positions have been employed depending on the practitioners. In this study, we investigate the correct position to apply dropout. We demonstrate that for a residual network with batch normalization, applying dropout at certain positions increases the performance, whereas applying dropout at other positions decreases the performance. Based on theoretical analysis, we provide the following guideline for the correct position to apply dropout: apply one dropout after the last batch normalization but before the last weight layer in the residual branch. We provide detailed theoretical explanations to support this claim and demonstrate them through module tests. In addition, we investigate the correct position of dropout in the head that produces the final prediction. Although the current consensus is to apply dropout after global average pooling, we prove that applying dropout before global average pooling leads to a more stable output. The proposed guidelines are validated through experiments using different datasets and models.
abstract_zh: 为了深度神经网络的稳定优化，诸如 dropout 和批量归一化之类的正则化方法已被用于各种任务中。然而，很少讨论应用退出的正确位置，并且根据从业者的不同而采用不同的位置。在本研究中，我们研究了应用 dropout 的正确位置。我们证明，对于具有批量归一化的残差网络，在某些位置应用 dropout 会提高性能，而在其他位置应用 dropout 会降低性能。基于理论分析，我们为应用 dropout 的正确位置提供以下指导：在最后一批归一化之后、残差分支中最后一个权重层之前应用一个 dropout。我们提供详细的理论解释来支持这一主张，并通过模块测试来证明它们。此外，我们还研究了产生最终预测的头部中 dropout 的正确位置。虽然目前的共识是在全局平均池化之后应用 dropout，但我们证明在全局平均池化之前应用 dropout 会带来更稳定的输出。所提出的指南通过使用不同数据集和模型的实验进行了验证。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在残差网络中结合批量归一化正确使用dropout的位置，以提升模型性能和稳定性。
AI.motivation: 尽管dropout和批量归一化常用于深度网络正则化，但其在残差网络中的具体应用位置缺乏明确指导，不同实践者采用不同策略。
AI.method: 通过理论分析和模块测试，确定在残差分支中最后一个批量归一化后、最终权重层前添加dropout；在预测头中，提出在全局平均池化前添加dropout以提高输出稳定性。
AI.result: 实验表明，按建议位置添加dropout可提升模型性能，且在多个数据集和模型上验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的dropout位置指南能有效提升残差网络性能，为相关实践提供理论支持和实证依据。

In addition, we investigate the correct position of dropout in the head that produces the final prediction. Although the current consensus is to apply dropout after global average pooling, we prove that applying dropout before global average pooling leads to a more stable output. The proposed guidelines are validated through experiments using different datasets and models. 为了深度神经网络的稳定优化，诸如 dropout 和批量归一化之类的正则化方法已被用于各种任务中。然而，很少讨论应用退出的正确位置，并且根据从业者的不同而采用不同的位置。在本研究中，我们研究了应用 dropout 的正确位置。我们证明，对于具有批量归一化的残差网络，在某些位置应用 dropout 会提高性能，而在其他位置应用 dropout 会降低性能。基于理论分析，我们为应用 dropout 的正确位置提供以下指导：在最后一批归一化之后、残差分支中最后一个权重层之前应用一个 dropout。我们提供详细的理论解释来支持这一主张，并通过模块测试来证明它们。此外，我们还研究了产生最终预测的头部中 dropout 的正确位置。虽然目前的共识是在全局平均池化之后应用 dropout，但我们证明在全局平均池化之前应用 dropout 会带来更稳定的输出。所提出的指南通过使用不同数据集和模型的实验进行了验证。 本文研究了在残差网络中结合批量归一化正确使用dropout的位置，以提升模型性能和稳定性。 Bum Jun Kim,Hyeyeon Choi,Hyeonah Jang,Donggeon Lee,Sang Woo Kim cs.LG,cs.CV

title: Can GPT-3 Perform Statutory Reasoning?
title_zh: GPT-3可以进行法定推理吗？
abstract: Statutory reasoning is the task of reasoning with facts and statutes, which are rules written in natural language by a legislature. It is a basic legal skill. In this paper we explore the capabilities of the most capable GPT-3 model, text-davinci-003, on an established statutory-reasoning dataset called SARA. We consider a variety of approaches, including dynamic few-shot prompting, chain-of-thought prompting, and zero-shot prompting. While we achieve results with GPT-3 that are better than the previous best published results, we also identify several types of clear errors it makes. We investigate why these errors happen. We discover that GPT-3 has imperfect prior knowledge of the actual U.S. statutes on which SARA is based. More importantly, we create simple synthetic statutes, which GPT-3 is guaranteed not to have seen during training. We find GPT-3 performs poorly at answering straightforward questions about these simple synthetic statutes.
summary: Statutory reasoning is the task of reasoning with facts and statutes, which are rules written in natural language by a legislature. It is a basic legal skill. In this paper we explore the capabilities of the most capable GPT-3 model, text-davinci-003, on an established statutory-reasoning dataset called SARA. We consider a variety of approaches, including dynamic few-shot prompting, chain-of-thought prompting, and zero-shot prompting. While we achieve results with GPT-3 that are better than the previous best published results, we also identify several types of clear errors it makes. We investigate why these errors happen. We discover that GPT-3 has imperfect prior knowledge of the actual U.S. statutes on which SARA is based. More importantly, we create simple synthetic statutes, which GPT-3 is guaranteed not to have seen during training. We find GPT-3 performs poorly at answering straightforward questions about these simple synthetic statutes.
abstract_zh: 法定推理是用事实和法规进行推理的任务，事实和法规是立法机关用自然语言编写的规则。这是一项基本的法律技能。在本文中，我们在已建立的法定推理数据集 SARA 上探索了最强大的 GPT-3 模型 text-davinci-003 的功能。我们考虑了多种方法，包括动态少样本提示、思维链提示和零样本提示。虽然我们使用 GPT-3 获得的结果优于之前发布的最佳结果，但我们也发现了它所犯的几种类型的明显错误。我们调查这些错误发生的原因。我们发现 GPT-3 对 SARA 所依据的实际美国法规的先验知识并不完善。更重要的是，我们创建了简单的综合法规，保证 GPT-3 在训练期间不会看到这些法规。我们发现 GPT-3 在回答有关这些简单综合法规的简单问题时表现不佳。

AI.tldr: 评估GPT-3在法定推理任务中的表现，使用SARA数据集进行测试。
AI.motivation: 探索当前最先进的语言模型（GPT-3）是否具备处理法律领域中的法定推理能力，这对法律科技和AI应用具有重要意义。
AI.method: 采用动态少样本提示、思维链提示和零样本提示等多种方法，在SARA数据集上测试GPT-3的法定推理能力，并设计合成法规验证模型泛化能力。
AI.result: GPT-3在SARA数据集上取得优于现有最佳结果的表现，但存在对实际法规理解不准确及处理合成法规时表现不佳的问题。
AI.conclusion: GPT-3的法定推理能力受限于其训练数据中的法律知识覆盖范围，对未接触过的法规逻辑推理能力较弱，需进一步优化模型训练方法。

authors_text: Yiwei Ma,Jiayi Ji,Xiaoshuai Sun,Yiyi Zhou,Rongrong Ji
title: Towards Local Visual Modeling for Image Captioning
title_zh: 迈向图像字幕的本地视觉建模
abstract: In this paper, we study the local visual modeling with grid features for image captioning, which is critical for generating accurate and detailed captions. To achieve this target, we propose a Locality-Sensitive Transformer Network (LSTNet) with two novel designs, namely Locality-Sensitive Attention (LSA) and Locality-Sensitive Fusion (LSF). LSA is deployed for the intra-layer interaction in Transformer via modeling the relationship between each grid and its neighbors. It reduces the difficulty of local object recognition during captioning. LSF is used for inter-layer information fusion, which aggregates the information of different encoder layers for cross-layer semantical complementarity. With these two novel designs, the proposed LSTNet can model the local visual information of grid features to improve the captioning quality. To validate LSTNet, we conduct extensive experiments on the competitive MS-COCO benchmark. The experimental results show that LSTNet is not only capable of local visual modeling, but also outperforms a bunch of state-of-the-art captioning models on offline and online testings, i.e., 134.8 CIDEr and 136.3 CIDEr, respectively. Besides, the generalization of LSTNet is also verified on the Flickr8k and Flickr30k datasets
summary: In this paper, we study the local visual modeling with grid features for image captioning, which is critical for generating accurate and detailed captions. To achieve this target, we propose a Locality-Sensitive Transformer Network (LSTNet) with two novel designs, namely Locality-Sensitive Attention (LSA) and Locality-Sensitive Fusion (LSF). LSA is deployed for the intra-layer interaction in Transformer via modeling the relationship between each grid and its neighbors. It reduces the difficulty of local object recognition during captioning. LSF is used for inter-layer information fusion, which aggregates the information of different encoder layers for cross-layer semantical complementarity. With these two novel designs, the proposed LSTNet can model the local visual information of grid features to improve the captioning quality. To validate LSTNet, we conduct extensive experiments on the competitive MS-COCO benchmark. The experimental results show that LSTNet is not only capable of local visual modeling, but also outperforms a bunch of state-of-the-art captioning models on offline and online testings, i.e., 134.8 CIDEr and 136.3 CIDEr, respectively. Besides, the generalization of LSTNet is also verified on the Flickr8k and Flickr30k datasets
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了用于图像字幕的具有网格特征的局部视觉建模，这对于生成准确和详细的字幕至关重要。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种具有两种新颖设计的局部敏感变压器网络（LSTNet），即局部敏感注意力（LSA）和局部敏感融合（LSF）。 LSA 通过对每个网格与其邻居之间的关系进行建模来部署 Transformer 中的层内交互。它降低了字幕过程中局部物体识别的难度。 LSF用于层间信息融合，聚合不同编码器层的信息以实现跨层语义互补。通过这两种新颖的设计，所提出的 LSTNet 可以对网格特征的局部视觉信息进行建模，以提高字幕质量。为了验证 LSTNet，我们在竞争性的 MS-COCO 基准上进行了广泛的实验。实验结果表明，LSTNet 不仅能够进行本地视觉建模，而且在离线和在线测试中都优于一系列最先进的字幕模型，即分别为 134.8 CIDEr 和 136.3 CIDEr。此外，LSTNet的泛化性也在Flickr8k和Flickr30k数据集上得到了验证

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于网格特征的局部视觉建模在图像字幕生成中的应用，提出了一种名为LSTNet的模型以提升字幕准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在捕捉局部视觉信息时存在不足，导致生成的字幕缺乏细节和准确性，需改进局部视觉建模以提升效果。
AI.method: 提出Locality-Sensitive Transformer Network（LSTNet），包含局部敏感注意力（LSA）和局部敏感融合（LSF）模块，分别用于建模网格特征的局部关系及跨层信息互补。
AI.result: 在MS-COCO数据集上离线和在线测试CIDEr指标分别达到134.8和136.3，优于现有先进模型，并在Flickr8k和Flickr30k数据集上验证了泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: LSTNet通过局部视觉建模有效提升了图像字幕质量，实验结果验证了其优越性和广泛适用性。

To achieve this target, we propose a Locality-Sensitive Transformer Network (LSTNet) with two novel designs, namely Locality-Sensitive Attention (LSA) and Locality-Sensitive Fusion (LSF). LSA is deployed for the intra-layer interaction in Transformer via modeling the relationship between each grid and its neighbors. It reduces the difficulty of local object recognition during captioning. LSF is used for inter-layer information fusion, which aggregates the information of different encoder layers for cross-layer semantical complementarity. With these two novel designs, the proposed LSTNet can model the local visual information of grid features to improve the captioning quality. title: Dual-layer Image Compression via Adaptive Downsampling and Spatially Varying Upconversion
title_zh: 通过自适应下采样和空间变化上转换的双层图像压缩
abstract: Ultra high resolution (UHR) images are almost always downsampled to fit small displays of mobile end devices and upsampled to its original resolution when exhibited on very high-resolution displays. This observation motivates us on jointly optimizing operation pairs of downsampling and upsampling that are spatially adaptive to image contents for maximal rate-distortion performance. In this paper, we propose an adaptive downsampled dual-layer (ADDL) image compression system. In the ADDL compression system, an image is reduced in resolution by learned content-adaptive downsampling kernels and compressed to form a coded base layer. For decompression the base layer is decoded and upconverted to the original resolution using a deep upsampling neural network, aided by the prior knowledge of the learned adaptive downsampling kernels. We restrict the downsampling kernels to the form of Gabor filters in order to reduce the complexity of filter optimization and also reduce the amount of side information needed by the decoder for adaptive upsampling. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed ADDL compression approach of jointly optimized, spatially adaptive downsampling and upconversion outperforms the state of the art image compression methods.
summary: Ultra high resolution (UHR) images are almost always downsampled to fit small displays of mobile end devices and upsampled to its original resolution when exhibited on very high-resolution displays. This observation motivates us on jointly optimizing operation pairs of downsampling and upsampling that are spatially adaptive to image contents for maximal rate-distortion performance. In this paper, we propose an adaptive downsampled dual-layer (ADDL) image compression system. In the ADDL compression system, an image is reduced in resolution by learned content-adaptive downsampling kernels and compressed to form a coded base layer. For decompression the base layer is decoded and upconverted to the original resolution using a deep upsampling neural network, aided by the prior knowledge of the learned adaptive downsampling kernels. We restrict the downsampling kernels to the form of Gabor filters in order to reduce the complexity of filter optimization and also reduce the amount of side information needed by the decoder for adaptive upsampling. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed ADDL compression approach of jointly optimized, spatially adaptive downsampling and upconversion outperforms the state of the art image compression methods.
abstract_zh: 超高分辨率 (UHR) 图像几乎总是会被下采样以适应移动终端设备的小型显示器，并在极高分辨率显示器上展示时上采样到其原始分辨率。这一观察激励我们联合优化下采样和上采样操作对，这些操作对在空间上自适应图像内容，以获得最大率失真性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种自适应下采样双层（ADDL）图像压缩系统。在 ADDL 压缩系统中，通过学习的内容自适应下采样内核降低图像的分辨率，并压缩以形成编码基础层。为了解压缩，在学习的自适应下采样内核的先验知识的帮助下，使用深度上采样神经网络对基础层进行解码并上转换为原始分辨率。我们将下采样内核限制为 Gabor 滤波器的形式，以降低滤波器优化的复杂性，并减少解码器自适应上采样所需的辅助信息量。大量实验表明，所提出的联合优化、空间自适应下采样和上转换的 ADDL 压缩方法优于最先进的图像压缩方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过自适应下采样和空间可变上转换的双层图像压缩系统。
AI.motivation: 超高分辨率图像通常需要在移动设备的小屏幕上进行下采样，并在高分辨率屏幕上进行上采样。因此，需要联合优化下采样和上采样操作以实现最佳的率失真性能。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种自适应下采样的双层（ADDL）图像压缩系统，通过学习内容自适应的下采样核进行压缩，并使用深度上采样神经网络进行解压缩。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提出的ADDL压缩方法在联合优化和空间自适应下采样和上转换方面优于现有的图像压缩方法。
AI.conclusion: ADDL方法通过自适应下采样和上采样操作，实现了优于现有方法的图像压缩性能。

search_text: Dual-layer Image Compression via Adaptive Downsampling and Spatially Varying Upconversion 通过自适应下采样和空间变化上转换的双层图像压缩 Ultra high resolution (UHR) images are almost always downsampled to fit small displays of mobile end devices and upsampled to its original resolution when exhibited on very high-resolution displays. This observation motivates us on jointly optimizing operation pairs of downsampling and upsampling that are spatially adaptive to image contents for maximal rate-distortion performance. In this paper, we propose an adaptive downsampled dual-layer (ADDL) image compression system. In the ADDL compression system, an image is reduced in resolution by learned content-adaptive downsampling kernels and compressed to form a coded base layer. For decompression the base layer is decoded and upconverted to the original resolution using a deep upsampling neural network, aided by the prior knowledge of the learned adaptive downsampling kernels. We restrict the downsampling kernels to the form of Gabor filters in order to reduce the complexity of filter optimization and also reduce the amount of side information needed by the decoder for adaptive upsampling. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed ADDL compression approach of jointly optimized, spatially adaptive downsampling and upconversion outperforms the state of the art image compression methods. 超高分辨率 (UHR) 图像几乎总是会被下采样以适应移动终端设备的小型显示器，并在极高分辨率显示器上展示时上采样到其原始分辨率。这一观察激励我们联合优化下采样和上采样操作对，这些操作对在空间上自适应图像内容，以获得最大率失真性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种自适应下采样双层（ADDL）图像压缩系统。在 ADDL 压缩系统中，通过学习的内容自适应下采样内核降低图像的分辨率，并压缩以形成编码基础层。为了解压缩，在学习的自适应下采样内核的先验知识的帮助下，使用深度上采样神经网络对基础层进行解码并上转换为原始分辨率。我们将下采样内核限制为 Gabor 滤波器的形式，以降低滤波器优化的复杂性，并减少解码器自适应上采样所需的辅助信息量。大量实验表明，所提出的联合优化、空间自适应下采样和上转换的 ADDL 压缩方法优于最先进的图像压缩方法。 本文提出了一种通过自适应下采样和空间可变上转换的双层图像压缩系统。 Xi Zhang,Xiaolin Wu eess.IV,cs.CV

title: Learning-Based Defect Recognitions for Autonomous UAV Inspections
title_zh: 用于自主无人机检查的基于学习的缺陷识别
abstract: Automatic crack detection and segmentation play a significant role in the whole system of unmanned aerial vehicle inspections. In this paper, we have implemented a deep learning framework for crack detection based on classical network architectures including Alexnet, VGG, and Resnet. Moreover, inspired by the feature pyramid network architecture, a hierarchical convolutional neural network (CNN) deep learning framework which is efficient in crack segmentation is also proposed, and its performance of it is compared with other state-of-the-art network architecture. We have summarized the existing crack detection and segmentation datasets and established the largest existing benchmark dataset on the internet for crack detection and segmentation, which is open-sourced for the research community. Our feature pyramid crack segmentation network is tested on the benchmark dataset and gives satisfactory segmentation results. A framework for automatic unmanned aerial vehicle inspections is also proposed and will be established for the crack inspection tasks of various concrete structures. All our self-established datasets and codes are open-sourced at: https://github.com/KangchengLiu/Crack-Detection-and-Segmentation-Dataset-for-UAV-Inspection
summary: Automatic crack detection and segmentation play a significant role in the whole system of unmanned aerial vehicle inspections. In this paper, we have implemented a deep learning framework for crack detection based on classical network architectures including Alexnet, VGG, and Resnet. Moreover, inspired by the feature pyramid network architecture, a hierarchical convolutional neural network (CNN) deep learning framework which is efficient in crack segmentation is also proposed, and its performance of it is compared with other state-of-the-art network architecture. We have summarized the existing crack detection and segmentation datasets and established the largest existing benchmark dataset on the internet for crack detection and segmentation, which is open-sourced for the research community. Our feature pyramid crack segmentation network is tested on the benchmark dataset and gives satisfactory segmentation results. A framework for automatic unmanned aerial vehicle inspections is also proposed and will be established for the crack inspection tasks of various concrete structures. All our self-established datasets and codes are open-sourced at: https://github.com/KangchengLiu/Crack-Detection-and-Segmentation-Dataset-for-UAV-Inspection
abstract_zh: 自动裂纹检测和分割在整个无人机检测系统中发挥着重要作用。在本文中，我们基于 Alexnet、VGG 和 Resnet 等经典网络架构实现了用于裂纹检测的深度学习框架。此外，受特征金字塔网络架构的启发，还提出了一种高效裂缝分割的分层卷积神经网络（CNN）深度学习框架，并将其性能与其他最先进的网络架构进行了比较。我们总结了现有的裂纹检测和分割数据集，并建立了互联网上现有最大的裂纹检测和分割基准数据集，并向研究社区开源。我们的特征金字塔裂纹分割网络在基准数据集上进行了测试，并给出了令人满意的分割结果。还提出了自动无人机检查框架，并将建立用于各种混凝土结构的裂缝检查任务。我们所有自建的数据集和代码均开源于：https://github.com/Kang ChengLiu/Crack-Detection-and-Segmentation-Dataset-for-UAV-Inspection

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于深度学习的无人机自动检测框架，用于混凝土结构裂缝的识别与分割，并构建了公开数据集。
AI.motivation: 无人机巡检中自动裂缝检测对结构安全至关重要，但现有方法在效率和精度上存在不足，需改进模型并建立统一基准数据集。
AI.method: 采用AlexNet、VGG、ResNet等经典网络架构，设计受特征金字塔启发的分层CNN框架，并构建包含多种混凝土裂缝的开源基准数据集。
AI.result: 提出的分层CNN在基准数据集上实现满意分割效果，且框架可扩展至不同混凝土结构的裂缝检测任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为无人机裂缝检测提供高效解决方案，公开数据集和代码推动了相关研究的发展。

authors_text: Lin Yao,Ruihan Xu,Zhifeng Gao,Guolin Ke,Yuhang Wang
title: Boosted ab initio Cryo-EM 3D Reconstruction with ACE-EM
title_zh: 使用 ACE-EM 增强从头开始冷冻电镜 3D 重建
abstract: The central problem in cryo-electron microscopy (cryo-EM) is to recover the 3D structure from noisy 2D projection images which requires estimating the missing projection angles (poses). Recent methods attempted to solve the 3D reconstruction problem with the autoencoder architecture, which suffers from the latent vector space sampling problem and frequently produces suboptimal pose inferences and inferior 3D reconstructions. Here we present an improved autoencoder architecture called ACE (Asymmetric Complementary autoEncoder), based on which we designed the ACE-EM method for cryo-EM 3D reconstructions. Compared to previous methods, ACE-EM reached higher pose space coverage within the same training time and boosted the reconstruction performance regardless of the choice of decoders. With this method, the Nyquist resolution (highest possible resolution) was reached for 3D reconstructions of both simulated and experimental cryo-EM datasets. Furthermore, ACE-EM is the only amortized inference method that reached the Nyquist resolution.
summary: The central problem in cryo-electron microscopy (cryo-EM) is to recover the 3D structure from noisy 2D projection images which requires estimating the missing projection angles (poses). Recent methods attempted to solve the 3D reconstruction problem with the autoencoder architecture, which suffers from the latent vector space sampling problem and frequently produces suboptimal pose inferences and inferior 3D reconstructions. Here we present an improved autoencoder architecture called ACE (Asymmetric Complementary autoEncoder), based on which we designed the ACE-EM method for cryo-EM 3D reconstructions. Compared to previous methods, ACE-EM reached higher pose space coverage within the same training time and boosted the reconstruction performance regardless of the choice of decoders. With this method, the Nyquist resolution (highest possible resolution) was reached for 3D reconstructions of both simulated and experimental cryo-EM datasets. Furthermore, ACE-EM is the only amortized inference method that reached the Nyquist resolution.
abstract_zh: 冷冻电子显微镜 (cryo-EM) 的核心问题是从嘈杂的 2D 投影图像中恢复 3D 结构，这需要估计缺失的投影角度（位姿）。最近的方法尝试使用自动编码器架构解决 3D 重建问题，该架构存在潜在向量空间采样问题，并且经常产生次优的姿态推断和较差的 3D 重建。在这里，我们提出了一种称为 ACE（非对称互补自动编码器）的改进自动编码器架构，基于该架构，我们设计了用于冷冻电镜 3D 重建的 ACE-EM 方法。与之前的方法相比，ACE-EM 在相同的训练时间内达到了更高的姿态空间覆盖范围，并且无论解码器的选择如何，都提高了重建性能。通过这种方法，模拟和实验冷冻电镜数据集的 3D 重建都达到了奈奎斯特分辨率（尽可能高的分辨率）。此外，ACE-EM 是唯一达到奈奎斯特分辨率的摊销推理方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ACE-EM方法，通过改进自编码器架构解决冷冻电镜三维重构中的姿态估计问题。
AI.motivation: 现有自编码器方法存在潜在向量空间采样问题，导致姿态推断不准确和三维重构质量低下。
AI.method: 设计不对称互补自编码器（ACE）架构，开发ACE-EM方法提升姿态空间覆盖范围与重构性能。
AI.result: ACE-EM在相同训练时间内实现更高姿态覆盖，达到奈奎斯特分辨率，且为唯一实现该目标的免训练推断方法。
AI.conclusion: ACE-EM显著提升冷冻电镜三维重构精度，为相关领域研究提供新方法基础。

search_text: Boosted ab initio Cryo-EM 3D Reconstruction with ACE-EM 使用 ACE-EM 增强从头开始冷冻电镜 3D 重建 The central problem in cryo-electron microscopy (cryo-EM) is to recover the 3D structure from noisy 2D projection images which requires estimating the missing projection angles (poses). Recent methods attempted to solve the 3D reconstruction problem with the autoencoder architecture, which suffers from the latent vector space sampling problem and frequently produces suboptimal pose inferences and inferior 3D reconstructions. Here we present an improved autoencoder architecture called ACE (Asymmetric Complementary autoEncoder), based on which we designed the ACE-EM method for cryo-EM 3D reconstructions. Compared to previous methods, ACE-EM reached higher pose space coverage within the same training time and boosted the reconstruction performance regardless of the choice of decoders. With this method, the Nyquist resolution (highest possible resolution) was reached for 3D reconstructions of both simulated and experimental cryo-EM datasets. Furthermore, ACE-EM is the only amortized inference method that reached the Nyquist resolution. 冷冻电子显微镜 (cryo-EM) 的核心问题是从嘈杂的 2D 投影图像中恢复 3D 结构，这需要估计缺失的投影角度（位姿）。最近的方法尝试使用自动编码器架构解决 3D 重建问题，该架构存在潜在向量空间采样问题，并且经常产生次优的姿态推断和较差的 3D 重建。在这里，我们提出了一种称为 ACE（非对称互补自动编码器）的改进自动编码器架构，基于该架构，我们设计了用于冷冻电镜 3D 重建的 ACE-EM 方法。与之前的方法相比，ACE-EM 在相同的训练时间内达到了更高的姿态空间覆盖范围，并且无论解码器的选择如何，都提高了重建性能。通过这种方法，模拟和实验冷冻电镜数据集的 3D 重建都达到了奈奎斯特分辨率（尽可能高的分辨率）。此外，ACE-EM 是唯一达到奈奎斯特分辨率的摊销推理方法。 本文提出ACE-EM方法，通过改进自编码器架构解决冷冻电镜三维重构中的姿态估计问题。 Lin Yao,Ruihan Xu,Zhifeng Gao,Guolin Ke,Yuhang Wang cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,q-bio.BM,q-bio.QM

authors_text: Fei Kong,Xiyue Wang,Jinxi Xiang,Sen Yang,Xinran Wang,Meng Yue,Jun Zhang,Junhan Zhao,Xiao Han,Yuhan Dong,Biyue Zhu,Fang Wang,Yueping Liu
title: Federated attention consistent learning models for prostate cancer diagnosis and Gleason grading
title_zh: 用于前列腺癌诊断和格里森分级的联合注意力一致学习模型
abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) holds significant promise in transforming medical imaging, enhancing diagnostics, and refining treatment strategies. However, the reliance on extensive multicenter datasets for training AI models poses challenges due to privacy concerns. Federated learning provides a solution by facilitating collaborative model training across multiple centers without sharing raw data. This study introduces a federated attention-consistent learning (FACL) framework to address challenges associated with large-scale pathological images and data heterogeneity. FACL enhances model generalization by maximizing attention consistency between local clients and the server model. To ensure privacy and validate robustness, we incorporated differential privacy by introducing noise during parameter transfer. We assessed the effectiveness of FACL in cancer diagnosis and Gleason grading tasks using 19,461 whole-slide images of prostate cancer from multiple centers. In the diagnosis task, FACL achieved an area under the curve (AUC) of 0.9718, outperforming seven centers with an average AUC of 0.9499 when categories are relatively balanced. For the Gleason grading task, FACL attained a Kappa score of 0.8463, surpassing the average Kappa score of 0.7379 from six centers. In conclusion, FACL offers a robust, accurate, and cost-effective AI training model for prostate cancer pathology while maintaining effective data safeguards.
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) holds significant promise in transforming medical imaging, enhancing diagnostics, and refining treatment strategies. However, the reliance on extensive multicenter datasets for training AI models poses challenges due to privacy concerns. Federated learning provides a solution by facilitating collaborative model training across multiple centers without sharing raw data. This study introduces a federated attention-consistent learning (FACL) framework to address challenges associated with large-scale pathological images and data heterogeneity. FACL enhances model generalization by maximizing attention consistency between local clients and the server model. To ensure privacy and validate robustness, we incorporated differential privacy by introducing noise during parameter transfer. We assessed the effectiveness of FACL in cancer diagnosis and Gleason grading tasks using 19,461 whole-slide images of prostate cancer from multiple centers. In the diagnosis task, FACL achieved an area under the curve (AUC) of 0.9718, outperforming seven centers with an average AUC of 0.9499 when categories are relatively balanced. For the Gleason grading task, FACL attained a Kappa score of 0.8463, surpassing the average Kappa score of 0.7379 from six centers. In conclusion, FACL offers a robust, accurate, and cost-effective AI training model for prostate cancer pathology while maintaining effective data safeguards.
abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 在转变医学成像、增强诊断和完善治疗策略方面具有重大前景。然而，由于隐私问题，依赖广泛的多中心数据集来训练人工智能模型带来了挑战。联邦学习提供了一种解决方案，可以促进跨多个中心的协作模型训练，而无需共享原始数据。本研究引入了联合注意力一致性学习（FACL）框架来解决与大规模病理图像和数据异质性相关的挑战。 FACL 通过最大化本地客户端和服务器模型之间的注意力一致性来增强模型泛化。为了确保隐私并验证鲁棒性，我们通过在参数传输过程中引入噪声来合并差分隐私。我们使用来自多个中心的 19,461 张前列腺癌全切片图像评估了 FACL 在癌症诊断和格里森分级任务中的有效性。在诊断任务中，FACL 的曲线下面积 (AUC) 为 0.9718，优于类别相对平衡时平均 AUC 0.9499 的七个中心。在格里森评分任务中，FACL 的 Kappa 得分为 0.8463，超过了六个中心的平均 Kappa 得分 0.7379。总之，FACL 为前列腺癌病理学提供了强大、准确且经济高效的 AI 训练模型，同时保持有效的数据保障。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种联邦注意力一致学习框架（FACL），用于前列腺癌诊断和Gleason分级，解决大规模病理图像和数据异质性问题，同时保护隐私。
AI.motivation: 传统AI模型训练依赖多中心数据集，但面临隐私风险和数据异质性挑战，需在不共享原始数据的前提下实现跨机构协作。
AI.method: 设计联邦注意力一致学习框架（FACL），通过最大化本地客户端与服务器模型的注意力一致性提升泛化能力，并引入差分隐私技术在参数传输中添加噪声以保障隐私。
AI.result: 在19,461张前列腺癌全切片图像上，FACL诊断任务AUC达0.9718（优于多中心平均0.9499），Gleason分级任务Kappa值为0.8463（优于多中心平均0.7379）。
AI.conclusion: FACL提供了一种隐私保护、准确且高效的AI训练方法，适用于前列腺癌病理分析，有效解决了数据异质性和隐私安全问题。

authors_text: Sivakanth Gopi,Yin Tat Lee,Daogao Liu,Ruoqi Shen,Kevin Tian
title: Algorithmic Aspects of the Log-Laplace Transform and a Non-Euclidean Proximal Sampler
title_zh: 对数拉普拉斯变换和非欧几里得近端采样器的算法方面
comment: Fixed error in previous version, main result weakened by a quadratic factor (see discussion in Section 1.4)
comments: Fixed error in previous version, main result weakened by a quadratic factor (see discussion in Section 1.4)
abstract: The development of efficient sampling algorithms catering to non-Euclidean geometries has been a challenging endeavor, as discretization techniques which succeed in the Euclidean setting do not readily carry over to more general settings. We develop a non-Euclidean analog of the recent proximal sampler of [LST21], which naturally induces regularization by an object known as the log-Laplace transform (LLT) of a density. We prove new mathematical properties (with an algorithmic flavor) of the LLT, such as strong convexity-smoothness duality and an isoperimetric inequality, which are used to prove a mixing time on our proximal sampler matching [LST21] under a warm start. As our main application, we show our warm-started sampler improves the value oracle complexity of differentially private convex optimization in $\ell_p$ and Schatten-$p$ norms for $p \in [1, 2]$ to match the Euclidean setting [GLL22], while retaining state-of-the-art excess risk bounds [GLLST23]. We find our investigation of the LLT to be a promising proof-of-concept of its utility as a tool for designing samplers, and outline directions for future exploration.
summary: The development of efficient sampling algorithms catering to non-Euclidean geometries has been a challenging endeavor, as discretization techniques which succeed in the Euclidean setting do not readily carry over to more general settings. We develop a non-Euclidean analog of the recent proximal sampler of [LST21], which naturally induces regularization by an object known as the log-Laplace transform (LLT) of a density. We prove new mathematical properties (with an algorithmic flavor) of the LLT, such as strong convexity-smoothness duality and an isoperimetric inequality, which are used to prove a mixing time on our proximal sampler matching [LST21] under a warm start. As our main application, we show our warm-started sampler improves the value oracle complexity of differentially private convex optimization in $\ell_p$ and Schatten-$p$ norms for $p \in [1, 2]$ to match the Euclidean setting [GLL22], while retaining state-of-the-art excess risk bounds [GLLST23]. We find our investigation of the LLT to be a promising proof-of-concept of its utility as a tool for designing samplers, and outline directions for future exploration.
abstract_zh: 开发适合非欧几里德几何的高效采样算法一直是一项具有挑战性的工作，因为在欧几里德设置中成功的离散化技术不容易转移到更一般的设置中。我们开发了最近的 [LST21] 近端采样器的非欧几里得模拟，它自然地通过称为密度的对数拉普拉斯变换 (LLT) 的对象来诱导正则化。我们证明了 LLT 的新数学属性（具有算法风格），例如强凸平滑对偶性和等周不等式，这些属性用于证明热启动下我们的近端采样器匹配 [LST21] 的混合时间。作为我们的主要应用，我们展示了我们的热启动采样器提高了 $\ell_p$ 和 Schatten-$p$ 规范中 $p \in [1, 2]$ 的差分私有凸优化的价值预言复杂性，以匹配欧几里得设置 [GLL22]，同时保留最先进的超额风险界限 [GLLST23]。我们发现我们对 LLT 的研究是其作为设计采样器工具的实用性的一个有前景的概念验证，并概述了未来探索的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一种非欧几里得几何下的近端采样器，利用对数拉普拉斯变换（LLT）的数学性质，改进了非欧几里得空间中的采样算法效率。
AI.motivation: 非欧几里得几何中的高效采样算法开发面临挑战，传统欧几里得空间的离散化技术难以直接应用，需探索新方法以提升采样效率并保持理论保证。
AI.method: 提出非欧几里得近端采样器的LLT正则化框架，证明其强凸性-平滑性对偶性及等周不等式，结合暖启动策略分析混合时间，并应用于差分隐私凸优化问题。
AI.result: 在暖启动条件下，采样器混合时间与欧几里得设置匹配，且将ℓ_p和Schatten-p范数下的差分隐私优化值预言机复杂度提升至欧几里得水平，同时保持最优风险界。
AI.conclusion: LLT作为设计采样器的工具展现出潜力，未来可进一步探索其在更广泛非欧几里得结构中的应用。
