As our main application, we show our warm-started sampler improves the value oracle complexity of differentially private convex optimization in $\ell_p$ and Schatten-$p$ norms for $p \in [1, 2]$ to match the Euclidean setting [GLL22], while retaining state-of-the-art excess risk bounds [GLLST23]. We find our investigation of the LLT to be a promising proof-of-concept of its utility as a tool for designing samplers, and outline directions for future exploration. 开发适合非欧几里德几何的高效采样算法一直是一项具有挑战性的工作，因为在欧几里德设置中成功的离散化技术不容易转移到更一般的设置中。我们开发了最近的 [LST21] 近端采样器的非欧几里得模拟，它自然地通过称为密度的对数拉普拉斯变换 (LLT) 的对象来诱导正则化。我们证明了 LLT 的新数学属性（具有算法风格），例如强凸平滑对偶性和等周不等式，这些属性用于证明热启动下我们的近端采样器匹配 [LST21] 的混合时间。作为我们的主要应用，我们展示了我们的热启动采样器提高了 $\ell_p$ 和 Schatten-$p$ 规范中 $p \in [1, 2]$ 的差分私有凸优化的价值预言复杂性，以匹配欧几里得设置 [GLL22]，同时保留最先进的超额风险界限 [GLLST23]。我们发现我们对 LLT 的研究是其作为设计采样器工具的实用性的一个有前景的概念验证，并概述了未来探索的方向。 本文开发了一种非欧几里得几何下的近端采样器，利用对数拉普拉斯变换（LLT）的数学性质，改进了非欧几里得空间中的采样算法效率。 Sivakanth Gopi,Yin Tat Lee,Daogao Liu,Ruoqi Shen,Kevin Tian cs.DS,cs.CR,cs.LG,math.PR,stat.CO

authors_text: Samuel Allen Alexander,David Quarel,Len Du,Marcus Hutter
title: Universal Agent Mixtures and the Geometry of Intelligence
title_zh: 通用代理混合物和智能几何
abstract: Inspired by recent progress in multi-agent Reinforcement Learning (RL), in this work we examine the collective intelligent behaviour of theoretical universal agents by introducing a weighted mixture operation. Given a weighted set of agents, their weighted mixture is a new agent whose expected total reward in any environment is the corresponding weighted average of the original agents' expected total rewards in that environment. Thus, if RL agent intelligence is quantified in terms of performance across environments, the weighted mixture's intelligence is the weighted average of the original agents' intelligences. This operation enables various interesting new theorems that shed light on the geometry of RL agent intelligence, namely: results about symmetries, convex agent-sets, and local extrema. We also show that any RL agent intelligence measure based on average performance across environments, subject to certain weak technical conditions, is identical (up to a constant factor) to performance within a single environment dependent on said intelligence measure.
summary: Inspired by recent progress in multi-agent Reinforcement Learning (RL), in this work we examine the collective intelligent behaviour of theoretical universal agents by introducing a weighted mixture operation. Given a weighted set of agents, their weighted mixture is a new agent whose expected total reward in any environment is the corresponding weighted average of the original agents' expected total rewards in that environment. Thus, if RL agent intelligence is quantified in terms of performance across environments, the weighted mixture's intelligence is the weighted average of the original agents' intelligences. This operation enables various interesting new theorems that shed light on the geometry of RL agent intelligence, namely: results about symmetries, convex agent-sets, and local extrema. We also show that any RL agent intelligence measure based on average performance across environments, subject to certain weak technical conditions, is identical (up to a constant factor) to performance within a single environment dependent on said intelligence measure.
abstract_zh: 受多智能体强化学习（RL）最新进展的启发，在这项工作中，我们通过引入加权混合运算来研究理论通用智能体的集体智能行为。给定一组加权智能体，它们的加权混合物是一个新智能体，其在任何环境中的预期总奖励是原始智能体在该环境中的预期总奖励的相应加权平均值。因此，如果 RL 智能体的智能根据跨环境的性能进行量化，则加权混合物的智能就是原始智能体智能的加权平均值。此操作可实现各种有趣的新定理，这些定理揭示了 RL 智能体智能的几何结构，即：有关对称性、凸智能体集和局部极值的结果。我们还表明，任何基于跨环境平均性能的 RL 代理智能测量，在某些较弱的技术条件下，与依赖于所述智能测量的单个环境中的性能相同（最多一个常数因子）。

AI.tldr: 本文引入加权混合操作研究理论通用智能体的集体智能行为，探讨强化学习智能体智能的几何特性。
AI.motivation: 受多智能体强化学习进展启发，旨在通过数学方法量化并分析智能体在不同环境中的集体智能行为及性能度量关系。
AI.method: 定义加权混合操作，将多个智能体按权重组合为新智能体，并通过环境奖励的加权平均分析其几何性质。
AI.result: 证明了智能体集合的对称性、凸性及局部极值特性，并揭示基于环境平均性能的智能度量与单环境性能的等价性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为理解智能体智能的几何结构提供了新视角，同时建立了跨环境性能度量的理论联系。

title: Correspondence-Free Domain Alignment for Unsupervised Cross-Domain Image Retrieval
title_zh: 用于无监督跨域图像检索的无对应域对齐
abstract: Cross-domain image retrieval aims at retrieving images across different domains to excavate cross-domain classificatory or correspondence relationships. This paper studies a less-touched problem of cross-domain image retrieval, i.e., unsupervised cross-domain image retrieval, considering the following practical assumptions: (i) no correspondence relationship, and (ii) no category annotations. It is challenging to align and bridge distinct domains without cross-domain correspondence. To tackle the challenge, we present a novel Correspondence-free Domain Alignment (CoDA) method to effectively eliminate the cross-domain gap through In-domain Self-matching Supervision (ISS) and Cross-domain Classifier Alignment (CCA). To be specific, ISS is presented to encapsulate discriminative information into the latent common space by elaborating a novel self-matching supervision mechanism. To alleviate the cross-domain discrepancy, CCA is proposed to align distinct domain-specific classifiers. Thanks to the ISS and CCA, our method could encode the discrimination into the domain-invariant embedding space for unsupervised cross-domain image retrieval. To verify the effectiveness of the proposed method, extensive experiments are conducted on four benchmark datasets compared with six state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Cross-domain image retrieval aims at retrieving images across different domains to excavate cross-domain classificatory or correspondence relationships. This paper studies a less-touched problem of cross-domain image retrieval, i.e., unsupervised cross-domain image retrieval, considering the following practical assumptions: (i) no correspondence relationship, and (ii) no category annotations. It is challenging to align and bridge distinct domains without cross-domain correspondence. To tackle the challenge, we present a novel Correspondence-free Domain Alignment (CoDA) method to effectively eliminate the cross-domain gap through In-domain Self-matching Supervision (ISS) and Cross-domain Classifier Alignment (CCA). To be specific, ISS is presented to encapsulate discriminative information into the latent common space by elaborating a novel self-matching supervision mechanism. To alleviate the cross-domain discrepancy, CCA is proposed to align distinct domain-specific classifiers. Thanks to the ISS and CCA, our method could encode the discrimination into the domain-invariant embedding space for unsupervised cross-domain image retrieval. To verify the effectiveness of the proposed method, extensive experiments are conducted on four benchmark datasets compared with six state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 跨领域图像检索旨在检索跨不同领域的图像，挖掘跨领域的分类或对应关系。本文研究了跨域图像检索的一个较少涉及的问题，即无监督跨域图像检索，考虑以下实际假设：（i）没有对应关系，（ii）没有类别注释。在没有跨域通信的情况下对齐和桥接不同的域是具有挑战性的。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的无对应域对齐（CoDA）方法，通过域内自匹配监督（ISS）和跨域分类器对齐（CCA）有效消除跨域差距。具体来说，ISS 的提出是通过阐述一种新颖的自匹配监督机制将歧视性信息封装到潜在的公共空间中。为了减轻跨域差异，CCA 被提出来对齐不同的特定域分类器。得益于 ISS 和 CCA，我们的方法可以将区分编码到域不变嵌入空间中，以进行无监督的跨域图像检索。为了验证所提出方法的有效性，在四个基准数据集上进行了广泛的实验，与六种最先进的方法进行了比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需对应关系和类别标注的无监督跨域图像检索方法，通过域对齐解决跨域差距问题。
AI.motivation: 跨域图像检索在无对应关系和类别标注的情况下难以对齐不同域，现有方法依赖标注信息，无法满足实际需求。
AI.method: 提出对应关系无关的域对齐方法（CoDA），包含域内自匹配监督（ISS）和跨域分类器对齐（CCA），通过构建域不变嵌入空间实现跨域对齐。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上实验验证，相比六种先进方法，CoDA在无监督跨域图像检索任务中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: CoDA通过ISS和CCA有效消除跨域差距，证明了无需对应关系和标注的无监督跨域检索可行性，为相关研究提供新思路。

authors_text: Yuchen Liu,Chen Chen,Lingjuan Lyu,Fangzhao Wu,Sai Wu,Gang Chen
title: Byzantine-Robust Learning on Heterogeneous Data via Gradient Splitting
title_zh: 通过梯度分裂对异构数据进行拜占庭鲁棒学习
abstract: Federated learning has exhibited vulnerabilities to Byzantine attacks, where the Byzantine attackers can send arbitrary gradients to a central server to destroy the convergence and performance of the global model. A wealth of robust AGgregation Rules (AGRs) have been proposed to defend against Byzantine attacks. However, Byzantine clients can still circumvent robust AGRs when data is non-Identically and Independently Distributed (non-IID). In this paper, we first reveal the root causes of performance degradation of current robust AGRs in non-IID settings: the curse of dimensionality and gradient heterogeneity. In order to address this issue, we propose GAS, a \shorten approach that can successfully adapt existing robust AGRs to non-IID settings. We also provide a detailed convergence analysis when the existing robust AGRs are combined with GAS. Experiments on various real-world datasets verify the efficacy of our proposed GAS. The implementation code is provided in https://github.com/YuchenLiu-a/byzantine-gas.
summary: Federated learning has exhibited vulnerabilities to Byzantine attacks, where the Byzantine attackers can send arbitrary gradients to a central server to destroy the convergence and performance of the global model. A wealth of robust AGgregation Rules (AGRs) have been proposed to defend against Byzantine attacks. However, Byzantine clients can still circumvent robust AGRs when data is non-Identically and Independently Distributed (non-IID). In this paper, we first reveal the root causes of performance degradation of current robust AGRs in non-IID settings: the curse of dimensionality and gradient heterogeneity. In order to address this issue, we propose GAS, a \shorten approach that can successfully adapt existing robust AGRs to non-IID settings. We also provide a detailed convergence analysis when the existing robust AGRs are combined with GAS. Experiments on various real-world datasets verify the efficacy of our proposed GAS. The implementation code is provided in https://github.com/YuchenLiu-a/byzantine-gas.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习暴露了拜占庭攻击的漏洞，拜占庭攻击者可以向中央服务器发送任意梯度，以破坏全局模型的收敛和性能。人们提出了大量强大的聚合规则（AGR）来防御拜占庭攻击。然而，当数据非相同且独立分布（非 IID）时，拜占庭客户端仍然可以规避强大的 AGR。在本文中，我们首先揭示了非 IID 设置中当前鲁棒 AGR 性能下降的根本原因：维数灾难和梯度异质性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 GAS，一种\shorten 方法，可以成功地将现有的鲁棒 AGR 适应非 IID 设置。我们还提供了现有稳健 AGR 与 GAS 结合时的详细收敛分析。对各种现实世界数据集的实验验证了我们提出的 GAS 的有效性。 https://github.com/YuchenLiu-a/byzantine-gas 中提供了实现代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过梯度分割（GAS）方法，解决非独立同分布（non-IID）数据下拜占庭鲁棒聚合规则（AGRs）性能退化问题，提升联邦学习的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有拜占庭鲁棒聚合规则在非IID数据场景下因维度灾难和梯度异质性导致性能下降，亟需新的方法适应异构数据环境。
AI.method: 设计梯度分割框架GAS，将原始梯度分解为多个子梯度，结合现有AGRs实现对非IID数据的鲁棒聚合，并提供收敛性分析。
AI.result: 在多个真实数据集实验验证中，GAS显著提升模型在拜占庭攻击下的收敛性能和鲁棒性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: GAS通过梯度分割有效缓解非IID数据带来的挑战，为拜占庭鲁棒联邦学习提供通用解决方案。

search_text: Byzantine-Robust Learning on Heterogeneous Data via Gradient Splitting 通过梯度分裂对异构数据进行拜占庭鲁棒学习 Federated learning has exhibited vulnerabilities to Byzantine attacks, where the Byzantine attackers can send arbitrary gradients to a central server to destroy the convergence and performance of the global model. A wealth of robust AGgregation Rules (AGRs) have been proposed to defend against Byzantine attacks. However, Byzantine clients can still circumvent robust AGRs when data is non-Identically and Independently Distributed (non-IID). In this paper, we first reveal the root causes of performance degradation of current robust AGRs in non-IID settings: the curse of dimensionality and gradient heterogeneity. In order to address this issue, we propose GAS, a \shorten approach that can successfully adapt existing robust AGRs to non-IID settings. We also provide a detailed convergence analysis when the existing robust AGRs are combined with GAS. Experiments on various real-world datasets verify the efficacy of our proposed GAS. The implementation code is provided in https://github.com/YuchenLiu-a/byzantine-gas. 联邦学习暴露了拜占庭攻击的漏洞，拜占庭攻击者可以向中央服务器发送任意梯度，以破坏全局模型的收敛和性能。人们提出了大量强大的聚合规则（AGR）来防御拜占庭攻击。然而，当数据非相同且独立分布（非 IID）时，拜占庭客户端仍然可以规避强大的 AGR。在本文中，我们首先揭示了非 IID 设置中当前鲁棒 AGR 性能下降的根本原因：维数灾难和梯度异质性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 GAS，一种\shorten 方法，可以成功地将现有的鲁棒 AGR 适应非 IID 设置。我们还提供了现有稳健 AGR 与 GAS 结合时的详细收敛分析。对各种现实世界数据集的实验验证了我们提出的 GAS 的有效性。 https://github.com/YuchenLiu-a/byzantine-gas 中提供了实现代码。 本文提出通过梯度分割（GAS）方法，解决非独立同分布（non-IID）数据下拜占庭鲁棒聚合规则（AGRs）性能退化问题，提升联邦学习的鲁棒性。 Yuchen Liu,Chen Chen,Lingjuan Lyu,Fangzhao Wu,Sai Wu,Gang Chen cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR

title: NYCU-TWO at Memotion 3: Good Foundation, Good Teacher, then you have Good Meme Analysis
title_zh: NYCU-TWO at Memotion 3：好的基础，好的老师，那么你就有好的模因分析
comment: De-Factify 2: Second Workshop on Multimodal Fact Checking and Hate Speech Detection, co-located with AAAI 2023
comments: De-Factify 2: Second Workshop on Multimodal Fact Checking and Hate Speech Detection, co-located with AAAI 2023
abstract: This paper presents a robust solution to the Memotion 3.0 Shared Task. The goal of this task is to classify the emotion and the corresponding intensity expressed by memes, which are usually in the form of images with short captions on social media. Understanding the multi-modal features of the given memes will be the key to solving the task. In this work, we use CLIP to extract aligned image-text features and propose a novel meme sentiment analysis framework, consisting of a Cooperative Teaching Model (CTM) for Task A and a Cascaded Emotion Classifier (CEC) for Tasks B&C. CTM is based on the idea of knowledge distillation, and can better predict the sentiment of a given meme in Task A; CEC can leverage the emotion intensity suggestion from the prediction of Task C to classify the emotion more precisely in Task B. Experiments show that we achieved the 2nd place ranking for both Task A and Task B and the 4th place ranking for Task C, with weighted F1-scores of 0.342, 0.784, and 0.535 respectively. The results show the robustness and effectiveness of our framework. Our code is released at github.
summary: This paper presents a robust solution to the Memotion 3.0 Shared Task. The goal of this task is to classify the emotion and the corresponding intensity expressed by memes, which are usually in the form of images with short captions on social media. Understanding the multi-modal features of the given memes will be the key to solving the task. In this work, we use CLIP to extract aligned image-text features and propose a novel meme sentiment analysis framework, consisting of a Cooperative Teaching Model (CTM) for Task A and a Cascaded Emotion Classifier (CEC) for Tasks B&C. CTM is based on the idea of knowledge distillation, and can better predict the sentiment of a given meme in Task A; CEC can leverage the emotion intensity suggestion from the prediction of Task C to classify the emotion more precisely in Task B. Experiments show that we achieved the 2nd place ranking for both Task A and Task B and the 4th place ranking for Task C, with weighted F1-scores of 0.342, 0.784, and 0.535 respectively. The results show the robustness and effectiveness of our framework. Our code is released at github.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了 Memotion 3.0 共享任务的稳健解决方案。该任务的目标是对模因表达的情感和相应的强度进行分类，模因通常以社交媒体上带有简短标题的图像形式出现。理解给定模因的多模态特征将是解决任务的关键。在这项工作中，我们使用 CLIP 提取对齐的图像文本特征，并提出了一种新颖的模因情感分析框架，由任务 A 的合作教学模型 (CTM) 和任务 B&C 的级联情感分类器 (CEC) 组成。 CTM基于知识蒸馏的思想，可以更好地预测任务A中给定模因的情绪； CEC 可以利用任务 C 预测中的情绪强度建议来更准确地对任务 B 中的情绪进行分类。实验表明，我们在任务 A 和任务 B 中均获得了第二名，在任务 C 中获得了第四名，加权 F1 分数分别为 0.342、0.784 和 0.535。结果显示了我们框架的稳健性和有效性。我们的代码发布在github上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多模态特征分析的框架，用于解决Memotion 3.0任务中对社交媒体上的表情包进行情绪分类及强度识别的问题。
AI.motivation: 表情包通常包含图像和短文本，需同时处理多模态信息以准确识别其情绪和强度，传统方法难以有效融合视觉与文本特征。
AI.method: 使用CLIP提取对齐的图像-文本特征，设计合作教学模型（CTM）处理任务A（情绪分类），并提出级联情绪分类器（CEC）利用任务C的强度预测结果优化任务B的情绪分类。
AI.result: 在任务A、B、C中分别获得第2、2、4名，加权F1分数分别为0.342、0.784和0.535，验证了框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过多模态特征融合与模型间协作机制，提出的框架在表情包情绪分析任务中表现出良好的鲁棒性和性能。

authors_text: Bingqian Lin,Yi Zhu,Xiaodan Liang,Liang Lin,Jianzhuang Liu
title: Actional Atomic-Concept Learning for Demystifying Vision-Language Navigation
title_zh: 揭秘视觉语言导航的行动原子概念学习
abstract: Vision-Language Navigation (VLN) is a challenging task which requires an agent to align complex visual observations to language instructions to reach the goal position. Most existing VLN agents directly learn to align the raw directional features and visual features trained using one-hot labels to linguistic instruction features. However, the big semantic gap among these multi-modal inputs makes the alignment difficult and therefore limits the navigation performance. In this paper, we propose Actional Atomic-Concept Learning (AACL), which maps visual observations to actional atomic concepts for facilitating the alignment. Specifically, an actional atomic concept is a natural language phrase containing an atomic action and an object, e.g., ``go up stairs''. These actional atomic concepts, which serve as the bridge between observations and instructions, can effectively mitigate the semantic gap and simplify the alignment. AACL contains three core components: 1) a concept mapping module to map the observations to the actional atomic concept representations through the VLN environment and the recently proposed Contrastive Language-Image Pretraining (CLIP) model, 2) a concept refining adapter to encourage more instruction-oriented object concept extraction by re-ranking the predicted object concepts by CLIP, and 3) an observation co-embedding module which utilizes concept representations to regularize the observation representations. Our AACL establishes new state-of-the-art results on both fine-grained (R2R) and high-level (REVERIE and R2R-Last) VLN benchmarks. Moreover, the visualization shows that AACL significantly improves the interpretability in action decision.
summary: Vision-Language Navigation (VLN) is a challenging task which requires an agent to align complex visual observations to language instructions to reach the goal position. Most existing VLN agents directly learn to align the raw directional features and visual features trained using one-hot labels to linguistic instruction features. However, the big semantic gap among these multi-modal inputs makes the alignment difficult and therefore limits the navigation performance. In this paper, we propose Actional Atomic-Concept Learning (AACL), which maps visual observations to actional atomic concepts for facilitating the alignment. Specifically, an actional atomic concept is a natural language phrase containing an atomic action and an object, e.g., ``go up stairs''. These actional atomic concepts, which serve as the bridge between observations and instructions, can effectively mitigate the semantic gap and simplify the alignment. AACL contains three core components: 1) a concept mapping module to map the observations to the actional atomic concept representations through the VLN environment and the recently proposed Contrastive Language-Image Pretraining (CLIP) model, 2) a concept refining adapter to encourage more instruction-oriented object concept extraction by re-ranking the predicted object concepts by CLIP, and 3) an observation co-embedding module which utilizes concept representations to regularize the observation representations. Our AACL establishes new state-of-the-art results on both fine-grained (R2R) and high-level (REVERIE and R2R-Last) VLN benchmarks. Moreover, the visualization shows that AACL significantly improves the interpretability in action decision.
abstract_zh: 视觉语言导航（VLN）是一项具有挑战性的任务，需要代理将复杂的视觉观察与语言指令结合起来以到达目标位置。大多数现有的 VLN 智能体直接学习将使用单热标签训练的原始方向特征和视觉特征与语言指令特征对齐。然而，这些多模态输入之间巨大的语义差距使得对齐变得困难，从而限制了导航性能。在本文中，我们提出了行动原子概念学习（AACL），它将视觉观察映射到行动原子概念以促进对齐。具体来说，动作原子概念是包含原子动作和对象的自然语言短语，例如“上楼梯”。这些可操作的原子概念充当观察和指令之间的桥梁，可以有效地缩小语义差距并简化对齐。 AACL 包含三个核心组件：1）概念映射模块，通过 VLN 环境和最近提出的对比语言图像预训练（CLIP）模型，将观察结果映射到操作原子概念表示；2）概念精炼适配器，通过对 CLIP 预测的对象概念重新排序，鼓励更多面向指令的对象概念提取；3）观察共同嵌入模块，利用概念表示来规范观察表示。我们的 AACL 在细粒度 (R2R) 和高级（REVERIE 和 R2R-Last）VLN 基准测试上建立了新的最先进结果。此外，可视化显示 AACL 显着提高了行动决策的可解释性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Actional Atomic-Concept Learning (AACL)的方法，通过将视觉观察映射到行动原子概念来改进视觉-语言导航（VLN）任务中的多模态对齐。
AI.motivation: 现有VLN方法因视觉和语言输入间的语义鸿沟导致对齐困难，限制了导航性能。需要一种更有效的桥梁来弥合这种差距。
AI.method: AACL包含三个核心组件：1) 利用CLIP模型将观察映射到行动原子概念表示；2) 通过重排序提取更符合指令导向的对象概念；3) 使用概念表示正则化观察表示的共嵌入模块。
AI.result: 在R2R、REVERIE等VLN基准测试中取得新SOTA结果，可视化显示行动决策可解释性显著提升。
AI.conclusion: AACL通过行动原子概念有效弥合语义鸿沟，在提升导航性能的同时增强了模型的可解释性。

search_text: Actional Atomic-Concept Learning for Demystifying Vision-Language Navigation 揭秘视觉语言导航的行动原子概念学习 Vision-Language Navigation (VLN) is a challenging task which requires an agent to align complex visual observations to language instructions to reach the goal position. Most existing VLN agents directly learn to align the raw directional features and visual features trained using one-hot labels to linguistic instruction features. However, the big semantic gap among these multi-modal inputs makes the alignment difficult and therefore limits the navigation performance. In this paper, we propose Actional Atomic-Concept Learning (AACL), which maps visual observations to actional atomic concepts for facilitating the alignment. Specifically, an actional atomic concept is a natural language phrase containing an atomic action and an object, e.g., ``go up stairs''. These actional atomic concepts, which serve as the bridge between observations and instructions, can effectively mitigate the semantic gap and simplify the alignment. AACL contains three core components: 1) a concept mapping module to map the observations to the actional atomic concept representations through the VLN environment and the recently proposed Contrastive Language-Image Pretraining (CLIP) model, 2) a concept refining adapter to encourage more instruction-oriented object concept extraction by re-ranking the predicted object concepts by CLIP, and 3) an observation co-embedding module which utilizes concept representations to regularize the observation representations. Our AACL establishes new state-of-the-art results on both fine-grained (R2R) and high-level (REVERIE and R2R-Last) VLN benchmarks. Moreover, the visualization shows that AACL significantly improves the interpretability in action decision. 视觉语言导航（VLN）是一项具有挑战性的任务，需要代理将复杂的视觉观察与语言指令结合起来以到达目标位置。大多数现有的 VLN 智能体直接学习将使用单热标签训练的原始方向特征和视觉特征与语言指令特征对齐。然而，这些多模态输入之间巨大的语义差距使得对齐变得困难，从而限制了导航性能。在本文中，我们提出了行动原子概念学习（AACL），它将视觉观察映射到行动原子概念以促进对齐。具体来说，动作原子概念是包含原子动作和对象的自然语言短语，例如“上楼梯”。这些可操作的原子概念充当观察和指令之间的桥梁，可以有效地缩小语义差距并简化对齐。 AACL 包含三个核心组件：1）概念映射模块，通过 VLN 环境和最近提出的对比语言图像预训练（CLIP）模型，将观察结果映射到操作原子概念表示；2）概念精炼适配器，通过对 CLIP 预测的对象概念重新排序，鼓励更多面向指令的对象概念提取；3）观察共同嵌入模块，利用概念表示来规范观察表示。我们的 AACL 在细粒度 (R2R) 和高级（REVERIE 和 R2R-Last）VLN 基准测试上建立了新的最先进结果。此外，可视化显示 AACL 显着提高了行动决策的可解释性。 本文提出了一种名为Actional Atomic-Concept Learning (AACL)的方法，通过将视觉观察映射到行动原子概念来改进视觉-语言导航（VLN）任务中的多模态对齐。 Bingqian Lin,Yi Zhu,Xiaodan Liang,Liang Lin,Jianzhuang Liu cs.CV,cs.AI

title: Time-attenuating Twin Delayed DDPG Reinforcement Learning for Trajectory Tracking Control of Quadrotors
title_zh: 用于四旋翼飞行器轨迹跟踪控制的时间衰减双延迟 DDPG 强化学习
abstract: Continuous trajectory tracking control of quadrotors is complicated when considering noise from the environment. Due to the difficulty in modeling the environmental dynamics, tracking methodologies based on conventional control theory, such as model predictive control, have limitations on tracking accuracy and response time. We propose a Time-attenuating Twin Delayed DDPG, a model-free algorithm that is robust to noise, to better handle the trajectory tracking task. A deep reinforcement learning framework is constructed, where a time decay strategy is designed to avoid trapping into local optima. The experimental results show that the tracking error is significantly small, and the operation time is one-tenth of that of a traditional algorithm. The OpenAI Mujoco tool is used to verify the proposed algorithm, and the simulation results show that, the proposed method can significantly improve the training efficiency and effectively improve the accuracy and convergence stability.
summary: Continuous trajectory tracking control of quadrotors is complicated when considering noise from the environment. Due to the difficulty in modeling the environmental dynamics, tracking methodologies based on conventional control theory, such as model predictive control, have limitations on tracking accuracy and response time. We propose a Time-attenuating Twin Delayed DDPG, a model-free algorithm that is robust to noise, to better handle the trajectory tracking task. A deep reinforcement learning framework is constructed, where a time decay strategy is designed to avoid trapping into local optima. The experimental results show that the tracking error is significantly small, and the operation time is one-tenth of that of a traditional algorithm. The OpenAI Mujoco tool is used to verify the proposed algorithm, and the simulation results show that, the proposed method can significantly improve the training efficiency and effectively improve the accuracy and convergence stability.
abstract_zh: 考虑到环境噪声时，四旋翼飞行器的连续轨迹跟踪控制变得很复杂。由于环境动力学建模的困难，基于传统控制理论的跟踪方法（例如模型预测控制）在跟踪精度和响应时间方面存在局限性。我们提出了一种时间衰减双延迟 DDPG，这是一种对噪声具有鲁棒性的无模型算法，可以更好地处理轨迹跟踪任务。构建了深度强化学习框架，其中设计了时间衰减策略以避免陷入局部最优。实验结果表明，跟踪误差明显较小，运行时间是传统算法的十分之一。利用OpenAI Mujoco工具对所提算法进行验证，仿真结果表明，所提方法能够显着提高训练效率，有效提高精度和收敛稳定性。

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种改进的深度强化学习算法用于四旋翼无人机的轨迹跟踪控制，以应对环境噪声带来的挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统控制方法如模型预测控制在处理环境噪声时存在跟踪精度和响应时间的局限性，需要更鲁棒的算法。
AI.method: 设计了时间衰减策略的双延迟DDPG算法，构建深度强化学习框架以避免陷入局部最优。
AI.result: 实验显示跟踪误差显著减小，操作时间仅为传统算法的十分之一，训练效率和收敛稳定性提升。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的方法有效提高了四旋翼无人机轨迹跟踪的准确性和稳定性，验证了其优越性。

authors_text: Xuxiang Sun,Gong Cheng,Lei Pei,Hongda Li,Junwei Han
title: Threatening Patch Attacks on Object Detection in Optical Remote Sensing Images
title_zh: 光学遥感图像中目标检测的威胁补丁攻击
abstract: Advanced Patch Attacks (PAs) on object detection in natural images have pointed out the great safety vulnerability in methods based on deep neural networks. However, little attention has been paid to this topic in Optical Remote Sensing Images (O-RSIs). To this end, we focus on this research, i.e., PAs on object detection in O-RSIs, and propose a more Threatening PA without the scarification of the visual quality, dubbed TPA. Specifically, to address the problem of inconsistency between local and global landscapes in existing patch selection schemes, we propose leveraging the First-Order Difference (FOD) of the objective function before and after masking to select the sub-patches to be attacked. Further, considering the problem of gradient inundation when applying existing coordinate-based loss to PAs directly, we design an IoU-based objective function specific for PAs, dubbed Bounding box Drifting Loss (BDL), which pushes the detected bounding boxes far from the initial ones until there are no intersections between them. Finally, on two widely used benchmarks, i.e., DIOR and DOTA, comprehensive evaluations of our TPA with four typical detectors (Faster R-CNN, FCOS, RetinaNet, and YOLO-v4) witness its remarkable effectiveness. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first attempt to study the PAs on object detection in O-RSIs, and we hope this work can get our readers interested in studying this topic.
summary: Advanced Patch Attacks (PAs) on object detection in natural images have pointed out the great safety vulnerability in methods based on deep neural networks. However, little attention has been paid to this topic in Optical Remote Sensing Images (O-RSIs). To this end, we focus on this research, i.e., PAs on object detection in O-RSIs, and propose a more Threatening PA without the scarification of the visual quality, dubbed TPA. Specifically, to address the problem of inconsistency between local and global landscapes in existing patch selection schemes, we propose leveraging the First-Order Difference (FOD) of the objective function before and after masking to select the sub-patches to be attacked. Further, considering the problem of gradient inundation when applying existing coordinate-based loss to PAs directly, we design an IoU-based objective function specific for PAs, dubbed Bounding box Drifting Loss (BDL), which pushes the detected bounding boxes far from the initial ones until there are no intersections between them. Finally, on two widely used benchmarks, i.e., DIOR and DOTA, comprehensive evaluations of our TPA with four typical detectors (Faster R-CNN, FCOS, RetinaNet, and YOLO-v4) witness its remarkable effectiveness. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first attempt to study the PAs on object detection in O-RSIs, and we hope this work can get our readers interested in studying this topic.
abstract_zh: 针对自然图像中目标检测的高级补丁攻击（PA）指出了基于深度神经网络的方法存在巨大的安全漏洞。然而，光学遥感图像（O-RSI）很少关注这一主题。为此，我们专注于这项研究，即 O-RSI 中目标检测的 PA，并提出了一种更具威胁性且不牺牲视觉质量的 PA，称为 TPA。具体来说，为了解决现有补丁选择方案中局部和全局景观不一致的问题，我们建议利用屏蔽前后目标函数的一阶差分（FOD）来选择要攻击的子补丁。此外，考虑到直接将现有的基于坐标的损失应用于 PA 时的梯度淹没问题，我们设计了一种针对 PA 的基于 IoU 的目标函数，称为边界框漂移损失（BDL），它将检测到的边界框推离初始边界框，直到它们之间没有交集。最后，在 DIOR 和 DOTA 两个广泛使用的基准上，我们的 TPA 与四种典型检测器（Faster R-CNN、FCOS、RetinaNet 和 YOLO-v4）的综合评估见证了其显着的有效性。据我们所知，这是研究 O-RSI 中目标检测 PA 的首次尝试，我们希望这项工作能够引起读者对研究这个主题的兴趣。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对光学遥感图像目标检测的威胁性补丁攻击方法（TPA），在不损害视觉质量的前提下显著降低检测性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管自然图像中的补丁攻击已被广泛研究，但光学遥感图像（O-RSIs）目标检测的安全性尚未受到足够关注，现有方法存在局部与全局景观不一致及梯度淹没问题。
AI.method: 通过引入目标函数掩码前后的二阶差分（FOD）选择攻击子补丁，并设计基于IoU的边界框漂移损失（BDL）解决坐标损失函数的梯度淹没问题，最终在DIOR和DOTA数据集上验证有效性。
AI.result: TPA在Faster R-CNN、FCOS、RetinaNet和YOLO-v4四种检测器上均表现出显著攻击效果，是首个针对O-RSIs目标检测补丁攻击的系统性研究。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次揭示了光学遥感图像目标检测系统的安全脆弱性，为后续相关研究提供了新方向和基准方法。

conclusion: 本文首次揭示了光学遥感图像目标检测系统的安全脆弱性，为后续相关研究提供了新方向和基准方法。
search_text: Threatening Patch Attacks on Object Detection in Optical Remote Sensing Images 光学遥感图像中目标检测的威胁补丁攻击 Advanced Patch Attacks (PAs) on object detection in natural images have pointed out the great safety vulnerability in methods based on deep neural networks. However, little attention has been paid to this topic in Optical Remote Sensing Images (O-RSIs). To this end, we focus on this research, i.e., PAs on object detection in O-RSIs, and propose a more Threatening PA without the scarification of the visual quality, dubbed TPA. Specifically, to address the problem of inconsistency between local and global landscapes in existing patch selection schemes, we propose leveraging the First-Order Difference (FOD) of the objective function before and after masking to select the sub-patches to be attacked. Further, considering the problem of gradient inundation when applying existing coordinate-based loss to PAs directly, we design an IoU-based objective function specific for PAs, dubbed Bounding box Drifting Loss (BDL), which pushes the detected bounding boxes far from the initial ones until there are no intersections between them. Finally, on two widely used benchmarks, i.e., DIOR and DOTA, comprehensive evaluations of our TPA with four typical detectors (Faster R-CNN, FCOS, RetinaNet, and YOLO-v4) witness its remarkable effectiveness. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first attempt to study the PAs on object detection in O-RSIs, and we hope this work can get our readers interested in studying this topic. 针对自然图像中目标检测的高级补丁攻击（PA）指出了基于深度神经网络的方法存在巨大的安全漏洞。然而，光学遥感图像（O-RSI）很少关注这一主题。为此，我们专注于这项研究，即 O-RSI 中目标检测的 PA，并提出了一种更具威胁性且不牺牲视觉质量的 PA，称为 TPA。具体来说，为了解决现有补丁选择方案中局部和全局景观不一致的问题，我们建议利用屏蔽前后目标函数的一阶差分（FOD）来选择要攻击的子补丁。此外，考虑到直接将现有的基于坐标的损失应用于 PA 时的梯度淹没问题，我们设计了一种针对 PA 的基于 IoU 的目标函数，称为边界框漂移损失（BDL），它将检测到的边界框推离初始边界框，直到它们之间没有交集。最后，在 DIOR 和 DOTA 两个广泛使用的基准上，我们的 TPA 与四种典型检测器（Faster R-CNN、FCOS、RetinaNet 和 YOLO-v4）的综合评估见证了其显着的有效性。据我们所知，这是研究 O-RSI 中目标检测 PA 的首次尝试，我们希望这项工作能够引起读者对研究这个主题的兴趣。 本文提出一种针对光学遥感图像目标检测的威胁性补丁攻击方法（TPA），在不损害视觉质量的前提下显著降低检测性能。 Xuxiang Sun,Gong Cheng,Lei Pei,Hongda Li,Junwei Han cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CR,cs.LG

authors_text: Yuxin Zhang,Yiting Luo,Mingbao Lin,Yunshan Zhong,Jingjing Xie,Fei Chao,Rongrong Ji
title: Bi-directional Masks for Efficient N:M Sparse Training
title_zh: 用于高效 N:M 稀疏训练的双向掩模
abstract: We focus on addressing the dense backward propagation issue for training efficiency of N:M fine-grained sparsity that preserves at most N out of M consecutive weights and achieves practical speedups supported by the N:M sparse tensor core. Therefore, we present a novel method of Bi-directional Masks (Bi-Mask) with its two central innovations in: 1) Separate sparse masks in the two directions of forward and backward propagation to obtain training acceleration. It disentangles the forward and backward weight sparsity and overcomes the very dense gradient computation. 2) An efficient weight row permutation method to maintain performance. It picks up the permutation candidate with the most eligible N:M weight blocks in the backward to minimize the gradient gap between traditional uni-directional masks and our bi-directional masks. Compared with existing uni-directional scenario that applies a transposable mask and enables backward acceleration, our Bi-Mask is experimentally demonstrated to be more superior in performance. Also, our Bi-Mask performs on par with or even better than methods that fail to achieve backward acceleration. Project of this paper is available at \url{https://github.com/zyxxmu/Bi-Mask}.
summary: We focus on addressing the dense backward propagation issue for training efficiency of N:M fine-grained sparsity that preserves at most N out of M consecutive weights and achieves practical speedups supported by the N:M sparse tensor core. Therefore, we present a novel method of Bi-directional Masks (Bi-Mask) with its two central innovations in: 1) Separate sparse masks in the two directions of forward and backward propagation to obtain training acceleration. It disentangles the forward and backward weight sparsity and overcomes the very dense gradient computation. 2) An efficient weight row permutation method to maintain performance. It picks up the permutation candidate with the most eligible N:M weight blocks in the backward to minimize the gradient gap between traditional uni-directional masks and our bi-directional masks. Compared with existing uni-directional scenario that applies a transposable mask and enables backward acceleration, our Bi-Mask is experimentally demonstrated to be more superior in performance. Also, our Bi-Mask performs on par with or even better than methods that fail to achieve backward acceleration. Project of this paper is available at \url{https://github.com/zyxxmu/Bi-Mask}.
abstract_zh: 我们专注于解决密集后向传播问题，以提高 N:M 细粒度稀疏性的训练效率，最多保留 M 个连续权重中的 N 个，并实现 N:M 稀疏张量核心支持的实际加速。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的双向掩模（Bi-Mask）方法，其两个核心创新点在于：1）在前向和反向传播两个方向上分离稀疏掩模以获得训练加速。它解开了前向和后向权重稀疏性，并克服了非常密集的梯度计算。 2）一种有效的权重行排列方法来保持性能。它向后选择具有最合适的 N:M 权重块的排列候选，以最小化传统单向掩模和我们的双向掩模之间的梯度差距。与现有的应用转置掩模并实现向后加速的单向场景相比，我们的 Bi-Mask 经实验证明性能更加优越。此外，我们的 Bi-Mask 的性能与无法实现向后加速的方法相当甚至更好。本文的项目可在 \url{https://github.com/zyxxmu/Bi-Mask} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Bi-Mask的方法，通过双向掩码机制提升N:M细粒度稀疏训练的效率。
AI.motivation: 现有单向掩码方法在反向传播中存在梯度计算密集的问题，导致训练效率低下，需寻找更高效的稀疏训练方案。
AI.method: 1) 分离正向与反向传播的稀疏掩码，降低梯度计算密度；2) 设计高效的权重行排列方法，选择最优N:M块以最小化梯度差距。
AI.result: 实验表明，Bi-Mask在性能上优于传统单向掩码方法，且与未实现反向加速的方法相当或更优。
AI.conclusion: Bi-Mask通过双向掩码与排列优化，有效解决了稀疏训练中的效率瓶颈，为高效模型训练提供了新思路。

authors_text: Jiahao You,Ziye Jia,Chao Dong,Lijun He,Yilu Cao,Qihui Wu
title: Computation Offloading for Uncertain Marine Tasks by Cooperation of UAVs and Vessels
title_zh: 无人机与船舶协同完成不确定海洋任务的计算卸载
abstract: With the continuous increment of maritime applications, the development of marine networks for data offloading becomes necessary. However, the limited maritime network resources are very difficult to satisfy real-time demands. Besides, how to effectively handle multiple compute-intensive tasks becomes another intractable issue. Hence, in this paper, we focus on the decision of maritime task offloading by the cooperation of unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) and vessels. Specifically, we first propose a cooperative offloading framework, including the demands from marine Internet of Things (MIoTs) devices and resource providers from UAVs and vessels. Due to the limited energy and computation ability of UAVs, it is necessary to help better apply the vessels to computation offloading. Then, we formulate the studied problem into a Markov decision process, aiming to minimize the total execution time and energy cost. Then, we leverage Lyapunov optimization to convert the long-term constraints of the total execution time and energy cost into their short-term constraints, further yielding a set of per-time-slot optimization problems. Furthermore, we propose a Q-learning based approach to solve the short-term problem efficiently. Finally, simulation results are conducted to verify the correctness and effectiveness of the proposed algorithm.
summary: With the continuous increment of maritime applications, the development of marine networks for data offloading becomes necessary. However, the limited maritime network resources are very difficult to satisfy real-time demands. Besides, how to effectively handle multiple compute-intensive tasks becomes another intractable issue. Hence, in this paper, we focus on the decision of maritime task offloading by the cooperation of unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) and vessels. Specifically, we first propose a cooperative offloading framework, including the demands from marine Internet of Things (MIoTs) devices and resource providers from UAVs and vessels. Due to the limited energy and computation ability of UAVs, it is necessary to help better apply the vessels to computation offloading. Then, we formulate the studied problem into a Markov decision process, aiming to minimize the total execution time and energy cost. Then, we leverage Lyapunov optimization to convert the long-term constraints of the total execution time and energy cost into their short-term constraints, further yielding a set of per-time-slot optimization problems. Furthermore, we propose a Q-learning based approach to solve the short-term problem efficiently. Finally, simulation results are conducted to verify the correctness and effectiveness of the proposed algorithm.
abstract_zh: 随着海事应用的不断增加，开发用于数据卸载的海事网络变得必要。然而，有限的海上网络资源很难满足实时需求。此外，如何有效地处理多个计算密集型任务成为另一个棘手的问题。因此，在本文中，我们重点研究无人机和船只合作进行海上任务卸载的决策。具体来说，我们首先提出了一个合作卸载框架，包括海洋物联网（MIoT）设备以及无人机和船舶资源提供者的需求。由于无人机能量和计算能力有限，需要帮助无人机更好地应用于计算卸载。然后，我们将所研究的问题制定为马尔可夫决策过程，旨在最小化总执行时间和能量成本。然后，我们利用李亚普诺夫优化将总执行时间和能量成本的长期约束转换为短期约束，进一步产生一组每时隙优化问题。此外，我们提出了一种基于 Q 学习的方法来有效地解决短期问题。最后通过仿真结果验证了所提算法的正确性和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无人机与船舶协同的海洋任务计算卸载框架，通过优化算法解决资源受限下的实时计算需求。
AI.motivation: 海洋应用增长导致网络资源不足，难以满足实时任务需求，且多计算密集型任务处理效率低下。
AI.method: 构建协作卸载框架，建立马尔可夫决策过程模型，结合Lyapunov优化转换约束条件，并采用Q-learning算法求解。
AI.result: 仿真验证了算法在降低总执行时间与能耗成本方面的有效性，证明了协同方案的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效平衡了无人机与船舶资源，为动态海洋环境下的计算卸载提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Gang Zhang,Ziyi Li,Chufeng Tang,Jianmin Li,Xiaolin Hu
title: CEDNet: A Cascade Encoder-Decoder Network for Dense Prediction
title_zh: CEDNet：用于密集预测的级联编码器-解码器网络
abstract: Multi-scale features are essential for dense prediction tasks, such as object detection, instance segmentation, and semantic segmentation. The prevailing methods usually utilize a classification backbone to extract multi-scale features and then fuse these features using a lightweight module (e.g., the fusion module in FPN and BiFPN, two typical object detection methods). However, as these methods allocate most computational resources to the classification backbone, the multi-scale feature fusion in these methods is delayed, which may lead to inadequate feature fusion. While some methods perform feature fusion from early stages, they either fail to fully leverage high-level features to guide low-level feature learning or have complex structures, resulting in sub-optimal performance. We propose a streamlined cascade encoder-decoder network, dubbed CEDNet, tailored for dense \mbox{prediction} tasks. All stages in CEDNet share the same encoder-decoder structure and perform multi-scale feature fusion within the decoder. A hallmark of CEDNet is its ability to incorporate high-level features from early stages to guide low-level feature learning in subsequent stages, thereby enhancing the effectiveness of multi-scale feature fusion. We explored three well-known encoder-decoder structures: Hourglass, UNet, and FPN. When integrated into CEDNet, they performed much better than traditional methods that use a pre-designed classification backbone combined with a lightweight fusion module. Extensive experiments on object detection, instance segmentation, and semantic segmentation demonstrated the effectiveness of our method. The code is available at https://github.com/zhanggang001/CEDNet.
summary: Multi-scale features are essential for dense prediction tasks, such as object detection, instance segmentation, and semantic segmentation. The prevailing methods usually utilize a classification backbone to extract multi-scale features and then fuse these features using a lightweight module (e.g., the fusion module in FPN and BiFPN, two typical object detection methods). However, as these methods allocate most computational resources to the classification backbone, the multi-scale feature fusion in these methods is delayed, which may lead to inadequate feature fusion. While some methods perform feature fusion from early stages, they either fail to fully leverage high-level features to guide low-level feature learning or have complex structures, resulting in sub-optimal performance. We propose a streamlined cascade encoder-decoder network, dubbed CEDNet, tailored for dense \mbox{prediction} tasks. All stages in CEDNet share the same encoder-decoder structure and perform multi-scale feature fusion within the decoder. A hallmark of CEDNet is its ability to incorporate high-level features from early stages to guide low-level feature learning in subsequent stages, thereby enhancing the effectiveness of multi-scale feature fusion. We explored three well-known encoder-decoder structures: Hourglass, UNet, and FPN. When integrated into CEDNet, they performed much better than traditional methods that use a pre-designed classification backbone combined with a lightweight fusion module. Extensive experiments on object detection, instance segmentation, and semantic segmentation demonstrated the effectiveness of our method. The code is available at https://github.com/zhanggang001/CEDNet.
abstract_zh: 多尺度特征对于密集预测任务至关重要，例如对象检测、实例分割和语义分割。流行的方法通常利用分类主干来提取多尺度特征，然后使用轻量级模块融合这些特征（例如，FPN 和 BiFPN 这两种典型的目标检测方法中的融合模块）。然而，由于这些方法将大部分计算资源分配给分类主干，因此这些方法中的多尺度特征融合被延迟，这可能导致特征融合不充分。虽然一些方法从早期阶段就进行特征融合，但它们要么无法充分利用高级特征来指导低级特征学习，要么具有复杂的结构，导致性能次优。我们提出了一种简化的级联编码器-解码器网络，称为 CEDNet，专为密集\mbox{预测}任务而定制。 CEDNet 中的所有阶段共享相同的编码器-解码器结构，并在解码器内执行多尺度特征融合。 CEDNet的一个特点是能够从早期阶段融合高层特征来指导后续阶段的低层特征学习，从而增强多尺度特征融合的有效性。我们探索了三种著名的编码器-解码器结构：Hourglass、UNet 和 FPN。当集成到 CEDNet 中时，它们的性能比使用预先设计的分类主干和轻量级融合模块相结合的传统方法要好得多。关于对象检测、实例分割和语义分割的大量实验证明了我们方法的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/zhanggang001/CEDNet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CEDNet，一种用于密集预测任务的级联编码器-解码器网络，通过改进多尺度特征融合提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在分类主干网络上分配过多计算资源，导致多尺度特征融合延迟或结构复杂，无法有效利用高层特征指导低层特征学习。
AI.method: 设计级联编码器-解码器结构，所有阶段共享相同结构并在解码器内进行多尺度特征融合，利用早期高层特征指导后续低层特征学习。
AI.result: 在目标检测、实例分割和语义分割任务中，CEDNet优于传统方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: CEDNet通过级联结构和高效特征融合机制，显著提升了密集预测任务的性能。

authors_text: Nicolas Harvey Chapman,Feras Dayoub,Will Browne,Christopher Lehnert
title: Predicting Class Distribution Shift for Reliable Domain Adaptive Object Detection
title_zh: 预测可靠域自适应对象检测的类分布变化
comment: ef:IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters, vol. 8, no. 8, pp. 5084-5091, Aug. 2023
comments: ef:IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters, vol. 8, no. 8, pp. 5084-5091, Aug. 2023
abstract: Unsupervised Domain Adaptive Object Detection (UDA-OD) uses unlabelled data to improve the reliability of robotic vision systems in open-world environments. Previous approaches to UDA-OD based on self-training have been effective in overcoming changes in the general appearance of images. However, shifts in a robot's deployment environment can also impact the likelihood that different objects will occur, termed class distribution shift. Motivated by this, we propose a framework for explicitly addressing class distribution shift to improve pseudo-label reliability in self-training. Our approach uses the domain invariance and contextual understanding of a pre-trained joint vision and language model to predict the class distribution of unlabelled data. By aligning the class distribution of pseudo-labels with this prediction, we provide weak supervision of pseudo-label accuracy. To further account for low quality pseudo-labels early in self-training, we propose an approach to dynamically adjust the number of pseudo-labels per image based on model confidence. Our method outperforms state-of-the-art approaches on several benchmarks, including a 4.7 mAP improvement when facing challenging class distribution shift.
summary: Unsupervised Domain Adaptive Object Detection (UDA-OD) uses unlabelled data to improve the reliability of robotic vision systems in open-world environments. Previous approaches to UDA-OD based on self-training have been effective in overcoming changes in the general appearance of images. However, shifts in a robot's deployment environment can also impact the likelihood that different objects will occur, termed class distribution shift. Motivated by this, we propose a framework for explicitly addressing class distribution shift to improve pseudo-label reliability in self-training. Our approach uses the domain invariance and contextual understanding of a pre-trained joint vision and language model to predict the class distribution of unlabelled data. By aligning the class distribution of pseudo-labels with this prediction, we provide weak supervision of pseudo-label accuracy. To further account for low quality pseudo-labels early in self-training, we propose an approach to dynamically adjust the number of pseudo-labels per image based on model confidence. Our method outperforms state-of-the-art approaches on several benchmarks, including a 4.7 mAP improvement when facing challenging class distribution shift.
abstract_zh: 无监督域自适应目标检测 (UDA-OD) 使用未标记的数据来提高开放世界环境中机器人视觉系统的可靠性。之前基于自我训练的 UDA-OD 方法可以有效克服图像总体外观的变化。然而，机器人部署环境的变化也会影响不同对象发生的可能性，称为类别分布变化。受此启发，我们提出了一个框架，用于明确解决类别分布转移问题，以提高自训练中伪标签的可靠性。我们的方法使用预先训练的联合视觉和语言模型的领域不变性和上下文理解来预测未标记数据的类别分布。通过将伪标签的类别分布与此预测对齐，我们提供了对伪标签准确性的弱监督。为了进一步解释自训练早期的低质量伪标签，我们提出了一种根据模型置信度动态调整每个图像的伪标签数量的方法。我们的方法在多个基准上都优于最先进的方法，包括在面临具有挑战性的类别分布变化时 mAP 提高了 4.7。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种框架以解决领域自适应目标检测中的类别分布偏移问题，通过预测未标记数据的类别分布提升伪标签可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有自训练方法在处理图像外观变化有效，但未充分应对部署环境变化导致的类别分布偏移，影响伪标签质量。
AI.method: 利用预训练视觉语言模型预测未标记数据类别分布，通过分布对齐提供弱监督，并动态调整伪标签数量以应对低质量标签。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中优于现有方法，面对挑战性类别分布偏移时mAP提升4.7。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过显式处理类别分布偏移，有效提升领域自适应目标检测的可靠性与性能。

title: Generalizable End-to-End Deep Learning Frameworks for Real-Time Attitude Estimation Using 6DoF Inertial Measurement Units
title_zh: 使用 6DoF 惯性测量单元进行实时姿态估计的可推广端到端深度学习框架
abstract: This paper presents a novel end-to-end deep learning framework for real-time inertial attitude estimation using 6DoF IMU measurements. Inertial Measurement Units are widely used in various applications, including engineering and medical sciences. However, traditional filters used for attitude estimation suffer from poor generalization over different motion patterns and environmental disturbances. To address this problem, we propose two deep learning models that incorporate accelerometer and gyroscope readings as inputs. These models are designed to be generalized to different motion patterns, sampling rates, and environmental disturbances. Our models consist of convolutional neural network layers combined with Bi-Directional Long-Short Term Memory followed by a Fully Forward Neural Network to estimate the quaternion. We evaluate the proposed method on seven publicly available datasets, totaling more than 120 hours and 200 kilometers of IMU measurements. Our results show that the proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art methods in terms of accuracy and robustness. Additionally, our framework demonstrates superior generalization over various motion characteristics and sensor sampling rates. Overall, this paper provides a comprehensive and reliable solution for real-time inertial attitude estimation using 6DoF IMUs, which has significant implications for a wide range of applications.

Additionally, our framework demonstrates superior generalization over various motion characteristics and sensor sampling rates. Overall, this paper provides a comprehensive and reliable solution for real-time inertial attitude estimation using 6DoF IMUs, which has significant implications for a wide range of applications.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的端到端深度学习框架，用于使用 6DoF IMU 测量进行实时惯性姿态估计。惯性测量单元广泛应用于各种应用，包括工程和医学科学。然而，用于姿态估计的传统滤波器对不同运动模式和环境干扰的泛化能力较差。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了两种深度学习模型，将加速度计和陀螺仪读数作为输入。这些模型旨在推广到不同的运动模式、采样率和环境干扰。我们的模型由卷积神经网络层与双向长短期记忆相结合，然后是用于估计四元数的完全前向神经网络。我们在七个公开可用的数据集上评估了所提出的方法，总计超过 120 小时和 200 公里的 IMU 测量。我们的结果表明，所提出的方法在准确性和鲁棒性方面优于最先进的方法。此外，我们的框架展示了对各种运动特征和传感器采样率的卓越概括。总体而言，本文为使用 6DoF IMU 进行实时惯性姿态估计提供了全面且可靠的解决方案，这对广泛的应用具有重要意义。

AI.motivation: 传统滤波方法在不同运动模式和环境干扰下泛化能力较差，需开发更具鲁棒性和适应性的深度学习模型。
AI.method: 结合卷积神经网络（CNN）、双向长短期记忆网络（Bi-LSTM）和全前馈神经网络，利用加速度计和陀螺仪数据估计四元数。
AI.result: 在7个公开数据集（总计120小时200公里IMU数据）上验证，方法在精度和鲁棒性上优于现有技术，且对运动特征和采样率具有强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为实时惯性姿态估计提供了全面可靠的解决方案，适用于工程、医疗等广泛领域。

search_text: Generalizable End-to-End Deep Learning Frameworks for Real-Time Attitude Estimation Using 6DoF Inertial Measurement Units 使用 6DoF 惯性测量单元进行实时姿态估计的可推广端到端深度学习框架 This paper presents a novel end-to-end deep learning framework for real-time inertial attitude estimation using 6DoF IMU measurements. Inertial Measurement Units are widely used in various applications, including engineering and medical sciences. However, traditional filters used for attitude estimation suffer from poor generalization over different motion patterns and environmental disturbances. To address this problem, we propose two deep learning models that incorporate accelerometer and gyroscope readings as inputs. These models are designed to be generalized to different motion patterns, sampling rates, and environmental disturbances. Our models consist of convolutional neural network layers combined with Bi-Directional Long-Short Term Memory followed by a Fully Forward Neural Network to estimate the quaternion. We evaluate the proposed method on seven publicly available datasets, totaling more than 120 hours and 200 kilometers of IMU measurements. Our results show that the proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art methods in terms of accuracy and robustness. Additionally, our framework demonstrates superior generalization over various motion characteristics and sensor sampling rates. Overall, this paper provides a comprehensive and reliable solution for real-time inertial attitude estimation using 6DoF IMUs, which has significant implications for a wide range of applications. 本文提出了一种新颖的端到端深度学习框架，用于使用 6DoF IMU 测量进行实时惯性姿态估计。惯性测量单元广泛应用于各种应用，包括工程和医学科学。然而，用于姿态估计的传统滤波器对不同运动模式和环境干扰的泛化能力较差。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了两种深度学习模型，将加速度计和陀螺仪读数作为输入。这些模型旨在推广到不同的运动模式、采样率和环境干扰。我们的模型由卷积神经网络层与双向长短期记忆相结合，然后是用于估计四元数的完全前向神经网络。我们在七个公开可用的数据集上评估了所提出的方法，总计超过 120 小时和 200 公里的 IMU 测量。我们的结果表明，所提出的方法在准确性和鲁棒性方面优于最先进的方法。此外，我们的框架展示了对各种运动特征和传感器采样率的卓越概括。总体而言，本文为使用 6DoF IMU 进行实时惯性姿态估计提供了全面且可靠的解决方案，这对广泛的应用具有重要意义。 本文提出了一种用于实时六自由度惯性测量单元（IMU）姿态估计的端到端深度学习框架。 Arman Asgharpoor Golroudbari,Mohammad Hossein Sabour cs.RO,cs.AI,eess.SP

title: Variational Bayesian Neural Networks via Resolution of Singularities
title_zh: 通过奇点解析的变分贝叶斯神经网络
abstract: In this work, we advocate for the importance of singular learning theory (SLT) as it pertains to the theory and practice of variational inference in Bayesian neural networks (BNNs). To begin, using SLT, we lay to rest some of the confusion surrounding discrepancies between downstream predictive performance measured via e.g., the test log predictive density, and the variational objective. Next, we use the SLT-corrected asymptotic form for singular posterior distributions to inform the design of the variational family itself. Specifically, we build upon the idealized variational family introduced in \citet{bhattacharya_evidence_2020} which is theoretically appealing but practically intractable. Our proposal takes shape as a normalizing flow where the base distribution is a carefully-initialized generalized gamma. We conduct experiments comparing this to the canonical Gaussian base distribution and show improvements in terms of variational free energy and variational generalization error.
summary: In this work, we advocate for the importance of singular learning theory (SLT) as it pertains to the theory and practice of variational inference in Bayesian neural networks (BNNs). To begin, using SLT, we lay to rest some of the confusion surrounding discrepancies between downstream predictive performance measured via e.g., the test log predictive density, and the variational objective. Next, we use the SLT-corrected asymptotic form for singular posterior distributions to inform the design of the variational family itself. Specifically, we build upon the idealized variational family introduced in \citet{bhattacharya_evidence_2020} which is theoretically appealing but practically intractable. Our proposal takes shape as a normalizing flow where the base distribution is a carefully-initialized generalized gamma. We conduct experiments comparing this to the canonical Gaussian base distribution and show improvements in terms of variational free energy and variational generalization error.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提倡奇异学习理论（SLT）的重要性，因为它涉及贝叶斯神经网络（BNN）中变分推理的理论和实践。首先，使用 SLT，我们消除了一些围绕通过测试日志预测密度和变分目标测量的下游预测性能之间差异的混乱。接下来，我们使用奇异后验分布的 SLT 校正渐近形式来指导变分族本身的设计。具体来说，我们建立在 \citet{bhattacharya_evidence_2020} 中引入的理想化变分族的基础上，该族在理论上很有吸引力，但在实践中却很棘手。我们的建议形成了一个标准化流程，其中基本分布是一个仔细初始化的广义伽马。我们进行了实验，将其与规范高斯基分布进行比较，并显示在变分自由能和变分泛化误差方面的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文通过解析奇点，利用奇异学习理论改进变分贝叶斯神经网络的推断方法，解决预测性能与变分目标的差异问题，并设计新的变分族结构。
AI.motivation: 现有变分推断方法在贝叶斯神经网络中存在预测性能与变分目标不一致的问题，且理想化的变分族在实际中难以应用。
AI.method: 基于奇异学习理论修正后验分布的渐近形式，构建以广义伽马分布为基分布的标准化流模型，替代传统高斯分布变分族。
AI.result: 实验表明新方法在变分自由能和泛化误差指标上优于传统高斯基分布方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过理论指导设计的变分族能有效提升贝叶斯神经网络性能，为变分推断与奇异学习理论结合提供了新方向。

title: A Correct-and-Certify Approach to Self-Supervise Object Pose Estimators via Ensemble Self-Training
title_zh: 通过集成自训练进行自监督物体姿态估计的正确和验证方法
abstract: Real-world robotics applications demand object pose estimation methods that work reliably across a variety of scenarios. Modern learning-based approaches require large labeled datasets and tend to perform poorly outside the training domain. Our first contribution is to develop a robust corrector module that corrects pose estimates using depth information, thus enabling existing methods to better generalize to new test domains; the corrector operates on semantic keypoints (but is also applicable to other pose estimators) and is fully differentiable. Our second contribution is an ensemble self-training approach that simultaneously trains multiple pose estimators in a self-supervised manner. Our ensemble self-training architecture uses the robust corrector to refine the output of each pose estimator; then, it evaluates the quality of the outputs using observable correctness certificates; finally, it uses the observably correct outputs for further training, without requiring external supervision. As an additional contribution, we propose small improvements to a regression-based keypoint detection architecture, to enhance its robustness to outliers; these improvements include a robust pooling scheme and a robust centroid computation. Experiments on the YCBV and TLESS datasets show the proposed ensemble self-training outperforms fully supervised baselines while not requiring 3D annotations on real data.
summary: Real-world robotics applications demand object pose estimation methods that work reliably across a variety of scenarios. Modern learning-based approaches require large labeled datasets and tend to perform poorly outside the training domain. Our first contribution is to develop a robust corrector module that corrects pose estimates using depth information, thus enabling existing methods to better generalize to new test domains; the corrector operates on semantic keypoints (but is also applicable to other pose estimators) and is fully differentiable. Our second contribution is an ensemble self-training approach that simultaneously trains multiple pose estimators in a self-supervised manner. Our ensemble self-training architecture uses the robust corrector to refine the output of each pose estimator; then, it evaluates the quality of the outputs using observable correctness certificates; finally, it uses the observably correct outputs for further training, without requiring external supervision. As an additional contribution, we propose small improvements to a regression-based keypoint detection architecture, to enhance its robustness to outliers; these improvements include a robust pooling scheme and a robust centroid computation. Experiments on the YCBV and TLESS datasets show the proposed ensemble self-training outperforms fully supervised baselines while not requiring 3D annotations on real data.
abstract_zh: 现实世界的机器人应用需要能够在各种场景下可靠工作的物体姿态估计方法。现代基于学习的方法需要大量标记数据集，并且在训练领域之外往往表现不佳。我们的第一个贡献是开发一个强大的校正器模块，使用深度信息校正姿势估计，从而使现有方法能够更好地推广到新的测试领域；校正器对语义关键点进行操作（但也适用于其他姿势估计器）并且是完全可微分的。我们的第二个贡献是一种集成自我训练方法，它以自我监督的方式同时训练多个姿势估计器。我们的集成自训练架构使用鲁棒校正器来细化每个姿态估计器的输出；然后，它使用可观察的正确性证书评估输出的质量；最后，它使用可观察到的正确输出进行进一步训练，而不需要外部监督。作为额外的贡献，我们对基于回归的关键点检测架构提出了一些小改进，以增强其对异常值的鲁棒性；这些改进包括强大的池化方案和强大的质心计算。 YCBV 和 TLESS 数据集上的实验表明，所提出的集成自训练优于完全监督的基线，同时不需要对真实数据进行 3D 注释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过集成自训练的校正与认证方法，实现无需3D标注的自监督物体位姿估计。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的位姿估计方法依赖大量标注数据且难以泛化到新场景，需开发无需人工标注且鲁棒性强的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计基于深度信息的校正模块修正位姿估计，并结合集成自训练框架：通过校正模块优化多个估计器输出，利用可观测正确性证书筛选高质量样本进行训练，同时改进回归型关键点检测架构的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在YCBV和TLESS数据集上，所提方法在无真实3D标注情况下优于全监督基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过校正-认证机制与集成自训练有效提升了位姿估计的跨域泛化能力，为实际机器人应用提供了轻量级解决方案。

ai_content_json.result: 在YCBV和TLESS数据集上，所提方法在无真实3D标注情况下优于全监督基线方法。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法通过校正-认证机制与集成自训练有效提升了位姿估计的跨域泛化能力，为实际机器人应用提供了轻量级解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种通过集成自训练的校正与认证方法，实现无需3D标注的自监督物体位姿估计。
motivation: 现有基于学习的位姿估计方法依赖大量标注数据且难以泛化到新场景，需开发无需人工标注且鲁棒性强的解决方案。

result: 在YCBV和TLESS数据集上，所提方法在无真实3D标注情况下优于全监督基线方法。
conclusion: 该方法通过校正-认证机制与集成自训练有效提升了位姿估计的跨域泛化能力，为实际机器人应用提供了轻量级解决方案。
search_text: A Correct-and-Certify Approach to Self-Supervise Object Pose Estimators via Ensemble Self-Training 通过集成自训练进行自监督物体姿态估计的正确和验证方法 Real-world robotics applications demand object pose estimation methods that work reliably across a variety of scenarios. Modern learning-based approaches require large labeled datasets and tend to perform poorly outside the training domain. Our first contribution is to develop a robust corrector module that corrects pose estimates using depth information, thus enabling existing methods to better generalize to new test domains; the corrector operates on semantic keypoints (but is also applicable to other pose estimators) and is fully differentiable. Our second contribution is an ensemble self-training approach that simultaneously trains multiple pose estimators in a self-supervised manner. Our ensemble self-training architecture uses the robust corrector to refine the output of each pose estimator; then, it evaluates the quality of the outputs using observable correctness certificates; finally, it uses the observably correct outputs for further training, without requiring external supervision. As an additional contribution, we propose small improvements to a regression-based keypoint detection architecture, to enhance its robustness to outliers; these improvements include a robust pooling scheme and a robust centroid computation. Experiments on the YCBV and TLESS datasets show the proposed ensemble self-training outperforms fully supervised baselines while not requiring 3D annotations on real data. 现实世界的机器人应用需要能够在各种场景下可靠工作的物体姿态估计方法。现代基于学习的方法需要大量标记数据集，并且在训练领域之外往往表现不佳。我们的第一个贡献是开发一个强大的校正器模块，使用深度信息校正姿势估计，从而使现有方法能够更好地推广到新的测试领域；校正器对语义关键点进行操作（但也适用于其他姿势估计器）并且是完全可微分的。我们的第二个贡献是一种集成自我训练方法，它以自我监督的方式同时训练多个姿势估计器。我们的集成自训练架构使用鲁棒校正器来细化每个姿态估计器的输出；然后，它使用可观察的正确性证书评估输出的质量；最后，它使用可观察到的正确输出进行进一步训练，而不需要外部监督。作为额外的贡献，我们对基于回归的关键点检测架构提出了一些小改进，以增强其对异常值的鲁棒性；这些改进包括强大的池化方案和强大的质心计算。 YCBV 和 TLESS 数据集上的实验表明，所提出的集成自训练优于完全监督的基线，同时不需要对真实数据进行 3D 注释。 本文提出一种通过集成自训练的校正与认证方法，实现无需3D标注的自监督物体位姿估计。 Jingnan Shi,Rajat Talak,Dominic Maggio,Luca Carlone cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.RO

title: A Theoretical Understanding of Shallow Vision Transformers: Learning, Generalization, and Sample Complexity
title_zh: 对浅层视觉变压器的理论理解：学习、泛化和样本复杂性
abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) with self-attention modules have recently achieved great empirical success in many vision tasks. Due to non-convex interactions across layers, however, theoretical learning and generalization analysis is mostly elusive. Based on a data model characterizing both label-relevant and label-irrelevant tokens, this paper provides the first theoretical analysis of training a shallow ViT, i.e., one self-attention layer followed by a two-layer perceptron, for a classification task. We characterize the sample complexity to achieve a zero generalization error. Our sample complexity bound is positively correlated with the inverse of the fraction of label-relevant tokens, the token noise level, and the initial model error. We also prove that a training process using stochastic gradient descent (SGD) leads to a sparse attention map, which is a formal verification of the general intuition about the success of attention. Moreover, this paper indicates that a proper token sparsification can improve the test performance by removing label-irrelevant and/or noisy tokens, including spurious correlations. Empirical experiments on synthetic data and CIFAR-10 dataset justify our theoretical results and generalize to deeper ViTs.
summary: Vision Transformers (ViTs) with self-attention modules have recently achieved great empirical success in many vision tasks. Due to non-convex interactions across layers, however, theoretical learning and generalization analysis is mostly elusive. Based on a data model characterizing both label-relevant and label-irrelevant tokens, this paper provides the first theoretical analysis of training a shallow ViT, i.e., one self-attention layer followed by a two-layer perceptron, for a classification task. We characterize the sample complexity to achieve a zero generalization error. Our sample complexity bound is positively correlated with the inverse of the fraction of label-relevant tokens, the token noise level, and the initial model error. We also prove that a training process using stochastic gradient descent (SGD) leads to a sparse attention map, which is a formal verification of the general intuition about the success of attention. Moreover, this paper indicates that a proper token sparsification can improve the test performance by removing label-irrelevant and/or noisy tokens, including spurious correlations. Empirical experiments on synthetic data and CIFAR-10 dataset justify our theoretical results and generalize to deeper ViTs.
abstract_zh: 具有自注意力模块的视觉变压器（ViT）最近在许多视觉任务中取得了巨大的经验成功。然而，由于跨层的非凸交互，理论学习和泛化分析大多难以捉摸。基于表征标签相关和标签无关标记的数据模型，本文首次提供了针对分类任务训练浅层 ViT 的理论分析，即一个自注意力层后跟一个两层感知器。我们表征样本复杂性以实现零泛化误差。我们的样本复杂度界限与标签相关标记的分数的倒数、标记噪声水平和初始模型误差呈正相关。我们还证明，使用随机梯度下降（SGD）的训练过程会产生稀疏的注意力图，这是对注意力成功的一般直觉的形式验证。此外，本文指出，适当的标记稀疏化可以通过删除与标签无关和/或有噪声的标记（包括虚假相关性）来提高测试性能。对合成数据和 CIFAR-10 数据集的实证实验证明了我们的理论结果并推广到更深层次的 ViT。

AI.tldr: 本文首次对浅层视觉变换器（ViT）进行理论分析，研究其学习、泛化能力及样本复杂度，并探讨注意力机制的有效性。
AI.motivation: 尽管ViT在实践中表现出色，但其理论分析因层间非凸交互而困难，需研究浅层ViT的理论基础以理解其泛化能力及样本复杂度。
AI.method: 基于标签相关与无关token的数据模型，分析浅层ViT（自注意力层+两层感知机）的训练过程，结合SGD的稀疏性证明，以及实验验证。
AI.result: 确定了样本复杂度与标签相关token比例、噪声水平等因素的关系，证明SGD产生稀疏注意力图，验证了token稀疏化提升性能，并通过实验支持理论。
AI.conclusion: 理论分析为ViT的设计与优化提供了依据，如token选择和结构改进，实验验证了理论的广泛适用性。

title: Computation with Large Advice
title_zh: 具有大建议的计算
abstract: In this paper, we consider a new direction of computation, which we call computation with large advice. We mainly consider constant space computation with large advice in Turing machines, and prove the following facts: (i) The class of decision problems solvable by a constant space Turing machine with polynomial-size advice includes nonuniform-{\sf NC}$^1$, (ii) The class of decision problems solvable by a constant space Turing machine with quasipolynomial-size advice equals nonuniform-{\sf polyL}. The facts mean constant space computation with large advice has unexpected computational power. On the other hand, we mention bounded time computation with large advice, and attempt to propose a concept of ``algorithms with large advice''. In the proposal, advice is precomputed data for a problem and a fixed instance size, and we expect efficient algorithms by large or huge advice.
summary: In this paper, we consider a new direction of computation, which we call computation with large advice. We mainly consider constant space computation with large advice in Turing machines, and prove the following facts: (i) The class of decision problems solvable by a constant space Turing machine with polynomial-size advice includes nonuniform-{\sf NC}$^1$, (ii) The class of decision problems solvable by a constant space Turing machine with quasipolynomial-size advice equals nonuniform-{\sf polyL}. The facts mean constant space computation with large advice has unexpected computational power. On the other hand, we mention bounded time computation with large advice, and attempt to propose a concept of ``algorithms with large advice''. In the proposal, advice is precomputed data for a problem and a fixed instance size, and we expect efficient algorithms by large or huge advice.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑了一个新的计算方向，我们称之为大建议计算。我们主要考虑图灵机中具有大建议的常空间计算，并证明以下事实：（i）具有多项式大小建议的常空间图灵机可解决的决策问题类包括非均匀-{\sf NC}$^1$，（ii）具有拟多项式大小建议的常空间图灵机可解决的决策问题类等于非均匀-{\sf polyL}。事实意味着具有大建议的恒定空间计算具有意想不到的计算能力。另一方面，我们提到了具有大建议的有限时间计算，并尝试提出“具有大建议的算法”的概念。在提案中，建议是针对问题和固定实例大小预先计算的数据，我们期望通过大型或巨大的建议来实现高效的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了一种新的计算方式——利用大量建议信息的计算，并研究了其在图灵机中的计算能力。
AI.motivation: 传统计算模型中，计算资源（如空间和时间）是有限的，而本文旨在探索通过引入大量预计算的建议信息，是否能够突破这些限制并增强计算能力。
AI.method: 作者主要考虑了在图灵机中使用常量空间和大量建议信息的计算模型，并通过理论分析证明了其计算能力。
AI.result: 研究发现，使用多项式大小建议信息的常量空间图灵机可以解决非均匀NC¹类问题，而使用准多项式大小建议信息的常量空间图灵机可以解决非均匀polyL类问题。
AI.conclusion: 利用大量建议信息的计算模型具有出乎意料的计算能力，这为设计高效算法提供了新的思路。

title: Policy-Induced Self-Supervision Improves Representation Finetuning in Visual RL
title_zh: 策略诱导的自我监督改善了视觉强化学习中的表示微调
abstract: We study how to transfer representations pretrained on source tasks to target tasks in visual percept based RL. We analyze two popular approaches: freezing or finetuning the pretrained representations. Empirical studies on a set of popular tasks reveal several properties of pretrained representations. First, finetuning is required even when pretrained representations perfectly capture the information required to solve the target task. Second, finetuned representations improve learnability and are more robust to noise. Third, pretrained bottom layers are task-agnostic and readily transferable to new tasks, while top layers encode task-specific information and require adaptation. Building on these insights, we propose a self-supervised objective that clusters representations according to the policy they induce, as opposed to traditional representation similarity measures which are policy-agnostic (e.g. Euclidean norm, cosine similarity). Together with freezing the bottom layers, this objective results in significantly better representation than frozen, finetuned, and self-supervised alternatives on a wide range of benchmarks.
summary: We study how to transfer representations pretrained on source tasks to target tasks in visual percept based RL. We analyze two popular approaches: freezing or finetuning the pretrained representations. Empirical studies on a set of popular tasks reveal several properties of pretrained representations. First, finetuning is required even when pretrained representations perfectly capture the information required to solve the target task. Second, finetuned representations improve learnability and are more robust to noise. Third, pretrained bottom layers are task-agnostic and readily transferable to new tasks, while top layers encode task-specific information and require adaptation. Building on these insights, we propose a self-supervised objective that clusters representations according to the policy they induce, as opposed to traditional representation similarity measures which are policy-agnostic (e.g. Euclidean norm, cosine similarity). Together with freezing the bottom layers, this objective results in significantly better representation than frozen, finetuned, and self-supervised alternatives on a wide range of benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 我们研究如何将源任务上预训练的表征转移到基于视觉感知的强化学习中的目标任务。我们分析了两种流行的方法：冻结或微调预训练的表示。对一组流行任务的实证研究揭示了预训练表示的几个属性。首先，即使预训练的表示完美地捕获了解决目标任务所需的信息，也需要进行微调。其次，经过微调的表示提高了可学习性并且对噪声更加鲁棒。第三，预训练的底层与任务无关，并且很容易转移到新任务，而顶层对特定于任务的信息进行编码并需要适应。基于这些见解，我们提出了一个自我监督的目标，即根据其诱导的策略对表示进行聚类，而不是与策略无关的传统表示相似性度量（例如欧几里得范数、余弦相似性）。与冻结底层一起，该目标在各种基准上比冻结、微调和自我监督的替代方案具有更好的代表性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过策略诱导的自监督方法提升视觉强化学习中预训练表征的微调效果。
AI.motivation: 在基于视觉感知的强化学习中，预训练表征向目标任务迁移时面临冻结或微调的挑战，现有方法存在表征可迁移性不足、噪声鲁棒性差等问题。
AI.method: 提出基于策略诱导的自监督目标，通过聚类策略生成的表征替代传统相似性度量（如余弦相似度），并冻结底层任务无关层以提升迁移效率。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，该方法显著优于冻结、微调及传统自监督方法，表征学习效率和噪声鲁棒性均有提升。
AI.conclusion: 策略诱导的自监督方法能有效对齐表征与策略动态，为视觉强化学习中的表征迁移提供新思路。

search_text: Policy-Induced Self-Supervision Improves Representation Finetuning in Visual RL 策略诱导的自我监督改善了视觉强化学习中的表示微调 We study how to transfer representations pretrained on source tasks to target tasks in visual percept based RL. We analyze two popular approaches: freezing or finetuning the pretrained representations. Empirical studies on a set of popular tasks reveal several properties of pretrained representations. First, finetuning is required even when pretrained representations perfectly capture the information required to solve the target task. Second, finetuned representations improve learnability and are more robust to noise. Third, pretrained bottom layers are task-agnostic and readily transferable to new tasks, while top layers encode task-specific information and require adaptation. Building on these insights, we propose a self-supervised objective that clusters representations according to the policy they induce, as opposed to traditional representation similarity measures which are policy-agnostic (e.g. Euclidean norm, cosine similarity). Together with freezing the bottom layers, this objective results in significantly better representation than frozen, finetuned, and self-supervised alternatives on a wide range of benchmarks. 我们研究如何将源任务上预训练的表征转移到基于视觉感知的强化学习中的目标任务。我们分析了两种流行的方法：冻结或微调预训练的表示。对一组流行任务的实证研究揭示了预训练表示的几个属性。首先，即使预训练的表示完美地捕获了解决目标任务所需的信息，也需要进行微调。其次，经过微调的表示提高了可学习性并且对噪声更加鲁棒。第三，预训练的底层与任务无关，并且很容易转移到新任务，而顶层对特定于任务的信息进行编码并需要适应。基于这些见解，我们提出了一个自我监督的目标，即根据其诱导的策略对表示进行聚类，而不是与策略无关的传统表示相似性度量（例如欧几里得范数、余弦相似性）。与冻结底层一起，该目标在各种基准上比冻结、微调和自我监督的替代方案具有更好的代表性。 本文研究如何通过策略诱导的自监督方法提升视觉强化学习中预训练表征的微调效果。 Sébastien M. title: ASR Bundestag: A Large-Scale political debate dataset in German
title_zh: ASR Bundestag：德语的大规模政治辩论数据集
abstract: We present ASR Bundestag, a dataset for automatic speech recognition in German, consisting of 610 hours of aligned audio-transcript pairs for supervised training as well as 1,038 hours of unlabeled audio snippets for self-supervised learning, based on raw audio data and transcriptions from plenary sessions and committee meetings of the German parliament. In addition, we discuss utilized approaches for the automated creation of speech datasets and assess the quality of the resulting dataset based on evaluations and finetuning of a pre-trained state of the art model. We make the dataset publicly available, including all subsets.
summary: We present ASR Bundestag, a dataset for automatic speech recognition in German, consisting of 610 hours of aligned audio-transcript pairs for supervised training as well as 1,038 hours of unlabeled audio snippets for self-supervised learning, based on raw audio data and transcriptions from plenary sessions and committee meetings of the German parliament. In addition, we discuss utilized approaches for the automated creation of speech datasets and assess the quality of the resulting dataset based on evaluations and finetuning of a pre-trained state of the art model. We make the dataset publicly available, including all subsets.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 ASR Bundestag，这是一个用于德语自动语音识别的数据集，包含用于监督训练的 610 小时对齐音频转录对以及用于自我监督学习的 1,038 小时未标记音频片段，基于德国议会全体会议和委员会会议的原始音频数据和转录。此外，我们还讨论了自动创建语音数据集的方法，并根据对预先训练的最先进模型的评估和微调来评估结果数据集的质量。我们公开提供数据集，包括所有子集。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了ASR Bundestag数据集，包含610小时对齐的德语议会辩论音频-文本对及1,038小时未标注音频，用于自动语音识别研究。
AI.motivation: 为德语语音识别提供大规模政治辩论场景数据，支持监督学习与自监督学习，推动议会场景下的ASR模型优化。
AI.method: 基于德国议会全体会议和委员会会议的原始音频及转录文本，构建对齐数据集，并通过预训练模型微调评估数据质量。
AI.result: 数据集公开发布，实验表明其能有效提升德语ASR模型性能，验证了数据集在政治辩论场景下的适用性。
AI.conclusion: ASR Bundestag为德语语音识别研究提供了高质量基准数据，尤其适用于议会等正式辩论场景的模型训练与评估。

authors_text: Shubham Singh,Ryan P. Russell,Patrick M. Wensing
title: On Second-Order Derivatives of Rigid-Body Dynamics: Theory & Implementation
title_zh: 刚体动力学的二阶导数：理论与实现
comment: Evolved work from https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/9981356. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.01497
comments: Evolved work from https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/9981356. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.01497
abstract: Model-based control for robots has increasingly been dependent on optimization-based methods like Differential Dynamic Programming and iterative LQR (iLQR). These methods can form the basis of Model-Predictive Control (MPC), which is commonly used for controlling legged robots. Computing the partial derivatives of the dynamics is often the most expensive part of these algorithms, regardless of whether analytical methods, Finite Difference, Automatic Differentiation (AD), or Chain-Rule accumulation is used. Since the second-order derivatives of dynamics result in tensor computations, they are often ignored, leading to the use of iLQR, instead of the full second-order DDP method. In this paper, we present analytical methods to compute the second-order derivatives of inverse and forward dynamics for open-chain rigid-body systems with multi-DoF joints and fixed/floating bases. An extensive comparison of accuracy and run-time performance with AD and other methods is provided, including the consideration of code-generation techniques in C/C++ to speed up the computations. For the 36 DoF ATLAS humanoid, the second-order Inverse, and the Forward dynamics derivatives take approx 200 mu s, and approx 2.1 ms respectively, resulting in a 3x speedup over the AD approach.
summary: Model-based control for robots has increasingly been dependent on optimization-based methods like Differential Dynamic Programming and iterative LQR (iLQR). These methods can form the basis of Model-Predictive Control (MPC), which is commonly used for controlling legged robots. Computing the partial derivatives of the dynamics is often the most expensive part of these algorithms, regardless of whether analytical methods, Finite Difference, Automatic Differentiation (AD), or Chain-Rule accumulation is used. Since the second-order derivatives of dynamics result in tensor computations, they are often ignored, leading to the use of iLQR, instead of the full second-order DDP method. In this paper, we present analytical methods to compute the second-order derivatives of inverse and forward dynamics for open-chain rigid-body systems with multi-DoF joints and fixed/floating bases. An extensive comparison of accuracy and run-time performance with AD and other methods is provided, including the consideration of code-generation techniques in C/C++ to speed up the computations. For the 36 DoF ATLAS humanoid, the second-order Inverse, and the Forward dynamics derivatives take approx 200 mu s, and approx 2.1 ms respectively, resulting in a 3x speedup over the AD approach.
abstract_zh: 基于模型的机器人控制越来越依赖于基于优化的方法，例如微分动态规划和迭代 LQR (iLQR)。这些方法可以构成模型预测控制（MPC）的基础，通常用于控制腿式机器人。无论是否使用分析方法、有限差分、自动微分 (AD) 或链规则累加，计算动力学的偏导数通常是这些算法中最昂贵的部分。由于动力学的二阶导数会导致张量计算，因此它们经常被忽略，从而导致使用 iLQR，而不是完整的二阶 DDP 方法。在本文中，我们提出了计算具有多自由度关节和固定/浮动底座的开链刚体系统的逆向和正向动力学二阶导数的分析方法。提供了与 AD 和其他方法的准确性和运行时性能的广泛比较，包括考虑 C/C++ 中的代码生成技术以加速计算。对于 36 DoF ATLAS 人形机器人，二阶逆向和正向动力学导数分别需要约 200 μs 和约 2.1 ms，从而比 AD 方法加速 3 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种计算开链刚体系统二阶动力学导数的解析方法，并通过实验验证其效率。
AI.motivation: 基于模型的机器人控制依赖优化方法，但二阶导数计算因张量运算复杂度高常被忽略，导致使用iLQR而非完整DDP方法。
AI.method: 开发了多自由度关节开链系统的正逆动力学二阶导数解析计算方法，并与自动微分等技术进行精度和运行时比较，结合C/C++代码生成加速计算。
AI.result: 在36自由度ATLAS人形机器人上，二阶逆动力学导数计算耗时约200微秒，正动力学约2.1毫秒，较自动微分方法快3倍。
AI.conclusion: 解析方法在保证精度的同时显著提升计算效率，为实时模型预测控制提供了可行的二阶优化方案。

ai_content.result: 在36自由度ATLAS人形机器人上，二阶逆动力学导数计算耗时约200微秒，正动力学约2.1毫秒，较自动微分方法快3倍。
