motivation: 基于模型的机器人控制依赖优化方法，但二阶导数计算因张量运算复杂度高常被忽略，导致使用iLQR而非完整DDP方法。
method: 开发了多自由度关节开链系统的正逆动力学二阶导数解析计算方法，并与自动微分等技术进行精度和运行时比较，结合C/C++代码生成加速计算。
result: 在36自由度ATLAS人形机器人上，二阶逆动力学导数计算耗时约200微秒，正动力学约2.1毫秒，较自动微分方法快3倍。
conclusion: 解析方法在保证精度的同时显著提升计算效率，为实时模型预测控制提供了可行的二阶优化方案。
search_text: On Second-Order Derivatives of Rigid-Body Dynamics: Theory & Implementation 刚体动力学的二阶导数：理论与实现 Model-based control for robots has increasingly been dependent on optimization-based methods like Differential Dynamic Programming and iterative LQR (iLQR). These methods can form the basis of Model-Predictive Control (MPC), which is commonly used for controlling legged robots. Computing the partial derivatives of the dynamics is often the most expensive part of these algorithms, regardless of whether analytical methods, Finite Difference, Automatic Differentiation (AD), or Chain-Rule accumulation is used. Since the second-order derivatives of dynamics result in tensor computations, they are often ignored, leading to the use of iLQR, instead of the full second-order DDP method. In this paper, we present analytical methods to compute the second-order derivatives of inverse and forward dynamics for open-chain rigid-body systems with multi-DoF joints and fixed/floating bases. An extensive comparison of accuracy and run-time performance with AD and other methods is provided, including the consideration of code-generation techniques in C/C++ to speed up the computations. For the 36 DoF ATLAS humanoid, the second-order Inverse, and the Forward dynamics derivatives take approx 200 mu s, and approx 2.1 ms respectively, resulting in a 3x speedup over the AD approach. 基于模型的机器人控制越来越依赖于基于优化的方法，例如微分动态规划和迭代 LQR (iLQR)。这些方法可以构成模型预测控制（MPC）的基础，通常用于控制腿式机器人。无论是否使用分析方法、有限差分、自动微分 (AD) 或链规则累加，计算动力学的偏导数通常是这些算法中最昂贵的部分。由于动力学的二阶导数会导致张量计算，因此它们经常被忽略，从而导致使用 iLQR，而不是完整的二阶 DDP 方法。在本文中，我们提出了计算具有多自由度关节和固定/浮动底座的开链刚体系统的逆向和正向动力学二阶导数的分析方法。提供了与 AD 和其他方法的准确性和运行时性能的广泛比较，包括考虑 C/C++ 中的代码生成技术以加速计算。对于 36 DoF ATLAS 人形机器人，二阶逆向和正向动力学导数分别需要约 200 μs 和约 2.1 ms，从而比 AD 方法加速 3 倍。 本文提出了一种计算开链刚体系统二阶动力学导数的解析方法，并通过实验验证其效率。 Shubham Singh,Ryan P. Russell,Patrick M. Wensing cs.RO

authors_text: Weiyu Feng,Seth Z. Zhao,Chuanyu Pan,Adam Chang,Yichen Chen,Zekun Wang,Allen Y. Yang
title: Digital Twin Tracking Dataset (DTTD): A New RGB+Depth 3D Dataset for Longer-Range Object Tracking Applications
title_zh: 数字孪生跟踪数据集 (DTTD)：适用于长距离物体跟踪应用的全新 RGB+深度 3D 数据集
abstract: Digital twin is a problem of augmenting real objects with their digital counterparts. It can underpin a wide range of applications in augmented reality (AR), autonomy, and UI/UX. A critical component in a good digital-twin system is real-time, accurate 3D object tracking. Most existing works solve 3D object tracking through the lens of robotic grasping, employ older generations of depth sensors, and measure performance metrics that may not apply to other digital-twin applications such as in AR. In this work, we create a novel RGB-D dataset, called Digital Twin Tracking Dataset (DTTD), to enable further research of the problem and extend potential solutions towards longer ranges and mm localization accuracy. To reduce point cloud noise from the input source, we select the latest Microsoft Azure Kinect as the state-of-the-art time-of-flight (ToF) camera. In total, 103 scenes of 10 common off-the-shelf objects with rich textures are recorded, with each frame annotated with a per-pixel semantic segmentation and ground-truth object poses provided by a commercial motion capturing system. Through extensive experiments with model-level and dataset-level analysis, we demonstrate that DTTD can help researchers develop future object tracking methods and analyze new challenges. The dataset, data generation, annotation, and model evaluation pipeline are made publicly available as open source code at: https://github.com/augcog/DTTDv1.
summary: Digital twin is a problem of augmenting real objects with their digital counterparts. It can underpin a wide range of applications in augmented reality (AR), autonomy, and UI/UX. A critical component in a good digital-twin system is real-time, accurate 3D object tracking. Most existing works solve 3D object tracking through the lens of robotic grasping, employ older generations of depth sensors, and measure performance metrics that may not apply to other digital-twin applications such as in AR. In this work, we create a novel RGB-D dataset, called Digital Twin Tracking Dataset (DTTD), to enable further research of the problem and extend potential solutions towards longer ranges and mm localization accuracy. To reduce point cloud noise from the input source, we select the latest Microsoft Azure Kinect as the state-of-the-art time-of-flight (ToF) camera. In total, 103 scenes of 10 common off-the-shelf objects with rich textures are recorded, with each frame annotated with a per-pixel semantic segmentation and ground-truth object poses provided by a commercial motion capturing system. Through extensive experiments with model-level and dataset-level analysis, we demonstrate that DTTD can help researchers develop future object tracking methods and analyze new challenges. The dataset, data generation, annotation, and model evaluation pipeline are made publicly available as open source code at: https://github.com/augcog/DTTDv1.
abstract_zh: 数字孪生是一个用数字对应物增强真实物体的问题。它可以支持增强现实 (AR)、自主性和 UI/UX 领域的广泛应用。良好的数字孪生系统的关键组成部分是实时、准确的 3D 对象跟踪。大多数现有工作通过机器人抓取的镜头来解决 3D 对象跟踪问题，采用老一代的深度传感器，并测量可能不适用于 AR 等其他数字孪生应用的性能指标。在这项工作中，我们创建了一个新颖的 RGB-D 数据集，称为数字孪生跟踪数据集 (DTTD)，以便进一步研究该问题并将潜在解决方案扩展到更长的范围和毫米级定位精度。为了减少输入源的点云噪声，我们选择最新的 Microsoft Azure Kinect 作为最先进的飞行时间 (ToF) 相机。总共记录了 10 个具有丰富纹理的常见现成物体的 103 个场景，每帧都用商业运动捕捉系统提供的每像素语义分割和地面真实物体姿势进行注释。通过模型级和数据集级分析的大量实验，我们证明 DTTD 可以帮助研究人员开发未来的对象跟踪方法并分析新的挑战。数据集、数据生成、注释和模型评估管道作为开源代码公开提供，网址为：https://github.com/augcog/DTTDv1。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为DTTD的新型RGB-D数据集，用于支持更远距离和毫米级定位精度的3D物体跟踪研究。
AI.motivation: 现有3D物体跟踪研究多基于机器人抓取场景，使用老旧深度传感器且评估指标不适用于AR等数字孪生应用，缺乏适用于长距离跟踪的高质量数据集。
AI.method: 采用微软Azure Kinect ToF相机采集数据，包含103个场景的10种常见物体，提供像素级语义分割标注和商用动捕系统生成的物体姿态真值，并开源数据生成与评估流程。
AI.result: 实验表明DTTD可有效支持长距离跟踪方法研究，揭示了现有模型在远距离场景下的性能瓶颈，为后续算法改进提供基准。
AI.conclusion: DTTD数据集的公开将推动数字孪生领域在AR等场景下的3D跟踪技术发展，促进长距离高精度定位方法的研究。

title: Exploiting Graph Structured Cross-Domain Representation for Multi-Domain Recommendation
title_zh: 利用图结构化跨域表示进行多域推荐
comment: Accepted at the 45th European Conference on Information Retrieval (ECIR'23), full paper track
comments: Accepted at the 45th European Conference on Information Retrieval (ECIR'23), full paper track
abstract: Multi-domain recommender systems benefit from cross-domain representation learning and positive knowledge transfer. Both can be achieved by introducing a specific modeling of input data (i.e. disjoint history) or trying dedicated training regimes. At the same time, treating domains as separate input sources becomes a limitation as it does not capture the interplay that naturally exists between domains. In this work, we efficiently learn multi-domain representation of sequential users' interactions using graph neural networks. We use temporal intra- and inter-domain interactions as contextual information for our method called MAGRec (short for Multi-domAin Graph-based Recommender). To better capture all relations in a multi-domain setting, we learn two graph-based sequential representations simultaneously: domain-guided for recent user interest, and general for long-term interest. This approach helps to mitigate the negative knowledge transfer problem from multiple domains and improve overall representation. We perform experiments on publicly available datasets in different scenarios where MAGRec consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Furthermore, we provide an ablation study and discuss further extensions of our method.
summary: Multi-domain recommender systems benefit from cross-domain representation learning and positive knowledge transfer. Both can be achieved by introducing a specific modeling of input data (i.e. disjoint history) or trying dedicated training regimes. At the same time, treating domains as separate input sources becomes a limitation as it does not capture the interplay that naturally exists between domains. In this work, we efficiently learn multi-domain representation of sequential users' interactions using graph neural networks. We use temporal intra- and inter-domain interactions as contextual information for our method called MAGRec (short for Multi-domAin Graph-based Recommender). To better capture all relations in a multi-domain setting, we learn two graph-based sequential representations simultaneously: domain-guided for recent user interest, and general for long-term interest. This approach helps to mitigate the negative knowledge transfer problem from multiple domains and improve overall representation. We perform experiments on publicly available datasets in different scenarios where MAGRec consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Furthermore, we provide an ablation study and discuss further extensions of our method.
abstract_zh: 多领域推荐系统受益于跨领域表示学习和积极的知识转移。这两者都可以通过引入输入数据的特定模型（即不相交的历史）或尝试专用的训练制度来实现。同时，将域视为单独的输入源成为一种限制，因为它无法捕获域之间自然存在的相互作用。在这项工作中，我们使用图神经网络有效地学习顺序用户交互的多域表示。我们使用时间域内和域间交互作为我们称为 MAGRec（基于图的多域推荐器的缩写）的方法的上下文信息。为了更好地捕获多域设置中的所有关系，我们同时学习两种基于图的顺序表示：针对近期用户兴趣的域引导，以及针对长期兴趣的一般表示。这种方法有助于减轻来自多个领域的负面知识转移问题并提高整体代表性。我们在不同场景下的公开数据集上进行了实验，其中 MAGRec 始终优于最先进的方法。此外，我们提供了消融研究并讨论了我们方法的进一步扩展。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图神经网络的多领域推荐方法MAGRec，通过建模跨领域交互关系提升推荐效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将不同领域视为独立输入源，忽略了领域间的自然交互关系，导致负知识迁移问题。
AI.method: 使用图神经网络同时学习领域引导的近期兴趣表征和通用长期兴趣表征，捕捉跨领域时序交互信息。
AI.result: 在多个公开数据集上持续优于现有先进方法，消融实验证明方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过图结构建模有效缓解多领域间的负知识迁移，提升整体推荐性能。

Furthermore, we provide an ablation study and discuss further extensions of our method. 多领域推荐系统受益于跨领域表示学习和积极的知识转移。这两者都可以通过引入输入数据的特定模型（即不相交的历史）或尝试专用的训练制度来实现。同时，将域视为单独的输入源成为一种限制，因为它无法捕获域之间自然存在的相互作用。在这项工作中，我们使用图神经网络有效地学习顺序用户交互的多域表示。我们使用时间域内和域间交互作为我们称为 MAGRec（基于图的多域推荐器的缩写）的方法的上下文信息。为了更好地捕获多域设置中的所有关系，我们同时学习两种基于图的顺序表示：针对近期用户兴趣的域引导，以及针对长期兴趣的一般表示。这种方法有助于减轻来自多个领域的负面知识转移问题并提高整体代表性。我们在不同场景下的公开数据集上进行了实验，其中 MAGRec 始终优于最先进的方法。此外，我们提供了消融研究并讨论了我们方法的进一步扩展。 本文提出一种基于图神经网络的多领域推荐方法MAGRec，通过建模跨领域交互关系提升推荐效果。 Alejandro Ariza-Casabona,Bartlomiej Twardowski,Tri Kurniawan Wijaya cs.IR,cs.AI

authors_text: Shyam Sudhakaran,Miguel González-Duque,Claire Glanois,Matthias Freiberger,Elias Najarro,Sebastian Risi
title: MarioGPT: Open-Ended Text2Level Generation through Large Language Models
title_zh: MarioGPT：通过大型语言模型生成开放式 Text2Level
abstract: Procedural Content Generation (PCG) is a technique to generate complex and diverse environments in an automated way. However, while generating content with PCG methods is often straightforward, generating meaningful content that reflects specific intentions and constraints remains challenging. Furthermore, many PCG algorithms lack the ability to generate content in an open-ended manner. Recently, Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown to be incredibly effective in many diverse domains. These trained LLMs can be fine-tuned, re-using information and accelerating training for new tasks. Here, we introduce MarioGPT, a fine-tuned GPT2 model trained to generate tile-based game levels, in our case Super Mario Bros levels. MarioGPT can not only generate diverse levels, but can be text-prompted for controllable level generation, addressing one of the key challenges of current PCG techniques. As far as we know, MarioGPT is the first text-to-level model and combined with novelty search it enables the generation of diverse levels with varying play-style dynamics (i.e. player paths) and the open-ended discovery of an increasingly diverse range of content. Code available at https://github.com/shyamsn97/mario-gpt.
summary: Procedural Content Generation (PCG) is a technique to generate complex and diverse environments in an automated way. However, while generating content with PCG methods is often straightforward, generating meaningful content that reflects specific intentions and constraints remains challenging. Furthermore, many PCG algorithms lack the ability to generate content in an open-ended manner. Recently, Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown to be incredibly effective in many diverse domains. These trained LLMs can be fine-tuned, re-using information and accelerating training for new tasks. Here, we introduce MarioGPT, a fine-tuned GPT2 model trained to generate tile-based game levels, in our case Super Mario Bros levels. MarioGPT can not only generate diverse levels, but can be text-prompted for controllable level generation, addressing one of the key challenges of current PCG techniques. As far as we know, MarioGPT is the first text-to-level model and combined with novelty search it enables the generation of diverse levels with varying play-style dynamics (i.e. player paths) and the open-ended discovery of an increasingly diverse range of content. Code available at https://github.com/shyamsn97/mario-gpt.
abstract_zh: 程序内容生成（PCG）是一种以自动化方式生成复杂且多样化环境的技术。然而，虽然使用 PCG 方法生成内容通常很简单，但生成反映特定意图和约束的有意义的内容仍然具有挑战性。此外，许多 PCG 算法缺乏以开放式方式生成内容的能力。最近，大型语言模型 (LLM) 在许多不同的领域都显示出极其有效的效果。这些经过培训的法学硕士可以进行微调，重复使用信息并加速新任务的培训。在这里，我们介绍 MarioGPT，这是一种经过微调的 GPT2 模型，经过训练可以生成基于图块的游戏关卡，在我们的例子中是《超级马里奥兄弟》关卡。 MarioGPT不仅可以生成多样化的关卡，还可以通过文本提示进行可控关卡生成，解决了当前PCG技术的关键挑战之一。据我们所知，MarioGPT 是第一个文本到关卡模型，与新颖性搜索相结合，它能够生成具有不同游戏风格动态（即玩家路径）的不同关卡，以及对日益多样化的内容进行开放式发现。代码可在 https://github.com/shyamsn97/mario-gpt 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MarioGPT，一种基于大语言模型（GPT2）的文本到游戏关卡生成方法，用于自动生成《超级马里奥兄弟》风格的多样化游戏关卡。
AI.motivation: 传统过程化内容生成（PCG）方法难以兼顾内容多样性与可控性，而现有算法缺乏开放性生成能力。大语言模型在多领域表现出色，但尚未应用于文本驱动的关卡生成。
AI.method: 通过微调GPT2模型，结合文本提示实现可控的瓦片关卡生成，并引入新颖性搜索算法以提升内容多样性。
AI.result: MarioGPT可生成具有不同玩法动态（如玩家路径）的多样化关卡，实现开放式的持续内容探索。
AI.conclusion: MarioGPT是首个文本到关卡生成模型，证明了大语言模型在过程化内容生成领域的潜力，为游戏设计提供新思路。

title: Variational Integrators and Graph-Based Solvers for Multibody Dynamics in Maximal Coordinates
title_zh: 最大坐标多体动力学的变分积分器和基于图的求解器
abstract: Multibody dynamics simulators are an important tool in many fields, including learning and control for robotics. However, many existing dynamics simulators suffer from inaccuracies when dealing with constrained mechanical systems due to unsuitable integrators with bad energy behavior and problematic constraint violations, for example for contact interactions. Variational integrators are numerical discretization methods that can reduce physical inaccuracies when simulating mechanical systems, and formulating the dynamics in maximal coordinates allows for easy and numerically robust incorporation of constraints such as kinematic loops or contacts. Therefore, this article derives a variational integrator for mechanical systems with equality and inequality constraints in maximal coordinates. Additionally, efficient graph-based sparsity-exploiting algorithms for solving the integrator are provided and implemented as an open-source simulator. The evaluation of the simulator shows improved physical accuracy due to the variational integrator and the advantages of the sparse solvers. Comparisons to minimal-coordinate algorithms show improved numerical robustness and application examples of a walking robot and an exoskeleton with explicit constraints demonstrate the necessity and capabilities of maximal coordinates.
summary: Multibody dynamics simulators are an important tool in many fields, including learning and control for robotics. However, many existing dynamics simulators suffer from inaccuracies when dealing with constrained mechanical systems due to unsuitable integrators with bad energy behavior and problematic constraint violations, for example for contact interactions. Variational integrators are numerical discretization methods that can reduce physical inaccuracies when simulating mechanical systems, and formulating the dynamics in maximal coordinates allows for easy and numerically robust incorporation of constraints such as kinematic loops or contacts. Therefore, this article derives a variational integrator for mechanical systems with equality and inequality constraints in maximal coordinates. Additionally, efficient graph-based sparsity-exploiting algorithms for solving the integrator are provided and implemented as an open-source simulator. The evaluation of the simulator shows improved physical accuracy due to the variational integrator and the advantages of the sparse solvers. Comparisons to minimal-coordinate algorithms show improved numerical robustness and application examples of a walking robot and an exoskeleton with explicit constraints demonstrate the necessity and capabilities of maximal coordinates.
abstract_zh: 多体动力学模拟器是许多领域的重要工具，包括机器人的学习和控制。然而，许多现有的动力学模拟器在处理受约束的机械系统时，由于不合适的积分器具有不良的能量行为和有问题的约束违规（例如接触相互作用），因此存在不准确性。变分积分器是数值离散方法，可以在模拟机械系统时减少物理误差，并且在最大坐标中制定动力学可以轻松且在数值上稳健地结合运动学环或接触等约束。因此，本文推导了最大坐标中具有等式和不等式约束的机械系统的变分积分器。此外，还提供了用于求解积分器的高效的基于图的稀疏性利用算法，并将其实现为开源模拟器。模拟器的评估表明，由于变分积分器和稀疏求解器的优点，物理精度得到了提高。与最小坐标算法的比较表明数值鲁棒性得到了提高，步行机器人和具有明确约束的外骨骼的应用示例证明了最大坐标的必要性和能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于变分积分器和图算法的多体动力学模拟方法，用于在极大坐标系中处理约束机械系统。
AI.motivation: 现有动力学模拟器在处理约束系统时存在能量行为不佳和约束违反问题，导致物理模拟不准确，尤其在接触交互等场景下表现不足。
AI.method: 推导适用于极大坐标的变分积分器，结合基于图的稀疏性优化算法，开发开源模拟器实现高效求解。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在物理准确性、数值鲁棒性及稀疏求解效率上优于传统极小坐标算法，步行机器人和外骨骼的应用验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 变分积分器与极大坐标系结合能有效解决约束多体系统的模拟问题，开源实现为相关领域提供了实用工具。

title: Self-supervised pseudo-colorizing of masked cells
title_zh: 掩蔽细胞的自监督伪着色
comment: 14 pages, 3 figures; Published in PLOS ONE
comments: 14 pages, 3 figures; Published in PLOS ONE
abstract: Self-supervised learning, which is strikingly referred to as the dark matter of intelligence, is gaining more attention in biomedical applications of deep learning. In this work, we introduce a novel self-supervision objective for the analysis of cells in biomedical microscopy images. We propose training deep learning models to pseudo-colorize masked cells. We use a physics-informed pseudo-spectral colormap that is well suited for colorizing cell topology. Our experiments reveal that approximating semantic segmentation by pseudo-colorization is beneficial for subsequent fine-tuning on cell detection. Inspired by the recent success of masked image modeling, we additionally mask out cell parts and train to reconstruct these parts to further enrich the learned representations. We compare our pre-training method with self-supervised frameworks including contrastive learning (SimCLR), masked autoencoders (MAEs), and edge-based self-supervision. We build upon our previous work and train hybrid models for cell detection, which contain both convolutional and vision transformer modules. Our pre-training method can outperform SimCLR, MAE-like masked image modeling, and edge-based self-supervision when pre-training on a diverse set of six fluorescence microscopy datasets. Code is available at: https://github.com/roydenwa/pseudo-colorize-masked-cells

Our pre-training method can outperform SimCLR, MAE-like masked image modeling, and edge-based self-supervision when pre-training on a diverse set of six fluorescence microscopy datasets. Code is available at: https://github.com/roydenwa/pseudo-colorize-masked-cells
abstract_zh: 自监督学习被称为智能的暗物质，在深度学习的生物医学应用中越来越受到关注。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种新颖的自我监督目标，用于分析生物医学显微镜图像中的细胞。我们建议训练深度学习模型来对蒙版细胞进行伪彩色化。我们使用基于物理的伪光谱色彩图，它非常适合对细胞拓扑进行着色。我们的实验表明，通过伪彩色化近似语义分割有利于后续细胞检测的微调。受到最近成功的蒙版图像建模的启发，我们还屏蔽了细胞部分并训练重建这些部分，以进一步丰富学习到的表示。我们将我们的预训练方法与自监督框架进行比较，包括对比学习（SimCLR）、掩码自动编码器（MAE）和基于边缘的自监督。我们以之前的工作为基础，训练用于细胞检测的混合模型，其中包含卷积和视觉变换器模块。在对六个不同的荧光显微镜数据集进行预训练时，我们的预训练方法可以优于 SimCLR、类似 MAE 的掩模图像建模和基于边缘的自监督。代码位于：https://github.com/roydenwa/pseudo-colorize-masked-cells

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督伪彩色化方法，用于生物医学显微图像中被掩码细胞的分析，通过伪彩色化和部分重建提升细胞检测性能。
AI.motivation: 自监督学习在生物医学图像分析中具有潜力，但现有方法在细胞拓扑结构建模和细粒度特征学习方面存在不足，需探索更有效的预训练策略。
AI.method: 设计基于物理启发的伪谱色图伪彩色化目标，结合掩码细胞部分重建任务，对比SimCLR、MAE等自监督框架，并采用卷积神经网络与视觉Transformer混合模型进行细胞检测。
AI.result: 在六个荧光显微图像数据集上，该预训练方法在细胞检测任务中优于对比的自监督方法，证明了伪彩色化与掩码重建的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 伪彩色化联合掩码重建的自监督预训练策略能有效提升细胞检测性能，为生物医学图像分析提供新的预训练范式。

search_text: Self-supervised pseudo-colorizing of masked cells 掩蔽细胞的自监督伪着色 Self-supervised learning, which is strikingly referred to as the dark matter of intelligence, is gaining more attention in biomedical applications of deep learning. In this work, we introduce a novel self-supervision objective for the analysis of cells in biomedical microscopy images. We propose training deep learning models to pseudo-colorize masked cells. We use a physics-informed pseudo-spectral colormap that is well suited for colorizing cell topology. Our experiments reveal that approximating semantic segmentation by pseudo-colorization is beneficial for subsequent fine-tuning on cell detection. Inspired by the recent success of masked image modeling, we additionally mask out cell parts and train to reconstruct these parts to further enrich the learned representations. We compare our pre-training method with self-supervised frameworks including contrastive learning (SimCLR), masked autoencoders (MAEs), and edge-based self-supervision. We build upon our previous work and train hybrid models for cell detection, which contain both convolutional and vision transformer modules. Our pre-training method can outperform SimCLR, MAE-like masked image modeling, and edge-based self-supervision when pre-training on a diverse set of six fluorescence microscopy datasets. Code is available at: https://github.com/roydenwa/pseudo-colorize-masked-cells 自监督学习被称为智能的暗物质，在深度学习的生物医学应用中越来越受到关注。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种新颖的自我监督目标，用于分析生物医学显微镜图像中的细胞。我们建议训练深度学习模型来对蒙版细胞进行伪彩色化。我们使用基于物理的伪光谱色彩图，它非常适合对细胞拓扑进行着色。我们的实验表明，通过伪彩色化近似语义分割有利于后续细胞检测的微调。受到最近成功的蒙版图像建模的启发，我们还屏蔽了细胞部分并训练重建这些部分，以进一步丰富学习到的表示。我们将我们的预训练方法与自监督框架进行比较，包括对比学习（SimCLR）、掩码自动编码器（MAE）和基于边缘的自监督。我们以之前的工作为基础，训练用于细胞检测的混合模型，其中包含卷积和视觉变换器模块。在对六个不同的荧光显微镜数据集进行预训练时，我们的预训练方法可以优于 SimCLR、类似 MAE 的掩模图像建模和基于边缘的自监督。代码位于：https://github.com/roydenwa/pseudo-colorize-masked-cells 本文提出一种自监督伪彩色化方法，用于生物医学显微图像中被掩码细胞的分析，通过伪彩色化和部分重建提升细胞检测性能。 Royden Wagner,Carlos Fernandez Lopez,Christoph Stiller cs.CV

title: Infinite Lewis Weights in Spectral Graph Theory
title_zh: 谱图论中的无限路易斯权重
abstract: We study the spectral implications of re-weighting a graph by the $\ell_\infty$-Lewis weights of its edges. Our main motivation is the ER-Minimization problem (Saberi et al., SIAM'08): Given an undirected graph $G$, the goal is to find positive normalized edge-weights $w\in \mathbb{R}_+^m$ which minimize the sum of pairwise \emph{effective-resistances} of $G_w$ (Kirchhoff's index). By contrast, $\ell_\infty$-Lewis weights minimize the \emph{maximum} effective-resistance of \emph{edges}, but are much cheaper to approximate, especially for Laplacians. With this algorithmic motivation, we study the ER-approximation ratio obtained by Lewis weights. Our first main result is that $\ell_\infty$-Lewis weights provide a constant ($\approx 3.12$) approximation for ER-minimization on \emph{trees}. The proof introduces a new technique, a local polarization process for effective-resistances ($\ell_2$-congestion) on trees, which is of independent interest in electrical network analysis. For general graphs, we prove an upper bound $α(G)$ on the approximation ratio obtained by Lewis weights, which is always $\leq \min\{ \text{diam}(G), κ(L_{w_\infty})\}$, where $κ$ is the condition number of the weighted Laplacian. All our approximation algorithms run in \emph{input-sparsity} time $\tilde{O}(m)$, a major improvement over Saberi et al.'s $O(m^{3.5})$ SDP for exact ER-minimization. Finally, we demonstrate the favorable effects of $\ell_\infty$-LW reweighting on the \emph{spectral-gap} of graphs and on their \emph{spectral-thinness} (Anari and Gharan, 2015). En-route to our results, we prove a weighted analogue of Mohar's classical bound on $λ_2(G)$, and provide a new characterization of leverage-scores of a matrix, as the gradient (w.r.t weights) of the volume of the enclosing ellipsoid.
summary: We study the spectral implications of re-weighting a graph by the $\ell_\infty$-Lewis weights of its edges. Our main motivation is the ER-Minimization problem (Saberi et al., SIAM'08): Given an undirected graph $G$, the goal is to find positive normalized edge-weights $w\in \mathbb{R}_+^m$ which minimize the sum of pairwise \emph{effective-resistances} of $G_w$ (Kirchhoff's index). By contrast, $\ell_\infty$-Lewis weights minimize the \emph{maximum} effective-resistance of \emph{edges}, but are much cheaper to approximate, especially for Laplacians. With this algorithmic motivation, we study the ER-approximation ratio obtained by Lewis weights. Our first main result is that $\ell_\infty$-Lewis weights provide a constant ($\approx 3.12$) approximation for ER-minimization on \emph{trees}. The proof introduces a new technique, a local polarization process for effective-resistances ($\ell_2$-congestion) on trees, which is of independent interest in electrical network analysis. For general graphs, we prove an upper bound $α(G)$ on the approximation ratio obtained by Lewis weights, which is always $\leq \min\{ \text{diam}(G), κ(L_{w_\infty})\}$, where $κ$ is the condition number of the weighted Laplacian. All our approximation algorithms run in \emph{input-sparsity} time $\tilde{O}(m)$, a major improvement over Saberi et al.'s $O(m^{3.5})$ SDP for exact ER-minimization. Finally, we demonstrate the favorable effects of $\ell_\infty$-LW reweighting on the \emph{spectral-gap} of graphs and on their \emph{spectral-thinness} (Anari and Gharan, 2015). En-route to our results, we prove a weighted analogue of Mohar's classical bound on $λ_2(G)$, and provide a new characterization of leverage-scores of a matrix, as the gradient (w.r.t weights) of the volume of the enclosing ellipsoid.
abstract_zh: 我们研究通过边的 $\ell_\infty$-Lewis 权重重新加权图的谱含义。我们的主要动机是 ER 最小化问题（Saberi 等人，SIAM'08）：给定一个无向图 $G$，目标是找到正归一化边权重 $w\in \mathbb{R}_+^m$，从而最小化 $G_w$（基尔霍夫指数）的成对 \emph{有效电阻} 之和。相比之下， $\ell_\infty$-Lewis 权重最小化了 \emph{edges} 的 \emph{maximum} 有效电阻，但近似起来要便宜得多，尤其是对于拉普拉斯算子。带着这种算法动机，我们研究了通过 Lewis 权重获得的 ER 近似比。我们的第一个主要结果是 $\ell_\infty$-Lewis 权重为 \emph{trees} 上的 ER 最小化提供了一个常数（$\approx 3.12$）近似值。该证明引入了一种新技术，即树上有效电阻（$\ell_2$-congestion）的局部极化过程，这在电网分析中具有独立的意义。对于一般图，我们证明了路易斯权重获得的近似比的上限 $α(G)$，该上限始终为 $\leq \min\{ \text{diam}(G), κ(L_{w_\infty})\}$，其中 $κ$ 是加权拉普拉斯的条件数。我们所有的近似算法都在 \emph{input-sparsity} 时间内运行 $\tilde{O}(m)$，这是对 Saberi 等人用于精确 ER 最小化的 $O(m^{3.5})$ SDP 的重大改进。最后，我们证明了 $\ell_\infty$-LW 重新加权对图的 \emph{spectral-gap} 及其 \emph{spectral-thinness} 的有利影响（Anari 和 Gharan，2015）。在获得结果的过程中，我们证明了 $λ_2(G)$ 上莫哈尔经典界限的加权模拟，并提供了矩阵杠杆分数的新表征，即封闭椭球体体积的梯度（w.r.t 权重）。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了使用ℓ∞-Lewis权重对图进行重加权的谱影响，特别是在有效电阻最小化问题上的近似效果。
AI.motivation: 解决有效电阻（ER）最小化问题时，传统方法计算复杂度高，而ℓ∞-Lewis权重能更高效地近似最小化最大有效电阻。
AI.method: 引入局部极化过程分析树结构的有效电阻，结合输入稀疏时间算法，推导一般图的近似比上界并分析谱性质。
AI.result: 在树上实现约3.12的常数近似比，一般图近似比上界与图直径及拉普拉斯矩阵条件数相关，算法时间复杂度降至Õ(m)。
AI.conclusion: ℓ∞-Lewis重加权在ER近似及提升图谱隙、谱薄度方面表现优越，为谱图理论提供新工具与高效算法。

title: Computing Truncated Metric Dimension of Trees
title_zh: 计算树的截断公制维度
abstract: Let $G=(V,E)$ be a simple, unweighted, connected graph. Let $d(u,v)$ denote the distance between vertices $u,v$. A resolving set of $G$ is a subset $S$ of $V$ such that knowing the distance from a vertex $v$ to every vertex in $S$ uniquely identifies $v$. The metric dimension of $G$ is defined as the size of the smallest resolving set of $G$. We define the $k$-truncated resolving set and $k$-truncated metric dimension of a graph similarly, but with the notion of distance replaced with $d_k(u,v) := \min(d(u,v),k+1)$. In this paper, we demonstrate that computing $k$-truncated dimension of trees is NP-Hard for general $k$. We then present a polynomial-time algorithm to compute $k$-truncated dimension of trees when $k$ is a fixed constant.
summary: Let $G=(V,E)$ be a simple, unweighted, connected graph. Let $d(u,v)$ denote the distance between vertices $u,v$. A resolving set of $G$ is a subset $S$ of $V$ such that knowing the distance from a vertex $v$ to every vertex in $S$ uniquely identifies $v$. The metric dimension of $G$ is defined as the size of the smallest resolving set of $G$. We define the $k$-truncated resolving set and $k$-truncated metric dimension of a graph similarly, but with the notion of distance replaced with $d_k(u,v) := \min(d(u,v),k+1)$. In this paper, we demonstrate that computing $k$-truncated dimension of trees is NP-Hard for general $k$. We then present a polynomial-time algorithm to compute $k$-truncated dimension of trees when $k$ is a fixed constant.
abstract_zh: 令 $G=(V,E)$ 为一个简单的、未加权的连通图。让 $d(u,v)$ 表示顶点 $u,v$ 之间的距离。 $G$ 的解析集是 $V$ 的子集 $S$，这样知道从顶点 $v$ 到 $S$ 中每个顶点的距离就可以唯一地标识 $v$。 $G$ 的度量维度定义为 $G$ 的最小解析集的大小。我们类似地定义图的 $k$-截断解析集和 $k$-截断度量维度，但用 $d_k(u,v) := \min(d(u,v),k+1)$ 替换距离概念。在本文中，我们证明了计算树的 $k$ 截断维度对于一般 $k$ 来说是 NP-Hard。然后，当 $k$ 是固定常数时，我们提出了一种多项式时间算法来计算树的 $k$ 截断维度。

AI.tldr: 研究树的k-截断度量维度的计算问题，证明其NP难性并提出固定k时的多项式算法
AI.motivation: 传统度量维度计算复杂度高，截断版本可能在实际应用中更高效，且有助于理解问题复杂度
AI.method: 通过证明NP难性，并设计动态规划或树形结构分解的算法，针对固定k的情况
AI.result: 证明计算树的k-截断维度是NP难的，且当k为固定常数时存在多项式时间算法
AI.conclusion: 为树结构的截断度量维度问题提供了理论基础，区分了不同k值下的计算复杂度

authors_text: Yanheng Li,Lin Luoying,Xinyan Li,Yaxuan Mao,Ray Lc
title: "Nice to meet you!": Expressing Emotions with Movement Gestures and Textual Content in Automatic Handwriting Robots
title_zh: “很高兴见到你！”：自动手写机器人通过动作手势和文字内容表达情感
abstract: Text-writing robots have been used in assistive writing and drawing applications. However, robots do not convey emotional tones in the writing process due to the lack of behaviors humans typically adopt. To examine how people interpret designed robotic expressions of emotion through both movements and textual output, we used a pen-plotting robot to generate texts by performing human-like behaviors like stop-and-go, speed, and pressure variation. We examined how people convey emotion in the writing process by observing how they wrote in different emotional contexts. We then mapped these human expressions during writing to the handwriting robot and measured how well other participants understood the robot's affective expression. We found that textual output was the strongest determinant of participants' ability to perceive the robot's emotions, whereas parameters of gestural movements of the robots like speed, fluency, pressure, size, and acceleration could be useful for understanding the context of the writing expression.
summary: Text-writing robots have been used in assistive writing and drawing applications. However, robots do not convey emotional tones in the writing process due to the lack of behaviors humans typically adopt. To examine how people interpret designed robotic expressions of emotion through both movements and textual output, we used a pen-plotting robot to generate texts by performing human-like behaviors like stop-and-go, speed, and pressure variation. We examined how people convey emotion in the writing process by observing how they wrote in different emotional contexts. We then mapped these human expressions during writing to the handwriting robot and measured how well other participants understood the robot's affective expression. We found that textual output was the strongest determinant of participants' ability to perceive the robot's emotions, whereas parameters of gestural movements of the robots like speed, fluency, pressure, size, and acceleration could be useful for understanding the context of the writing expression.
abstract_zh: 文本书写机器人已用于辅助书写和绘图应用。然而，由于缺乏人类通常采取的行为，机器人在写作过程中无法传达情感基调。为了研究人们如何通过动作和文本输出来解释设计的机器人情感表达，我们使用笔绘图机器人通过执行类似人类的行为（如走走停停、速度和压力变化）来生成文本。我们通过观察人们在不同情感背景下的写作方式来研究人们在写作过程中如何表达情感。然后，我们将书写过程中的这些人类表情映射到手写机器人上，并测量其他参与者对机器人情感表达的理解程度。我们发现，文本输出是参与者感知机器人情绪的能力的最强决定因素，而机器人手势运动的参数，如速度、流畅度、压力、大小和加速度，可能有助于理解书写表达的上下文。

AI.tldr: 研究如何通过自动书写机器人的运动手势和文本内容表达情感，并测试人类对机器人情感表达的感知能力。
AI.motivation: 现有书写机器人缺乏人类书写时的情感表达行为，无法有效传递情感语调，需探索机器人通过运动与文本结合表达情感的可行性。
AI.method: 使用绘图机器人模拟人类书写行为（如速度、压力变化），生成带有情感倾向的文本，并通过实验观察参与者对机器人情感表达的理解程度。
AI.result: 文本内容是参与者感知机器人情感的最关键因素，而机器人运动参数（速度、流畅度等）可辅助理解情感表达的上下文。
AI.conclusion: 情感表达需优先通过文本内容传递，但结合运动参数可增强机器人书写的情感表现力与情境理解。

authors_text: Gramoz Goranci,Monika Henzinger,Danupon Nanongkai,Thatchaphol Saranurak,Mikkel Thorup,Christian Wulff-Nilsen
title: Fully Dynamic Exact Edge Connectivity in Sublinear Time
title_zh: 亚线性时间内的完全动态精确边缘连接
comment: corrected the runtime of the algorithm based on expander decompositions
comments: corrected the runtime of the algorithm based on expander decompositions
abstract: Given a simple $n$-vertex, $m$-edge graph $G$ undergoing edge insertions and deletions, we give two new fully dynamic algorithms for exactly maintaining the edge connectivity of $G$ in $\tilde{O}(n)$ worst-case update time and $\tilde{O}(m^{1-1/31})$ amortized update time, respectively. Prior to our work, all dynamic edge connectivity algorithms either assumed bounded edge connectivity, guaranteed approximate solutions, or were restricted to edge insertions only. Our results provide an affirmative answer to an open question posed by Thorup [Combinatorica'07].
summary: Given a simple $n$-vertex, $m$-edge graph $G$ undergoing edge insertions and deletions, we give two new fully dynamic algorithms for exactly maintaining the edge connectivity of $G$ in $\tilde{O}(n)$ worst-case update time and $\tilde{O}(m^{1-1/31})$ amortized update time, respectively. Prior to our work, all dynamic edge connectivity algorithms either assumed bounded edge connectivity, guaranteed approximate solutions, or were restricted to edge insertions only. Our results provide an affirmative answer to an open question posed by Thorup [Combinatorica'07].
abstract_zh: 给定一个简单的 $n$-顶点、$m$-边图 $G$ 进行边插入和删除，我们给出了两种新的完全动态算法，分别在 $\tilde{O}(n)$ 最坏情况更新时间和 $\tilde{O}(m^{1-1/31})$ 摊销更新时间中精确维护 $G$ 的边连通性。在我们的工作之前，所有动态边缘连接算法要么假设有界边缘连接，保证近似解，要么仅限于边缘插入。我们的结果为 Thorup [Combinatorica'07] 提出的开放性问题提供了肯定的答案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种全新算法，在子线性时间内精确维护动态图的边连通性。
AI.motivation: 现有动态边连通性算法存在限制，如需假设边连通性上限、仅支持插入操作或只能提供近似解。
AI.method: 设计两种全动态算法，分别实现~O(n)最坏情况更新时间和~O(m^{1-1/31})摊还更新时间。
AI.result: 首次实现无需边连通性假设的精确动态边连通性维护，解决Thorup提出的开放性问题。
AI.conclusion: 突破性地提供精确动态边连通性解决方案，填补了该领域的重要研究空白。

authors_text: Lee Martie,Jessie Rosenberg,Veronique Demers,Gaoyuan Zhang,Onkar Bhardwaj,John Henning,Aditya Prasad,Matt Stallone,Ja Young Lee,Lucy Yip,Damilola Adesina,Elahe Paikari,Oscar Resendiz,Sarah Shaw,David Cox
title: Rapid Development of Compositional AI
title_zh: 组合式AI的快速发展
abstract: Compositional AI systems, which combine multiple artificial intelligence components together with other application components to solve a larger problem, have no known pattern of development and are often approached in a bespoke and ad hoc style. This makes development slower and harder to reuse for future applications. To support the full rapid development cycle of compositional AI applications, we have developed a novel framework called (Bee)* (written as a regular expression and pronounced as "beestar"). We illustrate how (Bee)* supports building integrated, scalable, and interactive compositional AI applications with a simplified developer experience.
summary: Compositional AI systems, which combine multiple artificial intelligence components together with other application components to solve a larger problem, have no known pattern of development and are often approached in a bespoke and ad hoc style. This makes development slower and harder to reuse for future applications. To support the full rapid development cycle of compositional AI applications, we have developed a novel framework called (Bee)* (written as a regular expression and pronounced as "beestar"). We illustrate how (Bee)* supports building integrated, scalable, and interactive compositional AI applications with a simplified developer experience.

search_text: Rapid Development of Compositional AI 组合式AI的快速发展 Compositional AI systems, which combine multiple artificial intelligence components together with other application components to solve a larger problem, have no known pattern of development and are often approached in a bespoke and ad hoc style. This makes development slower and harder to reuse for future applications. To support the full rapid development cycle of compositional AI applications, we have developed a novel framework called (Bee)* (written as a regular expression and pronounced as "beestar"). We illustrate how (Bee)* supports building integrated, scalable, and interactive compositional AI applications with a simplified developer experience. 组合式人工智能系统将多个人工智能组件与其他应用程序组件组合在一起以解决更大的问题，没有已知的开发模式，并且通常以定制和临时的方式进行处理。这使得开发速度变慢，并且更难以为未来的应用程序重用。为了支持组合式人工智能应用程序的完整快速开发周期，我们开发了一个名为 (Bee)* 的新颖框架（写为正则表达式，发音为“beestar”）。我们说明 (Bee)* 如何支持构建集成、可扩展和交互式组合 AI 应用程序，并提供简化的开发人员体验。 开发名为(Bee)*的框架以支持组合式AI应用的快速开发 Lee Martie,Jessie Rosenberg,Veronique Demers,Gaoyuan Zhang,Onkar Bhardwaj,John Henning,Aditya Prasad,Matt Stallone,Ja Young Lee,Lucy Yip,Damilola Adesina,Elahe Paikari,Oscar Resendiz,Sarah Shaw,David Cox cs.SE,cs.AI

authors_text: Yicheng Xiao,Yue Ma,Shuyan Li,Hantao Zhou,Ran Liao,Xiu Li
title: SemanticAC: Semantics-Assisted Framework for Audio Classification
title_zh: SemanticAC：音频分类语义辅助框架
abstract: In this paper, we propose SemanticAC, a semantics-assisted framework for Audio Classification to better leverage the semantic information. Unlike conventional audio classification methods that treat class labels as discrete vectors, we employ a language model to extract abundant semantics from labels and optimize the semantic consistency between audio signals and their labels. We verify that simple textual information from labels and advanced pretraining models enable more abundant semantic supervision for better performance. Specifically, we design a text encoder to capture the semantic information from the text extension of labels. Then we map the audio signals to align with the semantics of corresponding class labels via an audio encoder and a similarity calculation module so as to enforce the semantic consistency. Extensive experiments on two audio datasets, ESC-50 and US8K demonstrate that our proposed method consistently outperforms the compared audio classification methods.
summary: In this paper, we propose SemanticAC, a semantics-assisted framework for Audio Classification to better leverage the semantic information. Unlike conventional audio classification methods that treat class labels as discrete vectors, we employ a language model to extract abundant semantics from labels and optimize the semantic consistency between audio signals and their labels. We verify that simple textual information from labels and advanced pretraining models enable more abundant semantic supervision for better performance. Specifically, we design a text encoder to capture the semantic information from the text extension of labels. Then we map the audio signals to align with the semantics of corresponding class labels via an audio encoder and a similarity calculation module so as to enforce the semantic consistency. Extensive experiments on two audio datasets, ESC-50 and US8K demonstrate that our proposed method consistently outperforms the compared audio classification methods.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 SemanticAC，一种用于音频分类的语义辅助框架，以更好地利用语义信息。与将类别标签视为离散向量的传统音频分类方法不同，我们采用语言模型从标签中提取丰富的语义，并优化音频信号与其标签之间的语义一致性。我们验证了来自标签的简单文本信息和高级预训练模型可以实现更丰富的语义监督，从而获得更好的性能。具体来说，我们设计了一个文本编码器来从标签的文本扩展中捕获语义信息。然后，我们通过音频编码器和相似度计算模块将音频信号映射为与相应类标签的语义对齐，以强制语义一致性。对两个音频数据集 ESC-50 和 US8K 的大量实验表明，我们提出的方法始终优于比较的音频分类方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种利用语义信息辅助的音频分类框架SemanticAC，通过增强音频信号与标签间的语义一致性提升分类性能。
AI.motivation: 传统音频分类方法未充分利用标签的语义信息，通过引入语言模型提取标签语义可提供更丰富的监督信息以提升性能。
AI.method: 设计文本编码器提取标签语义，通过音频编码器和相似度模块对齐音频特征与标签语义，强制语义一致性。
AI.result: 在ESC-50和US8K数据集上实验表明，该方法持续优于现有音频分类方法。
AI.conclusion: 语义辅助框架能有效提升音频分类性能，凸显语义信息在分类任务中的重要性。

authors_text: Yawen Cui,Zitong Yu,Rizhao Cai,Xun Wang,Alex C. Kot,Li Liu
title: Generalized Few-Shot Continual Learning with Contrastive Mixture of Adapters
title_zh: 具有适配器对比混合的广义少样本持续学习
comment: Submitted to International Journal of Computer Vision (IJCV)
comments: Submitted to International Journal of Computer Vision (IJCV)
abstract: The goal of Few-Shot Continual Learning (FSCL) is to incrementally learn novel tasks with limited labeled samples and preserve previous capabilities simultaneously, while current FSCL methods are all for the class-incremental purpose. Moreover, the evaluation of FSCL solutions is only the cumulative performance of all encountered tasks, but there is no work on exploring the domain generalization ability. Domain generalization is a challenging yet practical task that aims to generalize beyond training domains. In this paper, we set up a Generalized FSCL (GFSCL) protocol involving both class- and domain-incremental situations together with the domain generalization assessment. Firstly, two benchmark datasets and protocols are newly arranged, and detailed baselines are provided for this unexplored configuration. We find that common continual learning methods have poor generalization ability on unseen domains and cannot better cope with the catastrophic forgetting issue in cross-incremental tasks. In this way, we further propose a rehearsal-free framework based on Vision Transformer (ViT) named Contrastive Mixture of Adapters (CMoA). Due to different optimization targets of class increment and domain increment, the CMoA contains two parts: (1) For the class-incremental issue, the Mixture of Adapters (MoA) module is incorporated into ViT, then cosine similarity regularization and the dynamic weighting are designed to make each adapter learn specific knowledge and concentrate on particular classes. (2) For the domain-related issues and domain-invariant representation learning, we alleviate the inner-class variation by prototype-calibrated contrastive learning. The codes and protocols are available at https://github.com/yawencui/CMoA.
summary: The goal of Few-Shot Continual Learning (FSCL) is to incrementally learn novel tasks with limited labeled samples and preserve previous capabilities simultaneously, while current FSCL methods are all for the class-incremental purpose. Moreover, the evaluation of FSCL solutions is only the cumulative performance of all encountered tasks, but there is no work on exploring the domain generalization ability. Domain generalization is a challenging yet practical task that aims to generalize beyond training domains. In this paper, we set up a Generalized FSCL (GFSCL) protocol involving both class- and domain-incremental situations together with the domain generalization assessment. Firstly, two benchmark datasets and protocols are newly arranged, and detailed baselines are provided for this unexplored configuration. We find that common continual learning methods have poor generalization ability on unseen domains and cannot better cope with the catastrophic forgetting issue in cross-incremental tasks. In this way, we further propose a rehearsal-free framework based on Vision Transformer (ViT) named Contrastive Mixture of Adapters (CMoA). Due to different optimization targets of class increment and domain increment, the CMoA contains two parts: (1) For the class-incremental issue, the Mixture of Adapters (MoA) module is incorporated into ViT, then cosine similarity regularization and the dynamic weighting are designed to make each adapter learn specific knowledge and concentrate on particular classes. (2) For the domain-related issues and domain-invariant representation learning, we alleviate the inner-class variation by prototype-calibrated contrastive learning. The codes and protocols are available at https://github.com/yawencui/CMoA.
abstract_zh: 少样本连续学习（FSCL）的目标是用有限的标记样本增量学习新任务，同时保留以前的能力，而当前的 FSCL 方法都是为了类增量的目的。而且，FSCL解决方案的评估只是所有遇到的任务的累积性能，而没有探索领域泛化能力的工作。领域泛化是一项具有挑战性但又实用的任务，旨在泛化到训练领域之外。在本文中，我们建立了一个广义 FSCL（GFSCL）协议，涉及类和域增量情况以及域泛化评估。首先，新安排了两个基准数据集和协议，并为这种未探索的配置提供了详细的基线。我们发现常见的持续学习方法对未见领域的泛化能力较差，无法更好地应对交叉增量任务中的灾难性遗忘问题。这样，我们进一步提出了一种基于 Vision Transformer (ViT) 的免排演框架，名为 Contrastive Mixture of Adapters (CMoA)。由于类增量和域增量的优化目标不同，CMoA包含两个部分：（1）针对类增量问题，将适配器混合（MoA）模块纳入ViT中，然后设计余弦相似度正则化和动态权重，使每个适配器学习特定知识并专注于特定类。 （2）对于领域相关问题和领域不变表示学习，我们通过原型校准对比学习来减轻类内变化。代码和协议可在 https://github.com/yawencui/CMoA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通用的小样本持续学习框架（GFSCL），结合类别增量和领域增量，通过对比混合适配器（CMoA）解决领域泛化和灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 现有小样本持续学习方法仅关注类别增量，缺乏对领域泛化能力的评估，导致在未见领域表现差且无法有效应对跨增量任务中的灾难性遗忘。
AI.method: 基于ViT设计无回放框架CMoA，包含两部分：1) 通过混合适配器模块（MoA）结合余弦相似度正则化和动态加权，使适配器专注特定类别；2) 利用原型校准对比学习减少类内差异，学习领域不变表示。
AI.result: 在新构建的基准数据集上，传统持续学习方法在领域泛化和跨增量任务中表现不佳，而CMoA在GFSCL任务中显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: CMoA通过结合类别与领域增量的联合优化，有效提升了小样本持续学习的领域泛化能力，为通用FSCL提供了新框架。

Firstly, two benchmark datasets and protocols are newly arranged, and detailed baselines are provided for this unexplored configuration. We find that common continual learning methods have poor generalization ability on unseen domains and cannot better cope with the catastrophic forgetting issue in cross-incremental tasks. In this way, we further propose a rehearsal-free framework based on Vision Transformer (ViT) named Contrastive Mixture of Adapters (CMoA). Due to different optimization targets of class increment and domain increment, the CMoA contains two parts: (1) For the class-incremental issue, the Mixture of Adapters (MoA) module is incorporated into ViT, then cosine similarity regularization and the dynamic weighting are designed to make each adapter learn specific knowledge and concentrate on particular classes. (2) For the domain-related issues and domain-invariant representation learning, we alleviate the inner-class variation by prototype-calibrated contrastive learning. The codes and protocols are available at https://github.com/yawencui/CMoA. 少样本连续学习（FSCL）的目标是用有限的标记样本增量学习新任务，同时保留以前的能力，而当前的 FSCL 方法都是为了类增量的目的。而且，FSCL解决方案的评估只是所有遇到的任务的累积性能，而没有探索领域泛化能力的工作。领域泛化是一项具有挑战性但又实用的任务，旨在泛化到训练领域之外。在本文中，我们建立了一个广义 FSCL（GFSCL）协议，涉及类和域增量情况以及域泛化评估。首先，新安排了两个基准数据集和协议，并为这种未探索的配置提供了详细的基线。我们发现常见的持续学习方法对未见领域的泛化能力较差，无法更好地应对交叉增量任务中的灾难性遗忘问题。这样，我们进一步提出了一种基于 Vision Transformer (ViT) 的免排演框架，名为 Contrastive Mixture of Adapters (CMoA)。由于类增量和域增量的优化目标不同，CMoA包含两个部分：（1）针对类增量问题，将适配器混合（MoA）模块纳入ViT中，然后设计余弦相似度正则化和动态权重，使每个适配器学习特定知识并专注于特定类。 （2）对于领域相关问题和领域不变表示学习，我们通过原型校准对比学习来减轻类内变化。代码和协议可在 https://github.com/yawencui/CMoA 获取。 本文提出了一种通用的小样本持续学习框架（GFSCL），结合类别增量和领域增量，通过对比混合适配器（CMoA）解决领域泛化和灾难性遗忘问题。 Yawen Cui,Zitong Yu,Rizhao Cai,Xun Wang,Alex C. Kot,Li Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Tianyi Bai,Yang Li,Yu Shen,Xinyi Zhang,Wentao Zhang,Bin Cui
title: Transfer Learning for Bayesian Optimization: A Survey
title_zh: 贝叶斯优化的迁移学习：一项调查
abstract: A wide spectrum of design and decision problems, including parameter tuning, A/B testing and drug design, intrinsically are instances of black-box optimization. Bayesian optimization (BO) is a powerful tool that models and optimizes such expensive "black-box" functions. However, at the beginning of optimization, vanilla Bayesian optimization methods often suffer from slow convergence issue due to inaccurate modeling based on few trials. To address this issue, researchers in the BO community propose to incorporate the spirit of transfer learning to accelerate optimization process, which could borrow strength from the past tasks (source tasks) to accelerate the current optimization problem (target task). This survey paper first summarizes transfer learning methods for Bayesian optimization from four perspectives: initial points design, search space design, surrogate model, and acquisition function. Then it highlights its methodological aspects and technical details for each approach. Finally, it showcases a wide range of applications and proposes promising future directions.
summary: A wide spectrum of design and decision problems, including parameter tuning, A/B testing and drug design, intrinsically are instances of black-box optimization. Bayesian optimization (BO) is a powerful tool that models and optimizes such expensive "black-box" functions. However, at the beginning of optimization, vanilla Bayesian optimization methods often suffer from slow convergence issue due to inaccurate modeling based on few trials. To address this issue, researchers in the BO community propose to incorporate the spirit of transfer learning to accelerate optimization process, which could borrow strength from the past tasks (source tasks) to accelerate the current optimization problem (target task). This survey paper first summarizes transfer learning methods for Bayesian optimization from four perspectives: initial points design, search space design, surrogate model, and acquisition function. Then it highlights its methodological aspects and technical details for each approach. Finally, it showcases a wide range of applications and proposes promising future directions.
abstract_zh: 各种设计和决策问题，包括参数调整、A/B 测试和药物设计，本质上都是黑盒优化的实例。贝叶斯优化 (BO) 是一种强大的工具，可以对此类昂贵的“黑匣子”函数进行建模和优化。然而，在优化开始时，由于基于少量试验的建模不准确，普通贝叶斯优化方法经常会遇到收敛速度慢的问题。针对这个问题，BO社区的研究人员提出结合迁移学习的精神来加速优化过程，可以借用过去的任务（源任务）的力量来加速当前的优化问题（目标任务）。本文首先从初始点设计、搜索空间设计、代理模型和获取函数四个角度总结了贝叶斯优化的迁移学习方法。然后它强调了每种方法的方法论方面和技术细节。最后，它展示了广泛的应用并提出了有前景的未来方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了迁移学习在贝叶斯优化中的应用，从四个角度总结方法并探讨其应用与未来方向。
AI.motivation: 传统贝叶斯优化在初始阶段因样本不足导致收敛缓慢，迁移学习可通过借鉴历史任务信息加速优化过程。
AI.method: 从初始点设计、搜索空间设计、代理模型及获取函数四个视角，系统总结迁移学习在贝叶斯优化中的方法与技术细节。
AI.result: 梳理了迁移学习加速贝叶斯优化的多种方法，展示了其在参数调优、药物设计等领域的应用，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 迁移学习有效提升贝叶斯优化效率，但仍需进一步探索跨领域迁移、动态任务适应等挑战。

title: Uncertainty-Aware AB3DMOT by Variational 3D Object Detection
title_zh: 通过变分 3D 对象检测实现不确定性感知 AB3DMOT
abstract: Autonomous driving needs to rely on high-quality 3D object detection to ensure safe navigation in the world. Uncertainty estimation is an effective tool to provide statistically accurate predictions, while the associated detection uncertainty can be used to implement a more safe navigation protocol or include the user in the loop. In this paper, we propose a Variational Neural Network-based TANet 3D object detector to generate 3D object detections with uncertainty and introduce these detections to an uncertainty-aware AB3DMOT tracker. This is done by applying a linear transformation to the estimated uncertainty matrix, which is subsequently used as a measurement noise for the adopted Kalman filter. We implement two ways to estimate output uncertainty, i.e., internally, by computing the variance of the CNN outputs and then propagating the uncertainty through the post-processing, and externally, by associating the final predictions of different samples and computing the covariance of each predicted box. In experiments, we show that the external uncertainty estimation leads to better results, outperforming both internal uncertainty estimation and classical tracking approaches. Furthermore, we propose a method to initialize the Variational 3D object detector with a pretrained TANet model, which leads to the best performing models.
summary: Autonomous driving needs to rely on high-quality 3D object detection to ensure safe navigation in the world. Uncertainty estimation is an effective tool to provide statistically accurate predictions, while the associated detection uncertainty can be used to implement a more safe navigation protocol or include the user in the loop. In this paper, we propose a Variational Neural Network-based TANet 3D object detector to generate 3D object detections with uncertainty and introduce these detections to an uncertainty-aware AB3DMOT tracker. This is done by applying a linear transformation to the estimated uncertainty matrix, which is subsequently used as a measurement noise for the adopted Kalman filter. We implement two ways to estimate output uncertainty, i.e., internally, by computing the variance of the CNN outputs and then propagating the uncertainty through the post-processing, and externally, by associating the final predictions of different samples and computing the covariance of each predicted box. In experiments, we show that the external uncertainty estimation leads to better results, outperforming both internal uncertainty estimation and classical tracking approaches. Furthermore, we propose a method to initialize the Variational 3D object detector with a pretrained TANet model, which leads to the best performing models.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶需要依靠高质量的3D物体检测来确保在世界范围内的安全导航。不确定性估计是提供统计准确预测的有效工具，而相关的检测不确定性可用于实施更安全的导航协议或将用户纳入循环中。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于变分神经网络的 TANet 3D 对象检测器，用于生成具有不确定性的 3D 对象检测，并将这些检测引入不确定性感知的 AB3DMOT 跟踪器。这是通过对估计的不确定性矩阵应用线性变换来完成的，该矩阵随后用作所采用的卡尔曼滤波器的测量噪声。我们实现了两种估计输出不确定性的方法，即在内部，通过计算 CNN 输出的方差，然后通过后处理传播不确定性；在外部，通过关联不同样本的最终预测并计算每个预测框的协方差。在实验中，我们表明外部不确定性估计会带来更好的结果，优于内部不确定性估计和经典跟踪方法。此外，我们提出了一种使用预训练的 TANet 模型初始化变分 3D 对象检测器的方法，从而获得性能最佳的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于变分神经网络的3D目标检测方法，并结合不确定性感知的AB3DMOT跟踪器，以提升自动驾驶中的安全导航性能。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶需要高精度的3D目标检测以确保安全，而传统方法未充分考虑检测不确定性，可能导致导航风险。通过引入不确定性估计，可优化导航策略并提升系统鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计变分TANet检测器生成带不确定性的3D目标检测结果，通过线性变换将不确定性矩阵作为卡尔曼滤波的测量噪声输入AB3DMOT跟踪器。提出内部（CNN输出方差传播）和外部（多样本预测协方差）两种不确定性估计方式，并采用预训练TANet模型初始化检测器。
AI.result: 实验表明，外部不确定性估计方法优于内部估计及经典跟踪方法，结合预训练模型的检测器达到最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 外部不确定性估计能有效提升跟踪精度，结合预训练模型的初始化策略是实现高性能不确定性感知跟踪的关键。

title: Video Waterdrop Removal via Spatio-Temporal Fusion in Driving Scenes
title_zh: 通过时空融合去除驾驶场景中的视频水滴
abstract: The waterdrops on windshields during driving can cause severe visual obstructions, which may lead to car accidents. Meanwhile, the waterdrops can also degrade the performance of a computer vision system in autonomous driving. To address these issues, we propose an attention-based framework that fuses the spatio-temporal representations from multiple frames to restore visual information occluded by waterdrops. Due to the lack of training data for video waterdrop removal, we propose a large-scale synthetic dataset with simulated waterdrops in complex driving scenes on rainy days. To improve the generality of our proposed method, we adopt a cross-modality training strategy that combines synthetic videos and real-world images. Extensive experiments show that our proposed method can generalize well and achieve the best waterdrop removal performance in complex real-world driving scenes.
summary: The waterdrops on windshields during driving can cause severe visual obstructions, which may lead to car accidents. Meanwhile, the waterdrops can also degrade the performance of a computer vision system in autonomous driving. To address these issues, we propose an attention-based framework that fuses the spatio-temporal representations from multiple frames to restore visual information occluded by waterdrops. Due to the lack of training data for video waterdrop removal, we propose a large-scale synthetic dataset with simulated waterdrops in complex driving scenes on rainy days. To improve the generality of our proposed method, we adopt a cross-modality training strategy that combines synthetic videos and real-world images. Extensive experiments show that our proposed method can generalize well and achieve the best waterdrop removal performance in complex real-world driving scenes.
abstract_zh: 行驶过程中挡风玻璃上的水滴会造成严重的视觉障碍，从而可能导致车祸。同时，水滴还会降低自动驾驶中计算机视觉系统的性能。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种基于注意力的框架，融合多个帧的时空表示，以恢复被水滴遮挡的视觉信息。由于缺乏视频水滴去除的训练数据，我们提出了一个大规模合成数据集，模拟雨天复杂驾驶场景中的水滴。为了提高我们提出的方法的通用性，我们采用了结合合成视频和真实世界图像的跨模态训练策略。大量的实验表明，我们提出的方法可以很好地泛化，并在复杂的现实驾驶场景中实现最佳的水滴去除性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于注意力机制的视频雨滴去除框架，通过时空融合多帧信息恢复被雨滴遮挡的视觉信息，以提升驾驶场景中的视觉清晰度和自动驾驶系统性能。
AI.motivation: 挡风玻璃上的雨滴会导致严重视觉遮挡，可能引发交通事故，并降低自动驾驶系统中计算机视觉的性能，亟需有效解决方案。
AI.method: 设计注意力机制框架融合多帧视频的时空特征，构建大规模合成数据集模拟复杂雨天驾驶场景，并采用合成视频与真实图像结合的跨模态训练策略。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在复杂真实驾驶场景中具有良好的泛化能力，实现了当前最先进的雨滴去除效果。
AI.conclusion: 提出的时空融合框架和跨模态训练策略有效解决了雨滴遮挡问题，为提升自动驾驶视觉安全提供了可靠技术方案。

authors_text: Illia Oleksiienko,Paraskevi Nousi,Nikolaos Passalis,Anastasios Tefas,Alexandros Iosifidis
title: Variational Voxel Pseudo Image Tracking
title_zh: 变分体素伪图像跟踪
abstract: Uncertainty estimation is an important task for critical problems, such as robotics and autonomous driving, because it allows creating statistically better perception models and signaling the model's certainty in its predictions to the decision method or a human supervisor. In this paper, we propose a Variational Neural Network-based version of a Voxel Pseudo Image Tracking (VPIT) method for 3D Single Object Tracking. The Variational Feature Generation Network of the proposed Variational VPIT computes features for target and search regions and the corresponding uncertainties, which are later combined using an uncertainty-aware cross-correlation module in one of two ways: by computing similarity between the corresponding uncertainties and adding it to the regular cross-correlation values, or by penalizing the uncertain feature channels to increase influence of the certain features. In experiments, we show that both methods improve tracking performance, while penalization of uncertain features provides the best uncertainty quality.
summary: Uncertainty estimation is an important task for critical problems, such as robotics and autonomous driving, because it allows creating statistically better perception models and signaling the model's certainty in its predictions to the decision method or a human supervisor. In this paper, we propose a Variational Neural Network-based version of a Voxel Pseudo Image Tracking (VPIT) method for 3D Single Object Tracking. The Variational Feature Generation Network of the proposed Variational VPIT computes features for target and search regions and the corresponding uncertainties, which are later combined using an uncertainty-aware cross-correlation module in one of two ways: by computing similarity between the corresponding uncertainties and adding it to the regular cross-correlation values, or by penalizing the uncertain feature channels to increase influence of the certain features. In experiments, we show that both methods improve tracking performance, while penalization of uncertain features provides the best uncertainty quality.
abstract_zh: 不确定性估计对于机器人和自动驾驶等关键问题来说是一项重要任务，因为它可以创建统计上更好的感知模型，并向决策方法或人类主管发出模型预测的确定性信号。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于变分神经网络的体素伪图像跟踪 (VPIT) 方法，用于 3D 单对象跟踪。所提出的变分 VPIT 的变分特征生成网络计算目标和搜索区域的特征以及相应的不确定性，随后使用不确定性感知互相关模块以两种方式之一将其组合：通过计算相应不确定性之间的相似性并将其添加到常规互相关值，或者通过惩罚不确定特征通道以增加某些特征的影响。在实验中，我们表明这两种方法都提高了跟踪性能，而不确定特征的惩罚提供了最好的不确定性质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于变分神经网络的3D单目标跟踪方法，通过不确定性估计提升跟踪性能。
AI.motivation: 不确定性估计对机器人和自动驾驶等关键领域至关重要，现有方法在处理不确定性时存在不足，需改进模型的感知能力和预测可信度传递。
AI.method: 设计变分特征生成网络生成目标与搜索区域的特征及对应不确定性，通过不确定性感知的交叉相关模块，采用不确定性相似度加权或惩罚不确定特征通道两种方式融合信息。
AI.result: 实验表明两种方法均提升跟踪性能，其中惩罚不确定特征通道的方法在不确定性质量评估中表现最优。
AI.conclusion: 变分VPIT方法通过有效建模不确定性显著提升3D跟踪效果，尤其在不确定性处理上具有优势。

title: LipLearner: Customizable Silent Speech Interactions on Mobile Devices
title_zh: LipLearner：移动设备上可定制的无声语音交互
comment: Conditionally accepted to the ACM CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems 2023 (CHI '23)
comments: Conditionally accepted to the ACM CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems 2023 (CHI '23)
abstract: Silent speech interface is a promising technology that enables private communications in natural language. However, previous approaches only support a small and inflexible vocabulary, which leads to limited expressiveness. We leverage contrastive learning to learn efficient lipreading representations, enabling few-shot command customization with minimal user effort. Our model exhibits high robustness to different lighting, posture, and gesture conditions on an in-the-wild dataset. For 25-command classification, an F1-score of 0.8947 is achievable only using one shot, and its performance can be further boosted by adaptively learning from more data. This generalizability allowed us to develop a mobile silent speech interface empowered with on-device fine-tuning and visual keyword spotting. A user study demonstrated that with LipLearner, users could define their own commands with high reliability guaranteed by an online incremental learning scheme. Subjective feedback indicated that our system provides essential functionalities for customizable silent speech interactions with high usability and learnability.
summary: Silent speech interface is a promising technology that enables private communications in natural language. However, previous approaches only support a small and inflexible vocabulary, which leads to limited expressiveness. We leverage contrastive learning to learn efficient lipreading representations, enabling few-shot command customization with minimal user effort. Our model exhibits high robustness to different lighting, posture, and gesture conditions on an in-the-wild dataset. For 25-command classification, an F1-score of 0.8947 is achievable only using one shot, and its performance can be further boosted by adaptively learning from more data. This generalizability allowed us to develop a mobile silent speech interface empowered with on-device fine-tuning and visual keyword spotting. A user study demonstrated that with LipLearner, users could define their own commands with high reliability guaranteed by an online incremental learning scheme. Subjective feedback indicated that our system provides essential functionalities for customizable silent speech interactions with high usability and learnability.
abstract_zh: 无声语音界面是一项很有前途的技术，可以使用自然语言进行私人通信。然而，以前的方法仅支持较小且不灵活的词汇表，这导致表达能力有限。我们利用对比学习来学习有效的唇读表示，从而以最少的用户工作量实现少量命令定制。我们的模型对野外数据集上的不同光照、姿势和手势条件表现出高度的鲁棒性。对于 25 个命令的分类，仅使用一次即可实现 0.8947 的 F1 分数，并且可以通过从更多数据中自适应学习来进一步提高其性能。这种通用性使我们能够开发出一种移动无声语音界面，该界面具有设备上微调和视觉关键词识别功能。一项用户研究表明，通过 LipLearner，用户可以定义自己的命令，并通过在线增量学习方案保证高可靠性。主观反馈表明，我们的系统为可定制的无声语音交互提供了基本功能，具有较高的可用性和可学习性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LipLearner，一种支持移动端自定义无声语音交互的系统，通过少量样本快速学习用户自定义命令。
AI.motivation: 现有无声语音接口词汇量有限且不够灵活，难以满足个性化需求，需开发更高效且可定制的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用对比学习提取高效唇语表征，结合少量样本学习与设备端微调技术，实现视觉关键词检测与在线增量学习。
AI.result: 在25命令分类任务中，单样本F1分数达0.8947，用户研究验证了系统的高可靠性与可用性。
AI.conclusion: LipLearner通过高效学习框架实现了移动端个性化无声语音交互，为隐私通信提供了实用技术方案。

search_text: LipLearner: Customizable Silent Speech Interactions on Mobile Devices LipLearner：移动设备上可定制的无声语音交互 Silent speech interface is a promising technology that enables private communications in natural language. However, previous approaches only support a small and inflexible vocabulary, which leads to limited expressiveness. We leverage contrastive learning to learn efficient lipreading representations, enabling few-shot command customization with minimal user effort. Our model exhibits high robustness to different lighting, posture, and gesture conditions on an in-the-wild dataset. For 25-command classification, an F1-score of 0.8947 is achievable only using one shot, and its performance can be further boosted by adaptively learning from more data. This generalizability allowed us to develop a mobile silent speech interface empowered with on-device fine-tuning and visual keyword spotting. A user study demonstrated that with LipLearner, users could define their own commands with high reliability guaranteed by an online incremental learning scheme. Subjective feedback indicated that our system provides essential functionalities for customizable silent speech interactions with high usability and learnability. 无声语音界面是一项很有前途的技术，可以使用自然语言进行私人通信。然而，以前的方法仅支持较小且不灵活的词汇表，这导致表达能力有限。我们利用对比学习来学习有效的唇读表示，从而以最少的用户工作量实现少量命令定制。我们的模型对野外数据集上的不同光照、姿势和手势条件表现出高度的鲁棒性。对于 25 个命令的分类，仅使用一次即可实现 0.8947 的 F1 分数，并且可以通过从更多数据中自适应学习来进一步提高其性能。这种通用性使我们能够开发出一种移动无声语音界面，该界面具有设备上微调和视觉关键词识别功能。一项用户研究表明，通过 LipLearner，用户可以定义自己的命令，并通过在线增量学习方案保证高可靠性。主观反馈表明，我们的系统为可定制的无声语音交互提供了基本功能，具有较高的可用性和可学习性。 本文提出LipLearner，一种支持移动端自定义无声语音交互的系统，通过少量样本快速学习用户自定义命令。 Zixiong Su,Shitao Fang,Jun Rekimoto cs.HC,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: On Comparing Fair Classifiers under Data Bias
title_zh: 数据偏差下公平分类器的比较
comment: Accepted as a Spotlight Presentation at Algorithmic Fairness through the Lens of Time, Neurips 2023 Workshop
comments: Accepted as a Spotlight Presentation at Algorithmic Fairness through the Lens of Time, Neurips 2023 Workshop
abstract: In this paper, we consider a theoretical model for injecting data bias, namely, under-representation and label bias (Blum & Stangl, 2019). We empirically study the effect of varying data biases on the accuracy and fairness of fair classifiers. Through extensive experiments on both synthetic and real-world datasets (e.g., Adult, German Credit, Bank Marketing, COMPAS), we empirically audit pre-, in-, and post-processing fair classifiers from standard fairness toolkits for their fairness and accuracy by injecting varying amounts of under-representation and label bias in their training data (but not the test data). Our main observations are: 1. The fairness and accuracy of many standard fair classifiers degrade severely as the bias injected in their training data increases, 2. A simple logistic regression model trained on the right data can often outperform, in both accuracy and fairness, most fair classifiers trained on biased training data, and 3. A few, simple fairness techniques (e.g., reweighing, exponentiated gradients) seem to offer stable accuracy and fairness guarantees even when their training data is injected with under-representation and label bias. Our experiments also show how to integrate a measure of data bias risk in the existing fairness dashboards for real-world deployments.
summary: In this paper, we consider a theoretical model for injecting data bias, namely, under-representation and label bias (Blum & Stangl, 2019). We empirically study the effect of varying data biases on the accuracy and fairness of fair classifiers. Through extensive experiments on both synthetic and real-world datasets (e.g., Adult, German Credit, Bank Marketing, COMPAS), we empirically audit pre-, in-, and post-processing fair classifiers from standard fairness toolkits for their fairness and accuracy by injecting varying amounts of under-representation and label bias in their training data (but not the test data). Our main observations are: 1. The fairness and accuracy of many standard fair classifiers degrade severely as the bias injected in their training data increases, 2. A simple logistic regression model trained on the right data can often outperform, in both accuracy and fairness, most fair classifiers trained on biased training data, and 3. A few, simple fairness techniques (e.g., reweighing, exponentiated gradients) seem to offer stable accuracy and fairness guarantees even when their training data is injected with under-representation and label bias. Our experiments also show how to integrate a measure of data bias risk in the existing fairness dashboards for real-world deployments.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑了注入数据偏差的理论模型，即代表性不足和标签偏差（Blum & Stangl，2019）。我们实证研究不同数据偏差对公平分类器的准确性和公平性的影响。通过对合成数据集和真实数据集（例如成人、德国信贷、银行营销、COMPAS）进行广泛的实验，我们通过在训练数据（但不是测试数据）中注入不同数量的代表性不足和标签偏差，对标准公平工具包中的处理前、处理中和处理后公平分类器的公平性和准确性进行实证审计。我们的主要观察结果是：1.随着训练数据中注入的偏差增加，许多标准公平分类器的公平性和准确性严重下降，2.在正确数据上训练的简单逻辑回归模型在准确性和公平性方面通常可以优于在有偏差的训练数据上训练的大多数公平分类器，以及3.一些简单的公平技术（例如重新加权、指数梯度）即使在注入训练数据时似乎也能提供稳定的准确性和公平性保证代表性不足和标签偏见。我们的实验还展示了如何将数据偏差风险的衡量标准集成到现有的公平性仪表板中以进行实际部署。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在存在数据偏差（欠代表和标签偏差）的情况下，比较不同公平分类器的性能表现。
AI.motivation: 数据偏差可能影响公平分类器的准确性与公平性，需评估现有公平分类方法在偏差数据下的鲁棒性并探索解决方案。
AI.method: 通过注入不同量的欠代表和标签偏差到训练数据中，在合成与真实数据集（如Adult、COMPAS）上测试预处理、处理及后处理公平分类器的准确性与公平性。
AI.result: 1. 训练数据偏差增加时，多数公平分类器的性能显著下降；2. 简单逻辑回归模型在无偏差数据下可能优于偏差数据训练的公平分类器；3. reweighing等简单技术能在偏差数据下保持稳定性能。
AI.conclusion: 现有公平分类器对数据偏差敏感，需结合偏差风险指标优化实际部署，并关注简单方法的稳健性。

authors_text: Sigal Raab,Inbal Leibovitch,Guy Tevet,Moab Arar,Amit H. Bermano,Daniel Cohen-Or
title: Single Motion Diffusion
title_zh: 单运动扩散
comment: Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zuWpVTgb_0U, Project page: https://sinmdm.github.io/SinMDM-page, Code: https://github.com/SinMDM/SinMDM
comments: Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zuWpVTgb_0U, Project page: https://sinmdm.github.io/SinMDM-page, Code: https://github.com/SinMDM/SinMDM
abstract: Synthesizing realistic animations of humans, animals, and even imaginary creatures, has long been a goal for artists and computer graphics professionals. Compared to the imaging domain, which is rich with large available datasets, the number of data instances for the motion domain is limited, particularly for the animation of animals and exotic creatures (e.g., dragons), which have unique skeletons and motion patterns. In this work, we present a Single Motion Diffusion Model, dubbed SinMDM, a model designed to learn the internal motifs of a single motion sequence with arbitrary topology and synthesize motions of arbitrary length that are faithful to them. We harness the power of diffusion models and present a denoising network explicitly designed for the task of learning from a single input motion. SinMDM is designed to be a lightweight architecture, which avoids overfitting by using a shallow network with local attention layers that narrow the receptive field and encourage motion diversity. SinMDM can be applied in various contexts, including spatial and temporal in-betweening, motion expansion, style transfer, and crowd animation. Our results show that SinMDM outperforms existing methods both in quality and time-space efficiency. Moreover, while current approaches require additional training for different applications, our work facilitates these applications at inference time. Our code and trained models are available at https://sinmdm.github.io/SinMDM-page.
summary: Synthesizing realistic animations of humans, animals, and even imaginary creatures, has long been a goal for artists and computer graphics professionals. Compared to the imaging domain, which is rich with large available datasets, the number of data instances for the motion domain is limited, particularly for the animation of animals and exotic creatures (e.g., dragons), which have unique skeletons and motion patterns. In this work, we present a Single Motion Diffusion Model, dubbed SinMDM, a model designed to learn the internal motifs of a single motion sequence with arbitrary topology and synthesize motions of arbitrary length that are faithful to them. We harness the power of diffusion models and present a denoising network explicitly designed for the task of learning from a single input motion. SinMDM is designed to be a lightweight architecture, which avoids overfitting by using a shallow network with local attention layers that narrow the receptive field and encourage motion diversity. SinMDM can be applied in various contexts, including spatial and temporal in-betweening, motion expansion, style transfer, and crowd animation. Our results show that SinMDM outperforms existing methods both in quality and time-space efficiency. Moreover, while current approaches require additional training for different applications, our work facilitates these applications at inference time. Our code and trained models are available at https://sinmdm.github.io/SinMDM-page.
abstract_zh: 合成人类、动物甚至想象中的生物的逼真动画一直是艺术家和计算机图形专业人士的目标。与拥有大量可用数据集的成像领域相比，运动领域的数据实例数量有限，特别是对于具有独特骨骼和运动模式的动物和外来生物（例如龙）的动画。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种单运动扩散模型，称为 SinMDM，该模型旨在学习具有任意拓扑的单运动序列的内部主题，并合成忠实于它们的任意长度的运动。我们利用扩散模型的力量，提出了一个专门为从单个输入运动中学习的任务而设计的去噪网络。 SinMDM 被设计为一种轻量级架构，通过使用具有局部注意层的浅层网络来缩小感受野并鼓励运动多样性，从而避免过度拟合。 SinMDM 可应用于各种环境，包括空间和时间中间、运动扩展、风格转移和人群动画。我们的结果表明 SinMDM 在质量和时空效率方面都优于现有方法。此外，虽然当前的方法需要针对不同的应用程序进行额外的培训，但我们的工作在推理时促进了这些应用程序。我们的代码和经过训练的模型可在 https://sinmdm.github.io/SinMDM-page 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SinMDM的单运动扩散模型，用于从单一运动序列中学习内部模式并生成任意长度的逼真动画。
AI.motivation: 运动数据（尤其是动物和幻想生物的动画）稀缺，现有方法需额外训练才能适应不同应用，效率低下。
AI.method: 设计轻量级扩散模型SinMDM，采用局部注意力机制和浅层网络结构，避免过拟合并鼓励运动多样性，直接从单个输入运动学习生成。
AI.result: SinMDM在质量和时空效率上优于现有方法，支持插值、扩展、风格迁移和群体动画等多种应用，无需额外训练即可完成。
AI.conclusion: SinMDM通过单运动序列学习实现了高效多任务动画生成，为运动合成提供了通用且灵活的解决方案。

Our results show that SinMDM outperforms existing methods both in quality and time-space efficiency. Moreover, while current approaches require additional training for different applications, our work facilitates these applications at inference time. Our code and trained models are available at https://sinmdm.github.io/SinMDM-page. 合成人类、动物甚至想象中的生物的逼真动画一直是艺术家和计算机图形专业人士的目标。与拥有大量可用数据集的成像领域相比，运动领域的数据实例数量有限，特别是对于具有独特骨骼和运动模式的动物和外来生物（例如龙）的动画。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种单运动扩散模型，称为 SinMDM，该模型旨在学习具有任意拓扑的单运动序列的内部主题，并合成忠实于它们的任意长度的运动。我们利用扩散模型的力量，提出了一个专门为从单个输入运动中学习的任务而设计的去噪网络。 SinMDM 被设计为一种轻量级架构，通过使用具有局部注意层的浅层网络来缩小感受野并鼓励运动多样性，从而避免过度拟合。 SinMDM 可应用于各种环境，包括空间和时间中间、运动扩展、风格转移和人群动画。我们的结果表明 SinMDM 在质量和时空效率方面都优于现有方法。此外，虽然当前的方法需要针对不同的应用程序进行额外的培训，但我们的工作在推理时促进了这些应用程序。我们的代码和经过训练的模型可在 https://sinmdm.github.io/SinMDM-page 上找到。 本文提出了一种名为SinMDM的单运动扩散模型，用于从单一运动序列中学习内部模式并生成任意长度的逼真动画。 Sigal Raab,Inbal Leibovitch,Guy Tevet,Moab Arar,Amit H. Bermano,Daniel Cohen-Or cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.GR

authors_text: Lujia Shen,Xuhong Zhang,Shouling Ji,Yuwen Pu,Chunpeng Ge,Xing Yang,Yanghe Feng
title: TextDefense: Adversarial Text Detection based on Word Importance Entropy
title_zh: TextDefense：基于词重要性熵的对抗性文本检测
abstract: Currently, natural language processing (NLP) models are wildly used in various scenarios. However, NLP models, like all deep models, are vulnerable to adversarially generated text. Numerous works have been working on mitigating the vulnerability from adversarial attacks. Nevertheless, there is no comprehensive defense in existing works where each work targets a specific attack category or suffers from the limitation of computation overhead, irresistible to adaptive attack, etc. In this paper, we exhaustively investigate the adversarial attack algorithms in NLP, and our empirical studies have discovered that the attack algorithms mainly disrupt the importance distribution of words in a text. A well-trained model can distinguish subtle importance distribution differences between clean and adversarial texts. Based on this intuition, we propose TextDefense, a new adversarial example detection framework that utilizes the target model's capability to defend against adversarial attacks while requiring no prior knowledge. TextDefense differs from previous approaches, where it utilizes the target model for detection and thus is attack type agnostic. Our extensive experiments show that TextDefense can be applied to different architectures, datasets, and attack methods and outperforms existing methods. We also discover that the leading factor influencing the performance of TextDefense is the target model's generalizability. By analyzing the property of the target model and the property of the adversarial example, we provide our insights into the adversarial attacks in NLP and the principles of our defense method.
summary: Currently, natural language processing (NLP) models are wildly used in various scenarios. However, NLP models, like all deep models, are vulnerable to adversarially generated text. Numerous works have been working on mitigating the vulnerability from adversarial attacks. Nevertheless, there is no comprehensive defense in existing works where each work targets a specific attack category or suffers from the limitation of computation overhead, irresistible to adaptive attack, etc. In this paper, we exhaustively investigate the adversarial attack algorithms in NLP, and our empirical studies have discovered that the attack algorithms mainly disrupt the importance distribution of words in a text. A well-trained model can distinguish subtle importance distribution differences between clean and adversarial texts. Based on this intuition, we propose TextDefense, a new adversarial example detection framework that utilizes the target model's capability to defend against adversarial attacks while requiring no prior knowledge. TextDefense differs from previous approaches, where it utilizes the target model for detection and thus is attack type agnostic. Our extensive experiments show that TextDefense can be applied to different architectures, datasets, and attack methods and outperforms existing methods. We also discover that the leading factor influencing the performance of TextDefense is the target model's generalizability. By analyzing the property of the target model and the property of the adversarial example, we provide our insights into the adversarial attacks in NLP and the principles of our defense method.
abstract_zh: 目前，自然语言处理（NLP）模型广泛应用于各种场景。然而，与所有深度模型一样，NLP 模型很容易受到对抗性生成文本的影响。许多工作都致力于减轻对抗性攻击的漏洞。然而，现有的工作还没有全面的防御，每个工作都针对特定的攻击类别，或者受到计算开销的限制，无法抵抗自适应攻击等。在本文中，我们详尽地研究了NLP中的对抗性攻击算法，我们的实证研究发现，攻击算法主要破坏文本中单词的重要性分布。训练有素的模型可以区分干净文本和对抗性文本之间细微的重要性分布差异。基于这种直觉，我们提出了 TextDefense，这是一种新的对抗性示例检测框架，它利用目标模型的能力来防御对抗性攻击，而无需先验知识。 TextDefense 与以前的方法不同，它利用目标模型进行检测，因此与攻击类型无关。我们大量的实验表明，TextDefense 可以应用于不同的架构、数据集和攻击方法，并且性能优于现有方法。我们还发现影响 TextDefense 性能的主要因素是目标模型的泛化性。通过分析目标模型的属性和对抗性示例的属性，我们提供了对 NLP 中的对抗性攻击以及我们的防御方法的原理的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于词重要性熵的新型对抗文本检测框架TextDefense，用于检测自然语言处理模型中的对抗样本。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击防御方法存在攻击类型特定、计算开销大或无法抵御自适应攻击等局限性，而对抗攻击主要通过扰乱文本词重要性分布实现。
AI.method: 利用目标模型区分干净文本与对抗文本的词重要性分布差异，通过计算词重要性熵构建检测框架，无需先验攻击知识且对攻击类型无偏好。
AI.result: 实验表明TextDefense在不同模型架构、数据集和攻击方法上均优于现有方法，且防御性能与目标模型的泛化能力密切相关。
AI.conclusion: 对抗攻击的核心在于词重要性分布扰动，TextDefense通过模型自身特性实现通用防御，为NLP领域对抗攻击研究提供了新视角。

title: Digging Deeper: Operator Analysis for Optimizing Nonlinearity of Boolean Functions
title_zh: 深入挖掘：优化布尔函数非线性的算子分析
abstract: Boolean functions are mathematical objects with numerous applications in domains like coding theory, cryptography, and telecommunications. Finding Boolean functions with specific properties is a complex combinatorial optimization problem where the search space grows super-exponentially with the number of input variables. One common property of interest is the nonlinearity of Boolean functions. Constructing highly nonlinear Boolean functions is difficult as it is not always known what nonlinearity values can be reached in practice. In this paper, we investigate the effects of the genetic operators for bit-string encoding in optimizing nonlinearity. While several mutation and crossover operators have commonly been used, the link between the genotype they operate on and the resulting phenotype changes is mostly obscure. By observing the range of possible changes an operator can provide, as well as relative probabilities of specific transitions in the objective space, one can use this information to design a more effective combination of genetic operators. The analysis reveals interesting insights into operator effectiveness and indicates how algorithm design may improve convergence compared to an operator-agnostic genetic algorithm.
summary: Boolean functions are mathematical objects with numerous applications in domains like coding theory, cryptography, and telecommunications. Finding Boolean functions with specific properties is a complex combinatorial optimization problem where the search space grows super-exponentially with the number of input variables. One common property of interest is the nonlinearity of Boolean functions. Constructing highly nonlinear Boolean functions is difficult as it is not always known what nonlinearity values can be reached in practice. In this paper, we investigate the effects of the genetic operators for bit-string encoding in optimizing nonlinearity. While several mutation and crossover operators have commonly been used, the link between the genotype they operate on and the resulting phenotype changes is mostly obscure. By observing the range of possible changes an operator can provide, as well as relative probabilities of specific transitions in the objective space, one can use this information to design a more effective combination of genetic operators. The analysis reveals interesting insights into operator effectiveness and indicates how algorithm design may improve convergence compared to an operator-agnostic genetic algorithm.
abstract_zh: 布尔函数是数学对象，在编码理论、密码学和电信等领域有着广泛的应用。查找具有特定属性的布尔函数是一个复杂的组合优化问题，其中搜索空间随着输入变量的数量呈超指数增长。布尔函数的非线性是人们感兴趣的一个常见属性。构造高度非线性布尔函数很困难，因为并不总是知道实际中可以达到什么非线性值。在本文中，我们研究了位串编码的遗传算子在优化非线性方面的效果。虽然常用的几种突变和交叉算子，但它们所操作的基因型与所产生的表型变化之间的联系大多是模糊的。通过观察算子可以提供的可能变化的范围，以及目标空间中特定转换的相对概率，人们可以使用这些信息来设计更有效的遗传算子组合。该分析揭示了对算子有效性的有趣见解，并表明与算子无关的遗传算法相比，算法设计如何提高收敛性。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析遗传算子对布尔函数非线性优化的效果，旨在提升遗传算法在该领域的性能。
AI.motivation: 布尔函数的非线性优化是密码学等领域的关键问题，但现有遗传算子的效果缺乏系统性分析，导致算法收敛效率低下。
AI.method: 通过研究位串编码下变异和交叉算子的基因型-表型映射关系，量化分析算子在目标空间中的变化范围与转移概率分布。
AI.result: 揭示了不同算子对非线性优化的贡献差异，并验证了基于算子特性的组合策略可显著提升算法收敛速度。
AI.conclusion: 针对布尔函数非线性优化的遗传算子设计需结合其表型变化特性，而非采用通用算子组合策略。
