authors_text: Yifei Wang,Yupan Wang,Zeyu Zhang,Song Yang,Kaiqi Zhao,Jiamou Liu
title: USER: Unsupervised Structural Entropy-based Robust Graph Neural Network
title_zh: 用户：无监督的基于结构熵的鲁棒图神经网络
abstract: Unsupervised/self-supervised graph neural networks (GNN) are vulnerable to inherent randomness in the input graph data which greatly affects the performance of the model in downstream tasks. In this paper, we alleviate the interference of graph randomness and learn appropriate representations of nodes without label information. To this end, we propose USER, an unsupervised robust version of graph neural networks that is based on structural entropy. We analyze the property of intrinsic connectivity and define intrinsic connectivity graph. We also identify the rank of the adjacency matrix as a crucial factor in revealing a graph that provides the same embeddings as the intrinsic connectivity graph. We then introduce structural entropy in the objective function to capture such a graph. Extensive experiments conducted on clustering and link prediction tasks under random-noises and meta-attack over three datasets show USER outperforms benchmarks and is robust to heavier randomness.
summary: Unsupervised/self-supervised graph neural networks (GNN) are vulnerable to inherent randomness in the input graph data which greatly affects the performance of the model in downstream tasks. In this paper, we alleviate the interference of graph randomness and learn appropriate representations of nodes without label information. To this end, we propose USER, an unsupervised robust version of graph neural networks that is based on structural entropy. We analyze the property of intrinsic connectivity and define intrinsic connectivity graph. We also identify the rank of the adjacency matrix as a crucial factor in revealing a graph that provides the same embeddings as the intrinsic connectivity graph. We then introduce structural entropy in the objective function to capture such a graph. Extensive experiments conducted on clustering and link prediction tasks under random-noises and meta-attack over three datasets show USER outperforms benchmarks and is robust to heavier randomness.
abstract_zh: 无监督/自监督图神经网络（GNN）很容易受到输入图数据固有随机性的影响，这极大地影响了模型在下游任务中的性能。在本文中，我们减轻了图随机性的干扰，并在没有标签信息的情况下学习节点的适当表示。为此，我们提出了 USER，一种基于结构熵的图神经网络的无监督鲁棒版本。我们分析了内在连通性的性质并定义了内在连通性图。我们还将邻接矩阵的秩确定为揭示提供与内在连接图相同的嵌入的图的关键因素。然后，我们在目标函数中引入结构熵来捕获这样的图。在三个数据集上的随机噪声和元攻击下的聚类和链接预测任务上进行的广泛实验表明，USER 的性能优于基准，并且对较重的随机性具有鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于结构熵的无监督鲁棒图神经网络（USER），旨在应对图数据中的固有随机性问题，提升节点表示学习的稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督图神经网络易受输入图数据的固有随机性影响，导致下游任务性能下降，需在无标签信息下学习鲁棒的节点表示。
AI.method: 通过分析图的内在连通性定义内在连通图，利用邻接矩阵秩揭示与内在连通图等效的图结构，并将结构熵引入目标函数以捕捉鲁棒图表示。
AI.result: 在三个数据集的聚类和链接预测任务中，USER在随机噪声和元攻击下均优于基准模型，表现出对更高随机性的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: USER通过结构熵有效缓解了图随机性干扰，为无监督图表示学习提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

search_text: USER: Unsupervised Structural Entropy-based Robust Graph Neural Network 用户：无监督的基于结构熵的鲁棒图神经网络 Unsupervised/self-supervised graph neural networks (GNN) are vulnerable to inherent randomness in the input graph data which greatly affects the performance of the model in downstream tasks. In this paper, we alleviate the interference of graph randomness and learn appropriate representations of nodes without label information. To this end, we propose USER, an unsupervised robust version of graph neural networks that is based on structural entropy. We analyze the property of intrinsic connectivity and define intrinsic connectivity graph. We also identify the rank of the adjacency matrix as a crucial factor in revealing a graph that provides the same embeddings as the intrinsic connectivity graph. We then introduce structural entropy in the objective function to capture such a graph. Extensive experiments conducted on clustering and link prediction tasks under random-noises and meta-attack over three datasets show USER outperforms benchmarks and is robust to heavier randomness. 无监督/自监督图神经网络（GNN）很容易受到输入图数据固有随机性的影响，这极大地影响了模型在下游任务中的性能。在本文中，我们减轻了图随机性的干扰，并在没有标签信息的情况下学习节点的适当表示。为此，我们提出了 USER，一种基于结构熵的图神经网络的无监督鲁棒版本。我们分析了内在连通性的性质并定义了内在连通性图。我们还将邻接矩阵的秩确定为揭示提供与内在连接图相同的嵌入的图的关键因素。然后，我们在目标函数中引入结构熵来捕获这样的图。在三个数据集上的随机噪声和元攻击下的聚类和链接预测任务上进行的广泛实验表明，USER 的性能优于基准，并且对较重的随机性具有鲁棒性。 本文提出了一种基于结构熵的无监督鲁棒图神经网络（USER），旨在应对图数据中的固有随机性问题，提升节点表示学习的稳定性。 Yifei Wang,Yupan Wang,Zeyu Zhang,Song Yang,Kaiqi Zhao,Jiamou Liu cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Hsuan Su,Shachi H Kumar,Sahisnu Mazumder,Wenda Chen,Ramesh Manuvinakurike,Eda Okur,Saurav Sahay,Lama Nachman,Shang-Tse Chen,Hung-yi Lee
title: Position Matters! Empirical Study of Order Effect in Knowledge-grounded Dialogue
title_zh: 职位很重要！知识对话中秩序效应的实证研究
abstract: With the power of large pretrained language models, various research works have integrated knowledge into dialogue systems. The traditional techniques treat knowledge as part of the input sequence for the dialogue system, prepending a set of knowledge statements in front of dialogue history. However, such a mechanism forces knowledge sets to be concatenated in an ordered manner, making models implicitly pay imbalanced attention to the sets during training. In this paper, we first investigate how the order of the knowledge set can influence autoregressive dialogue systems' responses. We conduct experiments on two commonly used dialogue datasets with two types of transformer-based models and find that models view the input knowledge unequally. To this end, we propose a simple and novel technique to alleviate the order effect by modifying the position embeddings of knowledge input in these models. With the proposed position embedding method, the experimental results show that each knowledge statement is uniformly considered to generate responses.
summary: With the power of large pretrained language models, various research works have integrated knowledge into dialogue systems. The traditional techniques treat knowledge as part of the input sequence for the dialogue system, prepending a set of knowledge statements in front of dialogue history. However, such a mechanism forces knowledge sets to be concatenated in an ordered manner, making models implicitly pay imbalanced attention to the sets during training. In this paper, we first investigate how the order of the knowledge set can influence autoregressive dialogue systems' responses. We conduct experiments on two commonly used dialogue datasets with two types of transformer-based models and find that models view the input knowledge unequally. To this end, we propose a simple and novel technique to alleviate the order effect by modifying the position embeddings of knowledge input in these models. With the proposed position embedding method, the experimental results show that each knowledge statement is uniformly considered to generate responses.
abstract_zh: 借助大型预训练语言模型的力量，各种研究工作已将知识集成到对话系统中。传统技术将知识视为对话系统输入序列的一部分，在对话历史之前添加一组知识语句。然而，这种机制迫使知识集以有序的方式连接起来，使得模型在训练过程中隐含地对知识集的关注不平衡。在本文中，我们首先研究知识集的顺序如何影响自回归对话系统的响应。我们使用两种基于 Transformer 的模型对两个常用的对话数据集进行了实验，发现模型对输入知识的看法不同。为此，我们提出了一种简单而新颖的技术，通过修改这些模型中知识输入的位置嵌入来减轻顺序效应。通过所提出的位置嵌入方法，实验结果表明，每个知识陈述都被统一考虑以生成响应。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究知识顺序对基于知识的对话系统响应的影响，并提出改进方法。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将知识按固定顺序输入对话系统，导致模型对知识的关注度不均衡。
AI.method: 通过修改知识输入的位置编码，缓解顺序效应带来的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，改进后的方法使模型能更均匀地考虑每条知识陈述。
AI.conclusion: 调整位置编码可有效减轻知识顺序对对话生成的影响。

title: A generalizable framework for low-rank tensor completion with numerical priors
title_zh: 具有数值先验的低秩张量完成的可推广框架
abstract: Low-Rank Tensor Completion, a method which exploits the inherent structure of tensors, has been studied extensively as an effective approach to tensor completion. Whilst such methods attained great success, none have systematically considered exploiting the numerical priors of tensor elements. Ignoring numerical priors causes loss of important information regarding the data, and therefore prevents the algorithms from reaching optimal accuracy. Despite the existence of some individual works which consider ad hoc numerical priors for specific tasks, no generalizable frameworks for incorporating numerical priors have appeared. We present the Generalized CP Decomposition Tensor Completion (GCDTC) framework, the first generalizable framework for low-rank tensor completion that takes numerical priors of the data into account. We test GCDTC by further proposing the Smooth Poisson Tensor Completion (SPTC) algorithm, an instantiation of the GCDTC framework, whose performance exceeds current state-of-the-arts by considerable margins in the task of non-negative tensor completion, exemplifying GCDTC's effectiveness. Our code is open-source.
summary: Low-Rank Tensor Completion, a method which exploits the inherent structure of tensors, has been studied extensively as an effective approach to tensor completion. Whilst such methods attained great success, none have systematically considered exploiting the numerical priors of tensor elements. Ignoring numerical priors causes loss of important information regarding the data, and therefore prevents the algorithms from reaching optimal accuracy. Despite the existence of some individual works which consider ad hoc numerical priors for specific tasks, no generalizable frameworks for incorporating numerical priors have appeared. We present the Generalized CP Decomposition Tensor Completion (GCDTC) framework, the first generalizable framework for low-rank tensor completion that takes numerical priors of the data into account. We test GCDTC by further proposing the Smooth Poisson Tensor Completion (SPTC) algorithm, an instantiation of the GCDTC framework, whose performance exceeds current state-of-the-arts by considerable margins in the task of non-negative tensor completion, exemplifying GCDTC's effectiveness. Our code is open-source.
abstract_zh: 低阶张量补全是一种利用张量固有结构的方法，作为张量补全的有效方法已被广泛研究。虽然这些方法取得了巨大成功，但没有一个方法系统地考虑利用张量元素的数值先验。忽略数值先验会导致有关数据的重要信息丢失，从而阻止算法达到最佳精度。尽管存在一些考虑特定任务的临时数值先验的个人作品，但尚未出现用于合并数值先验的通用框架。我们提出了广义 CP 分解张量补全 (GCDTC) 框架，这是第一个考虑数据数值先验的低秩张量补全的通用框架。我们通过进一步提出平滑泊松张量补全（SPTC）算法来测试 GCDTC，该算法是 GCDTC 框架的实例，其在非负张量补全任务中的性能远远超过当前最先进的技术，体现了 GCDTC 的有效性。我们的代码是开源的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可推广的低秩张量补全框架，结合数据元素的数值先验信息以提高补全精度。
AI.motivation: 现有低秩张量补全方法未系统考虑数值先验，导致信息丢失和精度不足，缺乏通用框架整合此类先验。
AI.method: 提出通用数值先验张量补全框架GCDTC，并设计其实例算法SPTC，通过平滑泊松分布建模非负张量的数值特性。
AI.result: SPTC在非负张量补全任务中显著超越现有最先进方法，验证了GCDTC框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: GCDTC框架成功整合数值先验信息，为低秩张量补全提供了可推广的解决方案。

authors_text: Guan-Horng Liu,Arash Vahdat,De-An Huang,Evangelos A. Theodorou,Weili Nie,Anima Anandkumar
title: I$^2$SB: Image-to-Image Schrödinger Bridge
title_zh: I$^2$SB：图像到图像薛定谔桥
abstract: We propose Image-to-Image Schrödinger Bridge (I$^2$SB), a new class of conditional diffusion models that directly learn the nonlinear diffusion processes between two given distributions. These diffusion bridges are particularly useful for image restoration, as the degraded images are structurally informative priors for reconstructing the clean images. I$^2$SB belongs to a tractable class of Schrödinger bridge, the nonlinear extension to score-based models, whose marginal distributions can be computed analytically given boundary pairs. This results in a simulation-free framework for nonlinear diffusions, where the I$^2$SB training becomes scalable by adopting practical techniques used in standard diffusion models. We validate I$^2$SB in solving various image restoration tasks, including inpainting, super-resolution, deblurring, and JPEG restoration on ImageNet 256x256 and show that I$^2$SB surpasses standard conditional diffusion models with more interpretable generative processes. Moreover, I$^2$SB matches the performance of inverse methods that additionally require the knowledge of the corruption operators. Our work opens up new algorithmic opportunities for developing efficient nonlinear diffusion models on a large scale. scale. Project page and codes: https://i2sb.github.io/
summary: We propose Image-to-Image Schrödinger Bridge (I$^2$SB), a new class of conditional diffusion models that directly learn the nonlinear diffusion processes between two given distributions. These diffusion bridges are particularly useful for image restoration, as the degraded images are structurally informative priors for reconstructing the clean images. I$^2$SB belongs to a tractable class of Schrödinger bridge, the nonlinear extension to score-based models, whose marginal distributions can be computed analytically given boundary pairs. This results in a simulation-free framework for nonlinear diffusions, where the I$^2$SB training becomes scalable by adopting practical techniques used in standard diffusion models. We validate I$^2$SB in solving various image restoration tasks, including inpainting, super-resolution, deblurring, and JPEG restoration on ImageNet 256x256 and show that I$^2$SB surpasses standard conditional diffusion models with more interpretable generative processes. Moreover, I$^2$SB matches the performance of inverse methods that additionally require the knowledge of the corruption operators. Our work opens up new algorithmic opportunities for developing efficient nonlinear diffusion models on a large scale. scale. Project page and codes: https://i2sb.github.io/
abstract_zh: 我们提出了图像到图像薛定谔桥（I$^2$SB），这是一类新的条件扩散模型，可以直接学习两个给定分布之间的非线性扩散过程。这些扩散桥对于图像恢复特别有用，因为退化图像在结构上是重建干净图像的信息先验。 I$^2$SB 属于薛定谔桥的易处理类，是基于分数的模型的非线性扩展，其边缘分布可以在给定边界对的情况下进行分析计算。这产生了非线性扩散的免模拟框架，其中 I$^2$SB 训练通过采用标准扩散模型中使用的实用技术变得可扩展。我们验证了 I$^2$SB 解决各种图像恢复任务的能力，包括 ImageNet 256x256 上的修复、超分辨率、去模糊和 JPEG 恢复，并表明 I$^2$SB 超越了标准条件扩散模型，具有更可解释的生成过程。此外，I$^2$SB 与逆向方法的性能相匹配，逆向方法还需要腐败算子的知识。我们的工作为大规模开发高效的非线性扩散模型开辟了新的算法机会。规模。项目页面及代码：https://i2sb.github.io/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的条件扩散模型I²SB，通过学习两个分布之间的非线性扩散过程，直接用于图像修复任务。
AI.motivation: 传统图像修复方法依赖复杂的模拟过程或需要额外的退化算子知识，而I²SB通过利用退化图像的结构信息作为先验，提供更高效且可解释的生成过程。
AI.method: 基于Schrödinger桥理论构建非线性扩散模型，通过解析计算边缘分布实现无模拟框架，并采用标准扩散模型的训练技术提升可扩展性。
AI.result: 在ImageNet 256x256数据集上，I²SB在修复、超分、去模糊等任务中超越了标准条件扩散模型，且性能与需退化算子的逆方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为开发大规模高效的非线性扩散模型提供了新算法方向，具有重要的应用前景。

authors_text: Xiaolin Wen,Yong Wang,Xuanwu Yue,Feida Zhu,Min Zhu
title: NFTDisk: Visual Detection of Wash Trading in NFT Markets
title_zh: NFTDisk：NFT市场清洗交易的可视化检测
abstract: With the growing popularity of Non-Fungible Tokens (NFT), a new type of digital assets, various fraudulent activities have appeared in NFT markets. Among them, wash trading has become one of the most common frauds in NFT markets, which attempts to mislead investors by creating fake trading volumes. Due to the sophisticated patterns of wash trading, only a subset of them can be detected by automatic algorithms, and manual inspection is usually required. We propose NFTDisk, a novel visualization for investors to identify wash trading activities in NFT markets, where two linked visualization modules are presented: a radial visualization module with a disk metaphor to overview NFT transactions and a flow-based visualization module to reveal detailed NFT flows at multiple levels. We conduct two case studies and an in-depth user interview with 14 NFT investors to evaluate NFTDisk. The results demonstrate its effectiveness in exploring wash trading activities in NFT markets.
summary: With the growing popularity of Non-Fungible Tokens (NFT), a new type of digital assets, various fraudulent activities have appeared in NFT markets. Among them, wash trading has become one of the most common frauds in NFT markets, which attempts to mislead investors by creating fake trading volumes. Due to the sophisticated patterns of wash trading, only a subset of them can be detected by automatic algorithms, and manual inspection is usually required. We propose NFTDisk, a novel visualization for investors to identify wash trading activities in NFT markets, where two linked visualization modules are presented: a radial visualization module with a disk metaphor to overview NFT transactions and a flow-based visualization module to reveal detailed NFT flows at multiple levels. We conduct two case studies and an in-depth user interview with 14 NFT investors to evaluate NFTDisk. The results demonstrate its effectiveness in exploring wash trading activities in NFT markets.
abstract_zh: 随着新型数字资产非同质代币（NFT）的日益普及，NFT市场上出现了各种欺诈行为。其中，刷量交易已成为NFT市场最常见的欺诈行为之一，试图通过制造虚假交易量来误导投资者。由于清洗交易模式复杂，自动算法只能检测到其中的一部分，通常需要手动检查。我们提出 NFTDisk，这是一种新颖的可视化工具，供投资者识别 NFT 市场中的虚假交易活动，其中提供了两个链接的可视化模块：一个带有磁盘隐喻的径向可视化模块，用于概述 NFT 交易；以及一个基于流量的可视化模块，用于揭示多个级别的详细 NFT 流量。我们对 14 位 NFT 投资者进行了两个案例研究和深入的用户访谈，以评估 NFTDisk。结果证明了其在探索 NFT 市场清洗交易活动方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NFTDisk，一种通过可视化手段帮助投资者检测NFT市场中洗盘交易的工具。
AI.motivation: NFT市场中洗盘交易欺诈行为猖獗，现有自动检测算法效果有限，需依赖人工审查，但效率低下。
AI.method: 设计包含径向盘状概览模块和多层级交易流细节模块的双联可视化系统，并通过案例研究与用户访谈验证有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明NFTDisk能有效辅助投资者识别洗盘交易模式，提升人工审查效率。
AI.conclusion: NFTDisk为NFT市场欺诈检测提供了可视化辅助工具，结合自动化分析与人类判断优势。

authors_text: Tomoki Anzai,Moju Zhao,Fan Shi,Kei Okada,Masayuki Inaba
title: Sensing and Navigation of Aerial Robot for Measuring Tree Location and Size in Forest Environment
title_zh: 用于测量森林环境中树木位置和大小的空中机器人的传感和导航
comment: ef:The 2017 International Workshop on Smart Info-Media System in Asia
comments: ef:The 2017 International Workshop on Smart Info-Media System in Asia
abstract: This paper shows the achievement of a sensing and navigation system of aerial robot for measuring location and size of trees in a forest environment autonomously. Although forestry is an important industry in Japan, the working population of forestry is decreasing. Then, as an application of mechanization of forestry, we propose tree data collection system by aerial robots which have high mobility in three-dimensional space. First, we develop tree recognition and measurement method, along with algorithm to generate tree database. Second, we describe aerial robot navigation system based on tree recognition. Finally, we present an experimental result in which an aerial robot flies in a forest and collects tree data.
summary: This paper shows the achievement of a sensing and navigation system of aerial robot for measuring location and size of trees in a forest environment autonomously. Although forestry is an important industry in Japan, the working population of forestry is decreasing. Then, as an application of mechanization of forestry, we propose tree data collection system by aerial robots which have high mobility in three-dimensional space. First, we develop tree recognition and measurement method, along with algorithm to generate tree database. Second, we describe aerial robot navigation system based on tree recognition. Finally, we present an experimental result in which an aerial robot flies in a forest and collects tree data.
abstract_zh: 本文展示了空中机器人传感和导航系统的成果，用于自主测量森林环境中树木的位置和大小。尽管林业是日本的重要产业，但林业劳动人口正在减少。然后，作为林业机械化的应用，我们提出了通过在三维空间中具有高机动性的空中机器人来采集树木数据的系统。首先，我们开发树木识别和测量方法，以及生成树木数据库的算法。其次，我们描述了基于树木识别的空中机器人导航系统。最后，我们展示了一个空中机器人在森林中飞行并收集树木数据的实验结果。

AI.tldr: 开发用于自主测量森林中树木位置和大小的空中机器人感知与导航系统
AI.motivation: 解决日本林业劳动力减少问题，通过机械化提高森林资源调查效率
AI.method: 提出树木识别与测量算法及数据库生成方法，结合导航系统实现自主飞行数据采集
AI.result: 实验验证了空中机器人在森林环境中自主飞行并有效收集树木数据的可行性
AI.conclusion: 该系统有效实现了森林树木数据的自动化采集，为林业机械化提供可行方案

search_text: Sensing and Navigation of Aerial Robot for Measuring Tree Location and Size in Forest Environment 用于测量森林环境中树木位置和大小的空中机器人的传感和导航 This paper shows the achievement of a sensing and navigation system of aerial robot for measuring location and size of trees in a forest environment autonomously. Although forestry is an important industry in Japan, the working population of forestry is decreasing. Then, as an application of mechanization of forestry, we propose tree data collection system by aerial robots which have high mobility in three-dimensional space. First, we develop tree recognition and measurement method, along with algorithm to generate tree database. Second, we describe aerial robot navigation system based on tree recognition. Finally, we present an experimental result in which an aerial robot flies in a forest and collects tree data. 本文展示了空中机器人传感和导航系统的成果，用于自主测量森林环境中树木的位置和大小。尽管林业是日本的重要产业，但林业劳动人口正在减少。然后，作为林业机械化的应用，我们提出了通过在三维空间中具有高机动性的空中机器人来采集树木数据的系统。首先，我们开发树木识别和测量方法，以及生成树木数据库的算法。其次，我们描述了基于树木识别的空中机器人导航系统。最后，我们展示了一个空中机器人在森林中飞行并收集树木数据的实验结果。 开发用于自主测量森林中树木位置和大小的空中机器人感知与导航系统 Tomoki Anzai,Moju Zhao,Fan Shi,Kei Okada,Masayuki Inaba cs.RO

title: Investigation of Enhanced Inertial Navigation Algorithms by Functional Iteration
title_zh: 通过函数迭代研究增强型惯性导航算法
abstract: The defects of the traditional strapdown inertial navigation algorithms become well acknowledged and the corresponding enhanced algorithms have been quite recently proposed trying to mitigate both theoretical and algorithmic defects. In this paper, the analytical accuracy evaluation of both the traditional algorithms and the enhanced algorithms is investigated, against the true reference for the first time enabled by the functional iteration approach having provable convergence. The analyses by the help of MATLAB Symbolic Toolbox show that the resultant error orders of all algorithms under investigation are consistent with those in the existing literatures, and the enhanced attitude algorithm notably reduces error orders of the traditional counterpart, while the impact of the enhanced velocity algorithm on error order reduction is insignificant. Simulation results agree with analyses that the superiority of the enhanced algorithm over the traditional one in the body-frame attitude computation scenario diminishes significantly in the entire inertial navigation computation scenario, while the functional iteration approach possesses significant accuracy superiority even under sustained lowly dynamic conditions.
summary: The defects of the traditional strapdown inertial navigation algorithms become well acknowledged and the corresponding enhanced algorithms have been quite recently proposed trying to mitigate both theoretical and algorithmic defects. In this paper, the analytical accuracy evaluation of both the traditional algorithms and the enhanced algorithms is investigated, against the true reference for the first time enabled by the functional iteration approach having provable convergence. The analyses by the help of MATLAB Symbolic Toolbox show that the resultant error orders of all algorithms under investigation are consistent with those in the existing literatures, and the enhanced attitude algorithm notably reduces error orders of the traditional counterpart, while the impact of the enhanced velocity algorithm on error order reduction is insignificant. Simulation results agree with analyses that the superiority of the enhanced algorithm over the traditional one in the body-frame attitude computation scenario diminishes significantly in the entire inertial navigation computation scenario, while the functional iteration approach possesses significant accuracy superiority even under sustained lowly dynamic conditions.
abstract_zh: 传统捷联惯性导航算法的缺陷已得到广泛认可，并且最近提出了相应的增强算法，试图减轻理论和算法缺陷。在本文中，首次通过具有可证明收敛性的函数迭代方法实现了真实参考，研究了传统算法和增强算法的分析精度评估。通过MATLAB Symbolic Toolbox的分析表明，所研究的所有算法得到的误差阶数与现有文献一致，并且增强姿态算法显着降低了传统算法的误差阶数，而增强速度算法对误差阶数降低的影响并不显着。仿真结果与分析一致，在整个惯性导航计算场景中，增强算法在机身姿态计算场景下相对于传统算法的优越性明显减弱，而函数迭代方法即使在持续低动态条件下也具有显着的精度优势。

AI.tldr: 本文首次采用具有可证明收敛性的函数迭代方法作为真实参考，对比分析传统与增强型捷联惯性导航算法的精度差异。
AI.motivation: 传统捷联惯性导航算法存在理论与实现缺陷，虽已有增强算法提出，但缺乏基于可验证收敛方法的系统性精度评估。
AI.method: 利用MATLAB符号工具箱进行理论分析，并通过函数迭代方法构建真值参考，结合仿真验证算法性能差异。
AI.result: 增强姿态算法显著降低误差阶数，但增强速度算法效果有限；函数迭代方法在持续低动态条件下展现明显精度优势。
AI.conclusion: 增强算法在整体导航场景优势有限，而函数迭代方法因收敛性保障，在精度上具有更广泛适用性，需进一步探索其工程实现路径。

authors_text: Jiaming Shen,Jialu Liu,Dan Finnie,Negar Rahmati,Michael Bendersky,Marc Najork
title: "Why is this misleading?": Detecting News Headline Hallucinations with Explanations
title_zh: “为什么这会产生误导？”：通过解释检测新闻标题幻觉
abstract: Automatic headline generation enables users to comprehend ongoing news events promptly and has recently become an important task in web mining and natural language processing. With the growing need for news headline generation, we argue that the hallucination issue, namely the generated headlines being not supported by the original news stories, is a critical challenge for the deployment of this feature in web-scale systems Meanwhile, due to the infrequency of hallucination cases and the requirement of careful reading for raters to reach the correct consensus, it is difficult to acquire a large dataset for training a model to detect such hallucinations through human curation. In this work, we present a new framework named ExHalder to address this challenge for headline hallucination detection. ExHalder adapts the knowledge from public natural language inference datasets into the news domain and learns to generate natural language sentences to explain the hallucination detection results. To evaluate the model performance, we carefully collect a dataset with more than six thousand labeled <article, headline> pairs. Extensive experiments on this dataset and another six public ones demonstrate that ExHalder can identify hallucinated headlines accurately and justifies its predictions with human-readable natural language explanations.
summary: Automatic headline generation enables users to comprehend ongoing news events promptly and has recently become an important task in web mining and natural language processing. With the growing need for news headline generation, we argue that the hallucination issue, namely the generated headlines being not supported by the original news stories, is a critical challenge for the deployment of this feature in web-scale systems Meanwhile, due to the infrequency of hallucination cases and the requirement of careful reading for raters to reach the correct consensus, it is difficult to acquire a large dataset for training a model to detect such hallucinations through human curation. In this work, we present a new framework named ExHalder to address this challenge for headline hallucination detection. ExHalder adapts the knowledge from public natural language inference datasets into the news domain and learns to generate natural language sentences to explain the hallucination detection results. To evaluate the model performance, we carefully collect a dataset with more than six thousand labeled <article, headline> pairs. Extensive experiments on this dataset and another six public ones demonstrate that ExHalder can identify hallucinated headlines accurately and justifies its predictions with human-readable natural language explanations.
abstract_zh: 自动标题生成使用户能够及时理解正在进行的新闻事件，并且最近已成为网络挖掘和自然语言处理中的一项重要任务。随着对新闻标题生成的需求不断增长，我们认为，幻觉问题，即生成的标题不受原始新闻报道的支持，是在网络规模系统中部署此功能的关键挑战。同时，由于幻觉案例的频率较低，并且需要仔细阅读评估者才能达成正确的共识，因此很难获取大型数据集来训练模型以通过人工管理来检测此类幻觉。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个名为 ExHalder 的新框架来解决标题幻觉检测的这一挑战。 ExHalder 将公共自然语言推理数据集中的知识应用到新闻领域，并学习生成自然语言句子来解释幻觉检测结果。为了评估模型性能，我们仔细收集了包含六千多个标记的 <article，headline> 对的数据集。对该数据集和另外六个公共数据集的大量实验表明，ExHalder 可以准确识别幻觉的标题，并通过人类可读的自然语言解释来证明其预测的合理性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为ExHalder的框架，用于检测新闻标题中的虚假信息（幻觉）并生成可解释的自然语言解释。
AI.motivation: 自动新闻标题生成面临幻觉问题（标题内容未被原文支持），且缺乏大规模标注数据导致检测模型训练困难。
AI.method: 将公开自然语言推理数据集的知识迁移至新闻领域，训练模型生成可解释的幻觉检测结果，并构建包含6000+标注<文章,标题>对的数据集进行验证。
AI.result: ExHalder在多个数据集上准确识别幻觉标题，且生成的解释具有可读性，实验表明其检测效果优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: ExHalder通过知识迁移和可解释性输出有效解决了新闻标题幻觉检测难题，为大规模部署提供了可行方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种名为ExHalder的框架，用于检测新闻标题中的虚假信息（幻觉）并生成可解释的自然语言解释。

authors_text: Kun Dai,Tao Xie,Ke Wang,Zhiqiang Jiang,Ruifeng Li,Lijun Zhao
title: OAMatcher: An Overlapping Areas-based Network for Accurate Local Feature Matching
title_zh: OAMatcher：基于重叠区域的网络，用于精确的局部特征匹配
abstract: Local feature matching is an essential component in many visual applications. In this work, we propose OAMatcher, a Tranformer-based detector-free method that imitates humans behavior to generate dense and accurate matches. Firstly, OAMatcher predicts overlapping areas to promote effective and clean global context aggregation, with the key insight that humans focus on the overlapping areas instead of the entire images after multiple observations when matching keypoints in image pairs. Technically, we first perform global information integration across all keypoints to imitate the humans behavior of observing the entire images at the beginning of feature matching. Then, we propose Overlapping Areas Prediction Module (OAPM) to capture the keypoints in co-visible regions and conduct feature enhancement among them to simulate that humans transit the focus regions from the entire images to overlapping regions, hence realizeing effective information exchange without the interference coming from the keypoints in non overlapping areas. Besides, since humans tend to leverage probability to determine whether the match labels are correct or not, we propose a Match Labels Weight Strategy (MLWS) to generate the coefficients used to appraise the reliability of the ground-truth match labels, while alleviating the influence of measurement noise coming from the data. Moreover, we integrate depth-wise convolution into Tranformer encoder layers to ensure OAMatcher extracts local and global feature representation concurrently. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that OAMatcher outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on several benchmarks, while exhibiting excellent robustness to extreme appearance variants. The source code is available at https://github.com/DK-HU/OAMatcher.
summary: Local feature matching is an essential component in many visual applications. In this work, we propose OAMatcher, a Tranformer-based detector-free method that imitates humans behavior to generate dense and accurate matches. Firstly, OAMatcher predicts overlapping areas to promote effective and clean global context aggregation, with the key insight that humans focus on the overlapping areas instead of the entire images after multiple observations when matching keypoints in image pairs. Technically, we first perform global information integration across all keypoints to imitate the humans behavior of observing the entire images at the beginning of feature matching. Then, we propose Overlapping Areas Prediction Module (OAPM) to capture the keypoints in co-visible regions and conduct feature enhancement among them to simulate that humans transit the focus regions from the entire images to overlapping regions, hence realizeing effective information exchange without the interference coming from the keypoints in non overlapping areas. Besides, since humans tend to leverage probability to determine whether the match labels are correct or not, we propose a Match Labels Weight Strategy (MLWS) to generate the coefficients used to appraise the reliability of the ground-truth match labels, while alleviating the influence of measurement noise coming from the data. Moreover, we integrate depth-wise convolution into Tranformer encoder layers to ensure OAMatcher extracts local and global feature representation concurrently. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that OAMatcher outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on several benchmarks, while exhibiting excellent robustness to extreme appearance variants. The source code is available at https://github.com/DK-HU/OAMatcher.
abstract_zh: 局部特征匹配是许多视觉应用中的重要组成部分。在这项工作中，我们提出了 OAMatcher，一种基于 Transformer 的无检测器方法，可以模仿人类行为来生成密集且准确的匹配。首先，OAMatcher 预测重叠区域，以促进有效和干净的全局上下文聚合，其关键见解是，在匹配图像对中的关键点时，经过多次观察，人类会关注重叠区域而不是整个图像。从技术上讲，我们首先对所有关键点进行全局信息集成，以模仿人类在特征匹配开始时观察整个图像的行为。然后，我们提出重叠区域预测模块（OAPM）来捕获共同可见区域中的关键点，并在它们之间进行特征增强，以模拟人类将焦点区域从整个图像转移到重叠区域，从而实现有效的信息交换，而不受非重叠区域中的关键点的干扰。此外，由于人类倾向于利用概率来确定匹配标签是否正确，因此我们提出了一种匹配标签权重策略（MLWS）来生成用于评估真实匹配标签可靠性的系数，同时减轻来自数据的测量噪声的影响。此外，我们将深度卷积集成到 Transformer 编码器层中，以确保 OAMatcher 同时提取局部和全局特征表示。综合实验表明，OAMatcher 在多个基准测试中均优于最先进的方法，同时对极端外观变体表现出出色的鲁棒性。源代码可在 https://github.com/DK-HU/OAMatcher 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OAMatcher，一种基于重叠区域的Transformer网络，用于实现精确的局部特征匹配。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在特征匹配中未充分模拟人类观察行为，而人类在匹配关键点时更关注图像对的重叠区域而非整体图像。
AI.method: 通过全局信息整合模拟人类初始观察，设计重叠区域预测模块（OAPM）增强共视区域特征，并引入匹配标签权重策略（MLWS）提升标签可靠性，结合深度卷积实现局部与全局特征联合提取。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上优于现有方法，且对极端外观变化具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: OAMatcher通过模拟人类视觉行为机制，有效提升了特征匹配精度与稳定性。

authors_text: Qianliang Wu,Yaqi Shen,Haobo Jiang,Guofeng Mei,Yaqing Ding,Lei Luo,Jin Xie,Jian Yang
title: Graph Matching Optimization Network for Point Cloud Registration
title_zh: 用于点云配准的图匹配优化网络
abstract: Point Cloud Registration is a fundamental and challenging problem in 3D computer vision. Recent works often utilize the geometric structure information in point feature embedding or outlier rejection for registration while neglecting to consider explicitly isometry-preserving constraint ($e.g.,$ point pair linked edge's length preserving after transformation) in training. We claim that the explicit isometry-preserving constraint is also important for improving feature representation abilities in the feature training stage. To this end, we propose a \underline{G}raph \underline{M}atching \underline{O}ptimization based \underline{Net}work (GMONet for short), which utilizes the graph-matching optimizer to explicitly exert the isometry preserving constraints in the point feature training to improve the point feature representation. Specifically, we exploit a partial graph-matching optimizer to optimize the super point ($i.e.,$ down-sampled key points) features and a full graph-matching optimizer to optimize fine-level point features in the overlap region. Meanwhile, we leverage the inexact proximal point method and the mini-batch sampling technique to accelerate these two graph-matching optimizers. Given high discriminative point features in the evaluation stage, we utilize the RANSAC approach to estimate the transformation between the scanned pairs. The proposed method has been evaluated on the 3DMatch/3DLoMatch benchmarks and the KITTI benchmark. The experimental results show that our method performs competitively compared to state-of-the-art baselines.
summary: Point Cloud Registration is a fundamental and challenging problem in 3D computer vision. Recent works often utilize the geometric structure information in point feature embedding or outlier rejection for registration while neglecting to consider explicitly isometry-preserving constraint ($e.g.,$ point pair linked edge's length preserving after transformation) in training. We claim that the explicit isometry-preserving constraint is also important for improving feature representation abilities in the feature training stage. To this end, we propose a \underline{G}raph \underline{M}atching \underline{O}ptimization based \underline{Net}work (GMONet for short), which utilizes the graph-matching optimizer to explicitly exert the isometry preserving constraints in the point feature training to improve the point feature representation. Specifically, we exploit a partial graph-matching optimizer to optimize the super point ($i.e.,$ down-sampled key points) features and a full graph-matching optimizer to optimize fine-level point features in the overlap region. Meanwhile, we leverage the inexact proximal point method and the mini-batch sampling technique to accelerate these two graph-matching optimizers. Given high discriminative point features in the evaluation stage, we utilize the RANSAC approach to estimate the transformation between the scanned pairs. The proposed method has been evaluated on the 3DMatch/3DLoMatch benchmarks and the KITTI benchmark. The experimental results show that our method performs competitively compared to state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: 点云配准是 3D 计算机视觉中的一个基本且具有挑战性的问题。最近的工作经常利用点特征嵌入或离群值拒绝中的几何结构信息进行配准，而忽略在训练中明确考虑等距保持约束（例如，变换后点对链接边的长度保持）。我们声称，显式的等距保持约束对于提高特征训练阶段的特征表示能力也很重要。为此，我们提出了一种基于 \underline{G}raph \underline{M}atching \underline{O} 优化的 \underline{Net} 工作（简称 GMONet），它利用图匹配优化器在点特征训练中显式地施加等距保持约束，以改进点特征表示。具体来说，我们利用部分图匹配优化器来优化超级点（即$下采样关键点）特征，并利用完整图匹配优化器来优化重叠区域中的精细点特征。同时，我们利用不精确的近端点方法和小批量采样技术来加速这两个图匹配优化器。考虑到评估阶段的高辨别点特征，我们利用 RANSAC 方法来估计扫描对之间的变换。所提出的方法已在 3DMatch/3DLoMatch 基准和 KITTI 基准上进行了评估。实验结果表明，与最先进的基线相比，我们的方法具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图匹配优化网络（GMONet）的点云配准方法，通过显式施加等距保持约束来提升点特征表示能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在点云配准中忽视了训练阶段显式等距保持约束（如点对边长保持）的重要性，导致特征表示能力不足。
AI.method: 设计GMONet，利用图匹配优化器显式施加等距约束：通过部分图匹配优化器优化超点特征，全图匹配优化器优化重叠区域细粒度特征，并结合近似 proximal 点方法和小批量采样加速优化过程。
AI.result: 在3DMatch/3DLoMatch和KITTI基准测试中，该方法性能优于或接近当前最先进的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 显式等距保持约束能有效提升点特征表示能力，GMONet在点云配准任务中表现出竞争力。

title: A Human-Centered Review of Algorithms in Decision-Making in Higher Education
title_zh: 以人为本的高等教育决策算法回顾
abstract: The use of algorithms for decision-making in higher education is steadily growing, promising cost-savings to institutions and personalized service for students but also raising ethical challenges around surveillance, fairness, and interpretation of data. To address the lack of systematic understanding of how these algorithms are currently designed, we reviewed an extensive corpus of papers proposing algorithms for decision-making in higher education. We categorized them based on input data, computational method, and target outcome, and then investigated the interrelations of these factors with the application of human-centered lenses: theoretical, participatory, or speculative design. We found that the models are trending towards deep learning, and increased use of student personal data and protected attributes, with the target scope expanding towards automated decisions. However, despite the associated decrease in interpretability and explainability, current development predominantly fails to incorporate human-centered lenses. We discuss the challenges with these trends and advocate for a human-centered approach.
summary: The use of algorithms for decision-making in higher education is steadily growing, promising cost-savings to institutions and personalized service for students but also raising ethical challenges around surveillance, fairness, and interpretation of data. To address the lack of systematic understanding of how these algorithms are currently designed, we reviewed an extensive corpus of papers proposing algorithms for decision-making in higher education. We categorized them based on input data, computational method, and target outcome, and then investigated the interrelations of these factors with the application of human-centered lenses: theoretical, participatory, or speculative design. We found that the models are trending towards deep learning, and increased use of student personal data and protected attributes, with the target scope expanding towards automated decisions. However, despite the associated decrease in interpretability and explainability, current development predominantly fails to incorporate human-centered lenses. We discuss the challenges with these trends and advocate for a human-centered approach.
abstract_zh: 高等教育中决策算法的使用正在稳步增长，这有望为机构节省成本并为学生提供个性化服务，但也引发了围绕监视、公平性和数据解释的道德挑战。为了解决目前对这些算法的设计方式缺乏系统理解的问题，我们回顾了大量提出高等教育决策算法的论文。我们根据输入数据、计算方法和目标结果对它们进行分类，然后研究这些因素与以人为本的视角（理论、参与式或推测性设计）应用的相互关系。我们发现这些模型正趋向于深度学习，并增加对学生个人数据和受保护属性的使用，目标范围扩大到自动化决策。然而，尽管可解释性和可解释性相应下降，但当前的发展主要未能纳入以人为本的镜头。我们讨论这些趋势所面临的挑战，并倡导以人为本的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文回顾了高等教育决策中算法的应用，分析其设计趋势与人本视角的关联。
AI.motivation: 算法在高等教育决策中的应用增长引发伦理挑战，但现有研究缺乏对算法设计与人本因素关系的系统性理解。
AI.method: 通过文献综述，按输入数据、计算方法和目标结果分类算法，并结合理论、参与式或推测设计的人本视角进行分析。
AI.result: 算法趋向深度学习与学生个人数据利用，但可解释性下降且未充分融入人本设计原则。
AI.conclusion: 需倡导人本方法以应对算法趋势带来的伦理与公平性挑战。

search_text: A Human-Centered Review of Algorithms in Decision-Making in Higher Education 以人为本的高等教育决策算法回顾 The use of algorithms for decision-making in higher education is steadily growing, promising cost-savings to institutions and personalized service for students but also raising ethical challenges around surveillance, fairness, and interpretation of data. To address the lack of systematic understanding of how these algorithms are currently designed, we reviewed an extensive corpus of papers proposing algorithms for decision-making in higher education. We categorized them based on input data, computational method, and target outcome, and then investigated the interrelations of these factors with the application of human-centered lenses: theoretical, participatory, or speculative design. We found that the models are trending towards deep learning, and increased use of student personal data and protected attributes, with the target scope expanding towards automated decisions. However, despite the associated decrease in interpretability and explainability, current development predominantly fails to incorporate human-centered lenses. We discuss the challenges with these trends and advocate for a human-centered approach. 高等教育中决策算法的使用正在稳步增长，这有望为机构节省成本并为学生提供个性化服务，但也引发了围绕监视、公平性和数据解释的道德挑战。为了解决目前对这些算法的设计方式缺乏系统理解的问题，我们回顾了大量提出高等教育决策算法的论文。我们根据输入数据、计算方法和目标结果对它们进行分类，然后研究这些因素与以人为本的视角（理论、参与式或推测性设计）应用的相互关系。我们发现这些模型正趋向于深度学习，并增加对学生个人数据和受保护属性的使用，目标范围扩大到自动化决策。然而，尽管可解释性和可解释性相应下降，但当前的发展主要未能纳入以人为本的镜头。我们讨论这些趋势所面临的挑战，并倡导以人为本的方法。 本文回顾了高等教育决策中算法的应用，分析其设计趋势与人本视角的关联。 Kelly McConvey,Shion Guha,Anastasia Kuzminykh cs.HC,cs.AI,cs.CY

title: Maneuver Decision-Making For Autonomous Air Combat Through Curriculum Learning And Reinforcement Learning With Sparse Rewards
title_zh: 通过课程学习和稀疏奖励强化学习进行自主空战机动决策
abstract: Reinforcement learning is an effective way to solve the decision-making problems. It is a meaningful and valuable direction to investigate autonomous air combat maneuver decision-making method based on reinforcement learning. However, when using reinforcement learning to solve the decision-making problems with sparse rewards, such as air combat maneuver decision-making, it costs too much time for training and the performance of the trained agent may not be satisfactory. In order to solve these problems, the method based on curriculum learning is proposed. First, three curricula of air combat maneuver decision-making are designed: angle curriculum, distance curriculum and hybrid curriculum. These courses are used to train air combat agents respectively, and compared with the original method without any curriculum. The training results show that angle curriculum can increase the speed and stability of training, and improve the performance of the agent; distance curriculum can increase the speed and stability of agent training; hybrid curriculum has a negative impact on training, because it makes the agent get stuck at local optimum. The simulation results show that after training, the agent can handle the situations where targets come from different directions, and the maneuver decision results are consistent with the characteristics of missile.
summary: Reinforcement learning is an effective way to solve the decision-making problems. It is a meaningful and valuable direction to investigate autonomous air combat maneuver decision-making method based on reinforcement learning. However, when using reinforcement learning to solve the decision-making problems with sparse rewards, such as air combat maneuver decision-making, it costs too much time for training and the performance of the trained agent may not be satisfactory. In order to solve these problems, the method based on curriculum learning is proposed. First, three curricula of air combat maneuver decision-making are designed: angle curriculum, distance curriculum and hybrid curriculum. These courses are used to train air combat agents respectively, and compared with the original method without any curriculum. The training results show that angle curriculum can increase the speed and stability of training, and improve the performance of the agent; distance curriculum can increase the speed and stability of agent training; hybrid curriculum has a negative impact on training, because it makes the agent get stuck at local optimum. The simulation results show that after training, the agent can handle the situations where targets come from different directions, and the maneuver decision results are consistent with the characteristics of missile.
abstract_zh: 强化学习是解决决策问题的有效途径。研究基于强化学习的自主空战机动决策方法是一个有意义且有价值的方向。然而，当使用强化学习来解决奖励稀疏的决策问题（例如空战机动决策）时，训练花费的时间过多，并且训练后的智能体的性能可能并不令人满意。为了解决这些问题，提出了基于课程学习的方法。首先设计了空战机动决策三个课程：角度课程、距离课程和混合课程。这些课程分别用于训练空战特工，并与原来没有任何课程的方法进行了比较。训练结果表明，角度课程可以提高训练的速度和稳定性，提高智能体的性能；远程课程可以提高坐席培训的速度和稳定性；混合课程对训练有负面影响，因为它使智能体陷入局部最优。仿真结果表明，经过训练后，Agent能够处理不同方向目标的情况，且机动决策结果与导弹特性相符。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合课程学习与强化学习的方法，解决自主空战中稀疏奖励导致的决策训练效率低和性能差的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在稀疏奖励场景下训练耗时且效果不佳，需探索更高效的自主空战机动决策方法。
AI.method: 设计三种课程（角度课程、距离课程、混合课程）分阶段训练空战代理，对比无课程方法的训练效果。
AI.result: 角度课程和距离课程提升训练速度与稳定性，混合课程导致局部最优；训练后的代理能应对多方向目标，决策符合导弹特性。
AI.conclusion: 课程学习有效增强强化学习在空战决策中的表现，角度与距离课程优于混合课程，为自主空战提供可行方案。

title: Sparse Mutation Decompositions: Fine Tuning Deep Neural Networks with Subspace Evolution
title_zh: 稀疏变异分解：利用子空间进化微调深度神经网络
abstract: Neuroevolution is a promising area of research that combines evolutionary algorithms with neural networks. A popular subclass of neuroevolutionary methods, called evolution strategies, relies on dense noise perturbations to mutate networks, which can be sample inefficient and challenging for large models with millions of parameters. We introduce an approach to alleviating this problem by decomposing dense mutations into low-dimensional subspaces. Restricting mutations in this way can significantly reduce variance as networks can handle stronger perturbations while maintaining performance, which enables a more controlled and targeted evolution of deep networks. This approach is uniquely effective for the task of fine tuning pre-trained models, which is an increasingly valuable area of research as networks continue to scale in size and open source models become more widely available. Furthermore, we show how this work naturally connects to ensemble learning where sparse mutations encourage diversity among children such that their combined predictions can reliably improve performance. We conduct the first large scale exploration of neuroevolutionary fine tuning and ensembling on the notoriously difficult ImageNet dataset, where we see small generalization improvements with only a single evolutionary generation using nearly a dozen different deep neural network architectures.
summary: Neuroevolution is a promising area of research that combines evolutionary algorithms with neural networks. A popular subclass of neuroevolutionary methods, called evolution strategies, relies on dense noise perturbations to mutate networks, which can be sample inefficient and challenging for large models with millions of parameters. We introduce an approach to alleviating this problem by decomposing dense mutations into low-dimensional subspaces. Restricting mutations in this way can significantly reduce variance as networks can handle stronger perturbations while maintaining performance, which enables a more controlled and targeted evolution of deep networks. This approach is uniquely effective for the task of fine tuning pre-trained models, which is an increasingly valuable area of research as networks continue to scale in size and open source models become more widely available. Furthermore, we show how this work naturally connects to ensemble learning where sparse mutations encourage diversity among children such that their combined predictions can reliably improve performance. We conduct the first large scale exploration of neuroevolutionary fine tuning and ensembling on the notoriously difficult ImageNet dataset, where we see small generalization improvements with only a single evolutionary generation using nearly a dozen different deep neural network architectures.
abstract_zh: 神经进化是将进化算法与神经网络相结合的一个有前途的研究领域。神经进化方法的一个流行子类称为进化策略，它依赖于密集的噪声扰动来变异网络，这对于具有数百万个参数的大型模型来说可能是采样效率低下且具有挑战性的。我们引入了一种通过将密集突变分解为低维子空间来缓解这个问题的方法。以这种方式限制突变可以显着减少方差，因为网络可以在保持性能的同时处理更强的扰动，从而实现深度网络的更可控和更有针对性的进化。这种方法对于微调预训练模型的任务特别有效，随着网络规模的不断扩大和开源模型变得越来越广泛，这是一个越来越有价值的研究领域。此外，我们展示了这项工作如何自然地与集成学习联系起来，其中稀疏突变鼓励儿童之间的多样性，以便他们的组合预测可以可靠地提高表现。我们在臭名昭著的 ImageNet 数据集上进行了神经进化微调和集成的首次大规模探索，我们在其中使用了近十几种不同的深度神经网络架构，仅使用单个进化代就看到了小的泛化改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过将密集突变分解为低维子空间来优化神经进化方法，以提高深度神经网络微调效率。
AI.motivation: 传统神经进化方法（如进化策略）使用密集噪声扰动进行突变，导致样本效率低下且难以处理大规模模型。随着预训练模型规模扩大和开源模型普及，亟需更高效的微调方法。
AI.method: 将密集突变分解为低维子空间，限制突变范围以降低方差并提升鲁棒性；结合集成学习，利用稀疏突变促进模型多样性以提升预测性能。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上进行了首个大规模神经进化微调与集成实验，使用单一进化代际和十余种网络架构实现了小幅泛化性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 子空间演化方法有效提升了神经进化微调效率，为大规模模型优化和集成学习提供了新思路，未来可进一步探索其在更多场景的应用。

method: 将密集突变分解为低维子空间，限制突变范围以降低方差并提升鲁棒性；结合集成学习，利用稀疏突变促进模型多样性以提升预测性能。
result: 在ImageNet数据集上进行了首个大规模神经进化微调与集成实验，使用单一进化代际和十余种网络架构实现了小幅泛化性能提升。
conclusion: 子空间演化方法有效提升了神经进化微调效率，为大规模模型优化和集成学习提供了新思路，未来可进一步探索其在更多场景的应用。
search_text: Sparse Mutation Decompositions: Fine Tuning Deep Neural Networks with Subspace Evolution 稀疏变异分解：利用子空间进化微调深度神经网络 Neuroevolution is a promising area of research that combines evolutionary algorithms with neural networks. A popular subclass of neuroevolutionary methods, called evolution strategies, relies on dense noise perturbations to mutate networks, which can be sample inefficient and challenging for large models with millions of parameters. We introduce an approach to alleviating this problem by decomposing dense mutations into low-dimensional subspaces. Restricting mutations in this way can significantly reduce variance as networks can handle stronger perturbations while maintaining performance, which enables a more controlled and targeted evolution of deep networks. This approach is uniquely effective for the task of fine tuning pre-trained models, which is an increasingly valuable area of research as networks continue to scale in size and open source models become more widely available. Furthermore, we show how this work naturally connects to ensemble learning where sparse mutations encourage diversity among children such that their combined predictions can reliably improve performance. We conduct the first large scale exploration of neuroevolutionary fine tuning and ensembling on the notoriously difficult ImageNet dataset, where we see small generalization improvements with only a single evolutionary generation using nearly a dozen different deep neural network architectures. 神经进化是将进化算法与神经网络相结合的一个有前途的研究领域。神经进化方法的一个流行子类称为进化策略，它依赖于密集的噪声扰动来变异网络，这对于具有数百万个参数的大型模型来说可能是采样效率低下且具有挑战性的。我们引入了一种通过将密集突变分解为低维子空间来缓解这个问题的方法。以这种方式限制突变可以显着减少方差，因为网络可以在保持性能的同时处理更强的扰动，从而实现深度网络的更可控和更有针对性的进化。这种方法对于微调预训练模型的任务特别有效，随着网络规模的不断扩大和开源模型变得越来越广泛，这是一个越来越有价值的研究领域。此外，我们展示了这项工作如何自然地与集成学习联系起来，其中稀疏突变鼓励儿童之间的多样性，以便他们的组合预测可以可靠地提高表现。我们在臭名昭著的 ImageNet 数据集上进行了神经进化微调和集成的首次大规模探索，我们在其中使用了近十几种不同的深度神经网络架构，仅使用单个进化代就看到了小的泛化改进。 本文提出了一种通过将密集突变分解为低维子空间来优化神经进化方法，以提高深度神经网络微调效率。 Tim Whitaker,Darrell Whitley cs.NE,cs.LG

title: NephroNet: A Novel Program for Identifying Renal Cell Carcinoma and Generating Synthetic Training Images with Convolutional Neural Networks and Diffusion Models
title_zh: NephroNet：一种利用卷积神经网络和扩散模型识别肾细胞癌并生成合成训练图像的新程序
abstract: Renal cell carcinoma (RCC) is a type of cancer that originates in the kidneys and is the most common type of kidney cancer in adults. It can be classified into several subtypes, including clear cell RCC, papillary RCC, and chromophobe RCC. In this study, an artificial intelligence model was developed and trained for classifying different subtypes of RCC using ResNet-18, a convolutional neural network that has been widely used for image classification tasks. The model was trained on a dataset of RCC histopathology images, which consisted of digital images of RCC surgical resection slides that were annotated with the corresponding subtype labels. The performance of the trained model was evaluated using several metrics, including accuracy, precision, and recall. Additionally, in this research, a novel synthetic image generation tool, NephroNet, is developed on diffusion models that are used to generate original images of RCC surgical resection slides. Diffusion models are a class of generative models capable of synthesizing high-quality images from noise. Several diffusers such as Stable Diffusion, Dreambooth Text-to-Image, and Textual Inversion were trained on a dataset of RCC images and were used to generate a series of original images that resembled RCC surgical resection slides, all within the span of fewer than four seconds. The generated images were visually realistic and could be used for creating new training datasets, testing the performance of image analysis algorithms, and training medical professionals. NephroNet is provided as an open-source software package and contains files for data preprocessing, training, and visualization. Overall, this study demonstrates the potential of artificial intelligence and diffusion models for classifying and generating RCC images, respectively. These methods could be useful for improving the diagnosis and treatment of RCC and more.

abstract_zh: 肾细胞癌（RCC）是一种起源于肾脏的癌症，是成人中最常见的肾癌类型。它可分为多种亚型，包括透明细胞肾细胞癌、乳头状肾细胞癌和嫌色细胞肾细胞癌。在本研究中，开发并训练了一个人工智能模型，用于使用 ResNet-18（一种已广泛用于图像分类任务的卷积神经网络）对 RCC 的不同亚型进行分类。该模型在 RCC 组织病理学图像数据集上进行训练，该数据集由 RCC 手术切除切片的数字图像组成，并用相应的亚型标签进行注释。使用多个指标评估训练模型的性能，包括准确度、精确度和召回率。此外，在这项研究中，一种新颖的合成图像生成工具 NephroNet 是在扩散模型上开发的，用于生成 RCC 手术切除切片的原始图像。扩散模型是一类能够从噪声中合成高质量图像的生成模型。 Stable Diffusion、Dreambooth Text-to-Image 和 Textual Inversion 等几种扩散器在 RCC 图像数据集上进行训练，并用于生成一系列类似于 RCC 手术切除幻灯片的原始图像，所有这些都在不到四秒的时间内完成。生成的图像视觉上逼真，可用于创建新的训练数据集、测试图像分析算法的性能以及培训医疗专业人员。 NephroNet 作为开源软件包提供，包含用于数据预处理、训练和可视化的文件。总体而言，这项研究展示了人工智能和扩散模型分别用于分类和生成 RCC 图像的潜力。这些方法可能有助于改善肾细胞癌等的诊断和治疗。

AI.tldr: 开发用于识别肾细胞癌亚型及生成合成训练图像的AI模型NephroNet
AI.motivation: 提高肾细胞癌诊断准确性及解决训练数据不足问题
AI.method: 基于ResNet-18的卷积神经网络进行分类，结合扩散模型（如Stable Diffusion）生成合成图像
AI.result: 模型分类性能良好，生成图像质量高且生成速度快
AI.conclusion: AI与扩散模型在RCC分类及图像生成中具有潜力，可提升诊断与治疗效果

authors_text: Graham Todd,Sam Earle,Muhammad Umair Nasir,Michael Cerny Green,Julian Togelius
title: Level Generation Through Large Language Models
title_zh: 通过大型语言模型生成关卡
comment: ef:FDG 2023: Proceedings of the 18th International Conference on the Foundations of Digital Games
comments: ef:FDG 2023: Proceedings of the 18th International Conference on the Foundations of Digital Games
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are powerful tools, capable of leveraging their training on natural language to write stories, generate code, and answer questions. But can they generate functional video game levels? Game levels, with their complex functional constraints and spatial relationships in more than one dimension, are very different from the kinds of data an LLM typically sees during training. Datasets of game levels are also hard to come by, potentially taxing the abilities of these data-hungry models. We investigate the use of LLMs to generate levels for the game Sokoban, finding that LLMs are indeed capable of doing so, and that their performance scales dramatically with dataset size. We also perform preliminary experiments on controlling LLM level generators and discuss promising areas for future work.
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are powerful tools, capable of leveraging their training on natural language to write stories, generate code, and answer questions. But can they generate functional video game levels? Game levels, with their complex functional constraints and spatial relationships in more than one dimension, are very different from the kinds of data an LLM typically sees during training. Datasets of game levels are also hard to come by, potentially taxing the abilities of these data-hungry models. We investigate the use of LLMs to generate levels for the game Sokoban, finding that LLMs are indeed capable of doing so, and that their performance scales dramatically with dataset size. We also perform preliminary experiments on controlling LLM level generators and discuss promising areas for future work.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 是强大的工具，能够利用自然语言训练来编写故事、生成代码和回答问题。但它们能生成实用的视频游戏关卡吗？游戏级别具有复杂的功能约束和多个维度的空间关系，与法学硕士在训练期间通常看到的数据类型有很大不同。游戏关卡的数据集也很难获得，这可能会对这些需要大量数据的模型的能力造成负担。我们研究了使用 LLM 为推箱子游戏生成关卡，发现 LLM 确实能够做到这一点，并且它们的性能随着数据集大小的变化而显着扩展。我们还进行了控制 LLM 级别生成器的初步实验，并讨论了未来工作的有希望的领域。

AI.tldr: 研究利用大语言模型生成功能性视频游戏关卡，特别是Sokoban游戏，并探讨其性能与数据集规模的关系。
AI.motivation: 游戏关卡设计复杂且数据稀缺，传统方法受限，需探索LLM在生成此类结构化内容的潜力。
AI.method: 通过训练LLM在Sokoban关卡数据集上，评估不同规模数据集对生成效果的影响，并进行生成控制的初步实验。
AI.result: 实验表明LLM能成功生成功能性Sokoban关卡，且生成质量随训练数据量增加显著提升。
AI.conclusion: LLM在足够数据下可有效生成游戏关卡，未来需进一步优化控制方法和探索其他游戏类型。

authors_text: Chia-Hsien Shih,Noel Naughton,Udit Halder,Heng-Sheng Chang,Seung Hyun Kim,Rhanor Gillette,Prashant G. Mehta,Mattia Gazzola
title: Hierarchical control and learning of a foraging CyberOctopus
title_zh: 觅食网络章鱼的分层控制和学习
abstract: Inspired by the unique neurophysiology of the octopus, we propose a hierarchical framework that simplifies the coordination of multiple soft arms by decomposing control into high-level decision making, low-level motor activation, and local reflexive behaviors via sensory feedback. When evaluated in the illustrative problem of a model octopus foraging for food, this hierarchical decomposition results in significant improvements relative to end-to-end methods. Performance is achieved through a mixed-modes approach, whereby qualitatively different tasks are addressed via complementary control schemes. Here, model-free reinforcement learning is employed for high-level decision-making, while model-based energy shaping takes care of arm-level motor execution. To render the pairing computationally tenable, a novel neural-network energy shaping (NN-ES) controller is developed, achieving accurate motions with time-to-solutions 200 times faster than previous attempts. Our hierarchical framework is then successfully deployed in increasingly challenging foraging scenarios, including an arena littered with obstacles in 3D space, demonstrating the viability of our approach.
summary: Inspired by the unique neurophysiology of the octopus, we propose a hierarchical framework that simplifies the coordination of multiple soft arms by decomposing control into high-level decision making, low-level motor activation, and local reflexive behaviors via sensory feedback. When evaluated in the illustrative problem of a model octopus foraging for food, this hierarchical decomposition results in significant improvements relative to end-to-end methods. Performance is achieved through a mixed-modes approach, whereby qualitatively different tasks are addressed via complementary control schemes. Here, model-free reinforcement learning is employed for high-level decision-making, while model-based energy shaping takes care of arm-level motor execution. To render the pairing computationally tenable, a novel neural-network energy shaping (NN-ES) controller is developed, achieving accurate motions with time-to-solutions 200 times faster than previous attempts. Our hierarchical framework is then successfully deployed in increasingly challenging foraging scenarios, including an arena littered with obstacles in 3D space, demonstrating the viability of our approach.
abstract_zh: 受章鱼独特的神经生理学的启发，我们提出了一个分层框架，通过将控制分解为高级决策、低级运动激活和通过感觉反馈的局部反射行为，简化了多个软臂的协调。当在模型章鱼觅食的说明性问题中进行评估时，这种分层分解导致相对于端到端方法的显着改进。性能是通过混合模式方法实现的，通过互补的控制方案来解决质量不同的任务。在这里，无模型强化学习用于高层决策，而基于模型的能量整形负责手臂级电机执行。为了使配对在计算上可行，开发了一种新型神经网络能量整形 (NN-ES) 控制器，可实现精确运动，解决问题的时间比之前的尝试快 200 倍。然后，我们的分层框架成功部署在日益具有挑战性的觅食场景中，包括 3D 空间中布满障碍物的竞技场，这证明了我们方法的可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分层控制框架，通过模仿章鱼神经生理结构，实现软体机械臂在复杂环境中的高效觅食控制。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以协调多软体手臂的复杂运动，需借鉴生物神经系统分层机制实现高效控制与学习。
AI.method: 构建包含高层决策（无模型强化学习）、中层运动控制（能量塑形）和底层反射行为的分层架构，并开发神经网络能量塑形控制器（NN-ES）。
AI.result: 在3D障碍环境中实现200倍加速的精准运动控制，验证了框架在复杂场景下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 分层控制框架通过解耦决策与执行层级，显著提升了软体机器人在动态复杂环境中的任务完成效率。

search_text: Hierarchical control and learning of a foraging CyberOctopus 觅食网络章鱼的分层控制和学习 Inspired by the unique neurophysiology of the octopus, we propose a hierarchical framework that simplifies the coordination of multiple soft arms by decomposing control into high-level decision making, low-level motor activation, and local reflexive behaviors via sensory feedback. When evaluated in the illustrative problem of a model octopus foraging for food, this hierarchical decomposition results in significant improvements relative to end-to-end methods. Performance is achieved through a mixed-modes approach, whereby qualitatively different tasks are addressed via complementary control schemes. Here, model-free reinforcement learning is employed for high-level decision-making, while model-based energy shaping takes care of arm-level motor execution. To render the pairing computationally tenable, a novel neural-network energy shaping (NN-ES) controller is developed, achieving accurate motions with time-to-solutions 200 times faster than previous attempts. Our hierarchical framework is then successfully deployed in increasingly challenging foraging scenarios, including an arena littered with obstacles in 3D space, demonstrating the viability of our approach. 受章鱼独特的神经生理学的启发，我们提出了一个分层框架，通过将控制分解为高级决策、低级运动激活和通过感觉反馈的局部反射行为，简化了多个软臂的协调。当在模型章鱼觅食的说明性问题中进行评估时，这种分层分解导致相对于端到端方法的显着改进。性能是通过混合模式方法实现的，通过互补的控制方案来解决质量不同的任务。在这里，无模型强化学习用于高层决策，而基于模型的能量整形负责手臂级电机执行。为了使配对在计算上可行，开发了一种新型神经网络能量整形 (NN-ES) 控制器，可实现精确运动，解决问题的时间比之前的尝试快 200 倍。然后，我们的分层框架成功部署在日益具有挑战性的觅食场景中，包括 3D 空间中布满障碍物的竞技场，这证明了我们方法的可行性。 本文提出一种分层控制框架，通过模仿章鱼神经生理结构，实现软体机械臂在复杂环境中的高效觅食控制。 Chia-Hsien Shih,Noel Naughton,Udit Halder,Heng-Sheng Chang,Seung Hyun Kim,Rhanor Gillette,Prashant G. Mehta,Mattia Gazzola cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Jungwon Kang,Mohammadjavad Ghorbanalivakili,Gunho Sohn,David Beach,Veronica Marin
title: TPE-Net: Track Point Extraction and Association Network for Rail Path Proposal Generation
title_zh: TPE-Net：用于生成铁路路径提案的轨迹点提取和关联网络
comment: 7 pages, 6 figures, and 1 table Jungwon Kang and Mohammadjavad Ghorbanalivakili have equal contribution
comments: 7 pages, 6 figures, and 1 table Jungwon Kang and Mohammadjavad Ghorbanalivakili have equal contribution
abstract: One essential feature of an autonomous train is minimizing collision risks with third-party objects. To estimate the risk, the control system must identify topological information of all the rail routes ahead on which the train can possibly move, especially within merging or diverging rails. This way, the train can figure out the status of potential obstacles with respect to its route and hence, make a timely decision. Numerous studies have successfully extracted all rail tracks as a whole within forward-looking images without considering element instances. Still, some image-based methods have employed hard-coded prior knowledge of railway geometry on 3D data to associate left-right rails and generate rail route instances. However, we propose a rail path extraction pipeline in which left-right rail pixels of each rail route instance are extracted and associated through a fully convolutional encoder-decoder architecture called TPE-Net. Two different regression branches for TPE-Net are proposed to regress the locations of center points of each rail route, along with their corresponding left-right pixels. Extracted rail pixels are then spatially clustered to generate topological information of all the possible train routes (ego-paths), discarding non-ego-path ones. Experimental results on a challenging, publicly released benchmark show true-positive-pixel level average precision and recall of 0.9207 and 0.8721, respectively, at about 12 frames per second. Even though our evaluation results are not higher than the SOTA, the proposed regression pipeline performs remarkably in extracting the correspondences by looking once at the image. It generates strong rail route hypotheses without reliance on camera parameters, 3D data, and geometrical constraints.
summary: One essential feature of an autonomous train is minimizing collision risks with third-party objects. To estimate the risk, the control system must identify topological information of all the rail routes ahead on which the train can possibly move, especially within merging or diverging rails. This way, the train can figure out the status of potential obstacles with respect to its route and hence, make a timely decision. Numerous studies have successfully extracted all rail tracks as a whole within forward-looking images without considering element instances. Still, some image-based methods have employed hard-coded prior knowledge of railway geometry on 3D data to associate left-right rails and generate rail route instances. However, we propose a rail path extraction pipeline in which left-right rail pixels of each rail route instance are extracted and associated through a fully convolutional encoder-decoder architecture called TPE-Net. Two different regression branches for TPE-Net are proposed to regress the locations of center points of each rail route, along with their corresponding left-right pixels. Extracted rail pixels are then spatially clustered to generate topological information of all the possible train routes (ego-paths), discarding non-ego-path ones. Experimental results on a challenging, publicly released benchmark show true-positive-pixel level average precision and recall of 0.9207 and 0.8721, respectively, at about 12 frames per second. Even though our evaluation results are not higher than the SOTA, the proposed regression pipeline performs remarkably in extracting the correspondences by looking once at the image. It generates strong rail route hypotheses without reliance on camera parameters, 3D data, and geometrical constraints.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶列车的一项基本特征是最大限度地减少与第三方物体的碰撞风险。为了估计风险，控制系统必须识别列车可能行驶的所有前方铁路路线的拓扑信息，特别是在合流或分叉铁路内。这样，火车就可以了解其路线上潜在障碍的状态，从而及时做出决定。许多研究已成功地将前瞻性图像中的所有铁轨作为一个整体提取出来，而无需考虑元素实例。尽管如此，一些基于图像的方法仍然采用了 3D 数据上铁路几何形状的硬编码先验知识来关联左右铁路并生成铁路路线实例。然而，我们提出了一种铁路路径提取管道，其中通过称为 TPE-Net 的全卷积编码器-解码器架构提取并关联每个铁路路线实例的左右铁路像素。提出了 TPE-Net 的两个不同的回归分支来回归每条铁路线中心点的位置及其相应的左右像素。然后，提取的铁路像素在空间上进行聚类，以生成所有可能的火车路线（自我路径）的拓扑信息，丢弃非自我路径。一项具有挑战性的公开发布的基准测试的实验结果显示，在每秒约 12 帧的情况下，真阳性像素级平均精度和召回率分别为 0.9207 和 0.8721。尽管我们的评估结果并不高于 SOTA，但所提出的回归管道在通过查看图像来提取对应关系方面表现出色。它可以生成强大的铁路路线假设，而不依赖于相机参数、3D 数据和几何约束。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TPE-Net网络，用于从图像中提取并关联左右轨道像素，生成铁路路径拓扑信息，以辅助自动驾驶列车规避障碍物。
AI.motivation: 现有方法或忽略轨道实例细节，或依赖3D数据与几何先验知识，难以在2D图像中高效提取轨道路径及其拓扑关系。
AI.method: 设计全卷积编码器-解码器架构TPE-Net，包含两个回归分支分别预测轨道中心点及左右像素，通过空间聚类生成潜在列车路径（ego-paths）。
AI.result: 在公开基准数据集上达到0.9207的平均精度和0.8721召回率，处理速度约12帧/秒，虽非当前最优但无需3D数据与几何约束即可生成强轨道假设。
AI.conclusion: TPE-Net通过单次图像扫描实现轨道路径提取，无需相机参数或3D信息，在铁路拓扑感知任务中展现出高效性与鲁棒性。

title: Assessment HTN (A-HTN) for Automated Task Performance Assessment in 3D Serious Games
title_zh: 用于 3D 严肃游戏中自动任务绩效评估的评估 HTN (A-HTN)
abstract: In the recent years, various 3D mixed reality serious games have been developed for different applications such as physical training, rehabilitation, and education. Task performance in a serious game is a measurement of how efficiently and accurately users accomplish the game's objectives. Prior research includes a graph-based representation of tasks, e.g. Hierarchical Task Network (HTN), which only models a game's tasks but does not perform assessment. In this paper, we propose Assessment HTN (A-HTN), which both models the task efficiently and incorporates assessment logic for game objectives. Based on how the task performance is evaluated, A-HTN automatically performs: (a) Task-level Assessment by comparing object manipulations and (b) Action-level Assessment by comparing motion trajectories. The system can also categorize the task performance assessment into single user or multi-user based on who is being assessed. We showcase the effectiveness of the A-HTN using two 3D VR serious games: a hydrometer experiment and a multi-user chemistry experiment. The A-HTN experiments show a high correlation between instructor scores and the system generated scores indicating that the proposed A-HTN generalizes automatic assessment at par with Subject Matter Experts.
summary: In the recent years, various 3D mixed reality serious games have been developed for different applications such as physical training, rehabilitation, and education. Task performance in a serious game is a measurement of how efficiently and accurately users accomplish the game's objectives. Prior research includes a graph-based representation of tasks, e.g. Hierarchical Task Network (HTN), which only models a game's tasks but does not perform assessment. In this paper, we propose Assessment HTN (A-HTN), which both models the task efficiently and incorporates assessment logic for game objectives. Based on how the task performance is evaluated, A-HTN automatically performs: (a) Task-level Assessment by comparing object manipulations and (b) Action-level Assessment by comparing motion trajectories. The system can also categorize the task performance assessment into single user or multi-user based on who is being assessed. We showcase the effectiveness of the A-HTN using two 3D VR serious games: a hydrometer experiment and a multi-user chemistry experiment. The A-HTN experiments show a high correlation between instructor scores and the system generated scores indicating that the proposed A-HTN generalizes automatic assessment at par with Subject Matter Experts.
abstract_zh: 近年来，针对体能训练、康复、教育等不同应用，开发了各种3D混合现实严肃游戏。严肃游戏中的任务表现是衡量用户如何有效和准确地完成游戏目标的指标。先前的研究包括基于图形的任务表示，例如分层任务网络（HTN），仅对游戏任务进行建模，但不执行评估。在本文中，我们提出了评估 HTN（A-HTN），它既可以有效地对任务进行建模，又可以结合游戏目标的评估逻辑。根据任务绩效的评估方式，A-HTN 自动执行：(a) 通过比较对象操作进行任务级评估，以及 (b) 通过比较运动轨迹进行动作级评估。系统还可以根据评估对象将任务绩效评估分为单用户或多用户。我们使用两个 3D VR 严肃游戏展示了 A-HTN 的有效性：比重计实验和多用户化学实验。 A-HTN 实验显示教师分数与系统生成的分数之间存在高度相关性，表明所提出的 A-HTN 概括了与主题专家相同的自动评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为评估层次任务网络（A-HTN）的新方法，用于在3D严肃游戏中自动评估用户的任务表现。
AI.motivation: 传统层次任务网络（HTN）仅能建模游戏任务而无法进行评估，需开发兼具任务建模与评估逻辑的系统以提升严肃游戏的自动化评估能力。
AI.method: A-HTN通过比较物体操作（任务级）和运动轨迹（动作级）实现自动评估，并根据评估对象区分单用户或多用户模式。
AI.result: 在水银实验和多用户化学实验的测试中，A-HTN生成的评分与教师评分高度相关，验证了其与领域专家相当的评估能力。
AI.conclusion: A-HTN有效实现了严肃游戏中任务表现的自动化评估，为3D虚拟现实环境下的性能分析提供了可靠方案。

search_text: Assessment HTN (A-HTN) for Automated Task Performance Assessment in 3D Serious Games 用于 3D 严肃游戏中自动任务绩效评估的评估 HTN (A-HTN) In the recent years, various 3D mixed reality serious games have been developed for different applications such as physical training, rehabilitation, and education. Task performance in a serious game is a measurement of how efficiently and accurately users accomplish the game's objectives. Prior research includes a graph-based representation of tasks, e.g. Hierarchical Task Network (HTN), which only models a game's tasks but does not perform assessment. In this paper, we propose Assessment HTN (A-HTN), which both models the task efficiently and incorporates assessment logic for game objectives. Based on how the task performance is evaluated, A-HTN automatically performs: (a) Task-level Assessment by comparing object manipulations and (b) Action-level Assessment by comparing motion trajectories. The system can also categorize the task performance assessment into single user or multi-user based on who is being assessed. We showcase the effectiveness of the A-HTN using two 3D VR serious games: a hydrometer experiment and a multi-user chemistry experiment. The A-HTN experiments show a high correlation between instructor scores and the system generated scores indicating that the proposed A-HTN generalizes automatic assessment at par with Subject Matter Experts. 近年来，针对体能训练、康复、教育等不同应用，开发了各种3D混合现实严肃游戏。严肃游戏中的任务表现是衡量用户如何有效和准确地完成游戏目标的指标。先前的研究包括基于图形的任务表示，例如分层任务网络（HTN），仅对游戏任务进行建模，但不执行评估。在本文中，我们提出了评估 HTN（A-HTN），它既可以有效地对任务进行建模，又可以结合游戏目标的评估逻辑。根据任务绩效的评估方式，A-HTN 自动执行：(a) 通过比较对象操作进行任务级评估，以及 (b) 通过比较运动轨迹进行动作级评估。系统还可以根据评估对象将任务绩效评估分为单用户或多用户。我们使用两个 3D VR 严肃游戏展示了 A-HTN 的有效性：比重计实验和多用户化学实验。 A-HTN 实验显示教师分数与系统生成的分数之间存在高度相关性，表明所提出的 A-HTN 概括了与主题专家相同的自动评估。 本文提出一种名为评估层次任务网络（A-HTN）的新方法，用于在3D严肃游戏中自动评估用户的任务表现。 Kevin Desai,Omeed Ashtiani,Balakrishnan Prabhakaran cs.HC,cs.MM

title: Mutation-Based Adversarial Attacks on Neural Text Detectors
title_zh: 对神经文本检测器的基于突变的对抗性攻击
abstract: Neural text detectors aim to decide the characteristics that distinguish neural (machine-generated) from human texts. To challenge such detectors, adversarial attacks can alter the statistical characteristics of the generated text, making the detection task more and more difficult. Inspired by the advances of mutation analysis in software development and testing, in this paper, we propose character- and word-based mutation operators for generating adversarial samples to attack state-of-the-art natural text detectors. This falls under white-box adversarial attacks. In such attacks, attackers have access to the original text and create mutation instances based on this original text. The ultimate goal is to confuse machine learning models and classifiers and decrease their prediction accuracy.
summary: Neural text detectors aim to decide the characteristics that distinguish neural (machine-generated) from human texts. To challenge such detectors, adversarial attacks can alter the statistical characteristics of the generated text, making the detection task more and more difficult. Inspired by the advances of mutation analysis in software development and testing, in this paper, we propose character- and word-based mutation operators for generating adversarial samples to attack state-of-the-art natural text detectors. This falls under white-box adversarial attacks. In such attacks, attackers have access to the original text and create mutation instances based on this original text. The ultimate goal is to confuse machine learning models and classifiers and decrease their prediction accuracy.
abstract_zh: 神经文本检测器旨在确定区分神经（机器生成）文本和人类文本的特征。为了挑战此类检测器，对抗性攻击可以改变生成文本的统计特征，使检测任务变得越来越困难。受到软件开发和测试中突变分析进步的启发，在本文中，我们提出了基于字符和单词的突变算子，用于生成对抗性样本来攻击最先进的自然文本检测器。这属于白盒对抗性攻击。在此类攻击中，攻击者可以访问原始文本并根据该原始文本创建突变实例。最终目标是混淆机器学习模型和分类器并降低其预测准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于字符和词级变异算子的对抗攻击方法，用于攻击神经文本检测器。
AI.motivation: 通过改变生成文本的统计特征以挑战现有检测器，受软件测试中变异分析技术的启发。
AI.method: 设计字符级和词级变异算子生成对抗样本，属于白盒攻击范畴。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效降低主流文本检测器的预测准确性。
AI.conclusion: 变异攻击方法可成功干扰机器学习模型，需进一步研究鲁棒防御机制。

authors_text: Dinghuai Zhang,Ling Pan,Ricky T. Q. Chen,Aaron Courville,Yoshua Bengio
title: Distributional GFlowNets with Quantile Flows
title_zh: 具有分位数流的分布式 GFlowNet
abstract: Generative Flow Networks (GFlowNets) are a new family of probabilistic samplers where an agent learns a stochastic policy for generating complex combinatorial structure through a series of decision-making steps. Despite being inspired from reinforcement learning, the current GFlowNet framework is relatively limited in its applicability and cannot handle stochasticity in the reward function. In this work, we adopt a distributional paradigm for GFlowNets, turning each flow function into a distribution, thus providing more informative learning signals during training. By parameterizing each edge flow through their quantile functions, our proposed \textit{quantile matching} GFlowNet learning algorithm is able to learn a risk-sensitive policy, an essential component for handling scenarios with risk uncertainty. Moreover, we find that the distributional approach can achieve substantial improvement on existing benchmarks compared to prior methods due to our enhanced training algorithm, even in settings with deterministic rewards.
summary: Generative Flow Networks (GFlowNets) are a new family of probabilistic samplers where an agent learns a stochastic policy for generating complex combinatorial structure through a series of decision-making steps. Despite being inspired from reinforcement learning, the current GFlowNet framework is relatively limited in its applicability and cannot handle stochasticity in the reward function. In this work, we adopt a distributional paradigm for GFlowNets, turning each flow function into a distribution, thus providing more informative learning signals during training. By parameterizing each edge flow through their quantile functions, our proposed \textit{quantile matching} GFlowNet learning algorithm is able to learn a risk-sensitive policy, an essential component for handling scenarios with risk uncertainty. Moreover, we find that the distributional approach can achieve substantial improvement on existing benchmarks compared to prior methods due to our enhanced training algorithm, even in settings with deterministic rewards.
abstract_zh: 生成流网络（GFlowNets）是一个新的概率采样器系列，其中代理学习随机策略，通过一系列决策步骤生成复杂的组合结构。尽管受到强化学习的启发，当前的 GFlowNet 框架的适用性相对有限，并且无法处理奖励函数中的随机性。在这项工作中，我们采用 GFlowNet 的分布式范例，将每个流函数转变为一个分布，从而在训练期间提供更多信息丰富的学习信号。通过通过分位数函数对每个边缘流进行参数化，我们提出的 \textit{分位数匹配} GFlowNet 学习算法能够学习风险敏感策略，这是处理风险不确定性场景的重要组成部分。此外，我们发现，由于我们增强的训练算法，即使在具有确定性奖励的环境中，与先前的方法相比，分布式方法也可以在现有基准上实现实质性改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分位数流的分布式GFlowNet方法，通过参数化边流的分位数函数来学习风险敏感策略，以解决现有GFlowNet框架在处理奖励函数随机性方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有GFlowNet框架无法有效处理奖励函数的随机性，导致在风险不确定性场景下表现受限，需通过分布范式增强学习信号以提升策略鲁棒性。
AI.method: 将GFlowNet的边流函数参数化为分位数函数，提出量化匹配学习算法，通过分布估计实现风险敏感策略学习，并优化训练过程以提升模型性能。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，该方法相比现有技术取得显著提升，尤其在存在风险不确定性的场景下表现更优，且在确定性奖励任务中也保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 分布式GFlowNet框架结合分位数流参数化能有效增强模型对风险的适应能力，为复杂组合结构生成任务提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。
