In this work, we adopt a distributional paradigm for GFlowNets, turning each flow function into a distribution, thus providing more informative learning signals during training. By parameterizing each edge flow through their quantile functions, our proposed \textit{quantile matching} GFlowNet learning algorithm is able to learn a risk-sensitive policy, an essential component for handling scenarios with risk uncertainty. Moreover, we find that the distributional approach can achieve substantial improvement on existing benchmarks compared to prior methods due to our enhanced training algorithm, even in settings with deterministic rewards. 生成流网络（GFlowNets）是一个新的概率采样器系列，其中代理学习随机策略，通过一系列决策步骤生成复杂的组合结构。尽管受到强化学习的启发，当前的 GFlowNet 框架的适用性相对有限，并且无法处理奖励函数中的随机性。在这项工作中，我们采用 GFlowNet 的分布式范例，将每个流函数转变为一个分布，从而在训练期间提供更多信息丰富的学习信号。通过通过分位数函数对每个边缘流进行参数化，我们提出的 \textit{分位数匹配} GFlowNet 学习算法能够学习风险敏感策略，这是处理风险不确定性场景的重要组成部分。此外，我们发现，由于我们增强的训练算法，即使在具有确定性奖励的环境中，与先前的方法相比，分布式方法也可以在现有基准上实现实质性改进。 本文提出一种基于分位数流的分布式GFlowNet方法，通过参数化边流的分位数函数来学习风险敏感策略，以解决现有GFlowNet框架在处理奖励函数随机性方面的不足。 Dinghuai Zhang,Ling Pan,Ricky T. Q. Chen,Aaron Courville,Yoshua Bengio cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.CO,stat.ML

title: Fairness-aware Multi-view Clustering
title_zh: 公平感知的多视图聚类
abstract: In the era of big data, we are often facing the challenge of data heterogeneity and the lack of label information simultaneously. In the financial domain (e.g., fraud detection), the heterogeneous data may include not only numerical data (e.g., total debt and yearly income), but also text and images (e.g., financial statement and invoice images). At the same time, the label information (e.g., fraud transactions) may be missing for building predictive models. To address these challenges, many state-of-the-art multi-view clustering methods have been proposed and achieved outstanding performance. However, these methods typically do not take into consideration the fairness aspect and are likely to generate biased results using sensitive information such as race and gender. Therefore, in this paper, we propose a fairness-aware multi-view clustering method named FairMVC. It incorporates the group fairness constraint into the soft membership assignment for each cluster to ensure that the fraction of different groups in each cluster is approximately identical to the entire data set. Meanwhile, we adopt the idea of both contrastive learning and non-contrastive learning and propose novel regularizers to handle heterogeneous data in complex scenarios with missing data or noisy features. Experimental results on real-world data sets demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of the proposed framework. We also derive insights regarding the relative performance of the proposed regularizers in various scenarios.
summary: In the era of big data, we are often facing the challenge of data heterogeneity and the lack of label information simultaneously. In the financial domain (e.g., fraud detection), the heterogeneous data may include not only numerical data (e.g., total debt and yearly income), but also text and images (e.g., financial statement and invoice images). At the same time, the label information (e.g., fraud transactions) may be missing for building predictive models. To address these challenges, many state-of-the-art multi-view clustering methods have been proposed and achieved outstanding performance. However, these methods typically do not take into consideration the fairness aspect and are likely to generate biased results using sensitive information such as race and gender. Therefore, in this paper, we propose a fairness-aware multi-view clustering method named FairMVC. It incorporates the group fairness constraint into the soft membership assignment for each cluster to ensure that the fraction of different groups in each cluster is approximately identical to the entire data set. Meanwhile, we adopt the idea of both contrastive learning and non-contrastive learning and propose novel regularizers to handle heterogeneous data in complex scenarios with missing data or noisy features. Experimental results on real-world data sets demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of the proposed framework. We also derive insights regarding the relative performance of the proposed regularizers in various scenarios.
abstract_zh: 大数据时代，我们常常同时面临数据异构性和标签信息缺失的挑战。在金融领域（例如欺诈检测），异构数据可能不仅包括数字数据（例如总债务和年收入），还包括文本和图像（例如财务报表和发票图像）。同时，构建预测模型时可能会丢失标签信息（例如欺诈交易）。为了应对这些挑战，人们提出了许多最先进的多视图聚类方法并取得了出色的性能。然而，这些方法通常不考虑公平性，并且可能使用种族和性别等敏感信息产生有偏见的结果。因此，在本文中，我们提出了一种公平感知的多视图聚类方法，名为 FairMVC。它将组公平约束合并到每个集群的软成员资格分配中，以确保每个集群中不同组的比例与整个数据集大致相同。同时，我们采用对比学习和非对比学习的思想，并提出新颖的正则化器来处理具有缺失数据或噪声特征的复杂场景中的异构数据。真实世界数据集的实验结果证明了所提出框架的有效性和效率。我们还得出了有关所提出的正则化器在各种情况下的相对性能的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种兼顾公平性的多视角聚类方法FairMVC，用于处理金融领域等复杂场景下的异构数据聚类问题。
AI.motivation: 现有聚类方法在处理异构数据时易受敏感属性（如性别、种族）影响产生偏差，而金融等领域的实际需求要求聚类结果需满足公平性约束。
AI.method: 通过引入组公平性约束优化软聚类分配，结合对比学习与非对比学习思想设计新型正则化项，有效处理缺失数据和噪声特征。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上验证了方法的有效性和效率，并分析了不同正则化项在多种场景下的相对性能表现。
AI.conclusion: FairMVC框架在保证聚类性能的同时实现了组间公平性，为复杂异构数据的公平聚类提供了新思路和实践指导。

authors_text: Yi Ren,Shangmin Guo,Wonho Bae,Danica J. Sutherland
title: How to prepare your task head for finetuning
title_zh: 如何准备任务头进行微调
abstract: In deep learning, transferring information from a pretrained network to a downstream task by finetuning has many benefits. The choice of task head plays an important role in fine-tuning, as the pretrained and downstream tasks are usually different. Although there exist many different designs for finetuning, a full understanding of when and why these algorithms work has been elusive. We analyze how the choice of task head controls feature adaptation and hence influences the downstream performance. By decomposing the learning dynamics of adaptation, we find that the key aspect is the training accuracy and loss at the beginning of finetuning, which determines the "energy" available for the feature's adaptation. We identify a significant trend in the effect of changes in this initial energy on the resulting features after fine-tuning. Specifically, as the energy increases, the Euclidean and cosine distances between the resulting and original features increase, while their dot products (and the resulting features' norm) first increase and then decrease. Inspired by this, we give several practical principles that lead to better downstream performance. We analytically prove this trend in an overparamterized linear setting and verify its applicability to different experimental settings.
summary: In deep learning, transferring information from a pretrained network to a downstream task by finetuning has many benefits. The choice of task head plays an important role in fine-tuning, as the pretrained and downstream tasks are usually different. Although there exist many different designs for finetuning, a full understanding of when and why these algorithms work has been elusive. We analyze how the choice of task head controls feature adaptation and hence influences the downstream performance. By decomposing the learning dynamics of adaptation, we find that the key aspect is the training accuracy and loss at the beginning of finetuning, which determines the "energy" available for the feature's adaptation. We identify a significant trend in the effect of changes in this initial energy on the resulting features after fine-tuning. Specifically, as the energy increases, the Euclidean and cosine distances between the resulting and original features increase, while their dot products (and the resulting features' norm) first increase and then decrease. Inspired by this, we give several practical principles that lead to better downstream performance. We analytically prove this trend in an overparamterized linear setting and verify its applicability to different experimental settings.
abstract_zh: 在深度学习中，通过微调将信息从预训练网络传输到下游任务有很多好处。任务头的选择在微调中起着重要作用，因为预训练任务和下游任务通常是不同的。尽管存在许多不同的微调设计，但对这些算法何时以及为何起作用的充分理解一直难以实现。我们分析任务头的选择如何控制特征适应，从而影响下游性能。通过分解适应的学习动态，我们发现关键的方面是微调开始时的训练精度和损失，这决定了特征适应的可用“能量”。我们发现初始能量的变化对微调后所得特征的影响存在显着趋势。具体来说，随着能量的增加，结果特征和原始特征之间的欧几里德距离和余弦距离增加，而它们的点积（以及结果特征的范数）首先增加然后减少。受此启发，我们给出了一些可以提高下游性能的实用原则。我们通过分析证明了过度参数化线性设置中的这种趋势，并验证了其对不同实验设置的适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在微调过程中任务头设计对下游任务性能的影响，分析了初始训练阶段的能量如何影响特征适应过程。
AI.motivation: 尽管微调方法众多，但缺乏对任务头选择机制及其对特征适应影响的系统性理解，导致实际应用中效果参差不齐。
AI.method: 通过分解微调过程的学习动态，量化分析初始训练准确率和损失（定义为'能量'）对特征适应的影响，并在过参数化线性模型中进行理论验证。
AI.result: 发现初始能量增加会导致特征欧氏距离和余弦距离扩大，点积及特征范数呈现先增后减趋势，据此提出优化任务头设计的实用原则。
AI.conclusion: 任务头的初始能量是控制特征适应的关键因素，基于该发现提出的优化原则可提升微调效果，且理论结论在多种实验设置中得到验证。

title: Stochastic Surprisal: An inferential measurement of Free Energy in Neural Networks
title_zh: 随机意外：神经网络中自由能的推断测量
comment: Paper accepted at Frontiers in Neuroscience
comments: Paper accepted at Frontiers in Neuroscience
abstract: This paper conjectures and validates a framework that allows for action during inference in supervised neural networks. Supervised neural networks are constructed with the objective to maximize their performance metric in any given task. This is done by reducing free energy and its associated surprisal during training. However, the bottom-up inference nature of supervised networks is a passive process that renders them fallible to noise. In this paper, we provide a thorough background of supervised neural networks, both generative and discriminative, and discuss their functionality from the perspective of free energy principle. We then provide a framework for introducing action during inference. We introduce a new measurement called stochastic surprisal that is a function of the network, the input, and any possible action. This action can be any one of the outputs that the neural network has learnt, thereby lending stochasticity to the measurement. Stochastic surprisal is validated on two applications: Image Quality Assessment and Recognition under noisy conditions. We show that, while noise characteristics are ignored to make robust recognition, they are analyzed to estimate image quality scores. We apply stochastic surprisal on two applications, three datasets, and as a plug-in on twelve networks. In all, it provides a statistically significant increase among all measures. We conclude by discussing the implications of the proposed stochastic surprisal in other areas of cognitive psychology including expectancy-mismatch and abductive reasoning.
summary: This paper conjectures and validates a framework that allows for action during inference in supervised neural networks. Supervised neural networks are constructed with the objective to maximize their performance metric in any given task. This is done by reducing free energy and its associated surprisal during training. However, the bottom-up inference nature of supervised networks is a passive process that renders them fallible to noise. In this paper, we provide a thorough background of supervised neural networks, both generative and discriminative, and discuss their functionality from the perspective of free energy principle. We then provide a framework for introducing action during inference. We introduce a new measurement called stochastic surprisal that is a function of the network, the input, and any possible action. This action can be any one of the outputs that the neural network has learnt, thereby lending stochasticity to the measurement. Stochastic surprisal is validated on two applications: Image Quality Assessment and Recognition under noisy conditions. We show that, while noise characteristics are ignored to make robust recognition, they are analyzed to estimate image quality scores. We apply stochastic surprisal on two applications, three datasets, and as a plug-in on twelve networks. In all, it provides a statistically significant increase among all measures. We conclude by discussing the implications of the proposed stochastic surprisal in other areas of cognitive psychology including expectancy-mismatch and abductive reasoning.
abstract_zh: 本文推测并验证了一个允许在监督神经网络推理过程中采取行动的框架。构建监督神经网络的目标是在任何给定任务中最大化其性能指标。这是通过减少训练期间的自由能及其相关的意外来实现的。然而，监督网络自下而上的推理本质是一个被动过程，这使得它们容易受到噪声的影响。在本文中，我们提供了监督神经网络（生成式和判别式）的全面背景，并从自由能原理的角度讨论了它们的功能。然后，我们提供了一个在推理过程中引入操作的框架。我们引入了一种称为随机意外的新测量方法，它是网络、输入和任何可能的操作的函数。这一动作可以是神经网络学到的任何一个输出，从而为测量提供随机性。随机惊喜在两个应用中得到验证：图像质量评估和噪声条件下的识别。我们表明，虽然为了进行稳健的识别而忽略噪声特征，但对它们进行分析以估计图像质量分数。我们将随机惊喜应用于两个应用程序、三个数据集，并作为十二个网络的插件。总而言之，它在所有措施中提供了统计上显着的增长。最后，我们讨论了所提出的随机惊喜在认知心理学其他领域（包括期望不匹配和溯因推理）的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'随机惊讶度'的新度量方法，用于在监督神经网络的推理过程中引入动作，以提升模型在噪声环境下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 监督神经网络的自下而上推理过程被动且易受噪声影响，现有方法难以有效处理噪声数据并评估图像质量。
AI.method: 基于自由能原理，提出随机惊讶度作为网络、输入和可能动作的函数，并在图像质量评估和噪声识别任务中验证其有效性。
AI.result: 在两个应用、三个数据集和十二个网络上的实验表明，随机惊讶度显著提升了所有评估指标的统计性能。
AI.conclusion: 随机惊讶度为认知心理学中的预期错配和归纳推理等领域的研究提供了新视角和工具。

search_text: Stochastic Surprisal: An inferential measurement of Free Energy in Neural Networks 随机意外：神经网络中自由能的推断测量 This paper conjectures and validates a framework that allows for action during inference in supervised neural networks. Supervised neural networks are constructed with the objective to maximize their performance metric in any given task. This is done by reducing free energy and its associated surprisal during training. However, the bottom-up inference nature of supervised networks is a passive process that renders them fallible to noise. In this paper, we provide a thorough background of supervised neural networks, both generative and discriminative, and discuss their functionality from the perspective of free energy principle. We then provide a framework for introducing action during inference. We introduce a new measurement called stochastic surprisal that is a function of the network, the input, and any possible action. This action can be any one of the outputs that the neural network has learnt, thereby lending stochasticity to the measurement. Stochastic surprisal is validated on two applications: Image Quality Assessment and Recognition under noisy conditions. We show that, while noise characteristics are ignored to make robust recognition, they are analyzed to estimate image quality scores. We apply stochastic surprisal on two applications, three datasets, and as a plug-in on twelve networks. In all, it provides a statistically significant increase among all measures. We conclude by discussing the implications of the proposed stochastic surprisal in other areas of cognitive psychology including expectancy-mismatch and abductive reasoning. 本文推测并验证了一个允许在监督神经网络推理过程中采取行动的框架。构建监督神经网络的目标是在任何给定任务中最大化其性能指标。这是通过减少训练期间的自由能及其相关的意外来实现的。然而，监督网络自下而上的推理本质是一个被动过程，这使得它们容易受到噪声的影响。在本文中，我们提供了监督神经网络（生成式和判别式）的全面背景，并从自由能原理的角度讨论了它们的功能。然后，我们提供了一个在推理过程中引入操作的框架。我们引入了一种称为随机意外的新测量方法，它是网络、输入和任何可能的操作的函数。这一动作可以是神经网络学到的任何一个输出，从而为测量提供随机性。随机惊喜在两个应用中得到验证：图像质量评估和噪声条件下的识别。我们表明，虽然为了进行稳健的识别而忽略噪声特征，但对它们进行分析以估计图像质量分数。我们将随机惊喜应用于两个应用程序、三个数据集，并作为十二个网络的插件。总而言之，它在所有措施中提供了统计上显着的增长。最后，我们讨论了所提出的随机惊喜在认知心理学其他领域（包括期望不匹配和溯因推理）的影响。 本文提出了一种名为'随机惊讶度'的新度量方法，用于在监督神经网络的推理过程中引入动作，以提升模型在噪声环境下的鲁棒性。 Mohit Prabhushankar,Ghassan AlRegib cs.LG,cs.CV

title: Towards Multi-User Activity Recognition through Facilitated Training Data and Deep Learning for Human-Robot Collaboration Applications
title_zh: 通过人机协作应用程序的简化训练数据和深度学习实现多用户活动识别
comment: This is the accepted manuscript. Please see published version at https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/10191782
comments: This is the accepted manuscript. Please see published version at https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/10191782
abstract: Human-robot interaction (HRI) research is progressively addressing multi-party scenarios, where a robot interacts with more than one human user at the same time. Conversely, research is still at an early stage for human-robot collaboration. The use of machine learning techniques to handle such type of collaboration requires data that are less feasible to produce than in a typical HRC setup. This work outlines scenarios of concurrent tasks for non-dyadic HRC applications. Based upon these concepts, this study also proposes an alternative way of gathering data regarding multi-user activity, by collecting data related to single users and merging them in post-processing, to reduce the effort involved in producing recordings of pair settings. To validate this statement, 3D skeleton poses of activity of single users were collected and merged in pairs. After this, such datapoints were used to separately train a long short-term memory (LSTM) network and a variational autoencoder (VAE) composed of spatio-temporal graph convolutional networks (STGCN) to recognise the joint activities of the pairs of people. The results showed that it is possible to make use of data collected in this way for pair HRC settings and get similar performances compared to using training data regarding groups of users recorded under the same settings, relieving from the technical difficulties involved in producing these data. The related code and collected data are publicly available.
summary: Human-robot interaction (HRI) research is progressively addressing multi-party scenarios, where a robot interacts with more than one human user at the same time. Conversely, research is still at an early stage for human-robot collaboration. The use of machine learning techniques to handle such type of collaboration requires data that are less feasible to produce than in a typical HRC setup. This work outlines scenarios of concurrent tasks for non-dyadic HRC applications. Based upon these concepts, this study also proposes an alternative way of gathering data regarding multi-user activity, by collecting data related to single users and merging them in post-processing, to reduce the effort involved in producing recordings of pair settings. To validate this statement, 3D skeleton poses of activity of single users were collected and merged in pairs. After this, such datapoints were used to separately train a long short-term memory (LSTM) network and a variational autoencoder (VAE) composed of spatio-temporal graph convolutional networks (STGCN) to recognise the joint activities of the pairs of people. The results showed that it is possible to make use of data collected in this way for pair HRC settings and get similar performances compared to using training data regarding groups of users recorded under the same settings, relieving from the technical difficulties involved in producing these data. The related code and collected data are publicly available.
abstract_zh: 人机交互（HRI）研究正在逐步解决多方场景，即机器人同时与多个人类用户交互。相反，人机协作的研究仍处于早期阶段。使用机器学习技术来处理此类协作所需的数据与典型的 HRC 设置相比不太可行。这项工作概述了非二元 HRC 应用程序的并发任务场景。基于这些概念，本研究还提出了一种收集多用户活动数据的替代方法，即收集与单个用户相关的数据并在后处理中合并它们，以减少生成配对设置记录所涉及的工作量。为了验证这一说法，我们收集了单个用户活动的 3D 骨架姿势并成对合并。之后，这些数据点被用来分别训练一个长短期记忆（LSTM）网络和一个由时空图卷积网络（STGCN）组成的变分自动编码器（VAE）来识别人们的联合活动。结果表明，与使用在相同设置下记录的用户组的训练数据相比，可以利用以这种方式收集的数据进行配对 HRC 设置并获得类似的性能，从而减轻了生成这些数据所涉及的技术困难。相关代码和收集的数据都是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过单用户活动数据的后期处理合并来实现多用户活动识别的方法，并应用于人机协作场景。
AI.motivation: 在多用户人机协作场景中，获取多用户活动数据较为困难，因此需要一种更高效的数据收集方法。
AI.method: 通过收集单用户的3D骨架姿态数据，并在后期处理中将其合并为多用户数据，然后使用LSTM网络和STGCN组成的VAE进行多用户活动识别。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，使用这种方法获得的多用户活动识别效果与直接收集多用户数据的效果相当。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解了多用户活动数据收集的技术难题，为多用户人机协作应用提供了可行的解决方案。

title: Interpretable Deep Learning for Forecasting Online Advertising Costs: Insights from the Competitive Bidding Landscape
title_zh: 用于预测在线广告成本的可解释深度学习：来自竞争性投标环境的见解
comment: Acceptd at IEEE DSAA 2024, 10 pages, 8 figures, 3 tables
comments: Acceptd at IEEE DSAA 2024, 10 pages, 8 figures, 3 tables
abstract: As advertisers increasingly shift their budgets toward digital advertising, accurately forecasting advertising costs becomes essential for optimizing marketing campaign returns. This paper presents a comprehensive study that employs various time-series forecasting methods to predict daily average CPC in the online advertising market. We evaluate the performance of statistical models, machine learning techniques, and deep learning approaches, including the Temporal Fusion Transformer (TFT). Our findings reveal that incorporating multivariate models, enriched with covariates derived from competitors' CPC patterns through time-series clustering, significantly improves forecasting accuracy. We interpret the results by analyzing feature importance and temporal attention, demonstrating how the models leverage both the advertiser's data and insights from the competitive landscape. Additionally, our method proves robust during major market shifts, such as the COVID-19 pandemic, consistently outperforming models that rely solely on individual advertisers' data. This study introduces a scalable technique for selecting relevant covariates from a broad pool of advertisers, offering more accurate long-term forecasts and strategic insights into budget allocation and competitive dynamics in digital advertising.
summary: As advertisers increasingly shift their budgets toward digital advertising, accurately forecasting advertising costs becomes essential for optimizing marketing campaign returns. This paper presents a comprehensive study that employs various time-series forecasting methods to predict daily average CPC in the online advertising market. We evaluate the performance of statistical models, machine learning techniques, and deep learning approaches, including the Temporal Fusion Transformer (TFT). Our findings reveal that incorporating multivariate models, enriched with covariates derived from competitors' CPC patterns through time-series clustering, significantly improves forecasting accuracy. We interpret the results by analyzing feature importance and temporal attention, demonstrating how the models leverage both the advertiser's data and insights from the competitive landscape. Additionally, our method proves robust during major market shifts, such as the COVID-19 pandemic, consistently outperforming models that rely solely on individual advertisers' data. This study introduces a scalable technique for selecting relevant covariates from a broad pool of advertisers, offering more accurate long-term forecasts and strategic insights into budget allocation and competitive dynamics in digital advertising.
abstract_zh: 随着广告商越来越多地将预算转向数字广告，准确预测广告成本对于优化营销活动回报至关重要。本文提出了一项综合研究，采用各种时间序列预测方法来预测在线广告市场的日平均每次点击费用。我们评估统计模型、机器学习技术和深度学习方法（包括时间融合变压器（TFT））的性能。我们的研究结果表明，结合多变量模型，并通过时间序列聚类从竞争对手的 CPC 模式中获取丰富的协变量，可显着提高预测准确性。我们通过分析特征重要性和时间注意力来解释结果，展示模型如何利用广告商的数据和竞争格局的见解。此外，事实证明，我们的方法在重大市场变化期间（例如 COVID-19 大流行）非常稳健，始终优于仅依赖个体广告商数据的模型。这项研究引入了一种可扩展的技术，用于从广泛的广告商中选择相关协变量，从而为数字广告中的预算分配和竞争动态提供更准确的长期预测和战略见解。

AI.tldr: 本文通过结合竞争者数据和深度学习模型，研究如何准确预测在线广告成本，优化广告预算分配。
AI.motivation: 随着广告预算向数字广告转移，精准预测广告成本对优化营销回报至关重要，但现有模型未能充分考虑竞争环境动态。
AI.method: 采用时间序列预测方法（包括统计模型、机器学习及Temporal Fusion Transformer），通过时间序列聚类提取竞争者CPC模式作为协变量，构建多变量模型。
AI.result: 多变量模型显著提升预测精度，尤其在疫情等市场突变期表现稳健，且可扩展选择相关协变量以支持长期预测与竞争策略分析。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为数字广告领域提供了可扩展的预测框架，助力广告主优化预算分配并深入理解竞争格局。

search_text: Interpretable Deep Learning for Forecasting Online Advertising Costs: Insights from the Competitive Bidding Landscape 用于预测在线广告成本的可解释深度学习：来自竞争性投标环境的见解 As advertisers increasingly shift their budgets toward digital advertising, accurately forecasting advertising costs becomes essential for optimizing marketing campaign returns. This paper presents a comprehensive study that employs various time-series forecasting methods to predict daily average CPC in the online advertising market. We evaluate the performance of statistical models, machine learning techniques, and deep learning approaches, including the Temporal Fusion Transformer (TFT). Our findings reveal that incorporating multivariate models, enriched with covariates derived from competitors' CPC patterns through time-series clustering, significantly improves forecasting accuracy. We interpret the results by analyzing feature importance and temporal attention, demonstrating how the models leverage both the advertiser's data and insights from the competitive landscape. Additionally, our method proves robust during major market shifts, such as the COVID-19 pandemic, consistently outperforming models that rely solely on individual advertisers' data. This study introduces a scalable technique for selecting relevant covariates from a broad pool of advertisers, offering more accurate long-term forecasts and strategic insights into budget allocation and competitive dynamics in digital advertising. 随着广告商越来越多地将预算转向数字广告，准确预测广告成本对于优化营销活动回报至关重要。本文提出了一项综合研究，采用各种时间序列预测方法来预测在线广告市场的日平均每次点击费用。我们评估统计模型、机器学习技术和深度学习方法（包括时间融合变压器（TFT））的性能。我们的研究结果表明，结合多变量模型，并通过时间序列聚类从竞争对手的 CPC 模式中获取丰富的协变量，可显着提高预测准确性。我们通过分析特征重要性和时间注意力来解释结果，展示模型如何利用广告商的数据和竞争格局的见解。此外，事实证明，我们的方法在重大市场变化期间（例如 COVID-19 大流行）非常稳健，始终优于仅依赖个体广告商数据的模型。这项研究引入了一种可扩展的技术，用于从广泛的广告商中选择相关协变量，从而为数字广告中的预算分配和竞争动态提供更准确的长期预测和战略见解。 本文通过结合竞争者数据和深度学习模型，研究如何准确预测在线广告成本，优化广告预算分配。 Fynn Oldenburg,Qiwei Han,Maximilian Kaiser cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.SI

title: Improving Sign Recognition with Phonology
title_zh: 利用音韵学提高符号识别能力
abstract: We use insights from research on American Sign Language (ASL) phonology to train models for isolated sign language recognition (ISLR), a step towards automatic sign language understanding. Our key insight is to explicitly recognize the role of phonology in sign production to achieve more accurate ISLR than existing work which does not consider sign language phonology. We train ISLR models that take in pose estimations of a signer producing a single sign to predict not only the sign but additionally its phonological characteristics, such as the handshape. These auxiliary predictions lead to a nearly 9% absolute gain in sign recognition accuracy on the WLASL benchmark, with consistent improvements in ISLR regardless of the underlying prediction model architecture. This work has the potential to accelerate linguistic research in the domain of signed languages and reduce communication barriers between deaf and hearing people.
summary: We use insights from research on American Sign Language (ASL) phonology to train models for isolated sign language recognition (ISLR), a step towards automatic sign language understanding. Our key insight is to explicitly recognize the role of phonology in sign production to achieve more accurate ISLR than existing work which does not consider sign language phonology. We train ISLR models that take in pose estimations of a signer producing a single sign to predict not only the sign but additionally its phonological characteristics, such as the handshape. These auxiliary predictions lead to a nearly 9% absolute gain in sign recognition accuracy on the WLASL benchmark, with consistent improvements in ISLR regardless of the underlying prediction model architecture. This work has the potential to accelerate linguistic research in the domain of signed languages and reduce communication barriers between deaf and hearing people.
abstract_zh: 我们利用美国手语 (ASL) 音系学研究的见解来训练孤立手语识别 (ISLR) 模型，这是迈向自动手语理解的一步。我们的主要见解是明确认识到音系学在手语产生中的作用，以实现比不考虑手语音系学的现有工作更准确的 ISLR。我们训练 ISLR 模型，该模型接受手语者发出单个手势的姿势估计，不仅可以预测该手势，还可以预测其语音特征，例如手形。这些辅助预测使 WLASL 基准上的标志识别准确度绝对提高了近 9%，无论底层预测模型架构如何，ISLR 都得到了持续改进。这项工作有可能加速手语领域的语言研究，并减少聋哑人和听力正常的人之间的沟通障碍。

AI.tldr: 本文通过引入手语语法学特征提升孤立手势识别（ISLR）的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有手势识别模型未考虑手语语法学特性，导致识别准确率不足。
AI.method: 训练模型同时预测手势本身及其语音特征（如手形），利用姿势估计数据作为输入。
AI.result: 在WLASL基准测试中实现近9%的绝对准确率提升，且模型架构无关。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可推动手语语言学研究，并缓解聋人与听力人群的沟通障碍。

title: Multispectral Contrastive Learning with Viewmaker Networks
title_zh: 使用 Viewmaker Networks 进行多光谱对比学习
abstract: Contrastive learning methods have been applied to a range of domains and modalities by training models to identify similar "views" of data points. However, specialized scientific modalities pose a challenge for this paradigm, as identifying good views for each scientific instrument is complex and time-intensive. In this paper, we focus on applying contrastive learning approaches to a variety of remote sensing datasets. We show that Viewmaker networks, a recently proposed method for generating views, are promising for producing views in this setting without requiring extensive domain knowledge and trial and error. We apply Viewmaker to four multispectral imaging problems, each with a different format, finding that Viewmaker can outperform cropping- and reflection-based methods for contrastive learning in every case when evaluated on downstream classification tasks. This provides additional evidence that domain-agnostic methods can empower contrastive learning to scale to real-world scientific domains. Open source code can be found at https://github.com/jbayrooti/divmaker.
summary: Contrastive learning methods have been applied to a range of domains and modalities by training models to identify similar "views" of data points. However, specialized scientific modalities pose a challenge for this paradigm, as identifying good views for each scientific instrument is complex and time-intensive. In this paper, we focus on applying contrastive learning approaches to a variety of remote sensing datasets. We show that Viewmaker networks, a recently proposed method for generating views, are promising for producing views in this setting without requiring extensive domain knowledge and trial and error. We apply Viewmaker to four multispectral imaging problems, each with a different format, finding that Viewmaker can outperform cropping- and reflection-based methods for contrastive learning in every case when evaluated on downstream classification tasks. This provides additional evidence that domain-agnostic methods can empower contrastive learning to scale to real-world scientific domains. Open source code can be found at https://github.com/jbayrooti/divmaker.
abstract_zh: 通过训练模型来识别数据点的相似“视图”，对比学习方法已应用于一系列领域和模式。然而，专门的科学模式对这种范式提出了挑战，因为为每种科学仪器确定好的观点是复杂且耗时的。在本文中，我们重点关注将对比学习方法应用于各种遥感数据集。我们表明 Viewmaker 网络是最近提出的一种生成视图的方法，有望在这种情况下生成视图，而无需广泛的领域知识和反复试验。我们将 Viewmaker 应用于四个多光谱成像问题，每个问题都有不同的格式，发现在下游分类任务上进行评估时，Viewmaker 在每种情况下都可以优于基于裁剪和反射的对比学习方法。这提供了额外的证据，表明与领域无关的方法可以使对比学习扩展到现实世界的科学领域。开源代码可以在 https://github.com/jbayrooti/divmaker 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用Viewmaker网络在多光谱遥感数据中生成对比学习视图，无需依赖领域知识。
AI.motivation: 传统对比学习在科学领域应用时，生成高质量视图需要大量领域知识和试验，而Viewmaker网络可降低这一门槛。
AI.method: 通过Viewmaker网络生成多光谱数据视图，并在四个不同格式的遥感任务中验证其效果，对比裁剪和反射方法。
AI.result: 在所有下游分类任务中，Viewmaker生成的视图均优于传统方法，证明其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 领域无关的Viewmaker方法可推动对比学习在真实科学场景中的扩展应用。

authors_text: Cong Han,Vishal Choudhari,Yinghao Aaron Li,Nima Mesgarani
title: Improved Decoding of Attentional Selection in Multi-Talker Environments with Self-Supervised Learned Speech Representation
title_zh: 利用自监督学习语音表示改进多说话者环境中注意力选择的解码
abstract: Auditory attention decoding (AAD) is a technique used to identify and amplify the talker that a listener is focused on in a noisy environment. This is done by comparing the listener's brainwaves to a representation of all the sound sources to find the closest match. The representation is typically the waveform or spectrogram of the sounds. The effectiveness of these representations for AAD is uncertain. In this study, we examined the use of self-supervised learned speech representation in improving the accuracy and speed of AAD. We recorded the brain activity of three subjects using invasive electrocorticography (ECoG) as they listened to two conversations and focused on one. We used WavLM to extract a latent representation of each talker and trained a spatiotemporal filter to map brain activity to intermediate representations of speech. During the evaluation, the reconstructed representation is compared to each speaker's representation to determine the target speaker. Our results indicate that speech representation from WavLM provides better decoding accuracy and speed than the speech envelope and spectrogram. Our findings demonstrate the advantages of self-supervised learned speech representation for auditory attention decoding and pave the way for developing brain-controlled hearable technologies.
summary: Auditory attention decoding (AAD) is a technique used to identify and amplify the talker that a listener is focused on in a noisy environment. This is done by comparing the listener's brainwaves to a representation of all the sound sources to find the closest match. The representation is typically the waveform or spectrogram of the sounds. The effectiveness of these representations for AAD is uncertain. In this study, we examined the use of self-supervised learned speech representation in improving the accuracy and speed of AAD. We recorded the brain activity of three subjects using invasive electrocorticography (ECoG) as they listened to two conversations and focused on one. We used WavLM to extract a latent representation of each talker and trained a spatiotemporal filter to map brain activity to intermediate representations of speech. During the evaluation, the reconstructed representation is compared to each speaker's representation to determine the target speaker. Our results indicate that speech representation from WavLM provides better decoding accuracy and speed than the speech envelope and spectrogram. Our findings demonstrate the advantages of self-supervised learned speech representation for auditory attention decoding and pave the way for developing brain-controlled hearable technologies.
abstract_zh: 听觉注意力解码 (AAD) 是一种用于识别和放大嘈杂环境中听众所关注的说话者的技术。这是通过将听众的脑电波与所有声源的表示进行比较以找到最接近的匹配来完成的。该表示通常是声音的波形或频谱图。这些 AAD 表述的有效性尚不确定。在这项研究中，我们研究了使用自监督学习语音表示来提高 AAD 的准确性和速度。我们使用侵入性皮质电图（ECoG）记录了三名受试者在听两段对话并专注于其中一段对话时的大脑活动。我们使用 WavLM 提取每个说话者的潜在表示，并训练时空滤波器将大脑活动映射到语音的中间表示。在评估过程中，将重建的表示与每个说话者的表示进行比较以确定目标说话者。我们的结果表明，WavLM 的语音表示比语音包络和频谱图提供了更好的解码精度和速度。我们的研究结果证明了自监督学习语音表示在听觉注意力解码方面的优势，并为开发大脑控制的可听技术铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文研究利用自监督学习的语音表征提升多说话人环境中听觉注意力解码的准确性与速度。
AI.motivation: 传统听觉注意力解码方法依赖波形或频谱图表征，但其效果存疑，需探索更优的语音表征方式以提升解码性能。
AI.method: 采用侵入式皮层脑电图记录受试者在双人对话中的脑活动，使用WavLM提取说话人语音的潜在表征，并训练时空滤波器将脑活动映射到语音中间表征以识别目标说话人。
AI.result: 实验表明，WavLM提取的语音表征在解码准确率和速度上均优于语音包络和频谱图方法。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习的语音表征可显著提升听觉注意力解码性能，为脑控听力设备开发提供理论支持。

search_text: Improved Decoding of Attentional Selection in Multi-Talker Environments with Self-Supervised Learned Speech Representation 利用自监督学习语音表示改进多说话者环境中注意力选择的解码 Auditory attention decoding (AAD) is a technique used to identify and amplify the talker that a listener is focused on in a noisy environment. This is done by comparing the listener's brainwaves to a representation of all the sound sources to find the closest match. The representation is typically the waveform or spectrogram of the sounds. The effectiveness of these representations for AAD is uncertain. In this study, we examined the use of self-supervised learned speech representation in improving the accuracy and speed of AAD. We recorded the brain activity of three subjects using invasive electrocorticography (ECoG) as they listened to two conversations and focused on one. We used WavLM to extract a latent representation of each talker and trained a spatiotemporal filter to map brain activity to intermediate representations of speech. During the evaluation, the reconstructed representation is compared to each speaker's representation to determine the target speaker. Our results indicate that speech representation from WavLM provides better decoding accuracy and speed than the speech envelope and spectrogram. Our findings demonstrate the advantages of self-supervised learned speech representation for auditory attention decoding and pave the way for developing brain-controlled hearable technologies. 听觉注意力解码 (AAD) 是一种用于识别和放大嘈杂环境中听众所关注的说话者的技术。这是通过将听众的脑电波与所有声源的表示进行比较以找到最接近的匹配来完成的。该表示通常是声音的波形或频谱图。这些 AAD 表述的有效性尚不确定。在这项研究中，我们研究了使用自监督学习语音表示来提高 AAD 的准确性和速度。我们使用侵入性皮质电图（ECoG）记录了三名受试者在听两段对话并专注于其中一段对话时的大脑活动。我们使用 WavLM 提取每个说话者的潜在表示，并训练时空滤波器将大脑活动映射到语音的中间表示。在评估过程中，将重建的表示与每个说话者的表示进行比较以确定目标说话者。我们的结果表明，WavLM 的语音表示比语音包络和频谱图提供了更好的解码精度和速度。我们的研究结果证明了自监督学习语音表示在听觉注意力解码方面的优势，并为开发大脑控制的可听技术铺平了道路。 本文研究利用自监督学习的语音表征提升多说话人环境中听觉注意力解码的准确性与速度。 Cong Han,Vishal Choudhari,Yinghao Aaron Li,Nima Mesgarani eess.AS,cs.SD,eess.SP

title: DaliID: Distortion-Adaptive Learned Invariance for Identification Models
title_zh: DaliID：识别模型的失真自适应学习不变性
abstract: In unconstrained scenarios, face recognition and person re-identification are subject to distortions such as motion blur, atmospheric turbulence, or upsampling artifacts. To improve robustness in these scenarios, we propose a methodology called Distortion-Adaptive Learned Invariance for Identification (DaliID) models. We contend that distortion augmentations, which degrade image quality, can be successfully leveraged to a greater degree than has been shown in the literature. Aided by an adaptive weighting schedule, a novel distortion augmentation is applied at severe levels during training. This training strategy increases feature-level invariance to distortions and decreases domain shift to unconstrained scenarios. At inference, we use a magnitude-weighted fusion of features from parallel models to retain robustness across the range of images. DaliID models achieve state-of-the-art (SOTA) for both face recognition and person re-identification on seven benchmark datasets, including IJB-S, TinyFace, DeepChange, and MSMT17. Additionally, we provide recaptured evaluation data at a distance of 750+ meters and further validate on real long-distance face imagery.
summary: In unconstrained scenarios, face recognition and person re-identification are subject to distortions such as motion blur, atmospheric turbulence, or upsampling artifacts. To improve robustness in these scenarios, we propose a methodology called Distortion-Adaptive Learned Invariance for Identification (DaliID) models. We contend that distortion augmentations, which degrade image quality, can be successfully leveraged to a greater degree than has been shown in the literature. Aided by an adaptive weighting schedule, a novel distortion augmentation is applied at severe levels during training. This training strategy increases feature-level invariance to distortions and decreases domain shift to unconstrained scenarios. At inference, we use a magnitude-weighted fusion of features from parallel models to retain robustness across the range of images. DaliID models achieve state-of-the-art (SOTA) for both face recognition and person re-identification on seven benchmark datasets, including IJB-S, TinyFace, DeepChange, and MSMT17. Additionally, we provide recaptured evaluation data at a distance of 750+ meters and further validate on real long-distance face imagery.
abstract_zh: 在不受约束的场景中，人脸识别和行人重新识别会受到运动模糊、大气湍流或上采样伪影等失真的影响。为了提高这些场景中的鲁棒性，我们提出了一种称为失真自适应学习不变性识别（DaliID）模型的方法。我们认为，失真增强会降低图像质量，但可以成功地利用到比文献中显示的更大的程度。在自适应加权方案的帮助下，在训练过程中在严格的水平上应用了一种新颖的失真增强。这种训练策略增加了特征级对扭曲的不变性，并减少了向无约束场景的域转移。在推理时，我们使用并行模型的特征的幅度加权融合来保持整个图像范围的鲁棒性。 DaliID 模型在 IJB-S、TinyFace、DeepChange 和 MSMT17 等七个基准数据集上实现了人脸识别和人员重新识别的最先进 (SOTA)。此外，我们还提供了750米以上距离处重新捕获的评估数据，并进一步在真实的远距离人脸图像上进行验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DaliID的方法，用于提高人脸识别和行人重识别在非受限场景下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 在非受限场景下，人脸识别和行人重识别容易受到运动模糊、大气湍流等失真影响，现有方法在这些场景下的表现不够理想。
AI.method: DaliID方法通过引入一种新的失真增强技术，并结合自适应加权策略，在训练过程中使用严重失真图像，从而增强模型对失真的不变性。在推理阶段，通过幅度加权融合多个并行模型的特征，以保持对各种图像的鲁棒性。
AI.result: DaliID在七个基准数据集（如IJB-S、TinyFace、DeepChange和MSMT17）上均取得了最先进的结果，并在750米以上的远距离图像上进行了验证。
AI.conclusion: DaliID方法通过失真自适应学习不变性，显著提升了人脸识别和行人重识别模型在非受限场景下的性能和鲁棒性。

authors_text: Shruthi Chari,Prasant Acharya,Daniel M. Gruen,Olivia Zhang,Elif K. Eyigoz,Mohamed Ghalwash,Oshani Seneviratne,Fernando Suarez Saiz,Pablo Meyer,Prithwish Chakraborty,Deborah L. McGuinness
title: Informing clinical assessment by contextualizing post-hoc explanations of risk prediction models in type-2 diabetes
title_zh: 通过结合 2 型糖尿病风险预测模型的事后解释为临床评估提供信息
comment: ef:Artificial Intelligence in Medicine; Vol. 137, Pg: 102498, 2023
comments: ef:Artificial Intelligence in Medicine; Vol. 137, Pg: 102498, 2023
abstract: Medical experts may use Artificial Intelligence (AI) systems with greater trust if these are supported by contextual explanations that let the practitioner connect system inferences to their context of use. However, their importance in improving model usage and understanding has not been extensively studied. Hence, we consider a comorbidity risk prediction scenario and focus on contexts regarding the patients clinical state, AI predictions about their risk of complications, and algorithmic explanations supporting the predictions. We explore how relevant information for such dimensions can be extracted from Medical guidelines to answer typical questions from clinical practitioners. We identify this as a question answering (QA) task and employ several state-of-the-art LLMs to present contexts around risk prediction model inferences and evaluate their acceptability. Finally, we study the benefits of contextual explanations by building an end-to-end AI pipeline including data cohorting, AI risk modeling, post-hoc model explanations, and prototyped a visual dashboard to present the combined insights from different context dimensions and data sources, while predicting and identifying the drivers of risk of Chronic Kidney Disease - a common type-2 diabetes comorbidity. All of these steps were performed in engagement with medical experts, including a final evaluation of the dashboard results by an expert medical panel. We show that LLMs, in particular BERT and SciBERT, can be readily deployed to extract some relevant explanations to support clinical usage. To understand the value-add of the contextual explanations, the expert panel evaluated these regarding actionable insights in the relevant clinical setting. Overall, our paper is one of the first end-to-end analyses identifying the feasibility and benefits of contextual explanations in a real-world clinical use case.
summary: Medical experts may use Artificial Intelligence (AI) systems with greater trust if these are supported by contextual explanations that let the practitioner connect system inferences to their context of use. However, their importance in improving model usage and understanding has not been extensively studied. Hence, we consider a comorbidity risk prediction scenario and focus on contexts regarding the patients clinical state, AI predictions about their risk of complications, and algorithmic explanations supporting the predictions. We explore how relevant information for such dimensions can be extracted from Medical guidelines to answer typical questions from clinical practitioners. We identify this as a question answering (QA) task and employ several state-of-the-art LLMs to present contexts around risk prediction model inferences and evaluate their acceptability. Finally, we study the benefits of contextual explanations by building an end-to-end AI pipeline including data cohorting, AI risk modeling, post-hoc model explanations, and prototyped a visual dashboard to present the combined insights from different context dimensions and data sources, while predicting and identifying the drivers of risk of Chronic Kidney Disease - a common type-2 diabetes comorbidity. All of these steps were performed in engagement with medical experts, including a final evaluation of the dashboard results by an expert medical panel. We show that LLMs, in particular BERT and SciBERT, can be readily deployed to extract some relevant explanations to support clinical usage. To understand the value-add of the contextual explanations, the expert panel evaluated these regarding actionable insights in the relevant clinical setting. Overall, our paper is one of the first end-to-end analyses identifying the feasibility and benefits of contextual explanations in a real-world clinical use case.
abstract_zh: 如果人工智能 (AI) 系统得到上下文解释的支持，让从业者将系统推论与其使用上下文联系起来，那么医学专家可能会更加信任地使用人工智能 (AI) 系统。然而，它们在提高模型使用和理解方面的重要性尚未得到广泛研究。因此，我们考虑共病风险预测场景，并重点关注患者临床状态的背景、关于并发症风险的人工智能预测以及支持预测的算法解释。我们探索如何从医学指南中提取这些维度的相关信息，以回答临床医生的典型问题。我们将其视为问答（QA）任务，并聘请了几位最先进的法学硕士来呈现风险预测模型推论的背景并评估其可接受性。最后，我们通过构建端到端人工智能管道（包括数据队列、人工智能风险建模、事后模型解释）来研究情境解释的好处，并设计一个可视化仪表板原型，以呈现来自不同情境维度和数据源的综合见解，同时预测和识别慢性肾病（一种常见的 2 型糖尿病合并症）风险的驱动因素。所有这些步骤都是与医学专家合作执行的，包括由医学专家小组对仪表板结果进行最终评估。我们表明，LLM，特别是 BERT 和 SciBERT，可以很容易地部署来提取一些相关的解释来支持临床使用。为了了解上下文解释的附加值，专家小组对相关临床环境中可行的见解进行了评估。总的来说，我们的论文是第一个端到端分析，确定了现实世界临床用例中上下文解释的可行性和好处。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过结合临床背景信息的后验解释，提升AI风险预测模型在2型糖尿病并发症预测中的临床可信度与实用性。
AI.motivation: 医疗专家对AI系统的信任度依赖于其解释的临床相关性，但现有研究未充分验证此类解释在实际医疗场景中的价值。
AI.method: 以慢性肾病预测为案例，通过自然语言处理模型（如BERT、SciBERT）从医学指南中提取上下文信息，构建包含数据预处理、AI建模、模型解释及可视化看板的端到端系统，并邀请医学专家评估解释的有效性。
AI.result: 证明LLM能有效提取临床相关解释，专家评估显示上下文信息可提升风险预测的可操作性，验证了该方法在真实医疗场景中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 结合领域知识的上下文解释可显著增强AI预测模型的临床适用性，端到端流程为AI与医疗实践的融合提供了可复用的框架。

search_text: Informing clinical assessment by contextualizing post-hoc explanations of risk prediction models in type-2 diabetes 通过结合 2 型糖尿病风险预测模型的事后解释为临床评估提供信息 Medical experts may use Artificial Intelligence (AI) systems with greater trust if these are supported by contextual explanations that let the practitioner connect system inferences to their context of use. However, their importance in improving model usage and understanding has not been extensively studied. Hence, we consider a comorbidity risk prediction scenario and focus on contexts regarding the patients clinical state, AI predictions about their risk of complications, and algorithmic explanations supporting the predictions. We explore how relevant information for such dimensions can be extracted from Medical guidelines to answer typical questions from clinical practitioners. We identify this as a question answering (QA) task and employ several state-of-the-art LLMs to present contexts around risk prediction model inferences and evaluate their acceptability. Finally, we study the benefits of contextual explanations by building an end-to-end AI pipeline including data cohorting, AI risk modeling, post-hoc model explanations, and prototyped a visual dashboard to present the combined insights from different context dimensions and data sources, while predicting and identifying the drivers of risk of Chronic Kidney Disease - a common type-2 diabetes comorbidity. All of these steps were performed in engagement with medical experts, including a final evaluation of the dashboard results by an expert medical panel. We show that LLMs, in particular BERT and SciBERT, can be readily deployed to extract some relevant explanations to support clinical usage. To understand the value-add of the contextual explanations, the expert panel evaluated these regarding actionable insights in the relevant clinical setting. Overall, our paper is one of the first end-to-end analyses identifying the feasibility and benefits of contextual explanations in a real-world clinical use case. 如果人工智能 (AI) 系统得到上下文解释的支持，让从业者将系统推论与其使用上下文联系起来，那么医学专家可能会更加信任地使用人工智能 (AI) 系统。然而，它们在提高模型使用和理解方面的重要性尚未得到广泛研究。因此，我们考虑共病风险预测场景，并重点关注患者临床状态的背景、关于并发症风险的人工智能预测以及支持预测的算法解释。我们探索如何从医学指南中提取这些维度的相关信息，以回答临床医生的典型问题。我们将其视为问答（QA）任务，并聘请了几位最先进的法学硕士来呈现风险预测模型推论的背景并评估其可接受性。最后，我们通过构建端到端人工智能管道（包括数据队列、人工智能风险建模、事后模型解释）来研究情境解释的好处，并设计一个可视化仪表板原型，以呈现来自不同情境维度和数据源的综合见解，同时预测和识别慢性肾病（一种常见的 2 型糖尿病合并症）风险的驱动因素。所有这些步骤都是与医学专家合作执行的，包括由医学专家小组对仪表板结果进行最终评估。我们表明，LLM，特别是 BERT 和 SciBERT，可以很容易地部署来提取一些相关的解释来支持临床使用。为了了解上下文解释的附加值，专家小组对相关临床环境中可行的见解进行了评估。总的来说，我们的论文是第一个端到端分析，确定了现实世界临床用例中上下文解释的可行性和好处。 本文旨在通过结合临床背景信息的后验解释，提升AI风险预测模型在2型糖尿病并发症预测中的临床可信度与实用性。 Shruthi Chari,Prasant Acharya,Daniel M. authors_text: Yufei Wang,Renjie Wan,Wenhan Yang,Bihan Wen,Lap-Pui Chau,Alex C. Kot
title: Removing Image Artifacts From Scratched Lens Protectors
title_zh: 去除划痕镜头保护膜上的图像伪影
abstract: A protector is placed in front of the camera lens for mobile devices to avoid damage, while the protector itself can be easily scratched accidentally, especially for plastic ones. The artifacts appear in a wide variety of patterns, making it difficult to see through them clearly. Removing image artifacts from the scratched lens protector is inherently challenging due to the occasional flare artifacts and the co-occurring interference within mixed artifacts. Though different methods have been proposed for some specific distortions, they seldom consider such inherent challenges. In our work, we consider the inherent challenges in a unified framework with two cooperative modules, which facilitate the performance boost of each other. We also collect a new dataset from the real world to facilitate training and evaluation purposes. The experimental results demonstrate that our method outperforms the baselines qualitatively and quantitatively. The code and datasets will be released after acceptance.
summary: A protector is placed in front of the camera lens for mobile devices to avoid damage, while the protector itself can be easily scratched accidentally, especially for plastic ones. The artifacts appear in a wide variety of patterns, making it difficult to see through them clearly. Removing image artifacts from the scratched lens protector is inherently challenging due to the occasional flare artifacts and the co-occurring interference within mixed artifacts. Though different methods have been proposed for some specific distortions, they seldom consider such inherent challenges. In our work, we consider the inherent challenges in a unified framework with two cooperative modules, which facilitate the performance boost of each other. We also collect a new dataset from the real world to facilitate training and evaluation purposes. The experimental results demonstrate that our method outperforms the baselines qualitatively and quantitatively. The code and datasets will be released after acceptance.
abstract_zh: 移动设备在相机镜头前放置了保护膜，以避免损坏，但保护膜本身很容易被意外划伤，尤其是塑料设备。这些文物的图案多种多样，很难看清楚。由于偶尔会出现耀斑伪影以及混合伪影中同时出现的干扰，从划伤的镜头保护膜中去除图像伪影本身就具有挑战性。尽管针对某些特定的扭曲提出了不同的方法，但他们很少考虑这种固有的挑战。在我们的工作中，我们考虑了具有两个协作模块的统一框架的固有挑战，这有利于彼此的性能提升。我们还从现实世界收集新的数据集以促进培训和评估目的。实验结果表明，我们的方法在质量和数量上都优于基线。代码和数据集将在接受后发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种去除手机镜头保护膜刮痕引起的图像伪影的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理镜头保护膜刮痕导致的复杂伪影（如耀斑和混合干扰），缺乏统一解决方案。
AI.method: 设计包含两个协同模块的统一框架，结合真实世界数据集进行训练与评估。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在定性和定量指标上均优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架有效解决了刮痕伪影问题，代码与数据集将公开以促进后续研究。

authors_text: Zitong Yu,Rizhao Cai,Yawen Cui,Xin Liu,Yongjian Hu,Alex Kot
title: Rethinking Vision Transformer and Masked Autoencoder in Multimodal Face Anti-Spoofing
title_zh: 重新思考多模态人脸反欺骗中的视觉变换器和屏蔽自动编码器
abstract: Recently, vision transformer (ViT) based multimodal learning methods have been proposed to improve the robustness of face anti-spoofing (FAS) systems. However, there are still no works to explore the fundamental natures (\textit{e.g.}, modality-aware inputs, suitable multimodal pre-training, and efficient finetuning) in vanilla ViT for multimodal FAS. In this paper, we investigate three key factors (i.e., inputs, pre-training, and finetuning) in ViT for multimodal FAS with RGB, Infrared (IR), and Depth. First, in terms of the ViT inputs, we find that leveraging local feature descriptors benefits the ViT on IR modality but not RGB or Depth modalities. Second, in observation of the inefficiency on direct finetuning the whole or partial ViT, we design an adaptive multimodal adapter (AMA), which can efficiently aggregate local multimodal features while freezing majority of ViT parameters. Finally, in consideration of the task (FAS vs. generic object classification) and modality (multimodal vs. unimodal) gaps, ImageNet pre-trained models might be sub-optimal for the multimodal FAS task. To bridge these gaps, we propose the modality-asymmetric masked autoencoder (M$^{2}$A$^{2}$E) for multimodal FAS self-supervised pre-training without costly annotated labels. Compared with the previous modality-symmetric autoencoder, the proposed M$^{2}$A$^{2}$E is able to learn more intrinsic task-aware representation and compatible with modality-agnostic (e.g., unimodal, bimodal, and trimodal) downstream settings. Extensive experiments with both unimodal (RGB, Depth, IR) and multimodal (RGB+Depth, RGB+IR, Depth+IR, RGB+Depth+IR) settings conducted on multimodal FAS benchmarks demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed methods. We hope these findings and solutions can facilitate the future research for ViT-based multimodal FAS.
summary: Recently, vision transformer (ViT) based multimodal learning methods have been proposed to improve the robustness of face anti-spoofing (FAS) systems. However, there are still no works to explore the fundamental natures (\textit{e.g.}, modality-aware inputs, suitable multimodal pre-training, and efficient finetuning) in vanilla ViT for multimodal FAS. In this paper, we investigate three key factors (i.e., inputs, pre-training, and finetuning) in ViT for multimodal FAS with RGB, Infrared (IR), and Depth. First, in terms of the ViT inputs, we find that leveraging local feature descriptors benefits the ViT on IR modality but not RGB or Depth modalities. Second, in observation of the inefficiency on direct finetuning the whole or partial ViT, we design an adaptive multimodal adapter (AMA), which can efficiently aggregate local multimodal features while freezing majority of ViT parameters. Finally, in consideration of the task (FAS vs. generic object classification) and modality (multimodal vs. unimodal) gaps, ImageNet pre-trained models might be sub-optimal for the multimodal FAS task. To bridge these gaps, we propose the modality-asymmetric masked autoencoder (M$^{2}$A$^{2}$E) for multimodal FAS self-supervised pre-training without costly annotated labels. Compared with the previous modality-symmetric autoencoder, the proposed M$^{2}$A$^{2}$E is able to learn more intrinsic task-aware representation and compatible with modality-agnostic (e.g., unimodal, bimodal, and trimodal) downstream settings. Extensive experiments with both unimodal (RGB, Depth, IR) and multimodal (RGB+Depth, RGB+IR, Depth+IR, RGB+Depth+IR) settings conducted on multimodal FAS benchmarks demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed methods. We hope these findings and solutions can facilitate the future research for ViT-based multimodal FAS.
abstract_zh: 最近，人们提出了基于视觉变换器（ViT）的多模态学习方法来提高人脸反欺骗（FAS）系统的鲁棒性。然而，仍然没有工作来探索多模态 FAS 的普通 ViT 的基本性质（\textit{e.g.}、模态感知输入、合适的多模态预训练和有效的微调）。在本文中，我们研究了具有 RGB、红外 (IR) 和深度的多模态 FAS ViT 中的三个关键因素（即输入、预训练和微调）。首先，就 ViT 输入而言，我们发现利用局部特征描述符有利于 IR 模态上的 ViT，但对 RGB 或深度模态没有好处。其次，鉴于直接微调整个或部分 ViT 的低效率，我们设计了一种自适应多模态适配器（AMA），它可以有效地聚合局部多模态特征，同时冻结大部分 ViT 参数。最后，考虑到任务（FAS 与通用对象分类）和模态（多模态与单模态）差距，ImageNet 预训练模型对于多模态 FAS 任务可能不是最佳选择。为了弥补这些差距，我们提出了模态非对称屏蔽自动编码器（M$^{2}$A$^{2}$E），用于多模态 FAS 自监督预训练，无需昂贵的注释标签。与之前的模态对称自动编码器相比，所提出的 M$^{2}$A$^{2}$E 能够学习更多内在的任务感知表示，并与模态无关（例如，单模态、双模态和三模态）下游设置兼容。在多模态 FAS 基准上进行的单模态（RGB、深度、IR）和多模态（RGB+深度、RGB+IR、深度+IR、RGB+深度+IR）设置的大量实验证明了所提出方法的优越性能。我们希望这些发现和解决方案能够促进基于 ViT 的多模式 FAS 的未来研究。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于视觉Transformer（ViT）和掩码自编码器（MAE）在多模态人脸防欺骗（FAS）中的应用，提出了改进方法以提升系统鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有ViT多模态FAS方法未充分探索模态感知输入、适合的预训练和高效微调等核心问题，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 提出自适应多模态适配器（AMA）以冻结大部分ViT参数并高效聚合局部特征；设计模态非对称掩码自编码器（M²A²E）进行无监督预训练，弥补任务与模态差异。
AI.result: 在多模态FAS基准测试中，方法在单模态（RGB、Depth、IR）和多模态（如RGB+Depth+IR）设置下均优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化输入设计、预训练策略和微调机制，本文方法为ViT在多模态FAS领域的应用提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: Rethinking Vision Transformer and Masked Autoencoder in Multimodal Face Anti-Spoofing 重新思考多模态人脸反欺骗中的视觉变换器和屏蔽自动编码器 Recently, vision transformer (ViT) based multimodal learning methods have been proposed to improve the robustness of face anti-spoofing (FAS) systems. However, there are still no works to explore the fundamental natures (\textit{e.g.}, modality-aware inputs, suitable multimodal pre-training, and efficient finetuning) in vanilla ViT for multimodal FAS. In this paper, we investigate three key factors (i.e., inputs, pre-training, and finetuning) in ViT for multimodal FAS with RGB, Infrared (IR), and Depth. First, in terms of the ViT inputs, we find that leveraging local feature descriptors benefits the ViT on IR modality but not RGB or Depth modalities. Second, in observation of the inefficiency on direct finetuning the whole or partial ViT, we design an adaptive multimodal adapter (AMA), which can efficiently aggregate local multimodal features while freezing majority of ViT parameters. Finally, in consideration of the task (FAS vs. generic object classification) and modality (multimodal vs. unimodal) gaps, ImageNet pre-trained models might be sub-optimal for the multimodal FAS task. To bridge these gaps, we propose the modality-asymmetric masked autoencoder (M$^{2}$A$^{2}$E) for multimodal FAS self-supervised pre-training without costly annotated labels. Compared with the previous modality-symmetric autoencoder, the proposed M$^{2}$A$^{2}$E is able to learn more intrinsic task-aware representation and compatible with modality-agnostic (e.g., unimodal, bimodal, and trimodal) downstream settings. Extensive experiments with both unimodal (RGB, Depth, IR) and multimodal (RGB+Depth, RGB+IR, Depth+IR, RGB+Depth+IR) settings conducted on multimodal FAS benchmarks demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed methods. We hope these findings and solutions can facilitate the future research for ViT-based multimodal FAS. 最近，人们提出了基于视觉变换器（ViT）的多模态学习方法来提高人脸反欺骗（FAS）系统的鲁棒性。然而，仍然没有工作来探索多模态 FAS 的普通 ViT 的基本性质（\textit{e.g.}、模态感知输入、合适的多模态预训练和有效的微调）。在本文中，我们研究了具有 RGB、红外 (IR) 和深度的多模态 FAS ViT 中的三个关键因素（即输入、预训练和微调）。首先，就 ViT 输入而言，我们发现利用局部特征描述符有利于 IR 模态上的 ViT，但对 RGB 或深度模态没有好处。其次，鉴于直接微调整个或部分 ViT 的低效率，我们设计了一种自适应多模态适配器（AMA），它可以有效地聚合局部多模态特征，同时冻结大部分 ViT 参数。最后，考虑到任务（FAS 与通用对象分类）和模态（多模态与单模态）差距，ImageNet 预训练模型对于多模态 FAS 任务可能不是最佳选择。为了弥补这些差距，我们提出了模态非对称屏蔽自动编码器（M$^{2}$A$^{2}$E），用于多模态 FAS 自监督预训练，无需昂贵的注释标签。与之前的模态对称自动编码器相比，所提出的 M$^{2}$A$^{2}$E 能够学习更多内在的任务感知表示，并与模态无关（例如，单模态、双模态和三模态）下游设置兼容。在多模态 FAS 基准上进行的单模态（RGB、深度、IR）和多模态（RGB+深度、RGB+IR、深度+IR、RGB+深度+IR）设置的大量实验证明了所提出方法的优越性能。我们希望这些发现和解决方案能够促进基于 ViT 的多模式 FAS 的未来研究。 本文研究了基于视觉Transformer（ViT）和掩码自编码器（MAE）在多模态人脸防欺骗（FAS）中的应用，提出了改进方法以提升系统鲁棒性。 Zitong Yu,Rizhao Cai,Yawen Cui,Xin Liu,Yongjian Hu,Alex Kot cs.CV

title: Is Distance Matrix Enough for Geometric Deep Learning?
title_zh: 距离矩阵足以用于几何深度学习吗？
comment: NeurIPS 2023. This new version includes corrections of some minor typos and potentially unclear notations
comments: NeurIPS 2023. This new version includes corrections of some minor typos and potentially unclear notations
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are often used for tasks involving the 3D geometry of a given graph, such as molecular dynamics simulation. While incorporating Euclidean distance into Message Passing Neural Networks (referred to as Vanilla DisGNN) is a straightforward way to learn the geometry, it has been demonstrated that Vanilla DisGNN is geometrically incomplete. In this work, we first construct families of novel and symmetric geometric graphs that Vanilla DisGNN cannot distinguish even when considering all-pair distances, which greatly expands the existing counterexample families. Our counterexamples show the inherent limitation of Vanilla DisGNN to capture symmetric geometric structures. We then propose $k$-DisGNNs, which can effectively exploit the rich geometry contained in the distance matrix. We demonstrate the high expressive power of $k$-DisGNNs from three perspectives: 1. They can learn high-order geometric information that cannot be captured by Vanilla DisGNN. 2. They can unify some existing well-designed geometric models. 3. They are universal function approximators from geometric graphs to scalars (when $k\geq 2$) and vectors (when $k\geq 3$). Most importantly, we establish a connection between geometric deep learning (GDL) and traditional graph representation learning (GRL), showing that those highly expressive GNN models originally designed for GRL can also be applied to GDL with impressive performance, and that existing complicated, equivariant models are not the only solution. Experiments verify our theory. Our $k$-DisGNNs achieve many new state-of-the-art results on MD17.

While incorporating Euclidean distance into Message Passing Neural Networks (referred to as Vanilla DisGNN) is a straightforward way to learn the geometry, it has been demonstrated that Vanilla DisGNN is geometrically incomplete. In this work, we first construct families of novel and symmetric geometric graphs that Vanilla DisGNN cannot distinguish even when considering all-pair distances, which greatly expands the existing counterexample families. Our counterexamples show the inherent limitation of Vanilla DisGNN to capture symmetric geometric structures. We then propose $k$-DisGNNs, which can effectively exploit the rich geometry contained in the distance matrix. We demonstrate the high expressive power of $k$-DisGNNs from three perspectives: 1. They can learn high-order geometric information that cannot be captured by Vanilla DisGNN. 2. They can unify some existing well-designed geometric models. 3. They are universal function approximators from geometric graphs to scalars (when $k\geq 2$) and vectors (when $k\geq 3$). Most importantly, we establish a connection between geometric deep learning (GDL) and traditional graph representation learning (GRL), showing that those highly expressive GNN models originally designed for GRL can also be applied to GDL with impressive performance, and that existing complicated, equivariant models are not the only solution. Experiments verify our theory. Our $k$-DisGNNs achieve many new state-of-the-art results on MD17.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络 (GNN) 通常用于涉及给定图的 3D 几何的任务，例如分子动力学模拟。虽然将欧几里得距离合并到消息传递神经网络（称为 Vanilla DisGNN）中是学习几何的直接方法，但已证明 Vanilla DisGNN 在几何上是不完整的。在这项工作中，我们首先构建了即使考虑全对距离时 Vanilla DisGNN 也无法区分的新颖且对称的几何图族，这极大地扩展了现有的反例族。我们的反例显示了 Vanilla DisGNN 捕获对称几何结构的固有局限性。然后，我们提出 $k$-DisGNN，它可以有效地利用距离矩阵中包含的丰富几何形状。我们从三个角度展示了 $k$-DisGNN 的高表达能力： 1.它们可以学习 Vanilla DisGNN 无法捕获的高阶几何信息。 2.它们可以统一一些现有的精心设计的几何模型。 3. 它们是从几何图形到标量（当 $k\geq 2$ 时）和向量（当 $k\geq 3$ 时）的通用函数逼近器。最重要的是，我们在几何深度学习（GDL）和传统图表示学习（GRL）之间建立了联系，表明那些最初为GRL设计的高表达GNN模型也可以应用于GDL，并具有令人印象深刻的性能，并且现有的复杂的等变模型并不是唯一的解决方案。实验验证了我们的理论。我们的 $k$-DisGNN 在 MD17 上取得了许多新的最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨距离矩阵在几何深度学习中的充分性，提出改进的k-DisGNN模型以克服传统方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统基于距离矩阵的图神经网络（Vanilla DisGNN）无法捕捉对称几何结构，存在几何不完整性问题，需更强大的模型来处理3D几何任务。
AI.method: 构建新型对称几何图作为反例揭示Vanilla DisGNN缺陷，提出利用距离矩阵高阶信息的k-DisGNN模型，并建立几何深度学习与传统图表示学习的联系。
AI.result: k-DisGNN在MD17数据集上取得多项最先进成果，证明其能统一现有几何模型并实现函数逼近能力。
AI.conclusion: 距离矩阵需结合高阶几何信息才能有效支撑几何深度学习，现有图表示学习模型可作为GDL的有效解决方案。

They can learn high-order geometric information that cannot be captured by Vanilla DisGNN. 2. They can unify some existing well-designed geometric models. 3. title: UGAE: A Novel Approach to Non-exponential Discounting
title_zh: UGAE：一种新的非指数贴现方法
abstract: The discounting mechanism in Reinforcement Learning determines the relative importance of future and present rewards. While exponential discounting is widely used in practice, non-exponential discounting methods that align with human behavior are often desirable for creating human-like agents. However, non-exponential discounting methods cannot be directly applied in modern on-policy actor-critic algorithms. To address this issue, we propose Universal Generalized Advantage Estimation (UGAE), which allows for the computation of GAE advantage values with arbitrary discounting. Additionally, we introduce Beta-weighted discounting, a continuous interpolation between exponential and hyperbolic discounting, to increase flexibility in choosing a discounting method. To showcase the utility of UGAE, we provide an analysis of the properties of various discounting methods. We also show experimentally that agents with non-exponential discounting trained via UGAE outperform variants trained with Monte Carlo advantage estimation. Through analysis of various discounting methods and experiments, we demonstrate the superior performance of UGAE with Beta-weighted discounting over the Monte Carlo baseline on standard RL benchmarks. UGAE is simple and easily integrated into any advantage-based algorithm as a replacement for the standard recursive GAE.

To showcase the utility of UGAE, we provide an analysis of the properties of various discounting methods. We also show experimentally that agents with non-exponential discounting trained via UGAE outperform variants trained with Monte Carlo advantage estimation. Through analysis of various discounting methods and experiments, we demonstrate the superior performance of UGAE with Beta-weighted discounting over the Monte Carlo baseline on standard RL benchmarks. UGAE is simple and easily integrated into any advantage-based algorithm as a replacement for the standard recursive GAE.
abstract_zh: 强化学习中的贴现机制决定了未来和当前奖励的相对重要性。虽然指数折扣在实践中被广泛使用，但与人类行为一致的非指数折扣方法通常对于创建类人代理来说是理想的。然而，非指数贴现方法不能直接应用于现代的在策略行动者批评算法中。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了通用广义优势估计（UGAE），它允许以任意折扣计算 GAE 优势值。此外，我们引入了 Beta 加权折扣，即指数折扣和双曲线折扣之间的连续插值，以提高选择折扣方法的灵活性。为了展示 UGAE 的实用性，我们对各种折扣方法的属性进行了分析。我们还通过实验证明，通过 UGAE 训练的非指数折扣智能体的表现优于通过蒙特卡罗优势估计训练的变体。通过对各种折扣方法和实验的分析，我们证明了使用 Beta 加权折扣的 UGAE 比标准 RL 基准上的蒙特卡洛基线具有优越的性能。 UGAE 简单且易于集成到任何基于优势的算法中，作为标准递归 GAE 的替代品。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为UGAE的新方法，用于在强化学习中实现非指数折扣，同时引入了Beta加权折扣以提高灵活性。
AI.motivation: 指数折扣虽常用，但难以模拟人类行为；现有非指数折扣方法无法直接应用于现代策略梯度算法，需寻找兼容性更强的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计通用广义优势估计（UGAE）框架以支持任意折扣方式，并提出Beta加权折扣作为指数与双曲折扣的连续插值方法。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于UGAE的非指数折扣智能体在标准RL基准测试中优于蒙特卡洛优势估计方法，且UGAE易于集成到现有算法中。
AI.conclusion: UGAE通过灵活的折扣机制和简单实现，为强化学习中的非指数折扣提供了高效且通用的解决方案。

search_text: UGAE: A Novel Approach to Non-exponential Discounting UGAE：一种新的非指数贴现方法 The discounting mechanism in Reinforcement Learning determines the relative importance of future and present rewards. While exponential discounting is widely used in practice, non-exponential discounting methods that align with human behavior are often desirable for creating human-like agents. However, non-exponential discounting methods cannot be directly applied in modern on-policy actor-critic algorithms. To address this issue, we propose Universal Generalized Advantage Estimation (UGAE), which allows for the computation of GAE advantage values with arbitrary discounting. Additionally, we introduce Beta-weighted discounting, a continuous interpolation between exponential and hyperbolic discounting, to increase flexibility in choosing a discounting method. To showcase the utility of UGAE, we provide an analysis of the properties of various discounting methods. We also show experimentally that agents with non-exponential discounting trained via UGAE outperform variants trained with Monte Carlo advantage estimation. Through analysis of various discounting methods and experiments, we demonstrate the superior performance of UGAE with Beta-weighted discounting over the Monte Carlo baseline on standard RL benchmarks. UGAE is simple and easily integrated into any advantage-based algorithm as a replacement for the standard recursive GAE. 强化学习中的贴现机制决定了未来和当前奖励的相对重要性。虽然指数折扣在实践中被广泛使用，但与人类行为一致的非指数折扣方法通常对于创建类人代理来说是理想的。然而，非指数贴现方法不能直接应用于现代的在策略行动者批评算法中。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了通用广义优势估计（UGAE），它允许以任意折扣计算 GAE 优势值。此外，我们引入了 Beta 加权折扣，即指数折扣和双曲线折扣之间的连续插值，以提高选择折扣方法的灵活性。为了展示 UGAE 的实用性，我们对各种折扣方法的属性进行了分析。我们还通过实验证明，通过 UGAE 训练的非指数折扣智能体的表现优于通过蒙特卡罗优势估计训练的变体。通过对各种折扣方法和实验的分析，我们证明了使用 Beta 加权折扣的 UGAE 比标准 RL 基准上的蒙特卡洛基线具有优越的性能。 UGAE 简单且易于集成到任何基于优势的算法中，作为标准递归 GAE 的替代品。 本文提出了一种名为UGAE的新方法，用于在强化学习中实现非指数折扣，同时引入了Beta加权折扣以提高灵活性。 Ariel Kwiatkowski,Vicky Kalogeiton,Julien Pettré,Marie-Paule Cani cs.LG,cs.AI

title: A Brief Report on LawGPT 1.0: A Virtual Legal Assistant Based on GPT-3
title_zh: LawGPT 1.0简报：基于GPT-3的虚拟法律助理
abstract: LawGPT 1.0 is a virtual legal assistant built on the state-of-the-art language model GPT-3, fine-tuned for the legal domain. The system is designed to provide legal assistance to users in a conversational manner, helping them with tasks such as answering legal questions, generating legal documents, and providing legal advice. In this paper, we provide a brief overview of LawGPT 1.0, its architecture, and its performance on a set of legal benchmark tasks. Please note that the detailed information about the model is protected by a non-disclosure agreement (NDA) and cannot be disclosed in this report.
summary: LawGPT 1.0 is a virtual legal assistant built on the state-of-the-art language model GPT-3, fine-tuned for the legal domain. The system is designed to provide legal assistance to users in a conversational manner, helping them with tasks such as answering legal questions, generating legal documents, and providing legal advice. In this paper, we provide a brief overview of LawGPT 1.0, its architecture, and its performance on a set of legal benchmark tasks. Please note that the detailed information about the model is protected by a non-disclosure agreement (NDA) and cannot be disclosed in this report.
abstract_zh: LawGPT 1.0 是一款基于最先进的语言模型 GPT-3 构建的虚拟法律助手，针对法律领域进行了微调。该系统旨在以对话方式为用户提供法律援助，帮助他们完成回答法律问题、生成法律文件、提供法律建议等任务。在本文中，我们简要概述了 LawGPT 1.0、其架构及其在一组法律基准任务上的性能。请注意，有关该模型的详细信息受保密协议（NDA）保护，无法在本报告中披露。

AI.method: 基于GPT-3模型进行法律领域微调，构建对话式法律助手系统
AI.result: 系统在法律基准任务中表现良好，但具体性能数据未公开
AI.conclusion: LawGPT 1.0展示了AI在法律领域的应用潜力，但需进一步研究和优化

authors_text: Zhaoxu Li,Zitong Yu,Nithish Muthuchamy Selvaraj,Xiaobao Guo,Bingquan Shen,Adams Wai-Kin Kong,Alex Kot
title: Flexible-modal Deception Detection with Audio-Visual Adapter
title_zh: 使用视听适配器的灵活模式欺骗检测
abstract: Detecting deception by human behaviors is vital in many fields such as custom security and multimedia anti-fraud. Recently, audio-visual deception detection attracts more attention due to its better performance than using only a single modality. However, in real-world multi-modal settings, the integrity of data can be an issue (e.g., sometimes only partial modalities are available). The missing modality might lead to a decrease in performance, but the model still learns the features of the missed modality. In this paper, to further improve the performance and overcome the missing modality problem, we propose a novel Transformer-based framework with an Audio-Visual Adapter (AVA) to fuse temporal features across two modalities efficiently. Extensive experiments conducted on two benchmark datasets demonstrate that the proposed method can achieve superior performance compared with other multi-modal fusion methods under flexible-modal (multiple and missing modalities) settings.
summary: Detecting deception by human behaviors is vital in many fields such as custom security and multimedia anti-fraud. Recently, audio-visual deception detection attracts more attention due to its better performance than using only a single modality. However, in real-world multi-modal settings, the integrity of data can be an issue (e.g., sometimes only partial modalities are available). The missing modality might lead to a decrease in performance, but the model still learns the features of the missed modality. In this paper, to further improve the performance and overcome the missing modality problem, we propose a novel Transformer-based framework with an Audio-Visual Adapter (AVA) to fuse temporal features across two modalities efficiently. Extensive experiments conducted on two benchmark datasets demonstrate that the proposed method can achieve superior performance compared with other multi-modal fusion methods under flexible-modal (multiple and missing modalities) settings.
abstract_zh: 检测人类行为的欺骗在定制安全和多媒体反欺诈等许多领域至关重要。最近，视听欺骗检测由于其比仅使用单一模态更好的性能而引起了更多关注。然而，在现实世界的多模式设置中，数据的完整性可能是一个问题（例如，有时只有部分模式可用）。丢失的模态可能会导致性能下降，但模型仍然可以学习丢失的模态的特征。在本文中，为了进一步提高性能并克服模态缺失问题，我们提出了一种基于 Transformer 的新型框架，该框架具有音视频适配器（AVA），可以有效地融合两种模态的时间特征。在两个基准数据集上进行的大量实验表明，在灵活模态（多模态和缺失模态）设置下，与其他多模态融合方法相比，所提出的方法可以实现卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于音频-视觉适配器的多模态欺骗检测框架，以解决实际场景中模态缺失导致的性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 现有音频-视觉欺骗检测方法在模态不完整时性能显著下降，且模型仍需学习缺失模态的特征，亟需更鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计基于Transformer的音频-视觉适配器（AVA），通过跨模态时序特征高效融合，实现对多模态数据的灵活处理。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上实验表明，该方法在多模态和模态缺失场景下均优于现有融合方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的AVA框架通过跨模态适配机制，有效提升了欺骗检测在模态缺失情况下的鲁棒性与性能。

title: Parameterizable Acoustical Modeling and Auralization of Cultural Heritage Sites based on Photogrammetry
title_zh: 基于摄影测量的文化遗产地参数化声学建模与可听化
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures, 27th Conference on Cultural Heritage and New Technologies (Vienna, 2022)
comments: 6 pages, 3 figures, 27th Conference on Cultural Heritage and New Technologies (Vienna, 2022)
abstract: The photogrammetric and reconstructive modeling of cultural heritage sites is mostly focused on visually perceivable aspects, but if their intended purpose is the performance of cultural acts with a sonic emphasis, it is important to consider the preservation of their acoustical behaviour to make them audible in an authentic way. This applies in particular to sacral and concert environments as popular objects for photogrammetric models, which contain geometrical and textural information that can be used to locate and classify acoustically relevant surface properties. With the advancing conversion or destruction of historical acoustical spaces, it becomes even more important to preserve their unique sonic characters, while three-dimensional auralizations become widely applicable. The proposed study presents the current state of a new methodological approach to acoustical modeling using photogrammetric data and introduces a parameterizable pipeline that will be accessible as an open-source software with a graphical user interface.

abstract_zh: 文化遗产地的摄影测量和重建建模主要集中在视觉可感知方面，但如果其预期目的是强调声音的文化行为的表现，则重要的是要考虑保留其声学行为，使它们以真实的方式被听到。这尤其适用于作为摄影测量模型的流行对象的骶骨和音乐会环境，其中包含可用于定位和分类声学相关表面属性的几何和纹理信息。随着历史声学空间的不断转换或破坏，保留其独特的声音特征变得更加重要，而三维可听性则变得广泛适用。拟议的研究展示了使用摄影测量数据进行声学建模的新方法的当前状态，并引入了可参数化的管道，该管道将作为具有图形用户界面的开源软件进行访问。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于摄影测量数据的文化遗产地声学建模和听觉化方法，通过参数化流程实现其独特声学特性的保存与再现。
AI.motivation: 文化遗产地（如宗教场所和音乐厅）的摄影测量建模多关注视觉效果，但其声学特性对文化活动至关重要。随着历史声学空间的损毁，亟需通过三维听觉化技术保存其独特声学特征。
AI.method: 利用摄影测量数据提取几何与纹理信息，构建参数化声学建模流程，并开发开源图形化软件实现声学特性分类与听觉化模拟。
AI.result: 开发出基于摄影测量数据的参数化声学建模方法及开源工具，可对文化遗产地进行高保真声学特性重建与听觉化呈现。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为文化遗产地的声学特性保存提供了技术路径，通过开放软件工具促进历史声学空间的数字化保护与研究。

authors_text: Varun Khurana,Yaman Kumar Singla,Nora Hollenstein,Rajesh Kumar,Balaji Krishnamurthy
title: Synthesizing Human Gaze Feedback for Improved NLP Performance
title_zh: 综合人类凝视反馈以提高 NLP 性能
comment: Accepted at European Chapter of the Association for Computational Linguistics (EACL)
comments: Accepted at European Chapter of the Association for Computational Linguistics (EACL)
abstract: Integrating human feedback in models can improve the performance of natural language processing (NLP) models. Feedback can be either explicit (e.g. ranking used in training language models) or implicit (e.g. using human cognitive signals in the form of eyetracking). Prior eye tracking and NLP research reveal that cognitive processes, such as human scanpaths, gleaned from human gaze patterns aid in the understanding and performance of NLP models. However, the collection of real eyetracking data for NLP tasks is challenging due to the requirement of expensive and precise equipment coupled with privacy invasion issues. To address this challenge, we propose ScanTextGAN, a novel model for generating human scanpaths over text. We show that ScanTextGAN-generated scanpaths can approximate meaningful cognitive signals in human gaze patterns. We include synthetically generated scanpaths in four popular NLP tasks spanning six different datasets as proof of concept and show that the models augmented with generated scanpaths improve the performance of all downstream NLP tasks.
summary: Integrating human feedback in models can improve the performance of natural language processing (NLP) models. Feedback can be either explicit (e.g. ranking used in training language models) or implicit (e.g. using human cognitive signals in the form of eyetracking). Prior eye tracking and NLP research reveal that cognitive processes, such as human scanpaths, gleaned from human gaze patterns aid in the understanding and performance of NLP models. However, the collection of real eyetracking data for NLP tasks is challenging due to the requirement of expensive and precise equipment coupled with privacy invasion issues. To address this challenge, we propose ScanTextGAN, a novel model for generating human scanpaths over text. We show that ScanTextGAN-generated scanpaths can approximate meaningful cognitive signals in human gaze patterns. We include synthetically generated scanpaths in four popular NLP tasks spanning six different datasets as proof of concept and show that the models augmented with generated scanpaths improve the performance of all downstream NLP tasks.
abstract_zh: 将人类反馈集成到模型中可以提高自然语言处理 (NLP) 模型的性能。反馈可以是显式的（例如训练语言模型中使用的排名）或隐式的（例如以眼球追踪形式使用人类认知信号）。先前的眼球追踪和 NLP 研究表明，从人类注视模式中收集的认知过程（例如人类扫描路径）有助于 NLP 模型的理解和性能。然而，由于需要昂贵且精确的设备以及侵犯隐私问题，为 NLP 任务收集真实的眼球追踪数据具有挑战性。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了 ScanTextGAN，这是一种用于在文本上生成人类扫描路径的新颖模型。我们证明 ScanTextGAN 生成的扫描路径可以近似人类注视模式中有意义的认知信号。我们在跨越六个不同数据集的四个流行 NLP 任务中包含综合生成的扫描路径作为概念证明，并表明使用生成的扫描路径增强的模型提高了所有下游 NLP 任务的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出ScanTextGAN模型生成人类注视轨迹以增强NLP模型性能
AI.motivation: 真实眼动数据收集困难，需合成数据以辅助NLP模型训练
AI.method: 开发ScanTextGAN模型生成合成注视轨迹
AI.result: 生成的注视轨迹提升四个NLP任务的性能
AI.conclusion: 合成注视反馈可有效提升NLP性能，ScanTextGAN方法可行
