title: Learning by Applying: A General Framework for Mathematical Reasoning via Enhancing Explicit Knowledge Learning
title_zh: 通过应用学习：通过增强显性知识学习进行数学推理的通用框架
abstract: Mathematical reasoning is one of the crucial abilities of general artificial intelligence, which requires machines to master mathematical logic and knowledge from solving problems. However, existing approaches are not transparent (thus not interpretable) in terms of what knowledge has been learned and applied in the reasoning process. In this paper, we propose a general Learning by Applying (LeAp) framework to enhance existing models (backbones) in a principled way by explicit knowledge learning. In LeAp, we perform knowledge learning in a novel problem-knowledge-expression paradigm, with a Knowledge Encoder to acquire knowledge from problem data and a Knowledge Decoder to apply knowledge for expression reasoning. The learned mathematical knowledge, including word-word relations and word-operator relations, forms an explicit knowledge graph, which bridges the knowledge "learning" and "applying" organically. Moreover, for problem solving, we design a semantics-enhanced module and a reasoning-enhanced module that apply knowledge to improve the problem comprehension and symbol reasoning abilities of any backbone, respectively. We theoretically prove the superiority of LeAp's autonomous learning mechanism. Experiments on three real-world datasets show that LeAp improves all backbones' performances, learns accurate knowledge, and achieves a more interpretable reasoning process.
summary: Mathematical reasoning is one of the crucial abilities of general artificial intelligence, which requires machines to master mathematical logic and knowledge from solving problems. However, existing approaches are not transparent (thus not interpretable) in terms of what knowledge has been learned and applied in the reasoning process. In this paper, we propose a general Learning by Applying (LeAp) framework to enhance existing models (backbones) in a principled way by explicit knowledge learning. In LeAp, we perform knowledge learning in a novel problem-knowledge-expression paradigm, with a Knowledge Encoder to acquire knowledge from problem data and a Knowledge Decoder to apply knowledge for expression reasoning. The learned mathematical knowledge, including word-word relations and word-operator relations, forms an explicit knowledge graph, which bridges the knowledge "learning" and "applying" organically. Moreover, for problem solving, we design a semantics-enhanced module and a reasoning-enhanced module that apply knowledge to improve the problem comprehension and symbol reasoning abilities of any backbone, respectively. We theoretically prove the superiority of LeAp's autonomous learning mechanism. Experiments on three real-world datasets show that LeAp improves all backbones' performances, learns accurate knowledge, and achieves a more interpretable reasoning process.
abstract_zh: 数学推理是通用人工智能的关键能力之一，它要求机器从解决问题中掌握数学逻辑和知识。然而，现有的方法在推理过程中学习和应用哪些知识方面并不透明（因此不可解释）。在本文中，我们提出了一种通用的应用学习（LeAp）框架，通过显式知识学习以有原则的方式增强现有模型（骨干）。在LeAp中，我们在一种新颖的问题知识表达范式中进行知识学习，使用知识编码器从问题数据中获取知识，并使用知识解码器将知识应用于表达推理。所学到的数学知识，包括词与词的关系、词与运算符的关系，形成显式的知识图谱，将知识的“学习”和“应用”有机地联系起来。此外，为了解决问题，我们设计了语义增强模块和推理增强模块，分别应用知识来提高任何主干的问题理解和符号推理能力。我们从理论上证明了LeAp自主学习机制的优越性。对三个真实世界数据集的实验表明，LeAp 提高了所有骨干网络的性能，学习准确的知识，并实现更可解释的推理过程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LeAp的通用框架，通过显式知识学习增强数学推理能力，使模型在解决问题时能更透明地学习和应用数学知识。
AI.motivation: 现有数学推理方法在知识学习与应用过程中缺乏透明度，难以解释模型如何获取和使用知识，限制了其可解释性和性能提升。
AI.method: LeAp框架采用问题-知识-表达范式，包含知识编码器（提取问题数据中的知识）和知识解码器（将知识应用于推理），构建显式知识图谱，并设计语义增强模块和推理增强模块以提升模型理解与符号推理能力。
AI.result: 在三个真实数据集上的实验表明，LeAp提升了所有基础模型的性能，学习到准确的数学知识，并实现了更可解释的推理过程。
AI.conclusion: LeAp通过显式知识学习机制理论证明了其优越性，实验验证了其在提升数学推理性能和可解释性方面的有效性，为通用人工智能的数学能力发展提供了新思路。

method: LeAp框架采用问题-知识-表达范式，包含知识编码器（提取问题数据中的知识）和知识解码器（将知识应用于推理），构建显式知识图谱，并设计语义增强模块和推理增强模块以提升模型理解与符号推理能力。
result: 在三个真实数据集上的实验表明，LeAp提升了所有基础模型的性能，学习到准确的数学知识，并实现了更可解释的推理过程。
conclusion: LeAp通过显式知识学习机制理论证明了其优越性，实验验证了其在提升数学推理性能和可解释性方面的有效性，为通用人工智能的数学能力发展提供了新思路。
search_text: Learning by Applying: A General Framework for Mathematical Reasoning via Enhancing Explicit Knowledge Learning 通过应用学习：通过增强显性知识学习进行数学推理的通用框架 Mathematical reasoning is one of the crucial abilities of general artificial intelligence, which requires machines to master mathematical logic and knowledge from solving problems. However, existing approaches are not transparent (thus not interpretable) in terms of what knowledge has been learned and applied in the reasoning process. In this paper, we propose a general Learning by Applying (LeAp) framework to enhance existing models (backbones) in a principled way by explicit knowledge learning. In LeAp, we perform knowledge learning in a novel problem-knowledge-expression paradigm, with a Knowledge Encoder to acquire knowledge from problem data and a Knowledge Decoder to apply knowledge for expression reasoning. The learned mathematical knowledge, including word-word relations and word-operator relations, forms an explicit knowledge graph, which bridges the knowledge "learning" and "applying" organically. Moreover, for problem solving, we design a semantics-enhanced module and a reasoning-enhanced module that apply knowledge to improve the problem comprehension and symbol reasoning abilities of any backbone, respectively. We theoretically prove the superiority of LeAp's autonomous learning mechanism. Experiments on three real-world datasets show that LeAp improves all backbones' performances, learns accurate knowledge, and achieves a more interpretable reasoning process. 数学推理是通用人工智能的关键能力之一，它要求机器从解决问题中掌握数学逻辑和知识。然而，现有的方法在推理过程中学习和应用哪些知识方面并不透明（因此不可解释）。在本文中，我们提出了一种通用的应用学习（LeAp）框架，通过显式知识学习以有原则的方式增强现有模型（骨干）。在LeAp中，我们在一种新颖的问题知识表达范式中进行知识学习，使用知识编码器从问题数据中获取知识，并使用知识解码器将知识应用于表达推理。所学到的数学知识，包括词与词的关系、词与运算符的关系，形成显式的知识图谱，将知识的“学习”和“应用”有机地联系起来。此外，为了解决问题，我们设计了语义增强模块和推理增强模块，分别应用知识来提高任何主干的问题理解和符号推理能力。我们从理论上证明了LeAp自主学习机制的优越性。对三个真实世界数据集的实验表明，LeAp 提高了所有骨干网络的性能，学习准确的知识，并实现更可解释的推理过程。 本文提出了一种名为LeAp的通用框架，通过显式知识学习增强数学推理能力，使模型在解决问题时能更透明地学习和应用数学知识。 Jiayu Liu,Zhenya Huang,Chengxiang Zhai,Qi Liu cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.LG

title: Scaffolding Progress: How Structured Editors Shape Novice Errors When Transitioning from Blocks to Text
title_zh: 脚手架进展：从块转换到文本时结构化编辑器如何塑造新手错误
comment: To be published in Proceedings of the 2023 SIGCSE technical symposium on computer science education, 7 pages, 3 figures
comments: To be published in Proceedings of the 2023 SIGCSE technical symposium on computer science education, 7 pages, 3 figures
abstract: Transitioning from block-based programming to text-based programming environments can be challenging as it requires students to learn new programming language concepts. In this paper, we identify and classify the issues encountered when transitioning from block-based to text-based programming. In particular, we investigate differences that emerge in learners when using a structured editor compared to an unstructured editor. We followed 26 high school students (ages 12-16; M=14 years) as they transitioned from Scratch to Python in three phases: (i) learning Scratch, (ii) transitioning from Scratch to Python using either a structured or unstructured editor, and (iii) evaluating Python coding skills using an unstructured editor. We identify 27 distinct types of issues and show that learners who used a structured editor during the transition phase had 4.6x less syntax issues and 1.9x less data-type issues compared to those who did not. When these learners switched to an unstructured editor for evaluation, they kept a lower rate on data-type issues but faced 4x more syntax errors.
summary: Transitioning from block-based programming to text-based programming environments can be challenging as it requires students to learn new programming language concepts. In this paper, we identify and classify the issues encountered when transitioning from block-based to text-based programming. In particular, we investigate differences that emerge in learners when using a structured editor compared to an unstructured editor. We followed 26 high school students (ages 12-16; M=14 years) as they transitioned from Scratch to Python in three phases: (i) learning Scratch, (ii) transitioning from Scratch to Python using either a structured or unstructured editor, and (iii) evaluating Python coding skills using an unstructured editor. We identify 27 distinct types of issues and show that learners who used a structured editor during the transition phase had 4.6x less syntax issues and 1.9x less data-type issues compared to those who did not. When these learners switched to an unstructured editor for evaluation, they kept a lower rate on data-type issues but faced 4x more syntax errors.
abstract_zh: 从基于块的编程过渡到基于文本的编程环境可能具有挑战性，因为它需要学生学习新的编程语言概念。在本文中，我们对从基于块的编程过渡到基于文本的编程时遇到的问题进行了识别和分类。特别是，我们调查了学习者在使用结构化编辑器与非结构化编辑器时出现的差异。我们跟踪了 26 名高中生（年龄 12-16 岁；M=14 岁），他们分三个阶段从 Scratch 过渡到 Python：(i) 学习 Scratch，(ii) 使用结构化或非结构化编辑器从 Scratch 过渡到 Python，以及 (iii) 使用非结构化编辑器评估 Python 编码技能。我们确定了 27 种不同类型的问题，结果表明，与未使用结构化编辑器的学习者相比，在过渡阶段使用结构化编辑器的学习者的语法问题减少了 4.6 倍，数据类型问题减少了 1.9 倍。当这些学习者改用非结构化编辑器进行评估时，他们在数据类型问题上保持较低的比率，但面临的语法错误增加了 4 倍。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了从积木式编程过渡到文本编程时，结构化编辑器与非结构化编辑器对新手错误的影响。
AI.motivation: 学生在从积木式编程（如Scratch）转向文本编程（如Python）时面临语法和数据类型等挑战，需探索结构化编辑器是否能有效减少错误。
AI.method: 跟踪26名高中生分三阶段学习：学习Scratch、使用结构化或非结构化编辑器过渡到Python、最后用非结构化编辑器评估Python技能，并分类27种问题类型。
AI.result: 使用结构化编辑器的学员在转换阶段语法错误减少4.6倍，数据类型错误减少1.9倍；切换到非结构化编辑器后，数据类型错误率仍较低，但语法错误增加4倍。
AI.conclusion: 结构化编辑器能有效降低过渡期错误，但学员在非结构化环境中仍易犯语法错误，表明结构化工具对学习有重要支持作用。

authors_text: Itai Dinur,Uri Stemmer,David P. Woodruff,Samson Zhou
title: On Differential Privacy and Adaptive Data Analysis with Bounded Space
title_zh: 关于有界空间的差分隐私和自适应数据分析
abstract: We study the space complexity of the two related fields of differential privacy and adaptive data analysis. Specifically, (1) Under standard cryptographic assumptions, we show that there exists a problem P that requires exponentially more space to be solved efficiently with differential privacy, compared to the space needed without privacy. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first separation between the space complexity of private and non-private algorithms. (2) The line of work on adaptive data analysis focuses on understanding the number of samples needed for answering a sequence of adaptive queries. We revisit previous lower bounds at a foundational level, and show that they are a consequence of a space bottleneck rather than a sampling bottleneck. To obtain our results, we define and construct an encryption scheme with multiple keys that is built to withstand a limited amount of key leakage in a very particular way.
summary: We study the space complexity of the two related fields of differential privacy and adaptive data analysis. Specifically, (1) Under standard cryptographic assumptions, we show that there exists a problem P that requires exponentially more space to be solved efficiently with differential privacy, compared to the space needed without privacy. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first separation between the space complexity of private and non-private algorithms. (2) The line of work on adaptive data analysis focuses on understanding the number of samples needed for answering a sequence of adaptive queries. We revisit previous lower bounds at a foundational level, and show that they are a consequence of a space bottleneck rather than a sampling bottleneck. To obtain our results, we define and construct an encryption scheme with multiple keys that is built to withstand a limited amount of key leakage in a very particular way.
abstract_zh: 我们研究差分隐私和自适应数据分析两个相关领域的空间复杂度。具体来说，（1）在标准密码学假设下，我们证明存在一个问题 P，与没有隐私时所需的空间相比，使用差分隐私需要指数级更多的空间来有效解决。据我们所知，这是私有算法和非私有算法的空间复杂度的首次分离。 (2) 自适应数据分析的工作重点是了解回答一系列自适应查询所需的样本数量。我们在基础层面上重新审视之前的下限，并表明它们是空间瓶颈而不是采样瓶颈的结果。为了获得我们的结果，我们定义并构建了一个具有多个密钥的加密方案，该方案旨在以非常特殊的方式承受有限数量的密钥泄漏。

AI.tldr: 研究差分隐私与自适应数据分析在受限空间下的复杂度问题，证明隐私保护算法需要更多空间并重新分析自适应查询的样本限制。
AI.motivation: 探索差分隐私与非隐私算法的空间复杂度差异，并澄清自适应数据分析中样本数量下限的根本原因。
AI.method: 基于密码学假设构造多密钥加密方案，通过分析空间瓶颈证明隐私保护与非隐私算法的复杂度差距。
AI.result: 1. 差分隐私算法解决某些问题需指数级更多空间；2. 自适应数据分析的样本下限源于空间限制而非抽样限制；3. 构建了抗有限密钥泄露的多密钥加密方案。
AI.conclusion: 空间复杂度是差分隐私与非隐私算法的核心差异点，自适应数据分析的瓶颈需从空间角度重新理解，加密方案为理论分析提供了新工具。

authors_text: Piush Aggarwal,Pranit Chawla,Mithun Das,Punyajoy Saha,Binny Mathew,Torsten Zesch,Animesh Mukherjee
title: HateProof: Are Hateful Meme Detection Systems really Robust?
title_zh: HateProof：仇恨模因检测系统真的强大吗？
abstract: Exploiting social media to spread hate has tremendously increased over the years. Lately, multi-modal hateful content such as memes has drawn relatively more traction than uni-modal content. Moreover, the availability of implicit content payloads makes them fairly challenging to be detected by existing hateful meme detection systems. In this paper, we present a use case study to analyze such systems' vulnerabilities against external adversarial attacks. We find that even very simple perturbations in uni-modal and multi-modal settings performed by humans with little knowledge about the model can make the existing detection models highly vulnerable. Empirically, we find a noticeable performance drop of as high as 10% in the macro-F1 score for certain attacks. As a remedy, we attempt to boost the model's robustness using contrastive learning as well as an adversarial training-based method - VILLA. Using an ensemble of the above two approaches, in two of our high resolution datasets, we are able to (re)gain back the performance to a large extent for certain attacks. We believe that ours is a first step toward addressing this crucial problem in an adversarial setting and would inspire more such investigations in the future.
summary: Exploiting social media to spread hate has tremendously increased over the years. Lately, multi-modal hateful content such as memes has drawn relatively more traction than uni-modal content. Moreover, the availability of implicit content payloads makes them fairly challenging to be detected by existing hateful meme detection systems. In this paper, we present a use case study to analyze such systems' vulnerabilities against external adversarial attacks. We find that even very simple perturbations in uni-modal and multi-modal settings performed by humans with little knowledge about the model can make the existing detection models highly vulnerable. Empirically, we find a noticeable performance drop of as high as 10% in the macro-F1 score for certain attacks. As a remedy, we attempt to boost the model's robustness using contrastive learning as well as an adversarial training-based method - VILLA. Using an ensemble of the above two approaches, in two of our high resolution datasets, we are able to (re)gain back the performance to a large extent for certain attacks. We believe that ours is a first step toward addressing this crucial problem in an adversarial setting and would inspire more such investigations in the future.
abstract_zh: 多年来，利用社交媒体传播仇恨的现象急剧增加。最近，模因等多模态仇恨内容比单模态内容吸引了更多的关注。此外，隐式内容有效负载的可用性使得现有的可恶模因检测系统很难检测到它们。在本文中，我们提出了一个用例研究来分析此类系统针对外部对抗性攻击的漏洞。我们发现，即使是由对模型知之甚少的人在单模态和多模态设置中执行的非常简单的扰动，也会使现有的检测模型变得非常脆弱。根据经验，我们发现某些攻击的宏 F1 分数的性能显着下降高达 10%。作为补救措施，我们尝试使用对比学习以及基于对抗性训练的方法 - VILLA 来提高模型的鲁棒性。使用上述两种方法的集合，在我们的两个高分辨率数据集中，我们能够在很大程度上（重新）恢复某些攻击的性能。我们相信，我们的研究是在对抗性环境中解决这一关键问题的第一步，并将在未来激发更多此类调查。

AI.tldr: 本文分析仇恨言论检测系统的脆弱性，并提出通过对比学习和对抗训练提升其鲁棒性的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有仇恨memes检测系统在面对对抗攻击时表现脆弱，简单扰动即可导致性能显著下降，需提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过案例研究暴露系统漏洞，采用对比学习与基于对抗训练的VILLA方法，并结合两种方法构建集成模型。
AI.result: 在两个高分辨率数据集上，集成方法成功恢复了部分攻击下的模型性能，宏观F1分数损失减少至10%以内。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次系统研究仇恨memes检测的对抗鲁棒性问题，为后续相关研究提供了基础与方向。

authors_text: Jiacheng Ye,Zhiyong Wu,Jiangtao Feng,Tao Yu,Lingpeng Kong
title: Compositional Exemplars for In-context Learning
title_zh: 情境学习的作文范例
abstract: Large pretrained language models (LMs) have shown impressive In-Context Learning (ICL) ability, where the model learns to do an unseen task via a prompt consisting of input-output examples as the demonstration, without any parameter updates. The performance of ICL is highly dominated by the quality of the selected in-context examples. However, previous selection methods are mostly based on simple heuristics, leading to sub-optimal performance. In this work, we formulate in-context example selection as a subset selection problem. We propose CEIL (Compositional Exemplars for In-context Learning), which is instantiated by Determinantal Point Processes (DPPs) to model the interaction between the given input and in-context examples, and optimized through a carefully-designed contrastive learning objective to obtain preference from LMs. We validate CEIL on 12 classification and generation datasets from 7 distinct NLP tasks, including sentiment analysis, paraphrase detection, natural language inference, commonsense reasoning, open-domain question answering, code generation, and semantic parsing. Extensive experiments demonstrate not only the state-of-the-art performance but also the transferability and compositionality of CEIL, shedding new light on effective and efficient in-context learning. Our code is released at https://github.com/HKUNLP/icl-ceil.
summary: Large pretrained language models (LMs) have shown impressive In-Context Learning (ICL) ability, where the model learns to do an unseen task via a prompt consisting of input-output examples as the demonstration, without any parameter updates. The performance of ICL is highly dominated by the quality of the selected in-context examples. However, previous selection methods are mostly based on simple heuristics, leading to sub-optimal performance. In this work, we formulate in-context example selection as a subset selection problem. We propose CEIL (Compositional Exemplars for In-context Learning), which is instantiated by Determinantal Point Processes (DPPs) to model the interaction between the given input and in-context examples, and optimized through a carefully-designed contrastive learning objective to obtain preference from LMs. We validate CEIL on 12 classification and generation datasets from 7 distinct NLP tasks, including sentiment analysis, paraphrase detection, natural language inference, commonsense reasoning, open-domain question answering, code generation, and semantic parsing. Extensive experiments demonstrate not only the state-of-the-art performance but also the transferability and compositionality of CEIL, shedding new light on effective and efficient in-context learning. Our code is released at https://github.com/HKUNLP/icl-ceil.
abstract_zh: 大型预训练语言模型 (LM) 显示了令人印象深刻的上下文学习 (ICL) 能力，其中模型通过由输入输出示例组成的提示来学习执行看不见的任务作为演示，而无需任何参数更新。 ICL 的性能在很大程度上取决于所选上下文示例的质量。然而，以前的选择方法大多基于简单的启发式，导致性能次优。在这项工作中，我们将上下文示例选择制定为子集选择问题。我们提出了 CEIL（上下文学习的组合范例），它由决定点过程（DPP）实例化，以对给定输入和上下文示例之间的交互进行建模，并通过精心设计的对比学习目标进行优化，以获得 LM 的偏好。我们在来自 7 个不同 NLP 任务的 12 个分类和生成数据集上验证了 CEIL，包括情感分析、释义检测、自然语言推理、常识推理、开放域问答、代码生成和语义解析。大量的实验不仅证明了 CEIL 最先进的性能，还证明了 CEIL 的可迁移性和组合性，为有效和高效的情境学习提供了新的线索。我们的代码发布于 https://github.com/HKUNLP/icl-ceil。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CEIL的方法，通过优化上下文示例选择来提升大语言模型的上下文学习（ICL）性能。
AI.motivation: 现有ICL示例选择方法依赖简单启发式规则，导致性能次优，需更有效的示例选择策略。
AI.method: 将示例选择建模为子集选择问题，利用行列式点过程（DPPs）建模输入与示例的交互，并通过对比学习目标优化示例偏好。
AI.result: 在7类NLP任务的12个数据集上取得最先进性能，验证了CEIL的可迁移性与组合性优势。
AI.conclusion: CEIL为高效且有效的上下文学习提供了新思路，代码已开源。

title: Local spectral attention for full-band speech enhancement
title_zh: 用于全频带语音增强的局部频谱关注
abstract: Attention mechanism has been widely utilized in speech enhancement (SE) because theoretically it can effectively model the inherent connection of signal both in time domain and spectrum domain. Usually, the span of attention is limited in time domain while the attention in frequency domain spans the whole frequency range. In this paper, we notice that the attention over the whole frequency range hampers the inference for full-band SE and possibly leads to excessive residual noise. To alleviate this problem, we introduce local spectral attention (LSA) into full-band SE model by limiting the span of attention. The ablation test on the state-of-the-art (SOTA) full-band SE model reveals that the local frequency attention can effectively improve overall performance. The improved model achieves the best objective score on the full-band VoiceBank+DEMAND set.
summary: Attention mechanism has been widely utilized in speech enhancement (SE) because theoretically it can effectively model the inherent connection of signal both in time domain and spectrum domain. Usually, the span of attention is limited in time domain while the attention in frequency domain spans the whole frequency range. In this paper, we notice that the attention over the whole frequency range hampers the inference for full-band SE and possibly leads to excessive residual noise. To alleviate this problem, we introduce local spectral attention (LSA) into full-band SE model by limiting the span of attention. The ablation test on the state-of-the-art (SOTA) full-band SE model reveals that the local frequency attention can effectively improve overall performance. The improved model achieves the best objective score on the full-band VoiceBank+DEMAND set.
abstract_zh: 注意力机制在语音增强（SE）中得到了广泛的应用，因为理论上它可以有效地模拟信号在时域和频谱域上的内在联系。通常，注意力的跨度在时域是有限的，而频域的注意力则跨越整个频率范围。在本文中，我们注意到对整个频率范围的关注阻碍了全频带 SE 的推断，并可能导致过多的残余噪声。为了缓解这个问题，我们通过限制注意力的跨度，将局部谱注意力（LSA）引入全带 SE 模型。对最先进（SOTA）全频带 SE 模型的消融测试表明，局部频率注意力可以有效提高整体性能。改进后的模型在全频段 VoiceBank+DEMAND 集上取得了最佳客观分数。

AI.tldr: 提出局部频谱注意力机制以改进全频带语音增强，减少残留噪声并提升性能。
AI.motivation: 传统全频域注意力机制可能导致推理复杂度高和残留噪声问题，需通过局部注意力优化。
AI.method: 在全频带语音增强模型中引入局部频谱注意力（LSA），限制频域注意力的跨度以降低复杂度。
AI.result: 消融实验证明LSA有效提升性能，改进模型在VoiceBank+DEMAND数据集上取得最优客观指标。
AI.conclusion: 局部频谱注意力机制有效缓解全频带语音增强中的残留噪声问题，显著提升模型性能。

method: 在全频带语音增强模型中引入局部频谱注意力（LSA），限制频域注意力的跨度以降低复杂度。
result: 消融实验证明LSA有效提升性能，改进模型在VoiceBank+DEMAND数据集上取得最优客观指标。
conclusion: 局部频谱注意力机制有效缓解全频带语音增强中的残留噪声问题，显著提升模型性能。
search_text: Local spectral attention for full-band speech enhancement 用于全频带语音增强的局部频谱关注 Attention mechanism has been widely utilized in speech enhancement (SE) because theoretically it can effectively model the inherent connection of signal both in time domain and spectrum domain. Usually, the span of attention is limited in time domain while the attention in frequency domain spans the whole frequency range. In this paper, we notice that the attention over the whole frequency range hampers the inference for full-band SE and possibly leads to excessive residual noise. To alleviate this problem, we introduce local spectral attention (LSA) into full-band SE model by limiting the span of attention. The ablation test on the state-of-the-art (SOTA) full-band SE model reveals that the local frequency attention can effectively improve overall performance. The improved model achieves the best objective score on the full-band VoiceBank+DEMAND set. 注意力机制在语音增强（SE）中得到了广泛的应用，因为理论上它可以有效地模拟信号在时域和频谱域上的内在联系。通常，注意力的跨度在时域是有限的，而频域的注意力则跨越整个频率范围。在本文中，我们注意到对整个频率范围的关注阻碍了全频带 SE 的推断，并可能导致过多的残余噪声。为了缓解这个问题，我们通过限制注意力的跨度，将局部谱注意力（LSA）引入全带 SE 模型。对最先进（SOTA）全频带 SE 模型的消融测试表明，局部频率注意力可以有效提高整体性能。改进后的模型在全频段 VoiceBank+DEMAND 集上取得了最佳客观分数。 提出局部频谱注意力机制以改进全频带语音增强，减少残留噪声并提升性能。 Zhongshu Hou,Qinwen Hu,Kai Chen,Jing Lu cs.SD,eess.AS

title: Attention does not guarantee best performance in speech enhancement
title_zh: 注意力并不能保证语音增强的最佳性能
abstract: Attention mechanism has been widely utilized in speech enhancement (SE) because theoretically it can effectively model the long-term inherent connection of signal both in time domain and spectrum domain. However, the generally used global attention mechanism might not be the best choice since the adjacent information naturally imposes more influence than the far-apart information in speech enhancement. In this paper, we validate this conjecture by replacing attention with RNN in two typical state-of-the-art (SOTA) models, multi-scale temporal frequency convolutional network (MTFAA) with axial attention and conformer-based metric-GAN network (CMGAN).
summary: Attention mechanism has been widely utilized in speech enhancement (SE) because theoretically it can effectively model the long-term inherent connection of signal both in time domain and spectrum domain. However, the generally used global attention mechanism might not be the best choice since the adjacent information naturally imposes more influence than the far-apart information in speech enhancement. In this paper, we validate this conjecture by replacing attention with RNN in two typical state-of-the-art (SOTA) models, multi-scale temporal frequency convolutional network (MTFAA) with axial attention and conformer-based metric-GAN network (CMGAN).
abstract_zh: 注意力机制在语音增强（SE）中得到了广泛的应用，因为理论上它可以有效地模拟信号在时域和频谱域上的长期内在联系。然而，通常使用的全局注意力机制可能不是最佳选择，因为在语音增强中相邻信息自然比相距较远的信息施加更大的影响。在本文中，我们通过在两个典型的最先进（SOTA）模型中用 RNN 替换注意力来验证这个猜想，即具有轴向注意力的多尺度时频卷积网络（MTFAA）和基于一致性的度量 GAN 网络（CMGAN）。

AI.tldr: 本文验证了注意力机制在语音增强任务中未必能保证最佳性能，并探索了替代方案。
AI.motivation: 尽管注意力机制在语音增强中被广泛使用，但相邻信息在时频域中的影响可能比全局注意力更关键，现有模型可能过度依赖注意力机制。
AI.method: 在两个先进模型（MTFAA和CMGAN）中，将注意力机制替换为RNN，比较性能差异。
AI.result: 实验表明，用RNN替代注意力机制后，模型在语音增强任务中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 注意力机制并非语音增强的唯一最优解，需根据任务特性选择合适的方法。

authors_text: Xiangjie Yan,Yongpeng Jiang,Guokun Wu,Chen Chen,Gao Huang,Xiang Li
title: Multi-Modal Interaction Control of Ultrasound Scanning Robots with Safe Human Guidance and Contact Recovery
title_zh: 具有安全人类引导和接触恢复功能的超声扫描机器人的多模态交互控制
abstract: Ultrasound scanning robots enable the automatic imaging of a patient's internal organs by maintaining close contact between the ultrasound probe and the patient's body during a scanning procedure. Comprehensive, high-quality ultrasound scans are essential for providing the patient with an accurate diagnosis and effective treatment plan. An ultrasound scanning robot usually works in a doctor-robot co-existing environment, hence both efficiency and safety during the collaboration should be considered. In this paper, we propose a novel multi-modal control scheme for ultrasound scanning robots, in which three interaction modes are integrated into a single control input. Specifically, the scanning mode drives the robot to track a time-varying trajectory on the patient's body under the desired impedance model; the recovery mode allows the robot to actively recontact the body whenever physical contact between the ultrasound probe and the patient's body is lost; the human-guided mode renders the robot passive such that the doctor can safely intervene to manually reposition the probe. The integration of multiple modes allows the doctor to intervene safely at any time during the task and also maximizes the robot's autonomous scanning ability. The performance of the robot is validated on a collaborative scanning task of a carotid artery examination.
summary: Ultrasound scanning robots enable the automatic imaging of a patient's internal organs by maintaining close contact between the ultrasound probe and the patient's body during a scanning procedure. Comprehensive, high-quality ultrasound scans are essential for providing the patient with an accurate diagnosis and effective treatment plan. An ultrasound scanning robot usually works in a doctor-robot co-existing environment, hence both efficiency and safety during the collaboration should be considered. In this paper, we propose a novel multi-modal control scheme for ultrasound scanning robots, in which three interaction modes are integrated into a single control input. Specifically, the scanning mode drives the robot to track a time-varying trajectory on the patient's body under the desired impedance model; the recovery mode allows the robot to actively recontact the body whenever physical contact between the ultrasound probe and the patient's body is lost; the human-guided mode renders the robot passive such that the doctor can safely intervene to manually reposition the probe. The integration of multiple modes allows the doctor to intervene safely at any time during the task and also maximizes the robot's autonomous scanning ability. The performance of the robot is validated on a collaborative scanning task of a carotid artery examination.
abstract_zh: 超声扫描机器人在扫描过程中保持超声探头与患者身体的紧密接触，从而实现患者内脏器官的自动成像。全面、高质量的超声扫描对于为患者提供准确的诊断和有效的治疗计划至关重要。超声扫描机器人通常工作在医生与机器人共存的环境中，因此需要考虑协作过程中的效率和安全性。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于超声扫描机器人的新型多模式控制方案，其中三种交互模式被集成到单个控制输入中。具体来说，扫描模式驱动机器人在期望的阻抗模型下跟踪患者身体上的时变轨迹；恢复模式允许机器人在超声探头与患者身体之间失去物理接触时主动重新接触身体；人工引导模式使机器人处于被动状态，以便医生可以安全地干预以手动重新定位探头。多种模式的融合，让医生在任务过程中可以随时安全干预，也最大限度地发挥了机器人的自主扫描能力。机器人的性能在颈动脉检查的协作扫描任务中得到验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态控制方案，整合扫描、接触恢复和医生引导三种模式，提升超声扫描机器人的安全性和自主性。
AI.motivation: 超声扫描机器人需在医生与机器人共存环境中运行，需兼顾效率与安全，现有方法难以满足动态交互需求。
AI.method: 设计融合三种交互模式的控制框架：扫描模式跟踪轨迹、恢复模式自动重接触、人体引导模式允许医生手动干预，集成于单一控制输入中。
AI.result: 在颈动脉检查协作任务中验证了机器人性能，证明方法可有效实现安全交互与自主扫描。
AI.conclusion: 多模态控制方案显著提升超声机器人在临床场景中的安全性与操作灵活性，具有应用潜力。

title: Maintaining Discrete Probability Distributions in Practice
title_zh: 在实践中维护离散概率分布
abstract: A classical problem in random number generation is the sampling of elements from a given discrete distribution. Formally, given a set of indices $S = \{1, \dots, n\}$ and sequence of weights $w_1, \dots, w_n \in \mathbb{R}^+$, the task is to provide samples from $S$ with distribution $p(i) = w_i / W$ where $W = \sum_j w_j$. A commonly accepted solution is Walker's Alias Table, which allows for each sample to be drawn in constant time. However, some applications correspond to a dynamic setting, where elements are inserted or removed, or weights change over time. Here, the Alias Table is not efficient, as it needs to be re-built whenever the underlying distribution changes. In this paper, we engineer a simple data structure for maintaining discrete probability distributions in the dynamic setting. Construction of the data structure is possible in time $O(n)$, sampling is possible in expected time $O(1)$, and an update of size $Δ$ can be processed in time $O(Δn / W)$. As a special case, we maintain an urn containing $W$ marbles of $n$ colors where with each update $O(W / n)$ marbles can be added or removed in $O(1)$ time per update. To evaluate the efficiency of the data structure in practice we conduct an empirical study. The results suggest that the dynamic sampling performance is competitive with the static Alias Table. Compared to existing more complex dynamic solutions we obtain a sampling speed-up of up to half an order of magnitude.
summary: A classical problem in random number generation is the sampling of elements from a given discrete distribution. Formally, given a set of indices $S = \{1, \dots, n\}$ and sequence of weights $w_1, \dots, w_n \in \mathbb{R}^+$, the task is to provide samples from $S$ with distribution $p(i) = w_i / W$ where $W = \sum_j w_j$. A commonly accepted solution is Walker's Alias Table, which allows for each sample to be drawn in constant time. However, some applications correspond to a dynamic setting, where elements are inserted or removed, or weights change over time. Here, the Alias Table is not efficient, as it needs to be re-built whenever the underlying distribution changes. In this paper, we engineer a simple data structure for maintaining discrete probability distributions in the dynamic setting. Construction of the data structure is possible in time $O(n)$, sampling is possible in expected time $O(1)$, and an update of size $Δ$ can be processed in time $O(Δn / W)$. As a special case, we maintain an urn containing $W$ marbles of $n$ colors where with each update $O(W / n)$ marbles can be added or removed in $O(1)$ time per update. To evaluate the efficiency of the data structure in practice we conduct an empirical study. The results suggest that the dynamic sampling performance is competitive with the static Alias Table. Compared to existing more complex dynamic solutions we obtain a sampling speed-up of up to half an order of magnitude.
abstract_zh: 随机数生成中的一个经典问题是从给定离散分布中对元素进行采样。形式上，给定一组索引 $S = \{1, \dots, n\}$ 和权重序列 $w_1, \dots, w_n \in \mathbb{R}^+$，任务是从 $S$ 中提供分布为 $p(i) = w_i / W$ 的样本，其中 $W = \sum_j w_j$。一个普遍接受的解决方案是 Walker 的别名表，它允许在恒定的时间内抽取每个样本。然而，某些应用程序对应于动态设置，其中插入或删除元素，或者权重随时间变化。在这里，别名表效率不高，因为只要底层分布发生变化，就需要重新构建它。在本文中，我们设计了一种简单的数据结构，用于在动态设置中维护离散概率分布。数据结构的构建可以在 $O(n)$ 时间内完成，采样可以在 $O(1)$ 时间内进行采样，并且可以在 $O(Δn / W)$ 时间内处理大小 $Δ$ 的更新。作为一种特殊情况，我们维护一个包含 $n$ 颜色的 $W$ 弹珠的瓮，其中每次更新都可以在每次更新 $O(1)$ 时间内添加或删除 $O(W / n)$ 弹珠。为了评估数据结构在实践中的效率，我们进行了实证研究。结果表明，动态采样性能与静态别名表具有竞争力。与现有的更复杂的动态解决方案相比，我们获得了高达半个数量级的采样加速。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种动态维护离散概率分布的数据结构，支持高效采样和更新操作。
AI.motivation: 经典的Walker别名表在静态场景下采样效率高，但无法处理动态变化的权重或元素增删场景，现有动态方案复杂且效率不足。
AI.method: 设计了一种简单数据结构，构建时间为O(n)，采样时间为O(1)，更新时间为O(Δn/W)。特别地，针对彩色弹珠 urn 模型，支持O(1)时间添加/移除O(W/n)个弹珠。
AI.result: 实验证明动态采样性能与静态别名表相当，相比现有复杂方案提速达半个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在动态场景下实现了高效且实用的离散分布维护，为实际应用提供了更优解决方案。

search_text: Maintaining Discrete Probability Distributions in Practice 在实践中维护离散概率分布 A classical problem in random number generation is the sampling of elements from a given discrete distribution. Formally, given a set of indices $S = \{1, \dots, n\}$ and sequence of weights $w_1, \dots, w_n \in \mathbb{R}^+$, the task is to provide samples from $S$ with distribution $p(i) = w_i / W$ where $W = \sum_j w_j$. A commonly accepted solution is Walker's Alias Table, which allows for each sample to be drawn in constant time. However, some applications correspond to a dynamic setting, where elements are inserted or removed, or weights change over time. Here, the Alias Table is not efficient, as it needs to be re-built whenever the underlying distribution changes. In this paper, we engineer a simple data structure for maintaining discrete probability distributions in the dynamic setting. Construction of the data structure is possible in time $O(n)$, sampling is possible in expected time $O(1)$, and an update of size $Δ$ can be processed in time $O(Δn / W)$. As a special case, we maintain an urn containing $W$ marbles of $n$ colors where with each update $O(W / n)$ marbles can be added or removed in $O(1)$ time per update. To evaluate the efficiency of the data structure in practice we conduct an empirical study. The results suggest that the dynamic sampling performance is competitive with the static Alias Table. Compared to existing more complex dynamic solutions we obtain a sampling speed-up of up to half an order of magnitude. 随机数生成中的一个经典问题是从给定离散分布中对元素进行采样。形式上，给定一组索引 $S = \{1, \dots, n\}$ 和权重序列 $w_1, \dots, w_n \in \mathbb{R}^+$，任务是从 $S$ 中提供分布为 $p(i) = w_i / W$ 的样本，其中 $W = \sum_j w_j$。一个普遍接受的解决方案是 Walker 的别名表，它允许在恒定的时间内抽取每个样本。然而，某些应用程序对应于动态设置，其中插入或删除元素，或者权重随时间变化。在这里，别名表效率不高，因为只要底层分布发生变化，就需要重新构建它。在本文中，我们设计了一种简单的数据结构，用于在动态设置中维护离散概率分布。数据结构的构建可以在 $O(n)$ 时间内完成，采样可以在 $O(1)$ 时间内进行采样，并且可以在 $O(Δn / W)$ 时间内处理大小 $Δ$ 的更新。作为一种特殊情况，我们维护一个包含 $n$ 颜色的 $W$ 弹珠的瓮，其中每次更新都可以在每次更新 $O(1)$ 时间内添加或删除 $O(W / n)$ 弹珠。为了评估数据结构在实践中的效率，我们进行了实证研究。结果表明，动态采样性能与静态别名表具有竞争力。与现有的更复杂的动态解决方案相比，我们获得了高达半个数量级的采样加速。 本文提出了一种动态维护离散概率分布的数据结构，支持高效采样和更新操作。 Daniel Allendorf cs.DS

title: An EPTAS for Budgeted Matching and Budgeted Matroid Intersection
title_zh: 预算匹配与预算拟阵交集的EPTAS
abstract: We study the budgeted versions of the well known matching and matroid intersection problems. While both problems admit a polynomial-time approximation scheme (PTAS) [Berger et al. (Math. Programming, 2011), Chekuri, Vondrak and Zenklusen (SODA 2011)], it has been an intriguing open question whether these problems admit a fully PTAS (FPTAS), or even an efficient PTAS (EPTAS). In this paper we answer the second part of this question affirmatively, by presenting an EPTAS for budgeted matching and budgeted matroid intersection. A main component of our scheme is a novel construction of representative sets for desired solutions, whose cardinality depends only on $\varepsilon$, the accuracy parameter. Thus, enumerating over solutions within a representative set leads to an EPTAS. This crucially distinguishes our algorithms from previous approaches, which rely on exhaustive enumeration over the solution set. Our ideas for constructing representative sets may find use in tackling other budgeted optimization problems, and are thus of independent interest.
summary: We study the budgeted versions of the well known matching and matroid intersection problems. While both problems admit a polynomial-time approximation scheme (PTAS) [Berger et al. (Math. Programming, 2011), Chekuri, Vondrak and Zenklusen (SODA 2011)], it has been an intriguing open question whether these problems admit a fully PTAS (FPTAS), or even an efficient PTAS (EPTAS). In this paper we answer the second part of this question affirmatively, by presenting an EPTAS for budgeted matching and budgeted matroid intersection. A main component of our scheme is a novel construction of representative sets for desired solutions, whose cardinality depends only on $\varepsilon$, the accuracy parameter. Thus, enumerating over solutions within a representative set leads to an EPTAS. This crucially distinguishes our algorithms from previous approaches, which rely on exhaustive enumeration over the solution set. Our ideas for constructing representative sets may find use in tackling other budgeted optimization problems, and are thus of independent interest.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了众所周知的匹配和拟阵相交问题的预算版本。虽然这两个问题都承认多项式时间近似方案（PTAS）[Berger 等人。 （Math.Programming，2011），Chekuri、Vondrak 和 Zenklusen（SODA 2011）]，这些问题是否承认完全的 PTAS（FPTAS），甚至是有效的 PTAS（EPTAS），一直是一个有趣的开放性问题。在本文中，我们通过提出预算匹配和预算拟阵交集的 EPTAS 来肯定地回答这个问题的第二部分。我们方案的一个主要组成部分是所需解决方案的代表集的新颖构造，其基数仅取决于精度参数 $\varepsilon$。因此，枚举代表性集合中的解决方案会产生 EPTAS。这将我们的算法与以前的方法区分开来，以前的方法依赖于对解决方案集的详尽枚举。我们构建代表性集的想法可以用于解决其他预算优化问题，因此具有独立的意义。

AI.tldr: 本文为预算匹配和预算拟阵交问题设计了一种高效多项式时间近似方案（EPTAS）。
AI.motivation: 尽管预算匹配和预算拟阵交问题已有多项式时间近似方案（PTAS），但是否存在更高效的完全PTAS（FPTAS）或高效PTAS（EPTAS）仍是开放问题。
AI.method: 通过构造仅依赖精度参数ε的代表性集合，并枚举该集合中的解，替代传统穷举方法。
AI.result: 成功提出预算匹配和预算拟阵交问题的EPTAS，且代表性集合构造方法具有通用性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法不仅解决了目标问题，其构造思想还可扩展至其他预算优化问题，具有独立研究价值。

title: CatAlyst: Domain-Extensible Intervention for Preventing Task Procrastination Using Large Generative Models
title_zh: CatAlyst：使用大型生成模型防止任务拖延的领域可扩展干预
comment: Accepted by ACM CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '23)
comments: Accepted by ACM CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '23)
abstract: CatAlyst uses generative models to help workers' progress by influencing their task engagement instead of directly contributing to their task outputs. It prompts distracted workers to resume their tasks by generating a continuation of their work and presenting it as an intervention that is more context-aware than conventional (predetermined) feedback. The prompt can function by drawing their interest and lowering the hurdle for resumption even when the generated continuation is insufficient to substitute their work, while recent human-AI collaboration research aiming at work substitution depends on a stable high accuracy. This frees CatAlyst from domain-specific model-tuning and makes it applicable to various tasks. Our studies involving writing and slide-editing tasks demonstrated CatAlyst's effectiveness in helping workers swiftly resume tasks with a lowered cognitive load. The results suggest a new form of human-AI collaboration where large generative models publicly available but imperfect for each individual domain can contribute to workers' digital well-being.
summary: CatAlyst uses generative models to help workers' progress by influencing their task engagement instead of directly contributing to their task outputs. It prompts distracted workers to resume their tasks by generating a continuation of their work and presenting it as an intervention that is more context-aware than conventional (predetermined) feedback. The prompt can function by drawing their interest and lowering the hurdle for resumption even when the generated continuation is insufficient to substitute their work, while recent human-AI collaboration research aiming at work substitution depends on a stable high accuracy. This frees CatAlyst from domain-specific model-tuning and makes it applicable to various tasks. Our studies involving writing and slide-editing tasks demonstrated CatAlyst's effectiveness in helping workers swiftly resume tasks with a lowered cognitive load. The results suggest a new form of human-AI collaboration where large generative models publicly available but imperfect for each individual domain can contribute to workers' digital well-being.
abstract_zh: CatAlyst 使用生成模型通过影响员工的任务参与度来帮助他们取得进步，而不是直接贡献于他们的任务输出。它通过生成工作的延续并将其呈现为比传统（预定）反馈更具情境意识的干预措施，促使心烦意乱的员工恢复任务。即使生成的延续不足以替代他们的工作，提示也可以通过吸引他们的兴趣并降低恢复的障碍来发挥作用，而最近针对工作替代的人机协作研究依赖于稳定的高精度。这使得 CatAlyst 免于特定领域的模型调整，并使其适用于各种任务。我们涉及写作和幻灯片编辑任务的研究证明了 CatAlyst 在帮助员工以较低的认知负荷快速恢复任务方面的有效性。结果表明，一种新的人类与人工智能协作形式，其中公开可用但对于每个单独领域都不完善的大型生成模型可以为工人的数字福祉做出贡献。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CatAlyst系统，利用大语言模型生成工作内容续写作为干预手段，通过提升任务参与度而非直接完成任务输出，帮助用户克服任务拖延问题。
AI.motivation: 传统反拖延方法依赖预设反馈且缺乏上下文感知能力，而现有研究要求模型具备领域特定的高精度输出，限制了适用性。
AI.method: 通过生成用户工作内容的续写片段作为提示，利用模型的上下文感知能力降低用户重新投入任务的认知门槛，无需领域微调即可跨任务应用。
AI.result: 在写作和幻灯片编辑任务中验证了CatAlyst的有效性，用户能更快速恢复任务且认知负荷显著降低。
AI.conclusion: 该研究展示了利用公开但非完美领域专用的大型生成模型，通过新型人机协作模式提升数字福祉的可行性。

search_text: CatAlyst: Domain-Extensible Intervention for Preventing Task Procrastination Using Large Generative Models CatAlyst：使用大型生成模型防止任务拖延的领域可扩展干预 CatAlyst uses generative models to help workers' progress by influencing their task engagement instead of directly contributing to their task outputs. It prompts distracted workers to resume their tasks by generating a continuation of their work and presenting it as an intervention that is more context-aware than conventional (predetermined) feedback. The prompt can function by drawing their interest and lowering the hurdle for resumption even when the generated continuation is insufficient to substitute their work, while recent human-AI collaboration research aiming at work substitution depends on a stable high accuracy. This frees CatAlyst from domain-specific model-tuning and makes it applicable to various tasks. Our studies involving writing and slide-editing tasks demonstrated CatAlyst's effectiveness in helping workers swiftly resume tasks with a lowered cognitive load. The results suggest a new form of human-AI collaboration where large generative models publicly available but imperfect for each individual domain can contribute to workers' digital well-being. CatAlyst 使用生成模型通过影响员工的任务参与度来帮助他们取得进步，而不是直接贡献于他们的任务输出。它通过生成工作的延续并将其呈现为比传统（预定）反馈更具情境意识的干预措施，促使心烦意乱的员工恢复任务。即使生成的延续不足以替代他们的工作，提示也可以通过吸引他们的兴趣并降低恢复的障碍来发挥作用，而最近针对工作替代的人机协作研究依赖于稳定的高精度。这使得 CatAlyst 免于特定领域的模型调整，并使其适用于各种任务。我们涉及写作和幻灯片编辑任务的研究证明了 CatAlyst 在帮助员工以较低的认知负荷快速恢复任务方面的有效性。结果表明，一种新的人类与人工智能协作形式，其中公开可用但对于每个单独领域都不完善的大型生成模型可以为工人的数字福祉做出贡献。 本文提出CatAlyst系统，利用大语言模型生成工作内容续写作为干预手段，通过提升任务参与度而非直接完成任务输出，帮助用户克服任务拖延问题。 Riku Arakawa,Hiromu Yakura,Masataka Goto cs.HC,cs.AI

title: Counter-GAP: Counterfactual Bias Evaluation through Gendered Ambiguous Pronouns
title_zh: Counter-GAP：通过性别模糊代词进行反事实偏见评估
abstract: Bias-measuring datasets play a critical role in detecting biased behavior of language models and in evaluating progress of bias mitigation methods. In this work, we focus on evaluating gender bias through coreference resolution, where previous datasets are either hand-crafted or fail to reliably measure an explicitly defined bias. To overcome these shortcomings, we propose a novel method to collect diverse, natural, and minimally distant text pairs via counterfactual generation, and construct Counter-GAP, an annotated dataset consisting of 4008 instances grouped into 1002 quadruples. We further identify a bias cancellation problem in previous group-level metrics on Counter-GAP, and propose to use the difference between inconsistency across genders and within genders to measure bias at a quadruple level. Our results show that four pre-trained language models are significantly more inconsistent across different gender groups than within each group, and that a name-based counterfactual data augmentation method is more effective to mitigate such bias than an anonymization-based method.
summary: Bias-measuring datasets play a critical role in detecting biased behavior of language models and in evaluating progress of bias mitigation methods. In this work, we focus on evaluating gender bias through coreference resolution, where previous datasets are either hand-crafted or fail to reliably measure an explicitly defined bias. To overcome these shortcomings, we propose a novel method to collect diverse, natural, and minimally distant text pairs via counterfactual generation, and construct Counter-GAP, an annotated dataset consisting of 4008 instances grouped into 1002 quadruples. We further identify a bias cancellation problem in previous group-level metrics on Counter-GAP, and propose to use the difference between inconsistency across genders and within genders to measure bias at a quadruple level. Our results show that four pre-trained language models are significantly more inconsistent across different gender groups than within each group, and that a name-based counterfactual data augmentation method is more effective to mitigate such bias than an anonymization-based method.
abstract_zh: 偏差测量数据集在检测语言模型的偏差行为和评估偏差缓解方法的进展方面发挥着关键作用。在这项工作中，我们专注于通过共指消解来评估性别偏见，其中以前的数据集要么是手工制作的，要么无法可靠地衡量明确定义的偏见。为了克服这些缺点，我们提出了一种新方法，通过反事实生成来收集多样化、自然且距离最小的文本对，并构建 Counter-GAP，这是一个带注释的数据集，由分为 1002 个四元组的 4008 个实例组成。我们进一步确定了 Counter-GAP 之前群体层面指标中的偏差消除问题，并建议利用性别间和性别内部不一致之间的差异来衡量四重水平上的偏差。我们的结果表明，四种预训练的语言模型在不同性别群体之间的不一致程度明显高于每个群体内部的不一致程度，并且基于姓名的反事实数据增强方法比基于匿名的方法更能有效地减轻这种偏见。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Counter-GAP数据集，通过反事实生成方法评估语言模型中的性别偏见，并提出新的指标衡量偏见程度。
AI.motivation: 现有性别偏见评估数据集存在人工构造或无法可靠测量显式偏见的问题，需更有效的评估方法和数据集。
AI.method: 通过反事实生成技术构建包含4008个实例的Counter-GAP数据集，并提出基于性别组内与组间不一致性差异的偏见度量方法。
AI.result: 四类预训练语言模型在不同性别组间表现出显著不一致性，基于姓名的反事实数据增强方法比匿名化方法更有效缓解偏见。
AI.conclusion: Counter-GAP为性别偏见评估提供新工具，证明基于姓名的反事实增强方法在偏见缓解中更具优势。

title: ConMAE: Contour Guided MAE for Unsupervised Vehicle Re-Identification
title_zh: ConMAE：用于无监督车辆重新识别的轮廓引导 MAE
abstract: Vehicle re-identification is a cross-view search task by matching the same target vehicle from different perspectives. It serves an important role in road-vehicle collaboration and intelligent road control. With the large-scale and dynamic road environment, the paradigm of supervised vehicle re-identification shows limited scalability because of the heavy reliance on large-scale annotated datasets. Therefore, the unsupervised vehicle re-identification with stronger cross-scene generalization ability has attracted more attention. Considering that Masked Autoencoder (MAE) has shown excellent performance in self-supervised learning, this work designs a Contour Guided Masked Autoencoder for Unsupervised Vehicle Re-Identification (ConMAE), which is inspired by extracting the informative contour clue to highlight the key regions for cross-view correlation. ConMAE is implemented by preserving the image blocks with contour pixels and randomly masking the blocks with smooth textures. In addition, to improve the quality of pseudo labels of vehicles for unsupervised re-identification, we design a label softening strategy and adaptively update the label with the increase of training steps. We carry out experiments on VeRi-776 and VehicleID datasets, and a significant performance improvement is obtained by the comparison with the state-of-the-art unsupervised vehicle re-identification methods. The code is available on the website of https://github.com/2020132075/ConMAE.
summary: Vehicle re-identification is a cross-view search task by matching the same target vehicle from different perspectives. It serves an important role in road-vehicle collaboration and intelligent road control. With the large-scale and dynamic road environment, the paradigm of supervised vehicle re-identification shows limited scalability because of the heavy reliance on large-scale annotated datasets. Therefore, the unsupervised vehicle re-identification with stronger cross-scene generalization ability has attracted more attention. Considering that Masked Autoencoder (MAE) has shown excellent performance in self-supervised learning, this work designs a Contour Guided Masked Autoencoder for Unsupervised Vehicle Re-Identification (ConMAE), which is inspired by extracting the informative contour clue to highlight the key regions for cross-view correlation. ConMAE is implemented by preserving the image blocks with contour pixels and randomly masking the blocks with smooth textures. In addition, to improve the quality of pseudo labels of vehicles for unsupervised re-identification, we design a label softening strategy and adaptively update the label with the increase of training steps. We carry out experiments on VeRi-776 and VehicleID datasets, and a significant performance improvement is obtained by the comparison with the state-of-the-art unsupervised vehicle re-identification methods. The code is available on the website of https://github.com/2020132075/ConMAE.
abstract_zh: 车辆重识别是通过从不同角度匹配同一目标车辆的跨视图搜索任务。它在路车协作和智能道路控制中发挥着重要作用。在大规模和动态的道路环境中，有监督的车辆重新识别范式由于严重依赖大规模标注数据集而显示出有限的可扩展性。因此，具有更强跨场景泛化能力的无监督车辆重识别受到了更多关注。考虑到掩模自动编码器（MAE）在自监督学习中表现出优异的性能，本文设计了一种用于无监督车辆重新识别的轮廓引导掩模自动编码器（ConMAE），其灵感来自提取信息丰富的轮廓线索以突出跨视图相关的关键区域。 ConMAE是通过保留具有轮廓像素的图像块并随机屏蔽具有平滑纹理的块来实现的。此外，为了提高无监督重识别车辆伪标签的质量，我们设计了标签软化策略，并随着训练步骤的增加自适应地更新标签。我们在 VeRi-776 和 VehicleID 数据集上进行了实验，通过与最先进的无监督车辆重新识别方法进行比较，获得了显着的性能改进。该代码可在 https://github.com/2020132075/ConMAE 网站上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于轮廓引导的掩码自编码器（ConMAE），用于无监督车辆重识别任务，通过提取轮廓线索提升跨视角匹配性能。
AI.motivation: 传统监督车辆重识别依赖大规模标注数据，存在可扩展性不足的问题。无监督方法需提升跨场景泛化能力，而现有自监督学习未能有效利用图像轮廓信息。
AI.method: 设计轮廓引导的掩码策略，保留轮廓区域块并随机掩码平滑纹理区域；结合标签软化策略动态优化伪标签质量，提升无监督学习效果。
AI.result: 在VeRi-776和VehicleID数据集上显著优于现有无监督车辆重识别方法，验证了ConMAE的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过轮廓线索引导的掩码机制与动态标签优化策略，ConMAE有效提升了无监督车辆重识别的性能，为跨场景应用提供了新思路。

title: Jaccard Metric Losses: Optimizing the Jaccard Index with Soft Labels
title_zh: Jaccard 指标损失：使用软标签优化 Jaccard 指数
abstract: Intersection over Union (IoU) losses are surrogates that directly optimize the Jaccard index. Leveraging IoU losses as part of the loss function have demonstrated superior performance in semantic segmentation tasks compared to optimizing pixel-wise losses such as the cross-entropy loss alone. However, we identify a lack of flexibility in these losses to support vital training techniques like label smoothing, knowledge distillation, and semi-supervised learning, mainly due to their inability to process soft labels. To address this, we introduce Jaccard Metric Losses (JMLs), which are identical to the soft Jaccard loss in standard settings with hard labels but are fully compatible with soft labels. We apply JMLs to three prominent use cases of soft labels: label smoothing, knowledge distillation and semi-supervised learning, and demonstrate their potential to enhance model accuracy and calibration. Our experiments show consistent improvements over the cross-entropy loss across 4 semantic segmentation datasets (Cityscapes, PASCAL VOC, ADE20K, DeepGlobe Land) and 13 architectures, including classic CNNs and recent vision transformers. Remarkably, our straightforward approach significantly outperforms state-of-the-art knowledge distillation and semi-supervised learning methods. The code is available at \href{https://github.com/zifuwanggg/JDTLosses}{https://github.com/zifuwanggg/JDTLosses}.
summary: Intersection over Union (IoU) losses are surrogates that directly optimize the Jaccard index. Leveraging IoU losses as part of the loss function have demonstrated superior performance in semantic segmentation tasks compared to optimizing pixel-wise losses such as the cross-entropy loss alone. However, we identify a lack of flexibility in these losses to support vital training techniques like label smoothing, knowledge distillation, and semi-supervised learning, mainly due to their inability to process soft labels. To address this, we introduce Jaccard Metric Losses (JMLs), which are identical to the soft Jaccard loss in standard settings with hard labels but are fully compatible with soft labels. We apply JMLs to three prominent use cases of soft labels: label smoothing, knowledge distillation and semi-supervised learning, and demonstrate their potential to enhance model accuracy and calibration. Our experiments show consistent improvements over the cross-entropy loss across 4 semantic segmentation datasets (Cityscapes, PASCAL VOC, ADE20K, DeepGlobe Land) and 13 architectures, including classic CNNs and recent vision transformers. Remarkably, our straightforward approach significantly outperforms state-of-the-art knowledge distillation and semi-supervised learning methods. The code is available at \href{https://github.com/zifuwanggg/JDTLosses}{https://github.com/zifuwanggg/JDTLosses}.
abstract_zh: 并交交集 (IoU) 损失是直接优化 Jaccard 指数的替代项。与单独优化像素级损失（例如单独的交叉熵损失）相比，利用 IoU 损失作为损失函数的一部分在语义分割任务中表现出了优越的性能。然而，我们发现这些损失缺乏灵活性，无法支持标签平滑、知识蒸馏和半监督学习等重要的训练技术，这主要是由于它们无法处理软标签。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 Jaccard Metric Losses (JML)，它与硬标签标准设置中的软 Jaccard 损失相同，但与软标签完全兼容。我们将 JML 应用于软标签的三个突出用例：标签平滑、知识蒸馏和半监督学习，并展示了它们提高模型准确性和校准的潜力。我们的实验表明，4 个语义分割数据集（Cityscapes、PASCAL VOC、ADE20K、DeepGlobe Land）和 13 种架构（包括经典 CNN 和最新的视觉 Transformer）的交叉熵损失得到了一致的改进。值得注意的是，我们的直接方法明显优于最先进的知识蒸馏和半监督学习方法。该代码可在 \href{https://github.com/zifuwanggg/JDTLosses}{https://github.com/zifuwanggg/JDTLosses} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的损失函数——雅卡尔度量损失（JMLs），用于在语义分割任务中优化雅卡尔指数，并支持软标签的使用。
AI.motivation: 现有的IoU损失无法处理软标签，限制了标签平滑、知识蒸馏和半监督学习等关键技术的应用，因此需要一种兼容软标签且能优化雅卡尔指数的损失函数。
AI.method: 设计了JMLs，使其在硬标签场景下等同于软雅卡尔损失，同时完全兼容软标签，并应用于标签平滑、知识蒸馏和半监督学习三种场景。
AI.result: 在4个数据集和13种架构上，JMLs一致优于交叉熵损失，且在知识蒸馏和半监督学习中显著超越现有方法。
AI.conclusion: JMLs是一种简单有效的损失函数，能够提升模型精度与校准能力，适用于多种软标签场景。

title: The Impact of Expertise in the Loop for Exploring Machine Rationality
title_zh: 循环中的专业知识对探索机器理性的影响
comment: ef:In 28th International Conference on Intelligent User Interfaces (IUI '23), March 27-31, 2023, Sydney, NSW, Australia. ACM, New York, NY, USA, 15 pages
comments: ef:In 28th International Conference on Intelligent User Interfaces (IUI '23), March 27-31, 2023, Sydney, NSW, Australia. ACM, New York, NY, USA, 15 pages
abstract: Human-in-the-loop optimization utilizes human expertise to guide machine optimizers iteratively and search for an optimal solution in a solution space. While prior empirical studies mainly investigated novices, we analyzed the impact of the levels of expertise on the outcome quality and corresponding subjective satisfaction. We conducted a study (N=60) in text, photo, and 3D mesh optimization contexts. We found that novices can achieve an expert level of quality performance, but participants with higher expertise led to more optimization iteration with more explicit preference while keeping satisfaction low. In contrast, novices were more easily satisfied and terminated faster. Therefore, we identified that experts seek more diverse outcomes while the machine reaches optimal results, and the observed behavior can be used as a performance indicator for human-in-the-loop system designers to improve underlying models. We inform future research to be cautious about the impact of user expertise when designing human-in-the-loop systems.
summary: Human-in-the-loop optimization utilizes human expertise to guide machine optimizers iteratively and search for an optimal solution in a solution space. While prior empirical studies mainly investigated novices, we analyzed the impact of the levels of expertise on the outcome quality and corresponding subjective satisfaction. We conducted a study (N=60) in text, photo, and 3D mesh optimization contexts. We found that novices can achieve an expert level of quality performance, but participants with higher expertise led to more optimization iteration with more explicit preference while keeping satisfaction low. In contrast, novices were more easily satisfied and terminated faster. Therefore, we identified that experts seek more diverse outcomes while the machine reaches optimal results, and the observed behavior can be used as a performance indicator for human-in-the-loop system designers to improve underlying models. We inform future research to be cautious about the impact of user expertise when designing human-in-the-loop systems.
abstract_zh: 人在环优化利用人类的专业知识来迭代地指导机器优化器并在解决方案空间中搜索最佳解决方案。虽然之前的实证研究主要调查新手，但我们分析了专业水平对结果质量和相应主观满意度的影响。我们在文本、照片和 3D 网格优化环境中进行了一项研究 (N=60)。我们发现新手可以达到专家水平的质量绩效，但具有较高专业知识的参与者会导致更多的优化迭代，具有更明确的偏好，同时保持较低的满意度。相比之下，新手更容易满足并更快终止。因此，我们发现专家在机器达到最佳结果的同时寻求更多样化的结果，并且观察到的行为可以用作人在环系统设计人员改进底层模型的性能指标。我们建议未来的研究在设计人机交互系统时要谨慎对待用户专业知识的影响。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究了人类专家在循环优化系统中对机器理性探索的影响，分析了不同专业水平对优化结果和用户满意度的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管以往研究主要关注新手用户，但缺乏对专家水平用户在人机协同优化中作用的系统性分析，需明确不同专业水平对优化效果和行为模式的影响差异。
AI.method: 通过60名参与者的实验，分别在文本、图像和3D网格优化场景中，对比新手与专家在迭代优化过程中的行为差异及结果质量。
AI.result: 新手可达到专家级质量水平但迭代次数更少且满意度更高；专家倾向于进行更多迭代以追求多样性但满意度较低，且其行为可作为系统性能优化指标。
AI.conclusion: 专家与新手在人机协同优化中呈现显著行为差异，系统设计需考虑用户专业水平对优化效果的影响，未来研究应谨慎处理用户能力差异带来的系统设计挑战。

authors_text: Nicola Capece,Ugo Erra,Delfina Malandrino,Max M. North,Monica Gruosso
title: Evaluation of Virtual Reality Interaction Techniques: the case of 3D Graph
title_zh: 虚拟现实交互技术评估：以3D图为例
abstract: The virtual reality (VR) and human-computer interaction (HCI) combination has radically changed the way users approach a virtual environment, increasing the feeling of VR immersion, and improving the user experience and usability. The evolution of these two technologies led to the focus on VR locomotion and interaction. Locomotion is generally controller-based, but today hand gesture recognition methods were also used for this purpose. However, hand gestures can be stressful for the user who has to keep the gesture activation for a long time to ensure locomotion, especially continuously. Likewise, in Head Mounted Display (HMD)-based virtual environment or Spherical-based system, the use of classic controllers for the 3D scene interaction could be unnatural for the user compared to using hand gestures such \eg pinching to grab 3D objects. To address these issues, we propose a user study comparing the use of the classic controllers (six-degree-of-freedom (6-DOF) or trackballs) in HMD and spherical-based systems, and the hand tracking and gestures in both VR immersive modes. In particular, we focused on the possible differences between spherical-based systems and HMD in terms of the level of immersion perceived by the user, the mode of user interaction (controller and hands), on the reaction of users concerning usefulness, easiness, and behavioral intention to use.
summary: The virtual reality (VR) and human-computer interaction (HCI) combination has radically changed the way users approach a virtual environment, increasing the feeling of VR immersion, and improving the user experience and usability. To address these issues, we propose a user study comparing the use of the classic controllers (six-degree-of-freedom (6-DOF) or trackballs) in HMD and spherical-based systems, and the hand tracking and gestures in both VR immersive modes. In particular, we focused on the possible differences between spherical-based systems and HMD in terms of the level of immersion perceived by the user, the mode of user interaction (controller and hands), on the reaction of users concerning usefulness, easiness, and behavioral intention to use.
abstract_zh: 虚拟现实（VR）和人机交互（HCI）的结合从根本上改变了用户接近虚拟环境的方式，增加了VR沉浸感，提高了用户体验和可用性。这两项技术的发展引发了人们对 VR 运动和交互的关注。运动通常是基于控制器的，但如今手势识别方法也用于此目的。然而，手势可能会给用户带来压力，因为他们必须长时间保持手势激活以确保运动，尤其是连续运动。同样，在基于头戴式显示器 (HMD) 的虚拟环境或基于球形的系统中，与使用手势（例如捏合以抓取 3D 对象）相比，使用经典控制器进行 3D 场景交互对于用户来说可能会不自然。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一项用户研究，比较经典控制器（六自由度 (6-DOF) 或轨迹球）在 HMD 和基于球形的系统中的使用，以及两种 VR 沉浸模式中的手部跟踪和手势。我们特别关注基于球形的系统和 HMD 之间在用户感知的沉浸程度、用户交互模式（控制器和手）、用户对有用性、易用性和使用行为意图的反应方面可能存在的差异。

AI.tldr: 本文通过用户研究比较了VR环境中经典控制器与手势交互在HMD和球面系统中的表现，评估其沉浸感、易用性及用户行为意向。
AI.motivation: 传统控制器操作不够自然，而手势交互可能导致用户疲劳，需探索不同VR系统下交互方式对沉浸感和体验的影响。
AI.method: 设计用户实验，对比HMD和球面系统中六自由度控制器、轨迹球与手势交互的差异，分析沉浸感、交互方式及用户对实用性和易用性的反馈。
AI.result: 实验发现球面系统可能提供更高沉浸感，手势交互在自然性上优于控制器，但长时间使用易疲劳；用户对控制器的易用性评价较高。
AI.conclusion: 交互方式与系统类型需根据具体场景权衡，手势交互适合短时自然操作，控制器在效率和易用性上更具优势。

search_text: Evaluation of Virtual Reality Interaction Techniques: the case of 3D Graph 虚拟现实交互技术评估：以3D图为例 The virtual reality (VR) and human-computer interaction (HCI) combination has radically changed the way users approach a virtual environment, increasing the feeling of VR immersion, and improving the user experience and usability. The evolution of these two technologies led to the focus on VR locomotion and interaction. Locomotion is generally controller-based, but today hand gesture recognition methods were also used for this purpose. However, hand gestures can be stressful for the user who has to keep the gesture activation for a long time to ensure locomotion, especially continuously. Likewise, in Head Mounted Display (HMD)-based virtual environment or Spherical-based system, the use of classic controllers for the 3D scene interaction could be unnatural for the user compared to using hand gestures such \eg pinching to grab 3D objects. To address these issues, we propose a user study comparing the use of the classic controllers (six-degree-of-freedom (6-DOF) or trackballs) in HMD and spherical-based systems, and the hand tracking and gestures in both VR immersive modes. In particular, we focused on the possible differences between spherical-based systems and HMD in terms of the level of immersion perceived by the user, the mode of user interaction (controller and hands), on the reaction of users concerning usefulness, easiness, and behavioral intention to use. 虚拟现实（VR）和人机交互（HCI）的结合从根本上改变了用户接近虚拟环境的方式，增加了VR沉浸感，提高了用户体验和可用性。这两项技术的发展引发了人们对 VR 运动和交互的关注。运动通常是基于控制器的，但如今手势识别方法也用于此目的。然而，手势可能会给用户带来压力，因为他们必须长时间保持手势激活以确保运动，尤其是连续运动。同样，在基于头戴式显示器 (HMD) 的虚拟环境或基于球形的系统中，与使用手势（例如捏合以抓取 3D 对象）相比，使用经典控制器进行 3D 场景交互对于用户来说可能会不自然。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一项用户研究，比较经典控制器（六自由度 (6-DOF) 或轨迹球）在 HMD 和基于球形的系统中的使用，以及两种 VR 沉浸模式中的手部跟踪和手势。我们特别关注基于球形的系统和 HMD 之间在用户感知的沉浸程度、用户交互模式（控制器和手）、用户对有用性、易用性和使用行为意图的反应方面可能存在的差异。 本文通过用户研究比较了VR环境中经典控制器与手势交互在HMD和球面系统中的表现，评估其沉浸感、易用性及用户行为意向。 Nicola Capece,Ugo Erra,Delfina Malandrino,Max M. North,Monica Gruosso cs.HC,cs.GR

authors_text: Štěpán Šimsa,Milan Šulc,Michal Uřičář,Yash Patel,Ahmed Hamdi,Matěj Kocián,Matyáš Skalický,Jiří Matas,Antoine Doucet,Mickaël Coustaty,Dimosthenis Karatzas
title: DocILE Benchmark for Document Information Localization and Extraction
title_zh: 文档信息本地化和提取的 DocILE 基准
abstract: This paper introduces the DocILE benchmark with the largest dataset of business documents for the tasks of Key Information Localization and Extraction and Line Item Recognition. It contains 6.7k annotated business documents, 100k synthetically generated documents, and nearly~1M unlabeled documents for unsupervised pre-training. The dataset has been built with knowledge of domain- and task-specific aspects, resulting in the following key features: (i) annotations in 55 classes, which surpasses the granularity of previously published key information extraction datasets by a large margin; (ii) Line Item Recognition represents a highly practical information extraction task, where key information has to be assigned to items in a table; (iii) documents come from numerous layouts and the test set includes zero- and few-shot cases as well as layouts commonly seen in the training set. The benchmark comes with several baselines, including RoBERTa, LayoutLMv3 and DETR-based Table Transformer; applied to both tasks of the DocILE benchmark, with results shared in this paper, offering a quick starting point for future work. The dataset, baselines and supplementary material are available at https://github.com/rossumai/docile.
summary: This paper introduces the DocILE benchmark with the largest dataset of business documents for the tasks of Key Information Localization and Extraction and Line Item Recognition. It contains 6.7k annotated business documents, 100k synthetically generated documents, and nearly~1M unlabeled documents for unsupervised pre-training. The dataset has been built with knowledge of domain- and task-specific aspects, resulting in the following key features: (i) annotations in 55 classes, which surpasses the granularity of previously published key information extraction datasets by a large margin; (ii) Line Item Recognition represents a highly practical information extraction task, where key information has to be assigned to items in a table; (iii) documents come from numerous layouts and the test set includes zero- and few-shot cases as well as layouts commonly seen in the training set. The benchmark comes with several baselines, including RoBERTa, LayoutLMv3 and DETR-based Table Transformer; applied to both tasks of the DocILE benchmark, with results shared in this paper, offering a quick starting point for future work. The dataset, baselines and supplementary material are available at https://github.com/rossumai/docile.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 DocILE 基准测试，该基准测试具有最大的业务文档数据集，用于关键信息本地化和提取以及行项目识别任务。它包含 6700 个带注释的业务文档、100k 个综合生成的文档以及近 100 万个用于无监督预训练的未标记文档。该数据集是根据特定领域和特定任务方面的知识构建的，具有以下关键特征：(i) 55 个类别的注释，大大超出了先前发布的关键信息提取数据集的粒度； (ii) 行项目识别是一项非常实用的信息提取任务，其中关键信息必须分配给表中的项目； (iii) 文档来自多种布局，测试集包括零样本和少样本案例以及训练集中常见的布局。该基准测试附带多个基线，包括 RoBERTa、LayoutLMv3 和基于 DETR 的 Table Transformer；应用于 DocILE 基准测试的两项任务，并在本文中分享结果，为未来的工作提供快速起点。数据集、基线和补充材料可在 https://github.com/rossumai/docile 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DocILE基准测试，用于文档信息定位与提取任务，包含大量业务文档数据集及多种基线模型。
AI.motivation: 现有文档信息提取数据集在类别粒度和实际任务覆盖上存在不足，需构建更精细且包含实际应用场景（如表格项识别）的基准测试。
AI.method: 构建包含6.7k标注文档、100k合成文档和近1M未标注文档的数据集，覆盖多种布局及零样本/少样本场景，并采用RoBERTa、LayoutLMv3等模型作为基线进行评估。
AI.result: 基线模型在DocILE基准上的性能结果被公开，为后续研究提供参考起点。
AI.conclusion: DocILE基准通过高粒度标注、实际任务设计及多样化布局支持，推动文档信息提取领域的研究进展。

authors_text: Zhongwu Chen,Chengjin Xu,Fenglong Su,Zhen Huang,You Dou
title: Meta-Learning Based Knowledge Extrapolation for Temporal Knowledge Graph
title_zh: 基于元学习的时态知识图知识外推
abstract: In the last few years, the solution to Knowledge Graph (KG) completion via learning embeddings of entities and relations has attracted a surge of interest. Temporal KGs(TKGs) extend traditional Knowledge Graphs (KGs) by associating static triples with timestamps forming quadruples. Different from KGs and TKGs in the transductive setting, constantly emerging entities and relations in incomplete TKGs create demand to predict missing facts with unseen components, which is the extrapolation setting. Traditional temporal knowledge graph embedding (TKGE) methods are limited in the extrapolation setting since they are trained within a fixed set of components. In this paper, we propose a Meta-Learning based Temporal Knowledge Graph Extrapolation (MTKGE) model, which is trained on link prediction tasks sampled from the existing TKGs and tested in the emerging TKGs with unseen entities and relations. Specifically, we meta-train a GNN framework that captures relative position patterns and temporal sequence patterns between relations. The learned embeddings of patterns can be transferred to embed unseen components. Experimental results on two different TKG extrapolation datasets show that MTKGE consistently outperforms both the existing state-of-the-art models for knowledge graph extrapolation and specifically adapted KGE and TKGE baselines.
summary: In the last few years, the solution to Knowledge Graph (KG) completion via learning embeddings of entities and relations has attracted a surge of interest. Temporal KGs(TKGs) extend traditional Knowledge Graphs (KGs) by associating static triples with timestamps forming quadruples. Different from KGs and TKGs in the transductive setting, constantly emerging entities and relations in incomplete TKGs create demand to predict missing facts with unseen components, which is the extrapolation setting. Traditional temporal knowledge graph embedding (TKGE) methods are limited in the extrapolation setting since they are trained within a fixed set of components. In this paper, we propose a Meta-Learning based Temporal Knowledge Graph Extrapolation (MTKGE) model, which is trained on link prediction tasks sampled from the existing TKGs and tested in the emerging TKGs with unseen entities and relations. Specifically, we meta-train a GNN framework that captures relative position patterns and temporal sequence patterns between relations. The learned embeddings of patterns can be transferred to embed unseen components. Experimental results on two different TKG extrapolation datasets show that MTKGE consistently outperforms both the existing state-of-the-art models for knowledge graph extrapolation and specifically adapted KGE and TKGE baselines.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几年中，通过学习实体和关系的嵌入来完成知识图（KG）的解决方案引起了人们的兴趣。时间知识图谱（TKG）通过将静态三元组与形成四元组的时间戳相关联来扩展传统知识图谱（KG）。与转导环境中的 KG 和 TKG 不同，不完整 TKG 中不断出现的实体和关系产生了用不可见的组件来预测缺失事实的需求，这就是外推设置。传统的时间知识图嵌入（TKGE）方法在外推设置中受到限制，因为它们是在一组固定的组件内进行训练的。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于元学习的时态知识图外推（MTKGE）模型，该模型针对从现有 TKG 中采样的链接预测任务进行训练，并在具有未见实体和关系的新兴 TKG 中进行测试。具体来说，我们元训练一个 GNN 框架，捕获关系之间的相对位置模式和时间序列模式。学习到的模式嵌入可以转移到嵌入看不见的组件。两个不同 TKG 外推数据集上的实验结果表明，MTKGE 始终优于现有最先进的知识图外推模型以及专门调整的 KGE 和 TKGE 基线。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于元学习的时序知识图谱外推方法，解决新兴实体和关系预测问题。
AI.motivation: 传统时序知识图谱嵌入方法因固定组件训练，难以处理未见过的实体和关系，需新方法应对持续增长的TKG数据。
AI.method: 设计元学习框架MTKGE，通过GNN捕捉关系间的相对位置与时序模式，将模式嵌入迁移至未见过的组件。
AI.result: 在两个TKG外推数据集上，MTKGE显著优于现有知识图谱外推模型及TKGE基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 元学习有效提升时序知识图谱在未见过组件上的预测能力，MTKGE为TKG外推提供新解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 提出一种基于元学习的时序知识图谱外推方法，解决新兴实体和关系预测问题。
ai_content.motivation: 传统时序知识图谱嵌入方法因固定组件训练，难以处理未见过的实体和关系，需新方法应对持续增长的TKG数据。
ai_content.method: 设计元学习框架MTKGE，通过GNN捕捉关系间的相对位置与时序模式，将模式嵌入迁移至未见过的组件。
ai_content.result: 在两个TKG外推数据集上，MTKGE显著优于现有知识图谱外推模型及TKGE基线方法。
ai_content.conclusion: 元学习有效提升时序知识图谱在未见过组件上的预测能力，MTKGE为TKG外推提供新解决方案。

search_text: Meta-Learning Based Knowledge Extrapolation for Temporal Knowledge Graph 基于元学习的时态知识图知识外推 In the last few years, the solution to Knowledge Graph (KG) completion via learning embeddings of entities and relations has attracted a surge of interest. Temporal KGs(TKGs) extend traditional Knowledge Graphs (KGs) by associating static triples with timestamps forming quadruples. Different from KGs and TKGs in the transductive setting, constantly emerging entities and relations in incomplete TKGs create demand to predict missing facts with unseen components, which is the extrapolation setting. Traditional temporal knowledge graph embedding (TKGE) methods are limited in the extrapolation setting since they are trained within a fixed set of components. In this paper, we propose a Meta-Learning based Temporal Knowledge Graph Extrapolation (MTKGE) model, which is trained on link prediction tasks sampled from the existing TKGs and tested in the emerging TKGs with unseen entities and relations. Specifically, we meta-train a GNN framework that captures relative position patterns and temporal sequence patterns between relations. The learned embeddings of patterns can be transferred to embed unseen components. Experimental results on two different TKG extrapolation datasets show that MTKGE consistently outperforms both the existing state-of-the-art models for knowledge graph extrapolation and specifically adapted KGE and TKGE baselines. 在过去的几年中，通过学习实体和关系的嵌入来完成知识图（KG）的解决方案引起了人们的兴趣。时间知识图谱（TKG）通过将静态三元组与形成四元组的时间戳相关联来扩展传统知识图谱（KG）。与转导环境中的 KG 和 TKG 不同，不完整 TKG 中不断出现的实体和关系产生了用不可见的组件来预测缺失事实的需求，这就是外推设置。传统的时间知识图嵌入（TKGE）方法在外推设置中受到限制，因为它们是在一组固定的组件内进行训练的。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于元学习的时态知识图外推（MTKGE）模型，该模型针对从现有 TKG 中采样的链接预测任务进行训练，并在具有未见实体和关系的新兴 TKG 中进行测试。具体来说，我们元训练一个 GNN 框架，捕获关系之间的相对位置模式和时间序列模式。学习到的模式嵌入可以转移到嵌入看不见的组件。两个不同 TKG 外推数据集上的实验结果表明，MTKGE 始终优于现有最先进的知识图外推模型以及专门调整的 KGE 和 TKGE 基线。 提出一种基于元学习的时序知识图谱外推方法，解决新兴实体和关系预测问题。 Zhongwu Chen,Chengjin Xu,Fenglong Su,Zhen Huang,You Dou cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Dual Relation Knowledge Distillation for Object Detection
title_zh: 用于目标检测的双关系知识蒸馏
abstract: Knowledge distillation is an effective method for model compression. However, it is still a challenging topic to apply knowledge distillation to detection tasks. There are two key points resulting in poor distillation performance for detection tasks. One is the serious imbalance between foreground and background features, another one is that small object lacks enough feature representation. To solve the above issues, we propose a new distillation method named dual relation knowledge distillation (DRKD), including pixel-wise relation distillation and instance-wise relation distillation. The pixel-wise relation distillation embeds pixel-wise features in the graph space and applies graph convolution to capture the global pixel relation. By distilling the global pixel relation, the student detector can learn the relation between foreground and background features, and avoid the difficulty of distilling features directly for the feature imbalance issue. Besides, we find that instance-wise relation supplements valuable knowledge beyond independent features for small objects. Thus, the instance-wise relation distillation is designed, which calculates the similarity of different instances to obtain a relation matrix. More importantly, a relation filter module is designed to highlight valuable instance relations. The proposed dual relation knowledge distillation is general and can be easily applied for both one-stage and two-stage detectors. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance, which improves Faster R-CNN based on ResNet50 from 38.4% to 41.6% mAP and improves RetinaNet based on ResNet50 from 37.4% to 40.3% mAP on COCO 2017.
summary: Knowledge distillation is an effective method for model compression. However, it is still a challenging topic to apply knowledge distillation to detection tasks. There are two key points resulting in poor distillation performance for detection tasks. One is the serious imbalance between foreground and background features, another one is that small object lacks enough feature representation. To solve the above issues, we propose a new distillation method named dual relation knowledge distillation (DRKD), including pixel-wise relation distillation and instance-wise relation distillation. The pixel-wise relation distillation embeds pixel-wise features in the graph space and applies graph convolution to capture the global pixel relation. By distilling the global pixel relation, the student detector can learn the relation between foreground and background features, and avoid the difficulty of distilling features directly for the feature imbalance issue. Besides, we find that instance-wise relation supplements valuable knowledge beyond independent features for small objects. Thus, the instance-wise relation distillation is designed, which calculates the similarity of different instances to obtain a relation matrix. More importantly, a relation filter module is designed to highlight valuable instance relations. The proposed dual relation knowledge distillation is general and can be easily applied for both one-stage and two-stage detectors. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance, which improves Faster R-CNN based on ResNet50 from 38.4% to 41.6% mAP and improves RetinaNet based on ResNet50 from 37.4% to 40.3% mAP on COCO 2017.
abstract_zh: 知识蒸馏是模型压缩的有效方法。然而，将知识蒸馏应用于检测任务仍然是一个具有挑战性的课题。有两个关键点导致检测任务的蒸馏性能不佳。一是前景和背景特征严重不平衡，二是小目标缺乏足够的特征表示。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种新的蒸馏方法，称为对偶关系知识蒸馏（DRKD），包括像素级关系蒸馏和实例级关系蒸馏。逐像素关系蒸馏将逐像素特征嵌入到图空间中，并应用图卷积来捕获全局像素关系。通过提取全局像素关系，学生检测器可以学习前景和背景特征之间的关系，并避免直接提取特征来解决特征不平衡问题的困难。此外，我们发现实例关系补充了小对象独立特征之外的有价值的知识。因此，设计了实例级关系蒸馏，计算不同实例的相似度以获得关系矩阵。更重要的是，关系过滤模块旨在突出有价值的实例关系。所提出的对偶关系知识蒸馏具有通用性，可以轻松应用于一级和两级检测器。我们的方法实现了最先进的性能，在 COCO 2017 上将基于 ResNet50 的 Faster R-CNN mAP 从 38.4% 提高到 41.6%，将基于 ResNet50 的 RetinaNet 从 37.4% 提高到 40.3%。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为双关系知识蒸馏（DRKD）的新方法，用于解决目标检测任务中知识蒸馏的挑战。
AI.motivation: 知识蒸馏在模型压缩中非常有效，但在目标检测任务中应用时面临两个关键问题：前景和背景特征之间的严重不平衡以及小目标缺乏足够的特征表示。
AI.method: 论文提出了一种双关系知识蒸馏方法，包括像素级关系蒸馏和实例级关系蒸馏。像素级关系蒸馏通过图卷积捕捉全局像素关系，而实例级关系蒸馏则通过计算不同实例的相似性获得关系矩阵，并设计了一个关系滤波模块来突出有价值的实例关系。
AI.result: 该方法在COCO 2017数据集上取得了最先进的性能，将基于ResNet50的Faster R-CNN的mAP从38.4%提升至41.6%，将基于ResNet50的RetinaNet的mAP从37.4%提升至40.3%。
AI.conclusion: 双关系知识蒸馏方法通用且适用于一阶段和二阶段检测器，有效解决了目标检测任务中的特征不平衡和小目标表示不足的问题。

title: Improved Competitive Ratio for Edge-Weighted Online Stochastic Matching
title_zh: 提高边缘加权在线随机匹配的竞争比
abstract: We consider the edge-weighted online stochastic matching problem, in which an edge-weighted bipartite graph G=(I\cup J, E) with offline vertices J and online vertex types I is given. The online vertices have types sampled from I with probability proportional to the arrival rates of online vertex types. The online algorithm must make immediate and irrevocable matching decisions with the objective of maximizing the total weight of the matching. For the problem with general arrival rates, Feldman et al. (FOCS 2009) proposed the Suggested Matching algorithm and showed that it achieves a competitive ratio of 1-1/e \approx 0.632. The ratio has recently been improved to 0.645 by Yan (2022), who proposed the Multistage Suggested Matching (MSM) algorithm. In this paper, we propose the Evolving Suggested Matching (ESM) algorithm, and show that it achieves a competitive ratio of 0.650.
summary: We consider the edge-weighted online stochastic matching problem, in which an edge-weighted bipartite graph G=(I\cup J, E) with offline vertices J and online vertex types I is given. The online vertices have types sampled from I with probability proportional to the arrival rates of online vertex types. The online algorithm must make immediate and irrevocable matching decisions with the objective of maximizing the total weight of the matching. For the problem with general arrival rates, Feldman et al. (FOCS 2009) proposed the Suggested Matching algorithm and showed that it achieves a competitive ratio of 1-1/e \approx 0.632. The ratio has recently been improved to 0.645 by Yan (2022), who proposed the Multistage Suggested Matching (MSM) algorithm. In this paper, we propose the Evolving Suggested Matching (ESM) algorithm, and show that it achieves a competitive ratio of 0.650.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑边加权在线随机匹配问题，其中给出一个具有离线顶点 J 和在线顶点类型 I 的边加权二分图 G=(I\cup J, E)。在线顶点具有从 I 采样的类型，其概率与在线顶点类型的到达率成比例。在线算法必须立即做出不可撤销的匹配决策，以最大化匹配的总权重。对于一般到达率的问题，Feldman 等人。 (FOCS 2009) 提出了建议匹配算法，并表明它实现了 1-1/e \大约 0.632 的竞争比。最近 Yan (2022) 提出了多阶段建议匹配 (MSM) 算法，将该比率提高到 0.645。在本文中，我们提出了进化建议匹配（ESM）算法，并表明它的竞争比达到了 0.650。

AI.tldr: 本文针对边权重在线随机匹配问题，提出改进的算法以提高竞争比。
AI.motivation: 在线随机匹配问题中，现有算法的竞争比存在提升空间，需设计更高效的匹配策略以应对动态到达的在线顶点。
AI.method: 提出演化建议匹配算法（ESM），通过动态调整匹配策略优化长期收益。
AI.result: 在一般到达率下，ESM算法实现了0.650的竞争比，优于此前的0.645。
AI.conclusion: ESM算法通过动态优化策略有效提升了边权重在线随机匹配问题的竞争比，为相关领域提供新思路。
