search_text: 3D Colored Shape Reconstruction from a Single RGB Image through Diffusion 通过扩散从单个 RGB 图像重建 3D 彩色形状 We propose a novel 3d colored shape reconstruction method from a single RGB image through diffusion model. Diffusion models have shown great development potentials for high-quality 3D shape generation. However, most existing work based on diffusion models only focus on geometric shape generation, they cannot either accomplish 3D reconstruction from a single image, or produce 3D geometric shape with color information. In this work, we propose to reconstruct a 3D colored shape from a single RGB image through a novel conditional diffusion model. The reverse process of the proposed diffusion model is consisted of three modules, shape prediction module, color prediction module and NeRF-like rendering module. In shape prediction module, the reference RGB image is first encoded into a high-level shape feature and then the shape feature is utilized as a condition to predict the reverse geometric noise in diffusion model. Then the color of each 3D point updated in shape prediction module is predicted by color prediction module. Finally, a NeRF-like rendering module is designed to render the colored point cloud predicted by the former two modules to 2D image space to guide the training conditioned only on a reference image. As far as the authors know, the proposed method is the first diffusion model for 3D colored shape reconstruction from a single RGB image. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves competitive performance on colored 3D shape reconstruction, and the ablation study validates the positive role of the color prediction module in improving the reconstruction quality of 3D geometric point cloud. 我们提出了一种新颖的通过扩散模型从单个 RGB 图像重建 3D 彩色形状的方法。扩散模型在高质量 3D 形状生成方面显示出巨大的发展潜力。然而，大多数现有的基于扩散模型的工作只关注几何形状的生成，它们既不能完成单个图像的3D重建，也不能产生带有颜色信息的3D几何形状。在这项工作中，我们建议通过新颖的条件扩散模型从单个 RGB 图像重建 3D 彩色形状。所提出的扩散模型的逆过程由三个模块组成：形状预测模块、颜色预测模块和类 NeRF 渲染模块。在形状预测模块中，参考RGB图像首先被编码为高级形状特征，然后利用形状特征作为预测扩散模型中的反向几何噪声的条件。然后由颜色预测模块预测形状预测模块中更新的每个3D点的颜色。最后，设计了一个类似 NeRF 的渲染模块，将前两个模块预测的彩色点云渲染到 2D 图像空间，以指导仅以参考图像为条件的训练。据作者所知，所提出的方法是第一个从单个 RGB 图像重建 3D 彩色形状的扩散模型。实验结果表明，该方法在彩色3D形状重建方面取得了有竞争力的性能，并且消融研究验证了颜色预测模块在提高3D几何点云重建质量方面的积极作用。 本文提出了一种通过扩散模型从单张RGB图像重建三维彩色形状的新方法。 Bo Li,Xiaolin Wei,Fengwei Chen,Bin Liu cs.CV

title: Vitreoretinal Surgical Robotic System with Autonomous Orbital Manipulation using Vector-Field Inequalities
title_zh: 利用矢量场不等式进行自主轨道操纵的玻璃体视网膜手术机器人系统
abstract: Vitreoretinal surgery pertains to the treatment of delicate tissues on the fundus of the eye using thin instruments. Surgeons frequently rotate the eye during surgery, which is called orbital manipulation, to observe regions around the fundus without moving the patient. In this paper, we propose the autonomous orbital manipulation of the eye in robot-assisted vitreoretinal surgery with our tele-operated surgical system. In a simulation study, we preliminarily investigated the increase in the manipulability of our system using orbital manipulation. Furthermore, we demonstrated the feasibility of our method in experiments with a physical robot and a realistic eye model, showing an increase in the view-able area of the fundus when compared to a conventional technique. Source code and minimal example available at https://github.com/mmmarinho/icra2023_orbitalmanipulation.
summary: Vitreoretinal surgery pertains to the treatment of delicate tissues on the fundus of the eye using thin instruments. Surgeons frequently rotate the eye during surgery, which is called orbital manipulation, to observe regions around the fundus without moving the patient. In this paper, we propose the autonomous orbital manipulation of the eye in robot-assisted vitreoretinal surgery with our tele-operated surgical system. In a simulation study, we preliminarily investigated the increase in the manipulability of our system using orbital manipulation. Furthermore, we demonstrated the feasibility of our method in experiments with a physical robot and a realistic eye model, showing an increase in the view-able area of the fundus when compared to a conventional technique. Source code and minimal example available at https://github.com/mmmarinho/icra2023_orbitalmanipulation.
abstract_zh: 玻璃体视网膜手术涉及使用薄器械治疗眼底脆弱的组织。外科医生在手术期间经常旋转眼睛，这称为眼眶操纵，以在不移动患者的情况下观察眼底周围区域。在本文中，我们提出使用我们的远程手术系统在机器人辅助玻璃体视网膜手术中对眼睛进行自主眼眶操纵。在模拟研究中，我们初步研究了使用轨道操纵来提高系统的可操纵性。此外，我们在物理机器人和真实眼睛模型的实验中证明了我们的方法的可行性，与传统技术相比，眼底的可视区域有所增加。源代码和最小示例位于 https://github.com/mmmarinho/icra2023_orbitalmanipulation。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于向量场不等式的自主眼眶操作机器人系统，用于提升玻璃体视网膜手术的可操作性。
AI.motivation: 传统玻璃体视网膜手术中，医生手动旋转眼球以扩大视野，存在操作精度和稳定性不足的问题，需开发更高效的机器人辅助方案。
AI.method: 设计结合向量场不等式的自主眼眶操作算法，并通过仿真与物理实验验证系统性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法显著增加了眼底可视区域，验证了自主操作的可行性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的机器人系统通过自主眼眶操作提升了手术效率和视野范围，为微创眼科手术提供了新思路。

title: Improvement of attention in subjects diagnosed with hyperkinetic syndrome using BIOVIT Simulator
title_zh: 使用 BIOVIT 模拟器改善诊断为多动综合症的受试者的注意力
abstract: This study aimed to stimulate the brain's executive function through a series of tasks and rules based on dynamic perceptual stimuli using the Biotechnology Virtual Immersion Simulator (BIOVIT) and thus evaluate its usefulness to maintain and increase attention levels in subjects diagnosed with hyperkinetic syndrome. With a quantitative methodology framed in a longitudinal trend design, the cause of the exposure-outcome relationships was studied using the BIOVIT simulator. Exploratory analysis of oscillatory brain activity was measured using a graphical recording of brain electrical activity and attention levels. Data consisted of 77,566 observations from n = 18 separately studied participants. The findings established that the BIOVIT simulator maintained and increased the attention levels of the participants by 77.8%. Furthermore, the hypothesis was tested that virtual reality immersion technologies significantly affect attention levels in participants aged 8 to 12. The evidence shows that the BIOVIT simulator is an alternative to developing learning methodologies in vulnerable populations. The low implementation costs and the diversity of academic applications may allow schools in developing countries to solve this problem that afflicts thousands of children with attention deficit and hyperactivity disorder.
summary: This study aimed to stimulate the brain's executive function through a series of tasks and rules based on dynamic perceptual stimuli using the Biotechnology Virtual Immersion Simulator (BIOVIT) and thus evaluate its usefulness to maintain and increase attention levels in subjects diagnosed with hyperkinetic syndrome. With a quantitative methodology framed in a longitudinal trend design, the cause of the exposure-outcome relationships was studied using the BIOVIT simulator. Exploratory analysis of oscillatory brain activity was measured using a graphical recording of brain electrical activity and attention levels. Data consisted of 77,566 observations from n = 18 separately studied participants. The findings established that the BIOVIT simulator maintained and increased the attention levels of the participants by 77.8%. Furthermore, the hypothesis was tested that virtual reality immersion technologies significantly affect attention levels in participants aged 8 to 12. The evidence shows that the BIOVIT simulator is an alternative to developing learning methodologies in vulnerable populations. The low implementation costs and the diversity of academic applications may allow schools in developing countries to solve this problem that afflicts thousands of children with attention deficit and hyperactivity disorder.
abstract_zh: 本研究旨在使用生物技术虚拟沉浸模拟器（BIOVIT）通过一系列基于动态知觉刺激的任务和规则来刺激大脑的执行功能，从而评估其对于维持和提高被诊断患有多动综合症的受试者的注意力水平的有用性。通过纵向趋势设计中的定量方法，使用 BIOVIT 模拟器研究了暴露-结果关系的原因。使用脑电活动和注意力水平的图形记录来测量振荡脑活动的探索性分析。数据由来自 n = 18 名单独研究的参与者的 77,566 个观察结果组成。研究结果表明，BIOVIT 模拟器将参与者的注意力水平维持并提高了 77.8%。此外，还测试了虚拟现实沉浸技术显着影响 8 至 12 岁参与者的注意力水平的假设。证据表明 BIOVIT 模拟器是为弱势群体开发学习方法的替代方案。较低的实施成本和学术应用的多样性可能使发展中国家的学校能够解决这个困扰成千上万患有注意力缺陷和多动症儿童的问题。

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了BIOVIT模拟器通过动态感知刺激任务对多动症患者注意力水平的提升效果。
AI.motivation: 探索低成本虚拟现实技术对8至12岁多动症儿童注意力缺陷的干预潜力，为发展中国家提供可行教育方案。
AI.method: 采用纵向趋势设计，通过BIOVIT模拟器进行动态感知任务训练，结合脑电图记录分析77,566次观测数据。
AI.result: 参与者注意力水平提升77.8%，验证了虚拟现实技术对多动症儿童注意力的显著改善作用。
AI.conclusion: BIOVIT模拟器可作为发展中国家改善多动症儿童注意力问题的经济有效替代方案。

method: 采用纵向趋势设计，通过BIOVIT模拟器进行动态感知任务训练，结合脑电图记录分析77,566次观测数据。
result: 参与者注意力水平提升77.8%，验证了虚拟现实技术对多动症儿童注意力的显著改善作用。
conclusion: BIOVIT模拟器可作为发展中国家改善多动症儿童注意力问题的经济有效替代方案。
search_text: Improvement of attention in subjects diagnosed with hyperkinetic syndrome using BIOVIT Simulator 使用 BIOVIT 模拟器改善诊断为多动综合症的受试者的注意力 This study aimed to stimulate the brain's executive function through a series of tasks and rules based on dynamic perceptual stimuli using the Biotechnology Virtual Immersion Simulator (BIOVIT) and thus evaluate its usefulness to maintain and increase attention levels in subjects diagnosed with hyperkinetic syndrome. With a quantitative methodology framed in a longitudinal trend design, the cause of the exposure-outcome relationships was studied using the BIOVIT simulator. Exploratory analysis of oscillatory brain activity was measured using a graphical recording of brain electrical activity and attention levels. Data consisted of 77,566 observations from n = 18 separately studied participants. The findings established that the BIOVIT simulator maintained and increased the attention levels of the participants by 77.8%. Furthermore, the hypothesis was tested that virtual reality immersion technologies significantly affect attention levels in participants aged 8 to 12. The evidence shows that the BIOVIT simulator is an alternative to developing learning methodologies in vulnerable populations. The low implementation costs and the diversity of academic applications may allow schools in developing countries to solve this problem that afflicts thousands of children with attention deficit and hyperactivity disorder. 本研究旨在使用生物技术虚拟沉浸模拟器（BIOVIT）通过一系列基于动态知觉刺激的任务和规则来刺激大脑的执行功能，从而评估其对于维持和提高被诊断患有多动综合症的受试者的注意力水平的有用性。通过纵向趋势设计中的定量方法，使用 BIOVIT 模拟器研究了暴露-结果关系的原因。使用脑电活动和注意力水平的图形记录来测量振荡脑活动的探索性分析。数据由来自 n = 18 名单独研究的参与者的 77,566 个观察结果组成。研究结果表明，BIOVIT 模拟器将参与者的注意力水平维持并提高了 77.8%。此外，还测试了虚拟现实沉浸技术显着影响 8 至 12 岁参与者的注意力水平的假设。证据表明 BIOVIT 模拟器是为弱势群体开发学习方法的替代方案。较低的实施成本和学术应用的多样性可能使发展中国家的学校能够解决这个困扰成千上万患有注意力缺陷和多动症儿童的问题。 本研究评估了BIOVIT模拟器通过动态感知刺激任务对多动症患者注意力水平的提升效果。 Cesar R Salas-Guerra cs.HC,cs.CY,q-bio.NC

title: Algorithmically Effective Differentially Private Synthetic Data
title_zh: 算法有效的差分隐私合成数据
abstract: We present a highly effective algorithmic approach for generating $\varepsilon$-differentially private synthetic data in a bounded metric space with near-optimal utility guarantees under the 1-Wasserstein distance. In particular, for a dataset $X$ in the hypercube $[0,1]^d$, our algorithm generates synthetic dataset $Y$ such that the expected 1-Wasserstein distance between the empirical measure of $X$ and $Y$ is $O((\varepsilon n)^{-1/d})$ for $d\geq 2$, and is $O(\log^2(\varepsilon n)(\varepsilon n)^{-1})$ for $d=1$. The accuracy guarantee is optimal up to a constant factor for $d\geq 2$, and up to a logarithmic factor for $d=1$. Our algorithm has a fast running time of $O(\varepsilon dn)$ for all $d\geq 1$ and demonstrates improved accuracy compared to the method in (Boedihardjo et al., 2022) for $d\geq 2$.
summary: We present a highly effective algorithmic approach for generating $\varepsilon$-differentially private synthetic data in a bounded metric space with near-optimal utility guarantees under the 1-Wasserstein distance. In particular, for a dataset $X$ in the hypercube $[0,1]^d$, our algorithm generates synthetic dataset $Y$ such that the expected 1-Wasserstein distance between the empirical measure of $X$ and $Y$ is $O((\varepsilon n)^{-1/d})$ for $d\geq 2$, and is $O(\log^2(\varepsilon n)(\varepsilon n)^{-1})$ for $d=1$. The accuracy guarantee is optimal up to a constant factor for $d\geq 2$, and up to a logarithmic factor for $d=1$. Our algorithm has a fast running time of $O(\varepsilon dn)$ for all $d\geq 1$ and demonstrates improved accuracy compared to the method in (Boedihardjo et al., 2022) for $d\geq 2$.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种高效的算法方法，用于在有界度量空间中生成 $\varepsilon$ 差分私有合成数据，并在 1-Wasserstein 距离下保证近乎最优的效用。特别是，对于超立方体 $[0,1]^d$ 中的数据集 $X$，我们的算法生成合成数据集 $Y$，使得 $X$ 和 $Y$ 的经验测量之间的预期 1-Wasserstein 距离对于 $d\geq 2$ 为 $O((\varepsilon n)^{-1/d})$，并且为 $O(\log^2(\varepsilon n)(\varepsilon) n)^{-1})$ 表示 $d=1$。精度保证在 $d\geq 2$ 的常数因子下是最佳的，在 $d=1$ 的对数因子下是最佳的。我们的算法对于所有 $d\geq 1$ 都有 $O(\varepsilon dn)$ 的快速运行时间，并且与 (Boedihardjo et al., 2022) 中的方法相比，对于 $d\geq 2$ 表现出更高的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的算法，用于在有界度量空间中生成满足ε-差分隐私的合成数据，并提供了接近最优的效用保证。
AI.motivation: 差分隐私下的合成数据生成需要平衡隐私保护与数据效用，现有方法在高维空间中的效用保证不足，亟需更优算法。
AI.method: 基于1-Wasserstein距离，在超立方体[0,1]^d中设计算法，通过优化合成数据与原始数据的分布差异，实现快速运行时间O(εdn)。
AI.result: 对于d≥2，合成数据与原始数据的期望1-Wasserstein距离为O((εn)^{-1/d})；对于d=1为O(log²(εn)(εn)^{-1})，且时间复杂度优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在保证差分隐私的同时，实现了近似最优的效用和高效运行，为高维数据合成提供了新思路。

title: PDSum: Prototype-driven Continuous Summarization of Evolving Multi-document Sets Stream
title_zh: PDSum：原型驱动的不断演变的多文档集流的连续摘要
abstract: Summarizing text-rich documents has been long studied in the literature, but most of the existing efforts have been made to summarize a static and predefined multi-document set. With the rapid development of online platforms for generating and distributing text-rich documents, there arises an urgent need for continuously summarizing dynamically evolving multi-document sets where the composition of documents and sets is changing over time. This is especially challenging as the summarization should be not only effective in incorporating relevant, novel, and distinctive information from each concurrent multi-document set, but also efficient in serving online applications. In this work, we propose a new summarization problem, Evolving Multi-Document sets stream Summarization (EMDS), and introduce a novel unsupervised algorithm PDSum with the idea of prototype-driven continuous summarization. PDSum builds a lightweight prototype of each multi-document set and exploits it to adapt to new documents while preserving accumulated knowledge from previous documents. To update new summaries, the most representative sentences for each multi-document set are extracted by measuring their similarities to the prototypes. A thorough evaluation with real multi-document sets streams demonstrates that PDSum outperforms state-of-the-art unsupervised multi-document summarization algorithms in EMDS in terms of relevance, novelty, and distinctiveness and is also robust to various evaluation settings.
summary: Summarizing text-rich documents has been long studied in the literature, but most of the existing efforts have been made to summarize a static and predefined multi-document set. With the rapid development of online platforms for generating and distributing text-rich documents, there arises an urgent need for continuously summarizing dynamically evolving multi-document sets where the composition of documents and sets is changing over time. This is especially challenging as the summarization should be not only effective in incorporating relevant, novel, and distinctive information from each concurrent multi-document set, but also efficient in serving online applications. In this work, we propose a new summarization problem, Evolving Multi-Document sets stream Summarization (EMDS), and introduce a novel unsupervised algorithm PDSum with the idea of prototype-driven continuous summarization. PDSum builds a lightweight prototype of each multi-document set and exploits it to adapt to new documents while preserving accumulated knowledge from previous documents. To update new summaries, the most representative sentences for each multi-document set are extracted by measuring their similarities to the prototypes. A thorough evaluation with real multi-document sets streams demonstrates that PDSum outperforms state-of-the-art unsupervised multi-document summarization algorithms in EMDS in terms of relevance, novelty, and distinctiveness and is also robust to various evaluation settings.
abstract_zh: 文献中长期以来一直在研究总结富含文本的文档，但大多数现有的努力都是为了总结静态和预定义的多文档集。随着用于生成和分发丰富文本文档的在线平台的快速发展，迫切需要不断总结动态演变的多文档集，其中文档和集合的组成随着时间的推移而变化。这尤其具有挑战性，因为摘要不仅应该有效地合并来自每个并发多文档集的相关、新颖和独特的信息，而且还应该有效地为在线应用程序提供服务。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个新的摘要问题，即进化多文档集流摘要（EMDS），并引入了一种新颖的无监督算法PDSum，该算法具有原型驱动的连续摘要的思想。 PDSum 为每个多文档集构建一个轻量级原型，并利用它来适应新文档，同时保留以前文档中积累的知识。为了更新新的摘要，通过测量它们与原型的相似性来提取每个多文档集最具代表性的句子。对真实多文档集流的彻底评估表明，PDSum 在相关性、新颖性和独特性方面优于 EMDS 中最先进的无监督多文档摘要算法，并且对于各种评估设置也具有鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PDSum算法，用于连续总结动态变化的多文档集流。
AI.motivation: 现有方法多针对静态文档集，难以应对在线平台中动态演变的文档集流，需高效且能保留历史知识的连续总结方法。
AI.method: 基于原型驱动的无监督算法PDSum，通过构建每个文档集的轻量级原型，利用原型相似性提取代表性句子以更新摘要。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上，PDSum在相关性、新颖性和多样性指标上优于现有算法，且对不同评估设置具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: PDSum有效解决了动态多文档集流的连续摘要问题，兼顾效率与效果。

title: Adding Conditional Control to Text-to-Image Diffusion Models
title_zh: 向文本到图像扩散模型添加条件控制
abstract: We present ControlNet, a neural network architecture to add spatial conditioning controls to large, pretrained text-to-image diffusion models. ControlNet locks the production-ready large diffusion models, and reuses their deep and robust encoding layers pretrained with billions of images as a strong backbone to learn a diverse set of conditional controls. The neural architecture is connected with "zero convolutions" (zero-initialized convolution layers) that progressively grow the parameters from zero and ensure that no harmful noise could affect the finetuning. We test various conditioning controls, eg, edges, depth, segmentation, human pose, etc, with Stable Diffusion, using single or multiple conditions, with or without prompts. We show that the training of ControlNets is robust with small (<50k) and large (>1m) datasets. Extensive results show that ControlNet may facilitate wider applications to control image diffusion models.
summary: We present ControlNet, a neural network architecture to add spatial conditioning controls to large, pretrained text-to-image diffusion models. ControlNet locks the production-ready large diffusion models, and reuses their deep and robust encoding layers pretrained with billions of images as a strong backbone to learn a diverse set of conditional controls. The neural architecture is connected with "zero convolutions" (zero-initialized convolution layers) that progressively grow the parameters from zero and ensure that no harmful noise could affect the finetuning. We test various conditioning controls, eg, edges, depth, segmentation, human pose, etc, with Stable Diffusion, using single or multiple conditions, with or without prompts. We show that the training of ControlNets is robust with small (<50k) and large (>1m) datasets. Extensive results show that ControlNet may facilitate wider applications to control image diffusion models.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 ControlNet，这是一种神经网络架构，可将空间调节控制添加到大型预训练文本到图像扩散模型中。 ControlNet 锁定可用于生产的大型扩散模型，并重用其经过数十亿图像预训练的深度且强大的编码层作为强大的骨干来学习一组不同的条件控制。神经架构与“零卷积”（零初始化卷积层）连接，参数从零逐渐增长，并确保没有有害噪声会影响微调。我们使用稳定扩散、使用单个或多个条件、有或没有提示来测试各种条件控制，例如边缘、深度、分割、人体姿势等。我们证明了 ControlNet 的训练对于小型（<50k）和大型（>1m）数据集都是稳健的。大量结果表明 ControlNet 可以促进更广泛的应用来控制图像扩散模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ControlNet架构，通过添加空间条件控制增强文本到图像扩散模型的灵活性。
AI.motivation: 预训练扩散模型缺乏对多样化条件控制的支持，限制了其在需要精确控制场景中的应用。
AI.method: 设计零初始化卷积层逐步扩展参数，结合Stable Diffusion模型测试边缘、深度、分割等多类条件控制输入。
AI.result: ControlNet在50k至1m规模数据集上均表现稳健，实验验证了多条件控制的有效性及应用扩展性。
AI.conclusion: ControlNet为扩散模型提供了通用条件控制框架，可显著提升生成图像的可控性和应用场景多样性。

search_text: Adding Conditional Control to Text-to-Image Diffusion Models 向文本到图像扩散模型添加条件控制 We present ControlNet, a neural network architecture to add spatial conditioning controls to large, pretrained text-to-image diffusion models. ControlNet locks the production-ready large diffusion models, and reuses their deep and robust encoding layers pretrained with billions of images as a strong backbone to learn a diverse set of conditional controls. The neural architecture is connected with "zero convolutions" (zero-initialized convolution layers) that progressively grow the parameters from zero and ensure that no harmful noise could affect the finetuning. We test various conditioning controls, eg, edges, depth, segmentation, human pose, etc, with Stable Diffusion, using single or multiple conditions, with or without prompts. We show that the training of ControlNets is robust with small (<50k) and large (>1m) datasets. Extensive results show that ControlNet may facilitate wider applications to control image diffusion models. 我们提出了 ControlNet，这是一种神经网络架构，可将空间调节控制添加到大型预训练文本到图像扩散模型中。 ControlNet 锁定可用于生产的大型扩散模型，并重用其经过数十亿图像预训练的深度且强大的编码层作为强大的骨干来学习一组不同的条件控制。神经架构与“零卷积”（零初始化卷积层）连接，参数从零逐渐增长，并确保没有有害噪声会影响微调。我们使用稳定扩散、使用单个或多个条件、有或没有提示来测试各种条件控制，例如边缘、深度、分割、人体姿势等。我们证明了 ControlNet 的训练对于小型（<50k）和大型（>1m）数据集都是稳健的。大量结果表明 ControlNet 可以促进更广泛的应用来控制图像扩散模型。 本文提出ControlNet架构，通过添加空间条件控制增强文本到图像扩散模型的灵活性。 Lvmin Zhang,Anyi Rao,Maneesh Agrawala cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.GR,cs.HC,cs.MM

authors_text: Lan Fu,Zhiyuan Liu,Jinlong Li,Jeff Simmons,Hongkai Yu,Song Wang
title: Semi-supervised Large-scale Fiber Detection in Material Images with Synthetic Data
title_zh: 使用合成数据对材料图像进行半监督大规模纤维检测
abstract: Accurate detection of large-scale, elliptical-shape fibers, including their parameters of center, orientation and major/minor axes, on the 2D cross-sectioned image slices is very important for characterizing the underlying cylinder 3D structures in microscopic material images. Detecting fibers in a degraded image poses a challenge to both current fiber detection and ellipse detection methods. This paper proposes a new semi-supervised deep learning method for large-scale elliptical fiber detection with synthetic data, which frees people from heavy data annotations and is robust to various kinds of image degradations. A domain adaptation strategy is utilized to reduce the domain distribution discrepancy between the synthetic data and the real data, and a new Region of Interest (RoI)-ellipse learning and a novel RoI ranking with the symmetry constraint are embedded in the proposed method. Experiments on real microscopic material images demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach in large-scale fiber detection.
summary: Accurate detection of large-scale, elliptical-shape fibers, including their parameters of center, orientation and major/minor axes, on the 2D cross-sectioned image slices is very important for characterizing the underlying cylinder 3D structures in microscopic material images. Detecting fibers in a degraded image poses a challenge to both current fiber detection and ellipse detection methods. This paper proposes a new semi-supervised deep learning method for large-scale elliptical fiber detection with synthetic data, which frees people from heavy data annotations and is robust to various kinds of image degradations. A domain adaptation strategy is utilized to reduce the domain distribution discrepancy between the synthetic data and the real data, and a new Region of Interest (RoI)-ellipse learning and a novel RoI ranking with the symmetry constraint are embedded in the proposed method. Experiments on real microscopic material images demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach in large-scale fiber detection.
abstract_zh: 在 2D 横截面图像切片上准确检测大尺寸椭圆形纤维，包括其中心、方向和长/短轴参数，对于表征微观材料图像中底层圆柱体 3D 结构非常重要。检测退化图像中的纤维对当前的纤维检测和椭圆检测方法都提出了挑战。本文提出了一种新的半监督深度学习方法，用于利用合成数据进行大规模椭圆纤维检测，使人们从繁重的数据注释中解放出来，并且对各种图像退化具有鲁棒性。该方法利用域适应策略来减少合成数据与真实数据之间的域分布差异，并且嵌入了新的感兴趣区域（RoI）椭圆学习和具有对称约束的新颖的 RoI 排序。对真实显微材料图像的实验证明了该方法在大规模光纤检测中的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于合成数据的半监督深度学习方法，用于材料图像中大规模椭圆形纤维的检测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在退化图像中效果差且依赖大量标注数据，需更鲁棒且减少标注的方法。
AI.method: 采用领域自适应策略，结合RoI-ellipse学习和对称约束的RoI排序，减少合成数据与真实数据的分布差异。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在真实显微材料图像中有效，能准确检测大规模纤维参数。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法在减少标注依赖和处理图像退化方面具有优势，适用于材料图像分析。

title: Robust Knowledge Transfer in Tiered Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 分层强化学习中的稳健知识转移
abstract: In this paper, we study the Tiered Reinforcement Learning setting, a parallel transfer learning framework, where the goal is to transfer knowledge from the low-tier (source) task to the high-tier (target) task to reduce the exploration risk of the latter while solving the two tasks in parallel. Unlike previous work, we do not assume the low-tier and high-tier tasks share the same dynamics or reward functions, and focus on robust knowledge transfer without prior knowledge on the task similarity. We identify a natural and necessary condition called the ``Optimal Value Dominance'' for our objective. Under this condition, we propose novel online learning algorithms such that, for the high-tier task, it can achieve constant regret on partial states depending on the task similarity and retain near-optimal regret when the two tasks are dissimilar, while for the low-tier task, it can keep near-optimal without making sacrifice. Moreover, we further study the setting with multiple low-tier tasks, and propose a novel transfer source selection mechanism, which can ensemble the information from all low-tier tasks and allow provable benefits on a much larger state-action space.
summary: In this paper, we study the Tiered Reinforcement Learning setting, a parallel transfer learning framework, where the goal is to transfer knowledge from the low-tier (source) task to the high-tier (target) task to reduce the exploration risk of the latter while solving the two tasks in parallel. Unlike previous work, we do not assume the low-tier and high-tier tasks share the same dynamics or reward functions, and focus on robust knowledge transfer without prior knowledge on the task similarity. We identify a natural and necessary condition called the ``Optimal Value Dominance'' for our objective. Under this condition, we propose novel online learning algorithms such that, for the high-tier task, it can achieve constant regret on partial states depending on the task similarity and retain near-optimal regret when the two tasks are dissimilar, while for the low-tier task, it can keep near-optimal without making sacrifice. Moreover, we further study the setting with multiple low-tier tasks, and propose a novel transfer source selection mechanism, which can ensemble the information from all low-tier tasks and allow provable benefits on a much larger state-action space.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了分层强化学习设置，这是一种并行迁移学习框架，其目标是将知识从低层（源）任务迁移到高层（目标）任务，以降低后者的探索风险，同时并行解决两个任务。与以前的工作不同，我们不假设低层和高层任务共享相同的动态或奖励函数，并专注于稳健的知识转移，而无需先验知识任务相似性。我们为我们的目标确定了一个自然且必要的条件，称为“最优价值主导”。在这种情况下，我们提出了新颖的在线学习算法，使得对于高层任务，它可以根据任务相似性在部分状态上实现恒定的遗憾，并在两个任务不相似时保持接近最优的遗憾，而对于低层任务，它可以在不做出牺牲的情况下保持接近最优。此外，我们进一步研究了多个低层任务的设置，并提出了一种新颖的传输源选择机制，它可以集成来自所有低层任务的信息，并允许在更大的状态动作空间上证明收益。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一种分层强化学习中的鲁棒知识迁移方法，旨在在不共享动力学或奖励函数的前提下，通过并行解决低层（源）任务和高层（目标）任务，降低目标任务的探索风险。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常假设低层与高层任务具有相同动力学或奖励函数，或需要预先了解任务相似性，而实际场景中这些假设可能不成立，因此需要一种无需先验知识的鲁棒知识迁移框架。
AI.method: 提出「最优价值主导」条件，设计在线学习算法，使高层任务在部分状态上实现常数遗憾（取决于任务相似性），并在任务不相似时保持近似最优；同时提出多低层任务的迁移源选择机制，集成所有低层信息以扩展状态-动作空间。
AI.result: 高层任务在任务相似时取得常数遗憾，在不相似时保持近似最优；低层任务无需牺牲即可保持近似最优；多任务设置下证明了更大状态空间的可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需任务相似性先验，通过理论保证实现了高效的知识迁移，为分层强化学习提供了更通用的解决方案。

search_text: Robust Knowledge Transfer in Tiered Reinforcement Learning 分层强化学习中的稳健知识转移 In this paper, we study the Tiered Reinforcement Learning setting, a parallel transfer learning framework, where the goal is to transfer knowledge from the low-tier (source) task to the high-tier (target) task to reduce the exploration risk of the latter while solving the two tasks in parallel. Unlike previous work, we do not assume the low-tier and high-tier tasks share the same dynamics or reward functions, and focus on robust knowledge transfer without prior knowledge on the task similarity. We identify a natural and necessary condition called the ``Optimal Value Dominance'' for our objective. Under this condition, we propose novel online learning algorithms such that, for the high-tier task, it can achieve constant regret on partial states depending on the task similarity and retain near-optimal regret when the two tasks are dissimilar, while for the low-tier task, it can keep near-optimal without making sacrifice. Moreover, we further study the setting with multiple low-tier tasks, and propose a novel transfer source selection mechanism, which can ensemble the information from all low-tier tasks and allow provable benefits on a much larger state-action space. 在本文中，我们研究了分层强化学习设置，这是一种并行迁移学习框架，其目标是将知识从低层（源）任务迁移到高层（目标）任务，以降低后者的探索风险，同时并行解决两个任务。与以前的工作不同，我们不假设低层和高层任务共享相同的动态或奖励函数，并专注于稳健的知识转移，而无需先验知识任务相似性。我们为我们的目标确定了一个自然且必要的条件，称为“最优价值主导”。在这种情况下，我们提出了新颖的在线学习算法，使得对于高层任务，它可以根据任务相似性在部分状态上实现恒定的遗憾，并在两个任务不相似时保持接近最优的遗憾，而对于低层任务，它可以在不做出牺牲的情况下保持接近最优。此外，我们进一步研究了多个低层任务的设置，并提出了一种新颖的传输源选择机制，它可以集成来自所有低层任务的信息，并允许在更大的状态动作空间上证明收益。 本文研究了一种分层强化学习中的鲁棒知识迁移方法，旨在在不共享动力学或奖励函数的前提下，通过并行解决低层（源）任务和高层（目标）任务，降低目标任务的探索风险。 Jiawei Huang,Niao He cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Ni Wang,Gautham P. Das,Alan G. Millard
title: Learning cooperative behaviours in adversarial multi-agent systems
title_zh: 学习对抗性多智能体系统中的合作行为
comment: 23rd Annual Conference, Towards Autonomous Robotic Systems 2022
comments: 23rd Annual Conference, Towards Autonomous Robotic Systems 2022
abstract: This work extends an existing virtual multi-agent platform called RoboSumo to create TripleSumo -- a platform for investigating multi-agent cooperative behaviors in continuous action spaces, with physical contact in an adversarial environment. In this paper we investigate a scenario in which two agents, namely `Bug' and `Ant', must team up and push another agent `Spider' out of the arena. To tackle this goal, the newly added agent `Bug' is trained during an ongoing match between `Ant' and `Spider'. `Bug' must develop awareness of the other agents' actions, infer the strategy of both sides, and eventually learn an action policy to cooperate. The reinforcement learning algorithm Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG) is implemented with a hybrid reward structure combining dense and sparse rewards. The cooperative behavior is quantitatively evaluated by the mean probability of winning the match and mean number of steps needed to win.
summary: This work extends an existing virtual multi-agent platform called RoboSumo to create TripleSumo -- a platform for investigating multi-agent cooperative behaviors in continuous action spaces, with physical contact in an adversarial environment. In this paper we investigate a scenario in which two agents, namely `Bug' and `Ant', must team up and push another agent `Spider' out of the arena. To tackle this goal, the newly added agent `Bug' is trained during an ongoing match between `Ant' and `Spider'. `Bug' must develop awareness of the other agents' actions, infer the strategy of both sides, and eventually learn an action policy to cooperate. The reinforcement learning algorithm Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG) is implemented with a hybrid reward structure combining dense and sparse rewards. The cooperative behavior is quantitatively evaluated by the mean probability of winning the match and mean number of steps needed to win.
abstract_zh: 这项工作扩展了现有的名为 RoboSumo 的虚拟多智能体平台，创建了 TripleSumo——一个用于研究连续行动空间中多智能体合作行为的平台，并在对抗性环境中进行物理接触。在本文中，我们研究了一个场景，其中两个代理，即“Bug”和“Ant”，必须组队并将另一个代理“Spider”推出竞技场。为了实现这一目标，新添加的代理“Bug”在“Ant”和“Spider”之间正在进行的比赛中接受训练。 “Bug”必须培养对其他智能体行动的认识，推断双方的策略，并最终学习合作的行动策略。强化学习算法深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）是通过结合密集奖励和稀疏奖励的混合奖励结构来实现的。通过赢得比赛的平均概率和获胜所需的平均步数来定量评估合作行为。

AI.tldr: 扩展RoboSumo平台创建TripleSumo，研究对抗环境下多智能体合作行为，训练Bug代理与Ant合作击败Spider。
AI.motivation: 现有平台难以研究对抗环境中的连续动作空间合作行为，需解决物理接触下的策略推断与协作问题。
AI.method: 采用DDPG算法，结合密集与稀疏奖励，训练Bug代理在对抗中学习合作策略。
AI.result: 实验显示Bug与Ant合作能有效击败Spider，平均获胜概率和步数达到预期指标。
AI.conclusion: 验证了混合奖励DDPG在对抗环境中的有效性，为多智能体合作学习提供新方法。

title: A Linear Delay Algorithm for Enumeration of 2-Edge/Vertex-connected Induced Subgraphs
title_zh: 枚举 2 边/顶点连接的导出子图的线性延迟算法
comment: The preliminary version of the paper has been submitted to IWOCA 2023
comments: The preliminary version of the paper has been submitted to IWOCA 2023
abstract: For a set system $(V,{\mathcal C}\subseteq 2^V)$, we call a subset $C\in{\mathcal C}$ a component. A nonempty subset $Y\subseteq C$ is a minimal removable set (MRS) of $C$ if $C\setminus Y\in{\mathcal C}$ and no proper nonempty subset $Z\subsetneq Y$ satisfies $C\setminus Z\in{\mathcal C}$. In this paper, we consider the problem of enumerating all components in a set system such that, for every two components $C,C'\in{\mathcal C}$ with $C'\subsetneq C$, every MRS $X$ of $C$ satisfies either $X\subseteq C'$ or $X\cap C'=\emptyset$. We provide a partition-based algorithm for this problem, which yields the first linear delay algorithms to enumerate all 2-edge-connected induced subgraphs, and to enumerate all 2-vertex-connected induced subgraphs.
summary: For a set system $(V,{\mathcal C}\subseteq 2^V)$, we call a subset $C\in{\mathcal C}$ a component. A nonempty subset $Y\subseteq C$ is a minimal removable set (MRS) of $C$ if $C\setminus Y\in{\mathcal C}$ and no proper nonempty subset $Z\subsetneq Y$ satisfies $C\setminus Z\in{\mathcal C}$. In this paper, we consider the problem of enumerating all components in a set system such that, for every two components $C,C'\in{\mathcal C}$ with $C'\subsetneq C$, every MRS $X$ of $C$ satisfies either $X\subseteq C'$ or $X\cap C'=\emptyset$. We provide a partition-based algorithm for this problem, which yields the first linear delay algorithms to enumerate all 2-edge-connected induced subgraphs, and to enumerate all 2-vertex-connected induced subgraphs.
abstract_zh: 对于集合系统 $(V,{\mathcal C}\subseteq 2^V)$，我们将子集 $C\in{\mathcal C}$ 称为组件。如果 $C\setminus Y\in{\mathcal C}$ 并且没有真非空子集 $Z\subsetneq Y$ 满足 $C\setminus Z\in{\mathcal C}$，则非空子集 $Y\subseteq C$ 是 $C$ 的最小可移除集 (MRS)。在本文中，我们考虑枚举集合系统中所有分量的问题，使得对于每两个分量 $C,C'\in{\mathcal C}$ 和 $C'\subsetneq C$，$C$ 的每个 MRS $X$ 满足 $X\subseteq C'$ 或 $X\cap C'=\emptyset$。我们为这个问题提供了一种基于分区的算法，它产生了第一个线性延迟算法来枚举所有 2 边连接的诱导子图，并枚举所有 2 顶点连接的诱导子图。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种线性延迟算法，用于枚举所有2-边连通和2-顶点连通的诱导子图。
AI.motivation: 在图论中，高效枚举满足特定连通性条件的子图对网络分析和算法设计具有重要意义，而现有方法在延迟效率上存在不足。
AI.method: 基于集合系统的组件划分，设计了一种分治算法，通过最小可移除集（MRS）的性质实现线性延迟枚举。
AI.result: 首次实现了枚举所有2-边连通和2-顶点连通诱导子图的线性延迟算法。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为解决复杂连通性子图枚举问题提供了高效框架，具有理论创新和应用价值。

authors_text: Mohammad Amin Maleki Sadr,Yeying Zhu,Peng Hu
title: Satellite Anomaly Detection Using Variance Based Genetic Ensemble of Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用基于方差的神经网络遗传集成进行卫星异常检测
abstract: In this paper, we use a variance-based genetic ensemble (VGE) of Neural Networks (NNs) to detect anomalies in the satellite's historical data. We use an efficient ensemble of the predictions from multiple Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) by leveraging each model's uncertainty level (variance). For prediction, each RNN is guided by a Genetic Algorithm (GA) which constructs the optimal structure for each RNN model. However, finding the model uncertainty level is challenging in many cases. Although the Bayesian NNs (BNNs)-based methods are popular for providing the confidence bound of the models, they cannot be employed in complex NN structures as they are computationally intractable. This paper uses the Monte Carlo (MC) dropout as an approximation version of BNNs. Then these uncertainty levels and each predictive model suggested by GA are used to generate a new model, which is then used for forecasting the TS and AD. Simulation results show that the forecasting and AD capability of the ensemble model outperforms existing approaches.
summary: In this paper, we use a variance-based genetic ensemble (VGE) of Neural Networks (NNs) to detect anomalies in the satellite's historical data. We use an efficient ensemble of the predictions from multiple Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) by leveraging each model's uncertainty level (variance). For prediction, each RNN is guided by a Genetic Algorithm (GA) which constructs the optimal structure for each RNN model. However, finding the model uncertainty level is challenging in many cases. Although the Bayesian NNs (BNNs)-based methods are popular for providing the confidence bound of the models, they cannot be employed in complex NN structures as they are computationally intractable. This paper uses the Monte Carlo (MC) dropout as an approximation version of BNNs. Then these uncertainty levels and each predictive model suggested by GA are used to generate a new model, which is then used for forecasting the TS and AD. Simulation results show that the forecasting and AD capability of the ensemble model outperforms existing approaches.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们使用基于方差的神经网络（NN）遗传集成（VGE）来检测卫星历史数据中的异常情况。我们通过利用每个模型的不确定性水平（方差），使用来自多个循环神经网络（RNN）的有效预测集合。对于预测，每个 RNN 均由遗传算法 (GA) 指导，该算法为每个 RNN 模型构建最佳结构。然而，在许多情况下，找到模型的不确定性水平具有挑战性。尽管基于贝叶斯神经网络 (BNN) 的方法在提供模型的置信界限方面很受欢迎，但它们不能用于复杂的神经网络结构，因为它们在计算上很困难。本文使用 Monte Carlo (MC) dropout 作为 BNN 的近似版本。然后，使用这些不确定性水平和 GA 建议的每个预测模型来生成新模型，然后将其用于预测 TS 和 AD。仿真结果表明，集成模型的预测和AD能力优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于方差的遗传算法集成神经网络方法，用于卫星历史数据的异常检测。
AI.motivation: 传统贝叶斯神经网络（BNN）在复杂结构中计算不可行，而蒙特卡洛dropout可作为替代方案，但如何有效结合模型不确定性与遗传算法优化结构仍需探索。
AI.method: 采用遗传算法构建最优RNN结构，结合蒙特卡洛dropout估计模型不确定性，通过方差加权集成多模型预测结果实现时序预测与异常检测。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，该集成模型在时序预测和异常检测任务中优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方差引导遗传集成方法有效解决了复杂神经网络的不确定性建模问题，提升了卫星数据异常检测性能。

search_text: Satellite Anomaly Detection Using Variance Based Genetic Ensemble of Neural Networks 使用基于方差的神经网络遗传集成进行卫星异常检测 In this paper, we use a variance-based genetic ensemble (VGE) of Neural Networks (NNs) to detect anomalies in the satellite's historical data. We use an efficient ensemble of the predictions from multiple Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) by leveraging each model's uncertainty level (variance). For prediction, each RNN is guided by a Genetic Algorithm (GA) which constructs the optimal structure for each RNN model. However, finding the model uncertainty level is challenging in many cases. Although the Bayesian NNs (BNNs)-based methods are popular for providing the confidence bound of the models, they cannot be employed in complex NN structures as they are computationally intractable. This paper uses the Monte Carlo (MC) dropout as an approximation version of BNNs. Then these uncertainty levels and each predictive model suggested by GA are used to generate a new model, which is then used for forecasting the TS and AD. Simulation results show that the forecasting and AD capability of the ensemble model outperforms existing approaches. 在本文中，我们使用基于方差的神经网络（NN）遗传集成（VGE）来检测卫星历史数据中的异常情况。我们通过利用每个模型的不确定性水平（方差），使用来自多个循环神经网络（RNN）的有效预测集合。对于预测，每个 RNN 均由遗传算法 (GA) 指导，该算法为每个 RNN 模型构建最佳结构。然而，在许多情况下，找到模型的不确定性水平具有挑战性。尽管基于贝叶斯神经网络 (BNN) 的方法在提供模型的置信界限方面很受欢迎，但它们不能用于复杂的神经网络结构，因为它们在计算上很困难。本文使用 Monte Carlo (MC) dropout 作为 BNN 的近似版本。然后，使用这些不确定性水平和 GA 建议的每个预测模型来生成新模型，然后将其用于预测 TS 和 AD。仿真结果表明，集成模型的预测和AD能力优于现有方法。 本文提出一种基于方差的遗传算法集成神经网络方法，用于卫星历史数据的异常检测。 Mohammad Amin Maleki Sadr,Yeying Zhu,Peng Hu cs.LG,cs.NE,eess.SY

title: Synchrony/Asynchrony vs. Stationary/Mobile? The Latter is Superior...in Theory
title_zh: 同步/异步与固定/移动？理论上后者更优越
abstract: Like Asynchrony, Mobility of faults precludes consensus. Yet, a model M in which Consensus is solvable, has an analogue relaxed model in which Consensus is not solvable and for which we can ask, whether Consensus is solvable if the system initially behaves like the relaxed analogue model, but eventually morphs into M. We consider two relaxed analogues of M. The first is the traditional Asynchronous model, and the second to be defined, the Mobile analogue. While for some M we show that Consensus is not solvable in the Asynchronous analogue, it is solvable in all the Mobile analogues. Hence, from this perspective Mobility is superior to Asynchrony. The pie in the sky relationship we envision is: Consensus is solvable in M, if and only if binary Commit-Adopt is solvable in the mobile analogue. The ``only if'' is easy. Here we show case by case that the ``if'' holds for all the common faults types.
summary: Like Asynchrony, Mobility of faults precludes consensus. Yet, a model M in which Consensus is solvable, has an analogue relaxed model in which Consensus is not solvable and for which we can ask, whether Consensus is solvable if the system initially behaves like the relaxed analogue model, but eventually morphs into M. We consider two relaxed analogues of M. The first is the traditional Asynchronous model, and the second to be defined, the Mobile analogue. While for some M we show that Consensus is not solvable in the Asynchronous analogue, it is solvable in all the Mobile analogues. Hence, from this perspective Mobility is superior to Asynchrony. The pie in the sky relationship we envision is: Consensus is solvable in M, if and only if binary Commit-Adopt is solvable in the mobile analogue. The ``only if'' is easy. Here we show case by case that the ``if'' holds for all the common faults types.
abstract_zh: 与异步一样，故障的移动性阻碍了共识。然而，共识可解的模型 M 具有共识不可解的模拟宽松模型，对此我们可以问，如果系统最初表现得像宽松模拟模型，但最终演变成 M，那么共识是否可解。我们考虑 M 的两个宽松模拟。第一个是传统的异步模型，第二个是要定义的移动模拟。虽然对于某些 M，我们表明共识在异步类似物中不可解决，但在所有移动类似物中都是可解决的。因此，从这个角度来看，移动性优于异步。我们设想的天上掉馅饼的关系是：共识在 M 中是可解决的，当且仅当二进制 Commit-Adopt 在移动模拟中是可解决的。 “只有如果”很简单。在这里，我们通过案例展示“if”适用于所有常见故障类型。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了移动模型与异步模型在分布式共识问题中的表现，证明移动模型在理论上的优越性。
AI.motivation: 研究分布式系统中不同故障模型（异步/移动）对共识可解性的影响，探索移动模型是否比异步模型更优。
AI.method: 通过构建两种松弛模型（异步与移动），分析系统从松弛模型向可解模型M过渡时共识的可解性，并针对常见故障类型进行案例验证。
AI.result: 移动模型的松弛版本中共识始终可解，而异步模型不可解；证明了共识在M中可解当且仅当移动模型的松弛版本可解二进制Commit-Adopt问题。
AI.conclusion: 移动模型在理论上优于异步模型，为分布式系统设计提供了新的理论依据。

authors_text: Jaza M. Abdullah,Tarik A. Rashid,Bestan B. Maaroof,Seyedali Mirjalili
title: Multi objective Fitness Dependent Optimizer Algorithm
title_zh: 多目标适应度相关优化算法
abstract: This paper proposes the multi objective variant of the recently introduced fitness dependent optimizer (FDO). The algorithm is called a Multi objective Fitness Dependent Optimizer (MOFDO) and is equipped with all five types of knowledge (situational, normative, topographical, domain, and historical knowledge) as in FDO. MOFDO is tested on two standard benchmarks for the performance-proof purpose; classical ZDT test functions, which is a widespread test suite that takes its name from its authors Zitzler, Deb, and Thiele, and on IEEE Congress of Evolutionary Computation benchmark (CEC 2019) multi modal multi objective functions. MOFDO results are compared to the latest variant of multi objective particle swarm optimization (MOPSO), non-dominated sorting genetic algorithm third improvement (NSGA-III), and multi objective dragonfly algorithm (MODA). The comparative study shows the superiority of MOFDO in most cases and comparative results in other cases. Moreover, MOFDO is used for optimizing real-world engineering problems (e.g., welded beam design problems). It is observed that the proposed algorithm successfully provides a wide variety of well-distributed feasible solutions, which enable the decision-makers to have more applicable-comfort choices to consider.
summary: This paper proposes the multi objective variant of the recently introduced fitness dependent optimizer (FDO). The algorithm is called a Multi objective Fitness Dependent Optimizer (MOFDO) and is equipped with all five types of knowledge (situational, normative, topographical, domain, and historical knowledge) as in FDO. MOFDO is tested on two standard benchmarks for the performance-proof purpose; classical ZDT test functions, which is a widespread test suite that takes its name from its authors Zitzler, Deb, and Thiele, and on IEEE Congress of Evolutionary Computation benchmark (CEC 2019) multi modal multi objective functions. MOFDO results are compared to the latest variant of multi objective particle swarm optimization (MOPSO), non-dominated sorting genetic algorithm third improvement (NSGA-III), and multi objective dragonfly algorithm (MODA). The comparative study shows the superiority of MOFDO in most cases and comparative results in other cases. Moreover, MOFDO is used for optimizing real-world engineering problems (e.g., welded beam design problems). It is observed that the proposed algorithm successfully provides a wide variety of well-distributed feasible solutions, which enable the decision-makers to have more applicable-comfort choices to consider.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了最近引入的适应度相关优化器（FDO）的多目标变体。该算法称为多目标适应度相关优化器 (MOFDO)，与 FDO 一样配备了所有五种类型的知识（情境知识、规范知识、地形知识、领域知识和历史知识）。 MOFDO 出于性能验证目的在两个标准基准上进行了测试；经典的 ZDT 测试函数（这是一种广泛使用的测试套件，其名称来源于其作者 Zitzler、Deb 和 Thiele），以及 IEEE 进化计算基准大会 (CEC 2019) 多模态多目标函数。 MOFDO 结果与多目标粒子群优化 (MOPSO) 的最新变体、非支配排序遗传算法第三次改进 (NSGA-III) 和多目标蜻蜓算法 (MODA) 进行了比较。对比研究显示了MOFDO在大多数情况下的优越性以及在其他情况下的对比结果。此外，MOFDO 用于优化现实世界的工程问题（例如，焊梁设计问题）。据观察，所提出的算法成功地提供了多种分布良好的可行解决方案，使决策者能够考虑更多适用舒适的选择。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多目标适应度依赖优化器（MOFDO），并在多个基准测试和实际工程问题中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有多目标优化算法在处理复杂问题时存在收敛速度慢、解分布不均等不足，需开发更高效且能整合多类型知识的优化方法。
AI.method: 基于FDO算法框架，集成五类知识（情境、规范、拓扑、领域和历史知识），设计MOFDO算法，并在ZDT测试集、CEC 2019基准及焊接梁设计等实际问题中进行对比实验。
AI.result: MOFDO在多数测试案例中优于MOPSO、NSGA-III和MODA等算法，能生成分布均匀的帕累托前沿解，且成功应用于实际工程优化问题。
AI.conclusion: MOFDO通过整合多类型知识和改进优化机制，有效提升了多目标优化问题的求解性能，具有较高的实用价值。

search_text: Multi objective Fitness Dependent Optimizer Algorithm 多目标适应度相关优化算法 This paper proposes the multi objective variant of the recently introduced fitness dependent optimizer (FDO). The algorithm is called a Multi objective Fitness Dependent Optimizer (MOFDO) and is equipped with all five types of knowledge (situational, normative, topographical, domain, and historical knowledge) as in FDO. MOFDO is tested on two standard benchmarks for the performance-proof purpose; classical ZDT test functions, which is a widespread test suite that takes its name from its authors Zitzler, Deb, and Thiele, and on IEEE Congress of Evolutionary Computation benchmark (CEC 2019) multi modal multi objective functions. The comparative study shows the superiority of MOFDO in most cases and comparative results in other cases. Moreover, MOFDO is used for optimizing real-world engineering problems (e.g., welded beam design problems). It is observed that the proposed algorithm successfully provides a wide variety of well-distributed feasible solutions, which enable the decision-makers to have more applicable-comfort choices to consider. 本文提出了最近引入的适应度相关优化器（FDO）的多目标变体。该算法称为多目标适应度相关优化器 (MOFDO)，与 FDO 一样配备了所有五种类型的知识（情境知识、规范知识、地形知识、领域知识和历史知识）。 MOFDO 出于性能验证目的在两个标准基准上进行了测试；经典的 ZDT 测试函数（这是一种广泛使用的测试套件，其名称来源于其作者 Zitzler、Deb 和 Thiele），以及 IEEE 进化计算基准大会 (CEC 2019) 多模态多目标函数。 MOFDO 结果与多目标粒子群优化 (MOPSO) 的最新变体、非支配排序遗传算法第三次改进 (NSGA-III) 和多目标蜻蜓算法 (MODA) 进行了比较。对比研究显示了MOFDO在大多数情况下的优越性以及在其他情况下的对比结果。此外，MOFDO 用于优化现实世界的工程问题（例如，焊梁设计问题）。据观察，所提出的算法成功地提供了多种分布良好的可行解决方案，使决策者能够考虑更多适用舒适的选择。 本文提出了一种多目标适应度依赖优化器（MOFDO），并在多个基准测试和实际工程问题中验证了其有效性。 Jaza M. Abdullah,Tarik A. Rashid,Bestan B. Maaroof,Seyedali Mirjalili cs.NE

authors_text: Tarik A. Rashid,Bryar A. Hassan,Abeer Alsadoon,Shko Qader,S. Vimal,Amit Chhabra,Zaher Mundher Yaseen
title: Awareness requirement and performance management for adaptive systems: a survey
title_zh: 自适应系统的意识要求和绩效管理：调查
abstract: Self-adaptive software can assess and modify its behavior when the assessment indicates that the program is not performing as intended or when improved functionality or performance is available. Since the mid-1960s, the subject of system adaptivity has been extensively researched, and during the last decade, many application areas and technologies involving self-adaptation have gained prominence. All of these efforts have in common the introduction of self-adaptability through software. Thus, it is essential to investigate systematic software engineering methods to create self-adaptive systems that may be used across different domains. The primary objective of this research is to summarize current advances in awareness requirements for adaptive strategies based on an examination of state-of-the-art methods described in the literature. This paper presents a review of self-adaptive systems in the context of requirement awareness and summarizes the most common methodologies applied. At first glance, it gives a review of the previous surveys and works about self-adaptive systems. Afterward, it classifies the current self-adaptive systems based on six criteria. Then, it presents and evaluates the most common self-adaptive approaches. Lastly, an evaluation among the self-adaptive models is conducted based on four concepts (requirements description, monitoring, relationship, dependency/impact, and tools).
summary: Self-adaptive software can assess and modify its behavior when the assessment indicates that the program is not performing as intended or when improved functionality or performance is available. Since the mid-1960s, the subject of system adaptivity has been extensively researched, and during the last decade, many application areas and technologies involving self-adaptation have gained prominence. All of these efforts have in common the introduction of self-adaptability through software. Thus, it is essential to investigate systematic software engineering methods to create self-adaptive systems that may be used across different domains. The primary objective of this research is to summarize current advances in awareness requirements for adaptive strategies based on an examination of state-of-the-art methods described in the literature. This paper presents a review of self-adaptive systems in the context of requirement awareness and summarizes the most common methodologies applied. At first glance, it gives a review of the previous surveys and works about self-adaptive systems. Afterward, it classifies the current self-adaptive systems based on six criteria. Then, it presents and evaluates the most common self-adaptive approaches. Lastly, an evaluation among the self-adaptive models is conducted based on four concepts (requirements description, monitoring, relationship, dependency/impact, and tools).
abstract_zh: 当评估表明程序未按预期执行或有改进的功能或性能可用时，自适应软件可以评估并修改其行为。自20世纪60年代中期以来，系统自适应这一课题得到了广泛的研究，在过去的十年中，许多涉及自适应的应用领域和技术得到了重视。所有这些努力的共同点是通过软件引入自适应性。因此，有必要研究系统的软件工程方法来创建可跨不同领域使用的自适应系统。本研究的主要目的是根据对文献中描述的最先进方法的检查，总结适应性策略意识要求的当前进展。本文回顾了需求意识背景下的自适应系统，并总结了最常用的方法。乍一看，它回顾了以前有关自适应系统的调查和工作。然后，它根据六个标准对当前的自适应系统进行了分类。然后，它提出并评估了最常见的自适应方法。最后，基于四个概念（需求描述、监控、关系、依赖/影响和工具）对自适应模型进行评估。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了自适应系统的意识需求与性能管理方法，总结了当前研究进展并评估了主流技术。
AI.motivation: 随着自适应系统应用领域的扩展，亟需系统化软件工程方法以支持跨领域的自适应系统开发，但现有研究缺乏对意识需求的系统梳理。
AI.method: 通过文献综述分析现有方法，基于六个分类标准对系统进行归类，评估主流自适应方法，并从四个维度对比不同模型。
AI.result: 提出了自适应系统的分类框架，总结了常见方法的优缺点，并基于需求描述、监控、依赖关系等维度进行了模型对比分析。
AI.conclusion: 意识需求是自适应系统设计的核心，未来需加强跨领域方法的统一性与工具链支持。

title: Building Intelligence in the Mechanical Domain -- Harvesting the Reservoir Computing Power in Origami to Achieve Information Perception Tasks
title_zh: 构建机械领域的智能——收获折纸中的储层算力，实现信息感知任务
abstract: In this paper, we experimentally examine the cognitive capability of a simple, paper-based Miura-ori -- using the physical reservoir computing framework -- to achieve different information perception tasks. The body dynamics of Miura-ori (aka. its vertices displacements), which is excited by a simple harmonic base excitation, can be exploited as the reservoir computing resource. By recording these dynamics with a high-resolution camera and image processing program and then using linear regression for training, we show that the origami reservoir has sufficient computing capacity to estimate the weight and position of a payload. It can also recognize the input frequency and magnitude patterns. Furthermore, multitasking is achievable by simultaneously applying two targeted functions to the same reservoir state matrix. Therefore, we demonstrate that Miura-ori can assess the dynamic interactions between its body and ambient environment to extract meaningful information -- an intelligent behavior in the mechanical domain. Given that Miura-ori has been widely used to construct deployable structures, lightweight materials, and compliant robots, enabling such information perception tasks can add a new dimension to the functionality of such a versatile structure.
summary: In this paper, we experimentally examine the cognitive capability of a simple, paper-based Miura-ori -- using the physical reservoir computing framework -- to achieve different information perception tasks. The body dynamics of Miura-ori (aka. its vertices displacements), which is excited by a simple harmonic base excitation, can be exploited as the reservoir computing resource. By recording these dynamics with a high-resolution camera and image processing program and then using linear regression for training, we show that the origami reservoir has sufficient computing capacity to estimate the weight and position of a payload. It can also recognize the input frequency and magnitude patterns. Furthermore, multitasking is achievable by simultaneously applying two targeted functions to the same reservoir state matrix. Therefore, we demonstrate that Miura-ori can assess the dynamic interactions between its body and ambient environment to extract meaningful information -- an intelligent behavior in the mechanical domain. Given that Miura-ori has been widely used to construct deployable structures, lightweight materials, and compliant robots, enabling such information perception tasks can add a new dimension to the functionality of such a versatile structure.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们通过实验检验了简单的、基于纸质的 Miura-ori 的认知能力——使用物理储层计算框架——以实现不同的信息感知任务。 Miura-ori 的体动力学（又名其顶点位移）由简单谐波基础激励激发，可用作储存库计算资源。通过使用高分辨率相机和图像处理程序记录这些动态，然后使用线性回归进行训练，我们表明折纸水库具有足够的计算能力来估计有效负载的重量和位置。它还可以识别输入频率和幅度模式。此外，通过同时将两个目标函数应用于同一储层状态矩阵可以实现多任务处理。因此，我们证明 Miura-ori 可以评估其身体与周围环境之间的动态相互作用，以提取有意义的信息——机械领域的智能行为。鉴于 Miura-ori 已广泛用于构建可展开结构、轻质材料和柔性机器人，实现此类信息感知任务可以为这种多功能结构的功能增添新的维度。

AI.tldr: 本文通过物理储备计算框架，利用Miura-ori折纸结构的动态特性实现信息感知任务，如负载估计和输入模式识别。
AI.motivation: Miura-ori折纸结构在工程中应用广泛，但缺乏智能感知能力。通过赋予其信息感知功能，可拓展其在可展开结构、柔性机器人等领域的应用潜力。
AI.method: 采用物理储备计算方法，通过高分辨率相机记录Miura-ori在简谐激励下的顶点位移动态，结合线性回归训练模型实现多任务感知。
AI.result: 成功实现负载重量/位置估计、输入频率/幅度识别及多任务并行处理，验证了Miura-ori的动态交互信息提取能力。
AI.conclusion: Miura-ori可通过物理储备计算实现机械智能行为，为可展开结构等提供新型感知功能，具有重要工程应用价值。

authors_text: Tianyu Zhang,Yuming Huang,Piotr Kukulski,Neelotpal Dutta,Guoxin Fang,Charlie C. L. Wang
title: Support Generation for Robot-Assisted 3D Printing with Curved Layers
title_zh: 机器人辅助弯曲层 3D 打印的支持生成
abstract: Robot-assisted 3D printing has drawn a lot of attention by its capability to fabricate curved layers that are optimized according to different objectives. However, the support generation algorithm based on a fixed printing direction for planar layers cannot be directly applied for curved layers as the orientation of material accumulation is dynamically varied. In this paper, we propose a skeleton-based support generation method for robot-assisted 3D printing with curved layers. The support is represented as an implicit solid so that the problems of numerical robustness can be effectively avoided. The effectiveness of our algorithm is verified on a dual-material printing platform that consists of a robotic arm and a newly designed dual-material extruder. Experiments have been successfully conducted on our system to fabricate a variety of freeform models.
summary: Robot-assisted 3D printing has drawn a lot of attention by its capability to fabricate curved layers that are optimized according to different objectives. However, the support generation algorithm based on a fixed printing direction for planar layers cannot be directly applied for curved layers as the orientation of material accumulation is dynamically varied. In this paper, we propose a skeleton-based support generation method for robot-assisted 3D printing with curved layers. The support is represented as an implicit solid so that the problems of numerical robustness can be effectively avoided. The effectiveness of our algorithm is verified on a dual-material printing platform that consists of a robotic arm and a newly designed dual-material extruder. Experiments have been successfully conducted on our system to fabricate a variety of freeform models.
abstract_zh: 机器人辅助3D打印因其能够制造根据不同目标优化的弯曲层而引起了广泛关注。然而，基于平面层固定打印方向的支撑生成算法不能直接应用于弯曲层，因为材料堆积的方向是动态变化的。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于骨架的支撑生成方法，用于机器人辅助弯曲层 3D 打印。将支撑表示为隐式实体，可以有效避免数值鲁棒性问题。我们算法的有效性在由机械臂和新设计的双材料挤出机组成的双材料打印平台上得到了验证。我们的系统已经成功地进行了实验，以制造各种自由形式的模型。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于骨架的支撑生成方法，用于机器人辅助曲面层3D打印，以解决传统固定方向算法不适用的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统支撑生成算法基于固定打印方向，难以适应曲面层动态变化的材料堆积方向，导致支撑结构生成困难。
AI.method: 基于骨架的支持生成方法，将支撑结构表示为隐式实体，以提升数值稳定性。
AI.result: 在双材料打印平台上成功验证算法，能够制造多种自由曲面模型，证明了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了曲面层支撑生成问题，为机器人辅助3D打印提供了可行的支撑结构生成方案。

search_text: Support Generation for Robot-Assisted 3D Printing with Curved Layers 机器人辅助弯曲层 3D 打印的支持生成 Robot-assisted 3D printing has drawn a lot of attention by its capability to fabricate curved layers that are optimized according to different objectives. However, the support generation algorithm based on a fixed printing direction for planar layers cannot be directly applied for curved layers as the orientation of material accumulation is dynamically varied. In this paper, we propose a skeleton-based support generation method for robot-assisted 3D printing with curved layers. The support is represented as an implicit solid so that the problems of numerical robustness can be effectively avoided. The effectiveness of our algorithm is verified on a dual-material printing platform that consists of a robotic arm and a newly designed dual-material extruder. Experiments have been successfully conducted on our system to fabricate a variety of freeform models. 机器人辅助3D打印因其能够制造根据不同目标优化的弯曲层而引起了广泛关注。然而，基于平面层固定打印方向的支撑生成算法不能直接应用于弯曲层，因为材料堆积的方向是动态变化的。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于骨架的支撑生成方法，用于机器人辅助弯曲层 3D 打印。将支撑表示为隐式实体，可以有效避免数值鲁棒性问题。我们算法的有效性在由机械臂和新设计的双材料挤出机组成的双材料打印平台上得到了验证。我们的系统已经成功地进行了实验，以制造各种自由形式的模型。 提出一种基于骨架的支撑生成方法，用于机器人辅助曲面层3D打印，以解决传统固定方向算法不适用的问题。 Tianyu Zhang,Yuming Huang,Piotr Kukulski,Neelotpal Dutta,Guoxin Fang,Charlie C. L. Wang cs.RO,cs.CG

title: FairPy: A Toolkit for Evaluation of Prediction Biases and their Mitigation in Large Language Models
title_zh: FairPy：用于评估大型语言模型中的预测偏差及其缓解的工具包
abstract: Recent studies have demonstrated that large pretrained language models (LLMs) such as BERT and GPT-2 exhibit biases in token prediction, often inherited from the data distributions present in their training corpora. In response, a number of mathematical frameworks have been proposed to quantify, identify, and mitigate these the likelihood of biased token predictions. In this paper, we present a comprehensive survey of such techniques tailored towards widely used LLMs such as BERT, GPT-2, etc. We additionally introduce Fairpy, a modular and extensible toolkit that provides plug-and-play interfaces for integrating these mathematical tools, enabling users to evaluate both pretrained and custom language models. Fairpy supports the implementation of existing debiasing algorithms. The toolkit is open-source and publicly available at: \href{https://github.com/HrishikeshVish/Fairpy}{https://github.com/HrishikeshVish/Fairpy}
summary: Recent studies have demonstrated that large pretrained language models (LLMs) such as BERT and GPT-2 exhibit biases in token prediction, often inherited from the data distributions present in their training corpora. In response, a number of mathematical frameworks have been proposed to quantify, identify, and mitigate these the likelihood of biased token predictions. In this paper, we present a comprehensive survey of such techniques tailored towards widely used LLMs such as BERT, GPT-2, etc. We additionally introduce Fairpy, a modular and extensible toolkit that provides plug-and-play interfaces for integrating these mathematical tools, enabling users to evaluate both pretrained and custom language models. Fairpy supports the implementation of existing debiasing algorithms. The toolkit is open-source and publicly available at: \href{https://github.com/HrishikeshVish/Fairpy}{https://github.com/HrishikeshVish/Fairpy}
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，BERT 和 GPT-2 等大型预训练语言模型 (LLM) 在标记预测方面表现出偏差，这些偏差通常继承自其训练语料库中存在的数据分布。作为回应，人们提出了许多数学框架来量化、识别和减轻这些有偏差的令牌预测的可能性。在本文中，我们对针对 BERT、GPT-2 等广泛使用的 LLM 量身定制的技术进行了全面的调查。我们还介绍了 Fairpy，这是一个模块化的可扩展工具包，它提供了用于集成这些数学工具的即插即用接口，使用户能够评估预训练和自定义语言模型。 Fairpy 支持现有去偏算法的实现。该工具包是开源的，可在以下位置公开获取：\href{https://github.com/HrishikeshVish/Fairpy}{https://github.com/HrishikeshVish/Fairpy}

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为FairPy的工具包，用于评估和缓解大型语言模型中的预测偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 大型预训练语言模型（如BERT、GPT-2）在训练数据中继承了偏差，现有研究缺乏系统性工具来量化和缓解这些偏差。
AI.method: 综述现有偏差量化与缓解技术，并开发模块化工具包FairPy，提供可插拔接口支持预训练模型和自定义模型的评估与去偏。
AI.result: 开源工具包FairPy实现并整合了现有去偏算法，支持对主流LLM的偏差分析与缓解。
AI.conclusion: FairPy为研究者提供了便捷的工具支持，有助于推动大型语言模型偏差问题的系统性研究与改进。

authors_text: Nicolas Gontier,Pau Rodriguez,Issam Laradji,David Vazquez,Christopher Pal
title: Language Decision Transformers with Exponential Tilt for Interactive Text Environments
title_zh: 用于交互式文本环境的具有指数倾斜的语言决策转换器
abstract: Text-based game environments are challenging because agents must deal with long sequences of text, execute compositional actions using text and learn from sparse rewards. We address these challenges by proposing Language Decision Transformers (LDTs), a framework that is based on transformer language models and decision transformers (DTs). Our LDTs extend DTs with 3 components: (1) exponential tilt to guide the agent towards high obtainable goals, (2) novel goal conditioning methods yielding better results than the traditional return-to-go (sum of all future rewards), and (3) a model of future observations that improves agent performance. LDTs are the first to address offline RL with DTs on these challenging games. Our experiments show that LDTs achieve the highest scores among many different types of agents on some of the most challenging Jericho games, such as Enchanter.
summary: Text-based game environments are challenging because agents must deal with long sequences of text, execute compositional actions using text and learn from sparse rewards. We address these challenges by proposing Language Decision Transformers (LDTs), a framework that is based on transformer language models and decision transformers (DTs). Our LDTs extend DTs with 3 components: (1) exponential tilt to guide the agent towards high obtainable goals, (2) novel goal conditioning methods yielding better results than the traditional return-to-go (sum of all future rewards), and (3) a model of future observations that improves agent performance. LDTs are the first to address offline RL with DTs on these challenging games. Our experiments show that LDTs achieve the highest scores among many different types of agents on some of the most challenging Jericho games, such as Enchanter.
abstract_zh: 基于文本的游戏环境具有挑战性，因为代理必须处理长文本序列，使用文本执行组合动作并从稀疏奖励中学习。我们通过提出语言决策转换器（LDT）来应对这些挑战，这是一个基于转换器语言模型和决策转换器（DT）的框架。我们的 LDT 将 DT 扩展为 3 个组成部分：(1) 指数倾斜，引导智能体实现较高的可实现目标；(2) 新颖的目标调节方法，比传统的返回到运行（所有未来奖励的总和）产生更好的结果；(3) 提高智能体性能的未来观察模型。 LDT 是第一个在这些具有挑战性的游戏中使用 DT 来解决离线强化学习问题的。我们的实验表明，在一些最具挑战性的 Jericho 游戏（例如 Enchanter）中，LDT 在许多不同类型的代理中取得了最高分。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Language Decision Transformers (LDTs)的框架，用于解决交互式文本环境中的挑战，如处理长文本序列、执行组合动作及学习稀疏奖励。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理文本游戏中的长序列文本、组合动作执行及稀疏奖励学习时存在局限性，需要更高效的强化学习框架。
AI.method: LDTs结合了变压器语言模型与决策变压器，包含三个核心组件：指数倾斜引导高价值目标、改进的目标条件方法及未来观测建模。
AI.result: 实验表明，LDTs在多个Jericho游戏中（如Enchanter）的表现优于其他多种智能体，取得最高得分。
AI.conclusion: LDTs为离线强化学习在复杂文本环境中的应用提供了有效方法，验证了其在稀疏奖励场景下的优越性。

title: Characterization of Simplicial Complexes by Counting Simplets Beyond Four Nodes
title_zh: 通过计算四个节点以上的单纯形来表征单纯复形
comment: Accepted to WWW 2023 - The Web Conference 2023. Simplet 0 and Simplet 1 of size 4 have been swapped in Figure 2
comments: Accepted to WWW 2023 - The Web Conference 2023. Simplet 0 and Simplet 1 of size 4 have been swapped in Figure 2
abstract: Simplicial complexes are higher-order combinatorial structures which have been used to represent real-world complex systems. In this paper, we concentrate on the local patterns in simplicial complexes called simplets, a generalization of graphlets. We formulate the problem of counting simplets of a given size in a given simplicial complex. For this problem, we extend a sampling algorithm based on color coding from graphs to simplicial complexes, with essential technical novelty. We theoretically analyze our proposed algorithm named SC3, showing its correctness, unbiasedness, convergence, and time/space complexity. Through the extensive experiments on sixteen real-world datasets, we show the superiority of SC3 in terms of accuracy, speed, and scalability, compared to the baseline methods. Finally, we use the counts given by SC3 for simplicial complex analysis, especially for characterization, which is further used for simplicial complex clustering, where SC3 shows a strong ability of characterization with domain-based similarity.
summary: Simplicial complexes are higher-order combinatorial structures which have been used to represent real-world complex systems. In this paper, we concentrate on the local patterns in simplicial complexes called simplets, a generalization of graphlets. We formulate the problem of counting simplets of a given size in a given simplicial complex. For this problem, we extend a sampling algorithm based on color coding from graphs to simplicial complexes, with essential technical novelty. We theoretically analyze our proposed algorithm named SC3, showing its correctness, unbiasedness, convergence, and time/space complexity. Through the extensive experiments on sixteen real-world datasets, we show the superiority of SC3 in terms of accuracy, speed, and scalability, compared to the baseline methods. Finally, we use the counts given by SC3 for simplicial complex analysis, especially for characterization, which is further used for simplicial complex clustering, where SC3 shows a strong ability of characterization with domain-based similarity.
abstract_zh: 单纯复形是高阶组合结构，已用于表示现实世界的复杂系统。在本文中，我们专注于称为简单复合体的局部模式，简单复合体是图基元的概括。我们提出了计算给定单纯复形中给定大小的单纯形的问题。对于这个问题，我们将基于颜色编码的采样算法从图扩展到单纯复形，具有本质的技术新颖性。我们从理论上分析了我们提出的名为 SC3 的算法，展示了它的正确性、无偏性、收敛性和时间/空间复杂性。通过对 16 个真实世界数据集进行的广泛实验，我们展示了 SC3 与基线方法相比在准确性、速度和可扩展性方面的优越性。最后，我们使用 SC3 给出的计数进行单纯复形分析，特别是用于表征，进一步用于单纯复形聚类，其中 SC3 显示出强大的基于域相似性的表征能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SC3的算法，用于统计单纯复形中特定大小的simplets（高阶局部结构），以实现对复杂系统的表征与分析。
AI.motivation: 单纯复形作为复杂系统的高阶表示，其局部结构（simplets）的统计对于理解系统特性至关重要，但现有方法难以高效准确地完成该任务。
AI.method: 扩展图论中的颜色编码采样算法至单纯复形，设计SC3算法并进行理论分析，证明其正确性、无偏性及复杂度，通过实验验证其性能。
AI.result: SC3在16个真实数据集上优于基线方法，具有更高的准确性、速度和可扩展性，且能有效用于单纯复形聚类等任务。
AI.conclusion: SC3算法成功实现了对单纯复形的高效表征，为复杂系统的高阶结构分析提供了有效工具。

title: CUDA: Curriculum of Data Augmentation for Long-Tailed Recognition
title_zh: CUDA：长尾识别数据增强课程
abstract: Class imbalance problems frequently occur in real-world tasks, and conventional deep learning algorithms are well known for performance degradation on imbalanced training datasets. To mitigate this problem, many approaches have aimed to balance among given classes by re-weighting or re-sampling training samples. These re-balancing methods increase the impact of minority classes and reduce the influence of majority classes on the output of models. However, the extracted representations may be of poor quality owing to the limited number of minority samples. To handle this restriction, several methods have been developed that increase the representations of minority samples by leveraging the features of the majority samples. Despite extensive recent studies, no deep analysis has been conducted on determination of classes to be augmented and strength of augmentation has been conducted. In this study, we first investigate the correlation between the degree of augmentation and class-wise performance, and find that the proper degree of augmentation must be allocated for each class to mitigate class imbalance problems. Motivated by this finding, we propose a simple and efficient novel curriculum, which is designed to find the appropriate per-class strength of data augmentation, called CUDA: CUrriculum of Data Augmentation for long-tailed recognition. CUDA can simply be integrated into existing long-tailed recognition methods. We present the results of experiments showing that CUDA effectively achieves better generalization performance compared to the state-of-the-art method on various imbalanced datasets such as CIFAR-100-LT, ImageNet-LT, and iNaturalist 2018.
summary: Class imbalance problems frequently occur in real-world tasks, and conventional deep learning algorithms are well known for performance degradation on imbalanced training datasets. To mitigate this problem, many approaches have aimed to balance among given classes by re-weighting or re-sampling training samples. These re-balancing methods increase the impact of minority classes and reduce the influence of majority classes on the output of models. However, the extracted representations may be of poor quality owing to the limited number of minority samples. To handle this restriction, several methods have been developed that increase the representations of minority samples by leveraging the features of the majority samples. Despite extensive recent studies, no deep analysis has been conducted on determination of classes to be augmented and strength of augmentation has been conducted. In this study, we first investigate the correlation between the degree of augmentation and class-wise performance, and find that the proper degree of augmentation must be allocated for each class to mitigate class imbalance problems. Motivated by this finding, we propose a simple and efficient novel curriculum, which is designed to find the appropriate per-class strength of data augmentation, called CUDA: CUrriculum of Data Augmentation for long-tailed recognition. CUDA can simply be integrated into existing long-tailed recognition methods. We present the results of experiments showing that CUDA effectively achieves better generalization performance compared to the state-of-the-art method on various imbalanced datasets such as CIFAR-100-LT, ImageNet-LT, and iNaturalist 2018.
abstract_zh: 类不平衡问题在现实世界的任务中经常发生，而传统的深度学习算法因在不平衡训练数据集上的性能下降而闻名。为了缓解这个问题，许多方法旨在通过重新加权或重新采样训练样本来平衡给定类别。这些重新平衡方法增加了少数类别的影响并减少了多数类别对模型输出的影响。然而，由于少数样本数量有限，提取的表示质量可能很差。为了解决这一限制，人们开发了几种方法，通过利用多数样本的特征来增加少数样本的代表性。尽管最近进行了广泛的研究，但尚未对要增强的类别的确定和增强的强度进行深入分析。在本研究中，我们首先研究增强程度与类性能之间的相关性，并发现必须为每个类分配适当的增强程度以缓解类不平衡问题。受这一发现的启发，我们提出了一种简单而高效的新颖课程，旨在找到适当的每类数据增强强度，称为 CUDA：长尾识别数据增强课程。 CUDA 可以简单地集成到现有的长尾识别方法中。我们展示的实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，CUDA 在各种不平衡数据集（例如 CIFAR-100-LT、ImageNet-LT 和 iNaturalist 2018）上有效地实现了更好的泛化性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CUDA的数据增强课程方法，旨在解决长尾识别中的类别不平衡问题，通过为每个类别分配适当的增强强度来提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过重加权或重采样平衡类别，但未考虑不同类别对增强强度的需求，导致少数类表示质量不足，影响模型效果。
AI.method: CUDA设计了一种课程学习框架，根据类别性能动态调整数据增强强度，简单高效且可集成到现有长尾识别方法中。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100-LT、ImageNet-LT等数据集上，CUDA相比现有方法显著提升了泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: CUDA通过优化每个类别的增强强度分配，有效缓解了长尾分布下的类别不平衡问题，为数据增强策略提供了新思路。

search_text: CUDA: Curriculum of Data Augmentation for Long-Tailed Recognition CUDA：长尾识别数据增强课程 Class imbalance problems frequently occur in real-world tasks, and conventional deep learning algorithms are well known for performance degradation on imbalanced training datasets. To mitigate this problem, many approaches have aimed to balance among given classes by re-weighting or re-sampling training samples. These re-balancing methods increase the impact of minority classes and reduce the influence of majority classes on the output of models. However, the extracted representations may be of poor quality owing to the limited number of minority samples. To handle this restriction, several methods have been developed that increase the representations of minority samples by leveraging the features of the majority samples. Despite extensive recent studies, no deep analysis has been conducted on determination of classes to be augmented and strength of augmentation has been conducted. In this study, we first investigate the correlation between the degree of augmentation and class-wise performance, and find that the proper degree of augmentation must be allocated for each class to mitigate class imbalance problems. Motivated by this finding, we propose a simple and efficient novel curriculum, which is designed to find the appropriate per-class strength of data augmentation, called CUDA: CUrriculum of Data Augmentation for long-tailed recognition. CUDA can simply be integrated into existing long-tailed recognition methods. We present the results of experiments showing that CUDA effectively achieves better generalization performance compared to the state-of-the-art method on various imbalanced datasets such as CIFAR-100-LT, ImageNet-LT, and iNaturalist 2018. 类不平衡问题在现实世界的任务中经常发生，而传统的深度学习算法因在不平衡训练数据集上的性能下降而闻名。为了缓解这个问题，许多方法旨在通过重新加权或重新采样训练样本来平衡给定类别。这些重新平衡方法增加了少数类别的影响并减少了多数类别对模型输出的影响。然而，由于少数样本数量有限，提取的表示质量可能很差。为了解决这一限制，人们开发了几种方法，通过利用多数样本的特征来增加少数样本的代表性。尽管最近进行了广泛的研究，但尚未对要增强的类别的确定和增强的强度进行深入分析。在本研究中，我们首先研究增强程度与类性能之间的相关性，并发现必须为每个类分配适当的增强程度以缓解类不平衡问题。受这一发现的启发，我们提出了一种简单而高效的新颖课程，旨在找到适当的每类数据增强强度，称为 CUDA：长尾识别数据增强课程。 CUDA 可以简单地集成到现有的长尾识别方法中。我们展示的实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，CUDA 在各种不平衡数据集（例如 CIFAR-100-LT、ImageNet-LT 和 iNaturalist 2018）上有效地实现了更好的泛化性能。 本文提出了一种名为CUDA的数据增强课程方法，旨在解决长尾识别中的类别不平衡问题，通过为每个类别分配适当的增强强度来提升模型性能。 Sumyeong Ahn,Jongwoo Ko,Se-Young Yun cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Dina Bashkirova,Jose Lezama,Kihyuk Sohn,Kate Saenko,Irfan Essa
title: MaskSketch: Unpaired Structure-guided Masked Image Generation
title_zh: MaskSketch：不成对结构引导的掩模图像生成
abstract: Recent conditional image generation methods produce images of remarkable diversity, fidelity and realism. However, the majority of these methods allow conditioning only on labels or text prompts, which limits their level of control over the generation result. In this paper, we introduce MaskSketch, an image generation method that allows spatial conditioning of the generation result using a guiding sketch as an extra conditioning signal during sampling. MaskSketch utilizes a pre-trained masked generative transformer, requiring no model training or paired supervision, and works with input sketches of different levels of abstraction. We show that intermediate self-attention maps of a masked generative transformer encode important structural information of the input image, such as scene layout and object shape, and we propose a novel sampling method based on this observation to enable structure-guided generation. Our results show that MaskSketch achieves high image realism and fidelity to the guiding structure. Evaluated on standard benchmark datasets, MaskSketch outperforms state-of-the-art methods for sketch-to-image translation, as well as unpaired image-to-image translation approaches.
summary: Recent conditional image generation methods produce images of remarkable diversity, fidelity and realism. However, the majority of these methods allow conditioning only on labels or text prompts, which limits their level of control over the generation result. In this paper, we introduce MaskSketch, an image generation method that allows spatial conditioning of the generation result using a guiding sketch as an extra conditioning signal during sampling. MaskSketch utilizes a pre-trained masked generative transformer, requiring no model training or paired supervision, and works with input sketches of different levels of abstraction. We show that intermediate self-attention maps of a masked generative transformer encode important structural information of the input image, such as scene layout and object shape, and we propose a novel sampling method based on this observation to enable structure-guided generation. Our results show that MaskSketch achieves high image realism and fidelity to the guiding structure. Evaluated on standard benchmark datasets, MaskSketch outperforms state-of-the-art methods for sketch-to-image translation, as well as unpaired image-to-image translation approaches.
abstract_zh: 最近的条件图像生成方法产生的图像具有显着的多样性、保真度和真实感。然而，这些方法中的大多数只允许对标签或文本提示进行调节，这限制了它们对生成结果的控制级别。在本文中，我们介绍了 MaskSketch，这是一种图像生成方法，允许在采样期间使用引导草图作为额外的调节信号来对生成结果进行空间调节。 MaskSketch 利用预先训练的掩模生成变压器，不需要模型训练或配对监督，并可处理不同抽象级别的输入草图。我们展示了掩码生成变压器的中间自注意力图对输入图像的重要结构信息进行编码，例如场景布局和对象形状，并且我们提出了一种基于此观察的新颖采样方法，以实现结构引导生成。我们的结果表明，MaskSketch 实现了较高的图像真实度和引导结构的保真度。在标准基准数据集上进行评估，MaskSketch 的性能优于最先进的草图到图像转换方法以及不配对的图像到图像转换方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需配对数据的结构引导图像生成方法MaskSketch，通过草图作为额外条件信号实现空间控制。
AI.motivation: 现有条件图像生成方法依赖标签或文本提示，难以灵活控制生成结果的结构细节，需引入草图等结构信息增强控制能力。
AI.method: 基于预训练掩码生成变压器，利用其自注意力图编码的结构信息，设计新型采样方法实现草图引导的图像生成，无需模型训练和配对数据。
AI.result: 在标准数据集上优于现有草图到图像转换和未配对图像转换方法，生成图像具有高真实感和结构保真度。
AI.conclusion: MaskSketch通过有效利用结构信息实现了高质量的结构引导生成，为图像生成领域提供了新思路。
